Name: Sports Management Worldwide
Description: The vision of Sports Management Worldwide is to revolutionize the sports agent industry into one where agents, in addition to providing excellent representation, have a positive impact on the athletes they represent. SMWW works to achieve this goal in two ways: As a provider of sports management education, we strive to prepare a new generation of athlete representatives with knowledge, critical thinking, ethics, integrity, skills, and the passion to succeed. As a full functioning sports agency, we offer our clients an array of services from financial to contractual to personal consulting enabling them to more fully focus on their sport.

Name: UCPA
Description:
UCPA
Union nationale des Centres Sportifs de Plein Air


«45 ans de passion au service du sport et de la jeunesse »

L'UCPA est une association à but non lucratif de loi 1901 créée en 1965. C'est une union d'associations unique en France, composée uniquement de personnes morales. Elle est administrée par les pouvoirs publics, dont les ministères en charge de la Santé, de la Jeunesse, des Sports et de la Vie associative, les collectivités territoriales ainsi que par les grands mouvements de jeunesse et d'éducation populaire français, qui en assurent par alternance la présidence, et par les principales fédérations sportives de sports de plein air. L'association UCPA inscrit son projet humaniste, social et citoyen dans le prolongement du service public, et participe à la mise en œuvre des politiques publiques destinées à la jeunesse.

L'UCPA répond à trois missions, qui se déclinent en trois métiers, au service de l'ensemble des jeunes européens, âgés de 6 à 39 ans. 

L’UCPA en chiffres : 
45 années d’expérience 
Près de 80 activités sportives 
139 sites de pratique dont 21 à l’étranger 
Une trentaine de croisières proposées 
320 programmes itinérants 
Une présence dans plus de 70 pays 
220 000 stagiaires accueillis chaque année dont 87 000 mineurs 
Plus d’1 million d’heures de cours dispensé tous les ans dans le cadre des loisirs sportifs 
1 600 jeunes accueillis par an en formation professionnelle 
412 000 heures de formation dispensées par l’Institut de formation aux métiers de sport et de l’animation 
90 000 jeunes bénéficiaires d’actions de solidarité 
730 salariés permanents 
de 950 (aux mois de novembre) à 3 130 (aux mois d’août) salariés en CDD 
154 millions d’euros de chiffre d’affaires annuel 
Près de 9 millions de stagiaires accueillis depuis la création de l’UCPA

Name: London Sport
Description:
Physical inactivity is responsible for 1 in 6 premature deaths.

That's why London Sport wants all Londoners to live happier, healthier lives through being active. 

Our focus is on children and adults in the most deprived communities who face the greatest challenges of inequality.

Collaborating with those who share our vision, we can help every community in London find their way to move more.

Let's Move London.

Name: Sportz Village
Description: Sportz Village is India’s largest school sports organization that aims to create champions and win in life. Established in 2003, the organization’s philosophy is focused on improving the health and well-being of children by making sport an integral part of child’s education and development. Whether it’s through their pioneering structured sports and physical education (P.E) program, EduSports, their efforts to use sport for positive change in public schools, or their support for student-athletes, Sportz Village is committed to creating champions, both on and off the field. Additionally, Sportz Village serves as a strategic partner and advisor for sports education to organizations such as NSDC, CII, NITI Aayog, and various state governments. Their programs are currently benefiting over 300,000 children and youth from more than 500 private and public schools across 22 states in India, and have cumulatively touched the lives of more than 60 lakh children.

Name: Aqua-Tots Saudi Arabia
Description:
Teaching kids swimming skills to prevent drowning also to become safe and confident swimmer.

Name: ISD Dubai Sports City
Description:
ISD lies in the heart of Dubai Sports City, one of the most easily accessible locations from most of Dubai's residential hubs.

Our top-tier sports facility has brought both amateur and professional athletes from all over the city for nearly three years.

We cater to sports enthusiasts of all ages & levels, by providing top class venues to play, training programs, access to sports scientists, nutritionists, and
fitness facilities. We are also a gathering spot of choice for sports & entertainment fans to meet and enjoy live and streamed events.

Name: Wildster
Description:
** Wildster’s core product and IP were acquired by a private investor group in 2024 and continue to operate under a different brand. **

Wildster was a vertical marketplace for youth sports and activities, connecting families, verified coaches, and venues on a single, trusted platform. We streamlined discovery, booking, and payments so coaches could focus on training and families could focus on play.

Name: Game Theory
Description: Game Theory (a Techstars backed company) is "Gamifying" the experience of playing sports.

Name: Super Soccer Stars
Description:
Super Soccer Stars is the nation’s most popular soccer development program for early childhood, elementary, and middle school children. Since our inception in Fall 2000, Super Soccer Stars has been providing outstanding community-based soccer development instruction to children in over 1,000 schools, childcare centers, and facilities in New York Metropolitan Region, New Jersey, Connecticut, Boston, Los Angeles, San Diego, San Francisco, Miami, Chicago, Pennsylvania, Texas, Hawaii, and Washington, D.C. Super Soccer Stars currently operates 3,300 classes per week in over 1,200 locations for over 140,000 boys and girls ages 12 months to 18 years old annually.  

We also have 47 Travel Teams through Soccer Stars United, our advanced development and travel program, throughout New York, Los Angeles, Florida, and more in development. 

From the East to the West, to across the Atlantic, Super Soccer Stars is spreading soccer fun. Come kick with us!

The company also has over 3000 active pay-to-play customers across its locations.  A full-stack, sports solutions company, Push Sports is on a mission to empower individuals and educational institutions, world- class sports education programs with a vision to make India - a sporting superpower. 
Established in 2021, Push Sports is driven by a dynamic team of over 100 passionate sports lovers and is backed by leading investors from across the world - including Beyond Seed, Ah!Ventures, PokerBaazi and most recently, Piyush Bansal, Founder, Lenskart and Vineeta Singh, Co-Founder, Sugar Cosmetics in Shark Tank India Season 3.

Name: RiF010
Description:
RiF010 is er voor iedereen. Voor jong en oud, beginner, pro, en alles daar tussenin. Bij ons kun je je allereerste golf pakken, maar ook down-the-line surfen of de stad vanaf het water verkenning op een SUP of in de kano. Bijkomen na de waterpret? Dat doe je in de Surfbar & Kitchen! 

Samen surfen met je collega's? Ja zeker!
Je leert je collega’s namelijk nóg beter kennen door samen de golven te trotseren, of door samen op ontdekkingstocht te gaan met onze kano’s of sups. Het hele team komt aan zijn trekken; de sportievelingen kunnen extra activiteiten ondernemen en voor hen die het liever rustiger aan doen staat ons terras klaar!

Name: Urban Sports Club Nederland
Description:
Urban Sports Club Nederland (formerly OneFit) offers corporate fitness to companies of all sizes, including over 50 sports through our network of more than 1,000 partners across the Netherlands. Having corporate fitness as a company benefit boosts your team's physical and mental health, and helps having a more engaged and committed team. Contact us via our website for more information.

We form the largest platform in the European fitness industry. We give our members access to over 10,000 workout and wellness locations in the Netherlands, Germany, Spain, Portugal, France, Belgium, Austria and more to follow soon.

Name: PGA of Canada
Description: The PGA of Canada was established in 1911 and is the second oldest and third largest professional golf association in the world. The PGA of Canada is a non-profit Association comprised of 3,700 golf professionals across the country. The PGA of Canada develops, promotes, and supports members in living a better life and earning a better living. The Association consists of the National Office located in Acton, Ontario and nine Zone Offices across the country.

Name: SportCity
Description:
SportCity bestaat sinds 1995 en heeft meer dan 115 clubs door heel Nederland. We zijn een fijne plek in de buurt waar je op een ongedwongen manier met je gezondheid bezig kunt zijn. 
Wij geloven dat ieder mens blijer wordt van een beetje meer bewegen. En dat persoonlijke aandacht in een club voor en door mensen je helpt om jouw manier van sporten te ontdekken. Of je nu langskomt om je conditie te verbeteren of de slappe lach te krijgen tijdens een groepsles: bij ons is iedereen welkom.
Samen zoeken naar wat jou beweegt, is wat ons beweegt.

Name: Sport Three Sixty Academy
Description:
Sport 360 is a Dubai-based sports group specializing in high-performance racquet sports and integrated wellness solutions.

We operate Central Padel Dubai and Central Tennis Dubai, offering elite coaching, training programs, and community events for players of all levels — from recreational to professional.

Our centers also include a fully equipped wellness division, featuring a gym, recovery zone, physiotherapy, and sports massage therapy, designed to support performance, prevention, and well-being.

At Sport 360, we’re committed to delivering world-class racquet sports experiences backed by professional support and a culture of excellence.

Name: Athlete To Athlete

Athlete To Athlete is a fast growing sports-tech startup whose mission is to build the next generation of driven, confident, and resilient student-athletes through mentorship.  

"It Goes Beyond The Game"

Name: الاتحاد السعودي للثقافة الرياضية - Saudi Arabian Sport Culture Federation
Description:
نشأ الاتحاد السعودي للثقافة الرياضية بعد اعتماد الأمير عبد العزيز بن تركي الفيصل وزير الرياضة رئيس اللجنة الأولمبية العربية السعودية التشكيل الجديد لعدد من مجالس إدارات الاتحادات واللجان والروابط الرياضية السعودية للدورة الانتخابية 2021 - 2024. التي انعقدت بتاريخ 11/10/1442هـ ، الموافق يوم 23 مايو (أيار) 2021، ومن ضمنها تأسيس الاتحاد السعودي للثقافة الرياضية برئاسة الدكتور سليمان بن عمر الجلعود. ويأتي تأسيس الاتحاد في إطار تحقيق رؤية المملكة 2030 الرامية لتحقيق الإنجازات الرياضية وتعزيز صحة المجتمع من خلال الارتقاء بالثقافة الرياضية لكل فئاته برعاية وتنظيم الفاعليات التي تسهم في التحفيز على ممارسة الرياضة، لتحسين جودة الحياة وتحقيق التنمية الصحية المستدامة، ومواكبتها للتطورات العالمية في الثقافة الرياضية وتلبيتها للمتطلبات المحلية والإقليمية.

أهدافنا:
الإجادة والتميز في مجالات الثقافة الرياضية والبحوث العلمية وخدمة المجتمع الرياضي.
 تعزيز الهوية الوطنية في الرياضة من خلال تقديم الدعم اللازم والتسهيلات المناسبة للاتحادات والاندية الرياضية.
رفع الوعي الثقافي بمفهوم الرياضة وتاريخها وأهميتها في المجتمعات الاخرى، وتحقيق الجودة الشاملة في تقديم الدورات وورش العمل والبحث العلمي كماً وكيفاً.
عقد الشراكات مع القطاعين العام والخاص بما يحقق الاستدامة في أنشطة الاتحاد.
تثقيف وتشجيع فئات المجتمع على ممارسة الرياضة الترويحية والتنافسية والأنشطة البدنية المعززة للصحة.
تنويع مصادر التمويل الذاتي بالاتحاد.
تعزيز نظام الحوكمة ومبدأ الشفافية والنزاهة، بناء تنظيم إداري داعم للتطوير والجودة
محو الأمية الرياضية والقضاء على النظرة السلبية نحو ممارسة الرياضة، والنهوض بالألعاب الرياضية المختلفة.
تنمية وتطوير قدرات المدربين واللاعبين والإداريين والحكام والقيادات الرياضية والكوادر البشرية بالاتحادات والاندية الرياضية والمجتمع بشكل عام

Description:
Welcome to Eversports! 

Our vision is simple: Make sports happen – anytime, anywhere! 

We offer three main products to bring this to life:
- Management Software: Streamlining admin work for sports providers with booking, payments, and more.
- App & Booking Platform: A seamless solution for sports enthusiasts to discover, book, and enjoy activities like tennis , yoga , and fitness .

Name: Paddle UK
Description: The national governing body for paddlesports in the UK. Formerly British Canoeing, we proudly represent all forms of paddlesport across the UK.

Name: TENVIC
Description:
At TENVIC, we believe that sport can make THE difference - a difference for various people & to numerous aspects of our lives. We are on a mission to take sport beyond the field into schools, boardrooms & the everyday lives of people. In 2020 TENVIC was awarded "The Best Company Promoting Sports" by FICCI. 

TENVIC has three core businesses:

Grassroots Sport – A pioneering structured approach to sport training in schools and other communities

Lessons from Sport – Leadership development programs for business organizations; life skills and behavioral competency training for sportspeople

Branding and Sport – Leveraging the power of sport to build brands and engage with a diverse set of consumers.

Name: Grounds Management Association
Description:
Established since 1934, the Grounds Management Association's purpose is to develop and raise the profile of the profession, give a voice to our membership and to offer the highest quality training, support and advice to those working in the industry.

Today's groundsperson is a highly skilled professional who is fully versed in every aspect of their job. The GMA is the leading organisation that represents not only these professionals, but all those involved in green keeping, horticulture, landscaping, turf culture and amenity management. We have both individual and associate members and corporate membership for  suppliers of machinery, equipment, seed, fertilisers, technical and consultancy services and contractors involved in the professional business of turf management.

We are the only all-encompassing organisation for all those with a practical or commercial interest in the multi-million pound industry of sports, leisure, landscaping and amenity management. 

We encourage you to join the Institute that truly represents your interests, your career, your company, your industry.

Name: Vasaloppet
Description:
TRADITION - UPPLEVELSE - UTMANING
Vasaloppet är en ideell verksamhet som ägs av IFK Mora och Sälens IF. En motor för folkhälsa och föreningsliv.

Vasaloppet är världens äldsta och största långlopp på skidor. Första loppet arrangerades 1922 och den klassiska 90 km långa sträckan mellan Berga by i Sälen till Mora var länge det enda loppet. I dag finns tjugotalet olika lopp inom disciplinerna cykling, löpning och längdskidåkning som årligen lockar omkring 100 000 anmälda deltagare. Alla lopp går längs den historiska sträckan mellan Sälen och Mora.

I Vasaloppsföreningen Sälen-Mora arbetar cirka 35 helårsanställda med att planera, förbereda och utveckla årets olika arrangemang.

All-Star offers both individual and team training at all our locations for players 5 to 18 years of age. All-Star has grown from a single facility to six different locations in Chester, Delaware, Montgomery, and Bucks counties of PA, as well as Cherry Hill, NJ.

Name: BigHit Sportz
Description:
BigHit Sportz is a sports app designed for the entirety of the sporting community. It’s an online player discovery and fan engagement platform. BigHit Sportz endeavours to bridge the enduring gap between potential Indian sports talent and accessible opportunities. The app aims to offer the extremely talented sports people of India an opportunity, a platform to showcase their talent and reach out to the masses. 
Not only players but also coaches, clubs/federations and supporters can benefit from the app. Where players can showcase their talent and get discovered, coaches can share their expertise, locate and groom the right talent; federations can promote their sport and supporters can consume exclusive sports content, be a part of a players’ journey and interact with other like-minded fans. BigHit Sportz is a one-stop solution for everyone and everything in sports!
We have partnered with 20+ national sporting federations. Also, we’ve introduced our mission and core concept of BigHit Sportz to world-renowned personalities like Khelo India officials, Shri Anurag Singh Thakur and Dr. Pramod Sawant. In pursuit of bringing international standards of football in India, we are working in close relationship with various European football leagues and clubs.

To sum it up, BigHit Sportz is an app - social media for sports - working towards spotting promising players in the country & revolutionising Indian sports

Download the BigHit App now: https://s.bighit.fans/naxz

Name: Plas y Brenin
Description:
Welcome to Plas y Brenin, where we offer a comprehensive range of training and assessment courses in various outdoor disciplines. Our programs cover rock climbing, hill walking, scrambling, mountaineering, kayaking, canoeing, mountain biking, first aid, remote working, and safe working at height.
What sets Plas y Brenin apart is our commitment to providing outdoor sports training that not only hones your skills but also helps you realise your ambitions. Our team comprises some of the most experienced, dedicated, and competent outdoor professionals in the field. Their unique talents contribute to making every visit to Plas y Brenin a special and enriching experience.
Whether you're seeking a residential course, an update on weather and climbing conditions, a relaxed bar meal coupled with engaging conversation, or a qualification to enhance your professional journey, you'll find it all here at the National Outdoor Centre.
Plas y Brenin operates under the management of the Mountain Training Trust (MTT), a registered charity established by the British Mountaineering Council, Mountain Training UK, and Mountain Training England. This ensures that the centre is overseen by organisations deeply committed to promoting safe and effective outdoor training.
Step into the vibrant world of Plas y Brenin, where the outdoors come alive, and our courses are crafted to both warm your spirit and fuel your passion for adventure. Unlock the doors to the outdoors with Plas y Brenin, where we are dedicated to empowering and equipping you for both your outdoor escapades and professional endeavours.

Name: EPIX Sports
Description:
At EPIX Sports, we are on a mission to move people by creating category-defining sports experiences. 

We work hand-in-hand with founders of local sports operators and scale them into European brands that inspire. From padel, pickle, bouldering, reformer to urban dance and many more, our goal is to make unique sports experiences accessible for athletes everywhere. 

Because in the end, it’s these very experiences that connect us. We move people.

Name: TeamScore (Glorifying God Through Sports)
Description:
It’s a horrible example for our children.

Parents berating coaches because their child isn’t getting enough playing time.

Adults cursing officials because they disagree with a call.

People getting physical with one another after tempers flare.

Our youth, the future generation of business leaders, spouses, and parents, are witnessing this in the formative years of their lives.

What lessons are they learning?

In a world full of anger and division, how can we expect to break this cycle unless our attitudes change?

There is hope, however: sportsmanship.

In an oftentimes dark world, sportsmanship is a ray of sunshine that can thaw the icy relations between people and warm hearts up to empathy and compassion.

Plus, sportsmanship has Biblical roots.  Refer to Proverbs 24:17-18.  As Christians, this is something that we are called by our Heavenly Father to make a priority.

As a busy leader, however, where will you find the time?  

Between running your school, leading your staff, teaching your students, and coaching your players, coming up with content to inspire your stakeholders with the principles of this vitally important topic can be difficult.

This is why I founded TeamScore.

My vocation is to partner with schools such as yours to ensure that the youth of today are instilled with the values of Christ-centric sportsmanship to ensure a generation of selfless, moral people.

Whether is be via public speaking or coaching services, my proprietary content ensures that all five pillars of the youth sports universe are adhering to these values: Parents, Coaches, Officials, Athletes, and Fans.

Imagine your athletes going out of their way to care for one another.

Imagine your parents constantly modeling behavior that you’d be proud of.

With TeamScore, not only is this possible, it’s probable, and it’d be an honor to minister to your stakeholders in this manner.

To learn more, please visit: https://billgosse.com/

When sportsmanship exists, we all score.

Name: Sally Little Golf
Description:
What seems like a lifetime ago, I left my homeland to pursue the dream of competing as a professional golfer on the world stage.  My dream came true. The journey took me around the world, and throughout I enjoyed the commitment, the pursuit of my passion, and the successes I had along the way.

Though I have been “global” for many years, my roots are in South Africa. I will always have a love for the competitive game, but the passion I have for my homeland became a powerful calling.

My greatest desire is to give back to the country that gave me wings, and to pursue my passions through the game I love:

To see South African professional women golfers achieve their rightful place.

To help South African business women understand the value that golf brings to them as a business tool…like the men have known forever!

To inspire our youth through the Sally Little Golf Trust, dedicated to educating and empowering the previously disadvantaged, with an emphasis on young women, through the game of golf.

With the endorsement of the Honourable Patricia de Lille, the City of Cape Town and the Parliamentary Sport and Recreational Council, we look forward to making a difference in many young lives.

Please join me, Sally Little, and together we can achieve great things!

Name: Children's Sailing Trust
Description:
We need your support!

How we make a difference
Young people of all abilities gain a huge boost in confidence from taking part in sailing and water sports. It's a transformative experience that starts them on the road to independence and achievement. 

What we do
We work directly with schools, Home Ed and SEND groups, which means that our activities are accessible to children from all backgrounds. Schools contribute a small percentage of the actual cost of lessons and the Trust fundraises for the shortfall from grants and donations.

Our activities are geared to each young person's ability: whether that is learning to sail or race single-handed, kayaking or rowing on the water. We stretch and encourage all the children that come to us. In recent years we have built relationships with schools for young people with special educational needs and disabilities and have seen from the smiles on the children's faces, the incredible difference that being outdoors on the water makes.

How you can support us
We are growing! We have created a national centre of excellence for water sports at Trevassack Lake on the Lizard Peninsula, enabling us to provide even more activities adapted for young people with additional needs and disabilities. 

We need your support to carry on giving valuable, life-changing experiences for the children taking part. To donate, see https://childrenssailingtrust.org.uk/donate/ or phone 01326 702326.

TAC is home to multiple Olympians, National Champions, World Champions, and other professional athletes in pursuit of excellence.

Our facility features an outdoor 50-meter pool, an indoor 50-meter competition pool, a 10-lane 25-yard pool, a warm water instructional pool, state-of-the-art fitness center, kitchen, meeting spaces, and more.

Due to our prime location and quality facility, TAC was selected as host of the domestic training site for the U.S. Olympic Swim Team in preparation for the 2024 Paris Olympics.

Name: Tactical Dynamics Nederland
Description:
Stap binnen in een wereld van kracht, zelfvertrouwen en veiligheid! 

Welkom bij Tactical Dynamics, dé toonaangevende expert in Krav Maga en weerbaarheidstrainingen voor specifieke doelgroepen. Of je nu een man of vrouw bent die zich zelfverzekerder wil voelen in het dagelijkse leven, een ouder die zijn kinderen wil beschermen, of een professional die zich wil wapenen tegen mogelijke gevaren op het werk, wij hebben de perfecte training voor jou.

Onze gespecialiseerde instructeurs begrijpen de unieke uitdagingen waarmee verschillende doelgroepen worden geconfronteerd en passen onze trainingen daarop aan. We bieden op maat gemaakte programma's voor vrouwen, kinderen, senioren, en professionals uit verschillende vakgebieden, zodat iedereen de vaardigheden kan ontwikkelen om zichzelf te verdedigen en weerbaarder te worden.

Ontdek hoe je jezelf kunt beschermen met Krav Maga, de beproefde zelfverdedigingstechniek die wereldwijd wordt gebruikt door militairen en wetshandhavers. Naast deze specifieke doelgroepen verzorgen wij ook op maat gemaakte trainingen voor zorgmedewerkers en hulpverleners. Daarnaast kun je bij ons ook terecht voor Fightclass, prive training en Krav Maga bedrijfsfitness. Leer hoe je situaties kunt herkennen, vermijden en omgaan met potentieel gevaarlijke situaties. Onze trainingen zijn niet alleen fysiek uitdagend, maar ook gericht op het vergroten van mentale veerkracht, zelfdisicpline en zelfvertrouwen.

Bij ons staat veiligheid voorop, en we creëren een ondersteunende omgeving waarin iedereen zich op zijn gemak voelt om te groeien en zijn of haar grenzen te verleggen. 

Voor meer informatie: 
info@tacticaldynamics.nl 

Of bel:
Chris Meijers 
06 4114 85 88

100% Resultaatsgarantie met de SportMed methodiek

Naast de beweeglessen voor particulieren bieden wij ook specifieke coachings-trajecten aan voor bedrijven en bedrijfsleiders. 

Dit om de sfeer in het bedrijf, de bedrijfsgeest en productiviteit van de werknemers te verhogen. Daarnaast verlagen we het ziekteverzuim wat zonder meer alvast een geweldige ROI genereerd. 

Contacteer ons voor een vrijblijvende call en ontdek wat BeweegCoach voor u en uw bedrijf kan betekenen.

Name: Himalayan Mountaineering Institute
Description:
The Himalayan Mountaineering Institute (HMI) is one of the premier mountaineering institutes in the world. Founded on November 4th, 1954 by Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru, the first Prime Minister of India, the institute is located in the picturesque hill station of Darjeeling.

Darjeeling is also the hometown of Sherpa Tenzing Norgay, the first human to set foot on the highest peak of Mount Everest along with Sir Edmund Hillary. And it was in HMI that Tenzing spent most of his post-Everest ascent period as Director of Field Training. HMI is now a prominent landmark of Darjeeling and a Centre of tourist attraction, it commands a magnificent view of Mount Kanchenjunga, the third-highest peak in the world.

In more than 62 years of its existence, the Institute has trained more than 45,000 thousand students including 2,500 from different foreign countries. The prestigious Course completion certificate from HMI is a prized possession of any trainee, which is given due recognition all over the world.

HMI boasts of a lineage of very illustrious luminaries. Tenzing Norgay was associated with HMI as its Director of Field Training from June 1954 to May 1976. He was then appointed Advisor in May 1976 and was the guiding spirit to the Institute till his death in May 1986. Nawang Gombu, who became the first man to climb Mt. Everest twice was an instructor at HMI since its inception in 1954.

Name: Respira Global Inc.
Description:
Respira Global Inc. is the exclusive North American distributor of HypoxBreath Advanced, a European Union Class IIa certified medical device delivering precision-guided Intermittent Hypoxia-Hyperoxia Therapy (IHHT). We support the integration of advanced breath training into wellness, clinical, and performance environments across North America.

Developed and regulated in the EU, HypoxBreath is engineered to facilitate adaptive respiratory patterns using alternating oxygen protocols, real-time heart rate variability (HRV) biofeedback, and automated safety thresholds. It is utilized globally in applications focused on stress modulation, recovery, and physical resilience.

Respira Global does not make specific therapeutic or medical claims and adheres to applicable regulatory frameworks in the United States. Our role is to provide access to sophisticated, non-invasive technology that supports professionals operating within their own scopes of practice.

We serve healthcare practitioners, performance specialists, and wellness providers seeking to incorporate structured respiratory training systems rooted in biofeedback, individualized protocols, and emerging physiological science.

Most clinics hesitate at the same three questions:

“How do we integrate this into our workflow?”

“Will my clients really pay for this?”

“Are we too small to make it work?”

Here’s what we’ve learned from clinics using Respira across Europe:

*Implementation doesn’t need to be technical. We guide you step-by-step, from setup to first client use. No special tech team required.

*Clients don’t resist the price when they understand the outcome. We give you language, positioning, and real case stories you can use to introduce Respira with confidence.

*Smaller clinics often get the biggest results. The impact of regulation, breath support, and nervous system recalibration is visible from the first few clients. We help you prove value early.

We work with you, not just sell to you.

Name: PEDALAS.RO
Description:
Nevoia de a face sport a oamenilor care au foarte puțin timp, nevoia de siguranță în context pandemic, dar și aceea de intimitate și economie de resurse, sunt acum acoperite de conceptul Pedalas.ro - platformă cu antrenamente de indoor cycling online.
Pedalas.ro reprezintă deci alternativa de a face mișcare din confortul propriului spațiu (casă, curte, birou etc), care a devenit preferată de acea categorie de oameni care au nevoie de sport în viețile lor, însă cel puțin din motivele de mai sus, evită să meargă la sală.
Sigur că, fiind vorba de ciclism de interior, practicat pe biciclete staționare, este nevoie să ai o bicicletă la dispoziție.
Există trei posibilități: 
1. ai deja o bicicletă
2. îți cumperi o bicicletă sau 
3. alegi unul dintre pachetele Pedalas.ro, care include bicicleta necesară.
Dacă te întrebi de ce ai alege să plătești un membership Pedalas.ro, când ai putea pedala singur/ă, răspunsul este: 
Pedalând alături de noi în comunitatea Pedalas, te voi asista, consilia și ajuta să măsori și să îți îndeplinești obiective precum:
1. combaterea efectelor nocive ale unei vieți sedentare (hernii lombare / cervicale, ameliorarea valorilor glicemiei, colesterolului, trigliceridelor etc și evitarea apariției bolilor cardiovasculare)
2. ținerea greutății sub control și echilibrarea compoziției corporale (% grăsime versus % masă musculară)
3. tonifierea musculaturii, îmbunătățirea esteticii și redefinirea corporală
4. creșterea rezistenței la efort, cu beneficii directe asupra sănătății inimii, plămânilor, precum și asupra tuturor sistemelor corpului (imunitar, cardio-vascular, respirator, osteo-scheletal etc)
5. îmbunătățirea echilibrului, a stabilității și a densității osoase
6. reducerea stresului cotidian, prin obținerea unei stări generale mai bune, asigurate de hormonii eliberați în timpul antrenamentelor
7. îmbunătățirea concentrării și a încrederii / stimei de sine.

Description:
At ForeFront Football, we transform football through methodology and training.

Our vision is built on over 10 seasons of experience with FC Barcelona as Coaches, Academy Coordinators, and Members of the Methodology Department. This journey has provided us with a deep understanding of organizing sports departments, designing innovative methodologies, and fostering the comprehensive development of players and teams.

Advisory Services for Clubs and Federations:
We enhance the identity of each institution to make it recognizable and outstanding. We establish methodology departments based on a comprehensive approach that includes:
Preserving the values and philosophy of the organization.
Establishing a coherent and recognizable playing style.
Improving the pedagogical exchange between coaches and players.
Creating tailored training environments.
Enhancing players' potential through personalized profiles.
Optimizing coaches’ reporting processes.
Advising on the implementation of technological tools.
Designing training programs for coaches.
Efficiently coordinating the club’s departments.
Promoting innovation and research.
Advisory Services for Coaches and Players:
For coaches, we offer detailed analyses of their pedagogical approach and practical implementation of their playing style, specializing in the Positional Play model.
For players, we provide personalized training plans based on the analysis of their match performance and emotional decision-making. We propose technical, tactical, and emotional improvements to optimize their performance and highlight their strengths.

Online Training Program:
With an innovative design, our training program encompasses three key dimensions: the playing style, the player, and the pedagogical exchange. From this interaction emerges the ForeFront coach, equipped to lead with excellence.

Description:
Welcome to Michael Phelps Swimming.

Michael Phelps is passionate about growing the sport of swimming and getting more children in the water. As a child, he learned to swim in a school in North Baltimore, called North Baltimore Swim School. It was there that he learned water safety and overcame his fear of water. Now, after many accomplishments, both in and out of the water, he is able to invest in the very program that taught him. A program he fully supports and believes in. This swim school gives Michael a direct opportunity to reach his personal goals for the sport, while giving back to the community.

Highlights Of The Program Founded nearly 30 years ago by Cathy Lears Bennett, current program director.
Michael Phelps was a student in the early 90’s.
Awarded “Best Of Baltimore” 3 times since 2002.
Have instructed nearly 30,000 people of all ages and abilities, since inception.
Have consistently instructed 1,500+ unique participants per year since 2004.
The original Meadowbrook site operates an 50+ hours of instruction per week

This swim school has a proven track record of success, built from focusing on the participant and their individual needs. Recognizing that everyone is different, and has different “goals” in the water, is a fundamental principle of our program. This personal touch and attention, that each participant receives, is something that we will continue to make a top priority with each new site. This is the core of what makes us different from other swim instruction programs, in addition to our number of class offerings, our different levels of instruction, our staff, and the level of service we provide. MPS takes pride in providing it’s participants with the level of instruction they desire, at times that fit there schedule, from instructors they trust, under a brand they love.

Description:
Toronto Motorsports Park (TMP), located outside of Cayuga has been the home of drag racing in Canada since 1954. Known as Canadas premier motorsports and recreation facility TMP is 75 minutes south of Toronto and features a diverse facility across its 400 acre property which includes; a challenging and versatile three kilometer road course and a NHRA sanctioned quarter mile drag strip.

TMP offers a wide variety of programs for all motorsport enthusiasts including the F2000 Driving Experience, Exotic Dream Car Experience and Drag Racing Experience. These are in addition to the more frequent events such as Test and Tune, Open Car Lapping, and Motorcycle Lapping. TMP also holds their signature drag racing event, the Canadian Nitro Nationals which are held on Canada Day weekend annually. This event  features Jet Dragsters, Nitro Funny Cars, Top Fuel Dragsters, Fireworks, Camping, and live Music.

For tickets, more information or to book a motorsport experience call: 1-866-824-7223, 905-772-0303 or visit our online store at https://torontomotorsportspark.com/shop

Name: Boxing Company
Description:
Tactisch inzicht, teambuilding, doorzettingsvermogen, durf, doelgerichtheid en het vermogen om grenzen te blijven verleggen met als doel het beste uit jezelf te halen. Dit zijn de persoonlijke pijlers die de basis hebben gelegd voor de Boxing Company. Founders Bart Voet en Rudy van Laere weten als oudgedienden van de elite-eenheid van de Luchtmobiele Brigade namelijk als geen ander hoe je barrières moet doorbreken om je doelen te kunnen bereiken.

Met deze instelling startten zij eind 2014 op veler verzoek van moeders aan het schoolplein met een laagdrempelige, leuke en intensieve workout in een gymzaal te Oud-Beijerland en Tiel. Boksen, één van de meest uitdagende en steeds populairder wordende trainingsmethoden, werd het middel om de vrouwen fitter te maken. Al snel kreeg het beestje een naam en was Pink Boxing een feit. Bijna net zo snel konden beide mannen hun baan bij Defensie opzeggen, want het sloeg aan! De dames waren zodanig enthousiast dat zij thuis vertelde over de Pink Boxing lessen. Dit maakte mannen geïnteresseerd en dat was de eerste aanzet tot Cross Boxing, een vergelijkbare maar next level workout voor zowel mannen als vrouwen. De groei bleef aan waardoor Bart en Rudy een eigen Boxing Company en (hoofd)kantoor konden openen in Oud-Beijerland.

Boksen moest voor iedereen worden. Dit is gestart met de innovatieve producten Pink Boxing en Cross Boxing waarbij boksen toegankelijk werd gemaakt voor het brede publiek. Dit breidde al snel uit met een compleet arsenaal aan groepslessen en maatwerkprogramma’s. De basis van een sterke franchiseformule was geboren. Fitnessprofessionals kunnen profiteren van een all-in franchiseconcept dat binnen no-time is uitgegroeid tot een grote ‘boxing community’.

Wij zijn Sjouke en Jens, afgestudeerd als social workers met een passie voor sport. Na jarenlange ervaring in de jeugdzorg, het onderwijs en verslavingszorg, hebben we gemerkt dat sport vaak onderbelicht blijft in de gehele zorg- en welzijnssector, terwijl het juist goed kan aansluiten bij bepaalde behoeften. Met meer dan 10 jaar ervaring in kracht- en vechtsport, willen we onze kennis combineren en delen door middel van onze unieke trainingsprogramma's. Ons doel is om sport te integreren in het welzijn en de zorg, en zo een positieve impact te creëren.

Wij streven ernaar om sporttrainingen te introduceren voor een breed scala aan doelgroepen binnen de zorg- en welzijnssector. Gebaseerd op onze ervaringen in de zorg, hebben we een module ontwikkeld die geschikt is voor vrijwel alle organisaties en instellingen binnen deze sector. Mocht de module niet passend zijn voor een specifieke doelgroep, dan kunnen wij een op maat gemaakt aanbod verzorgen. Wij vinden het belangrijk om met onze klanten samen te werken en te brainstormen over een passende oplossing.

Zorg en Sport is een flexibele organisatie die op locatie naar keuze werkt. Onze trainingen kunnen zowel binnen als buiten worden gegeven, afhankelijk van de voorkeur van onze klanten. Bij elke training die wij organiseren, zorgen wij voor alle benodigde materialen.

Name: VML : de Nederlandse Vereniging van Lesgevers Sport en Bewegen 55 plus
Description: De Nederlandse Vereniging van Lesgevers Sport en Bewegen 55 plus (VML) is in 1996 als Nederlandse Vereniging van MBvO-Leid(st)ers begonnen. VML is uitgegroeid tot een vereniging voor lesgevers in sport en beweging. Zij ondersteunt vakbekwaamheid, vak ontwikkeling, vakkennis en rechtspositie.

Name: Ze Racing Driving
Description:
Ze Racing Driving est une école de pilotage basée à Lohéac et faisant évoluer les pilotes sur différents circuits de France.

 Professionnels, amateurs ou débutants, chacun trouve sa place chez Ze Racing Driving grâce à un coaching personnalisé.

 Ze Racing Driving, c'est avant tout une histoire de passionnés. Aujourd'hui, l'école prend un nouveau virage en développant sa structure.

 Ze Racing Driving utilise la méthode des pros pour les besoins de progression du pilote : 
 Un instructeur diplômé d'état à ses côtés,
 Des systèmes de données et caméras embarqués,
 Un débriefing entre chaque session avec un ingénieur piste analysant les données sur écran,
 Un mécanicien spécialiste de la compétition automobile prêt à intervenir, 

 Le tout en toute sécurité.

Et toujours: une bonne ambiance, un réceptif pour se requinquer tout au long de la journée  

A chacun son style : coaching personnalisé, stage asphalte, stage “glisse and fun” 
 Plaisir et progression garantis

Name: ZERO
Description:
ERO biedt jongeren ruimte tot zelfontwikkeling door middel van freerunning en fun.

Bij ZERO zien we sport en beweging als essentieel voor de ontwikkeling van een gezonde levensstijl. Steeds minder jongeren doen aan een sport. Als je het ons vraagt, moet dat veranderen. Een sportende maatschappij is een sterke maatschappij!

Name: Impact Football Company
Description: Impact FC offers individual performance coaching for professional football players. With innovative video- and data analysis combined with one-on-one coaching, Impact helps footballers maximize their positive impact on the game.

Name: Uniball Bcn
Description:
UniBall Bcn is Barcelona’s leading university sports community, bringing together exchange students, university athletes, and local players through competitive inter-university football leagues, basketball, volleyball, and more.

Play in structured 7v7 & 5v5 leagues with live stats, professional referees, and high-level competition.Join 70+ nationalities competing in Barcelona’s best student football championship.

Perfect for university students, private university athletes, and exchange students looking to stay active, meet new people, and balance sports with academics.

Beyond the pitch, we host sports industry networking events, where experts discuss sports marketing, sponsorship, and the globalization of football, providing students with valuable insights into the evolving sports business landscape.

Name: Khelbei Bangladesh
Description:
A digital platform that promotes sports academies and venues, connects amateur and pro athletes to businesses, and revolutionises Bangladesh’s sports talent management sector. We believe age, social background, geographic location should not be a barrier to participate in sports. For nation's well being it is an imperative to create opportunities for people to participate it sports, not only professionally but for pleasure as well.

khelbeibangladesh.com is a one one stop solution for every sports needs and queries.

Name: Ultimate Hoops, Inc.
Description:
Found in over 125 Life Time clubs around the nation, Ultimate Hoops features official-sized hardwood courts and basketball games, leagues, clinics and camps for all levels. 

For kids:
We have top-level camps, clinics and classes running every week — featuring trainers with high-level experience as both players and coaches — as well as an all-day, double elimination tournaments in both 3-on-3 and 5-on-5 formats. 

For adults:
We have the largest recreational league in the nation featuring different tiers for all skill levels and all ages, recorded stats and championship banners. 

For the pros:
Whether it’s summer pickup games, league play or in our national tournaments, we have both former and current professional athletes playing on our courts.

We love this game, and because we believe anyone can play, we hope everyone will. Whether that’s at Life Time or in your driveway. In a 40+ league or as a starter for varsity. For fun or for competition. We only ask one thing:

Keep Playing. Never Retire.

Name: To The TOP!
Description:
To The TOP!

We represent and managing coaches and professional footballers

Name: Kaelin Training
Description:
Wir sind spezialisiert auf Personal Training und insbesondere auf Fussball Trainings und Fussball Camps. Unser Team besteht aus ehemaligen Spitzenfussballer:innen, die ihre Erfahrung & ihr Wissen im Bereich Fussball, Ernährung und Personal Training weitergeben. 

:: Sport Camps 
:: Personal Training 
:: Fussball Training

Name: Arkansas Global Cycling Accelerator
Description:
The Arkansas Global Cycling Accelerator (AGCA) is a program for pre-Series A startups building innovative cycling components and tech-enabled cycling solutions. Based in Bentonville, Arkansas, the program will connect program participants with industry mentors, networks, and resources to help scale growth during Spring 2026.

Questions? Email AGCA staff at amy@cyclingaccelerator.com or martial@cyclingaccelerator.com.

Name: Xavier Golf Academy
Description:
De Xavier Golf Academy is sinds 1 mei 2024 de nieuwe golfschool op Golfbaan Hitland. 
De Xavier Golf Academy werkt met gepassioneerde professionals. Playing Professionals, Teaching Professionals en specialistische coaches. 
Naast een breed aanbod aan lessen, cursussen en clinics helpt de Xavier Golf Academy ook mee aan verbeteringen op de Golfbaan. Daarnaast richt het zich ook op de organisatie van events. 
Samen met alle partners: het Recreatieschap, de Golfclub en Hit Eten & Drinken proberen we elke golfer een fantastische dag te bezorgen.

Name: Workit
Description: Vitaliteit is een thema waar jij je graag mee bezig houdt. En terecht! Fitte medewerkers zijn mentaal en fysiek sterk. Jij weet als geen ander welke positieve effecten dat heeft op de werkvloer. Win-Win! Met Workit krijg jij mensen in beweging. Jouw collega's kiezen zelf waar en wanneer zij willen sporten. Lekker flexibel!

Name: Durham Cricket Foundation
Description:
Durham Cricket Foundation is the official charity of Durham Cricket.

We are a sport-for-good charity using the power of cricket to improve the health and wellbeing of people in our communities. We work to get a bat and ball into more hands and through introducing more people to the power of cricket, we use the game as a vehicle for social and personal outcomes.

Name: The Gift of Soccer Foundation
Description:
The Gift of Soccer Foundation was established in 2010 by Ken and Margie Levandoski to provide underprivileged players in their local community with the essential equipment needed to play soccer. The founders were astonished by the amount of excellent equipment that was quickly outgrown or set aside and simply getting lost. Recognizing this waste, they saw an opportunity to repurpose these items and make a positive impact. 

Over time, the need and opportunities to reach children worldwide grew rapidly. Since its inception, The Gift of Soccer Foundation has completed 42 donations to 25 countries, donated over 62,500 pieces of gear collected from various organizations, families, and corporate sponsors. Additionally, the foundation has had the honor of assisting many established and grassroots organizations with vital business structural consulting, enhancing their ability to serve their communities effectively.

At The Gift of Soccer Foundation, our mission is to empower underprivileged youth around the world through the beautiful game of soccer. By collecting and repurposing gently used soccer equipment, we provide children in need with the resources to learn, play, and grow both on and off the field. Our vision is to create a global community where every child, regardless of their background, has the opportunity to experience the joy and benefits of soccer. We believe in the power of sport to bring people together, foster teamwork, build brighter futures, and sharing joy. 

Join us in making a difference!

Name: Sportland Senegal
Description: Dans un Sénégal où les espaces de loisirs manquent, chacun s'enferme chez soi ne sachant comment occuper son temps libre. Sportland permet de réunir enfants et parents dans un endroit convivial et ludique autour du sport loisir. Ici on partage les valeurs sportives, défis, challenges et combativité dans un esprit "fun and Joy" pour vivre et faire vivre le sport en s'amusant.

Name: Gymnasium Cyprus
Description:
Gymnasium is not just a sports club; It is the most modern and innovative sports and development project. The Gymnasium program combines training in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (BJJ), emotional intelligence and physical education for children.

Our specially made training program is based on a combination of the development of emotional intelligence and sports where children receive knowledge and necessary skills in a playful way.

The combination of martial arts and the development of emotional intelligence, in aggregate guarantees successful personal development and the progression of key character traits such as discipline, the will to win, the ability to withstand falls with dignity and set goals in order to achieve them.

info@gymnasium.com.cy

Name: 1Wall UK (formerly UK Wallball)
Description:
1Wall UK is the National Governing Body for the accessible, fast-paced sport of 1Wall Handball aka Wallball in the UK. With just a wall and a ball, we create opportunities for people of all backgrounds to get active, build community, and thrive. We are also a Registered Charity in England and Wales. 

We work in schools, prisons, parks and public spaces to make sport truly inclusive — especially in underserved communities. Our work spans coaching, court installations, research, international collaboration, and youth leadership development.

Backed by global partners and inspired by street sport culture from New York to Mexico City, 1Wall UK is leading a movement where anyone, anywhere can play.
We're always looking for new volunteers, partners and funders.

Name: The Reckoning Sports Tourism Podcast
Description:
The Reckoning Sports Tourism Podcast is an edgy, unadulterated behind-the-scenes look at sports tourism in the Southeast. 

Join Don and Zack twice per month as they share drinks with the biggest and brightest in sports tourism and discuss everything from life-changing concerts and events to pickle ball courts.

Name: TopSpin Sports
Description: A truly grassroots enterprise led by a team of experts with extensive health and sporting knowledge. Topspin Sports Centre, the foundation of the business, has state of the art facilities including 10 padel courts, 7 tennis courts, a pro shop and cafe.

Name: Proyecto En JueGo
Description: Proyecto En JueGo es una iniciativa social deportiva apoyada por el Programa de Jóvenes Líderes del Comité Olímpico Internacional que tiene el foco puesto en utilizar al deporte como un vehículo para la educación, inclusión y desarrollo. En la búsqueda de que todos/as puedan ser los capitanes de su propio barco, se trabaja con niños/as que viven en hogares de tránsito, niños y adolescentes en situación de vulnerabilidad socioeconómica y jóvenes con discapacidad intelectual.

Name: Complete Cricket International
Description:
Complete Cricket International are a company who aim to challenge, develop and improve cricketers of all ages and abilities. 

All our programmes are run by professional coaches, all with ECB level 2 qualifications or above, alongside current and former International and County cricketers. Our coaches are fully DBS checked, First Aid trained, have attended the relevant Safeguarding courses and are members of the ECB Coaches Association.

Name: MAINPEAK Wingfoil & MTB Center Portugal
Description:
MAINPEAK Watersports LDA ist das Wingfoil & Mountainbike Center im Norden von Portugal.
Auch du kannst es lernen über dem Wasser zu schweben!

Name: Pure Hoops
Description:
Pure Hoops est une entité de basketball, qui a pour but de former de jeunes talents féminin, de manière qualitative et professionnelle, avec les meilleurs coaches dans le domaine.
Nous sommes également concernés quant à l’évolution et la promotion du basket féminin en suisse. Il y a énormément de talents et de célébrités en devenir, qui demandent et méritent qu’à être mises en lumière.

Name: Max Potential Sporcu Kuluçka Merkezi
Description:
Türkiye sporla yaşayan bir ülke. Ülkemizde 2019 yılı kayıtlarına göre yaklaşık 5 milyon 104 bin 22 lisanslı sporcu bulunmakta. Ülke olarak altyapılarda ve milli takımlarda ne kadar başarılı veya yetenekli olursak olalım sporcularımızın çok ama çok ufak bir kısmını kendi potansiyellerinin zirvesine çıkarabiliyoruz. Çıkardıklarımızın da yine bir çoğunu o seviyede tutamıyoruz.

Bunun sebeplerine baktığımızda; bilinçsizlik, profesyonelleşememe, eğitim eksikliği, destek veren kişi, kurum veya kuruluşların yetersizliği ya da marka yönetiminin yapılamaması gibi başlıkları görüyoruz. Ayrıca bu desteklerin yüksek maliyeti de özellikle genç sporcuların yaşadığı zorluklar arasında.

Max Potential olarak biz, potansiyeli yüksek sporcularla en deneyimli uzmanları buluşturan ve yatırım fonu mantığıyla finansman desteği sunan Türkiye’nin ilk Sporcu Kuluçka Merkezi’yiz.

Potansiyelli sporcuların gelişimleri için ihtiyaç duydukları hizmetleri almasını sağlayarak, sporcuları dünyadaki rakipleriyle eşit hatta daha iyi imkanlarla donatarak, kendi potansiyellerinin zirvesine çıkarmayı ve orada uzun süre kalmaları için yardımcı olmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Name: Padel Australia
Description:
In 2021 Padel Australia became the official nominated governing body for padel. Padel Australia is responsible for the governance and growth of the sport, as well as running national and international competitions, including: 
- Australian Padel Open (Cupra FIP Tour)
- Melbourne Padel Open (Cupra FIP Tour)
- Australian Padel Tour 

Padel Australia is proud to support the Australian National Padel Team, the Aussie Crocs. 

Want to learn more? For more information about us and to keep up to date with daily news and events, visit our website www.padelaus.com.au

Name: International Gymnastics Camp
Description:
In 1971 the Klaus Family founded International Gymnastics Camp with a vision to build a place that united the gymnastics world in a fun, kind, safe and positive environment. Nestled in the beautiful Pocono Mountains, more than 150,000 campers from over 60 countries have called IGC their home away from home. As the longest Accredited ACA Gymnastics Summer Camp, the Klaus Family has been pioneers of safety and kindness in the gymnastics world since the beginning! 

International Gymnastics Camp is committed to providing a kind, healthy & safe environment for all our campers in all aspects of camp life. IGC programs across the board are built on the foundation of enriching every camper’s love for gymnastics, developing social skills, making life long friendships, enhancing teamwork skills, gaining independence and making camp magic memories that last a lifetime.

Name: PRO Amateur Fútbol
Description: Somos PRO Amateur Fútbol, el primer centro de entrenamiento donde convertimos la pasión por el fútbol en salud y bienestar gracias a nuestro innovador sistema de entrenamiento que fusiona efectivos circuitos funcionales con estructuras de fútbol modernas diariamente.

Name: Bienal Pernambuco
Description: A Bienal Internacional do Livro de Pernambuco é um evento de reconhecida importância no universo do livro, da leitura e da literatura, com atividades relacionadas à fruição do conhecimento, das artes e da cultura, proporcionando estímulo ao mercado editorial e à difusão da produção literária, e ainda, incentivando a formação de novos leitores.

Name: Voie Martiale ("Martial Path")
Description: Voie Martiale, to re-discover all the richness of a full, sustainable and responsible martial practice. Education for health, self-development, personal ethics, respect for others, citizenship and individual responsibility.

Name: Idrættens Branchedage
Description: Idrættens Branchedage er en inspirerende konference- og udstillingsplatform for fagpersonale fra landets idrætsfaciliteter/ idrætsanlæg, beslutningstagere fra kommunale forvaltninger, idrætsorganisationer og idrætsudbydere samt serviceudbydere, start-ups og leverandører til idræts- og fritidsbranchen. Også fremtidens arbejdsstyrke fra landets mange idrætsrelaterede uddannelser bliver et fokuspunkt.

Name: GRLS WNTD SOCCER
Description:
Sport, regelmäßige Bewegung und das Gefühl der Zugehörigkeit sind essenziell für die gesunde Entwicklung junger Menschen. Leider haben vor allem Mädchen aus sozial benachteiligten Familien oder mit Migrationshintergrund keinen guten Zugang zu Sportangeboten – zum Beispiel aufgrund  kultureller und finanzieller Hürden.  Es gibt nur wenige Sportangebote für Mädchen, diese sind häufig kostenpflichtig. Die Hemmschwelle zur Teilnahme ist hoch.  

Das möchten wir ändern: GRLS WNTD SOCCER bietet kostenlose Fußballangebote für Mädchen unterschiedlicher sozialer und kultureller Herkunft. Mit unseren Angeboten stärken wir das Selbstbewusstsein junger Mädchen, ermutigen sie in Begegnung zu kommen und begeistern sie für Bewegung und Fußball als Teamsport.

Name: Vodar
Description:
Vodar helps sports coaches with no prior experience in sports psychology to teach mental skills effectively to junior athletes. 

The app provides a structured, plug-and-play methodology for mental coaching, enabling immediate integration of practical mental coaching drills into training sessions.

While everyone's racing to upgrade machines, we're leveraging technology to upgrade minds - blending neuroscience, sports psychology, and a deep love for junior athletes into the most powerful mental coaching system in sports.

Because game-ready minds win big.

In sports.
In business.
In life.

If you’re passionate about sports and you want to contribute to the bright future of the next generation of exceptional athletes - let’s talk!

Name: Handballcampus München
Description:
Als gemeinnützige Organisation setzen wir uns dafür ein Kinder im goldenen Lernalter von 3 bis 12 Jahren für Bewegung (mit Ball) zu begeistern!
Uns geht es nicht um Titel, sondern um leuchtende Kinderaugen. Begeisterung statt Druck, Vorfreude statt Bauchschmerzen, Freundschaft statt Rivalität.

In Handballcamps bei unseren Partnervereinen garantieren kleine Spiel- und Trainingsgruppen eine intensive individuelle Betreuung mit neuen Impulsen für die Jungen und Mädchen durch unsere speziell aus- und fortgebildeten Trainer*innen.

Alle motivierten Trainer können bei uns in Fortbildungen oder Camps unsere HCM-Mentalität erfahren und sie dann aktiv im Vereinsleben weitergeben.

Unsere HCM-Coaches helfen in Kindergärten und Schulen und begeistern dort die Kinder spielerisch für mehr Bewegung. 

Nicht nur durch unsere Camps und Trainerausbildungen können Vereine profitieren: Unser Netzwerk aus Trainern, Ausstattern, Grafikern bis hin zum Ticketservice hilft gerne bei jeder Vereinsangelegenheit.

So wollen wir mit dem Handballcampus München eine Anlaufstelle für alle aus der Metropolregion München schaffen, die mit unserem Lieblingssport zu tun haben oder in Kontakt kommen wollen.

Respekt - Begeisterung - Wertschätzung - Teamgeist - Lernen
Wir leben unsere HCM-Werte in jedem Training und Camptag aktiv vor! So begeistern wir jedes Kind nachhaltig.

Name: Racing Club
Description: The Future Of Race Horse Ownership!

Name: The Coaching Hub
Description: We are thrilled to announce The Coaching Hub. A platform created to support Clubs, Coaches and Players with services including 1:1 and group sessions, session plans, CPD and more.

Name: Rugby Alberta
Description:
Rugby has a long history in Alberta, beginning in the late 1800s with a
division of the Northwest Mounted Police holding exhibition games in 1884 and 1885. From those humble beginnings, Alberta Rugby has grown, first from additional exhibition matches between the NWMP and teams in Edmonton, Calgary, and Lethbridge, in the 1890s, then to clubs across the
province. 

Our Values
Respect: For all those involved in rugby, the wider community and self.
Integrity: In rugby, we aspire to do the right thing.
Inclusivity: Diversity of opinion and culture means working together to be a vibrant, respectful organization.
Passion: Rugby is more than just a game, it builds communities and fosters a lifelong love of the sport.
Fun: Rugby is a source of joy for all.

Staff
Executive Director - Sandy Nesbitt
Event Planning Coordinator - Mark Tilles
Manager, Rugby Operations - Andrew Shaw
Rugby Development Officer - Breanne Morgan 
Accounting Coordinator - Christi-Sue Nesbitt 
Communications Coordinator - Steph Hovdestad
Media Coordinator - Róisín McElhatton

Board of Directors
President - Chris Cooke
Vice President - Paul Looker
Director of Finance - Darren Andruko
Directors at Large - Doug Laird, John Vavrek, Rory McKeown, Caroline Tindall, and James Lord

In addition, we have representation on our board from:
Alberta Junior Rugby Association President- Ultan Peters
Calgary Rugby Union President - Peter Rowe
Edmonton Rugby Union President - Dave Logan
Ramoa President - Andrew Petti

Name: SWISSPADDLE
Description:
Base nautique sur les bords du lac Léman à Vevey proposant des activités autour du Stand Up Paddle.
Swisspaddle permet de: 
- PRATIQUER - Seul(e), en famille, entre amis ou collaborateurs pour découvrir et pratiquer ce sport sous toutes ses formes, en toute sécurité.
- S'EQUIPER - En choisissant du matériel adapté à votre pratique du stand up paddle.
- S'EVADER - Partir en excursion sur les rives du Lac Léman, au pied des vignobles de Lavaux, ou en traversant le lac.

Swisspaddle c'est aussi: 
- des cours de foil
- la promotion du stand up paddle en Suisse 
- la sécurité des événements sur l'eau
- des lake day sur mesure (SUP, bouée, ski nautique, traiteur) pour écoles et entreprises

Name: SMART - University of Bordeaux
Description: The Sport mouvement Ambition recherche et Technologie (SMART) platform is an intelligent gymnasium dedicated to research, training, innovation and sports practices, inaugurated in 2024 at the heart of the Université de Bordeaux Campus.

Name: Base Academy - Soccer
Description: We are specialists in soccer training for athletes who are starting their careers. Our teams train hard, play big games, travel abroad and within the country, and compete at the highest level so we can manage their successful careers by providing them with the best opportunities around the world.

Name: SHOWTIIIME
Description: Showtiiime c'est un lieu coloré et décalé qu'on n'est pas prêt d'oublier  Pour chanter  , régler ses comptes sur le ring , ou partir à l'aventure  SHOWTIIIME c'est le lieu de team building qu'il te faut en plein centre de la Ville de Saint-Omer !

Name: Antrenoryum
Description:
Spor yapmak istiyorsunuz ancak çok yoğun bir temponuz mu var? Uzun süreli taahhütlerle kendinizi bir yere bağlamak istemiyor musunuz? 
 Antrenoryum tam bu noktada devreye giriyor.

Türkiye'nin her bölgesinde uzman antrenörler ile çalışmanızı sağlıyoruz.  Zaman ve konum problemini ortadan kaldırıyoruz. Antrenörlerimizin eğitimi, sertifikaları ve nitelikleri hakkında bilgi sahibi olmanızı sağlıyoruz. Çalışmak istediğiniz antrenörümüzle, birlikte belirlediğiniz konumda ve zamanda, en kısa sürede spora başlıyorsunuz.

Diyetisyen, özel eğitim öğretmeni ve fizyoterapist ihtiyacınızı da gideriyoruz. Tüm yaş gruplarına ihtiyaç ve amaca özgü, kişiselleştirilmiş, en verimli ve kaliteli hizmeti vermek için hizmetinizdeyiz.

Antrenoryum olarak, günümüzde oldukça yaygın hale gelen hareketsizlik problemine çözüm bulmak istiyoruz ve genci yaşlısı herkesin belli bir spor kültürüne sahip olabilmesini amaçlamaktayız. Sporu bir yaşam biçimi haline getirebilmeyi, kendimize vizyon edinmiş bulunmaktayız.

Antrenoryum olarak misyonumuz sporu seven herkesi buluşturabilmektir. Her geçen gün sporun bütün paydaşlarına ulaşabilmek ve en kaliteli eğitmenlerden, diyetisyenlere, fizyoterapistlere kadar spora tutku duyan bütün bireylerin arasında bir köprü görevi görmek istiyoruz.

Antrenoryum'da alanında en iyi okullarda eğitim gören ve sürekli gelişime açık, bildiklerini insanlarla paylaşabilmek için yanıp tutuşan ve iletişimi kuvvetli eğitmenlerimizi, diyetisyenlerimizi ve fizyoterapistlerimizi bünyemizde bulundurmak istiyoruz. Ziyaretçilerimizin istediği şekilde, istediği zaman ve mekanlarda, doğru bir şekilde spora ulaşabilmesinin mücadelesini veriyoruz ve sporun bütün paydaşlarının memnuniyeti için her geçen gün daha çok çabalıyoruz.

Name: Grill and Chill
Description:
Loueur de bateaux BBQ sur le lac du Bourget-du-Lac, implanté au port de Charpignat. 
Nous proposons une solution clé en main, avec une location d'un bateau BBQ avec toute la nourriture et les boissons sélectionnées par nos soins.

Name: M:7 Sports
Description: M:7 Sports Pittsburgh is a one-of-a-kind sports community with opportunities for everyone to achieve their athletic or fitness goals. For athletes, it’s a first-class training and competition space to help them realize their full potential on and off the courts and fields. For adults, it offers a wide variety of workout options including a Body Lab and strength/conditioning classes. For families, it offers dedicated activities, such as kickball and dodgeball, to help them stay active together.

Name: Edmonton Petroleum Golf & Country Club
Description:
At Edmonton Petroleum Golf & Country Club, private golf feels personal.

No ballot system. No spouse restrictions. And the kind of tee access that makes last-minute rounds your new routine.

Our 18-hole championship course—designed by PGA Tour pro Mark McCumber—runs over 7,000 yards of tree-lined fairways and natural water features, backed by one of the best practice facilities in Alberta. A full grass range, short game area, and a strong playing culture make it a place where your game—and your time—are respected.

But it’s more than just great golf.

This is a club where you walk in and people know your name (and your short game).
Where Friday rounds turn into long lunches.
Where competitive players stay sharp, families grow into the game, and junior golfers are coached by a dedicated PGA professional through a structured, development-focused program.

Whether you're working on your handicap, building your network, playing as a couple, raising a junior athlete, or just ready for a place that fits—this is your golf life, dialed in.

Name: Senaa Brand
Description:
At Senaabrand, we believe your everyday essentials should do more than just function—they should inspire. The Senaa Tumbler is the ultimate companion for life on the move: sleek, durable, and thoughtfully designed for those who demand performance with purpose.

 SipSavor Go – Experience temperature-perfect beverages wherever you are.
 Built for the Bolt – Engineered for active lifestyles, from commutes to mountain trails.
 Every Sip is an Adventure – Whether you're chasing goals or chasing horizons, we’re right there with you.

Made with sustainable materials and elevated design, the Senaa Tumbler isn’t just another drinkware—it's a statement of how you move through the world.

Senaa. For those who go boldly, sip smartly, and live intentionally.

Name: T.WILL Sports, Inc.
Description:
Welcome to T.WILL Sports, Inc. – Minnesota's premier provider of in-school and after-school sports programs and seasonal sports camps.

Founded by sports visionary Tim Williams in 2018, we're dedicated to transforming the youth sports landscape by emphasizing the overall experience, rather than just winning. 

Our award-winning sports programs, including in-school and after-school sports programs, and seasonal sports camps, are designed to instill valuable life lessons and education through sports.

We're proud to be the largest provider of in-school and after-school sports programs in Minnesota, and we're excited to bring our sports revolution to other U.S. markets in 2023-2024.

Our aim is to deliver an unmatched experience to young athletes everywhere, inspiring them to pursue their dreams and realize their full potential.

If you're looking to join a dynamic and rapidly growing sports company that's changing the game, visit our website at www.twillsports.com to learn more about us and explore exciting career opportunities.

Name: Team Savage MMA
Description: Team Savage Mixed Martial Arts we offer a variety of classes to our members so that they can find a program that not only teaches them self defense, but gets them in the best shape of their lives! We help our students develop basics fundamental that will teach them how to defend themselves. Team Savage MMA teaches MMA/ Brazilian Jiu Jitsu from Beginning to advance. We take pride in helping our members gain self confidence. Team Savage MMA also breeds and prepares fighters for fights. We are the only school in Queens Astoria that offers 20 classes per week.

Name: PlayyON
Description: PlayyON is a unique, all-in-one platform designed to unify the fragmented sports and recreation industry. Combining community engagement with robust management tools, PlayyON empowers Managers and Coaches to connect, organize, and monetize their activities seamlessly. By addressing the pain points of this $69 billion and growing industry, PlayyON offers a scalable, all-in-one solution.

Name: Marathon Kids UK
Description:
Marathon Kids UK inspires the next generation to become physically active.

We believe that running has the power to show kids they can achieve more than they ever dreamed possible!

The Marathon Kids UK programme and accompanying tracking systems encourages kids to set goals and run distances of multiple marathons over the course of an academic year.

One kilometre at a time, our Marathon Kids unlock their potential, learning grit, determination, and the feeling of pure joy that comes from crushing your goals — mentally as well as physically.

Name: Teech Golf App
Description:
Teech Golf révolutionne ton expérience, que ce soit au practice, sur le parcours ou au clubhouse.

Voici nos deux principales fonctionnalités :
1 Programmes d’entraînement personnalisés : Reçois des programmes optimisés en fonction de tes performances.

2 Cartes de scores GPS avancées : Suis tes statistiques agrégées sur toutes tes parties grâce à nos cartes de scores interactives.

Teech Golf est ton allié au practice.

Notre objectif est de te fournir des conseils efficaces pour améliorer ton jeu. Chaque séance d’entraînement est minutée, expliquée, et accompagnée de courtes vidéos illustratives pour chaque exercice.

Nous croyons fermement que les golfeurs prennent plus de plaisir sur le parcours lorsqu'ils jouent mieux. Cependant, il n'existe pas de solution efficace pour accompagner durablement cette évolution après l'obtention de la carte verte.

C'est là qu'intervient l'application de coaching Teech Golf.

Nous nous concentrons sur ta performance tout en veillant à ton plaisir de jeu. Avec Teech Golf, tu peux partager tes cartes de scores, reconnaître les parcours à l'avance, découvrir tes tendances de jeu, identifier tes points forts, et suivre ta progression.

N’hésite pas à nous contacter si tu souhaites en savoir plus !

À plein de birdies 
L’équipe Teech Golf

Name: Corodo
Description: Corodo has been the reference for top athletes at a high level for years, who want to get the best out of themselves and their performance with high performance coaching.

Name: Strata Athletics
Description: Strata Athletics is a holistic youth sports program backed by professional curriculum and coaching that uses a learning-based approach and data-driven insights to both enhance transferable life skills and keep youth engaged in sport longer.

Name: CBFS Academy
Description:
Bem-vindo à página oficial do Programa de Qualificação Profissional do Futsal Brasileiro, sob a liderança da Confederação Brasileira de Futsal | CBFS! 

Nosso compromisso é elevar o padrão do futsal brasileiro, não apenas nas quadras, mas também nos bastidores. Através deste programa, estamos empenhados em capacitar profissionais ligados ao mundo do futsal, desde treinadores e árbitros até gestores esportivos.

Com uma visão de excelência e pioneirismo, buscamos aprimorar a qualidade da nossa modalidade em todos os níveis. Nossa iniciativa abrange uma variedade de tópicos, desde as mais recentes táticas de jogo até as práticas de gerenciamento esportivo mais avançadas. Tudo isso visa fortalecer a nossa base e catapultar o futsal brasileiro para patamares ainda mais elevados.

Junte-se a nós nesta jornada de aprendizado contínuo e aprimoramento profissional. Através do Programa de Qualificação Profissional do Futsal Brasileiro, estamos moldando o futuro do futsal em nosso país.

Name: Laser Titans
Description:
At Laser Titans, we bring the thrill of mobile laser tag straight to you — transforming offices, auditoriums, fields, or event spaces into immersive, adrenaline-fueled battle zones.

We specialize in creating high-energy, team-building experiences that fuse strategy, technology, and fun. Whether it’s a corporate offsite, birthday celebration, or public event, our games are designed to break barriers, build bonds, and ignite unforgettable memories.

Our cutting-edge equipment and modular arena setups make it possible to play anywhere — indoors or outdoors — with real-time scoring, sound effects, and game modes that keep every participant on edge and engaged.

Name: Mansfield Town Community Trust

Mansfield Town Community Trust, working across Mansfield, Ashfield and surrounding areas since 1990 to unite people through the power of sport.

Projects include:
Premier League Primary Stars 
Premier League Kicks

Post - 16 Education

Name: AAC TENNIS PADEL
Description:
The Amiens Athletic Club (AAC) is a historic club from the Amiens region. Tennis - Badminton - Padel - Pickle Ball - Gym - Restaurant Bar - Meeting Room.

The AAC Tennis Padel is also : 13 clay tennis courts including 9 indoor, 2 padel track, 2 badminton courts and a club-house. 
The labels "Club Roland-Garros", "Club Tennis Santé" et a preparation center for Paris 2024.

But most importantly a ambitious and convivial sport club.
