Name: Ligue de Bretagne de Judo et Disciplines Associées
Description: La Ligue de Bretagne de Judo et D.A regroupe plus de 260 clubs et 28000 licenciés. Elle est la structure régionalise décentralisée de la Fédération Française de Judo Jujitsu Kendo et D.A. Le judo est à la fois un sport, un art martial, mais aussi une méthode éducative intellectuelle, physique et morale, basée sur les 8 valeurs de son Code Moral : la politesse, le courage, la sincérité, l'honneur, la modestie, le respect, le contrôle de soi et l'amitié.

Name: SUNY Cortland Strength and Conditioning for Human Performance
Description:
If you want to pursue a career in a strength and conditioning setting, you’ll need a theoretical and practical knowledge  base to meet your goals. A concentrated course program provides essential theoretical information. You’ll apply this knowledge through an internship experience in strength and conditioning, exercise, wellness, health promotion, corporate fitness, cardiac rehabilitation, commercial fitness or other related areas.

This group is a professional community for current students, alumni, faculty, and professionals associated with the Bachelor of Science in Strength and Conditioning for Human Performance program at SUNY Cortland. (This program was previous called Fitness Development.) 

This group serves to connect individuals passionate about optimizing human performance, share industry insights, highlight student and alumni achievements, and provide resources for academic and career advancement in strength and conditioning, sport performance, and health and fitness industries. 

Whether you’re a current student looking to explore career opportunities, an alumnus eager to stay connected, or a professional seeking early career professionals, this group is your go-to platform.

Name: Perflection AI
Description:
Hello everyone! We are a team of passionate golfers and professional instructors, turning any smartphone into a personal AI sports coach. 

Starting with golf, our technology delivers a real-time, personalized training experience.

We believe our approach will become the most effective and affordable way for anyone to learn and enjoy sports.

Name: Asociación de Rugby de Santiago
Description: Somos la Asociación de Rugby de Santiago, que desde 1963 promovemos y gestionamos rugby femenino como masculino.

Name: Logos Golf Ministries Scotland
Description:
Logos Golf Ministries, over the past 7 years, Logos Golf Ministries Ambassador, PGA Professional Vincent Brown has worked on the PGA Tartan Tour sharing Christian values and faith.
Logos Golf Ministries a non-profit registered charity, organise a range of events from smaller golf days to PGA Pro-Ams, we have been a presence all over Scotland and shared our time with many Professional and Amateur Golfers alike.

Name: TWOth Autosport Inc
Description:
TWOth Autosport is a motorsport organization with over 20 years of racing experience, specializing in production-based sportscar racing. Whether you’re new to the sport and want to grow as efficiently as possible, a seasoned driver looking to partner with the right team, or a business owner looking for the best ROI in motorsports, we have the resources to make sure every part of your racing program is well prepared to achieved success.

This sportscar racing journey began as a young technician and driver pairing, Trevor & Travis Hill joined Porsche race teams Bullet Racing and TRG in the 2008-2011 GrandAm series and Rolex 24 at Daytona. The opportunities only grew from there as Trevor would evolve into an internationally respected race technician and car chief, while Travis continued to develop as a driver and coach, ultimately reaching his goal as a Porsche factory certified instructor.

That passion and experience has now grown and is shared with dozens of drivers and crew at TWOth as the Hill brothers continue to build their Ottawa-based racing team.

Whats next? You'll have to come along for the ride and see for yourself!

Name: Buitenbeweging
Description:
Niets fijner dan sporten in de frisse lucht, samen met anderen. 

Je krijgt er vanzelf een beter humeur van, ook als het regent! Ik geloof in de kracht en het plezier van buiten bewegen. Dus daag ik je op een enthousiaste manier uit om meer te bewegen in de buitenlucht voor een fitter lijf én goed humeur.

Dit doe ik door:
* Slow Sports lessen in een van de mooie parken van Arnhem Noord.
* Bootcamplessen met buurtgenoten, Bootcamp in de Buurt, in Park Sonsbeek.
* Workshops Buitenbeweging voor bedrijven en organisaties tijdens bijvoorbeeld teamdagen, beleidsdagen, personeelsuitjes, familiefeesten.

Ik geef je graag meer informatie via mijn website: https://buitenbeweging.nl of stuur me een mail voor je persoonlijke vragen: riettevanrooij@gmail.com.

Welkom voor een gratis proefles of vrijblijvend zakelijk informatiegesprek.

Name: International Sports Alliance
Description:
International Sports Alliance (ISA) is building the future of global sport with American football at the core. We’re focused on making the game safer, smarter, and more accessible by integrating cutting-edge equipment, athlete education, and federation partnerships.

Through collaborations with leading brands and governing bodies, we’re bringing innovation and structure to the European market while creating new opportunities for athletes worldwide.

Our mission is simple: empower athletes, from grassroots to the professional level, with pathways that include coaching support, performance development, international exposure, and guidance on contracts and opportunities at the collegiate and global stage.

We operate in various regions across Europe and beyond, ensuring that athletes have access to the tools, resources, and representation they need to succeed in competitive sports. Our organization is committed to promoting player safety, supporting career development, and fostering athletic excellence.

Name: Fitee
Description: Fitee's mission is to become the largest sports community in Europe. We aim to do this in two parts. Firstly, by offering services fit for your business, boosting productivity and cohesion whilst elevating pressure from HR. We do this by providing you with a selection of quality workouts tailored to your office schedule, plus monthly social events that'll allow you and your fellow colleagues to de-stress and mingle. Secondly, we create a thriving community that brings people together, provides a sense of belonging and improves overall health with our weekly workouts and social events for.

Name: Clube Circulo Militar do Paraná
Description: Buscando sempre trazer o que há de melhor para nossos associados  oferecendo estruturas completas para lazer, treinos, recreação e diversão para todas as idades.

Name: Parcours Formation Sport
Description:
Tu veux faire du sport ton métier ? Tu veux enfin te lever le matin avec l’envie de bouger, de transmettre, d’inspirer les autres à se dépasser ? Chez Parcours Formation Sport, c’est exactement pour ça qu’on existe.

Depuis Brive, on forme chaque année une promo de futurs coach(e)s sportifs à travers la formation BPJEPS Activités de la Forme (option muscu/haltéro, cours collectifs, ou les deux).
 Formation en alternance (tu apprends en salle ET sur le terrain).
 Encadrement par une équipe de formateurs passionnés et expérimentés, dont certains sont passés par chez nous.
 Ambiance familiale, mais exigeante. Bienveillance, mais rigueur.

 Notre mission ? Te permettre de te professionnaliser dans le sport, et d’en vivre vraiment.
 Que tu sois en reconversion, en recherche de sens, ou simplement prêt(e) à passer à l’action : on t'accompagne à chaque étape.

 Les recrutements pour la prochaine promo ouvrent bientôt.
Et si c’était ton tour de tout changer ?
 Contacte-nous pour en discuter, on répond à toutes tes questions, sans engagement.

www.parcoursformation.pro
parcoursformationbrive@gmail.com
05 55 24 19 76

Description: l'Équipe de Recherche en Sciences du Sport de l'Institut des Sciences du Sport (ISS) de l'Université Hassan Premier.

Name: CATV - Clube de Atletismo de Torres Vedras
Description: No Clube de Atletismo de Torres Vedras (CATV), acreditamos que o Atletismo é mais do que um desporto, é uma ferramenta para formar pessoas e atletas de todas as idades. A partir dos 5 anos, todos podem descobrir, aprender e evoluir connosco, desde os primeiros passos na modalidade até à competição de alto nível. Os nossos treinos combinam desenvolvimento físico, técnico e humano, garantindo que cada atleta cresce de forma equiibrada, quer queira praticar por lazer ou com objetivos competitivos.

Name: Automóvil Club de Costa Rica (ACCR)
Description: El ACCR  es una Asociación sin fines de lucro. Representamos a la Federación Internacional del Automóvil en Costa Rica desde 1955.

Name: UDP Fitness
Description:
Wil je sterker, fitter en/of vitaler worden onder begeleiding van onze trainers en coaches? Samen zorgen we er voor dat het past in jouw drukke lifestyle en dat je doelstellingen (toch) behaald worden. 

Dit is hoe wij jou kunnen helpen:
1) Small Group Training: de voordelen van personal training tegen groepslesprijzen
2) Gepersonaliseerde begeleiding in training, voeding én lifestyle. Wij regelen het, jij hoeft alleen te komen.

Verder kan je bij ons langskomen voor massages en speciale coaching in voeding.

Wat dit voor jou betekent: meer energie voor je werk en gezin, een fitnessroutine die daadwerkelijk vol te houden is, en resultaten waar je trots op kunt zijn. 

Onze leden variëren van marathon-finishers tot Hyrox-deelnemers - allemaal drukke mensen die hun onmogelijke doelen hebben bereikt.

Name: Cap Sensations : jetski & SUP
Description: capsensations@gmail.com

Name: Dive Rarotonga Ltd
Description:
Dive Rarotonga is a professionally operated PADI 5* Dive Centre, owned by and operated by active divers for divers. We are proud authors of 5 PADI Distinctive Specialty Courses unique to the Cook Islands.
We have continued to operate successfully throughout the current Covid issues and continue to operate within our risk management strategy to ensure the safety of all,  both above and below water.
We offer training from absolute beginners through to PADI Instructor levels, as well as guided dives over our spectacular reef systems here.
We're the Cook Islands distributors for both Scubapro and Suunto, offering competitive sales and service for these alongside products from Mares and Aqualung. 
We also offer full hydrostatic testing for cylinders. 

We offer quality diving in a fun and friendly atmosphere - so whether these are your first bubbles, you are already qualified and you are diving for fun, or you want to progress your professional diving career, we have dives to suit you!

Name: GoalStation
Description: Goal Station – Powered by A-Champs, specializes in the design, development, and creation of cutting-edge products and training facilities worldwide. Using our live data patented technology, players and coaches get instant results and performance analysis for smarter, more effective training.

Name: Bureau des guides Leysin
Description:
Partir en montagne apporte, à chacun  d’entre nous, des expériences personnelles très différentes.
Nous venons y chercher des moments de détente, de rencontre ou de contemplation, mais aussi la réalisation de grands projets, sommets secrètement convoités dont l’ascension nous permettra d’assouvir notre soif de découverte et d’aventure.
Le choix de partir avec un guide de montagne vous donnera l’occasion de vivre ces instants en sûreté et de bénéficier de son expérience été comme hiver.
C’est pourquoi le Bureau des Guides de Leysin s’engage à respecter des normes strictes d’encadrement pour un enseignement de qualité lors des cours et des courses. Notre principal défi : la pratique de l’alpinisme avec une sécurité maximale.
Au fil des ans, nous avons foulé les 4 coins des Alpes, partagé des moments inoubliables, admiré les montagnes, toutes plus belles les unes que les autres et surtout vécu à chaque fois une aventure unique.
Toute l’équipe du Bureau des Guides de Leysin se réjouit de vous accueillir et se fera un plaisir de vous renseigner.

Name: Vitruve-football
Description:
LE FOOTBALL est devenu UN SPORT DE VITESSE sous toutes ses formes. L'idée de VITRUVE-FOOTBALL est donc d'explorer AU NIVEAU PHYSIQUE ce nouveau paradigme en discutant  par son site www.vitruve-football.net du COMMENT FAIRE-FAIRE ou en d'autres termes du MANAGEMENT STRATEGIQUE DE L'ENTRAÌNEMENT PHYSIQUE FOOTBALLISTIQUE.

Outre la discussion de ce nouveau paradigme, VITRUVE-FOOTBALL offre, en prenant le temps d'aller vite, des prestations de DIAGNOSTIC DE VITESSE, de COACHING PREPARATION PHYSIQUE INDIVIDUELLE ET D'EQUIPE et de REGENERATION aux footballeurs.

Name: Juist Juul
Description:
Kickbokslessen voor volwassenen en kinderen
 Personal training en duo training
 Bedrijfssport op locatie

Meer weten? Kijk op www.juist-juul.nl

Plezier hebben en hard trainen staan voorop. Ik train je op de manier die jij wilt en bij jou past. Ik ben in staat om jou te motiveren en te stimuleren tot de prestaties die jij zelf wilt bereiken.

Meld je aan voor een proefles! 

info@juist-juul.nl
www.juist-juul.nl

Name: Pilates for Lijf
Description:
Wil jij les krijgen en in dé authentieke Pilates methode van Joseph Pilates? 
Klassiek Pilates is een fysiek oefenprogramma dat gebaseerd is op het lichaam in zijn meest natuurlijke staat: in beweging. Je volgt alle oefeningen aaneensluitend van elkaar en in dezelfde volgorde waardoor een ‘flow’ ontstaat. Op basis van spiergroepen samengesteld. De oefeningen worden uitsluitend en (in begin fase) liggend uitgevoerd. We doen deze oefeningen niet op een muzikaal tempo. Door de herhaling van de oefeningen, zul je merken dat je hierdoor juist een goed beeld krijgt van jouw eigen groeiproces. En de oefeningen daarmee op steeds hoger niveau in jouw lichaam beheersen kan!

Name: Sport- en ontspanningscentrum Kortezwaag
Description:
Sport- en ontspanningscentrum Kortezwaag in Gorredijk is een veelzijdige locatie die een breed scala aan activiteiten biedt. Of je nu recreatief bezig wilt zijn of gericht bent op het leveren van topprestaties, bij ons staat één ding centraal: wij willen dat iedere sporter zich thuisvoelt.

Met faciliteiten zoals een zwembad, fitness, groepslessen, sauna en een ruime sporthal bieden we mogelijkheden voor iedereen. Kortezwaag is de ideale plek voor individuen, gezinnen of groepen om fit en actief te blijven, of gewoon te genieten van een ontspannen tijd in een vertrouwde en gastvrije omgeving.

Name: Achraf Hakimi Foundation
Description:
The Achraf Hakimi Foundation ensures the educational development of thousands of young people through various partnerships. Our team works in coordination with orphanages and various public centers for a good and effective management of resources.

We help children to go further in their ambitions on the path to success.

Name: FAST and Female (Freya Anderson Swim Training)
Description:
At FAST and Female we want to build a community to support women in sport by building confidence and resilience.

Women and girls face many problems whilst growing up, such as, issues with body confidence, life/work balance and dealing with a menstrual cycle. Now throw competing in a sport into the mix! 

“64% of girls quit sport by the time they finish puberty. From personal experience, sport, and swimming in general, has brought me so much confidence and joy. This is what makes this statistic so upsetting. All of the team here want to make sport as accessible as possible, and starting with FAST and female, providing support and education, is our first step.”

Freya Anderson

Name: Seven Seas School of Yachting
Description:
We are a RYA Recognised Training Centre based in Athens, Greece, offering a wide range of courses for sailing, powerboat and motor cruising for all levels of experience, from beginner to Yachtmaster Ocean, all year-round.

We have helped hundreds of boating enthusiasts nurture their passion for the sea and dozens of aspiring and established yachting professionals advance their career through their courses with us.

We never teach perfunctorily: Our hallmark is our commitment to providing meaningful training that doesn't only translate into a certificate, but rather into sound knowledge that will allow our students to safely handle and fully enjoy their time on their vessel of choice. 

To that end, our team of seasoned instructors attend to each student's individual learning needs to ensure that their time on board is worth their while.

Name: ScoutFlix
Description: We are an AI enabled software as a service platform connecting orgs, athletes , coaches and scouts primarily within the cricket ecosystem.

Name: OUR GOAL CIC
Description:
Our Goal is a world where every girl has positive, safe, and empowering experiences of physical activity which will improve her life. 

We deliver mentoring and physical activity programmes to girls across Greater Manchester.

Name: SIID
Description:
SIID rend l’expertise des sportives d’élite accessible à toutes les femmes. 

À travers masterclasses interactives et challenges motivants, nous aidons chaque femme à se dépasser, progresser et se connecter à une communauté inspirante. 

SIID est une plateforme de masterclasses dédiée à l’empowerment féminin par le sport. 

Nous rendons l’expertise des sportives d’élite accessible à toutes les femmes, partout dans le monde, à travers des contenus interactifs, courts et inspirants. 

Notre mission : 

-Développer la confiance et les compétences à travers des programmes sportifs et éducatifs. 

-Connecter les femmes à une communauté internationale de sportives et mentors. 

-Favoriser le dépassement de soi, la discipline et la progression personnelle, tout en rendant l’apprentissage motivant et engageant.

Name: Phillips Coaching
Description:
PERSONALISED. PROFESSIONAL. PROVEN.
Unlocking True Potential. 

At Phillips Coaching, we understand that sport is more than just a game - it’s a powerful vehicle for shaping confident, capable, and well-rounded young people. 

Our programs go beyond skills training to nurture the social, emotional, and physical development that supports a lifelong love of sport and a strong foundation for life.

With a team of elite coaches and a proven approach to athlete development, we empower young athletes to realise their full potential. Our philosophy combines high-performance coaching with personal mentorship, ensuring each player is guided, challenged, and supported every step of the way.

We work in close partnership with families, schools, and sporting clubs to deliver customised programs that elevate ability, enhance physical capability, and build mental resilience. 

From tailored craft refinement to strategic goal setting and performance analysis, we don’t just coach - we develop complete athletes prepared to thrive on and off the field.

At Phillips Coaching, we build more than athletes. We build futures.

Name: Personal Training Las Rosas
Description:
Especializados en entrenamiento personal y nutrición trabajamos de forma personal e individualizada para conseguir aquello que te propongas.

- ¿Aumento de masa muscular? 
- ¿Pérdida de grasa? 
- ¿Definición? 
- ¿Lesión o dolor crónico? 
- ¿Rendimiento deportivo?

Contamos con amplia experiencia, pero lo que realmente nos avala es la satisfacción de todos nuestros clientes.

¿Nuestro objetivo? Tú.

Name: Diesel Sports Complex
Description:
Diesel Sports Complex is a multi-sport complex located at 9043 Marshall Rd, Cranberry Twp, Pennsylvania, United States.  Our mission is to provide an environment to positively impact, grow and develop athlete, their families and ultimately our community through a variety of sports and training platforms.  

We pride ourselves on having a clean, modern and technologically advanced facility where athletes are provided with professional training and equipment to help them reach their potential on and off the field.  

Unlock your peak pefomrance and join our premier sport facility today! Whether you're a seasoned athlete or just starting your journey, our state-of-the-art facility offers a dynamic range of sports and amenities to cater to your every need. From an indoor field house to outdoor turf auxiliary field, we provide top-notch equipment and expert coaching to help you reach your goals. Join our dedicated community of athletes, enthusiasts, and professionals committed to pushing boundaries and achieving excellence. Don't miss out on the opportunity to elevate your game and experience the ultimate in sports, fitness and personal growth!

Name: Scooled
Description: We are a modern sports management consultancy company with a vision to leverage modern practices to redefine what sports, fitness, and cultural activities mean for everyone. You have the infrastructure? We will take care of the rest. We provide end to end solutions for sports complexes/academies, schools, corporates and gates communities.

Name: FFSE - Ligue Guadeloupe
Description:
Le sport comme moteur de bien-être, de cohésion et de performance en entreprise.

La Ligue de Guadeloupe du Sport d’Entreprise (LGSE) est l’organe régional de la Fédération Française du Sport d’Entreprise (FFSE).
Elle a pour mission de promouvoir, développer et structurer la pratique du sport au sein du monde professionnel en Guadeloupe.

Notre conviction est simple : le sport n’est pas seulement une activité de loisir, c’est un outil de bien-être, de cohésion et de performance pour les entreprises et leurs collaborateurs.

Créée pour accompagner les employeurs, les salariés et les acteurs économiques du territoire, la Ligue agit comme un pont entre le monde du sport et celui de l’entreprise.
Elle propose des actions concrètes, des événements accessibles et des programmes adaptés à tous les profils, du sportif confirmé au simple curieux souhaitant bouger pour sa santé.

Name: OCHSNER HOCKEY ACADEMY
Description:
Spezialisiert auf Eishockeycamps für alle Alters- und Leistungskategorien möchten wir mit unserem holistischen Ansatz und unserer tiefen Leidenschaft für das Schweizer Eishockey die Menschen um uns herum inspirieren und ermutigen. Neben der Vermittlung von sportartspezifischen Themen sehen wir unsere Aufgabe auch darin, den Menschen zu stärken und unsere Teilnehmer:innen genau dort abzuholen, wo sie gerade sind. Weg von Leistungsdruck und Selektion ermöglichen wir druckloses Lernen, das Entdecken neuer Fähigkeiten und garantieren dabei vor allem eines: FUN!

Alle Camps & Trainings werden von professionellen Coaches geleitet, die über einen reichen und stufenrelevanten Erfahrungsschatz verfügen.

"THE PLACE TO TRAIN SINCE 2013"

Name: Zien Healthy Club
Description: En Zien Healthy Club ayudamos a mejorar la salud y la calidad de vida de nuestros usuarios ofreciendo un servicio de actividad física diferente.

Name: SC Gjøa Youth Soccer
Description:

Name: ADAM Rehabilitation
Description:
ADAM Rehabilitation LLC was founded to support the development of Advanced Dynamics for Adaptive Movements. On the ideology that restoring, maintaining, and promoting physical strength is the key to living a healthier lifestyle, our core product was developed. After five years of research and development, the ADAM Brace was designed to be the most stable and dynamic exercise-specific rehabilitation tool available. The company holds both Non-provisional and Design Patents for the Multifunctional Therapeutic Workout Enhancement Brace.

The ADAM Brace improves patient care by delivering safer alternatives for exercise and rehabilitation therapy. Each ring has been placed to optimize your form and function across hundreds of exercise variations. The ADAM Brace is the first hands-free exercise tool that directly stabilizes the arm as it simultaneously allows for resistance to be placed on the shoulder while conducting dynamic movements.

Our products in development will focus on innovative and adaptive exercise tools that can be used to design dynamic strength routines not only for rehabilitation but for working out and for athletes at all levels, including professionals. We believe the ADAM brace is the first tool capable of achieving and performing balanced adaptive movements from a safer, more stable point. 

Please visit ADAMRehabilitation.com.

Name: Abilities Unlimited Australia
Description:
At AUA, we're passionate about providing children with disabilities the opportunities to grow, build capabilities and confidence through adaptive sports and active recreation with a focus on safety.

Our programs include:

Cyclabilities - a three-stage cycling program that teaches and equips children with disabilities with the skills, and safety elements to overcome barriers, learn to ride a bike in sensory-friendly environment, and safely navigate busy roads in alignment with road injury prevention strategies.

Waterabilities- a water-safety based program teaching children with disabilities or dual disadvantages, the extremely important, and vital safety elements around water, consequently building confidence and love of water sports. We strive to align with drowning prevention strategies, by providing adaptive safety lessons to participants and families.

Shredabilities - our amazing program providing children with diverse abilities with fun and exciting opportunities to learn to skateboard and do tricks. Alongside a mission to make shredding accessible, we strive to introduce essential and generalisable safety concepts.

Moveabilities - Teaching children the fundamentals of movement, exercise and dance. Here, our goal is to develop fine motor skills, help families and children build social networks and provide youth with opportunities to let their creativity out.

Teamabilities- Providing youth with disabilities, with the fundamentals behind participation in team sports. This includes promoting values of sharing, turn-taking and being an encouraging and supportive member through applied, research-based adaptive sports.

Defendabilities- Focussing on de-escalation and defense tactics and tackling the prominent issues regarding bullying in Australian schools; there is a disproportionately high number of children with disabilities being targeted, and we aim to develop the skills required for children with disabilities to be able to build confidence and independence.

At All Star Tennis, we live and breathe our values, creating a tennis experience that's as vibrant as it is inclusive. Founded by two school friends with a shared passion for sports and coaching, our journey began as a hobby but quickly evolved into a thriving business. We are driven by our love for the game and a strong desire to share it with everyone. 

Our Commitment to Community
Our community-focused approach has built partnerships with local councils and organisations, allowing us to add significant value to the neighbourhoods we serve. We believe in diversity, where individuals from all walks of life come together to share their love for sports and community.

25 Years of Excellence
As we celebrate our 25-year anniversary, our commitment to excellence remains unwavering. We continually enhance our brand to be the best place to train and work in the world of tennis. Our mission goes beyond profits—we reinvest in enhancing court facilities and supporting the local community.

Inclusive and Accessible
In collaboration with organisations like the LTA and local groups such as Friends of Wandsworth Common, we strengthen our community support, ensuring that tennis is truly accessible to all. We provide life-changing experiences for children through the All Star Trust school outreach programmes, breakfast clubs, and offer support for performance players.

Our Values
•	Fun

•	Professional

Join us at All Star Tennis, where every swing is a step towards a stronger, more connected community.

Name: JVW Program for Football Development
Description:
The JVW Girls Football Program, is the largest football program for women in South Africa, co-founded by former Banyana Banyana captain Janine van Wyk and businesswoman Lauren Duncan. The JVW Girls Football Program founded in 2012, to create opportunities for girls of all ages to play in a comfortable and gender-catered environment.

To date, the JVW Girls Football Program currently has a team competing at all levels of football for women within the South African Football Association structures – namely the national HollywoodBets Super League, which is the highest division of women’s soccer in South Africa, the provincial Sasol League, the Ekurhuleni Regional League, and the Gauteng Development League.
In addition to competitive football, the JVW Girls Football Program also holds a development program within its structure and the JVW Girls School League.

The JVW Girls School League is the largest high school league for girls’ football. Launched in 2012, the JVW Girls School League hosts over 160 schools across Gauteng and has over 3200 girls actively competing in the annual league.

The JVW Girls Football Program continuously aims to be a trailblazer in South African Women’s Football and afford young girls and female athletes a platform and environment to chase their dreams, aspire for greatness and prepare themselves to compete at international standards.

Létání je bezpečné a vhodné pro dospělé i děti od 5 let. Není potřeba žádná předchozí zkušenost – profesionální instruktoři vás vše naučí a zapůjčí vám kompletní vybavení.

Let ve větrném tunelu je nejen nezapomenutelným zážitkem, ale také skvělou volbou pro:

 Teambuildingy a firemní akce
 Školení, prezentace a pracovní setkání (k dispozici je konferenční místnost)
 Firemní večírky s možností netradičního občerstvení v restauraci s výhledem na letovou komoru

 Nabízíme také dárkové poukazy, které jsou skvělým benefitem pro zaměstnance, originálním dárkem pro klienty nebo netradiční cenou do soutěží.

Name: Comité Régional Sports pour Tous Ile de France
Description:
Le Comité Régional Sports pour Tous Ile-de-France est un organe déconcentré de la Fédération Française Sports pour Tous, association loi 1901, agréée par le ministère des Sports et reconnue d’utilité publique.

Accessible et socialisante, la Fédération Française Sports pour Tous a pour ambition de mettre à la disposition de tous une offre d’activités physiques adaptées et variées. Grâce à ses champs d’actions diversifiés, la Fédération travaille à l’éveil physique des plus jeunes, renforce les relations parents-enfants, encourage l’affirmation de soi chez les adolescents, favorise la forme, la santé et le bien-être pour les adultes, préserve le capital santé des seniors et permet le mieux-être et l’autonomie pour les personnes âgées dépendantes.

Cette diversité des activités fédérales est un véritable support pour la promotion de l’activité physique de loisir. Ses missions de formation, de réinsertion, d’accompagnement tout au long de la vie font de la Fédération un acteur incontournable de l’offre sportive en France.

We help companies and other employers to engage, motivate and vitalize their employees with our teamdevelopment, teambuilding and vitality programms.

Name: Koninklijke Sportfondsen Nederland B.V.
Description:
Sportfonden geeft energie! Wij zetten ons in voor een vitaal Nederland. Wij geloven in de kracht van bewegen. In de kracht van mentale uitdaging. En in het plezier om dat samen te doen. Met doelgerichte programma’s en accommodaties vanuit een gestroomlijnde organisatie werken wij samen met gemeenten, maatschappelijke organisaties en andere partners op het brede domein van beweging én welzijn.

Met meer dan 3.000 medewerkers exploiteert Sportfondsen, via een 100-tal ondernemingen, meer dan 550 voorzieningen zoals zwembaden, sporthallen, ijsbanen, multifunctionele sportcentra en sociaal-culturele centra. Name: Amazing Athletes
Description:
Amazing Athletes provides a year-round, structured curriculum that introduces children to 10 different ball sports and helps them to master 6 key areas of motor-development. Our program is taught in a non-competitive, learning-based environment. We work with each child at their own progression level to ensure they are able to reach their highest potential.

Each weekly class focuses on two different sports and one area of motor-development. Also incorporated into each class are activities designed to improve the young child’s hand-eye coordination, muscle tone, flexibility, cardiovascular fitness and more.

Amazing Athletes is a Franchise 500-ranked mobile children's franchise that helps activate youth to help instill a lifetime of healthy habits at an early age.

Visit www.amazingathletes.com or call 888-228-3942 for more information.

Name: Khater Sports
Description:
With 30 years of proven performance under the most severe conditions, you will find Khater Sports is a mark in the largest stadiums, sporting clubs, schools, residential compounds, hotels, and governmental institutions. 
We have delivered outstanding projects in every governorate in Egypt as well as several projects in the MENA region. 
We are proud to have the best sports construction engineers and technicians in the region making sure every project is delivered with superior quality and global standards. 
Khater sports offers comprehensive customized sports solutions aiming to create an attractive environment for people to play sports and lead a healthier lifestyle. 
These solutions include building and maintaining natural and artificial turf fields, athletic tracks, indoor halls, outdoor courts, and swimming pools using an array of different systems. Aside from the construction and maintenance of these facilities, we provide all the accessories and equipment needed like scoreboards, timing systems, stadium lighting,bleachers, basketball boards, nets, treadmills, barbells, etc. 
We also offer consultancy and management of sports venues to some of the largest organizations in Egypt.

Name: African Union Sports Council
Description: The African Union Sport Council is a Specialized Technical Office of the African Union whose responsibility is co-coordinating the Africa Sports Movement and the forum for concerted action between Member States for the promotion and development of sport.

Name: Transforming Basketball
Description:
Transforming Basketball exists as a vehicle to share how Alex Sarama and his team practically apply the principles of contemporary skill acquisition. The Transforming Basketball approach is centered upon an ecological dynamics rationale being used as a framework used to view basketball performance and reconceptualise the role of the coach and basketball practitioner.

An ecological approach underpins the methodologies adopted by Transforming Basketball. The five design principles of a nonlinear pedagogy manifest into the application of a constraints-led approach. Rather than viewing skills as techniques or patterns to be acquired and internalised, skill is viewed as an emergent property predicated around the relationship between the player and their environment.

Transforming Basketball exists to help the basketball world move beyond traditional paradigms that have existed across many decades. Through online resources, blogs, podcasts, online courses, live events and consulting, the basketball world now has an opportunity to benefit from evidence-based ideas.

Name: Instituto Mais Ação
Description:
O Instituto Mais Ação é uma Organização da Sociedade Civil de Interesse Público (OSCIP) fundada em 26 de maio 2018 com o objetivo de promover o desenvolvimento pessoal e a inclusão social por meio do esporte e da educação. Buscamos fortalecer os laços entre crianças e adolescentes, promovendo valores como trabalho em equipe, respeito e superação. Através de parcerias estratégicas e envolvimento da comunidade, estamos inspirando vidas e construindo um futuro melhor por meio do esporte.

Atualmente, o Mais Ação executa os projetos Mais Ação Olímpico, Mais Ação Voleibol, Semear Esportes e Sementinhas do Esporte, todos gratuitos.

Name: Infinity Global Sports
Description:
Argentina Soccer Trips.

At Infinity Global Sports, we are passionate about delivering unforgettable soccer experiences. Based in Buenos Aires with an office in New York, we specialize in crafting tailor-made soccer journeys that connect teams from the US with the rich soccer culture of Argentina.

Whether you're a young talent seeking to hone your skills or a coach aiming to inspire your team, we provide an all-encompassing package that includes competitive matches, training sessions with top Argentine coaches, and attendance at thrilling professional games. Our participants get the chance to play in the same cities that produced global soccer icons like Lionel Messi and Diego Maradona.

Our services extend beyond the pitch. From arranging accommodations and local transportation to organizing cultural tours, we ensure every aspect of the trip is managed seamlessly. Our local expertise and partnerships with major clubs like River Plate and Boca Juniors allow us to offer exclusive access to world-class training facilities and match-day experiences.

At Infinity Global Sports, we believe in the power of soccer to inspire and unite. Join us to experience the heartbeat of Argentine soccer—where passion meets the pitch.

Name: Pickleball Kingdom

Pickleball Kingdom is the premier indoor pickleball franchise, dedicated to making the fastest growing sport in the world accessible year round. Through state of the art facilities, world class programming, and a strong focus on community, Pickleball Kingdom is redefining modern recreation while helping entrepreneurs build high performing businesses.

With over 400 franchises awarded and expansion underway across the United States and internationally, Pickleball Kingdom is the largest and fastest growing indoor pickleball brand in the world. We also lead the industry in AUV, giving operators a proven, high revenue, labor light model in one of the most exciting categories in sports and wellness.

Name: Club Respect
Description:
Genuine and deep respect is key to every healthy and strong relationship. Respect for the other, even when there’s a difference.

Attitudes, behaviour and language modelled in clubs ripple out to the rest of society. When these behaviours tip towards the abusive end of the scale, clubs need to act before they become commonplace and deep-seated.

Knowing how to best deal with the situation can be difficult — that’s where Club Respect comes in. Club Respect shows you how to bring about, and maintain, a club culture that leaves no room for bullying, sexism, racism, abuse or violence.

Imagine a community full of clubs that value respect, safety, fairness and equality; reducing violence and abuse across our wider society from the ground up. This is the point, and power, of Club Respect.

-------

Club Respect is a national harm-prevention initiative by the Dugdale Trust for Women & Girls, of which the Victorian Women’s Trust is Trustee.

Name: Monkey Moves
Description:
Onderzoek toont aan dat meer en beter bewegen effect heeft op de gezondheid van kinderen. Dit in de vorm van een betere fysieke fitheid, optimale motorische ontwikkeling, betere schoolprestaties en betere sociale vaardigheden. Kinderen leren alleen niet meer hoe te spelen! Daarbij is aangetoond dat deze positieve effecten een rol blijven spelen tijdens de volwassen leeftijd. 

Wij brengen gezond bewegen weer terug in het DNA van het kind. Door kinderen samen te leren spelen, samen regels te maken en aan te passen en de basis van 12 verschillende sporten aan te leren, verrijken wij de beweegervaringen, keert het plezier terug, stimuleren we zelfredzaamheid en sociale verbondenheid. 

Ons programma heeft als doel kinderen op motorisch- en sociaal vlak optimaal te stimuleren. Niet alleen binnen onze lessen, maar juist ook daarbuiten. 

Monkey Moves biedt multisport lessen als middel voor fitte zelfredzame kinderen met een positief zelfbeeld! 

Wij geloven in een leven lang gezond in beweging! Doe je mee?

Name: CREPS de Bordeaux
Description:
Le CREPS (Centre de Ressources, d’Expertise et de Performance Sportive) de Bordeaux est un établissement public local de formation dans les domaines du sport, de la jeunesse et de l’éducation populaire.

Créé en 1945, placé sous la tutelle de l’État, le CREPS est implanté à Talence sur un site de 15 hectares, propriété de la Région Nouvelle-Aquitaine.

Centre de préparation aux Jeux de Paris 2024, le CREPS de Bordeaux accueille plus de 400 sportifs au sein de 25 pôles et accompagne d’autres sportifs de haut niveau de Nouvelle-Aquitaine dans leur projet de vie. 

Il forme 950 stagiaires par an au sein de 67 sessions de formations ; 158 000 heures de formation sont ainsi dispensées.

Name: Coach Logic
Description:
TWO COACHES ON A MISSION


Coach Logic started in 2012 from the shared experience of co-founders Andy Muir and Mark Cairns, both seasoned rugby players, coaches and educators. Their inspiration behind developing technology to help teams better perform on the pitch started after spending countless hours filming matches and then squeezing into a changing room with the squad to analyse the game on a tiny screen. This clunky and mostly inefficient way of analysing performance led them to the question: 

“Is there a better way to do this?”

That moment was the beginning of Coach Logic - a platform designed by coaches, for coaches. Built to make analysis easier, communication clearer, and reflection deeper - to solve a universal pain point in sports analysis. 

The original Coach Logic Teams product has grown into a globally recognised and used platform, trusted by thousands of coaches across multiple sports. It helps teams collaborate to analyse faster, learn quicker, and stay connected off the pitch, as well as on it. 

But as we’ve supported more teams, one truth has become clearer than ever: athletes perform better when their coaches are more effective. 

Introducing SAM: the coach development platform 

Built from a decade of coaching experience and product innovation, SAM is a newly dedicated coach-development tool, powered by AI and grounded in real coaching practice. 

Where Teams brings players and coaches together, SAM turns the spotlight onto the coaches themselves. It helps coaches reflect deeper, think clearer, and grow their skills with analysis and smart insights. 

It’s coaching development, personalised. And it’s the tool we wish we’d had back in those early days.

Name: Football Association of Malawi
Description:
Football Association of Malawi (FAM) was founded in 1966 as the governing body of football in Malawi and got affiliated to FIFA in 1967, to the Confederation of African Football (CAF) in 1968 and later on to the Council of Southern Africa Football Associations (COSAFA) in 1997. FAM is established in accordance with the Malawi National Council of Sports Act: Chapter 30.10 of the Laws of Malawi.

FAM as an institution is run by an elected body of Executive Committee members headed by a President. The tenure of office for the Executive Committee is 4 years. The Executive Committee members also serve on various sub-committee of the Football Association. The Executive arm of FAM is elected by the congress that constitutes 9 affiliates of FAM.

Football Association of Malawi (FAM) is headquartered in Chiwembe Township, about 2 kilometers off – Illovo (Malawi) Sugar Ltd round-about in Limbe. Its offices are within the FIFA-funded Technical Centre. The infrastructure comprises of two football fields, a 26-room hostel, a conference center, an auditorium, office blocks, recreation rooms, a restaurant, and laundry.
The Association manages all Malawi National Football teams.

- Remonter les bonnes et les nouvelles pratiques auprès de la Fédération

Description:
At Soccer Herformance, we are driving the advancement of health, wellness, and performance solutions across the women’s game. We are committed to helping players, coaches, practitioners, teams, and organizations achieve their highest potential through cutting-edge sports science research and performance insights.

Ellie Maybury is the visionary behind Soccer Herformance. Ellie is renowned for shaping the success stories of players, teams, and organizations at the highest levels of women’s soccer. Ellie is not just a performance consultant; she is a trailblazer, dedicating her career to elevating sports science and performance support across the women’s soccer landscape.

With a profound understanding of the unique challenges of women’s soccer players, Ellie has become a beacon of inspiration in the realm of women’s soccer. Ellie brings insight and knowledge from nearly two decades of work across a variety of women’s soccer environments. Her most recent employment was with the U.S. Soccer Federation, where she served as Head of Sport Science for the Youth National Teams before transitioning into the role of Head of Performance for the U.S. Women’s National Team. Before U.S. Soccer, Ellie held various positions at Birmingham City Women’s Football Club, The Football Association, and Nike.

Ellie’s passion lies in developing female-specific health, wellness, and performance initiatives. Through consulting, she aims to provide performance services to players, coaches, practitioners, teams, and organizations and drive research and innovation throughout the women’s game.

The Galo Method is not only more efficient and effective, but faster, more repeatable, and more accurate, contributing to its consistency.

Name: الاتحاد السعودي للجودو |  Saudi Judo Federation (SJF)
Description:
يُمثل الاتحاد السعودي للجودو الجهة الرسمية لتنظيم وتطوير رياضة الجودو في المملكة العربية السعودية، ويعمل تحت إشراف اللجنة الأولمبية والبارالمبية السعودية. 

يسعى الاتحاد إلى بناء منظومة رياضية متكاملة تسهم في تطوير اللعبة محليًا، وتوسيع قاعدتها المجتمعية، ورفع مستوى التنافسية على المستويين الإقليمي والدولي، بما يتماشى مع مستهدفات رؤية المملكة 2030 في قطاع الرياضة. 

تُعد رياضة الجودو أحد أبرز الفنون القتالية اليابانية الحديثة، وقد تأسست في أواخر القرن التاسع عشر على يد الدكتور جيغورو كانو، مستلهمة من تقنيات الجوجيتسو التقليدية، ومطورة بأسلوب يعزز القيم التربوية والرياضية في آنٍ واحد. 

يعني مصطلح “جودو” (柔道) “الطريق اللين”، وهو تعبير يعكس الفلسفة التي تقوم عليها هذه الرياضة، والتي تعتمد على استخدام التوازن والمهارة بدلاً من القوة المباشرة. 

الجودو رياضة أولمبية معترف بها دوليًا، وتمارس على نطاق واسع من قِبل مختلف الفئات العمرية حول العالم. وتُسهم في تعزيز الصفات الشخصية مثل الانضباط الذاتي، والثقة بالنفس، واحترام الآخر، والالتزام بروح التنافس الشريف، إلى جانب فوائدها البدنية والصحية.

Aperio Sports is a dedicated platform, crafted to assist aspiring footballers in navigating their football journey. 

The opportunities in football are endless yet it can be confusing and scary to walk this path which is why Aperio is here to walk beside you..

At Aperio Sports we mentor, support, and place footballers in two key verticals:

 European Academy Development – Through our partnerships in Portugal and Spain, players undergo structured training and are scouted for club opportunities, with realistic targets and long-term growth in mind 

 U.S. University Placement – We build complete athlete profiles and connect players directly with university coaches, helping them secure scholarships and admission as student-athletes—without going through the conventional application route.

We're not an academy, nor a club. We are a consulting firm for footballers, and our model is simple: identify talent, guide them strategically, and connect them to the right ecosystem—whether it's an academy, university, or club

Our vision is long-term, our approach is personalized, and our mission is clear: to redefine the future of football talent, one player at a time.

Name: Tumbling Tigerz (PTY)ltd
Description:
Tumbling Tigerz has been operating as a physical child development program since 2011, delivering gross motor development to children in the foundation phase (Ages 3 - 9). The development and movements that are incorporated in the Tumbling Tigerz program are essential in assisting children with Core strength, Coordination, Crossing the midline, Gross motor development, social development and many more. 

These movements and the gross motor program that Tumbling Tigerz facilitates is not to be considered as a Sport or Extracurricular activity, but is rather to be considered as a preventative gross motor development program or a maintenance program for children that will need to attend therapy or return to therapy if certain strength and development maintenance is not up kept and this will be detrimental to not only the physical state of the child but the mental state as well.
The role of physical development during the foundation phase is part of the curriculum and the cognitive developmental aspects that the children engage during these sessions also benefit the concentration and cognitive ability in the classroom.

Name: Wales Outdoors
Description:
Wonderful 5 Star guided walks and guided tours in and of Wales. Leaders are qualified mountain leaders and/or tourist guides and are also ambassadors for many areas of Wales. We offer both engaging and enthusiastic delivery of your day.

Some walks begin at the start point and others we can pick up in Cardiff, or any location in Wales by arrangement. All tours currently begin in Cardiff.

Name: Brain Ball
Description:
Remettre le corps en mouvement pour réactiver le potentiel de chacun — enfant, adulte, senior.
Une pratique ludique qui marie mouvement et rythme : Brain Ball stimule conjointement les capacités motrices, cognitives et socio-émotionnelles.

Les exercices développent coordination, latéralité, proprioception (moteur), attention, mémoire de travail, inhibition (cognitif) et coopération, communication, confiance partagée (social).
Le rythme associé à la manipulation de balles fait office de langage universel, accessible et fédérateur.

Méthode française née de l’expérience de terrain, Brain Ball s’est imposé comme une solution innovante et accessible.
Présente dans les écoles, EHPAD, collectivités et structures sport-santé, elle renforce l’attention, la coordination et la confiance à travers une pratique ludique et progressive.

Nous formons et accompagnons les professionnels de l’éducation, de la santé et du sport à intégrer le mouvement dans leurs séances. Ce maillage constitue un réseau national de professionnels certifiés et licenciés Brain Ball, gage d’une mise en œuvre cohérente, sûre et évolutive.

Brain Ball, c'est :
 un Organisme de formation certifié Qualiopi
 un Réseau de professionnels engagés sur le terrain.
   une Innovation française déployée sur le terrain, au service des apprentissages, de l’autonomie et de la prévention à tout âge.

Our comprehensive training program includes everything from basic skills like dribbling and passing to advanced tactics and physical conditioning. What sets us apart? Flexibility. You can schedule sessions in nearby fields, backyards, or private facilities, tailoring your coaching to meet the needs of your trainees.

In terms of compensation, we offer some of the highest pay rates in the industry, ensuring you start earning right away. If you're committed, passionate, and ready to make a meaningful impact, join the Dribbler team today and help us shape the future of soccer in America!

Name: Pilates with Kate Dublin
Description: Stott Pilates can help you build strength, balance, flexibility and posture - creating a happier, healthier body for you to enjoy! Stott Pilates beginners, intermediate and advanced Pilates.

Name: Bowlpark
Description:
Somos una organización socioeducativa con 15 años de trayectoria que impulsa el bienestar ecosistemico en las personas  a nivel   formativo, comunitario y territorial, mediante el desarrollo de procesos de empoderamiento que vinculan deporte, educación,  naturaleza, infraestructura y articulación de agentes de impacto.

Propósito
Promover el bienestar ecosistémico de las comunidades a través  de la planificación estratégica de iniciativas de impacto local y el desarrollo de experiencias significativas en sus territorios, fortaleciendo habilidades personales, liderazgo local, conciencia social, mejoramiento del espacio público y vínculo con la naturaleza.

Misión y Visión
Fundación Bowlpark crea y acompaña espacios seguros de práctica deportiva, aprendizaje y comunidad, utilizando el deporte y el territorio como herramientas para el desarrollo personal y colectivo. Nuestra visión es lograr de manera participativa Comunidades prósperas y sostenibles donde cada persona es un agente de transformación que tiene acceso real  a moverse, aprender y pertenecer a territorios naturales o urbanos.

Name: Teamchallenge.at
Description:
Die Teamchallenge.at ist ein fesselndes Teambuilding Outdoor Abenteuer, das die Spannung eines Escape Rooms mit der Aufregung einer Schnitzeljagd kombiniert. 
Mittels App und Einlesen von QR-Codes kommt man immer zu neuen Hinweisen, spannende Rätseln und spannenden Teamaufgaben. 

Jetzt an drei Standorten in Deutsch Kaltenbrunn, Bad Waltersdorf und Laßnitzhöhe!

Einfach zu jedem beliebigen Termin auf unserer Homepage buchen, Link zur App erhalten und sofort loslegen. 

Ein Team besteht aus 3-6 Personen - und beliebig viele Teams können die Challenge gleichzeitig durchführen.

Name: Wado Ryu Karate Amriswil
Description:
Bei uns steht die Gesundheit an erster Stelle, daher sind wir mit unserem Karate als J+S Experte, J+S Sportleiter und J+S Kidsleiter (Polysportiv) beim Jugend und Sport (J+S) dabei.

Durch die Kampfkunst Karate wird Selbstvertrauen, Konzentration, Koordination, innere Stärke, Gesundheit und Fitness aktiv gefördert!

Daher für alle Altersgruppen geeignet.

Bei Fragen: 
Meldet euch oder schaut vorbei!

Sportliche Grüsse 
Nicola Ioná

Name: MyTrainingMap
Description:
MyTrainingMap is a marketplace for training camps. Our platform is connecting training camp planners with camp service providers from around the world.

MyTrainingMap was created by athletes, for athletes. Knowing the complexity of organizing training camps, we wanted to simplify the process. We did this by curating popular camp locations into one place – a space to search, discover, and connect.

Name: Baldershallen
Description:
Baldershallen drivs av Sundsvalls Tennisklubb och har som ambition att genom samverkan mellan många olika racketsporter och andra idrotter skapa Sveriges trevligaste och mest innovativa racket- och idrottshall. En unik och inkluderande mötesplats på 15 000 kvm där vi räknar med att ca: 1 000 barn och ungdomar kommer att passera varje dag.

Här ska ungdomar kunna ”hänga” och umgås, få hjälp med läxor, äta och utöva sin idrott. Samtidigt vill vi även underlätta vardagspusslet för föräldrar genom att erbjuda vuxenkurser, ett topmodernt gym för träning, likväl som fritt wifi och stora ytor för att sitta och jobba medan barnen tränar. Eller varför inte en matlåda med bra hemlagad mat att ta med hem efter träningen, när ibland orken att laga mat inte infinner sig.

Genom det stora idrottsutbudet i kombination med bemannad reception, konferensavdelning, relaxavdelning och restaurang erbjuds företag och föreningar oändliga möjligheter till både kund- och personalaktiviteter där det går att kombinera idrott och friskvård med konferens och måltider.

Name: Eiserner-Franke
Description: Weltrekord mit 66 Ironmans im Jahr 2019
Location: Nürnberg, Never Walk Alone Nürnberg e.V.

Name: Barça Academy Campus
Description:
#BarçaAcademy around the world
Teaching Barça values

I way to play. I way to grow 

Welcome!

Name: Wo*Men's Sport Land of Freedom
Description:
WO*MEN’S SPORT LAND OF FREEDOM is an international project that aims to further highlight how much mentality, values and interpersonal skills of RUGBY are a fundamental tool for the future of our boys and girls.

Sport is a toolbox for everyday life, to learn, experiment... win, lose, pick yourself up...building trust in yourself and in others and believing in teamwork. 

WE SUPPORT the importance of study and culture alongside sport, as a solid basis for independence; we believe that those who have trained to get involved and commit to achieve goals in sport, have a background that
creates another opportunity to be CHOSEN ON THE JOB MARKET, and therefore create a better future.

We strongly believe that our modern society and our companies, need motivated people with a strong work ethic, characteristics that the world of sport has already settled and from this conviction , the proposal for a test THAT MORE STRONGLY CONNECTS THE WORLD OF SPORT TO THAT OF COMPANIES.

Name: SPORTOZEN
Description:
Sportozen is a premier sports management and community-driven platform dedicated to creating unparalleled sporting experiences. From organizing top-tier tournaments to fostering vibrant sports communities, we are committed to promoting active lifestyles, inclusivity, and competitive spirit.

With a growing presence in Gurgaon, Delhi, Chandigarh, and Jaipur, we specialize in:
 Tournaments & Leagues – Cricket, Badminton, Pickleball & More
 Corporate Sports Events – Elevating workplace wellness through sports
 Community Building – Connecting like-minded sports enthusiasts
 Premium Sports Venues – Book & play at the best facilities

Whether you're a casual player, professional athlete, or a corporate team, Sportozen provides the perfect platform to play, connect, and compete. Join us and be a part of a thriving sports ecosystem!

 Visit Us: https://sportozen.com/
 Get in Touch: info@sportozen.com

Name: The Olympic Oval
Description: The Olympic Oval is a legacy facility of the 1988 Olympic Games. It is a place where Olympic dreams come true and athletes are put in a position to achieve their personal best. An important and integral part of the University of Calgary’s Faculty of Kinesiology; the Oval is a speed-skating facility, a research facility for UCalgary kinesiology scholars, a training facility for varsity athletes and a public facility to serve the University community.

Name: Private Coaching Collective
Description:
The Private Coaching Collective (PCC) is the driving force behind a dynamic network of organizations, all committed to providing youth with unparalleled opportunities to grow through sport and fitness. PCC unites a diverse group of brands, programs, and experts, each contributing unique experiences, initiatives, and resources designed to nurture both athletic potential and personal development.

At PCC, we believe that sport has the power to transform lives. By fostering confidence, resilience, and teamwork, our programs empower the next generation to excel not only in sports but in all areas of life. Our mission is to create inclusive, high-quality programming that inspires young athletes, helps them develop essential life skills, and instills a lifelong love of physical activity.

Our collective approach ensures that every program under PCC thrives on shared expertise, resources, and a unified commitment to excellence. Sport Explorers delivers engaging school-based programming, including before- and after-school activities and Physical Education support, ensuring kids have enriching opportunities to stay active and develop skills. Athlete Prep focuses on athlete development for all levels, offering dynamic programming and resources to help young athletes grow, improve, and succeed. Meanwhile, SportsWeek specializes in providing unforgettable seasonal camps—Spring, Summer, Winter, and Pro-D Day—that keep kids active, learning, and having fun year-round.

PCC collaborates with schools, communities, and organizations to expand access to our programs and promote positive, lasting change. Through partnerships, innovative training methods, and a focus on fun and inclusivity, we are setting a new standard for youth development in the sport and fitness industry.

Together, we’re building a future where every child has the opportunity to thrive.

Name: Fit at Home
Description:
We love to make you move!  

Welcome to Fit at Home, the biggest workout platform in Europe. We offer more than 500 workouts in the U.K. and Spain and over 1000 workouts in The Netherlands. The number one fitness app is available on Virgin Media, Samsung Smart TV, LG and Philips and you can also access via web on any device. You can do your workout whenever you want. Easy and accessible for the whole family. Next to the different workout videos, like Dumbbell & Fit, Pilates & Fit and Kids & Fun, we also offer meditation videos. And with our free reminder service you’ll never miss a workout. Join us today and become the fittest version of yourself!

Name: Peer Performance
Description:
Making Football Training Planning Easy & Fun for Volunteer Coaches.

At Peer Performance, we know that local football is built by passionate volunteer coaches who juggle jobs, family, and coaching. But planning engaging, structured training sessions takes time—time that many coaches simply don’t have.

That’s why we created Peer Performance—a training app that helps coaches generate fun & effective training sessions in seconds. 
 No more long hours researching drills. 
 No more struggling to keep players engaged. 
 Just fun, research-backed workouts designed to improve performance & enjoyment—without the stress.

 What We Offer:
 Instant Training Plans – Tailored specifically to your team.
 Fun & Science-Based Workouts – Always with the ball—keeping your players engaged!
 Save Time & Build Confidence – Run structured sessions, even for new coaches..
 Customizable Training – Adjust workouts to match your team’s needs.

 Why It Matters
Local football needs more support, and we’re here to empower volunteer coaches with the tools to lead better training sessions, inspire players, and create a lasting impact.

 What is local football?
Local football refers to non-professional, community-based sports played at amateur clubs and grassroots teams—where anyone can participate and grow.

Name: Blue Reef Diver
Description:
With more than 40 years of experience in delivering diving related services to its customers; Blue Reef Diver is an accredited PADI licensed (S479) company that started in, the bride of the red sea, Jeddah Saudi Arabia since 1980.

Our experience and interment knowledge of the region enables us to tailor unique packages including diving trips as well as learning our customers how to dive to discover first-hand the flora and fauna on the famous Red Sea reefs. 

We offer a variety of packages for diving trips, practical diving classes with skilled instructors and a wide range of accommodation in our resort accompanied with entertainment activities.

Name: Houwelingen Health
Description: Bent u op zoek bent naar personal trainer die werkt op basis van een compleet en optimaal 'Personalized' samengesteld trainingsprogramma inclusief lifestyle- en voedingsadvies? Neem vrijblijvend contact met mij op. Jan van @HouwelingenHealth

Name: Great Lakes Sailing
Description: Welcome to Great Lakes Sailing, the premier sailing school in Chicago. Our adult sailing education program offers courses on Lake Michigan that cater to both cruising and racing enthusiasts. As a community sailing program, we believe in providing a fun and safe environment for sailors of all levels. Join us and learn how to master the waters of Lake Michigan.

Name: Interactie Sportbedrijf Ermelo B.V.
Description:
Interactie Sportbedrijf B.V. geeft namens de gemeente Ermelo invulling aan het sport- en cultuurbeleid. Wij brengen inwoners van alle leeftijden en achtergronden in beweging door o.a.: 
•	sport- en bewegingsmogelijkheden te faciliteren
•	inwoners te helpen bij het naleven van een gezonde leefstijl
•	cultuur voor iedere inwoner toegankelijk te maken
•	diverse sport- en cultuurlocaties te beheren 
•	Het expertisecentrum van Ermelo te zijn op het gebied van bewegen, (inclusief) sporten en een gezonde leefstijl.

Name: Ligue Nouvelle-Aquitaine de Handball
