Name: GravityZip
Description: GravityZip is India's First & Only Indoor Skydiving Arena located in Gandipet, Hyderabad. Feel the thrill of flying high in the air while being in a controlled environment without the need of jumping from the plane or pulling a parachute. Join us to enjoy the feeling of defying gravity, being unfettered and free, in a completely safe environment.

Name: TimeToMove
Description:
TimeToMove is een organisatie die zich richt op het structureel versterken van welzijn binnen de zorg. Vanuit jarenlange praktijkervaring ontwikkelen en ondersteunen wij concepten die aansluiten bij de dagelijkse realiteit van zorgorganisaties.

Wij werken aan welzijn dat niet afhankelijk is van losse activiteiten, maar onderdeel wordt van het dagelijks leven op de afdeling. Daarbij combineren we uitvoeringskracht met conceptontwikkeling en organisatiebrede ondersteuning.

Binnen TimeToMove is WelzijnPlus ontwikkeld als structureel welzijnsconcept. Via maandelijkse welzijnsboxen ondersteunt WelzijnPlus dagelijks welzijn, familieparticipatie en samenwerking, zonder extra druk te leggen op zorg- en welzijnsteams.

TimeToMove werkt samen met zorgorganisaties, management en maatschappelijke partners aan duurzame, uitvoerbare en mensgerichte vormen van welzijn, passend bij verschillende zorgsectoren en doelgroepen.

Name: Sportsynthesis
Description: Building strong foundation through sports and fitness that applies in all spheres of life.

Name: Cyclo Studio
Description:
Cyclo Studio is a boutique workout studio inspired by New York City located in Ghent, Kortrijk, Roeselare & Antwerp.
Cyclo Studio offers a class-based, cycling workout experience in a trendy studio. From playfull rythmic sessions to more data driven power rides. 
Different classes for different needs!

Our rockstar instructors will inspire, support & push you at all times.

Cyclo Studio will make your workout, 
your favorite part of the day.

For specialized corporate rides, do not hesitate to contact us.

Name: Your Workout Personal Training
Description: Personal Training, Duo Personal training, voedingsbegeleiding, Bootcamp

Name: Volley
Description:
Volley is on a mission to revolutionize racquet sports. We are the world’s first digitally enabled robotics as a service (RaaS) training platform focused on sports such as platform tennis, pickleball, tennis and padel. Combining a digitally controlled ball trainer with an AI vision network, Volley creates opportunities for players, pros and clubs.


Players experience workouts that provide tailored live-play scenarios, receive video footage of their play, and gain instant access to pro feedback. Pros gain access to creative tools that can help energize established programs and build new ones, while expanding their coaching reach and engagement through prescribed training, video feedback, and same-side on-court instruction. Clubs can provide members an innovative new service without investment. Volley offers unlimited training opportunities to those looking to up their game.

Name: coachup.academy
Description:
At coachup academy we equip coaches with the latest knowledge in neuroscience and how to apply it in their sports team.

The coachup mission: 
 We believe sports has the power to change lives. Better coaches means better teams, and better teams makes for a better world.  A world where through building sports teams that are collaborative, inclusive and perform better, we can positively impact social relationships both in and out of sports.

 coachup brings the science of teams to life through proprietary diagnostic assessments, practical exercises for coaches, a book written specifically for sport coaches & expert training courses and masterclasses. All based on the latest applied neuroscience.

The “Problem”:
Coaches make or break the performance of sports teams, but they are rarely equipped with the latest behavioral science to apply into their coaching. Existing coaching qualifications focus mainly on the physical, and technical side of team performance. Most coaches are not taught the social pillar which offers the keys to team dynamics and high performance. 

This is where coachup comes in. Our expertise in creating high-performing teams using applied neuroscience has been proven in the business and operational team environments, and now we aim to support sport coaches create high-performance environments for their players. This starts and finishes with having the right social environment in your team, so that your players are engaged, motivated, connected, highly performing, and having fun!



Check out what we do bellow

Website 

https://www.coachup.academy/

Linktree 

https://linktr.ee/coachup.academy

Instagram 

@coachup.academy

Facebook 

https://www.facebook.com/coachup.ac

Name: Gymno'bus
Description: Le dispositif du "Gymno'Bus" a été créé pour aller à la rencontre des territoires et des entreprises des parcs d’activités de la Région Centre-Val de Loire, à des fins de développer de manière préventive et durable la pratique des activités physiques et sportives au bénéfice de la santé de tous les salariés.

Name: Wild Cairns
Description:
Transform corporate team building into an exhilarating adventure at Wild Cairns. Nestled in the stunning East Lothian countryside, our outdoor activity centre is dedicated to delivering unforgettable experiences that merge fun with functional teamwork. Specialising in dynamic activities, we offer challenging assault courses, thrilling axe throwing, and strategic airsoft gun range shooting with zombie targets—each designed to strengthen team bonds and enhance communication.

Understanding that the essence of a robust team lies in collaboration and enjoyment, Wild Cairns ensures every activity pushes teams out of their comfort zones within a supportive and exhilarating environment. Our activities are crafted to allow team members to discover their hidden strengths and forge deeper connections with their colleagues, transforming a day out into a powerful team-building opportunity.

Why Choose Wild Cairns for Corporate Team Building?

Engaging Activities: From obstacle courses to axe throwing and zombie-target airsoft shooting, our activities ensure high participation and enthusiasm.
Customised Experiences: Events are tailored to meet your team's specific needs, focusing on leadership, trust, and collaborative skills.
Professional Facilitation: Our experienced instructors are adept at guiding teams through challenges, ensuring safety and promoting teamwork.
Stunning Location: The breathtaking landscapes of East Lothian provide a perfect escape from the office, inspiring and invigorating your team.
Whether aiming to enhance team dynamics, celebrate a company milestone, or give your team a well-deserved break, Wild Cairns is your go-to destination for building stronger teams through adventure and enjoyment. Connect with us to plan your next corporate outing and watch your team's spirit soar as they tackle challenges and celebrate successes together.

Name: SMASHD Research Group
Description:
At SMASHD we bring together leading research and action learning in movement cultures and sport to generate inclusive models of physical cultures, sporting organization and youth development to increase wellbeing, performance and participation. Our work focuses on six main interrelated themes:
 
Indigeneity, place and space as shapers of inclusivity and wellbeing
Sport, bodies and youth development
Sporting cultures and operations for social and personal wellbeing
Transformation of organizational operations and practices in sport
Safe spaces for all in sport and exercise
Global movement cultures

Name: Sportstichting Zuidplas
Description:
Welkom bij Sportstichting Zuidplas

Met een divers beweegaanbod in het water, de sporthallen en in de gymzalen maakt Sportstichting Zuidplas (SSZ) bewegen voor iedere inwoner van Zuidplas mogelijk. We bieden kwalitatief hoogwaardig zwemonderwijs. Scholen, verenigingen, bedrijven en particulieren kunnen in onze accommodaties terecht.
Location: Nieuwerkerk aan den IJssel, South Holland

Name: Padel Kiosk
Description:
Enabling (unmanned) Padel clubs to provide 24/7 service to players through a permanent supply of padel rackets, padel balls, snacks and drinks, via a stylish and user-friendly vending machines.

We offer different plans:

► Full service: we manage the Padel Kiosk at your club, you receive commission on every sale/rental.

► Full ownership: you buy and manage the Padel Kiosk.

 Read more: www.padelkiosk.be 
 Get in touch: info@padelkiosk.be

Name: Très Bon Point
Description: Une équipe de consultation dévouée au soutien des entraineur·es, des dirigeant·es et des organisations sportives francophones.

Name: Arruno Exploration
Description:
Sailing and growing go hand in hand on a Grow sailing trip. It is the perfect combination between personal and professional growth and a pure experience on the ocean. During this unique trip, the participants will take a charted course that is carefully supervised by professional coaches or trainers. 

Our Grow trips are carefully structured. First and foremost, We plan a run-up first and foremost, where we focus on the preparation for the nautical aspects and for learning the charted course itself. We then embark on a sailing trip together on the ocean for several days. During this intense journey you will come into contact with your own "I", learn to work together, dare to be vulnerable and learn from yourself and from others. The sailing trip is the final element where our sailors disembark with ambitious plans and ideas.

Name: SPOKI
Description: The goal of this Erasmus + project is to introduce an innovative and science-based method in European countries to activate more children (aged 8-10 years) to sports.

Name: Ride Gudauri
Description:
Ride Gudauri was born from the love of adventure and a deep connection to the mountains. Founded by Goga Ogbaidze and Ana Mtavrishvili, our story is rooted in the heart of Gudauri, where Goga, a former top skier in Georgia, grew up with a profound bond to the land. Together, we offer unique experiences that showcase the beauty and thrill of Gudauri—from skiing with certified instructors to exploring the mountains on snowmobiles, quad bikes, horseback, and even paragliding.

Our team, led by Goga, who is also a certified IFMGA/GMGA instructor and TOT (Teachers of Teachers), is dedicated to providing exceptional service and unforgettable adventures. At Ride Gudauri, we don’t just offer activities; we share the spirit and warmth of Gudauri’s local community, making every visit truly special.

Join us in discovering the hidden gems of Gudauri, where every moment is an adventure.

Name: Miyem Basketball Academy
Description:
A PROPOS DE L’ACADÉMIE
Passionnés de Basket, les membres de la Miyem Basket Academy s’occupent d’organiser des événements sportifs autour du basket pour les enfants, adolescents et adultes. Sous la bénediction d’Endy Miyem, à l’origine du projet, la MBA vous informe des nouveaux camps d’été et stages de formation disponibles.

Name: BA Footballers Academy
Description:
BAFA es una academia de formación futbolística con sede en Buenos aires, orientada al desarrollo integral de jóvenes futbolistas, respetando las características y demandas de cada etapa formativa. 

Nuestra enfoque combina entrenamiento técnico - coordinativo, desarrollo neurocognitivo, acompañamiento pedagógico y una visión a largo plazo del jugador, priorizando la toma de decisiones, la inteligencia de juego y el crecimiento personal.

BAFA ofrece programas adaptados tanto para jugadores locales como para futbolistas internacionales que buscan vivir la experiencia de formarse y competir en el fútbol argentino.

A partir de 2026 nuestra propuesta se estructura en 3 niveles de servicio, permitiendo acompañar al jugador desde la iniciación hasta la proyección profesional.

Name: SIMUL'TIR OISE
Description:
Simul'tir Oise est un simulateur de tir en 3D. Il permet des entrainements à la gestuelle de tir grâce à sa précision unique au monde et ses différentes disciplines disponibles.
Je vous accueille dans ses locaux ou à domicile avec son barnum de projection transportable.
Je vous propose également l'organisation de tous types d'évènements dans ses locaux ou sur le lieu de votre choix.
Dans l'espace physique, vous trouverez un service de bar et une salle de détente en plus du simulateur.

Name: boulder
Description: Bringing climbing culture to Qatar, boulder is 280 sqm of fun, challenging climbs, giving you a mental, physical and social workout. Climbing at boulder is associated with adventure, play, risk, athleticism and enjoyment. It's great solo, and it's great in groups. An Olympic sport spreading across the globe, boulder is Qatar's answer to indoor climbing. With socials, lessons, academies and collaborative events, boulder is a safe space to grow, workout and develop your strength and resilience.

Name: PolyApa
Description:
PolyAPA est une société spécialisée en Activité Physique Adaptée APA
Nous sommes situés à Chessy (Val d'Europe) et nous intervenons sur toute la France

Name: Aarhus Håndbold Fonden
Description: Fonden for Aarhus Støtter Håndbolden (i daglig tale Aarhus Håndbold Fonden) er stiftet i 2023 for at skabe de bedste betingelser for udvikling af århusiansk håndbold. Fonden støtter alle typer af håndboldrelaterede aktiviteter i Aarhus. Fonden ejer også selskaberne bag Aarhus Håndbolds liga-kvindehold og 1. division-herrehold. Med de to flagskibe er det målet at skabe oplevelser for alle håndboldinteresserede i byen og inspirere børn og unge til at dyrke sporten, vi alle sammen holder af.

Name: European Irish Rugby Experience
Description: Developing rugby across Europe with Irish spirit

Name: Fundación Real Madrid Clinics Western Europe
Description:
DAS KÖNIGLICHE FUSSBALLCAMP
Real Madrid ist der populärste Fußballverein der Welt. Die „La Cantera“, die Jugendakademie der Königlichen, gilt zudem als beste Nachwuchsschmiede im internationalen Fußball. Mit der Fundación Real Madrid Clinic transportieren wir das Trainingskonzept unserer erfolgreichen Jugendarbeit in acht europäische Länder und damit auch in deine Nähe. In den 5-Tages-Fußballcamps machen wir die Magie des Vereins für Euch Teilnehmer erlebbar. Die größten Talente erhalten sogar die Chance, sich über ihre Leistungen für ein Fußball-Wochenende in Madrid zu qualifizieren.

Name: Talent Forge
Description:
"Greatness doesn’t wait to be found — it’s identified, nurtured, and forged.
Welcome to Talent Forge by SEM Fitness Academy.
We scout athletic potential in children aged 8 to 16 using scientific, sport-specific assessments.
From speed, strength, agility to coordination and reaction time — we assess it all to identify natural talent.
Our expert coaches and sports scientists provide personalized reports to guide every child’s journey.
We don’t just find talent — we shape it. With training, guidance, and care, we turn potential into performance.
Enroll today and give your child the opportunity to shine — on the field and beyond.
Talent is everywhere. Let us help you find it."

Name: MatchDay
Description: At MatchDay we want people to play the sports they love their entire lives and remain an active member of their unique player community. It is our passion to deliver a premier playing and app experience to make doing so as easy and convenient as ordering a ride hail or your favorite meal.

Name: L'Etablisienne
Description:
Un lieu  unique à Paris dédié au faire-soi même, à l’ameublement et à l’habitat.

    Ouvert à tous, étudiants, professionnels et particuliers.

    Un atelier en self-service où louer des établis, des outils et bénéficier d’un espace de stockage.

    Un espace de formation où des artisans vous conseillent et vous guident dans tous vos projets de fabrication, création, réparation, rénovation…

Name: Prime Education Hub
Description:
Prime Education Hub is an App with the aim of empowering performance specialists and physiotherapists to move the world of sport forward.

Combining the excellent knowledge of our experts with artificial intelligence, we want to revolutionize the world of online sports education.

Name: National Tennis Association
Description: Providing opportunities to play, learn and compete.

Name: Love And Dive
Description:
Bienvenu chez Love & Dive !

Passé 40 ans, habités par un p’tit grain de folie, nous nous sommes lancés dans l’incroyable aventure de la plongée. 

Instantanément à la suite de notre baptême, la plongée est devenue une passion commune. 

Très vite, l'envie de partager notre bien-être est devenue virale. Nous avons alors entrepris notre apprentissage Padi afin d’être à même d'enseigner. 

Notre seule envie? Vous contaminer et vous faire entrer dans une autre réalité ... Dans notre réalité.

Name: Aspire Academy
Description:
Aspire Academy is a driving force behind the Orange high-performance rugby program. As an official 'accelerator' within the Oranje Pathway, we work closely with Rugby Netherlands, Rugby Academies and a broad network of (inter)national partners. Together we support players, coaches and rugby professionals to excel and take Dutch rugby to an international top level.

Our mission consists of three spearheads: Drive / Operate / Spread:
1. Drive Talent Acceleration for National and International Success Stories - Together with our internationally skilled staff and partners, we develop and support the next generation of rugby talent for national teams and international careers.
2. Operate the Platform for High-Performance Coaches and Trainers - Aspire provides a powerful platform where coaches and trainers can grow, develop and access full-fledged career opportunities.
3. Spread the Values of Rugby - We bring the core values of rugby – Respect, Discipline, Passion, Perseverance and Camaraderie – to other sports and society, making the magic of rugby accessible to a wider audience.

Join Aspire Academy and become part of the future of rugby in the Netherlands!

Name: Mountain Bike United
Description: The Mountain Bike United app is your gateway to the world's mountain bike community and experiences.

Name: The Community Cricket Enterprise UK Ltd
Description:
The Community Cricket Enterprise UK is a genuine grassroots collaberation of innovative and passionate minds who live the beauty of cricket, and wish to share that connection
Insights and knowledge gained from over 100 combined years of amateur cricket playing and administration - all processed and available via our consultancy and freelance service.
Processed using an inate understanding of cricket's and cricket club's current position in societies that face larger challenges.
We assist clubs, Parish & village councils, leagues, charities, schools, community groups and clubs that don't exist yet (club set up)
With a template club (New Western Wave CCC) and ground in the offing, The Community Cricket Enterprise is set to ignite interest and engage communities in cricket from an a unique angle

Name: AFM MANAGEMENT

Tu souhaites découvrir les métiers du sport? N'attends plus, rejoins nous! 

Nous proposons des formations en alternance ou en continue et accessibles aux personnes en situation de handicap.
- Le BPJEPS RUGBY 
- Le BPJEPS Activités Pour Tous (APT)
- Le BPJEPS Activités de la Forme option Haltérophilie Musculation

Nous proposons aussi des bilans d'orientation et de personnalité. 
Conçu pour les sportifs de haut niveau, ce diagnostic permet de mieux se connaître et ainsi prendre des décisions d’orientation en tenant compte de ses intérêts, de ses goûts, de ses points forts et de ses axes d'amélioration.

Contacte nous pour plus d'informations et démarrer ta formation.
06 64 38 48 20

Name: playera
Description: We are a sports company with a vision to make sports and tournaments more accessible to people

Name: SportsPlayMotion
Description:
SPM strives to create a positive environment for learning in all our lessons. We award those who apply our sporting principles in sessions. We offer all sports in the national curriculum.

SportsPlayMotion provides PE provision, extra-curricular clubs, holiday camps and other exciting projects. 

We aim to mirror the experience the children get in the classroom in our lessons by including the following:

Focused learning objectives and success criteria for children to track their progress.

Frequent opportunities for peer and self-assessment- During our debrief, all students discuss who they believe applied the SPM principles in pairs/groups.

Differentiation and challenges to meet the needs of all children

Clear, structured behaviour management strategies that partner with your school’s system.

Name: Joy to SUP
Description:
SUP staat voor Stand Up Paddling. Hierbij sta je op een soort surfplank (SUPboard) op het water en beweeg je jezelf voort met een peddel in je handen.

Suppen is komen overwaaien vanuit de Hawaïaanse surfscene en is een van de snelst groeiende watersporten van dit moment. De hoogste tijd dus om dit in onze mooie Achterhoek te beoefenen!

Tijdens het suppen ben je lekker buiten in de natuur op het water bezig. Het is het enorm ontspannend en tegelijkertijd train je een groot deel van je lichaam. De perfecte combinatie van relaxen en toch sportief bezig zijn!

Bij Joy to SUP kun je terecht voor SUPlessen, SUPyoga, SUPtours èn kun je een van deze SUP-activiteiten toevoegen aan je vriendenuitje, bedrijfsuitje, vrijgezellenuitje of kinderfeestje.

Name: Team Super Sports
Description:
Team Super Sports is on a mission to become the UK’s number one premium sports camp provider for Independent Schools. Founded in 2016 by former PE teacher Dan Super, we deliver high-quality, inspiring holiday sports experiences that ignite a lifelong love of sport in young people.

We partner with leading Independent Schools across the Midlands and beyond, providing professional, player-focused, and premium camps that enhance the reputation of our host schools. Our experienced coaching team blends passion, expertise, and care to create fun, inclusive, and engaging environments where every child can thrive.

Our core offering includes:
Multi-Sport Holiday Camps – packed with energy, skill development, and teamwork.
Pro-Camps – sport-specific programmes led by specialist coaches.
Parties and Sports Leaders Courses – extending our impact beyond the holiday calendar.

We are proud to work in partnership with outstanding Independent Schools such as Solihull School, King Henry VIII School (Coventry), Bablake School (Coventry), Princethorpe College (Rugby) The Blue Coat School (Birmingham) and Malvern College (Worcester), delivering unforgettable camp experiences that parents trust and schools value.

With a proven track record of growth - and a commitment to excellence guided by the EOS business operating system, we continue to expand into new regions while maintaining our 4.9+ Google rating.

At Team Super Sports, we believe that exceptional camps inspire confident, active, and happy children. We’re building the future of school holiday sport — one premium camp at a time.

Name: BL Ballers Foundation CIC
Description: BL Ballers Foundation CIC

Name: Hockey Vlaanderen
Description:
Hockey Vlaanderen organiseert, ontwikkelt en vertegenwoordigt de hockeysport in Vlaanderen en het Brussels Hoofdstedelijk Gewest.

Met aandacht en respect voor ethiek, fair play en familiewaarden stelt zij zich ten dienste van alle clubs om hen te ondersteunen in hun dagelijkse werking. Ze streeft ernaar elke inwoner de mogelijkheid te bieden om de hockeysport te beoefenen in clubverband, op een kwalitatieve manier, en dit op recreatief, competitief en/of topsportniveau.

Om de nationale kampioenschappen te organiseren en de nationale teams te ondersteunen, werkt zij samen met de Royal Belgian Hockey Association en Hockey Wallonie Bruxelles.

Hockey Vlaanderen is opgericht in 2012.

Name: NeXgen Sports Academy
Description: At NEXGEN Sports Academy we offer comprehensive training programs for football enthusiasts of all ages. Our training sessions are designed to enhance skills, promote teamwork, and foster a lifelong love for the game.

Name: U.S. Soccer Parent
Description:
When our son started his journey as a young soccer player, we wanted to help him choose the best path forward. We were overwhelmed with research and information and had no way of deciphering the system. 

At ussoccerparent.com, we believe that informed and engaged parents play a crucial role in their children's soccer development. By fostering open communication, promoting fair play, and encouraging a love for the game, we aim to create a thriving youth soccer community that benefits players, families, and the sport. 

Our Mission
To provide a resource to help start your athlete's journey and provide information to guide those already on their path. 

What We Offer
•	Resources & Information for understanding the youth soccer landscape.
•	Up-to-date information on youth soccer trends, opportunities, and best practices
•	Forums for connecting with other soccer parents and sharing experiences

Subscribe to our Newsletter - Pitch Perfect!
https://bit.ly/ussoccerparent

Name: Footballer Plus
Description: Footballer Plus is a pioneering online platform that connects top football coaches and global opportunities with young players from local pitches, basements, and backyards who lack access to high-quality training. Our mission is to become the leading global football development platform by providing accessible, affordable coaching that promotes holistic player growth, including technical skills, mental toughness, and performance nutrition. By cultivating a worldwide community, Footballer Plus aims to democratize football education and nurture talent from diverse regions.

Name: New England Disabled Sports
Description:
“Where Boundaries are Broken”

New England Disabled Sports (NEDS) is a 501 (c) (3) not-for-profit organization, providing adaptive sports instruction to students of varying abilities that meet the General Essential Eligibility Criteria . It is through the generous donations of individuals, corporations, and foundations that close to 600 student-athletes living with disabilities are able to enjoy adaptive sports year-round.

Headquartered at Loon Mountain Ski Resort in Lincoln, NH and at the Bretton Woods Ski Resort at Omni Mount Washington Resort NEDS has become a nationally recognized program, providing expert adaptive sport instruction to adults and children living with physical and cognitive disabilities.

Name: Golf.One
Description:

Experience our contemporary golf facility offering expert tuition, 4 Trackman golf bays, a fully stocked bar, and a social lounge – all in one location.

Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned golfer, Golf.One accommodates all skill levels. Explore our four golf simulator bays for practice, a selection of over 200 courses to play, and engaging golf games. Our onsite bar is fully stocked with a range of beverages such as tea, coffee, beers, ciders, and cocktails. 

A fantastic location for birthdays, special occasions, or a unique venue for networking, corporate, and business events.

Gather your friends, family, and colleagues for a round of virtual golf at Golf.One, where our ethos is enjoyment for everyone.

En The L4F Pro Football Academy, no solo entrenamos, sino que personalizamos tu experiencia para que cada momento en el campo sea una oportunidad de crecimiento. 

Nuestros entrenamientos están pensados para maximizar el nivel de futbolistas y porteros que desean mejorar sus cualidades técnicas, físicas, toma de decisiones en el campo, interpretación del juego y aumentar su confianza.

La edad o nivel es indiferente, adaptándonos a las necesidades del futbolista, ya sea benjamín, juvenil o senior.

Name: Pin Point Indoor
Description: Pin Point Raleigh is the premier destination in Raleigh, North Carolina, offering a sprawling 72,000 sqft facility dedicated to sports and entertainment. Featuring 16 state-of-the-art indoor pickleball courts, 8 cutting-edge golf simulators, and 8500 sqft of indoor chipping and putting greens, we provide an unparalleled experience for enthusiasts of all skill levels. Our amenities also include a vibrant sports bar, a well-stocked pro shop, and two versatile event spaces capable of hosting private corporate events for up to 100 guests.

Name: Sportzon India
Description:
Welcome to Sportzon, the ultimate playground for sports fanatics!

Nestled along NH-24 in Ghaziabad, Sportzon boasts a stellar sports complex featuring a top-notch imported football turf, an incredible basketball court, cricket pitches, a skating zone, and an archery range!

But that’s not all—Sportzon isn't just a place; it’s a powerhouse of athletic possibility, blending technology with sport. 

Our dynamic website and user-friendly app ensure that whether you're lounging at home or on the move, you’ve got access to everything you need to stay active. 

Find, book, and engage with sports facilities and trainers effortlessly through our platform. For businesses, it’s your go-to spot for showcasing events and services. 

Sportzon is where tech meets fitness, making sports more accessible and life healthier. Dive in, get active, and discover the joy of sports like never before!

Enjoy top-notch facilities and have a blast playing your favorite sports!

Name: Mov'n'Play
Description:
J'ai créé Mov'n'Play, dont l'objectif est de favoriser le mouvement, partout, pour tous !
A l'école, on apprend mieux lorsque l'activité plaît au cerveau, dans un contexte où l'enfant peut courir, parler, jouer, rire, tout en étant avec ses copains.
En centre de loisirs, en milieu associatif, on se dépense plus lorsque l'activité est challengeante et innovante.
En club sportif, on donne du sens au déplacement jusqu'à le rendre intuitif.
En entreprise, on booste la cohésion d'équipe avec des défis et des activités invitant au dépassement de soi.
En Ehpad, en IME, on favorise l'autonomie en travaillant la motricité et en élargissant le répertoire d'activités accessibles au public accueilli par ces établissements.

Je m'appuie sur la solu.tion Learn-O., génératrice de motivation, dont le fonctionnement est basé sur un outil numérique, des balises et des doigts électroniques ainsi que des cartes défi !

Si le concept vous intéresse, rendez-vous sur www.movnplay.fr.

A bientôt !

Name: Aqua Nation Sports Academy - ANSA
Description:
Aqua Nation Sports Academy LLC (ANSA) is a new-age Sports and Endurance Training Academy headquartered in Dubai and India, committed to shaping the next generation of athletes through world-class coaching, scientific methodologies, and a results-driven approach.

ANSA is founded and led by George Mathew, a Sports Entrepreneur and Mentor with 28+ years of corporate leadership experience across Fortune 500 multinational companies. His vision blends professional discipline with a passion for sport, creating a training environment where excellence, innovation, and athlete development come together.

The academy is also guided by Pradeep Kumar, National Swimming Coach of India, four-time Olympian, and Dronacharya Awardee. With over three decades of experience in nurturing national and international champions, Pradeep brings unparalleled expertise and global coaching insights, ensuring every athlete receives training that meets elite international standards.

At ANSA, our mission goes beyond performance. We aim to inspire a strong sports and fitness culture across communities—making athletic development accessible, holistic, and impactful. Our programs are rooted in the latest scientific techniques, modern training technologies, and proven coaching frameworks that deliver measurable results.

We currently offer training programs for all ages and genders in Dubai, UAE, supported by certified coaches, advanced methodologies, and a structured curriculum designed for lifelong skill development. As part of our global expansion, we will soon be launching our services in additional cities worldwide.

Whether you're a beginner, a young aspirant, or a competitive athlete, ANSA is committed to helping you unlock your potential and build a stronger, healthier, and more confident future through sport.

Name: Health Festival
Description: Een weekend vol body & mind workshops, kennis, workouts en inspiratie. Kosteloos op meer dan 100+ verschillende locaties door heel Amsterdam!

Name: Amateur Pickleball Association
Description: The Amateur Pickleball Association (APA Tournaments) hosts pickleball tournaments around the country at destination locations, permanent court venues and NCAA tennis facility venues that we flip into pickleball courts.  These events are open to all ages.

Name: Wonderfin
Description:
Wonderfin is a new approach of exclusive leisure activities in the water. 

Our company, working as external partner, provides unforgettable water experience to hotels' and resorts' guests. 
It is more than a swimming lesson! The young participants turn into mermaids, sharks or dolphins who will explore the magic treasures of Oceania. The swimming team of Wonderfin includes two different aquatic activities: the Swimming School and the Mermaid Academy. 

Explore more about us and our recreational activities on our website.

Name: Station Roffa
Description:
Elke dag hoopt elke Rotterdammer dat de dag mooier wordt dan gisteren. Mooier in wat we kunnen, in wat we hebben, in wie we kennen. En soms kan het lastig zijn om in je eentje weer in beweging te komen: om wonen, werken, en delen weer op de rit te krijgen of houden.


Dan is het fijn om die plek te kennen waar dat zomaar kan gebeuren. Waar een mooiere morgen soms soms gewoon een kwestie is van binnen komen. Een lekker lage drempel, met allemaal oplossingen. Ontmoeten en praten. Fixen. Verbeteren. Een kortstondig tussenstation richting een nog beter leven. Voor Rotterdammers die van spoor willen wisselen naar de kansen die op hun wachten. Naar elkaar.

Name: Courtside
Description:
CourtSide is redefining sport and lifestyle in Central India — bringing together professional-grade Pickleball, Padel, a temperature-controlled Swimming Pool, and a community-centric Café and Pro Shop under one purpose-built arena. Designed for people who want more from their fitness spaces, Courtside blends high-performance facilities with a modern social culture, creating a place where you can train hard, recover well, and genuinely belong.

OPEN TO:
• Sports equipment partnerships
• Premium beverage/health collabs
• Lifestyle & fitness retail tie-ups
• Launch events & brand activations at Courtside

Name: Summit Mentality
Description:
We are a company with a very clear vision...

To encourage the world to push themselves mentally and physically to become a slightly better version of themselves every single day.

We believe that the best way for people to get started on their fitness and personal development journey. Is to be surrounded by a positive community. A community of like-minded thinkers with a single objective...an objective to improve.

We are building this community through hosting running clubs, fitness & wellbeing retreats, group fitness sessions, and much much more.

All of our events and fitness classes are accessible to all fitness levels. We welcome anyone with open arms who have decided to find a route of self-improvement. 

We hope to see you in the near future!

Name: Coach For Life Foundation
Description:
The Coach for Life Foundation has been established by Jon & Sue Tanner and a group of foundation Trustees via their Charitable Trust, the Sport Development and Innovation Charitable Trust with a clear objective of growing the quality of youth sport coaches in New Zealand.
 
We believe that quality youth sport coaching helps grow, nurture and develop our young athletes to become better athletes, better people, and better New Zealanders. 

If we can enhance the capability of our youth sport coaches we believe young athletes will have richer sporting experiences and are more likely to stay in sport longer. 
 
To achieve this the Coach for Life Foundation is committed to delivering programmes of work that provide our youth sport coaches with resources and inspiration to enable them to provide quality sporting experiences for our youth.

Name: GOLFABELLA
Description:
GOLFABELL was founded in 2023 by serial entrepreneur Aleksandra Efimova with a mission to reimagine the golf lifestyle for executive and accomplished women—through curated golf experiences, elegant performance apparel, and a vibrant community.

GOLFABELLA offers curated, invitation-only local golf clinics, Nine & Dine outings, and destination retreats—each designed to foster meaningful connections, personal growth, and a shared passion for the game.

Our apparel is crafted in Italy using advanced fabrics and expert tailoring. Created for women who lead dynamic, sophisticated lives, GOLFABELLA pieces blend elegance, comfort, and performance—on the course and beyond.

Whether joining a local curated outing or traveling to a world-class resort, GOLFABELLA invites you to experience golf as a source of empowerment, well-being, and connection.

Name: Esports Track Shack
Description:
Esports Track Shack provides testing and analysis of esports athletes' core gaming skills.

We are a small, but highly dedicated team driven by our vision of providing esports athletes, coaches and teams with the best and scientifically proven tests of core gaming skills.

Name: Centre National de Formation by ASPTT
Description:
Le Centre de Formation Grand Est by ASPTT répond à un besoin pour des stagiaires en quête d’une formation reconnue dans la filière des métiers du sport ! 

Notre organisme de formation, situé sur le bassin Mosellan, dans un magnifique complexe sportif, propose une session BPJEPS « Activités physiques pour Tous », mais aussi des formations fédérales de qualité.

Le Centre National de Formation du Grand-Est c'est :
 Une salle omnisports de 1000 m²
 Un dojo
 Un espace de réunion (vidéo projecteur, wifi…)
 18 terrains de tennis (8 couverts et 10 extérieurs)
 Un espace de restauration (intérieur et extérieur)

Le tout au sein d'un complexe de 4 hectares, à quelques minutes du centre ville de Metz

Name: Cap Ardennes Events
Description:
Cap Ardennes Events – Votre partenaire pour des expériences uniques au cœur du Massif de l’Ardenne

Bienvenue chez Cap Ardennes Events, spécialiste de l’organisation et de l’animation d’activités sportives et ludiques pour tous les âges. Notre mission ? Vous faire découvrir le Massif de l’Ardenne sous un jour nouveau, à travers des expériences mémorables et accessibles à tous.

Nous vous proposons une gamme variée d’activités nautiques et terrestres autour du lac des Vieilles Forges, avec un équipement de qualité garantissant confort et sécurité : canoës, kayaks, stand-up paddles, paddles géants, vélos sur l’eau, trottinettes tout-terrain et VTT. Que vous soyez amateur de sensations fortes ou en quête de détente, nous avons ce qu’il vous faut !

Experts en team building, nous collaborons avec un réseau de professionnels reconnus pour concevoir des animations originales qui renforcent la cohésion et l’esprit d’équipe. Parfait pour les entreprises souhaitant allier plaisir et performance.

Nous accompagnons également vos événements professionnels en partenariat avec le centre des congrès du lac des Vieilles Forges. De la logistique complète à un soutien ciblé, nous prenons en charge les détails pour que vous puissiez vous concentrer sur l’essentiel : vos invités.

Passionnée et engagée, notre équipe met un point d’honneur à offrir des moments inoubliables tout en respectant la nature qui nous entoure. Chez Cap Ardennes Events, chaque activité est une invitation à explorer, partager et profiter pleinement du cadre exceptionnel des Ardennes.

Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour en savoir plus ou pour planifier votre prochaine aventure avec nous. Ensemble, faisons de votre événement un succès !

Name: Federación Costarricense de Ajedrez

Name: DK Keepersschool
Description:
WELKOM BIJ DK Keepersschool
DK Keepersschool staat onder leiding van Danny Klijnholstz. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in het trainen, motiveren en het uitdagen van keepers.

Trainingen voor voetballers worden veel aangeboden en staan al jaren in de belangstelling van voetballiefhebbers. Maar bij ons draait het juist om de keepers en staat de keeper op de eerste plaats. Bij ons kun je trainingen volgen, zodat je jezelf optimaal kunt ontwikkelen. Dat doen wij in verschillende klassen, waardoor iedereen op zijn plaats zit. Je kunt bij ons terecht voor keepersopleidingen, keepersdagen, keepersclinics en privétrainingen. Verder zijn wij voor verenigingen ook in de te huren als keeperstrainer. Heb je interesse in een van deze vormen of meer? Neem dan contact met ons op via dkkeepersschool@gmail.com

Name: Envision Chess Academy
Description:
Transformative Chess Education at Envision Chess Academy - Empower Your Chess Vision.

Envision Chess Academy stands as the beacon for chess enthusiasts seeking a transformative experience. Our academy boasts a cadre of seasoned FIDE-certified trainers, each dedicated to unlocking the strategic prowess within every student. Whether you're nurturing the budding passion of a young prodigy or refining the skills of an experienced player, Envision Chess Academy is your gateway to excellence. Join us in shaping the grandmasters of tomorrow, where every move is a step towards brilliance. Elevate your game with Envision Chess Academy – because success is not just a move; it's a lifestyle!

Name: Pacelab Ltd
Description: ith its pioneering sports science-driven approach to coaching fast bowling, PaceLab provides private cricket coaching for individual cricketers, teams and coaches of various ages and experience levels. The brainchild of Steffan Jones, PaceLab aims to help as many bowlers as possible increase their pace ceiling and fulfil their fast bowling aspirations

Name: Líderes Esportivos
Description:
O Líderes Esportivos nasceu em 2021, incubado pela Mais Impacto, ambas iniciativas fundadas por Daiany França Saldanha.  Seu lançamento teve patrocínio do Departamento de Estado dos EUA e apoio do IREX, organização internacional de desenvolvimento e educação. 

Desde então, nos tornamos uma estação de conhecimento dedicada a fortalecer lideranças e projetos esportivos. Nossa plataforma reúne profissionais, educadores e gestores para compartilhar conhecimento, trocar experiências, potencializar redes e ampliar o impacto do esporte na sociedade. 

Atualmente, o Líderes Esportivos é coordenado pelo Instituto Mudar o Jogo, que atua para fortalecer o esporte como um direito e uma expressão viva das comunidades, mobilizando recursos, influenciando políticas e ampliando sua relevância social, diversidade e investimentos. 

O que oferecemos
 — Comunidade – Grupo exclusivo no WhatsApp, no qual divulgamos oportunidades e apoiamos a construção de projetos esportivos de qualidade, acessíveis e inclusivos. 

 — Blog – Explore conteúdos e reportagens exclusivas sobre gestão de projetos, mulheres no esporte, patrocínio esportivo e educação esportiva de qualidade. 

 — Produções audiovisuais – Conheça o Linha de Frente, nosso projeto que valoriza e fortalece a imagem de quem faz o esporte acontecer nas quebradas, produzindo fotos e vídeos profissionais que contam histórias reais e inspiram novas parcerias. 

— Vozes do Esporte – Podcast que amplia a visibilidade e o reconhecimento de mulheres que estão transformando o esporte no Brasil. Em cada episódio, histórias inspiradoras de atletas, gestoras, treinadoras e comunicadoras revelam o poder do esporte como força de mudança social e liderança feminina.

Name: SUP yourself
Description:
Onze bedrijfsnaam says it all... ZELF SUPPEN.

Suppen is de snelst groeiende watersport van dit moment; laagdrempelig en voor (bijna) iedereen geschikt. Maar, het handmatig verhuren van SUPboards is arbeidsintensief, tijdrovend en zorgt vaak voor logistieke problemen. 
We’ve been there, done that!

Dat kan namelijk echt veel makkelijker! Met onze volledig geautomatiseerde, onbemande en off-grid SUPverhuurbox kunnen jouw klanten wanneer ze maar willen een SUPboard huren. 

Voor je klanten is het huurproces super simpel en overzichtelijk. In één oogopslag zien ze de beschikbaarheid en zijn onafhankelijk van jouw locatie- en dagplanning.

Omzet draaien terwijl jij ondertussen tijd hebt voor andere werkzaamheden... makkelijker wordt het niet! En dit alles zonder extra personeel!

Interesse in een SUPverhuurbox op jouw locatie of een samenwerking? Neem contact met ons op!

Name: Sport4All GO
Description:
Het team van Sport4AllGO heeft jarenlange ervaring op het gebied van sport en bewegen voor kinderen & volwassenen van veel verschillende soorten doelgroepen. Sport4All GO biedt de mogelijkheid tot sporten individueel en in groepsverband. 
Als leefstijlcoach & sportinstructrices kunnen we jou begeleiden naar de balans naar een gezond(er) & fit(ter) leven. Ook kunnen we advies en begeleiding bieden aan mensen waarbij de sport of beweegaanvraag gecompliceerder ligt en daardoor vraagt om specifiekere randvoorwaarden.
Op deze manier vinden we voor iedereen die graag sport of in beweging is, een passende vorm. 
Binnen Sport4All GO of daarbuiten.

Name: AFA Academy
Description:
AFA Academy gives soccer players the opportunity to train with the method which allowed the Argentinian National Football Team being one of the most successful teams in history. 

High quality facilities and AFA certified coaches assure the perfect environment for developing technical, tactical and mental skills as a World Champion player, helping young girls and boys to upgrade their abilities.

Name: The Flying Caddie
Description:
The Flying Caddie - A caddie in your pocket.

Helping golfers arrive prepared and confident, while helping clubs create unforgettable experiences.

The Flying Caddie redefines how courses are discovered and experienced. For golfers, it builds anticipation before the round, clarity on every tee, and a deeper connection to the course. For clubs, it is a premium storytelling platform, created with your professionals, that showcases strategy, character, and beauty, attracting new visitors, engaging members, and encouraging repeat play.

We don’t just show courses, we help golfers feel them.

Name: Sport Management UCLouvain - Olympic Research Centre
Description: Le groupe de recherche Sport Management UCLouvain est lié au Louvain Research Institute in Management and Organizations (LouRIM) et ses membres sont impliqués à la Faculté des sciences de la motricité (FSM) de l’UCLouvain. Ses recherches portent notamment sur la gouvernance, la responsabilité sociale, la diversité et l’inclusion dans le sport. En se fondant sur les connaissances scientifiques à la pointe, le groupe accompagne les acteurs du sport d’aujourd’hui et forme les managers de demain.

Name: Diving Ireland
Description:
Diving Ireland is the national governing body for recreational underwater sports in Ireland. We were founded in 1963 to organise and promote sport scuba diving and snorkelling. Diving Ireland has grown since then to incorporate over 63 clubs around the Country and now includes the sports of Underwater Hockey and Freediving. Diving Ireland courses are ISO accredited and use the CMAS standards. The Diving Ireland  instructor training programme  is integrated with the Sport Ireland adventure sport instructor framework. Diving Ireland is the only diver training organisation integrated with the Sport Ireland instructor training programme.

If you are interested in learning to Scuba Dive, Snorkel, Freedive or play Underwater Hockey our doors are always open to the complete beginner as well as the more experienced individual. Our objectives are to allow you to develop the skills required to excel at this amazing activities within a friendly, safe, professional and continually developing environment.

Name: BULGARIAN ESPORT FEDERATION
Description: We are committed to developing and promoting esport in Bulgaria by supporting players, teams, and organizations, fostering grassroots initiatives, and creating opportunities for growth and competition at all levels. Our mission is to build a thriving esport community and elevate the industry to new heights.

Name: Hoops Factory Bordeaux
Description: Hoops Factory Bordeaux est une salle 100% dédiée à la pratique du basketball dans toutes ses formes (5x5, 3x3, Handi-Basket, ...). Un complexe unique sur le territoire de la Nouvelle-Aquitaine ! Ouvert à tous les amateurs de la balle orange. Venez comme vous êtes !

Name: Brooks Ellis Coaching
Description:
As a former NFL linebacker, I know what it takes to compete at the highest level. As a coach, I aim to help your child maximize his potential on the field by learning the proper technique and adopting the mental and physical toughness required to win in the sport. 

Physical training entails developing agility, mobility, plyometrics, speed, strength, and position-specific skills, while mental training includes leadership, accountability, battling through adversity, time management, and football IQ development. 

Not only are we training football skills, but I also offer natural and holistic health coaching that I have adopted into my routine over the years. In 2018, I suffered my third total concussion, which unfortunately ended my career and caused long-lasting symptoms. Instead of relying on medication to manage the symptoms, I dove headfirst into courses, books, and training that taught me how to recover using ancient, natural, and modern research-based techniques designed to treat the root cause. 

During my football career, I made many mistakes that inhibited my performance on the field, despite my longevity in the sport. My coaching provides your child with everything I've learned about how to excel in the sport of football while avoiding easily addressable routines and behaviors directly transferrable to life outside of football.

Football is training for life, and my coaching will prepare your son to maximize their potential on and off the field.

Name: Prime Padel Events
Description:
Welkom bij Prime Padel Events, dé specialist in het organiseren van hoogwaardige padeltoernooien. Sinds onze oprichting in 2024 hebben we ons toegewijd aan het creëren van unieke en onvergetelijke padelervaringen, zowel voor particulieren als voor bedrijven.

Bij Prime Padel Events staan kwaliteit en passie voor de sport centraal. Of je nu een fanatieke speler bent of op zoek bent naar een dynamisch personeelsuitje, wij zorgen voor een evenement dat perfect aansluit bij jouw wensen. Voor bedrijven bieden we op maat gemaakte community- en personeelsevenementen aan, waarbij teambuilding en sportieve uitdaging samenkomen.

Onze missie is simpel: iedereen laten genieten van de snelle en spannende sport padel, door het organiseren van topklasse toernooien en events. Sluit je aan bij de groeiende community van padelliefhebbers en ervaar zelf waarom Prime Padel Events dé keuze is voor padeltoernooien van het hoogste niveau.

Name: Sportbelang SGK
Description:
Stichting Sportbelang SGK zet zich in voor iedereen met een beperking in de regio Den Haag. Het doel is door middel van sport en beweging een veilige plek in de samenleving te creëren voor mensen met een beperking.

Die veilige plek gaat verder dan alleen dat uurtje sporten. Stichting Sportbelang SGK draagt bij aan de sociale toegankelijkheid door een verbinding te creëren tussen sporter, vrijwilliger, coach en de samenleving. De kwaliteiten van de sporters worden ook benut langs de zijlijnen. Het deskundige team van sportprofessonials wordt aangevuld en ondersteund met vrijwilligers uit de doelgroep zelf. 

Sporters nemen zo deel op hun eigen niveau en naar eigen kunnen, kijkend naar mogelijkheden van wat wel kan ondanks de handicap. Hierbij maakt het niet uit of je een individuele sporter bent of een teamsport beoefent. Zowel recreatief als sporten op topniveau, iedereen telt. 

Want ook de grootste voetbalfan met autisme moet de kans krijgen zelf te voetballen, in plaats van alleen zijn grootste voetbalidolen vanaf de zijlijn aan te moedigen. En iemand met een lichamelijke handicap kan prima wekelijks meedoen aan een fitness les, of met vrienden lekker bowlen. Vanuit de samenwerking met diverse verenigingen biedt SGK maar liefst 20 verschillende sporten aan voor de verschillende doelgroepen.

Die doelgroepen verschillen van elkaar, omdat iedereen die tussen wal en schip valt ook het recht heeft deel te nemen aan sport en beweegactiviteiten. Zo is de SGK er voor mensen met een verstandelijke handicap, jeugd met een stoornis in het autisme spectrum, volwassenen met een lichamelijke handicap, volwassenen met een niet aangeboren handicap en kinderen van het speciaal onderwijs in de regio Den Haag.

Bij sport wordt snel gedacht aan winnen, conditie en gezondheid. Maar sport en bewegen bieden zoveel meer: plezier hebben, samen met anderen lekker bezig zijn, vrienden maken en zelfvertrouwen, sportiviteit en weerbaarheid opbouwen. Meedoen brengt je in beweging!

Name: Münchner Golf Eschenried
Description:
Münchner Golf Eschenried ist mit ca. 2500 Mitgliedern der größte Golfclub Bayerns. 5 Plätze mit insgesamt 69 Loch stehen zur Verfügung.

Platz Gut Häusern:
Der Golfpark Gut Häusern ist das Dorado für erfahrene Golf-Weltenbummler, die den „Spirit of the Game“ atmen und deren Anspruch stets das Besondere ist. Gut Häusern vereint in einzigartiger Weise die neue Dimension des Golfsports und die traditionellen Werte dieses Sports. Eine raffinierte und harmonische Komposition der Urkomponenten Wald, Sand und Wasser verleihen dem cartfähigen Meisterschaftsplatz ein spezielles, nach schottischem Vorbild geprägtes Charakteristikum.

Platz Eschenried:
Gerade einmal 10 Autominuten nordwestlich von München, dort wo das Dachauer Moos beginnt, liegt der Golfplatz Eschenried, das Herzstück im „Münchner Golf Eschenried“. Um die Jahrhundertwende war die Gegend eine begehrte Motivlandschaft der Münchner Künstler, noch heute spürt man dieses ganz besonderen Flair.

Platz Eschenhof:
Öffentlich bedeutet auf dem Eschenhof, dass der Gast kein Handicap und auch keine Mitgliedschaft von einem Golfclub oder Verband vorzeigen muß, wenn er hier spielen möchte, die offizielle Platzreife des Deutschen Golf Verbandes (DGV-Platzreife) genügt.
Da die meisten öffentlichen Golfanlagen in Deutschland nur aus 9 oder 6 Bahnen bestehen, bieten wir mit dem 18-Loch Platz Eschenhof den clubfreien Golfern im Münchner Raum ein besonders seltenes Erlebnis, welches vom sportlichen Anspruch und Niveau des Greenkeepings, sonst nur Clubgolfern vorbehalten ist.

Platz Gröbenbach:
Der Gröbenbach wurde bereits 1990 eröffnet und gehört zu den ersten öffentlichen Golfplätzen in Deutschland. Gäste müssen keinen Clubausweis vorzeigen, eine anerkannte Platzreife ist hier ausreichend.
Alter Baumbestand und große Wasserhindernisse begeistern Neueinsteiger und Handicap-Golfer. Sogar Profi-Golfer Martin Kaymer, der im September 2016 den Golfclub Eschenried besuchte, hatte auf dem Gröbenbach seinen Spaß.

Bij Sport Care Plus is sport het middel tot het doel. Door middel van sporten kunnen mensen werken aan persoonlijke ontwikkeling. We werken met een onderbouwde methode die is ontstaan uit de praktijk en is aangevuld met wetenschappelijke theorie. 

Onze droom is om alle mensen met een verstandelijke beperking of gedragsstoornis in Nederland de mogelijkheid bieden om op eigen niveau sportdoelen te behalen, en middels die sportdoelen te werken aan persoonlijke ontwikkeling.

Name: Studio Gem Milano
Description:
Società Sportiva Dilettantistica, riconosciuta dal CONI, affiliata alla FIDS-Federazione Italiana Danza Sportiva,
FGI-Federazione Ginnastica D’Italia e a diversi Enti di promozione sportiva

L’attività di propaganda é in funzione agli scopi istituzionali e necessaria per lo sviluppo e la divulgazione dello Sport dilettantistico nazionale.

Siamo una società sportiva dilettantistica. Studio gem è uno spazio pensato per soddisfare le esigenze di tutte le persone che amano danzare, ballare, fare sport.

Poter offrire ai suoi tesserati una vasta varietà di attività pensate e programmate in base alle loro dirette richieste è lo scopo principale di Studio GEM. Ogni singolo tesserato grande o piccolo avrà la possibilità di condividere le proprie passioni e di farle crescere in un ambiente amichevole e familiare.

Situato in corso di Porta Vigentina 35, punto strategico raggiungibile a piedi, a due passi dal centro, vicino alla metropolitana Crocetta e Porta Romana, sulla linea del tram 24 e 9. La sua prossimità all’università Bocconi, fa sì che la sua frequentazione sia formata da un pubblico giovane. Circondato da diversi complessi scolastici Materna, Primaria e Secondaria è un punto di riferimento per le attività riservate ai più piccoli.

Studio gem è uno spazio di 1500 mq su due piani divisi in 11 grandi sale, uno studio medico, una sala personal, spogliatoi con docce per uomini e donne e due grandi spazi di attesa che si trasformano in aree per le feste e per grandi workshop o semplicemente per far pratica a fine attività.  La preparazione allo sport anche se non a livello agonistico ha la sua finalità nel partecipare a gare, spettacoli, saggi. Tutte occasioni per mettere alla prova le capacità di ogni singolo atleta, porsi obiettivi e nel contempo provare grandi emozioni e forti sentimenti. Studio gem con le sue attività collettive e i suoi luoghi di condivisione aiuta a socializzare e fa nascere amicizie e amori. Lo sport, il ballo e la danza sono per tutti.

Name: Puente Red Basketball
Description: Puente Red Basketball is a space designed for the training and development of specific individual basketball skills, technique and tactics, but with the underlying intention of helping with the personal development of the people who come to us, generating spaces that promote them to work on their emotions, understand their context, to coexist with the frustration that comes with the mistakes that we make, self-knowledge, and much more. The idea with Puente is to produce a different space, where people who pass through it feel identified and find a home where they can leave their comfort zone behind without feeling exposed, but accompanied.

Name: Blue Marlin Dive Gili Trawangan
Description:
Founded in 1992 by owner and director Simon Liddiard, Blue Marlin Dive began as the original dive centre on Gili Trawangan. With Simon’s long‑standing reputation as a leader in technical diver training, the Blue Marlin Dive Family has grown into one of Indonesia’s most respected names in diving — committed to providing quality services at reasonable prices and exceeding the expectations of even the most discerning divers.

Over the years, Blue Marlin has expanded into a network of six PADI 5 Dive Centres, Resorts, and IDC Centres across Indonesia, including Gili Trawangan, Komodo, Gili Air, Gili Meno, and Lombok. Each location offers a unique surface interval experience paired with world‑class recreational diving

As a PADI 5 Career Development Centre, Blue Marlin Dive Gili Trawangan is proud to offer award‑winning Instructor Development Courses (IDC) led by Platinum Course Directors, helping divers turn passion into professional careers. In recognition of our excellence, PADI celebrated our 25th anniversary with awards for “25 Years of Outstanding Scuba Diver Training.”

For those seeking the next frontier, our Technical Diving Centre, headed by world record holder Will Goodman, specializes in TDI training and JJ‑CCR rebreather diving, making Blue Marlin a hub for advanced exploration. We also offer multiple liveaboard adventures, connecting divers to Indonesia’s most breathtaking marine environments.

From first breaths underwater to professional pathways and technical exploration, Blue Marlin Dive Gili Trawangan is where your journey begins. Find YOUR Blue Marlin.
Location: Gili Indah, Pemenang, Gili Trawangan, Lombok NTB

As an organization, our core activity revolves around designing and providing a comprehensive betting platform that caters to the diverse interests of our customers. We prioritize user experience, ensuring a seamless and enjoyable betting journey for all.

With our commitment to integrity, responsible gambling practices, and a customer-centric approach, Zemen Sport Betting Plc. aims to revolutionize the sports betting industry. Name: RB7 Academy
Description:
Onze missie:

Onze missie is om coaching wereldwijd naar een hoger niveau te brengen.

RB7 Academy coache's, een organisatie die zich inzet voor sport, cultuur en participatie.

 Onze missie is om mensen te helpen hun kennis en talent te ontwikkelen door middel van sport en cultuur. 
Wij bieden opleidingen en activiteiten aan die gericht zijn op sport, cultuur en integratie. Wij werken met deskundige trainers die de Nederlandse en de Syrische cultuur verbinden. Wij geven mensen een eerlijke kans om zich te ontplooien, ongeacht hun achtergrond. Wij zorgen voor een eerlijke en plezierige omgeving waarin we samen kunnen leven, sporten en werken. Bij RB7 geloven we in de kracht van sport en cultuur om de samenleving te verbeteren. 
Wij stimuleren de mensen/spelers om leiders te worden, die met zelfvertrouwen en verantwoordelijkheid de juiste keuzes maken, zowel op het veld als daarbuiten. 
Wij begeleiden onze spelers op hun reis naar persoonlijke en professionele ontwikkeling.

 RB7 doelstelling:

Onze deelnemers uit te dagen, te inspireren en te begeleiden om creatieve, zelfbewuste en verantwoordelijke leiders te worden, zowel op het veld als daarbuiten.
Onze deelnemers te leren omgaan met winnen en verliezen, respect te tonen voor zichzelf en anderen, en het belang van teamwork te begrijpen.
Onze deelnemers te helpen om hun sporttechniek te verbeteren, door hen essentiële voetbalvaardigheden aan te leren, zoals dribbeltechniek, snel voetenwerk, bewegingstechniek en schiettechniek.
Onze deelnemers te ondersteunen om hun fysieke, mentale en emotionele welzijn te verbeteren, door hen lichamelijke coaching, leiderschapstrainingen, psychologie en motivatie aan te bieden.
Onze deelnemers te stimuleren om hun talenten te laten bloeien, door hen kansen te geven om het geleerde toe te passen in spel- en wedstrijdvormen.
Onze deelnemers te laten groeien in een eerlijke, bewuste en plezierige omgeving, waarin vertrouwen, inzicht en aandacht.

Name: monoppy │ مونوپی
Description:
(شرکت راهنمای تندرستی هوشمند) مونوپی  
مونوپی یک استارتاپ ورزشی است که در حوزه فرهنگسازی در ورزش، تغذیه، توسعهفردی و حفاظت از محیط زیست فعالیت دارد. هدف اصلی این شرکت برگزاری رویدادهای ورزشی به صورت حضوری و مجازی با مخاطبانی از سراسر ایران و جهان هست. مخاطبان ما ورزشکاران حرفه ای نیستند ،مردم عادی و افراد مبتدی هستند که به دنبال انگیزه برای ارتقای سلامت روحی و جسمی خود هستند.
مونوپی از بهار ۱۴۰۱ شروع به فعالیت کرده و طی مدت کوتاهی توانسته 15 هزار مخاطب از سراسر دنیا را به شرکت در برنامه های ورزشی خود دعوت نماید. این استارتاپ با ایجاد رقابت در ورزش و جمع کردن امتیاز و جوایز نفیس (که توسط اسپانسرها گاها تامین میشود) توانسته محبوبیت زیادی بین مردم ورزش دوست ایجاد کنند.

Name: World Cup Soccer Camps & Clinics
Description:
Since 1991 World Cup Soccer Camps & Clinics has set the standard of excellence for youth soccer camps, classes and personal soccer training. With an emphasis on instruction, your child will receive the highest level of attention in a fun and safe environment. Our morning sessions are dedicated to technical training and developing skills. We create many touches on the ball to make it exciting and to improve your child's game. Half days conclude with small-sided games. In the afternoons we play matches where we work on tactics and positioning. All our coaches are skilled players, great with children and love to teach. With a 1 to 12, coach to player ratio, we are able to focus on high-quality and individualized training. Your child will be a better player after camp while having a lot of fun.

You can choose between our:

-Junior Academy (ages 5&6):
-Classic Skill Camp (all levels, ages 7-9)
-Development Academy (more experienced players, ages 10-13)
-Goalkeeper Camp (GK One, ages 7-9, GK Two, ages 10-13)

Name: Team Sportservice Haarlemmermeer
Description:
Team Sportservice Haarlemmermeer is the local sports desk for the municipality of Haarlemmermeer and the surrounding area. We inform, advise and guide people in the field of sports. Our motivation is to allow every person, and therefore the entire society, to benefit to the maximum from the positive effects of sport and exercise. Team Haarlemmermeer is also active in the Amstel and Meerlanden region, including through the Adapted Sports partnership.

Team Sportservice Haarlemmermeer wants to stimulate a healthy lifestyle among all residents of Haarlemmermeer and let them experience pleasure and satisfaction in sports and exercise by:

Bringing sports into the neighbourhood;
Encouraging sport and exercise in and around schools;
strengthening sports associations.

By strengthening and interconnecting these three areas, everyone, young and old, can participate in sports and exercise activities according to their own preferences. Sport is no longer practiced as an end in itself, but is also used as a means. Sport and exercise have many positive effects. In terms of fun, mental and physical health and providing a social network.

Team Sportservice Haarlemmermeer works closely with the municipality of Haarlemmermeer, our formal client. Regular consultations are held about the progress of activities.

Name: Cambodian Premier League
Description:
The Cambodian Premier League (CPL) is the football company which organise the highest professional football competition in Cambodia. The league was officially rebranded In 2022, as the Cambodian Premier League (CPL). 

This change aligned Cambodian football with global football naming standards and reflected a stronger professional identity. The rebrand also symbolised the league’s ambition to grow regionally within Southeast Asia and compete more strongly in AFC competitions. 

The Cambodian Premier League typically features 11 professional clubs, playing a full home-and-away season format. So far the Top-performing teams qualify for international tournaments such as: AFC Cup ,AFC Challenge League and AFF - Shopee Cup (new format). 

The Cambodian Premier League - CPL has become the backbone of Cambodian football development by producing players for the Cambodian national team, Developing youth academies, Attracting foreign players and coaches creating professional pathways for referees, media, and sports staff. It has also helped build a stronger football fan culture, especially in Phnom Penh and provincial cities.

Name: Power of Polo
Description:
Empowering and Challenging. 
 
Power of Polo is a unique grassroots charity. Our mission is to positively impact the lives of people facing social, economic or health challenges, utilising the sport of polo.

Our strapline ‘change your line’ refers to how this sport can help participants change the direction of their life and is taken from the most important rule of the game: the line of the ball.

Power of Polo’s model is one of partnership, collaboration and facilitation. Many polo clubs are keen to provide charitable programmes but do not have the necessary infrastructure needed. We provide this support by bringing together charities, polo clubs and other relevant organisations, building programmes to help and support people from a range of backgrounds to change their lines – and their lives – through the sport that we love.

Set up in 2015, the charity has already reached hundreds of participants, from ages 12-70, and worked with partners and participants from all walks of life. We run both day and residential activities with our partner clubs and charities, at which our participants learn the basics of horsemanship, polo, teamwork and life skills, while crucially enjoying respite and fun.

We have built youth leader positions within our courses as an opportunity for young people to develop skills which can help them towards their careers in the future, and have many wonderful success stories to tell, of which we are incredibly proud.

The benefits of equine assisted activities are now globally recognised but access to horses is severely limited for many parts of society. Our aim is to ensure the sport of polo can play its part in changing this, and that we can be a catalyst for change.

Name: Karate Do San Pedro

Name: Aceify.me
Description:
We have built a leading tennis coaching business. We work with some of the worlds leading coaches.
Aceify has been live since 2017 and we have successfully booked around 25000 tennis lessons so far on the platform.
We are very pleased with the progress we have made in the tennis market, and are now looking to expand our services to include other sports lessons and fitness training.
The fitness market is HUGE. We aim to disrupt this market in the same way that other apps have disrupted, for example, the taxi and hotel industries, by offering consumers choice, flexibility, and customisation, which can be accessed conveniently on their phones.
We will make it easy to find and book a variety of high-quality sports and fitness lessons, helping customers add exercise sessions to their daily schedule. Brits are wasting £558m on unused gym memberships - with 11% saying they haven't been in a YEAR.
By allowing users to pay a small fee per workout, Aceify offers customers better value and more variety in how they exercise. We are going to make sure that we only have top-quality fitness sessions on our platform. We feel really good about this mission we are on because we are helping people to get fit in a cost-effective way.

Description: Since 1993, the Royal City Soccer Club has hosted unique soccer camp experiences for thousands of boys and girls at all levels of soccer. We are a registered non-profit community organization registered in Ontario, Nova Scotia, Manitoba, Saskatchewan, Alberta and British Columbia.  We originated our programs in Guelph, hence the Royal name. Through popular demand our camps have quickly grown to over 100 different locations across Canada. We look forward to continue offering unique soccer camp experiences for youth in Canada.

Name: Outdoorer KE
Description:
Outdoorer helps you go farther, climb higher and conquer yourself. We are a community of adventure die-hards helping hikers find their ways back to themselves, one hike at a time.

We believe there’s peace, healing, and freedom in the great outdoors—and lots of space for us all to find it. We are best known for teaching complete beginners to hike—and getting them to Mt. Kenya in 90 days through our #beginnertomtkenya program.

We’ve proven that, done right, hiking is the one sport people of all ages can thrive in. Our mantra is: “Hike your own hike so you can Unlock Your Mountain.”

We have structured three-month programs that move you straight to your goals in a fraction of the time it would ordinarily take you.

Our other popular program, #roadmaptokili, is specially designed to train you for climbing #Kilimanjaro.

Of course, if you have no short-term big-mountain ambitions, our Rookie Program makes a hiker out of you in just 12 weeks.

Our programs run concurrently a year thrice, so whenever you’re ready to begin, you can jump onboard at your convenience.

If you don’t like long-term commitments, there’s still room for you. The events in our programs are available in our every-Saturday calendar.

We also gear you up for any trail. Our thoughtfully selected collection of hiking gear is lightweight, multipurpose, and packed with the features you need.

!—— Tap the link in our profile for shorcuts to all these resources ——!

We love to share our adventures with our online community of 30K+ combined following.

We’re now active here on LinkedIn, but even more on Instagram—you should join us @outdoorer.ke!

We hope you love our content, and are thrilled to share our trails with you!

Name: Greater Williamsburg Sports and Events Center
Description:
Born from a bold collaboration between the City of Williamsburg, James City County, and York County, the Greater Williamsburg Sports & Events Center is more than a venue - it’s a landmark investment in the future of sports, community, and tourism.

Opening in Summer 2026, GWSEC is a 200,000-square-foot, state-of-the-art facility designed to host world-class tournaments, high-impact corporate meetings, and unforgettable community gatherings.

Our capabilities include:

* 12 full-size basketball courts, convertible to 24 volleyball or 36 pickleball courts
* The largest indoor roll-out turf system in the U.S., accommodating a regulation football field or up to three indoor soccer fields
* Climbing and adventure features, inspiring play for athletes and families alike
* Versatile meeting and event spaces for trade shows, galas, and corporate outings
* Chef-driven food & beverage service, with full-service catering and concessions

Every detail is designed with flexibility, scale, and elevated hospitality in mind -ensuring that any event finds every possibility here in Greater Williamsburg.

Name: TALA Soccer Training, LLC
Description:
TALA Soccer Training is intentionally designed to create a positive, motivational learning environment where self-assessment meets facilitated training to identify and achieve individualized learning outcomes resulting in holistic player growth and development.

TALA Soccer Training begins with the end in mind. Through individually designed goal-oriented sessions our coaches provide progressive training activities that are adaptive, holistic, and based on the principles of teaching and learning.

Through our teaching and learning approach to player development, TALA Soccer Training is designed to encourage a love and passion for learning and playing the game through experiential, game like sessions that exercise the technical, tactical, physical, social, and cognitive pillars of soccer concurrently.

The Mission of TALA Soccer Training is to provide a transformative soccer environment where players and coaches learn, develop, and improve through a cognitive approach to holistic player development.

Name: ISC SPAIN - International Spanish Courses
Description:

We pride ourselves on ensuring that our students have fun while learning Spanish, making new friends, experiencing new cultures, and enjoying the Spanish lifestyle. Students participate in a wide variety of educational, cultural, and sports activities every day.
 
We offer Spanish courses at different levels, combined with different sports, such as tennis, golf, water sports, basketball, volleyball, and soccer.
 
At our summer camps, students only have to worry about learning Spanish and having fun, as all services are included:

- 20 hours of Spanish per week.
- 12 hours of sports or leisure activities per week.
- Full board.
- Excursions.
 
Are you interested in joining us?

Name: Irish National Sailing & Powerboat School
Description:
The Irish National Sailing & Powerboat School is the largest sailing and watersports training provider in Ireland and we have been getting people on the water since 1978. We provide all essential gear, boats and buoyancy aids, while wetsuits can be hired by the week. Our instructors are highly experienced and we are fully insured. We have an excellent safety record and pride ourselves on our superb reputation. 

The Irish National Sailing and Powerboat School offers training programs to children, adults, corporate groups, Primary schools and Secondary schools. Our training is tailored depending on age and experience. We have a fleet of over 250 boats ranging from single person dinghies to sports yachts and some of the most advanced powerboats in the country. We can accommodate all abilities with no experience necessary. The programs we teach are done in a highly professional manner having some of the most experienced instructors in the industry. We believe that the best way to learn is in a fun, stress free environment ensuring that you spend as much time as possible on the water.

We are one of the few organisations that operate throughout the year. While offering on the water tuition in sailing and powerboating we also have courses in VHF radios, First aid and navigation. We are recognised by both the Royal Yachting Association and the Irish Sailing Association as a certifying organisation.

We are also a Science Foundation Ireland Discovery Primary Science and Maths affiliated organisation offering informative and interactive programs for school tours and summer camps.

Name: Kuza Kids
Description:
Kuza Kids is a vibrant organization committed to making a tangible difference in the lives of children and youths within both refugee and host communities in Kenya. Established in October 2022, our journey began with a passionate vision to support and uplift young individuals through the transformative power of sports and arts activities. In our brief yet impactful existence, we've dedicated ourselves to creating safe and nurturing environments where children can thrive, express themselves, and build essential life skills.

Our foundation is rooted in compassion, inclusivity, and empowerment. We firmly believe in the importance of caring for children, protecting their welfare, and preparing them for a brighter future. At Kuza Kids, every child is valued, regardless of their background or circumstances. Through our dedication and enthusiasm, we aim to instill essential values such as teamwork, discipline, and resilience, fostering a sense of belonging and self-confidence among our participants.

Central to our mission is the belief that sports and arts have the power to transcend barriers, inspire creativity, and promote social cohesion. Through activities such as basketball, football, and arts and crafts, we provide young individuals with meaningful opportunities to develop their skills, cultivate their talents, and explore their potential. Our collaboration with local schools and communities enables us to reach underserved areas, where we introduce programs designed to nurture passions, enhance abilities, and foster camaraderie.

In our pursuit of excellence, we are guided by a dedicated team of passionate individuals who work tirelessly to support and nurture the growth of our participants. From experienced coaches and instructors to mentors and volunteers, each member of our team is committed to creating a positive and inclusive environment where children can thrive and flourish. Apprenant la cuisine au travers des 5 sens de l'être humain, Nos P'tits Chefs a à cœur de proposer des ateliers ludiques mais éducatifs par le biais de la méthode dite Montessori.

Nos P'tits Chefs, c'est aussi des ateliers pour les professionnels. Déjà présente sur plusieurs gros événements et dans des établissements d'accueil pour jeunes enfants, notre équipe est prête à intervenir dans de nouveaux lieux et à saisir de nouvelles opportunités.
