The Indian Sports Initiative is a Section 8 Company, developed using design and system thinking framework, that aims to promote unconventional Olympic sports through the development of sports educational curriculum. We explore the intersection of sports and social justice, furthering accessibility for the underprivileged and providing them with the strength and fortitude to fight all the stigma, stereotypes, and exploitation that comes their way.

Our Work:

- Incubated at The Circle India

- Incubated at Teach For India

- Secured The Circle’s Innovation Funding Grant worth up to Rs 1 Lakh

- Spearheaded workshops in collaboration with 5 Bombay Municipal Corporation schools and 5 low income private schools to increase awareness and accessibility for sports such as Taekwondo, Athletics and Archery to 350+ students

- Partnered with Barefoot Edu Foundation to conduct upskilling workshops for 15 cricket coaches that impacted 700+ students in the communities of Malwani and Govandi. 

- Selected as one of the top 15 projects for Teach For India’s National Social Innovation Track across 8 cities - iLab x Avagam Ventures

Description:
SportzGuard Services Pvt Ltd. #SPORTZGUARD is one of India's fastest-growing turnkey sports infrastructure companies, offering comprehensive sports infrastructure solutions to schools, sports arenas, developers, and government sports complexes. We handle everything from designing and constructing to delivering ready-to-use sports facilities that meet international standards set by regulatory bodies like FIBA, FIH, FIFA, ITF, and BWF.

With three strategically located offices in Hyderabad, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we proudly serve clients nationwide. Our warehouses in Hyderabad and Mumbai are well-equipped to support our operations, ensuring the timely delivery of materials and equipment. What truly sets SportzGuard apart is our in-house team of architects, engineers, and installation experts, complemented by advanced machinery.

SportzGuard’s CEO Deepak Gupta brings 14 years of extensive experience in the sports infrastructure industry, having previously served as the Director of Sales at one of India’s leading sports infrastructure companies. Name: SKI Experience
Description:
Beter skiën in 1 dag

SKI Experience dagevents in Snowworld Zoetermeer of Landgraaf en Techniek en Fun skireizen

Na een korte introductie van de nieuwste skitechnieken ga je met maximaal 9 medecursisten van je eigen skiniveau onder begeleiding van een SKI Experience coach de sneeuw in. Je gaat aan de slag met je houding, je leert hoe de bewegingsafloop van zowel korte als lange bochten in elkaar zit en je gaat ervaren hoe het voelt om een mooie ronde gesneden bocht te skiën.
 
Skiles met oortjes en videoanalyse

Wij maken een video opname van je en gebruiken deze om een analyse te maken van je skivaardigheden. Gedurende de hele dag maken we gebruik van onze unieke Direct Feedback-methode, waarbij je d.m.v. een “oortje” feedback krijgt van je coach terwijl je aan het afdalen bent.
 
Gezellige après ski

Uiteraard is er ook tijd en ruimte voor een uitgebreide lunch en sluiten we de dag af met een leuk en spectaculair onderdeel waarbij je kunt laten zien welke vorderingen je hebt gemaakt. En... zoals het hoort bij een intensieve skidag is er na afloop van het programma gelegenheid voor de apres ski en kunnen we onder het genot van een lekker drankje de belevenissen van de dag bespreken. Kortom een intensieve dag waarbij plezier en leren samengaan. Bekijk onderstaande video voor een sfeer impressie. 
 
Doe mee en schrijf je meteen in!

De allerleukste manier om beter te gaan skiën

Maar eerst wat meer over ons en waar wij naar streven.
Ludios is opgericht door Daan van Gerrevink, hij is als ZZP’er na zijn sportopleiding de arbeidsmarkt opgegaan en ervaarde dat de sportarbeidsmarkt veel onzekerheden met zich meebracht. Daarnaast voelde Daan de vraag vanuit de markt naar een bredere oplossing voor de inzet van sportinstructeurs op basisscholen en kinderopvangorganisaties. Vanuit die anticipatie op het gat in de markt werden de eerste banen gecreëerd voor een stabiele werkomgeving en eerlijke verdienste voor sportprofessionals.
Dit concept zijn we aan het vergroten tot een platform voor werken in de sport. Met nieuwe werkzaamheden en uitdagingen in teken van hetzelfde doel: “Wij willen alle sportprofessionals een passende baan aanbieden”. Op het moment bestaat Ludios uit 220 sportieve en enthousiaste sportprofessionals die hun eigen carrière in de sport willen lanceren. Ludios biedt hun dat platform. We richten ons op nieuwe diensten door middel van eigen initiatieven, pitches en samenwerkingen. Met als doel: meer banen en eerlijke verdienste met werken in de sport.

Name: Courageous Sailing Center
Description:
Courageous was established in 1987 by Boston sailing enthusiast Harry McDonough, who envisioned the sport of sailing as a means of fostering unity and life skills in children of all economic and ethnic backgrounds. Courageous has developed into a nationally recognized, year-round educational center, serving our community through lessons and memberships for adults, sailing for those with special needs, corporate teambuilding, and youth development opportunities.

Our main focus remains our youth programs, which utilize sailing, the marine environment, and science education as platforms for social-emotional and academic growth. Courageous is committed to ensuring equitable access to high-quality, engaging, multi-year learning opportunities for kids throughout Boston and beyond. We serve approximately 1000 young people per year, of whom over 600 participate for free in multi-week summer or school-year programs. Approximately 2 out of 3 summer students receive need-based scholarships, with 57% paying nothing at all. Our programs reflect the diversity of Boston, with over 60% of our summer sailors identifying as youth of color. Young sailors remain involved with Courageous over the course of a decade or more, many eventually becoming paid Instructors-in-Training and instructors themselves.

Years of evaluation have confirmed that Courageous programs are effective in empowering youth to strengthen leadership and other crucial 21st century skills, become confident sailors and swimmers, and—in the case of our summer academic support program, offered in partnership with Boston Public Schools—become more engaged in learning and improve academically. At Courageous, young people from all walks of life come together to build skills that will take them far beyond Boston Harbor, supported by a community of people united by the belief in the transformative power of setting sail.

Name: Polska Agencja Antydopingowa POLADA
Description:
Polska Agencja Antydopingowa została utworzona w dniu 1 lipca 2017 roku. Wcześniej w Polsce za walkę z dopingiem w sporcie odpowiedzialna była Komisja do Zwalczania Dopingu w Sporcie, która pod różnymi nazwami funkcjonowała od 1988 r.

Ustawą o kulturze fizycznej z dnia 3 czerwca 1984 r. zabroniono stosowania w sporcie środków farmakologicznych i innych substancji dopingowych. W dniu 16 listopada 1989 r. minister spraw zagranicznych rządu Rzeczypospolitej Polskiej podpisał Konwencję Antydopingową Rady Europy. Konwencję tę 3 lipca 1990 r. ratyfikował Prezydent RP. Konwencja jest kompleksową, międzynarodową umową, której celem jest zwalczanie stosowania niedozwolonych środków i metod przez sportowców. Podpisanie i ratyfikowanie konwencji oznacza, że władze Rzeczypospolitej Polskiej przyjęły na siebie odpowiedzialność za zwalczanie dopingu w naszym kraju.

Tworząc system antydopingowy w Polsce, w 1988 r. powołano komisję antydopingową, działającą w latach 1991 -1993 pod nazwą Rada do Zwalczania Dopingu w Sporcie, którą ostatecznie w 1993 r. przemianowano na Komisję do Zwalczania Dopingu w Sporcie.

W grudniu 1995 r. Komitet Społeczno-Polityczny Rady Ministrów przyjął Narodowy Program Zwalczania Dopingu w Sporcie. Program ten oparty na Konwencji Antydopingowej Rady Europy, Karcie Olimpijskiej MKOl oraz ustawodawstwie polskim, koncentruje się na zadaniach z zakresu edukacji, przeprowadzania kontroli antydopingowych, kontroli stosowania sankcji przez polskie związki sportowe.

Name: Skydive Empuriabrava - The Land of The Sky - JIP AVIACIO SLU
Description:
FREEFALL IN EVERYONES REACH

The history of SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA started in 1985. This was a beginning of a project, which until then had only been a dream. The aim was to create a full time, professional skydiving centre. The initial project was so successful that during the first year 25.000 jumps were made, making SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA one of the leading skydiving centres in Europe at that time.

Since then SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA has grown to become one of the top three skydiving centers in the world, achieving 134.000 jumps for the year 2001. To date over 2.000.000 jumps have been made at SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA since it’s beginnings in 1985.
The company began with a staff of just 5 people and now employs over 40 people, and has generated a series of satellite businesses around itself.

SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA doesn’t only dedicate its activities to experienced skydivers alone; it has also brought skydiving within the reach of the man-on-the-street through tandem jumps. Every year, thousands of people make their first jump without any prior formal skydiving training. They were able to make their dream to fly come true doing a tandem jump accompanied by a professional instructor. They were a part of the more than 150.000 people who have chosen SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA to do their first Tandem jump throughout the center’s history.

In these 30 years of existence, SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA has been the organizer of some of the most prestigious international events in the World.

Skydive Empuriabrava has also participated in the past in functions organized by as well as for the community, by doing exhibition jumps in various events such as inaugurations, celebrations and as well as fund raising activities.


'FLY WHERE THOSE WHO FLY FLY'

Due to the privileged situation and the infrastructure that it possesses, SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA has become one of the primary training destinations for many of the top skydiving teams in the world. SKYDIVE EMPURIABRAVA.

Name: Soccer Camps International
Description:
Soccer Camps International is the premier global gateway to elite European youth football development. For over 25 years, we have specialized in bridging the gap between international student-athletes and the most prestigious professional soccer environments in the world.

Our Role in the Soccer Ecosystem:
We serve as a specialized consultant and registration partner. We do not operate the camps themselves; rather, we work directly with official soccer school club divisions, club-branded camp departments, and authorized program organizers to provide a centralized, transparent platform for elite training.

By consolidating the most sought-after programs in England, Spain, Italy, France, and Portugal, we allow families to compare, plan, and secure placements in official youth environments with confidence and ease.

Our Portfolio Includes Official Branded Programs for:

England: Liverpool FC Football Camps UK, Arsenal Summer Soccer Camps UK, Manchester City Soccer Camps, Chelsea FC Soccer Camps, Tottenham Camps.

Spain: Real Madrid Foundation Campus, FC Barcelona Soccer Experience “Barça Academy Summer Clinic", and Atlético de Madrid Performance.

Italy: AC Milan Academy, Inter Camps and Juventus Summer Camps.

France: Paris Saint-Germain PSG Academy

Portugal: Benfica Elite Training Camp.

Why Families and Partners Trust Us

Curated Access: We only list programs that meet rigorous standards for coaching quality, safety, and player experience.

Operational Expertise: We assist in navigating the complexities of international sports travel, from accommodation details to registration timelines.

Deep Industry Knowledge: Our team understands the nuances of each camp's philosophy and it is high-performance residency

As we look toward the 2026 season, our focus remains on expanding access to the world’s most successful footballing philosophies and fostering the next generation of global talent.

 Explore the 2026 Schedule: https://soccercampsinternational.com/soccer-camps

Name: MID-EASTERN ATHLETIC CONFERENCE
Description:
The Mid-Eastern Athletic Conference (MEAC) enters its 53rd year of intercollegiate competition with the 2023-24 academic school year. Located in Norfolk, Va., the MEAC is made up of eight outstanding historically black institutions across the Atlantic coastline: Coppin State University, Delaware State University, Howard University, University of Maryland Eastern Shore, Morgan State University, Norfolk State University, North Carolina Central University and South Carolina State University.

The MEAC sponsors 14 Division I (FCS) sports: women’s bowling, men’s and women’s basketball, men’s and women’s cross country, football, men’s and women’s tennis, men’s and women’s track & field, softball and volleyball. The MEAC receives automatic NCAA qualification bids in seven sports – men’s and women’s basketball, women’s bowling, men’s and women’s tennis, softball and volleyball. The MEAC’s football champion is pitted against the champion of the Southwestern Athletic Conference (SWAC) in the Cricket Celebration Bowl, which debuted in December 2015.

MEAC student-athletes excel on and off the field and several have been recognized on ESPN the Magazine/CoSIDA Academic All-America and All-District teams. The conference sponsors All-Academic teams in each of its sports and awards two post-graduate scholarships of $5,000 each annually to one male and one female student-athlete who have excelled academically and athletically and are in their final season of intercollegiate athletics eligibility and competition under MEAC and NCAA regulations.

Name: DGI Huset Vordingborg
Description:
Vi tilbyder aktiviteter og arrangementer for alle og hele familien

Huset er åbent for borgere, kultur- og idrætsforeninger og erhvervslivet. Vores vision er at skabe et kultur- og idrætshus for alle samt et vartegn for Vordingborg og hele Sydsjælland. DGI Huset Vordingborg vil være medvirkende til, at alle borgere har mulighed for et aktivt liv med gode fællesskaber. Målet er, at få flere til at dyrke motion, så vi udbyder en bred vifte af aktiviteter bl.a. badminton, bordtennis, holdtræninger på land som yoga, CrossGym og stræk/balance samt holdtræninger i vand som AquaFit, AquaBoards og BabySvøm. Vi råder også over et moderne fitnesscenter, hvor motionister, pensionister og konkurrenceatleter træner side om side.

Derudover har vi også attraktive faciliteter til:

- Når erhvervslivet skal afholde møder, konferencer eller seminarer.

- Når der skal afholdes større events som loppemarkeder, koncerter eller stævner.

- Når familien og vennerne skal samles til en festlig anledning som brunch eller konfirmation.

Historie

Tilblivelsen af DGI Huset Vordingborg startede i 2012, hvor Vordingborg Kommune købte industrigrunden og den nedlagte plastfabrik Panther Plast på Solbakkevej. Visionen var, at den gamle produktionshal skulle blive hjemsted for faciliteter og aktiviteter inden for kultur, idræt, uddannelse og erhverv. Det krævede et større oprydnings- og renoveringsarbejde, men i foråret 2014 var bygningen klar til brug og området blev døbt Panteren. 

For at kunne løfte opgaven indgik Vordingborg Kommune et samarbejde med Idrætsorganisationen DGI om driften af Panteren. I denne forbindelse overgik stedet til at være et DGI Hus, der primært havde været et jysk fænomen fx i Aalborg og Herning, hvor DGI Husene har mange aktiviteter hver dag året rundt. DGI Huset Panteren var det første DGI Hus på Sjælland udover DGI Byen i København.

Name: Balaban Hybrid Training
Description:
2013 yılında Türkiye’de farklı spor disiplinlerinin henüz yaygınlaşmaması, insanların daha etkili ve eğlenceli bir alan arayışı içerisine girmeleri sebebiyle 2013 yılının Kasım ayında Ataşehir’de açtığımız ilk şubemiz, öncelikle ‘’Crossfit Balaban’’ adı altında hizmet vermeye başladı. Zaman içerisinde binlerce insanın yaşamına dokunan CrossFit Balaban, 2014 yılında 4. Levent şubesini, 2015 yılında ise Anadolu yakasına 2. Şubesini açarak kısa süre içinde şubeleşmeyi başarmış, 2016 yılında Kıbrıs’a Franchise vererek ailesini daha da genişletmeye başlamıştır.

Balaban markası, belli bir disiplin altında açılmasına rağmen, birbirinden farklı yeni branşların da eklenmesiyle birlikte daha da geniş bir kitleye hitap etmeye başladı. Bu nedenle salonumuzu 2017 yılının Kasım ayında Nidakule Kuzey’e taşıma ve Balaban Solid Sports adıyla konseptimizi büyütme kararı aldık.Akademik çalışmalara değer veren deneyimli eğitmen kadrosu,ev sahipliği yaptığı seminerler ve çeşitli spor dallarında sayısız müsabakalara katılan eğitmenleri ve üyeleriyle Balaban, bir spor tesisinden daha fazlasını, bir ‘’Spor Okulu’’ halini aldı.

Balaban ailesi olarak amacımız; üyelerimizin daha bilinçli spor yapmalarını sağlamak ve gelişimlerini hızlandırarak sporu sadece aktivite olarak görmelerini değil, yaşam tarzı haline getirmelerine yardımcı olmaktır. Yetişmekte olan nesillere spor bilinci ve alışkanlığı kazandırmak, her yaş ve meslek grubundan insanların yaşamlarını zindeleştirmek için gerekli olan fiziksel ve zihinsel gelişim imkanlarını sağlamaktır.

Kendimizi her gün geliştirmeye ve ilerletmeye çalıştığımız bu yolda, edinmiş olduğumuz tecrübeler ile salonumuz, açıldığı günden bu yana ortaya koyduğu istikrarlı ve yenilikçi düşünce yapısıyla, profesyonel kadrosu ve giderek artan tecrübesi ile sizlere daha iyi hizmet vermeye çalışmak öncelikli hedefimizdir.

Hierzu haben wir ein umfangreiches Ausbildungsportfolio entwickelt. Unter anderem bieten wir die erste staatlich geprüfte und anerkannte Online-Ausbildung für Fußballtrainer an, 1:1-Coachings, Veranstaltungen oder eine eigens entwickelte Trainer-Community für den Meinungs- und Erfahrungsaustausch.

Description:

Description: Learning with purpose and a structured framework make learning better. That’s what guides our team at Swim it Right. Through meaningful and measurable sessions, our educators and students embark on learning journeys that are both focused and fulfilling.

Name: Svenska Klätterförbundet
Description:
Svenska Klätterförbundet främjar och utvecklar alla former av klättring. Vi företräder alla klättrare i Sverige, har landslag i sportklättring och skimo och sätter standarden för såväl utbildningar som klätterarrangemang.

Våra klubbar har nästan 15 000 medlemmar och klättringen bara växer. Ingen vet exakt hur många som klättrar i Sverige, men vi vet en sak: Vi är många.

Följ oss gärna på vår resa!

Name: Association LA CHAÎNE
Description:
Association spécialisée dans le SPORT SANTÉ 

Nous partons d'un constat simple: le coaching privé, une prise en charge adaptée, c'est compliqué. 
Le projet de La Chaîne est d'aider un maximum de personnes à améliorer sa qualité de vie par le biais d'activité physique et de conseils santé. 
Ce projet est né à Rouen et se développe aujourd'hui à l'échelle nationale. 

La Chaîne, c'est un panel de professionnels de l'activité physique et de la santé:

Entraineurs
Educateurs spécialisés
Enseignants en activité physique adaptée
Préparateurs physiques
Kinésithérapeutes
Nutritionnistes
Professeurs 

Tous ces professionnels donnent bénévolement de leur temps pour encadrer des actions de prévention, d'entretien ou de thérapie à destination de la population. 
 Le pari de l'association est de rendre accessible tant sur le plan financier que géographique une prise en charge adaptée à un maximum de citoyens. Et ainsi avoir un impact efficient sur la qualité de vie de ces derniers. 

Nous travaillons sur des groupes restreints afin de pratiquer de manière personnalisée, mais également développer l'aspect social, surtout dans le contexte actuel. 

     Faire de l'activité physique c'est bien! Mais faire de l'activité physique adaptée à son profil c'est mieux! Et si c'est avec des gens sympas, c'est encore mieux! 

     Venez nous aider à gagner notre pari. On à besoin de bénévoles dans le domaine du sport mais pas uniquement (Du secrétariat par exemple...). 

À très vite!

Name: ANDF - Associação Nacional de Delegados de Futebol
Description:
Associação Nacional de Delegados de Futebol
Futebol / Futsal / Futebol de Praia

O Delegado de Futebol é o agente desportivo nomeado para cada um dos jogos das competições federadas e que representa a organização da competição no terreno.

Foi criada esta função há 27 anos pela Liga de Clubes como necessidade de se fazer representar no terreno e fazer cumprir o regulamento de competições, facilitando as relações entre os diversos agentes que interagem na organização do jogo, garantir as condições legais e exigidas por regulamento para a realização do jogo, dirigir a reunião preparatória de jogo e reportar ao Departamento de Competições toda a informação prevista e relevante, juntamente com a demais documentação do jogo.

Em Outubro de 2022 foi criada uma comissão instaladora para a criação de estatutos e registo da ANDF tendo sido efetuada a escritura e nomeação dos primeiros Órgãos Sociais no dia 25 de Novembro no Cartório Notarial da Nazaré.

Name: USC Amsterdam

Name: Youth Challenge
Description:
Youth Challenge brings together young people with physical disabilities and teen volunteers who inspire each other through adapted sports, recreation, and social growth activities.

■ Participants: 150+ children, ages 4-18, with physical impairments, such as cerebral palsy, spina bifida and a variety of other disabilities, who reside at home and attend local schools.
■ Volunteers: 300 teens, ages 12-18, are trained seasonally by professionals and peers to work with children with physical disabilities.
■ Programs: Over 300 activities are offered year-round with adaptive sports and recreational equipment and adjustments to suit each child's interests.
■ All programs and transportation are offered free of charge.
■ Founded in 1976 by Executive Director, Mary Sue (Anter) Tanis, as an alternative summer recreation program for children with physical disabilities.

Name: Fish the Fly Guide Service
Description:
For those looking for the ultimate fly fishing trip, join us for a trip in Jackson hole WY & Yellowstone National Park. 

What is Wyoming fly fishing all about? Imagine floating a river below towering peaks or hiking high in the mountains to a remote stream. This could be your day with Fish the Fly Guide Service!

Our clients often say that fly fishing in Jackson Hole was the best day of their vacation. The area’s exhilarating scenery speaks for itself, but our friendly fishing guides make the difference! They are expert fly fishermen and women who know how to convey their knowledge. We focus on quality customer service from the booking process to hooking a trout!

Description:

By putting the player at the heart of our platform we hope to provide coaches with the insight that they need to guide, support and inspire each individual player to make the most of their talents and to become great young people.

Name: Beweegboeken
Description:
Iedereen is het erover eens: kinderen moeten meer bewegen! Hoe meer kinderen worden gestimuleerd om veel en vooral met plezier te bewegen, hoe beter.

Beweegboeken is een wetenschappelijk onderbouwd beweegprogramma, speciaal voor de kinderopvang.

Met Beweegboeken ontdekken kinderen het plezier in bewegen en leren ze alle basismotorische vaardigheden op een speelse manier. Met het Beweegboeken programma kunnen pedagogisch professionals heel eenvoudig gevarieerde beweegactiviteiten met de kinderen doen. Een gebruiksvriendelijke Beweegboeken app helpt hun daarbij. 

Elk Beweegboek heeft een eigen verhaal en beweegactiviteiten. Samen met de Jims Fast, Strong, Bendy, Floaty, Bouncy en Bouncer, beleven de kinderen allemaal beweegavonturen in de Jim-wereld. Elk karakter heeft zijn eigen manier van bewegen én persoonlijkheid. Zij nemen de kinderen mee op avontuur en worden hun beweegvrienden.

Bewegen was nog nooit zo leuk, voor kinderen én pedagogisch professionals!

Name: 2-4-1 Sports
Description:

In short 2-4-1 Puts Play Back into Sports and lives at the intersection of sport and social emotional learning.

Name: Harness Change at Cumbria Rural Academy CIC
Description:
A programme designed to get tangible results in developing core skills quickly and effectively. 
Problem solving 
Decision making 
Leadership 
Confidence 
Autonomy and self-management 
Communication 
Team Building 
These results are achieved in an accelerated time frame due to a unique process for assessing and mastering these skills. 
We use horses as a tool to harness change and get tangible results. Horses reflect and respond to our intentions and behaviours. This allows to see and feel the results of our core skills in action giving you a unique tool to assess your current skill set and practice new ones. With the help of Zara’s facilitation, you will: 
Identify the skill gaps 
Acquire and learn different tools and strategies to build the new skill 
Practice the new skill and see it in action with the horse 
The process can be rolled out in a 1 day workshop and will allow you to go back into the workplace with your new skill already tried and tested. 

Harness Change for you and your business now.

Name: HeadCoach
Description:
HeadCoach optimizes performance and enhances wellbeing. We focus on Emotional Intelligence, the science of understanding and managing emotions. 

Our mobile app allows coaches and psychologists to scale their support by providing real-time insights on emotional and mental wellbeing, monitoring individuals, and enabling focused one-to-one interventions where needed most.

Research indicates that 80% of success is rooted in mental acuity (PMID: 11665914). With HeadCoach, empower your head with Emotional Intelligence to triumph consistently, perform at your peak, and unleash your full potential. Our platform seamlessly integrates Emotional Intelligence strategies, habit tracking, and journaling, fostering enhanced performance in arenas, training fields, and everyday life.

Our credible founding team, comprising a Chartered Psychologist and a UEFA A license coach, is certified in Emotional Intelligence training. They have delivered over 100 workshops and helped over 1,000 people. Their expertise informs the science-backed strategies offered through HeadCoach, such as cognitive restructuring and emotional regulation techniques, ensuring a championship-winning psychology and coaching experience.

Our app's cutting-edge technology leverages the latest advancements in psychology, coaching, and digital technology. HeadCoach is designed to cater to teams and organizations of all sizes, ensuring that everyone can benefit from emotional and mental wellbeing training. With our platform, everyone can perform at their best, regardless of the size of their team or organization.

With a global reach that spans elite professionals to grassroots enthusiasts, HeadCoach is the trusted go-to solution in sports. Our results-oriented approach leads to quantifiable improvements in emotional and mental wellbeing, emphasizing that it's not just about playing better; it's about living better.

Elevate your organization's performance with HeadCoach. It's time to Coach Your Head with HeadCoach.

El objetivo que tenemos es integrar la máxima preparación deportiva y humanística para crear una nueva generación de tenistas que se erijan en embajadores de la causa por la equidad social y justicia climática, con los principales valores como respeto, humildad, civismo, formación cultural y solidaridad entre muchos otros a través del programa A.C.E.

Name: Ninja Academie
Description:
Ninja Academy organizes awesome sports adventures for everyone dreaming to become a ninja. Our Ninja Masters will teach you some cool ninja skills and take you an exciting missions against dragons and samurai. 

We learn by experiences. We make those experiences as cool as it gets. With some awesome games, you will learn skills like sneaking, climbing, roling, fighting and throwing. 

We will provide a save environment to learn to cooperate and take part in a team. You will conquer your fears or indicate you boundaries. Sometimes you'll win, sometimes you'll loose. But all the time, you will learn skills for life!

Name: Union Régionale Sportive Léo Lagrange Nouvelle Aquitaine
Description:
L'Union Régionale Sportive Léo Lagrange Nouvelle Aquitaine (URSLL NA), organe déconcentrée de l'UNSLL, vise à : 
- promouvoir le sport pour tous et sous toutes ses formes,
- rendre accessible l’ensemble de ses activités au plus grand nombre,
- éduquer et insérer par le sport,
- prévenir toute forme d’inégalités, de triches et de violence dans le sport,
- favoriser l’accès à la citoyenneté et à la santé,
- former et professionnaliser ses acteurs 
Les axes de développement de l'URSLL NA sont : 
o	Représenter l’UNSLL et relayer ses politiques sportives ;
o	Accueillir, accompagner, fédérer le tissu associatif régional ;
o	Étoffer le maillage territorial, de manière à devenir progressivement un territoire de projets structurants, innovants et de solidarité.
Sur le plan des projets et des actions, son équipe technique met en œuvre 5 programmes structurants : 
- Léo Sport Health et des sous programmes en le sport comme facteur de santé
- Léo Sport Job et son sous programme Léo Sport Challenge avec comme dénominateur commun la notion de défi sportif comme outil de réalisation de soi
- Léo Sport Accès qui vise les territoires cibles ou carencés ou même l'adaptation d'une pratique d'APS pour un public particulier
- Léo Sport Fair Play qui mobilise le sport comme outil pour lutter contre les discriminations, les violences dans le sport mais aussi les actions sportives en faveur du public carcéral ou des jeunes de la PJJ.
- Léo Sport Prog'ESS qui utilise le sport comme trait d'union pour activer des projets de la sphère de l'économie sociale et solidaire, du développement durable pour favoriser la responsabilité sociale des entreprises et des organisations.

Name: Sportsopia
Description: At Sportsopia, our mission is to transform the sports landscape in Bangladesh by empowering athletes, organizing impactful events, and fostering strategic partnerships. We are dedicated to driving innovation, creating opportunities for talent growth, and building a culture of inclusivity and excellence within the sports community. Our vision is to establish a sustainable platform that uplifts the sports sector and inspires the next generation of athletes.

Name: Mount Batten Centre Charity Trust
Description:
The Mount Batten Watersports and Activities Centre in Plymouth is one of the foremost Outdoor Education centres in the South West – the Centre has a reputation for excellence, professionalism and operates to the highest standards.

On offer are schools residentials, multi-activity courses, family fun days, watersports Instructor courses, RYA and British Canoeing personal proficiency awards and corporate team building events. 

In late 2014, the Mount Batten Watersports and Activities Centre was granted charity status (previously a not-for-profit organisation) after successfully meeting the criteria governed by Charity Law.

The Centre has always considered the ‘advancement of education’ and the ‘advancement of amateur sport’ at its core and ‘to promote, sustain and increase individual and collective knowledge and understanding of specific areas of study, skills and expertise.’

Name: Raising Her Game
Description:
Raising Her Game is a charity which empowers girls through sport. We are dedicated to improving diversity and representation in girls' sport, through creating a community where every girl has a pathway to ensure a lifelong love of sport. 

Raising Her Game works to bring more sports into more communities, break down participation barriers, and minimise sports dropouts. 

First, we offer free multi-sport camps to young girls from underrepresented groups. These are run by diverse, fully qualified role models who are passionate about the benefits of sport. 

Then, to ensure continued participation, we connect our girls with our carefully picked partner clubs who help them grow and thrive. 

This, combined with follow-up from our team, provision of free kit and subsidised membership fees helps minimise barriers to continued sports participation and encourages the girls to continue their sporting journeys. 

Our work with National Governing Bodies also ensures more accessible participation, continued inspiration and better connections from grassroots to elite sporting pathways.

Description:
Street Dreams Soccer Academy was founded by five childhood friends with the desire to have an impact in the community that raised us. We believe all children should have access to a fútbol environment where they are being challenged and developed.

Our approach to sport is culturally relevant and community-driven. We seek to optimize positive-youth-development via mentorship, family engagement, and community collaborations.

Our goal is to provide a competitive soccer environment where youth are challenged, supported, and encouraged to be the best versions of themselves on and off the field. We believe it is important to invest in our youth of today because they are the future leaders of tomorrow.

With world class coaches, warm private pools and a dedicated customer service team, we guarantee our students will be progressing to a high level in a short space of time. We are committed to being available, reactive and attentive to your needs at every stage with us.

Welcome to our world and we look forward to welcoming you to our community.

Name: Motiv8 Gym

Investeren in uw gezondheid en die van anderen is de eerste stap naar verduurzaming!

Name: FIDT
Description:
𝐄𝐞𝐧 𝐠𝐞𝐳𝐨𝐧𝐝 𝐞𝐧 𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐟 𝐛𝐞𝐝𝐫𝐢𝐣𝐟 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐞𝐧 𝐳𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐚𝐭 𝐣𝐞 𝐚𝐥𝐬 𝐇𝐑-𝐦𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐤𝐞𝐫 𝐞𝐱𝐭𝐫𝐚 𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐤 𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐚𝐚𝐫𝐭? 

Vraag jij je ook wel eens af welke trainingen, workshops of activiteiten écht effect hebben op de gezondheid van je collega’s? Hoe je er voor zorgt dat het je niet alleen maar extra werk oplevert? Merk jij dat je op dit moment alleen maar de sportieve medewerker aanspreekt terwijl degene die je juist wilt bereiken niet mee doet aan de activiteiten? 

Na veel gesprekken met HR-managers, medewerkers van bedrijven en onderzoek naar wetenschappelijke studies hebben wij voor jou uitgezocht hoe je op een effectieve manier fitte collega’s krijgt die met plezier naar hun werk gaan. 

Met ons nieuwe no-nonsense en effectieve vitaliteitsprogramma helpen we jou om medewerkers te krijgen die gezonder zijn en beter in hun vel zitten. 

We gaan samen aan de slag met motivatie- en gedrag, testen van conditie en het bepalen van je daadwerkelijke leeftijd, boks- en hardloopclinics, kracht- en conditietrainingen, bewustwording over ademen en voeding en het bepalen van jullie eigen sportieve doelen. 

Wil je een keer sparren over hoe we jouw collega's in goede conditie kunnen brengen? 

  sofie@fidt.nl
  06 31 96 00 96

Name: Lakes & Mountains with Matt Limited
Description:

Name: EBIC & Hotel Toppen af Ebeltoft
Description:
Ebeltoft Idræts- og Kulturcenter er en selvejende institution.

Vores formål er:  "At forestår driften af Idræts- og Kulturcentret i Ebeltoft, fortrinsvis med idrætsarbejde, fritidsaktiviteter, ungdomsarbejde, uddannelse, kurser, møder, koncerter, udstillinger og andre kulturelle arrangementer og aktiviteter i området, møder og lignende, samt vandrehjem, sportel og uddannelsescenter."

EBIC´s organisation består af et repræsentantskab på 15 medlemmer, der vælger en bestyrelse på fire medlemmer. Udover de 15 medlemmer, er der et medlem der repræsenterer svømmehallen. Dette medlem deltager også i bestyrelsesmøder, men har ikke stemmeret.

Repræsentantskabet vælger en formand direkte på det årlige repræsentantskab. Formanden sidder i en periode på min. 2 år. Ud over formanden vælges tre medlemmer. En bestyrelsesperiode er på min. 2 år. EBIC’s bestyrelse er den øverste myndighed i idrætscentret og for Danhostel Ebeltoft.

Bestyrelsen ansætter en direktør, som daglig leder af hele EBIC’s organisation, her under også Danhostel Ebeltoft.

Under direktøren er ansat en Halinspektør til at varetage den daglige drift i idrætscenteret, samt en vært på Toppen af Ebeltoft.

Det økonomiske overskud fra driften af Toppen af Ebeltoft anvendes til at udvikle og drive både Toppen af Ebeltoft og Ebeltoft Idræts- og Kulturcenter.

Hvis du har spørgsmål kan du skrive en mail til info@ebic.dk.

Name: The Thoreau Club
Description:
Established in 1951 by Clifford and Dorothy Pulis, Camp Thoreau was the fulfillment of a dream to create a day camp where they could share their love of nature, the outdoors and their camping expertise. Mr & Mrs. Click, as they were known by the locals, understood the value of a wholesome camp experience and believed children should learn about nature’s wonders. Incorporating their own wilderness camping experiences and a quote from Henry David Thoreau’s Walden, “Every morning an opportunity to make life of equal simplicity with nature,” the “Click” Pulis team created a unique camp environment that captured the feeling of the deep woods of Maine in rural Concord, MA.

Camp Thoreau, Inc.’s growth over its 60+ year history has been significant and yet deliberate, always conservative and always in keeping with the family’s core values. What started as a traditional summer camp for kids to play and grow has developed into a complex year round fitness, tennis, swim and health club for kids and adults of all ages.

Name: Stootkracht013
Description:
Stootkracht013 – Vitaliteit in actie

Ik geloof dat vitaliteit veel meer is dan een checklist of los project.
Het is een levend systeem dat ontstaat wanneer mensen zich gezien voelen, in beweging komen en samen verantwoordelijkheid nemen.

Het moment waarop een team echt aan gaat en samen groeit, is slechts het begin van wat mogelijk is.

Bij Stootkracht013 noemen we dat geen toeval.
Wij noemen dat: magie in actie.
Energie die stroomt. Verbinding die groeit. Veerkracht die beweegt. Aandacht die raakt.
Dat is hoe we teams en organisaties in beweging brengen.

Onze vijf pijlers brengen leiders en teams in beweging en maken vitaliteit voelbaar in de praktijk:
- Energie in actie: eigenaarschap over energie, fysiek én mentaal.
- Spanning als brandstof: waar het wringt, zit energie. Leiders begeleiden dit zorgvuldig, zodat beweging en richting ontstaat.
- Verbinding door aandacht: versterkt samenwerking, vertrouwen en veiligheid.
- Veerkracht voorbij comfort: groei net buiten comfort door leren en reflectie.
- Ritme in leiderschap: voorbeeldgedrag, herhaling en ruimte voor ontwikkeling.

Werken met Stootkracht013 betekent:
- Leiders die actief meedoen.
- Teams met ruimte om te bewegen en te ontwikkelen.
- Vitaliteit die collectief wordt ervaren.
- Ontwikkeling en reflectie die structureel zijn.
- Verandering die voelbaar is in energie, samenwerking en resultaten.

Wie kiest voor Stootkracht013 zet zichzelf én het team in beweging.
Ontwikkeling begint zodra je in beweging komt.

Tworzymy przestrzeń, w której młodzi i starsi, osoby z niepełnosprawnościami (OzN) oraz ci, którzy dopiero stawiają pierwsze kroki w golfie, mogą uczyć się, rozwijać i czerpać radość z gry. Wierzymy, że golf to coś więcej niż sport – to sposób na budowanie relacji, pewności siebie, wartości i trwałych przyjaźni.

 Wspieramy rozwój na każdym etapie – od pierwszego swingu aż po profesjonalną karierę.
 Łączymy pokolenia – dzieci, młodzież, seniorów i całe rodziny.
 Stawiamy na fair play, pasję i determinację – to nasze codzienne wartości.
 Dajemy szansę talentom – tym, którzy potrzebują tylko odrobiny wsparcia, by rozwinąć skrzydła.

Nasze działania obejmują:
• programy szkoleniowe i edukacyjne
• aktywizację seniorów
• działania włączające osoby z niepełnosprawnościami
• organizację wydarzeń i turniejów z misją społeczną
• promocję golfa jako sportu dostępnego i otwartego

Wspólnie tworzymy kulturę sportu opartego na empatii i równych szansach. Zmieniamy rzeczywistość krok po kroku, swing po swingu. 

 Więcej o nas: www.fairwaydlawszystkich.pl

Name: NextGen
Description:
Anno 2023 is sport belangrijker dan ooit. Bedrijven hebben een voorbeeldfunctie richting hun medewerkers en kinderen bij het aanbieden en promoten van sportaanbod. Of het nu gaat om een jaarlijkse sportdag, een sportief personeelsevent of de feestelijke afsluiting van een project, challenge of jaar/seizoen: sport events zijn onmisbaar op de agenda van iedere organisatie. Het probleem is dat de doorsnee sportdag lang niet voor iedereen leuk en nuttig is. Iedere keer hetzelfde aanbod, niet iedereen vindt de gekozen sport(en) leuk, de niveauverschillen zijn enorm of het instapniveau is te hoog, waardoor deelnemers minder plezier hebben, 
vroegtijdig afhaken of zich zelfs helemaal niet meer aanmelden.

Name: DOO
Description:
"Innovating the Future of Sports | Sports Technology Enthusiast | Empowering Athletes and Fans

 Welcome to DOO, where we're at the forefront of merging sports and technology to create groundbreaking experiences for athletes and fans alike.

 Our mission is to redefine the sports landscape through innovative technology solutions. From performance-enhancing wearables to immersive virtual experiences, we're dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in sports.

 Explore the intersection of cutting-edge technology and sports excellence. Our flagship project, Sky Gym, is a virtual sports arena designed to empower individuals with diverse abilities and those facing immune system challenges. It's a testament to our commitment to inclusivity and positive change.

Join us in exploring the exciting fusion of sports and technology. Connect with fellow enthusiasts, athletes, and innovators who share a passion for pushing the limits and reimagining the future of sports.

Let's shape the future together! Reach out to learn more about our initiatives, collaborations, and how you can be a part of the sports tech revolution. Follow DOO for the latest updates, insights, and industry advancements."

Name: Modo Pro Training
Description:
Modo Pro es una plataforma de entrenamiento virtual que está transformando el fitness en Latinoamérica. Nuestra misión es cerrar la brecha de acceso a entrenamientos de alta calidad, nutrición personalizada y acompañamiento 1 a 1, haciéndolos accesibles para todos.

Gracias a una metodología propia que combina entrenamiento estratégico con planes nutricionales adaptados, logramos que nuestros usuarios obtengan resultados hasta 6 veces más rápido que con los métodos tradicionales.

Pero Modo Pro es mucho más que una app: es una comunidad activa y motivadora, integrada por usuarios, coaches y expertos que te acompañan en cada etapa del proceso. Aquí, nunca entrenás solo.

Actualmente, los programas están liderados por Ricardo Elías y Lia Olite, reconocidos atletas e influencers del mundo fitness. Muy pronto, nuevos entrenadores se sumarán al equipo.

En menos de un año, ya hemos ayudado a más de 15,000 personas a transformar su estilo de vida.

Name: ENVIE SPORTIVE
Description:
L'objectif de ENVIE SPORTIVE est de promouvoir la pratique d'une activité physique et sportive pour tous.
Rappelons que cette dernière a un impact positif sur la gestion du stress, l'amélioration de la condition physique, la prévention des maladies chroniques et cardiovasculaires. Nous intervenons notamment au sein des entreprises où le fait de pratiquer le sport entre collègues améliore nettement le cohésion d'équipe, la communication ainsi que la productivité globale.
Nous proposons aussi des interventions pour les maisons de retraite/résidence senior ainsi qu'au sein des écoles primaires.

Name: Milton Magic FC (Milton Youth Soccer Club)
Description:
MYSC was incorporated in 1988 and has been servicing the town of Milton ever since. Milton Youth Soccer Club is a non-profit, volunteer organization whose purpose is to provide quality soccer programs to kids of all ages. We have over 4000 players who play house-league, development, and rep each year. We have teams from U4 to U18 and an Adult League as well. Our program is successful because of our dedicated volunteers.
Mission
To promote and develop the game of soccer within the community. To help individuals develop their character as resourceful and responsible members of their community by providing opportunities, through the game of soccer, for mental, physical, social and leadership development.

Name: CWO
Description:
De Stichting CWO is een samenwerkingsverband van het Watersportverbond en de HISWA. Deze stichting stelt zich tot doel een uniform diplomasysteem voor vrijwillige vaaropleidingen in te richten en in stand te houden. Zo zijn er diploma’s voor bijna elke watersportdiscipline (bijv: kielbootzeilen, jeugdzeilen, zeezeilen, brandingsurfen etc.). 

Naast deze diploma's voor watersporters zijn er ook opleidingen en diploma's voor instructeurs en examinatoren in elke tak van watersport. Bovendien wil de CWO de kwaliteit van de vaaropleidingen in Nederland waarborgen en die kwaliteit zichtbaar maken voor de watersporters. 

De CWO is van mening dat plezier in watersport gewaarborgd wordt met een goede opleiding. Bij de CWO vindt u daarom alle informatie en adressen voor uw opleidingswens!

Name: ASPTT Rennes Omnisports
Description:
Rennes ASPTT Omnisports – Le sport pour tous depuis 1922 
Depuis plus de 100 ans, Rennes ASPTT Omnisports est un acteur majeur du sport rennais. Fondée en 1922, l’association s’est construite autour d’une conviction forte : le sport est un formidable vecteur de lien social, d’inclusion et d’épanouissement.
Aujourd’hui, Rennes ASPTT Omnisports rassemble plus de 1 000 adhérents et peut compter sur l’engagement de 250 bénévoles qui font vivre un projet sportif ambitieux et durable, ancré sur le territoire.
Notre mission est de rendre le sport accessible à toutes et tous, quels que soient l’âge, le niveau ou le parcours. À travers 15 activités sportives – athlétisme, basketball, football, tennis, cyclisme, randonnée, voile, karaté, marche nordique, Kidisport, handisport, sport adapté, gymnastique, natation et badminton – nous proposons une offre complète, inclusive et tournée vers le plaisir de pratiquer.
*Association omnisports engagée, nous plaçons au cœur de nos actions les valeurs de solidarité, de convivialité, de performance et d’inclusion. Reconnue pour ses labels en faveur du parasport, de l’insertion vers l’emploi et du sport pour les jeunes.
*L’association organise et participe à de nombreux événements sportifs et citoyens tels que Les Foulées Maurepasiennes, La Rennaise, CAP vers l’HANDI, Tout Rennes Court, un Média Day, des stages ou encore le Stade vers l’Emploi.
- communicationrennes@asptt.com

Whether you're a new referee or a seasoned professional, Referee offers expert insights, certification programs, and the latest rule interpretations across a wide variety of sports.

We are committed to advancing the profession of officiating by delivering high-quality educational materials, development tools, and industry news. Through our comprehensive print and digital resources—including video analysis, articles, and in-depth training programs—we empower officials to make confident decisions and continuously improve their skills.

At Referee, we believe in building a strong community of sports officials by promoting integrity, fairness, and professionalism in every aspect of the game. Join us to stay informed, enhance your expertise, and be part of the future of sports officiating.

Name: Departamento de Recreación y Deportes
Description:
El Departamento de Recreación y Deportes es la Agencia Gubernamental encargada de promover la recreación y el deporte en todo Puerto Rico.  Con miras a que los ciudadanos disfruten sanamente de su tiempo libre y que se beneficien de actividades recreativas y deportivas.

Nuestra misión es brindar oportunidades a la población general a través de nuestras regiones de servicio ubicadas alrededor de todo Puerto Rico, ofreciendo actividades recreativas y programas deportivos gratuitos para el beneficio y el mejoramiento de la calidad de vida de todas las poblaciones a las cuales servimos: (niño(a)s, adultos, ancianos, personas con impedimentos).

Objetivos:

– Buen uso del tiempo libre en actividades sanas que promuevan la unidad familiar.

– Identificación de atletas potenciales.

– Desarrollo y apoyo economico a atletas en las diferentes disciplinas deportivas.

– Propulsar el deporte como herramienta de desarrollo económico para ayudar al crecimiento de nuestra economía isleña.

Nuestra visión como Agencia es ser reconocidos por nuestra efectividad, por la calidad del servicio que brindamos en el desarrollo de la recreación y el deporte, y por la satisfacción de la ciudadanía.

Name: Be More Rugby
Description:
Rugby is all about how to work effectively as a team and how to get the best from yourself and your teammates. 
There are also lessons in leadership, motivation, work ethic, self-awareness, positive mental attitude, self-control, discipline, patience, emotional intelligence, personal growth, responsibility, fulfilment, respect and, above all, happiness!
A Rugby player cannot win on their own, therefore there is no success without a team. 
Simply put, we all understand sport and the sports team mentality, so we already understand how to succeed, personally and professionally. Studying leadership, motivation and teamwork is as complicated as watching the game at the weekend. Be More Rugby wants to show how easy it is to create a winning mindset that will help you be more successful, positive and happy!
Become the best `You` with a Rugby mindset. 
Grab life with both hands and go for the Try line!

Name: SURFWRLD
Description:
Surfen unmittelbar vor der Haustür? Bald möglich! Mitten in NRW, genau genommen in Werne, entsteht mit dem Doppelprojekt aus SURFWRLD und SCNCWAVE eine weltweit einzigartige Möglichkeit, Spaß und Forschung miteinander zu kombinieren. 

Ein Surfpark mit fast dreimal so viel Wasserfläche wie bisherige Anlagen. Ausgestattet mit den neuesten Technologien und hochmodernen Wellensystemen bietet SURFWRLD ein authentisches Surfgefühl. Egal, ob erfahren oder Neuling: bei uns findest du die ideale Welle für dich, um deine Surffähigkeiten zu verbessern oder zu erlernen. Während andere Anlagen im Winter schließen, ist unsere durchgehend in Betrieb, indem sie eine wasserbauliche Großforschungseinrichtung umgewandelt wird: SCNCWAVE. Tauche ein in die faszinierende Welt des Wassers, der Wellen und des Surfens und buche noch heute deine Surfstunde. Wir freuen uns auf dich!

All the FOOTLAB venues are connected and users can follow the global rankings, chat or challenge athletes and teams all over the world, all connected by the passion for football. FOOTLAB challenges were created to improve technical and tactical ability, physical fitness, team play and social skills, or just to spend a good time in a football environment context.

GO Anna! is meer dan alleen bewegen op het Annapark. Doel is om verbindingen te leggen met andere ondernemers, op een informele maar sportieve manier. 
De trainingen hebben iedere week een ander thema. Denk aan snelheid, kracht of behendigheid en dat wordt dan weer aangepast op ieders fysieke mogelijkheden. 
Na afloop van de training praten we nog even gezellig na onder het genot van een vers gemaakte smoothie en een kop koffie of thee.

Wil jij jouw netwerk graag uitbreiden op een van de mooiste locaties in Venray én heb jij het voornemen om meer te gaan bewegen op jouw eigen niveau? Kom een les mee doen! We vinden het leuk om je erbij te hebben. 

Iedere vrijdag van 7.30 uur tot 8.30 uur op het Annapark in Venray (in de winter beginnen we een half uurtje later trouwens).

Name: Wilspoke Sports and Entertainment

Wilspoke Sports & Entertainment is a purpose-driven sports management company dedicated to building impactful experiences that go beyond the game. We specialize in managing inclusive sporting events, fostering adaptive sports like physical disability cricket, and creating platforms that empower differently abled athletes to shine on national and international stages.

Our expertise spans event conceptualization, sponsorship management, CSR partnerships, athlete development, and brand building. We work closely with governing bodies, corporates, and global federations to design programs that combine sports, social impact, and sustainability.

At Wilspoke, we believe sports is not just competition—it is a powerful tool for empowerment, inclusion, and change. Every project we undertake is driven by the vision of giving athletes a voice, inspiring communities, and showcasing the transformative power of sports.

Follow us to stay updated on:

Name: Let's Get Active (LGA)
Description:
INSPIRE. EDUCATE. CREATE.

At Let's Get Active (LGA), we're more than just a sports organisation; we're catalysts for positive change in young lives. Founded with a vision to empower and elevate, LGA harnesses the power of sports to foster personal growth, discipline, and teamwork among youth.

Our Mission
Our core mission is to provide comprehensive, tailor-made sports programmes that address the physical, mental, and social development needs of young athletes. By operating across South & East London, we've dedicated ourselves to crafting environments where potential is recognised, nurtured, and celebrated.

What We Offer
Basketball Camps: A flagship events that combines high-level skill development with life lessons, catering to ages 5-16.

Primary School Programs: Custom-designed to integrate seamlessly into educational settings, enhancing physical education with a focus on fun and engagement.

Mentorship & Coaching: Beyond the court, our programs extend to mentorship, offering guidance, support, and inspiration to the next generation of athletes.

Partnerships for Progress: Proud collaborators with Jr. NBA, Jordan Brand, London Lions, and more, bringing exclusive opportunities and elite experiences to our participants.

Join Our Community
We invite you to be part of our journey towards making sports a foundation for lifelong success. Whether you're a parent, athlete, coach, or supporter, there's a place for you in the LGA family.

#LetsGetActive

Name: Surlo
Description:
Surlo est une plateforme numérique (application mobile et version web) à destination de la communauté des pratiquants de sports nautiques.

Elle couvre tous les sports nautiques (voile, voile légère, kite, planche à voile, wing, canoë-kayak, aviron, stand-up paddle etc.) et s’adresse à tous les pratiquants, quels que soient leur niveau (amateur, pro) ou leur plan d’eau (mer, lac, rivières).

L’eau fascine mais la plupart des pratiquants regrette de ne pas avoir assez de temps à consacrer à leur pratique. Surlo est là pour maximiser leur temps sur l’eau en les aidant à naviguer plus et mieux.

Contrairement aux autres applications nautiques souvent très techniques et à usage individuel, Surlo est une plateforme communautaire conviviale qui offre des fonctionnalités avancées tout en restant simple d’utilisation.

Concrètement, Surlo permet aux pratiquants de planifier, d’enregistrer et d’analyser leurs sessions sur l’eau grâce au GPS de leur smartphone ou de leur montre connectée.

Des défis sportifs leur permettent de se mesurer aux autres pratiquants, qu’ils soient pros ou amateurs, au travers de classements actualisés en temps réel.

La plateforme propose trois types de défis : des parcours, des runs de vitesse et des défis endurance pour mettre sa régularité à l’épreuve. Les plus exigeants peuvent également créer leurs propres défis sur-mesure et défier leurs amis.

Grâce aux fonctionnalités sociales de l’application, ils peuvent suivre l’actualité de leurs sportifs préférés.

Surlo, c’est également une communauté engagée pour la protection des Océans.

Les pratiquants, au travers de leur activité Surlo, gagnent des « crédits impact » qui sont convertis en soutiens financiers à l’ONG de leur choix: WWF France et son programme « Méditerranée », Surfrider Foundation Europe, Tara Océan etc.

Name: Jumpshot Generosity

Empowering Youth Through Basketball:

Jumpshot Generosity is a visionary initiative that aims to empower underserved and at-risk youth in British Columbia through the transformative power of basketball. With a mission to provide opportunities for youth to play, learn, and develop valuable sport and life skills, Jumpshot Generosity collaborates with public schools and community centers to create a safe and inclusive environment where participants receive complimentary access to training, mentorship, basketball equipment, and nutritious meals.

Name: Elite Cricket Academy and Sports Gear Private Limited
Description:
Opened in June 2023, Elite Cricket Academy and Sports Gear Pty Ltd (ECA) is the first  Integrated Elite Indoor cricket training facility in the Medavakkam, Chennai region equipped with a modern training equipment Gym, a recovery, an onsite retail store, box cricket area giving a fully rounded training experience. The cricket lanes are 38m in length and provide a complete run-up experience for bowlers of all types. Our vision as a company is to ensure that Cricketers and indeed all sports lovers see us as the go-to place for training and cricket practice. We also aim to be able to provide services to those who are not sports-inclined and also be amongst the top three indoor sports facilities in Chennai.

Our aim at achieving our vision and objectives has led us to develop strategies that will not only see us attaining this vision but will also ensure that we compete favorably against our competitors and stand out as well. Some of these strategies will be contained in the unique services we intend to offer our various customers.

ECA’s Mission Statement

Our mission is to provide a great learning environment, educate and create a welcoming environment for cricketers of all ages and gender and help them develop into confident cricketers.

Our aim at achieving our vision and objectives has led us to focus on sourcing the best coaching and support staff and equipment. Our employees will not only be well trained and undergo continuous training, but they will also have their performances continually appraised. ECA’s programs are structured and continuously evolving to adapt to the changing dynamics of the game.

Our commitment to our patrons, customers, and anyone coming into the center ensures they have 100% satisfaction and walk away with a fabulous cricket training experience. We are looking forward to seeing you soon.

Description:

We envision a Singapore where riding a bicycle is always safe and convenient for everyone, where cycling is the top choice for recreation and everyday trips, and where the benefits of cycling are experienced and valued by everyone on our little island.

We believe that the human spirit thrives on adventure and inspires the rest of us to take action. At GoBike, we aim to inspire people to a healthy lifestyle by offering the most immersive cycling experiences for all levels of cyclists, from city tours to mountain trails and everything in between. Oferecemos a possibilidade de turmas para familiares, para que todos possam melhorar suas habilidades cognitivas juntos. 

Acreditamos que um cérebro ativo é vida e estamos aqui para ajudar. 

Agende agora mesmo sua aula gratuita e comece a transformar a sua vida!

Name: Guided Outdoor Adventures
Description:
Guided Outdoor Adventures delivers safe, supportive and professionally led outdoor experiences across the UK. We specialise in guided walks, mountain days and navigation training in the Peak District, Lake District, Snowdonia/Eryri and Yorkshire Dales, working only with qualified and insured Mountain Leaders and outdoor professionals.

Our mission is simple:
to help people explore the outdoors with confidence, safety and connection.

We offer:
• Guided walks for all abilities
• Navigation & Hill Skills courses
• Corporate wellbeing and team-building days
• Charity challenge support (Snowdon, Yorkshire 3 Peaks, bespoke routes)
• Family-friendly adventures and private bookings
• Outdoor First Aid training (16 hour)

Our ethos -Navigate with Wisdom - reflects our commitment to providing inclusive, confidence-building experiences that prioritise safety, wellbeing and community.

Whether you're an individual looking to build mountain confidence, a business seeking meaningful team experiences, or a group planning a challenge event, Guided Outdoor Adventures provides trusted leadership and supportive, memorable days in the outdoors.

 Explore upcoming adventures: guidedoutdooradventures.co.uk

Kurrinda Bloodstock Syndications is an Authorised Representative (No. 001285134) of Stable Connect Limited (AFS License No. 336964) This means that we are an Approved Promoter with Racing NSW and adhere to the regulations set by Racing NSW and ASIC.

Name: BasketballRecruiting.com
Description:
Who Is This For?

BasketballRecruiting.Com is for basketball parents, coaches, and players. If you (or your athletes) want to play college basketball, this is the place for you.

The old methods to get in front of college coaches no longer work... 
The recruiting process can be overwhelming and the options are endless.

I'm sure you've been told that you need to play AAU, consider going to a prep school, go to exposure camps, email coaches your game film, invest in expensive recruiting services, make an online player profile, etc... the list goes on and on.

While some of these things can help you, many of the above are a waste of time and money.

Most parents and players wind up randomly doing things that they think will help, but have no way to know for sure.

This is what we call the "blind approach." It's as good as throwing paint at the wall and hoping something sticks.

If you feel like this is what you're doing right now, it's not your fault and you're NOT alone.

There is a HUGE gap regarding legitimate information and most of the options you see today are just money grabs.

That is why we put together this platform. We will be educating you day by day, on the exact steps you need to be taking to put yourself in the best position possible to get recruited.

Now this isn't surface-level information that you can find anywhere on the internet.

We've brought together some of the best minds in college basketball.

You'll get direct insight from current college coaches at every level and be able to learn from other parents that have successfully navigated through this process.

Name: GrowFit
Description:
GrowFit, established in 2006, is the Bay Area's premier provider of sports-based camps and comprehensive physical education programs for children aged 4-12. At GrowFit, we’re dedicated to helping every child thrive through active play, teamwork, and community-building activities.

Name: TeQers
Description:
We offer Teqball table hire, referees and host Teqball competitions for amateur and experienced Teqballers.

We offer hire of trained and competent referees to host, teach and officiate your Teqball experience.

What is TeqBall?

TeqBall is a growing sport which tests the technique, control &  first touch of players just like a game of 2 touch, combined with a uniquely engineered table, TeqBall combines football and table tennis. This newest craze in outdoor sports is sure to test your skills.

Our Equipment

The Teq One Table introduces an exciting and innovative form of sporting equipment. Through 2 years of testing and research, the Teq Table was developed to create a new sports table that allows you to play a number of different games, such as Teqball, Teqis, Teqvoly and Qatch, as well as the ability to play and create your own games.

The solid net on the Teq One was designed to cause the ball to bounce back, allowing the player to catch the ball and continue their game uninterrupted. The structure’s design allows you to focus on your skills and abilities instead of luck or chance interfering with your game.

Main rules of Teqball
•	Teqball is played with a size five football.
•	2 players (singles game) or by 4 players (doubles game).
•	Matches consists of best-of-3 sets.
•	Each set is played until a player/team reaches 12 points.
•	Every player/team has 2 attempts to complete a successful service.
•	Players/Teams change service after each 4 points.
•	It is forbidden to touch the ball with the same body part twice consecutively.
•	And with the same body part twice consecutively.
•	Every player/team is allowed to return the ball with a maximum of 3 touches by any body part, except for the hands & arms.
•	In doubles, a team has a maximum of 3 touches, however, the teammates must pass the ball at least once to each other.
•	While playing, neither the table nor the opponent can be touched.
•	In case of an edgeball, the rally shall be repeated.

Name: Prosneige
Description:
Depuis 28 ans, Prosneige est bien plus qu'un groupe d'écoles de ski : c'est une véritable famille unie par la passion des sports d'hiver et de la montagne.

Implanté dans 5 stations emblématiques des Alpes françaises, Prosneige réunit 5 écoles de ski et des magasins de sport pour accompagner chaque client dans sa pratique, quel que soit son niveau. Avec plus de 100 moniteurs dévoués, nous offrons des cours personnalisés qui vont bien au-delà de la technique : ils sont l'occasion de partager notre amour de la montagne et nos émotions.

Notre camp de base à Albertville, notre salle d'escalade, et nos espaces snacking témoignent de notre volonté de créer un environnement convivial et diversifié, où chacun peut se retrouver et vivre des moments uniques. Nous formons également les moniteurs de demain, transmettant notre savoir-faire et notre passion dans un esprit d'entraide et de partage.

Audace, innovation et proximité sont les moteurs de notre engagement. Chaque membre de l'équipe, dynamique et bienveillant, s'investit pleinement pour offrir à nos clients une expérience inoubliable en montagne, empreinte de chaleur humaine et de professionnalisme. Chez Prosneige, nous faisons de vos vacances des moments d'exception, où plaisir et apprentissage vont de pair.

A très vite pour vivre ensemble l'expérience Prosneige

Name: Be Diving México
Description: We are a diving center established in 2019, despite the short life span of our brand, the members of our family have many years of experience and professionalism in the field. Our mission is to provide personalized and high-quality service. On the other hand, our vision is focused on clients being able to appreciate and understand the importance of caring for the oceans and their ecosystems, and thus make this a unique learning experience, promoting responsible and sustainable tourism. Name: Shabiki Kenya

Name: Inclyousion Sports
Description:
Inclyousion Sports provides inclusive sports enrichment programs for children, using innovative behavioral methods to teach sports, fitness and social skills.

We provide fun, non-competitive sports classes, that have been developed with the framework of The National Association for Sport and Physical Education, and combined with research-based behavior change methods, such as positive reinforcement. Our coaches complete robust program, behavioral and inclusion training to ensure children are supported and challenged with age and developmentally appropriate skill building activities. Our classes are intentionally small so that coaches can be attentive to the children's needs. 

Our program is designed so that each month we focus our classes on one sport. For four weeks, children practice the basic skills within each sport in addition to strengthening appropriate social skills. Sports we may focus on include: soccer, basketball, baseball, track and field, football, tennis and hockey. 

We are on a mission to make high quality sports enrichment programs accessible to all children!

Name: Tourney Direct
Description:
In the fast-paced world of youth sports, event management is no small feat. Recruiting staff, juggling schedules, and managing payments often create an endless cycle of spreadsheets, emails, and last-minute chaos. Recognizing the need for change, we created Tourney Direct.

Our journey began with a clear mission: to bring clarity and efficiency to event operations. We listened to organizers, coaches, and administrators, each sharing similar frustrations. Inspired by their stories, we developed Tourney Direct—a platform that simplifies staffing, management, and payments, letting organizers focus on what truly matters: creating unforgettable experiences for athletes, staff, and fans.

Today, Tourney Direct is more than software. We’re a committed partner dedicated to empowering the youth sports community by making event staffing and payment management smoother, simpler, and more enjoyable. It’s a story of passion, innovation, and a drive to transform sports event management. And we’re just getting started.

Join us in this new era of sports event management, where seamless operations lead to unforgettable experiences.

Name: KOHR Golf Center
Description:
Discover the epitome of golf practice excellence at KOHR Golf Center, where beauty meets cutting-edge technology. Our facility stands as a beacon of golf innovation, setting the standard for practice facilities nationwide.

Indoor Golf Excellence
Step inside our state-of-the-art Indoor Golf Center, boasting five Trackman Simulators, along with our beautiful indoor putting green, all designed to sharpen your skills year-round.

Unparalleled Public Practice Center
KOHR Golf Center proudly houses a nationally renowned public practice center featuring a remarkable lineup of 62 Trackman Range hitting bays, complemented by 14 target greens. Our expansive championship short-game area ensures you have every tool at your disposal. For those seeking exclusivity, our two-acre Members-only training area awaits.

Elite Golf Academy
Prepare to witness the transformation of aspiring junior golfers into elite athletes at our prestigious golf academy. At KOHR Golf, we inspire, empower, and evolve the next generation of junior and collegiate golfers. Join us on a journey that goes beyond golf, preparing our players for success in life.

Golf Coaching & Instruction

Name: Sportzentrum Zürich
Description:
Zwischen Dübendorf und Wangen-Brüttisellen entsteht auf mehreren Ebenen und auf mehr als 23 000 m2 ein polysportives Kompetenzzentrum. Das Zentrum wird ab 2025 das neue Zuhause für über 30 Sportarten. Egal, welche Sportart, welches Leistungsniveau und welche Altersgruppe – es können alle voneinander profitieren.

Vor Ort werden professionelle sportmedizinische Versorgung, Ruheräume und Physiotherapie angeboten. Das Sportzentrum bietet die Möglichkeit, Veranstaltungen, Schulungen, Sportcamps und Generalversammlungen durchzuführen. Zudem werden im Gebäude für die beiden Initianten «Regionalverband Zürich Tennis» und «Zürcher Turnverband» Geschäftsstellen untergebracht sowie die Kunst- und Sportschule Zürcher Oberland.

Name: Wicklow Sports & Recreation Partnership
Description:
The Wicklow Local Sports Partnership is part of a vibrant local sports and physical activity network of clubs, sports facilities, communities, schools and others. 
The vision and oversight of the Wicklow Sports & Recreation Partnership are managed by our Board and acted on by our staff.  This vision and these actions do not however take place in a vacuum, they are shaped and guided by Sport Ireland’s Strategy, by the Healthy Ireland Framework and the National Sports Policy.

Name: Krav Maga International Eindhoven, IKMA Gidon System Nederland
Description:
Onze doelen zijn; Het ontwikkelen en/of verbeteren van mentale en fysieke weerbaarheid door middel van psycho-fysieke coaching en training sessies

Onze geaccrediteerde psycho-fysieke coach/trainers bieden op maat Psycho-fysieke trainingen aan met specialisaties in;
-Basisonderwijs
-Gezinstraining
-Autistisch Spectrum Stoornissen
-Verstandelijke Beperkingen
-Psychosociaal Trauma en rouw ervaring
-Parkinson en Parkinsonisme sport trainer

Naast onze workshops, clinics, en meerdaagse programma’s voor scholen, bedrijven en  instellingen, verzorgen we ook reguliere groepslessen voor  kinderen vanaf 8 jaar, jong volwassenen, volwassenen en mensen met een beperking 
De trainingen zijn voor iedereen toegankelijk, ervaring of fysieke conditie is vereist en iedereen is welkom.

Onze school is erkend met het Uniek Sporten Brabant-certificaat, wat onze toewijding benadrukt om sport toegankelijk te maken voor mensen met een beperking. Elke les is ontworpen om niet alleen fysieke vaardigheden te verbeteren maar ook belangrijke levensvaardigheden, zoals het stellen van grenzen en zelfadvocatie. We streven naar een inclusieve gemeenschap waarin niemand buitengesloten wordt en waar respect en integriteit centraal staan.

Name: Rhijenhof
Description:
0174 292 906 |  info@rhijenhof.nl |  www.rhijenhof.nl  

De thuisbasis voor Burgersdijk tennis en Tennisclub de Rhijenhof.
Op de grens van Wateringen/ Westland en Den Haag vind je de Rhijenhof. Dit is de thuisbasis voor Burgersdijk tennis en Tennisclub de Rhijenhof. Daarnaast kun je hier terecht voor fitness, fysiotherapie en sportkleding. En natuurlijk staat de koffie voor je klaar in onze gezellige horeca.

𝗪𝗲𝗿𝗸 𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗷𝗼𝘂𝘄 𝗴𝗲𝘇𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗱 𝗲𝗻 𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗺𝗼𝗲𝘁 𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝗱𝗼𝗼𝗿:
-	Tennis (14 gravelbanen en 12 indoor hardcourtbanen)
-	Squash (7 squashbanen)
-	Padel (binnenkort)
-	Fysio
-	Fitness

𝗛𝘂𝘂𝗿 𝗲𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝗻- 𝗼𝗳 𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗱𝗼𝗼𝗿 𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝘀𝗯𝗮𝗮𝗻
Met een groot aanbod van 26 banen hebben wij voldoende ruimte voor alle tennisfanaten van Westland, Den Haag en omstreken. De banen mogen gebruikt worden door leden van tennisvereniging Tennisclub de Rhijenhof en ook door niet-leden. Leden hebben voorrang op het gebruik van de 14 buitenbanen en kunnen daarnaast meedoen aan de vele activiteiten van de vereniging. De banen zijn per keer te boeken of voor een langere periode. Hierdoor is het ook mogelijk om banen te boeken voor een toernooi, recreatieve mogelijkheden of tennislessen. Wil je zeker weten dat je kunt tennissen op je vaste tijd neem dan contact met ons op.

𝗦𝗾𝘂𝗮𝘀𝗵𝗯𝗮𝗻𝗲𝗻 𝗵𝘂𝗿𝗲𝗻
Daag je vrienden of collega’s uit om eens een potje te squashen: een racketspel waarbij je in een afgesloten ruimte naast elkaar én op hetzelfde speelveld speelt. Squash is een intensieve sport die flink wat energie vraagt. Reserveren is daarom mogelijk van een half uur tot anderhalf uur.  Er zijn in totaal 7 banen waarvan 4 voor leden en 3 voor niet-leden. 

𝗕𝗶𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗻𝗸𝗼𝗿𝘁 𝗼𝗼𝗸 𝗽𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗯𝗮𝗻𝗲𝗻 𝗼𝗽 𝗱𝗲 𝗥𝗵𝗶𝗷𝗲𝗻𝗵𝗼𝗳
We zijn blij dat we binnenkort padelbanen aanleggen op onze locatie. Padel, een boeiende mix van tennis en squash, biedt een dynamische en leuke ervaring voor spelers van alle niveaus.

Name: The Strength Club | Personal Training Breda (Terheijden)
Description:
The Strength Club is een privé sportschool waar mensen alleen op afspraak kunnen sporten, begeleid door een personal trainer. Dit kan individuele training zijn of training in duo's. Bovendien zijn al onze trainers goed opgeleid in hun gespecialiseerde vakgebied en werken we met dezelfde passie voor sport. Op deze manier blijven we de kwaliteit waar we voor staan waarborgen.
Of je nu een topsporter bent of net begint, de sportschool is ontworpen om iedereen zo goed mogelijk te begeleiden bij het bereiken van zijn of haar doelen. De sportschool bestaat uit twee verdiepingen, uitgerust met het beste materiaal uit de fitnessbranche.
 
Wij richten ons ook altijd op het complete pakket. Dit betekent dat voeding en leefstijlbegeleiding zijn inbegrepen bij elk tarief voor personal training.

Onze trainers zijn volledig toegewijd en staan klaar om je te begeleiden naar de beste versie van jezelf.

Name: Premium Training Center
Description: Premium Training Center es un centro de entrenamiento personal y específico para futbolistas a través de una metodología innovadora en el sector basada en el aprendizaje, evolución y potenciación de las habilidades y capacidades de cada jugador/a.

Name: Club Deportivo Godoy Cruz Antonio Tomba
Description:
El Club Deportivo Godoy Cruz Antonio Tomba es una de las instituciones deportivas y sociales más importantes de Argentina. El Tomba, como se lo conoce comúnmente, es uno de los equipos del país que más veces ha participado internacionalmente en Copa Libertadores y Sudamericana, las competiciones más importantes a nivel continental en América.

Con un gran número de hinchas, es el equipo más popular de Mendoza, como así también una de las entidades deportivas ejemplo en gestión económica y dirigencial en la Argentina.

La institución cuenta con un predio deportivo de alto rendimiento con 14 canchas e instalaciones de primer nivel para su plantel profesional e inferiores.

Más allá de que el fútbol siempre ha sido la principal actividad, el club se caracteriza por su propuesta social, superando la decena de disciplinas, que se encuentran activas y en constante crecimiento. Además, orgullosamente posee un Instituto Educativo con nivel inicial, primario y secundario. 

MISIÓN 

Ser un club de primera división modelo, que fomente el desarrollo de la cultura deportiva, ética e intelectual de socios/as, hinchas y quienes trabajan en la institución; brindando la infraestructura y los recursos necesarios para la práctica social y deportiva.

Name: Slimmer Presteren Podcast
Description:
In de wekelijkse Slimmer Presteren podcast nemen middle-aged-man-in-lycra Gerrit Heijkoop, wetenschapsjournalist Jurgen van Teeffelen en sportarts Guido Vroemen nieuwe ontwikkelingen in de sportwereld onder de loep. 

Hun doel? Jou beter laten presteren, met de juiste kennis!

Iedere vrijdagochtend verschijnt een nieuwe aflevering waarin steeds een ander onderwerp wordt belicht. En hoewel de Slimmer Presteren Podcast regelmatig de ‘best beluisterde hardlooppodcast van Nederland en België’ is, gaat het over veel meer sporten dan alleen hardlopen. Gerrit en Jurgen doen zelf aan triathlon (= zwemmen, wielrennen, hardlopen) en mountainbiken, maar het gaat ook over fitness, voetbal, en onderwerpen die nuttig zijn voor allerlei sporten in het algemeen.

De onderwerpen worden bekeken enerzijds vanuit het perspectief van de topsport als dé ultieme broedplaats voor vernieuwingen. Anderzijds gaat de Slimmer Presteren Podcast altijd op zoek naar het antwoord op de vraag: ‘wat kan een amateursporter hiermee?’

Naast de wekelijkse podcast, publiceert de Slimmer Presteren Podcast een wekelijkse nieuwsbrief. Ook zijn we betrokken bij de organisatie van live evenementen, zoals het Slimmer Presteren Podcast Café, de Uilentoren Loop en de Heuvelrug Triathlon.

Je kan de Slimmer Presteren Podcast, oftewel Gerrit en Jurgen, ook boeken als spreker en/of presentator voor jouw volgende evenement, congres of inspiratiesessie. Met een interactieve lezing of workshop over diverse onderwerpen op het gebied van gezonde leefstijl, innovatie & wetenschap of de psychologie achter presteren.
