Name: Türkiye Herkes İçin Spor Federasyonu
Description:
“Herkes İçin Spor” düşüncesine 1923 ve 1937 senelerinde yapmış olduğu konuşmalarında değinen Atatürk, Türk spor hareketini yönetenlerin ve spor bilincini yükseltmeye çalışanların her yaştaki Türk için beden eğitimini sağlaması gerekliliğinden söz etmiştir. Bu düşünce, günümüzün “Herkes İçin Spor” anlayışının çok önceleri Atatürk tarafından ifade edilmiş olduğunu göstermektedir. 

Fiziksel egzersizlerin yaşam kalitesi, sağlığın korunması ve geliştirilmesi açısından oluşturduğu değer tüm dünyada kabul edilen bir gerçektir. Birçok ülkede olduğu gibi Avrupa Konseyi’ne üye ülkelerde de spora katılımı teşvik etmek üzere 1960’lı yıllardan beri yoğun bir çalışma sürdürülmektedir. Bu çalışma, her yaştan ve her kesimden bireyleri yaş, cinsiyet, ırk, sosyal yapı ve becerileri ne olursa olsun serbest zamanlarında bir tür bedensel etkinlik yapmayı motive etmeyi amaçlamaktadır. 1982 Anayasasının 59’uncu maddesinde “Devlet, her yaştaki Türk vatandaşlarının beden ve ruh sağlığını geliştirecek tedbirleri alır. Sporun kitlelere yayılmasını teşvik eder.” denmektedir. 

Yıllar boyu gerek bazı federasyonların gerekse de bazı gönüllü kuruluşların çalışmaları şeklinde organize edilen Herkes İçin Spor faaliyetlerinin kurumsallaştırılması gereği 8-11 Mayıs 1990 tarihinde yapılan Spor Şurası’nda tekrarlanmış ve 12 Haziran 1990 tarihinde ülkemizde Herkes İçin Spor Federasyonu resmen kurulmuştur.

Name: Coach'fit
Description:
Depuis 2011, Coach’fit accompagne les dirigeants, particuliers et entreprises de Bretagne et des Pays de la Loire dans l’amélioration de leur santé et bien-être grâce au sport et à la prévention.

 Coaching sportif à domicile :
Optimisez votre temps avec des séances sur-mesure directement chez vous ! Pratiquez dans un environnement de confiance, avec un coach dédié, et profitez d’une méthode sport & santé adaptée à vos objectifs : condition physique, soulagement des douleurs (dos, cervicales), perte de poids, préparation physique… Nos programmes s’appuient sur un bilan forme unique en Bretagne, pour une approche personnalisée et efficace.
 Bonus fiscalité : ce service est défiscalisable à hauteur de 50 % !

 Sport & Prévention en entreprise :
Aujourd’hui, l’activité physique en entreprise est bien plus qu’un simple avantage : c’est un véritable levier de performance et de bien-être pour vos équipes. Coach'fit vous accompagne avec :
 Réveil musculaire sur le lieu de travail, une routine simple et efficace pour réduire les TMS et l’absentéisme.
 Séances adaptées aux métiers : exercices ciblés pour les équipes terrain et bureaux.
 Formations sport, santé et prévention.
 Ateliers de prévention (gestes et postures, ergonomie).

Name: Somerset Activity and Sports Partnership
Description:
Somerset Activity and Sports Partnership (SASP) is dedicated to increasing the health and happiness of residents in Somerset through physical activity and sport.

SASP is a charitable trust and a member of the nation-wide network of 43 Active Partnership's, sharing a mission of transforming lives through sport and physical activity. Each Active Partnership is independent, governed by a Board of Trustees and funded through Sport England, and grant giving bodies, companies and individuals whom share their mission.

Our Values: Passionate, Inclusive, Dedicated, Inspiring, Connected

Passionate: We are passionate about the power of physical activity and sport to build communities and a sense of belonging to improve the quality of people's lives in Somerset.

Inclusive: We value differences, learn from experiences and welcome varying perspectives to deliver safe, meaningful and real opportunities in physical activity and sport for the people of Somerset.

Dedicated: We are dedicated to connecting Somerset residents to opportunities to be active in ways that feel good to them, offering the best chance to sustain their involvement in and enjoyment of moving.

Inspiring: We lead from within, uplifting communities and individuals to integrate physical activity into their work as an essential part of everyday life.

Connected: We believe that we do things best together, building togetherness and respect and encouraging mutual support within our work.

Our vision is to...

"Achieve healthier and happier communities in Somerset through physical activity and sport"

We inspire and enable positive life choices through sport and physical activity and we do this by:

Providing accessible opportunities locally for all ages and abilities, prioritising those who are least active.
Addressing inequalities and removing barriers to physical activity and sport.
Supporting clubs, communities, schools and the workforce to embrace physical activity.
Bringing together organisations and partner

Name: Crowborough Tennis and Squash Club Ltd
Description:
Crowborough Tennis and Squash Club started life in 1905 as one of the leading small rackets clubs in Sussex. Now a flourishing club offering tennis, padel, swuash, racketball, pickleball and table tennis.

The Club is thriving today promoting sport and activities for the whole family. The club is committed to providing great facilities for the local community and surround area. As well as tennis, squash and racketball we have a number of partners who provide a great range of health and fitness pursuits including Jo Christie's Dance School, Beauty Culture offering holistic beauty therapies, Realignment Osteopathy, Pilates and Tai Chi. 

We welcome players of all ages and abilities and we really do have something for everyone. The club has growing tennis, squash and racketball sections, playing both socially and competitively in the Sussex and Weald Leagues. 
 
Our Squash 1st Team are reigning Sussex Premier Divisions Champions and we have over 20 teams tennis across all sports catering for men, women, mixed and juniors. 

Our tennis coaching is provided by CTA Sussex (Crowborough Tennis Academy) and we have a Squash and Racketball coaching team offering extensive coaching options for all.

The club also boasts a  fully stocked bar and comfortable lounge. A growing social calendar with a host of exciting events is available to both members and non members alike. 

The club is open to the public 7 days a week for 'Pay and Play' tennis, squash and racketball. We also have a variety of Room Hire options available within the Club.

As a non profit club, to help us to deliver the best facilities and promote sport throughout the local community we are always on the look out for sponsors and supporters.

WGD is the fastest-growing female golf development initiative. WGD is now a weeklong celebration May 27 to June 3, 2025. WGD has created an incredible global community and has the support of the major golfing governing bodies and organization. In 2024 Women's Golf Day had 406 million impressions on social media.  To learn more about WGD and its weeklong celebration  visit www.womensgolfday.com @womensgolfday, #WomensGolfDay #WGDunites

Name: PlayerWallet, Inc.
Description:
PlayerWallet operates on a Hybrid Business Model, combining elements of Software as a Service (SaaS) with a Direct Service approach.

At the heart of our software component is our PlayerScore algorithm. This tool is designed to collect and analyze data, providing student-athletes with a comprehensive, multi-faceted evaluation of their performance. This evaluation spans across academics, athletics, and extracurricular activities, offering a holistic view of their current standing.

On the direct service side of our model, we're offering After Action Reports at prospect camps. These reports provide aspiring student-athletes with detailed insights into their performance, serving as a critical tool for improvement and growth. In essence, we're acting as a bridge, connecting hardware with comprehensive performance evaluation.

Launched at the Founder Institute.

Name: Jonge Beweeghelden
Description: Jonge Beweeghelden is een speciaal ontwikkelde methode voor kinderopvangorganisaties en thuis. Met deze methode is het voor opvoedprofessionals mogelijk om kinderen van 0 tot 12 jaar een compleet beweegprogramma aan te bieden. Het is de basis voor goed leren bewegen. De methode is zeer gebruiksvriendelijk. Met duidelijke leerlijnen, vaste structuren, volledig uitgewerkte lessen en begeleidende filmpjes verandert iedereen in een Jonge Beweegheld!

Name: Modern Swim Academy
Description:
MODERN SWIM – Dubai’s Premier Swimming Academy

At MODERN SWIM, we believe swimming is more than just a sport—it's a life skill that builds confidence, fitness, and fun! With state-of-the-art facilities and experienced, certified coaches, we offer tailored swimming programs for children of all ages and skill levels. Whether your child is a beginner or an advanced swimmer, we are dedicated to helping them thrive in the water.

Our services include:

 Professional swimming lessons
 Basketball training programs
 Water safety and survival techniques
 Fun, engaging activities that boost fitness and teamwork
Located across multiple air-conditioned venues in Dubai, we create an enjoyable, safe environment where every student can learn at their own pace. Join us and dive into a world of growth, excitement, and success!

Visit www.msa4fun.com to learn more or connect with us to discuss how we can help your child make a splash!

#SwimmingAcademy #ModernSwim #DubaiSports #LearnToSwim #ChildrensFitness

Name: Sportievak vzw
Description:
Sportievak vzw ontstond eind jaren ’80 en werd van bij het begin door Sport Vlaanderen als sportfederatie erkend. 
Wij organiseren sportkampen, sportdagen en sportieve activiteiten voor kinderen, jongeren en volwassenen. Aangesloten sportclubs genieten optimale voorwaarden bij aansluiting (o.a. een heel degelijke sportverzekering met talrijke opties) en kunnen voor tal van administratieve en logistieke zaken een beroep doen op de clubbegeleiders.

In de missie van de federatie blijft de recreatieve sportbeoefening centraal staan, net als het streven naar kwaliteit en professionalisme.
Het blijft onze ultieme ambitie en beleidsuitdaging om iedereen, met name alle Vlamingen actief te laten sporten en het netwerk van Vlaamse recreatieve sportclubs te laten groeien. We richten ons hiervoor op alle leeftijden.
Onder het motto “meer en beter” moet ook de kwaliteitsbewaking en de laagdrempeligheid er blijvend toe bijdragen dat het aanbod en het aantal bereikte sporters kan blijven groeien.
De nodige promotionele inspanningen en acties brengen de deelnemers in contact met diverse sporten en zetten hen aan tot regelmatige sportbeoefening, liefst in één van onze aangesloten clubs. Bij alle doelgroepen en bij alle acties staat de recreatieve sportbeoefening centraal en wordt het verband tussen sport en gezondheid steeds geaccentueerd.

Name: The Alpine Club of Canada
Description: The Alpine Club of Canada (ACC) is an amateur athletic association with its national office in Canmore, Alberta that has been a focal point for Canadian mountaineering since its founding in 1906. The club was co-founded by Arthur Oliver Wheeler, who served as its first president, and Elizabeth Parker, a journalist for the Manitoba Free Press. Byron Harmon, whose 6500+ photographs of the Canadian Rockies in the early 20th century provide the best glimpse of the area at that time, was official photographer to the club at its founding.[1] The club is the leading organization in Canada devoted to climbing, mountain culture, and issues related to alpine pursuits and ecology. It is also the Canadian regulatory organization for climbing competition, sanctioning local, regional and national events, and assembling, coaching and supporting the national team.

Name: Sportservice Apeldoorn
Description: Sportservice is een lokaal opererend team van energieke en dynamische sport- en beweegprofessionals. Wij vervullen in de gemeente Apeldoorn een maatschappelijke rol door het stimuleren, voorlichten, organiseren en onder de aandacht brengen van sport, bewegen in de brede zin van het woord. Alles hierbij is gericht op een actieve leefstijl.

Name: Suomen Urheilijat ry
Description: Edustamme urheilijoita yli lajirajojen. Jäsenyhdistyksemme: Suomen Jääkiekkoilijat ry, Jalkapallon Pelaajayhdistys ry, Joukkueurheilijat ry ja Yleisurheilijat ry.

Name: Ian Coley Sporting Ltd.
Description:
We are proud to be one of the leading shooting grounds and schools in the UK. As recent winner of "Ground of the Year" and "Course Setter of the Year" at the 2025 CPSA Awards, we welcome shooters of all experience levels to join us in the heart of the Cotswolds. Our school is the perfect place to learn how to shoot under the guidance of our friendly and experienced coaches. Beginners are very welcome to come and ‘Have-A-Go’ – you’ll soon discover how fun and addictive the sport is! Our shooting ground also has plenty to offer experienced shots and is available for ‘Pay & Play’ practice to licence holders, with self-timer traps for individual practice. Or, brush up on specific shooting skills with some expert tuition from our fully qualified coaches.

As one of the first clay shooting establishments in the UK to offer Corporate Clay Shoot Days, we have since built up over 40 years’ experience in hosting shooting events for companies large and small. A corporate clay shoot is a fantastic way to build relationships with clients or reward hard working teams. Just the right mix of fun and competition, and accessible to all, regardless of whether they have shot before or not. 

We are home to one of the largest selections of new and used shotguns in the UK, with over 1000 guns in stock. Selection of rifles, air rifles and airguns - plus a large range of cartridges, ammunition, shooting accessories and country clothing.  Our knowledgeable staff are on hand to give advice to both novice and experienced shots.

Our sporting agency offers bespoke shooting opportunities on some of the UK’s most famous Estates, as well as further afield in Spain and Argentina. With over 40 years of experience in the game shooting field, we offer the very best sport and hospitality available. Take on the ultimate challenge of driven grouse; high pheasants or partridges on a full-team day - or join our friendly Roving Syndicate as an individual gun.

Name: International Association of Pickleball and Padel Facilities
Description: The IAPPF is the first and only professional trade and advocacy organization dedicated to the success of pickleball and padel facilities, suppliers and the worldwide.  Led by veteran industry pros, IAPPF brings deep, actionable content, counsel and community to drive business success for all stakeholders across the industry, and to foster the continued growth and enjoyment of the sports across the globe.

Name: Asia Adventure Sport
Description:
We support schools so that they can offer their students a wide variety of after school sports clubs and exciting outdoor education experiences. Currently we operate in Hong Kong, and look to expand around Asia in the coming years. All our after school clubs and outdoor education programmes are tailored to each individual school’s needs and run by expert, experienced instructors. 

We’re passionate about helping children to develop life-long positive attitudes to sport, physical activity and healthy living as well as a sense of curiosity and adventure! Our approach is to make our programmes fun and accessible to each individual child and cater to all abilities. We do this by creating a positive and supportive environment so that every child can find sports and adventure activities an enriching experience. 

If you’d like to know more about how we could design an after school programme for your school, or create a tailored outdoor adventure camp programme for your students, drop us an email at hello@asiaadventuresport.com to get started.

We also run regular outdoor adventure holiday camps around Hong Kong, which can be booked on our website. Follow us to stay updated on when holiday camp bookings open and to learn more about our other programmes!

Name: Singapore Disability Sports Council (SDSC)
Description: The SDSC is the national sports body for Persons with Disabilities (PwD), founded in 1973. It aims to transform the lives of PwD through sport as a form of rehabilitative therapy, and means to realise their potential. Besides providing platforms for learning sport, SDSC trains talents to represent Singapore at regional and international competitions. Our success stories include Aloysius Gan, World Boccia Youth Champion, and Yip Pin Xiu, 5-time Paralympic gold medalist. Find out more about us at www.sdsc.org.sg.

Name: Fast Tennis
Description:
A Fast Tennis é uma academia de tênis inovadora em sua abordagem. Somos os criadores do conceito "Fun & Flex", que combina aprendizado divertido com a conveniência de horários flexíveis, tornando o tênis acessível e mais atraente para todos.

Movidos pelo propósito de fazer a diferença na vida das pessoas, buscamos promover saúde, bem-estar e diversão através do tênis. Nossa visão é audaciosa: até 2028, vamos ser a maior rede de academias de tênis do mundo, com mais de 300 unidades no Brasil e América Latina.

Name: Matt Hackenberg Basketball
Description:
I am a basketball coach and content creator, with more than 12 years of experience leading young men through the game of basketball. 

I specialize in creating content about high school basketball concepts and schemes, and I share my insights and tips on various social media platforms, such as X, Facebook, Instagram, and YouTube. 

My basketball store has detailed and technical guides for basketball coaches to learn specific basketball schemes.

I have a bachelor's degree in history from Kentucky Christian University, and I enjoy learning and teaching about the schemes and strategies of the game of basketball.

Name: Sportbedrijven Nederland
Description:
Sportbedrijven Nederland is een vereniging van en voor ambitieuze en maatschappelijk geëngageerde sportbedrijven, die hun krachten bundelen om heel Nederland in beweging te brengen.

We versterken de bedrijfstak door samenwerking, belangenbehartiging, kennisdeling en het uitdragen van onze gezamenlijke ambitie namelijk:

Als uitvoerende sportbedrijven van voornamelijk (lokale) overheden brengen wij mensen door middel van sport in beweging. Hierbij besteden wij veel aandacht aan de sociale- en gezondheidsaspecten. Uitgangspunt is dat iedereen kan meedoen en zich gerespecteerd en gewaardeerd voelt. Inclusiviteit en duurzaam sporten en bewegen staan hierbij centraal.

De vereniging ondersteunt de sportbedrijven en behartigt hun belangen. Hierbij werken we veel samen met de Rijksoverheid, gemeenten en gelieerde (landelijke) sportorganisaties en instellingen. Zo bouwen we samen aan een gezonder en vitaler Nederland.

Name: CFA SPORT ANIMATION OCCITANIE
Description:
Un réseau d'une quarantaine d'organismes de formation et de nombreux partenaires institutionnels, 
Plus de 200 formations en apprentissage aux métiers du sport, de l’animation, du tourisme et du tertiaire appliqués à ces domaines,
Des diplômes et des titres professionnels (de niveau Bac à Bac +3),
Une présence dans toute l’Occitanie et ce, depuis plus de 15 ans.

Créé en 2008 sous l’impulsion du conseil régional, le CFA participe à l’insertion professionnelle durable des jeunes ainsi qu’au développement économique des territoires. 

En tant que « CFA Régional Hors les murs », il contribue activement : 
-	Au développement de l’apprentissage,
-	Aux objectifs éducatifs de la nation,
-	À la professionnalisation des secteurs du sport, de l’animation et du tourisme.

Gage de sa démarche « qualité » et de sa dynamique d’amélioration continue », le CFA est labellisé QUALIOPI et CERTIF’REGION. 

Il est aujourd’hui animé par une équipe jeune et dynamique de plus de 18 salariés autour d’une gouvernance d’expérience.

We facilitate Cultural Change through Barrett Values Centre tools, NLP Certifications & Training in Classic and New Code and Coaching Certifications, focused on personal and corporate excellency.

From ice skating, skiing and snowboarding to karting, laser gaming and climbing. All this under one roof, at De Uithof in The Hague.

Name: Akanksha Singh Basketball Academy
Description:
Founded by former Indian captain and basketball icon Akanksha Singh, Akanksha Singh Basketball (ASB) is a premier training academy offering world-class coaching, an indoor mini court with adjustable rims, and a full-size outdoor court. ASB operates out of two locations in Bangalore: the Padukone-Dravid Center for Sports Excellence in Betahalasuru and the University Sports Block in Gandhi Nagar. 

The 360-degree athlete development includes strength training, hydrotherapy, sports psychology, quality residential facilities, nutritious meals, medical aid, and study halls. Supporting both outstation and local athletes, our structured programs cater to boys and girls aged 6 to adults up to 60, welcoming all levels and age groups.

Name: Paddle for Future | Mangrove Bay Eco Camp
Description:
India's suburbs blessed with numerous lakes and ponds, wetlands but with rapid urbanization and poor waste management, changing lifestyle these water bodies are declining and getting reduced into garbage dump yards. These water body ecosystems are very critical for remaining flora, fauna and aquifer recharge, water supply.

Paddle for Future program strives to conserve these water bodies through research, education and sports.

With a team of Environmentalists, Fitness experts, Engineers, Geologists, Herpetologists and Zoologists, Paddle for Future program fights to conserve our water bodies for our future generations by inspiring a personal connection to the environment and help develop the actions to sustain it.

Name: Yorkshire Cricket Board
Description:
One of our key goals is to promote the game of cricket at all levels across the County, working in partnership with other appropriate agencies and organisations, including schools and local cricket clubs, to increase participation and growth in the game.

There are over 700 cricket clubs affiliated to the YCB, with in excess of 1450 senior recreational teams across Yorkshire playing cricket every weekend. We work closely with our cricket partners of Yorkshire County Cricket Club and the Yorkshire Cricket Foundation to promote all forms of cricket within Yorkshire, whilst embedding our passion and knowledge in the sport to inspire generations of cricket players into the future.

Name: Skirama Kronplatz | Plan de Corones
Description:
Der berühmte Berg im Pustertal gilt im Winter als der Skiberg Nr. 1 in Südtirol und im Sommer als beliebtes Ausflugsziel für Familien, Wanderer, Biker, Genießer und Kultur-Begeisterte.
Ein Skitag am Kronplatz in den Dolomiten bringt wirklich alles mit sich, was den perfekten Tag auf der Piste ausmacht. Der sanft abfallende Berg zwischen Bruneck, St. Vigil und Olang gilt mit seinen breiten, fast baumlosen Hängen, 121 km Pisten und 31 modernsten Aufstiegsanlagen zu den Top-Wintersportdestinationen in den Dolomiten.

Name: SAIL Team - imprezy integracyjne i eventy na wodzie

Name: Level Up Gyms
Description:
Level Up is Dubai’s newest recreational community sports centre for children and adults. A brand-new state-of-the-art centre running over 40,000 square feet, we offer a full range of programs for children and adults including Gymnastics, Padel Tennis, Martial Arts and Wellness.

Our Gymnastics centre is the first in Dubai that teaches all four different FIG disciplines of gymnastics: Artistic, Rhythmic, Trampoline and Parkour. We are here and we’re committed to enriching the potential of young gymnasts as they focus on their form, strength, flexibility and development.

Our Padel Tennis, Martial Arts and Wellness centres are open to children and adults looking to develop their skills or learn something new.

We take pride in our team of highly qualified and internationally accredited coaches who were carefully selected to guide, inspire, and train their students on their extraordinary journey.

Our Forte lies in managing various aspects related to the sports ecosystem, comprising athletes, teams, leagues, and organizations.
We are committed towards offering personalized partnerships with athletes, acting as consultants to take care of each & every aspect related to their life, offering them tailored services, as they would require.
We are also committed towards creating meaningful content, building scalable IPs, showcasing experiential live events, and leveraging merchandising & licensing to unlock the full potential of our brand assets.

Our Mission is to be a global Sports brand, extending the reach & impact of our athletes globally and being a trendsetter in whatever content that we create.

Nuestro equipo de profesionales altamente cualificados te acompaña en cada paso del proceso, ofreciendo formación especializada y personalizada para todas las categorías: Coordinadores y Gestores Deportivos, Monitores y Técnicos Deportivos, y Auxiliares Deportivos.
Contamos con temarios completos y actualizados, clases teóricas y prácticas, simulacros de examen y tutorías personalizadas, diseñadas para maximizar tus posibilidades de éxito. Con nuestra experiencia, metodología y compromiso, hacemos que alcanzar tu plaza y desarrollar tu carrera profesional en el deporte sea un objetivo realizable y seguro.

Name: elitefeats
Description:
For Event Organizers: elitefeats is the company for a streamlined one-stop-shop for timing, registration, sponsor support, social media support, finisher photos, marketing, professional advice, bibs, race gear and event production.

There is no event too large or small -- let's connect and see how we can help create a community at your next race.

For Brands: sponsorship with elitefeats events show consumers brands share their community values. Lets connect and see if our audience is a good fit for your priorities.

Each year more people cross an elitefeats finish line than NYC, Boston and Chicago Marathons combined.

We work with road races, NCAA Championships, track meets, multi sport events, National Championships + more. 

We're passionate about creating community and connecting that community with nonprofit races and the brands that support them.

Esports 050 streeft ernaar om de positieve impact van esports, gaming en gamification te benutten en te vergroten. Om deze reden hebben wij unieke en uitdagende activiteiten ontwikkeld om het huidige beweegaanbod te vernieuwen. Dit aanbod sluit perfect aan bij de huidige belevingswereld van verschillende doelgroepen, kijkend naar de ontwikkelingen op het gebied van technologie.

Name: Little Kickers Northern Ontario
Description:
Find a soccer class to match your child's age and in your local area. There are no specific start and end dates, just sign up online and join in! 

What is Little Kickers?

‘’Little Kickers is an educational soccer programme for children aged 1.5yrs-7yrs. Our programme is designed to help children learn fundamental skills through games and play. We know that children best learn through play and repetition and our programme supports this. In our classes we use imaginative themes in each session, which gets children fully immersed into the class. A child that is engaged in what they are doing is a child that is learning and developing. Our classes are built upon early learning goals for children and we aim to focus on 5 main areas of learning: Communication and language, physical development, personal / social /emotional development, basic mathematics and expressive / imaginative play. Within these learning brackets we hone in on smaller learning outcomes such as listening and attention skills, ABC movement skills (agility, balance & coordination), physical skills, such as running and jumping, social skills, like sharing, shapes, colours and numbers and much more. All of this is taught in a pressure-free, fun and safe environment.

Soccer and a Healthy Lifestyle

‘’What’s great about Little Kickers is that not only is there a huge amount of learning going on, children are engaging in physical exercise. Child obesity is on the up  and along with modern technology, it is more important than ever to get children engaged in a structured sports programme. By helping children to love sports at such a young age, it is more likely that children will then grow up to continue to play and engage in sports as adults and lead healthy lifestyles.

We’re now the world’s biggest and most successful pre-school soccer academy and there’s plenty more to come. We’re constantly enhancing our classes with the help of our experts

Name: Melda Akseki
Description:
Merhaba, ben Melda,

Sertifikalı bir Pilates eğitmeni ve beden farkındalığı yolculuğunda size eşlik etmekten büyük mutluluk duyan bir rehberim.

Hareketin beden ve zihin üzerindeki dönüştürücü gücüne olan inancım, beni yıllar önce Pilates ile tanıştırdı. O günden bu yana, hem klasik hem modern Pilates tekniklerinde uzmanlaştım ve bu bilgileri farklı ihtiyaçlara sahip bireylerle paylaşarak onların daha sağlıklı, dengeli ve güçlü bir yaşama adım atmalarına yardımcı oluyorum.

Eğitimlerimde odak noktam, sadece fiziksel güçlenme değil; aynı zamanda nefes, postür, esneklik ve zihinsel odaklanmadır. Her seansı katılımcının bedenine ve seviyesine göre kişiselleştirerek güvenli, etkili ve motive edici bir ortam yaratmayı amaçlıyorum.

İster yeni başlıyor olun, ister ileri seviyede bir pratiğiniz olsun — birlikte hedeflerinize ulaşmak, bedensel farkındalığınızı artırmak ve günlük yaşam kalitenizi yükseltmek için buradayım.

Sağlıkla ve sevgiyle,
Melda Akseki

Description:
Climbat es referente en el mundo de la escalada como operador de rocódromos orientados a públicos de todos los niveles, desde iniciación en la escalada deportiva, a perfeccionamiento y entrenamiento para escaladores del más alto nivel. 

Nuestras instalaciones están dotadas de zonas de boulder, muros de cuerda, espacios de auto-aseguradores “TruBlue”, escalada lúdica Clip ‘N Climb e incluso circuitos de aventura en altura o zonas Ninja. 

Ofrecemos un amplio abanico de servicios dirigidos a escaladores y escaladoras de todos los niveles y edades con el fin de promover la autosuperación, la cooperación y la pasión por la escalada:  cursos de iniciación, clases personalizadas, grupos de escalada y opens no competitivos, cumpleaños, campamentos y eventos para grupos y empresas. 

En Climbat creemos firmemente que la escalada no es solo uno de los deportes más completos, sino que además es una actividad que fomenta la autoestima, la cooperación, el respeto, la socialización y el sentimiento de pertenencia a una comunidad que cada vez gana más adeptos.

La empresa, en plena expansión, forma parte del Groupe ABEO y atesora la experiencia de un líder mundial en la fabricación de rocódromos como Entre-Prises, responsable de la instalación de los muros de escalada en las próximas Olimpiadas de Tokio.

La compañía cuenta con 6 centros en España; Barcelona, Madrid, Zaragoza, Avilés, Barakaldo y Murcia y dos en Francia, París y Treville.

Description:
La Ligue Bourgogne-Franche-Comté de Football (LBFC) a pour mission d’organiser, développer, animer et réguler l’enseignement et la pratique du football sur l’ensemble du territoire régional. Elle gère notamment les compétitions amateurs (National 3, Régional 1 à 3, tours régionaux de Coupe de France), les championnats régionaux jeunes et féminins, la formation des éducateurs, arbitres & dirigeants, l’arbitrage, le développement des autres pratiques : Futsal, Golf foot, Beach-Soccer ou le eFoot.
La LBFC est une association qui dépend de la Fédération Française de Football (FFF) et de la Ligue du Football Amateur (LFA). Elle est issue de la fusion entre la Ligue de Bourgogne et la Ligue Franche-Comté, actée en septembre 2016, et compte 7 Districts formant le socle départemental du territoire : Côte-d’Or, Doubs/Territoire de Belfort (DTB), Haute-Saône, Jura, Nièvre, Saône-et-Loire et Yonne.

Name: Australian Open
Description:
The 2023 Australian Open is a Grand Slam tennis tournament that will take place at Melbourne Park, from 16–29 January 2023. It will be the 111th edition of the Australian Open, the 55th in the Open Era, and the first Grand Slam of the year. The tournament will consist of events for professional players in singles, doubles and mixed doubles. Junior and wheelchair players will compete in singles and doubles tournaments. As in previous years, the tournament's main sponsor is Kia.

Rafael Nadal and Ashleigh Barty are the reigning champions in Men's singles and Women's singles, respectively. Barty chose not to defend her title after she retired from the sport in March 2022.

Name: Sport for change
Description:
We believe that the sports world needs to be changed to serve the social need of society. The sport for development projects in Ethiopia should integrate approaches in response to the COVID-19 impact including the modality of Sport for development training. Projects that include health-messaging and protection aspects are particularly encouraged, and so are innovative mechanisms, including the usage of social media, introducing E-sports, and the sport for change concept. For the effective implementation of the S4D methodologies strong synergy with public-private sectors, clubs, federations, NGOs, Government organizations, international organizations, Media, and the community is vital. 
The sport for social change aims to support the country's development initiatives in combination with sustainable development goals through the power of Sport. 
The pandemic thought as a lesson that there is a high need for the sports sector to come up with adaptable solutions in response to COVID- 19 and after COVID- 19, resilience mechanisms, partnership, digital solutions, and inclusion are prior topics to tackle within the sport for change strategy.

Name: Mindbuddy
Description:
Mindbuddy helps academies turn static IDPs into daily performance habits - without adding work for coaches.

In many clubs, IDP goals live in a PDF and meetings; players don’t carry them into training or games. Mindbuddy is a player-centred platform that builds awareness, focus and consistency: before training, players pick a goal from their IDP to work on; before matches, they set a performance goal and prepare with a tailored visualization audio; afterward, they reflect on progress and improvement areas. Over time, these simple 2-minute routines create real ownership.

For coaches, Mindbuddy is a support tool that extends their reach. The dashboard shows which goals players are working on in training and games - plus their reflections over time, so 1-to-1s get sharper, and follow-ups more targeted. Keep your current IDP format; we make it live in the day-to-day.

Why clubs choose Mindbuddy
• Staff-light, fast to implement (minutes per day for players; near-zero extra for staff)
• Players takes ownership and learn to perform at their best
• Coaches get continuous insight that drives better conversations and decisions
• Pathway impact: helps more players get ready for the professional stage

Proof: Used by several top European academies. 85% of players report feeling better prepared for training and matches, and 80% of coaches say 1-to-1 conversations improve.

Name: Swimming Nature
Description:
We believe that learning to swim is a process that should be done early and done properly. When this happens, establishing a lifetime of beautiful, effortless swimming is usually merely a formality.   

Our pioneering approach has long been recognised and approved by parents, students, universities and fellow academics. We focus first on water confidence before gradually adding the integral mechanics one by one, which are then combined over time to produce assured, elegant swimming.   

Swimming Nature was established in 1993 and has since taught thousands of babies, children, and adults how to swim as nature intended us to. Today, we teach over 8,000 students every week and operate our pools out of our HQ in Bayswater, West London, where we have a dedicated team of customer service assistants. We currently employ over 100 swimming instructors across the UK, but we are growing rapidly, and new positions are often opening up. 

The training arm of our company, Swimming Nature Network, offers to train and partner with pools, health clubs and leisure centres. This has allowed us to implement our swimming programmes, whilst our principles and techniques have expanded. 

Swim naturally, with Swimming Nature.

Description:
ABOUT ME

I am FlexDerek, with coaching experience since 2009.


My passion for sports began in the 90s. At that time, I watched action movies with Arnold, such as “RAMBO” and others, and with Van Damme, like “Legionnaire” and “When there is nowhere to run” repeatedly on video cassette players.

Motivated by the heroes of these films, I spent a lot of time on a pull-up bar installed by my father in the door frame. Even back then, and still now, I really enjoy doing push-ups and other strength exercises. At the age of 9, I had calluses on my hands from the pull-up bar as if I were laying asphalt.

Then, at the age of 17, I entered Vinnitsa State Pedagogical University without exams (based on my achievements in school sports) in the Faculty of “Physical Education.” I continued to engage in weightlifting in the gym but always avoided stretching.

It happened that I met my coach in May 2009, and before that, I had never practiced stretching at all. Just five months later, in September 2009, I founded FlexDerekSchool, where I currently teach stretching and body flexibility development.

Since then, I have been training individuals with safe and effective programs like “Stretching Upon Meeting” and “Stretching Online“—personalized training sessions that I adapt to the needs and abilities of each student. This helps ensure maximum effectiveness, comfort, and safety during workouts.

Name: Fastbreak Sports
Description:
Founded in 2006 to address the absence of quality in New York City youth sports programming, Fastbreak Sports is dedicated to and specializes in fostering the fundamental skills needed for young athletes to thrive in team sports throughout their lives. Central to our mission is the belief that we coach kids and create memorable moments that elevate and support families in their lifelong journeys of personal and physical development.

At Fastbreak Sports, we are guided by our core values of heart, teamwork, spirit, integrity, respect, self-belief, accountability, and humility. These principles shape our approach to coaching and community engagement, ensuring a positive and inclusive environment for all participants. 
We offer a comprehensive range of high-end sports developmental programs for children from kindergarten through high school, featuring our state-of-the-art indoor facility on Manhattan’s Upper East Side, as well as convenient classes at various locations across the Upper East Side and Upper West Side.

Our Programs Include:
•	Comprehensive youth sports organization (training, classes, teams)
                •  Basketball, Football, Cheerleading, Soccer, Baseball
•	Themed birthday parties for all ages 
•	Developmental programs for babies and toddlers 
•	Travel and AAU teams 
•	Weekend Leagues

Over the years, we have established strategic partnerships with prominent organizations, including the New York Knicks, IMG Academies, Basketball Stars of New York, Metro United, and Point Guard College. Our goal is to continuously enhance our programming, making it synonymous with elite training in NYC. 

To date, Fastbreak Sports has successfully coached tens-of-thousands of young athletes in the fundamentals of multiple different sports instilling not only skills but also a lifelong love for sport. 

Join us as we continue to empower the next generation of athletes through quality training and community engagement.

Name: CoachMate
Description:
CoachMate is building the global learning and engagement platform for grassroots sport.

We equip teachers, parents and volunteer coaches with world-class tools from national and international governing bodies, delivered simply, for the right age and stage, exactly when they are needed.

CoachMate combines high-quality video, practical session plans and best-practice guidance with gamified micro-learning, progress tracking and personalised pathways. The result is learning that feels motivating, achievable and relevant.

Our platform uses data and emerging AI capabilities to support smarter engagement, helping governing bodies understand participation, retention and volunteer confidence, while keeping the experience simple and accessible for diverse communities.

Because when coaches feel supported and confident, kids have better experiences and stay in the game longer.

CoachMate works alongside leading sporting organisations to translate national and international frameworks into practical, on-the-ground experiences across schools, clubs and homes. The platform is scalable, inclusive and designed to remove barriers to access, while delivering meaningful insight and impact.

We are proud to partner with
Cricket Australia
Golf Australia
Golf New Zealand
Basketball New Zealand
New Zealand Football
Halberg Foundation
BMX New Zealand

With more partnerships underway.

If you are a governing body, education provider or commercial partner looking to strengthen participation, retention and impact at scale, we would love to talk.

CoachMate exists to help create positive sporting experiences that last a lifetime.

#SportForGood #EveryoneInTheGame

Name: FUCICAM (Fundación Ciclista de Castilla-La Mancha)
Description:
Bienvenid@s al perfil de FUCICAM (Fundación Ciclista de Castilla-La Mancha)! 

¿QUIÉNES somos? Una organización sin ánimo de lucro especializada en ciclismo y paraciclismo en carretera con cinco áreas de actuación: Inclusión / Mujer / Formación / Competición / Investigación. 

¿CÓMO lo hacemos? Aterrizamos los cinco objetivos anteriores en dos líneas de trabajo fundamentales:

1) La integración e inclusión social de personas con capacidades diferentes a través del ciclismo. Organizamos eventos de todo tipo relacionados con el paraciclismo (ciclismo adaptado): desde charlas motivacionales y primera toma de contacto con los distintos vehículos, hasta la organización de carreras oficiales integradas en el circuito de la Copa de España y la Copa de Europa de Paraciclismo.
2) La organización de carreras ciclistas con patrocinio público y/o privado con ocasión de algún hito o fecha señalada: fiestas patronales, aniversario, lanzamiento de producto/servicio, celebración, meeting, convivencia, etc.

¿DÓNDE lo hacemos? En todo el territorio nacional.

¿PARA QUIÉN lo hacemos? Para personas de 0 a 99 años, lo que en el argot ciclista se traduce por: de Escuelas a Máster 60. Cualquiera que sea su capacitación física.

¿A QUIÉN nos dirigimos? A empresas, organismos e instituciones públicas y privadas de toda índole que quieran patrocinar eventos ciclistas. Proporcionamos: arco de salida/meta, vallado de la zona, coche de dirección, coche neutro, coche médico, coche escoba, recorrido y trazado, señalética, permisos y documentación administrativa, seguro médico y de RC, guía técnica y reglamento, inscripciones, localizadores individuales, ambulancia/s, motos de enlace, radio-vuelta, speaker/animación, photocall de podio, filmación, cronometraje, difusión en RRSS, etc. "Llave en mano".

¿CUÁNTO cuesta? Como la casuística es amplísima, para obtener un presupuesto "ad hoc" contacta con Félix (659 905 852) o Cristina (660 659 100).

Muchas gracias, os esperamos!
(RRSS: @fucicam)

Name: Sporting Chance  Development Foundation
Description:
At Sporting Chance Development Foundation our mission is to give every child in South Africa the opportunity to participate in sports, regardless of their background. We provide uniquely tailored sports coaching and health education programmes, with a team of experienced and skilled coaches who foster an environment of encouragement, discipline and accountability.

Our impact has been significant, with over 270,000 children across South Africa benefitting from our programmes since 1990. Currently, 34,000 children are involved in our programmes annually, while creating contractual employment for over 1,000 coaches. Our programmes include Disney Healthy Happy Play, Calypso Beach Cricket, Street Netball, Street Soccer, Street Cricket, Table Cricket and regular coaching programmes in under resourced communities.

Although we have a strong presence in the Western Cape, our programmes are run nationally,  with projects in KwaZulu-Natal, the Eastern Cape, Gauteng, and Limpopo. We have the intellectual and network-building capacity to create programmes all around South Africa.

Join us in our mission to empower the youth of South Africa through sport. Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest programmes, achievements, and partnership opportunities.

We are always looking to collaborate with like-minded business people and organizations who share our vision for a healthier, active and more inclusive South Africa.

Name: CBBasketball Algeria
Description:
L’académie « C. B.B » est la première école professionnelle de formation privée en Algérie, dédiée aux jeunes spécialisés en basket-ball, fondée en 2017 par un staff technique compétent, des éducateurs, conseillers en sport ,cadre dirigeant et anciens basketteurs internationaux passionné par la balle orange,Dirigé par l’ancien joueur de l’Equipe nationale algérienne de basket-ball, Amin Benramdan.

Durant toute l’année scolaire, l’académie propose aux jeunes basketteurs et basketteuses de 04 ans à 18 ans un programme permettant d’alterner cours et entrainements.

Les jeunes basketteurs et basketteuses engagées dans leur club peuvent intégrer l’académie pour des cours de perfectionnement sur un ou deux créneaux par semaine.

L’académie « C.B.B » et son équipe pédagogique de 15 personnes accueille plus de 100 licenciés répartis entre : l’école de mini basket : baby basket, poussins, écoles garçons et filles, benjamins, benjamines, et formation des jeunes professionnelle : minimes, cadets, juniors.

L’académie « C.B.B » est ouverte dans le but de conduire ses Académiciens à la réalisation de leurs projets sportifs et professionnels. Former des basketteurs accomplis mais aussi des jeunes épanouis capables d’intégrer le monde de l’entreprise Grâce aux valeurs transmises par les éducateurs.

L’académies « C.B.B » participe régulièrement à des tournois nationaux et internationaux pendant les vacances scolaires. L’objectif est de donner une dimension internationale à l’apprentissage de nos jeunes sportifs.

With a pulse on Gen Z culture and a commitment to equity in sports, we blend elite training, mentorship, and media-forward experiences that spark confidence and build community.

Name: Nationaal Bureau Sport Stimulering
Description:
Nationaal Bureau Sport Stimulering heeft als hoofddoel het stimuleren en professionaliseren van sport in Nederland. 

Door succesbeleving te vergroten krijgen kinderen meer plezier in sport. Met het uitgangspunt dat als je goed bent in een bepaalde sport je meer plezier beleefd aan het beoefenen ervan. Dit is het doel van sportivun jeugdkampen en testen; een leuke week of dag, met aan het eind een rapport welke sport het beste bij je past.

Door een betere basis van bewegen, ofwel het verbeteren van de basiseigenschappen van bewegen voorkomt men blessures en klachten op langere termijn. Ook sportspecifiek verbeter je. Dit is het doel van sporttest; een nuttige test met een rapportage welke basiseigenschappen kunnen worden verbeterd.

NBSS levert een bijdrage aan een bewustere en professionelere manier van sportbeleving in Nederland.

Name: USA Clay Target League
Description:
The USA Clay Target League is the worldwide leader in youth clay target shooting sports programs, and a 501(c)3 non-profit organization. 

The League's priorities are safety, fun, and marksmanship – in that order.  

100% School-Approved, Everyone Can Participate!

Name: 7 Mares Mergulho
Description:
A escola 7 Mares Mergulho é reconhecida pela CBPDS (Confederação Brasileira De Pesca e Desportos Subaquáticos), oficialmente a Entidade Federal de Administração da Pesca e do Mergulho no Brasil. Nessa condição é também reconhecida pelo COB (Comitê Olímpico Brasileiro) como exclusiva representante no País da CMAS (Confederação Mundial das Atividades Subaquáticas) e da CIPS (Confederação Mundial de Pesca Desportiva). É legitimada por entidades internacionais como UNESCO e CIO (Comitê Internacional Olímpico). A atribuição exclusiva da CMAS é a direção e normalização das atividades do Mergulho e da Pesca no mundo, não existindo outra Entidade de direção mundial neste ramo de atividades desportivas reconhecidas pelo CIO.


CBPDS
A Escola 7 Mares Mergulho nasceu da ideia de um mergulhador que desde criança teve a felicidade de conhecer e conviver com as maravilhas do mundo subaquático, um ambiente de paz e harmonia.

Assim, por respeito e fascínio a este mundo surgiu a vontade de apresentá-lo a todas as pessoas.

Mergulhador desde abril de 1992 onde teve oportunidade de conviver com amigos que ao passar dos anos foram incentivando para abrir a própria escola, em 2000 já formado como instrutor teve oportunidade de trabalhar juntamente com seu primo em uma escola de mergulho onde ministrou o curso de mergulho por 4 anos.

Os anos foram passando e a idéia de abrir a própria escola amadurecendo, quando foi montado um primeiro grupo para projeto piloto.

A partir desse dia o esforço seria concentrado para a sua realização.

Foram meses de muita dedicação e determinação até a Escola de Mergulho começar a nascer.

Mas para dar início ao funcionamento da escola ela precisaria de um nome, que foi batizada de 7 Mares Mergulho.

Instrutor: Evandro Cia Pim M1 / 10 / 00018 / EFR #283350, mergulhador desde abril de 1992, formado instrutor em junho 2000.

Para ello ponemos al alcance del deportista nuestro método de trabajo que consta en tocar 7 aspectos de su vida, como la nutrición, sus capacidades físicas y deportivas, su nivel educativo y la invitación a trabajar aspectos de su intimidad, todo con personal especializado y cualificado en cada área.

Name: PLYAZ
Description:
Keeping Football Journeys Alive

Every year, thousands of players are released from football academies. Most continue training like professionals, but without funding, structure, or visibility, many fade from the game they love.

PLYAZ exists to change that.

We’re a football platform and community designed to help released and semi-professional players stay visible, get supported, and keep their dreams alive. PLYAZ extends existing club frameworks; helping clubs and player-care teams maintain contact with alumni, track welfare outcomes, and celebrate player success, without replacing trusted systems.

What we do:

Enable verified player profiles, transparent funding, and a supportive network of players, fans, and mentors.

Provide ways for players to fund their journeys, showcase their commitment, and stay connected to football.

Support clubs by ensuring their investment in player development continues—even for those outside the academy system.

PLYAZ is a partner, not a critic. We're here to keep football journeys alive, long after the final academy whistle.

MISSION STATEMENT
The National Academy of Athletics promotes positive physical and mental development through sports fundamentals. Our expertly trained coaches provide children access to specialized athletic instruction that will set them on a path for personal growth, optimism, and confidence both on and off the field. Through inspiration, motivation, and perspiration, our participants have a great time gaining new skills, all while developing lasting friendships. At all NAofA programs, we encourage campers to play with confidence, enthusiasm, and a love for the game.

OUR AMAZING STAFF
NAofA Certified coaches lead our programs to ensure each camper’s safety, skill development, and individual enjoyment. They ensure participants become healthier, skilled, and confident on and off the field.

OUR PROGRAMS
All NAofA programs are developed by Aaron Locks and are designed to provide children with a safe, fun, and educational youth sports experience. We help athletes build power and agility before the race, add an extra layer of protection against injuries, increase their peak performance and reduce recovery time to get back in the game faster and stronger.

Everyone who runs, cycles, swims or exercises regularly benefits from regular control of a expert to maintain a healthy performance level and prevent further damage in case of a preventable weakness.

Based on the level and nature of your needs our help includes:
- Measuring and evaluating body posture to identify potential problems
- Building up muscle agility and power in a balanced fashion
- Improving performance limits in a sustainable way
- Helping you recover from a race or extensive exercise

Name: Teddy Tennis HQ
Description:
Teddy Tennis curriculum based, sport education programme that inspires children aged 2½ to 5+ years to get active and learn to play tennis. It works by combining music, pictures and teddy bear characters into a totally interactive learning adventure that young children love.

Teddy Tennis is marketed worldwide as a franchise and is sold to coaches, clubs, entrepreneurs and childcare businesses. The programme is taught in nurseries and primary schools as well as at local sports & tennis clubs.

What makes Teddy Tennis special is that it’s teaching system has been developed using the Visual Auditory Kinesthetic (VAK) accelerated learning style:
- Visual Learners learn by looking
- Auditory Learners learn by listening
- Kinesthetic Learners learn best through physical activity

Applying the VAK multi-sensory learning approach to teaching young children has proved to be very effective. When they play Teddy Tennis "They see it, they hear it, they do it and they love it".

What are the Educational Benefits of Teddy Tennis?
The structured Teddy Tennis teaching system delivers amazing results far beyond that of teaching children to get active.  The key educational benefits Teddy Tennis offers include:
- Improving confidence & self-esteem
- Building essential communication skills and team work
- Enhancing co-ordination
- Laying the foundations for listening & learning
- Teaching the concept of sportsmanship and fair play
- Speeding up the learning process
- Teaching essential tennis skills
- AND Introducing English language skills

Where is Teddy Tennis Today?
As of July 2022, there are approximately 30 Teddy Tennis Franchisee operating in such diverse places as London,  Milton Keynes, The Cotswolds, New York, Beijing, Shanghai, Cape Town, Durban, Cairo and Alexandria.

info@teddysportsworld.com

Name: Padel Smash Academy
Description:
Padel Smash Academy is a pioneering initiative dedicated to promoting and growing the sport of Padel in the USA. As a comprehensive content development brand, our project is uniquely positioned to serve Padel enthusiasts, clubs, entrepreneurs, and brands, providing a dynamic platform that combines education, community engagement, and business development. 

Objectives

1. Promote Padel Awareness: Elevate the profile of Padel in the U.S. by delivering high-quality content, educational resources, and engaging programming.
2. Community Building: Foster a vibrant, supportive, and engaged Padel community, connecting players, clubs, and industry stakeholders.
3. Strategic Partnerships: Collaborate with leading brands like Padel Galis, Playtomic, and Racket Central to enhance the Padel experience and provide value to our audience.
4. Content Creation & Distribution: Produce a diverse range of content, including a daily YouTube show, to educate, entertain, and inform the Padel community.

Key Components

- Content Development: Create a rich portfolio of content, ranging from instructional videos and match analyses to interviews with Padel professionals and industry news.
- Digital Platform: Utilize a robust digital platform to distribute content, interact with the community, and offer an immersive Padel experience online.
- Business Development: Leverage strategic partnerships and business development efforts to grow the sport, support Padel-related businesses, and ensure the sustainability of the academy.

Impact

PSA is at the forefront of the Padel movement in the United States. Through our comprehensive approach, we strive to not only introduce and popularize the sport but also to cultivate a thriving ecosystem that supports players, businesses, and the broader Padel community. Our commitment to quality content, community engagement, and strategic growth initiatives positions PSA as a catalyst for the sport's expansion and a beacon for Padel enthusiasts nationwide.

Name: The Loppet Foundation
Description:
The Loppet Foundation is a non-profit organization that connects people to the outdoors through experiences that grow community.

In partnership with the Minneapolis Park and Recreation Board (MPRB), the Loppet operates the Twin Cities' most well known cross-country ski trails, in addition to hiking/running trails, mountain bike/fat-tire bike trails, a snow tubing hill, an alpine hill, paddling and nature-based programming in partnership with Eloise Butler Wildflower garden, plus summer adventure camps for youth, all based out of The Trailhead in Theodore Wirth Park.

The Loppet is widely known for organizing large-scale sporting events which have shaped cross-country skiing in the United States and beyond. The 2018 Masters Cross Country Ski World Cup, 2011 and 2021 U.S. Junior Cross Country Ski Championships, 2020 FIS Cross Country World Cup, U.S. SuperTour races, 2019 and 2020 USA Winter Triathlon National Championships, 2018 Super Bowl Live and most recently the 2024 FIS Loppet Cup, which drew 25,000 spectators daily to watch some of the best nordic skiers in the world in Minneapolis’ unique urban park. The Foundation also organizes 50+ Loppet events each year, including the City of Lakes Loppet Winter Festival and our annual fundraiser, the Luminary Loppet, which attracts over 15,000 participants annually.

Focused programming in Adventure Camps, Minne-Loppet, and Junior Loppet programs have helped thousands of youth in North Minneapolis schools learn life-long outdoor skills, gain confidence in their abilities, and find healing in nature. The Loppet Run Club, Loppet Ski Club and BIPOC bike clubs provide adults with the opportunity to gain group recreational experience, while Loppet TRAIL KIDS is a stepping stone for children ages 7-13 into other more competitive programs. The year-round nationally-recognized competitive training programs for junior and adult racers through Loppet Nordic Racing and Loppet Cycle Works.

Name: European Squash Federation
Description: The overall aim of the European Squash Federation (ESF) Is to promote the growth of squash across Europe. ESF is responsible for creating and upholding the regulations for European tournaments, as well as for upholding and enforcing the regulations of squash. ESF arrange various European Championships for teams and individual players, across all age groups, and also organise the European Junior Circuit – a series of over 30 events across Europe for young squash players up to 18 years old as well as the European Masters Circuit – a series of 17 events across Europe for players over 35 years old. 46 countries and territories across Europe have joined ESF which means that their players and clubs are able to enter ESF tournaments and participate in ESF coaching and refereeing courses. These central courses are run by experienced professionals to help develop the skills and expertise of local coaches and referees all around Europe. ESF is one of five regional federations that work closely with the World Squash Federation who set the standards for all the technical aspects of squash and co-ordinate the global squash calendar.

Our services are offered in new and luxurious ways that attract people from all walks of life, age groups, and genders. Bermuda diving center is located at al wasl road in Dubai. The dive center and all stuff are registered under PADI. we have special classrooms using high-end technologies and multimedia devices for theory sessions. Along the classrooms, we have a deep inhouse swimming pool for course skills and practices.

Our dive center presents a wide range of scuba diving and free dive equipments for basic and advanced level divers. The in-house maintenance team is highly trained to fix and repair equipment. Our Compressor refilling system is one of the most advance, safe and fast systems in Dubai, being able to refill 30 tanks in 15 minutes. We welcome our visitors to join and enjoy our scuba diving services.

Services - Try Scuba diving, PADI courses, PADI specialty courses, equipment maintenance, equipment rental, dive trips, commercial diving

Description:
Adiss Sports Academy intends to develop and empower Athletes from all class of life but mostly the vulnerable and underprivileged in Cape Town and surrounding. Upon identifying these Athletes the Academy sources for funding for the Development and upkeep of the identified Athletes as well as their Education. 
In the long run we would look for a House to accommodate the athletes, a school hostel and a local School which will enroll the athletes with a prospect of home schooling if possible. But for a start we would work with athletes coming from their respective homes. 
It is in our mandate that we ensure that the Child Protection rights of the young athletes particularly the girl athlete are taken great care of, hence the appointment of a mature female to the post of Academy assistant Director Administration would be a must.
Finally our focus will not only be centered on their training but on their development too and sustained life for the Athletes in our Academy. 
Our aim is to have players for all levels from junior to senior teams.

Name: Padel Tennis Ireland Ltd
Description: We are Ireland's largest indoor facility dedicated solely to Padel, located at Fota Junction, Co. Cork. Our state of the art Padel facility is home to 4 Panoramic Padel courts. We aim to be Ireland's most inclusive sporting brand and our facility is fully wheelchair accessible. We have 6 showers (3 female & 3 male) and 2 WC toilet facilities. Download our free booking App on the Apple App Store or Google Play Store by searching "Padel Tennis Ireland". Our facility offers casual play, private lessons, group lessons for both kids and ages or all sporting abilities. We also offer a Padel specific fitness class which is a high calorie burning workout. We have a wide range of programs to offer corporates ranging from group lessons to half/full day team building events. Please get in touch if you would like to book a Padel filled fun team building event for your staff.

Name: TackleLondon
Description:
Tackle London is dedicated to creating positive change for young people in London. We do this by addressing Adverse Childhood/Community
Experiences (ACEs) through sports mentoring.

Our mission is to empower young Londoners, in communities affected by increased levels of poverty, neglect and social disadvantage. We aim to
provide them with the support and opportunities needed to overcome challenges, enabling them to achieve their full potential.

We achieve this by working with schools and local grassroots rugby clubs to create an unbroken pathway of regular and ongoing mentoring with reliable, trusted adults.

Our coaches go directly into schools to deliver comprehensive educational support. In addition to rugby sessions, our initiatives include mentoring and workshops that foster personal development. These take place during normal school hours, usually during PE classes.

Under our community outreach programme, we work with rugby clubs to engage with young people in their community who have not accessed
rugby before. We provide all coaches and volunteers with comprehensive trauma-informed training. This makes the club both a safe space for these young people and their families and also a community hub, where all members can experience the transformational power of the ‘rugby home’.

Join us in our mission to transform the lives of young people and build a brighter future for the next generation. To contribute to our project, visit
our donation page at www.tacklelondon.org or contact us at info@tackelondon.org

Name: Nudge Cycling
Description:
ONZE MISSIE
Nudge Cycling wil de vitaliteit en gezondheid van deelnemers verhogen door ze uit te dagen en te motiveren. Door samen te mountainbiken in het bos brengen we een glimlach op het gezicht.

Afgestemd op de belangrijke thema’s binnen de organisatie wil Nudge Cycling ook de interne samenwerking en het groepsgevoel versterken.

VOOR IEDEREEN IN DE ORGANISATIE
Fitte medewerkers vormen sterkere teams, terwijl leiders vol energie makkelijker verbinden om zichzelf steeds opnieuw te overtreffen. We helpen complete organisaties beter te presteren, dankzij duurzame inzetbaarheid waar iedereen zich beter bij voelt.

Bouwen aan een sterker team, individuele medewerkers trainen of er met de leiders van de organisatie keer op keer meer uit halen? We stemmen de aanpak af op de doelstellingen van jouw organisatie.

DATA-DRIVEN
Vanuit een behoefteanalyse ontwerpen we een programma op maat, dat we implementeren met behulp van onze vitaliteits-app. De applicatie is er speciaal voor individuele deelnemers en teams, met beloningen en onderlinge rankings op basis van specifieke uitdagingen.

Dankzij koppelingen met Strava, Garmin, Apple Health, Fitbit en Google Fit maken we de vorderingen inzichtelijk. We meten beweging, hartslag, BMI en slaap en creëren inzicht in verbrande calorieën, actieve tijd, kilometers en bijvoorbeeld stappen.

Name: EUROPEAN NETWORK OF OUTDOOR SPORTS
Description:
EUROPEAN NETWORK OF OUTDOOR SPORTS is an NGO promoting the strategic development of Outdoor Sports and recreation at European Level.

The objectives for ENOS link to the mission and these are:

1. Taking action and supporting responsible and sustainable access and use of landscape, marine areas, habitats and eco-systems.

2. Taking action and advocating for climate action within and outside of the outdoor sports sector.

3. Supporting the organization and management of outdoor sports both on a national and transnational basis through knowledge sharing and exchange.

4. Generating and providing evidence on the value of outdoor sports to support healthy lifestyles for all in Europe.

5. Generating and providing evidence that outdoor sport can provide genuine environmental, educative, social and economic benefits to individuals, communities, regions and nations.

6. Promoting equality of opportunity, diversity and social inclusion in participation in outdoor sports.

7. Empowering and inspiring the sector to network and develop joint projects and funding applications.

8. Supporting trans-national approaches to the development of leaders, instructors and coaches, to develop knowledge, skills and employment.

9. Advocating and championing for outdoor sports at a strategic level in Europe

Name: Little Kickers Northern Ontario
Description:
Find a soccer class to match your child's age and in your local area. There are no specific start and end dates, just sign up online and join in! 

What is Little Kickers?

‘’Little Kickers is an educational soccer programme for children aged 1.5yrs-7yrs. Our programme is designed to help children learn fundamental skills through games and play. We know that children best learn through play and repetition and our programme supports this. In our classes we use imaginative themes in each session, which gets children fully immersed into the class. A child that is engaged in what they are doing is a child that is learning and developing. Our classes are built upon early learning goals for children and we aim to focus on 5 main areas of learning: Communication and language, physical development, personal / social /emotional development, basic mathematics and expressive / imaginative play. Within these learning brackets we hone in on smaller learning outcomes such as listening and attention skills, ABC movement skills (agility, balance & coordination), physical skills, such as running and jumping, social skills, like sharing, shapes, colours and numbers and much more. All of this is taught in a pressure-free, fun and safe environment.

Soccer and a Healthy Lifestyle

‘’What’s great about Little Kickers is that not only is there a huge amount of learning going on, children are engaging in physical exercise. Child obesity is on the up  and along with modern technology, it is more important than ever to get children engaged in a structured sports programme. By helping children to love sports at such a young age, it is more likely that children will then grow up to continue to play and engage in sports as adults and lead healthy lifestyles.

We’re now the world’s biggest and most successful pre-school soccer academy and there’s plenty more to come. We’re constantly enhancing our classes with the help of our experts

Calculated Performance's mission is clear: to develop the complete athlete. We want to grow a community of like-minded athletes and coaches, who all share the same passion of self developing. Whether that is joining your first grassroots team or signing your first professional contract.

Name: Active Cornwall
Description:
Our vision is for a Cornwall where inequalities are no longer a barrier to an active life. We champion the benefits of incorporating movement and physical activity into everyday life, focusing on those facing the most significant inequalities. Sharing our unique insights, knowledge and resources, we work collaboratively with others to influence policy and help integrate activity into education, healthcare and community life.  

We are one of 43 independent Active Partnerships in England, collaborating with national partners and 'Uniting the Movement' for Sport England in Cornwall, tackling inactivity and reducing inequalities. 

In partnership with the NHS, Cornwall Council and local delivery partners, we strategically commission and build quality-assured capacity in priority places for those who need our support the most. By connecting with communities, we tackle barriers that prevent people from leading more active lives, powering positive and sustainable change at scale, and influencing active environments.
 
Research shows that physical activity plays a crucial role in preventing illness and managing long term health conditions, and being active can reduce the risk of major illnesses and early death by 30%. However, 49% of children in Cornwall do not meet the recommended physical activity guidelines, especially those from less affluent families or with special educational needs and disabilities. Our ageing and minority populations are increasing, and economic disparities are growing, leading to more inequality and less activity.

With a focus on children, young people and older adults, we support those who need the most help to move more and live well for longer. Delivering national initiatives at a local level, we also deliver programmes where gaps in the market otherwise remain.

Underpinned by our beliefs of trust, equity, compassion, innovation and curiosity, our work across four strategic themes delivers long term systemic change and impact.

Description:

1. The development of the spirit of brotherhood and solidarity of the members

2. The promotion of the sport through the cooperation of the members after the other sports state actors

3. The recognition and securing of the position and rights of its members in the field of Greek Basketball as well as the study, protection and promotion of finances, etc. members' professional interests

5. Monitoring the latest developments in the sport through the establishment of sports literature libraries, screenings, the establishment of educational Seminars and Schools for the technical and pedagogical improvement of basketball coaches, and for the creation of such, as well as the calling of foreign technicians for information and teaching in the above seminars and schools

7. The development and promotion of relations with the Federation and the Unions, as well as the development of its public relations

8. Watching all kinds of sporting events and actively participating in them

9. The association's support in any way to its members, whose teams participate in international level matches, as well as the support in the matches of the National teams

The realization of the above purposes will be pursued by the Association with appropriate teachings and lectures, by improving the working conditions of the members, by ensuring regular work for the members and generally by taking every legal measure aimed at the improvement, technical and professional of the members of the Association.

The platform caters to a diverse range of sports preferences and skill levels, ensuring there's something for everyone.

At its core, Sportomic is designed to streamline the booking process, enhance venue visibility, and foster community engagement through organized sports events and leagues. This not only helps sports venues optimize their operations and increase their bookings, but also encourages community participation and active lifestyles among users.

Sportomic’s user-friendly interface, combined with powerful backend technology, provides real-time booking capabilities and comprehensive management tools for venue operators. This integration of technology simplifies the operational challenges commonly faced by sports facilities while offering users a convenient and reliable booking experience.

By promoting accessibility to sports facilities and encouraging regular physical activity, Sportomic aims to contribute positively to the health and well-being of its community, making it easier for everyone to engage in sports and fitness activities. Whether for casual recreation or more competitive pursuits, Sportomic provides a one-stop solution for sports enthusiasts across India.
