Name: International Junior Golf Academy (IJGA)
Description:
The International Junior Golf Academy (IJGA) is the premier destination for middle and high school golfers seeking a competitive advantage over their peers. IJGA's unique programs deliver customized golf training, tour competition, performance training, character building and an elite college preparatory education in a close, family environment in Hilton Head, South Carolina. 

IJGA's mission is to train junior golfers for success in tournament golf and beyond. Through our supportive and competitive environment, students develop the critical qualities of commitment, goal setting and a consistent work ethic to best impact their academics and golf careers.

The International Junior Golf Academy opened its doors with an enrollment of six students in 1995. By 2000, the Academy had grown to the point that a housing campus was needed. In 2004, the program reached 100 students and now hosts over 140 full-time students.

IJGA boasts nearly a 100% college placement rate with students earning over $51 million in scholarships. Alumni have attended schools such as Georgia Tech, Princeton, Dartmouth, Oklahoma State, Texas A&M, Notre Dame, Yale, University of Alabama, University of Oklahoma and Boston College, just to name a few. Additionally, they've gone on to have successful careers on the PGA, LPGA and European Tours.

Name: MEYA sports
Description:
MEYA Sports is a next-generation elite sports academy headquartered in Dubai, UAE, driven by a bold vision: to empower young athletes—neurodiverse and neurotypical—to thrive through sport, strength and inclusive excellence.

Our mission is to deliver world-class coaching, cutting-edge training environments and a culture of integrity, safety and respect. We specialise in dynamic programmes across various Sports, with a dedicated focus on children & youth identifying with neurodiversity.

At MEYA we believe every individual has a champion within. We build endurance, self-belief and leadership for life—not just sport. Our inclusive curriculum, rooted in smart innovation and community values, is designed to bridge differences, amplify potential and reshape the future of sport. Based in the UAE and Qatar, but global in mindset, MEYA Sports is where ambition meets action, diversity is strength and performance is for everyone.

Join the movement. Wear the brand with pride. Lead the next generation.

Name: MultiBall Australia
Description:
MultiBall Australia is an Australian based partner and reseller of the innovative MultiBall & interactiveSQUASH solutions by LYMB.iO (formely Fun With Balls GmbH). 

MultiBall transforms any wall into a fully immersive free motion interactive sports & entertainment experience.  The system provides an incredibly fun solution to solve the problem of inactivity in our digital society. It does this in the most creative & inclusive way using fitness, entertainment and education to promote a healthy lifestyle.

Find your use case here from - Leisure Centres, Retail, Sports Clubs, Tennis Training,  Soccer Training, Squash Clubs, School PDHPE, Early Learning, After School Programs, School Holiday Programs, Stadium Sensory Rooms, Events & Brand Activations, Gyms, Shopping Centers, Corporate Wellbeing / Modern Offices, Exercise Physiology, Youth Affairs, Aged Care, The Home, Airports and more!

Name: Will Ferry Soccer School
Description:
Our goal is to empower every child to discover a love for being active, find their place in the football community, and develop at their own pace. That's why we provide a fun and friendly environment where everyone is welcome. With access to in-person professional coaching and virtual training videos hosted by Will Ferry, we're the premier choice for every child.

Will Ferry Soccer School was founded in 2022 with one goal: to provide a level playing field for children of all abilities to thrive. Our pressure-free sessions allow children to develop at their own pace in a friendly environment where everyone feels welcome and has the opportunity to express themselves.

What makes us unique is that we combine a physical coaching programme with a virtual programme of training videos hosted by Will Ferry. As a result, your child will benefit from an encouraging and inspirational football coaching experience they won't find anywhere else. Our range of fun activities and professional experience is designed to help every child shine both on and off the pitch.

Name: Girls Rugby Inc.
Description: Girls Rugby provides access for girls to learn vital skills and core values such as leadership, empowerment, achievement, respect and sportsmanship all while enjoying the experience of playing all-girls, non-contact rugby. Girls Rugby embodies the philosophy of developing young girls through sport and understands the positive benefits that participation in team sports has on their lives.

Name: Park Sports
Description:
Park Sports (formerly Will to Win) was established over 25 years ago with the goal of improving accessibility to quality, affordable sporting facilities in many of London’s iconic and beautiful Parks.

With the help and support of key partners like The Royal Parks and The Lawn Tennis Association (LTA), and by working with local authorities, we’ve been able to achieve that goal. We welcome all age groups and abilities to our six outdoor sports venues, which now include floodlit tennis courts, padel courts, football pitches, netball courts and lawn bowls.

One of London’s best-kept secrets is its beautiful parklands. We make sure that the leisure and sporting facilities within these wonderful green spaces are maintained to a high standard, well-equipped, and remain accessible to everyone.

We provide our local communities with the very best in sports coaching programmes as well as a friendly and welcoming social environment.

We even have café spaces in which you can catch up with friends, take a moment to relax after a match or simply have a cup of coffee and watch the world go by; our versatile facilities have everything you need to recharge your sense of well-being.

We are a fun, professional, diverse and inclusive brand with a passion for customer service and excellence.

We are Park Sports. We love to play in nature’s playground.

Name: Sprenty • სფრენთი
Description: სფრენთი აერთიანებს ყველა სპორტულ ობიექტს ერთ სივრცეში და გაძლევს საშუალებას დაჯავშნო online

Name: Southern Miss Sport Management
Description: Globally, sports represent a $400-$600 billion-dollar industry. Forbes has estimated a 20% increase in the US alone in the past five years, $60.5B to $73.5B, making it one of the fastest-growing industries in the US. Our program immerses students into the industry, combining traditional classroom instruction with hands-on experience. Students receive professional training from industry leaders in preparation for management positions with professional sport teams, intercollegiate/intramural athletics, recreation programs at colleges/universities, and more.

Name: Faculté des Sciences du Sport de Nancy - STAPS Nancy
Description:
The Faculty of Sports Sciences of Nancy, also known as UFR STAPS Nancy, is a component of the University of Lorraine.

Each year, it welcomes nearly 1,500 students in Sports and Physical Activities Sciences and Techniques (STAPS).

The programs are accessible after high school, for reorientation, or as part of continuing education.

Name: AYO Indonesia
Description:
Ayo Indonesia (ayo.co.id) is Indonesia's leading Sport Tech Startup. We are a super sport community platform that connects sport enthusiasts, athletes, sport teams, tournaments and sport venues.

Players can find new sport communities to join, new sparring partners, competitions and also book sport venues directly from our app.

We are helping Indonesia's sport venues to transform digitally from previously traditional management methods. We provide the most advanced tools for our venue partners to manage their venues more efficiently and increase their sales.

Our vision is to improve the sporting experience of all athletes. We are building a complete sporting ecosystem in order to make it easier for athletes to participate in sports.

Currently there are over 9,000 sport communities registered on Ayo Indonesia with over 180,000 players in the ecosystem.

Along with our online platform, we also run numerous offline activities in the shape of sporting competitions for our community.

Name: Basquete S.A.
Description:
A Basquete S.A. é uma escola licenciada pela NBA Basketball School, o maior programa de formação global da marca NBA. Com 13 anos de história, somos referência em educação esportiva e desenvolvimento integral de crianças e jovens através do basquete.

Nossa missão vai além da quadra: usamos o esporte como ferramenta de transformação pessoal, social e emocional. Aliamos formação técnica de excelência com vivências reais no Brasil e no exterior, criando experiências completas para atletas e suas famílias.

 NBA Basketball School
Como licenciados oficiais, oferecemos:
	•	Metodologia exclusiva desenvolvida pela NBA;
	•	Treinamento contínuo de professores e gestores;
	•	Acompanhamento pedagógico direto da NBA Brasil;
	•	Eventos e seletivas exclusivas para nossos alunos.

 Novas Fronteiras para o Basquete
A Basquete S.A. vive um novo momento, com foco em intercâmbio internacional, conexões com clubes e centros de treinamento na Europa e programas como o BSA Tour Lisboa, que leva atletas federados para uma imersão esportiva e cultural em Portugal.

Também atuamos como ponte para equipes e atletas que desejam competir ou treinar fora do Brasil, fortalecendo o intercâmbio esportivo entre continentes e criando novas oportunidades de visibilidade e crescimento.

 Para Famílias: oferecemos um ambiente seguro, profissional e inspirador para que seu filho(a) desenvolva habilidades que ultrapassam o esporte: disciplina, autoestima, foco, tomada de decisão e trabalho em equipe.

 Para Empresas: somos uma plataforma sólida para projetos de impacto social, formação esportiva e internacionalização de talentos. Estamos abertos a parcerias que queiram transformar vidas através do esporte.

 Fundada pelo ex-jogador profissional Fernando Coloneze, com passagens pela seleção brasileira e experiência como gestor olímpico, nossa escola carrega em seu DNA a vivência prática no mais alto nível do basquete nacional e internacional.

Name: S4S PREPARACIÓN FÍSICA
Description:
S4S es un centro especializado en la preparación física de opositores a Bombero, Policía Nacional y Policía Local.

Trabajamos con un enfoque técnico, medible y orientado al rendimiento real de las pruebas físicas.

Nuestros sistemas combinan fuerza, atletismo, postura y movimiento. Cada prueba tiene un sistema propio, con progresiones claras y seguimiento individualizado para garantizar una mejora real y segura.

Ofrecemos entrenamientos presenciales en grupos reducidos y programas online para quienes entrenan a distancia. En ambos casos, priorizamos la calidad del movimiento, el control de la carga y la precisión técnica.

En S4S formamos un equipo de preparadores físicos que comparte un mismo objetivo: que cada atleta entrene con claridad, seguridad y un plan que tenga sentido.

Si eres preparador físico y te interesa trabajar en un entorno técnico y en crecimiento, nos encantará conocer tu perfil.

Name: Activate
Description:
Through our holiday camps, the National Citizen Service and the Holiday Activity and Food programme we engage over 10,000 children and young adults each year.

Our mission is to provide positive life enhancing experiences to young people, through innovative sport, activity, and youth engagement projects.

Name: Fit4lady
Description: Women-only fitness franchise met vestigingen door heel Nederland. We zijn altijd op zoek naar onderneemsters en trainsters met liefde voor sport. Meer weten? Bezoek onze website.

Name: Rset.Athletic
Description:
Rset, blends fitness with mental well-being, guiding you on a journey of renewal, balance and holistic health.
As Hacettepe Sports Sciences graduates, record holders (in swimming) and Olympic athletes (in modern pentathlon) who are both national athletes, we created RSET by synthesizing our academic, field and coaching experiences with our approach to what we would need in a gym if we were active or recreational athletes today.

Name: Professional Soccer Resource
Description:
Detailed training focused on Soccer-Specific Movement, Techniques, & Concepts used by The Pros 
founded by former USMNT Captain & Defender, Danny Califf
Specialized programs help players develop concrete technical skills and reach a deeper understanding needed at the highest level of the game. 

We work with players individually on technique, body awareness, and soccer-
specific movement skills to increase agility, rapid change of pace/direction, balance, strength, body control & positioning by improving mechanics &
technique.
Our Experience, Curriculum, Technology, and Passion are the reasons why we
have been successful.
We have played at the professional level and have had to confront similar obstacles that youth athletes are placed in today: whether that be trying to make a better club or high school team, recruitment to college, or training for the professional level. 
We have invaluable experiences at every one of those levels and encountered challenges both on and off the pitch.

Name: 91 Sporting Company
Description:
At 91 Sporting Company, we blend passion with purpose, building platforms where players grow, communities connect, and the game never stops. We are on a mission to make sports accessible, organised, and impactful.

1. Professional Coaching - Our certified coaches deliver structured, age-specific programs that focus on skill, discipline, and performance for beginners to emerging professionals.
2. Pay & Play Facilities
Affordable, bookable sports spaces that keep the game going — accessible to individuals, teams, and schools.
3. Corporate Sports Events - We plan and deliver dynamic, tailor-made sports experiences for companies, from employee engagement programs to large-scale corporate leagues that promote wellness, teamwork, and a winning mindset.
4. Sports Infrastructure Management - We develop, upgrade, and manage multi-sport facilities that are game-ready, safe, and scalable — from school grounds to community arenas.


At our core, we believe sport is not just a game — it’s a movement. We're here to build the foundation for a stronger, more connected sports culture in India.

Name: T3 Performance
Description:
T3 Performance is a purpose-driven community united by one goal: Developing athletes, programs, and the communities they serve.
What began as a small training space in Avon, Ohio has grown into a thriving network of facilities and partner clubs, all designed to provide expert coaching, meaningful support, and opportunities for individuals and organizations to reach their full potential.
Across our locations and partnerships, we deliver the tools, guidance, and expertise needed to help teams succeed and make a lasting impact. Rooted in purposeful coaching and authentic connection, our approach focuses on long-term development — benefiting both athletes and the programs that shape them.

Name: BlueField Sports Agency
Description:
BlueField Sports Agency, is a global scouting, development, and promotion agency that is passionate about giving talented athletes around the world the opportunity to reach their full potential. We are committed to helping athletes achieve success and reach their dreams, no matter what their background is.
Our team of experienced professionals have worked with some of the best known clubs and academies in the world, helping to identify and develop the most promising talent from around the globe. We specialise in helping athletes of all ages and levels to reach the highest level of their potential and to maximise their performance.

Name: SkillsTeem Consultants Ltd
Description:
Corporate Team building
Corporate wellness and fitness
Corporate Fun & Sports Day
Recreation and Sports facility management 
Gym management
Recreation and sports personnel sourcing and training

Name: K&K Swim School
Description:
K&K Swim School began in 2014 with a mission to teach and grow a lifelong love for the water.

We believe every swimmer—no matter their age, background, or experience—deserves personalized instruction that is safe, effective, and meaningful. That’s why we offer high-quality swim lessons designed to build confidence, connection, and trust from the very first moment in the water.

Now teaching in 17 cities across Alberta, Saskatchewan, and Quebec, K&K Swim School offers one-on-one private lessons in AB and SK, and small group lessons in QC. Whether it’s a 5-month-old baby, a first-time preschooler, or an adult learner, our tailored approach helps swimmers feel supported every step of the way.

Our Swimful curriculum emphasizes mindfulness, breath control, and building a genuine bond with the water—without the use of flotation aids. This unique method allows swimmers to develop buoyancy, balance, and independence naturally, even at a young age.

At K&K, we are inspired every day by the growth we witness in and out of the water. We challenge our swimmers while fostering trust, adaptability, and resilience. Our instructors build meaningful connections that last long after the lesson ends.

We value connection, build trust, encourage challenge, support growth, and aim to inspire—every swimmer, every lesson.

Name: Sidekick Sports Academy
Description:
Since 2012, Sidekick Sports Academy, based in Greater Boston, MA, has been dedicated to youth sports education, community development, and athlete growth. We offer a wide range of services, including after-school activities, skills clinics, and vacation camps in basketball, soccer, flag football, lacrosse, futsal, track & field, and more. Additionally, we provide including league and tournament management, coaching education, private training, competitive teams, trained referees, and wellness programs for children with special needs and adults with disabilities.

Having worked with World Cup champions, Hall of Famers, Olympians, and English Premier League players, we are passionate about empowering athletes of all levels. Whether fostering the joy of a high-five or guiding competitive players, we use sports to inspire, motivate, and enhance the lives of every participant, regardless of skill level or ability.

Name: SWIM WORLD
Description:
Nos especializamos en brindar una oferta integral de servicios, productos y proyectos acuáticos orientados a contribuir con el bienestar, salud y performance de nuestros clientes. Contamos con 3 unidades de negocio: 

1. Escuela de natación: a través de "SW Esdepor" formamos a nuestros alumnos en el ámbito deportivo y personal, mediante una metodología de enseñanza personalizada e innovadora cuyo propósito es lograr el desarrollo integral de nuestro alumnado formando así “Campeones para la vida”. Nos ubicamos en el Club Okinawense y contamos con la mejor piscina de Lima Este.

2. SW Pools: Esta unidad de negocio se divide en 2 categorías:
Proyectos de superficies grandes: Nos encargamos del diseño, implementación y ejecución de proyectos acuáticos (centros acuáticos, piscinas (semi) olímpicas, de competición, de recreación, etc.); siendo nuestros principales clientes las instituciones públicas y privadas. Nuestro principal proyecto ejecutado fue la Implementación del Centro Acuático de la Videna para los Juegos Panamericanos Lima 2019.
Proyectos de superficies pequeñas: Ofrecemos bienestar, salud y recreación a nuestros usuarios a través de nuestras piscinas inteligentes de nado contra corriente y de relajación que se adaptan a las distintas necesidades y espacios requeridos por nuestros clientes. Están orientadas al cliente final y clubes deportivos. Contamos con más de 70 proyectos implementados a nivel nacional.

3. SW Store: tienda de artículos y servicios deportivos. Contamos con un portafolio multimarca de soluciones y accesorios especializados en deportes acuáticos, entrenamiento y triatlón. Somos representantes oficiales de MADWAVE (marca de artículos de natación), que ofrece una gran variedad de soluciones para nado en piscina (competición y entrenamiento), aguas abiertas, waterpolo y demás, asimismo, cuenta con productos certificados por la World Aquatics (Ex FINA). Nuestra sede principal está ubicada en Av. Caminos del Inca 620 – Surco, Lima.

Name: Double Sports
Description: Double Sports biedt uitvoering, organisatie en coördinatie van sport en spelactiviteiten voor met name het onderwijs, de kinderopvang, welzijnsinstanties en gemeenten. Alle activiteiten van Double Sports worden verzorgd door flexibele sportprofessionals die sport en spel kunnen onderwijzen aan jong tot oud.

Name: Gimnasio Dorian
Description: El gimnasio más grande del Austro Ecuatoriano.

Name: MOVER Futebol
Description:
Movimento de Equidade Racial no Futebol.
O Projeto fundado em 2022 por profissionais negros de diversos segmentos no futebol, tem como objetivo, capacitar, oportunizar e divulgar o trabalho de profissionais negros no Futebol.

Página focada nos profissionais, trabalhos e projetos de profissionais Pretos no futebol!

Name: One Life
Description:
One Life is a platform built to turn talent into success. We create content to educate and inspire. We document the journey. We share the blueprint. We break down how to make it — in sports, in music, and in the business behind it.

We equip rising talent not just with visibility, but with the knowledge, access, and tools to make it.

We connect athletes and artists with the right people, our global network, and real opportunities — and we make sure they’re ready when the doors open.

Name: Fotbalgolf Radonice - Event Garden
Description:
Spojujeme sport, přírodu a týmovou zábavu v jedinečném prostředí. Oživte firemní dny exkluzivním fotbalgolfem na našem rozlehlém 6hektarovém parku!

"PROJDĚTE SE PŘÍRODOU S MÍČEM U NOHOU" 

Poskytujeme kompletní servis s prvotřídním cateringem a grilováním přímo na místě. Užijte si skvělou hru, kterou s nadšením hrají ženy i muži každé věkové kategorie. Ideálním prostředí pro outdoor firemní teambuilding, prozákaznické a partnerské akce a networking.

Pro obohacení akce jsou k dispozici i petanque hřiště a možnost zahrát si další venkovní sporty, včetně volejbalu, badmintonu, kroketu a frisbee.

Zažijte nezapomenutelné firemní události plné energie a týmového ducha!

Name: NV Academy
Description: NV Academy is there for YOU! All our packages and services offered are tailor-made to your specific targets. Instead of merely explaining perfect driving lines, we seek to set a goal with you and work towards it together. And with a goal we mean your personal goal: it may be that you have never driven on a race track before and wish to set your first racing steps in a safe & professional environment, but it may also be that your goal is racing in the 24h of LeMans.

Name: British Skydiving
Description: British Skydiving is the National Governing Body for Sports Parachuting in the UK

Name: ESPORTSRIO
Description:
Com sede na cidade do Rio de Janeiro e fundada por Nayla Cristina e Carlos Gama, a ESPORTSRIO é uma plataforma de comunicação  que publica semanalmente para a comunidade de Esports do Rio de Janeiro entrevistas com profissionais, perfil de atletas e organizações, as últimas 
notícias, e insights de Esports, eventos, apostas de Esports, mídia de esports, conferências Business to Business e Networking.

Name: Human Ability
Description: Human Ability es el sistema de entrenamiento para la mejora del rendimiento físico basado en 5 estímulos: Sprint, Jump, Throw, Lift & Play  By Coach Antonio Expósito.

Name: DEGUST'Emoi
Description:
Dégustation de vins et spiritueux dans 25 villes en France ! 
Les formateurs DEGUST’Emoi partagent chaque année leur passion pour le vin et les spiritueux à près de 20 000 participants autour de cours d’initiation, de formats journées et week-ends, d’ateliers thématiques (grands crus, accords mets et vins, whiskies, vins rouges…) et l’organisation de team building œnologiques. 

Sous la direction de son président et fondateur Vincent Fiorani, DEGUST’Emoi s’engage pour la défense des savoirs-faire respectueux de l’environnement et des terroirs en proposant une sélection de vins 100% bio ou biodynamie. 

DEGUST'Emoi est également un centre de formation agréé et dispense les formations certifiantes éligibles CPF ainsi que des formations WSET reconnues à l’international. 

Curieux, amateurs et œnophiles chevronnés trouveront chacun matière à explorer le monde passionnant de la dégustation, le tout dans une ambiance conviviale et chaleureuse !

“Qui sait déguster ne boit plus jamais de vin mais goûte des secrets” (Salvador Dali)

Name: Personal Fitness Nederland
Description:
Ruim 15 jaar geleden startten fysiotherapeut Jos Vermeer samen met zijn vrouw gewichtsconsulente Petra Vermeer en collega Giel Verberne het concept van Personal Fitness Nederland. Binnen dit concept staan de drie pijlers: voeding, beweging en mental coaching centraal. De laagdrempelige methode in een kleine, eenvoudige ruimte in Tilburg sloeg aan. In 2013 besloten Jos, Giel en Petra om nog meer mensen in Nederland kennis te laten maken de Fit for Life methode. Vandaag de dag is Personal Fitness Nederland een dynamisch en energiek bedrijf dat passie heeft voor sporten, bewegen en gezondheid. Iedereen die graag gezonder wil gaan leven, een aantal kilo wil afvallen of een bepaalde gedragsverandering wil realiseren, is bij Personal Fitness Nederland aan het juiste adres. Wat iemand zijn doelstelling ook is, met het team van Personal Fitness Nederland doen we er alles aan om samen met de klant deze doelen te bereiken en behouden.

We zijn dan ook zeer trots dat op dit moment duizenden mensen bezig zijn om hun doelen te behalen in meer dan 80 vestigingen van Personal Fitness Nederland om zo uiteindelijk hun kwaliteit van leven te verbeteren. We zullen dan ook doorgaan tot we in iedere (middelgrote) gemeente van Nederland aanwezig zijn zodat wij nog meer positieve invloed kunnen uitoefenen op het geluk en de vitaliteit van alle inwoners in Nederland.

Name: KSWISS FIT
Description:
Kevin Ferreira, alias Kswiss Fit, est bien plus qu’un préparateur physique. Ancien combattant professionnel en arts martiaux mixtes, il s’est imposé comme une référence internationale en performance et mobilité articulaire.

Son expertise l’a mené à entraîner des joueurs NBA, des footballeurs de haut niveau, des athlètes olympiques et des combattants MMA. Mais c’est en tant que pionnier de la mobilité articulaire dans l’espace francophone qu’il s’est réellement distingué.

Formé aux États-Unis, au contact des meilleurs, Kevin a choisi de mettre ses connaissances au service de la francophonie. Sa mission ? Réapprendre à bouger. Mieux. Plus librement. Sans douleur.

Aujourd’hui, il accompagne les professionnels du sport, de la santé et tous ceux qui refusent de se résigner à la douleur, vers une performance durable et un corps fonctionnel.

"Vous n’êtes pas brisé. Vous avez juste oublié comment bouger. Et ça, ça s’apprend."

Name: WIN Sport School MARSEILLE
Description:
WIN, l’école de management du sport présente dans 24 villes en France et en Europe, forme les passionnés et sportifs de haut niveau au management, marketing, événementiel sportif, sponsoring et développement commercial.

Avec un programme en 3 à 5 ans, développez vos compétences en management sportif et renforcez votre employabilité grâce à l’alternance, première expérience significative longue durée.

Name: Inter Academy Brazil
Description:
A Inter Academy Brazil é a rede de escolas de futebol do clube FC Internazionale, ou Inter de Milão como é conhecido no Brasil. 

Com metodologia de ensino e treinamento premiados pela UEFA (UEFA Grassroots), a Inter Academy Brazil oferece aos seus alunos o sonho de jogar futebol com o padrão de um time europeu e aprender valores como respeito, autoconfiança e determinação.

Ser um licenciado Inter Academy Brazil é representar uma das 10 maiores marcas do futebol mundial, com baixo volume de investindo em um negócio com grande potencial de retorno financeiro. 

UM PROGRAMA 360º PARA A IMPLANTAÇÃO E GESTÃO DE ESCOLINHAS DE FUTEBOL.

Oferecemos uma política de parceria com nossos licenciados, com suporte 360° na gestão da escolinha de futebol e incremento de receita com a venda de produtos oficiais. Somos facilitadores. Você contará com uma equipe multidisciplinar concentrada em gerar lucro, minimizar riscos e garantir o crescimento do negócio:

        •	MARCA FC INTERNAZIONALE: top 10 no mundo;

        •	SUPORTE PARA O NEGÓCIO: sistemas de gestão, treinamento e 
                consultoria de marketing;

        •	METODOLOGIA DE TREINO: metodologia de base FC Internazionale, 
                com professores certificados;

        •	MARKET PLACE: incremento de receita com venda de produtos oficiais;

        •	EXPERIÊNCIA DO CLIENTE: eventos, campeonatos e estágios na Itália.

Entre em contato com nossa equipe e faça parte desse time:  whts.co/coml

#growingtogether

Name: GoRally
Description:
On a mission to enable the next 10M Indians to play sport, regularly. 

Book courts, join Open Games when your friends bail, and train with Karnataka’s top players—all at www.gorally.in!

Rally at our centres in JP Nagar, Indiranagar, HSR, and Bellandur   
We’re expanding to CBD, Whitefield, Agara and Sarjapur Road soon, and we can’t wait to welcome you!

Join our 4000+ WhatsApp community and Get Ready to Rally!: https://chat.whatsapp.com/CdyTugvVrn9LkMhKapBGwE

Name: Centro de Movimento Deborah Colker
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Maccabi Australia
Description:
Maccabi Australia together with our member States and affiliated Clubs exist to promote Jewish identity and continuity – connecting our Jewish community through sport.

We are the largest Jewish grass-roots organisation in Australia, boasting a 90-year heritage, 35,000 supporters and more than 6,000 members ranging in age from 5 to 85 years across over 50 clubs. Every week participating in a Maccabi team provides an opportunity for Jewish children to connect and form lifelong friendships. Our event calendar includes an annual Junior Sports Carnival, participation in the Maccabiah Games in Israel, interstate sport challenges and Maccabi regional events.

Maccabi is a world wide organisation that represents Jewish sportsmen and women around the world. The Maccabi World Union (MWU) represents more than 500,000 members in over 60 countries participating in just about every sporting code. MWU has established a phenomenal track record of using organised sports as a passport to lifelong Jewish involvement.

The Maccabi organisation in Australia has a proud history of developing Jewish sport and has been sending a team to the Maccabiah since 1950 as well as playing a significant role in developing sport locally through Junior carnivals. Importantly Maccabi Australia is a Zionist sports organisation and is focused on strengthening its links with Israel and the Jewish community generally.

Name: Surf the Greats
Description:
Community organization focused on surf education, adventure and lifestyle on the Great Lakes and beyond.

Mission

Surf the Greats aspires to establish and foster community through the adventure of surfing the Great Lakes and beyond. We educate, explore, and share through the medium of surf, while reconnecting with the magnificence of nature.

Vision

   Skyline. Training Days can also be incorporated.
* National Navigation Award Scheme
* D of E Training and Expedition Supervision.
* Freelance Services.

Our company owner, Mark McKenzie has been navigating for over 10 years and following his achievement of the Mountain Training's Mountain Leader Award in 2017 has become the Central England's Regional Co-ordinator for the Mountain Training Association (MTA), volunteering to "develop a much wider community spirit, provide help and support and engage in shared experiences" all for the benefit of the regions members.

Mark is also currently working and assisting on the MTA's Mentoring Scheme.

Having worked in a variety of mountain locations throughout the UK and had the opportunity to motivate, to push and stretch individuals and groups alike to achieve their goals and aspirations, whilst understanding their needs and expectations, TriVentures UK will look forward to "engaging, enthusing and educating"

If you are interested in an outdoor adventure, you'll be guided by our company owner Mark McKenzie ML and other fully qualified mountain professionals with First Aid certification and current DBS Checks where required, do get in touch.

Go on, it'll be worth it.......

Name: Moovmoor
Description:
Let's talk about desk zombies. You know, that feeling when you've been sitting for hours, your body and mind are begging for movement, and your third coffee isn't helping anymore? Work shouldn't hurt… But it does. With 4.7 hours of daily sitting, we're turning workplaces into zombie zones.

Between complicated ergonomic guides and forgotten gym memberships, nothing really sticks. That's why we created Moovmoor - because movement should be fun, social, and actually fit into your day.


Here's how we're different: 

 Live sessions with Moovers who get it (no robot instructors here!)

 Team action that turns colleagues into accountability buddies (because moving alone is boring)

 Smart scheduling that respects your calendar (bye-bye, calendar tetris)

 A community that keeps moving


When teams Moov more:

 No more treating ibuprofen like candy

 Real energy, not just caffeine-induced peaks

 A work culture that's actually human

 Skyrocketing productivity (turns out moving helps with that!)


Moov more. Do more. Feel human.

Ready to wake up your workplace? Let's bring your team back to life.

Name: EscaVida
Description:
EscaVida: Your Gateway to the World’s Greatest Adventures

EscaVida is the ultimate platform for thrill-seekers and experience lovers. We connect you with curated outdoor adventures — on land, sea, and in the air — through trusted operators and seamless technology.

Whether you’re diving into the deep, soaring over dunes, or hiking wild trails, EscaVida makes discovering and booking unforgettable experiences effortless, reliable, and inspiring.

 What We Offer

Adventure Without the Guesswork
EscaVida partners with certified providers across a wide range of activities — from diving and desert camping to paragliding and beyond. We do the vetting, so you can focus on the thrill.

Curated for Every Explorer
Not sure where to start? Our smart discovery engine and adventure advisors help match you with experiences based on your interests, skill level, and location — so every journey feels made for you.

A Platform Built for Action
Our intuitive booking system lets you browse, compare, and reserve your next adventure in just a few clicks. Real-time availability, transparent pricing, and personalized options — no friction, no surprises.

A Community That Moves You
EscaVida brings together a tribe of explorers, instructors, and experience hosts. Share stories, find your next adventure buddy, or grow your network if you’re a provider. We’re building more than a platform — we’re building a movement.

 Why EscaVida?

Because the best moments in life aren’t things — they’re experiences.
Because freedom, discovery, and connection aren’t just dreams — they’re destinations.
And because you deserve more than just a trip. You deserve an adventure worth remembering.

Name: MetaRealm

Lunaris Esports:
A competitive esports organization representing top talent across multiple titles. Lunaris competes in national and regional tournaments, produces professional content, and collaborates with brands and creators to deliver high impact visibility both online and at live events.

MetaRealm Hub:
A centralized gaming platform designed to connect players, creators, teams, and partners. The Hub brings together tournaments, game nights, community activities, and content under one ecosystem, serving as a bridge between gamers and industry stakeholders.

Lunaris Academy & Guild:
A development focused program and community aimed at discovering and nurturing emerging talent. Through structured training, mentorship, and competitive exposure, the Academy helps players and creators improve their skills while the Guild provides an active community environment for collaboration and growth.

Together, these projects position MetaRealm as a scalable gaming hub, combining competition, community, education, and content to support the growth of esports and gaming culture in the region and beyond.

Name: Morphy
Description:
Nous sommes tous différents : même si nous suivons le même programme que notre sportif préféré  nous ne deviendrons jamais comme lui.

Nous n’avons pas tous la même longueur de bras  la même épaisseur de cage thoracique, la même forme de bassin et nous ne pouvons pas tous exécuter les exercices de la même façon. Ces particularités anatomiques  peuvent facilement engendrer des blessures à terme.

Le sport permet d'être en bonne santé mais s'il est pratiqué de manière non adaptée au pratiquant, cela provoque tout l'inverse 

C’est pourquoi nous avons créé Morphy, une intelligence  qui s’adapte entièrement à l’utilisateur pour performer tout en évitant les blessures.

Name: AVIPA
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada a brindar servicios de actividades extraescolares y deportivas de alta calidad, en un ambiente seguro y divertido. 
En AVIPA, nos enorgullece contar con un equipo humano excepcional, formado en su mayoría por exalumnos de la escuela con la que trabajamos. Creemos en el potencial de nuestros exalumnos y les ofrecemos la posibilidad de continuar su camino con nosotros, brindándoles oportunidades de desarrollo profesional y valorando su experiencia en la escuela. Esta conexión especial con la comunidad educativa nos permite establecer una relación cercana y auténtica con los estudiantes y sus familias.
En colaboración con el colegio Concepcionistas de Barcelona, hemos revitalizado y mejorado el servicio de actividades extraescolares, ofreciendo una propuesta educativa innovadora y en constante evolución, adaptandonos a las necesidades y capacidades de la escuela. Hemos experimentado un incremento significativo en la participación de los alumnos en nuestras actividades, lo que demuestra la confianza y satisfacción de las familias. 
Nuestro compromiso con la calidad se refleja en el éxito de nuestro casal de verano, un programa lúdico y educativo que ha sido ampliamente reconocido y elogiado por las familias. Durante el verano, brindamos a los niños la oportunidad de disfrutar de actividades deportivas, talleres creativos y emocionantes excursiones, proporcionando una experiencia enriquecedora y divertida. Valoramos la confianza que las familias depositan en nosotros al elegir nuestro casal de verano como una opción segura y estimulante para sus hijos.
Trabajamos de la mano con la comunidad educativa, colaborando estrechamente con los docentes y directivos del colegio para garantizar una integración perfecta de nuestras actividades dentro del currículo escolar y los valores educativos del colegio.

Name: Runmaka VR
Description:
Runmaka VR went live September 2024. 

Initially, our aim was to provide a batter training environment for cricketers, that had never previously been possible. This is in the form of a virtual reality app that can be downloaded onto Meta Quest 2 and 3 headsets. 

As a cricket coach of over 40 years, I have always been acutely aware that facilities aren't always easy to come by and the costs associated can be high. Runmaka VR aims to provide a solution with a cost-effective app that allows players to train when they want to, where they want to. In essence, they would own their own indoor centre. #yourcenterofexcellence

We don't want to replace anything, rather, supplement everything. We fully support coaches and coaching and all manner of current practice formats and styles. We just believe that Runmaka VR can offer even further opportunities to help the player.

As we have evolved, we have realised that the scope to enhance the training experience is endless. In the same way that I have had to use my imagination as a coach to maximise my venue to support technical and tactical development, we can apply a huge variety of additional training tools to assist the player and their learning. 

We are genuinely at the very beginning of our journey, but it's incredibly exciting. There is so much to do and the potential is limitless.

Name: FemPadel Collective
Description:
FemPadel Collective (FPC) is a lifestyle and media platform dedicated to women in padel.
What began as a community has evolved into an online magazine celebrating the women shaping the sport, from professional players and coaches to creatives, entrepreneurs, and brands driving change within the padel ecosystem.

Through editorial storytelling, events, and brand partnerships, FPC blends journalism, community, and culture. Our content explores the intersection of sport, travel, and lifestyle, inspiring women to see padel as more than a game, but as a way of life.

Editorial Focus
We publish stories, interviews, and features that spotlight women’s voices and redefine how the padel world is seen, shared, and experienced.

Partnerships
We collaborate with clubs, brands, and organizations to create meaningful visibility for women in padel through creative campaigns, retreats, and curated editorial content.

Our Mission
To amplify the presence of women in padel through storytelling, visibility, and community, building bridges between sport and lifestyle.

Our Vision
To become the leading editorial platform and collective voice for women in padel globally.

Let’s shape the narrative of women’s padel together.

Description:

WIE: Personen van 70 jaar of ouder die een verhoogde fysieke kwetsbaarheid hebben (traag wandelen, weinig spierkracht, vermoeidheid, …).
 
WAAR/WANNEER: Er wordt gedurende 24 weken 3x per week getraind in het huis van de 70-plusser. De tijdstippen kunnen samen met de 70-plusser afgesproken worden.
 
WAAROM: Om de fitheid van de 70-plusser te verbeteren zodat dagelijkse activiteiten/handelingen vlotter verlopen. Het kan daarnaast ook de eenzaamheid verminderen, de participatie verhogen en de kwaliteit van leven verbeteren.
 
Voor deze wetenschappelijke studie zijn we momenteel op zoek naar kwetsbare 70-plussers die willen deelnemen én naar vrijwilligers (bv.: mantelzorgers) die het oefenprogramma willen begeleiden in hun buurt. Description:
COMMUNITY BUSINESS OF THE YEAR SME LEICESTERSHIRE AND RUTLAND 2025!

AMBITION Sports Coaching Ltd specialises in but is not limited to Special Educational Needs/Social, Emotional and Mental Health. AMBITIONs primary focus is encouraging children and young people to engage more in sport and physical activity, helping them to discover their potential and recognise their successes. 

In addition to practical sport sessions for all, AMBITION also provides academic support to children and young people with Special Educational Needs/Social, Emotional and Mental Health on both a 1-1 and small group basis. 

The benefits that can be gained from sporting participation can have a huge positive impact on academic success; focus control, improved concentration, time management and more! AMBITION will aim to develop and meet the needs and requirements of each individual to help them to succeed in their future goals. 

Founder: Laura Till 
- First Class Degree in BSc (Hons) Sports Coaching
- DBS Checked
- Level 3 Designated Safeguarding Lead 
- First Aid Trained
- Level 2 Multi-Skills Coach
- Level 2 Sports Coaching
- Level 3 Teaching Assistant

Name: Stichting Aapjeskooi
Description:
Bij Aapjeskooi draait alles om één ding: jonge kinderen met plezier laten bewegen! Wij zijn een stichting zonder winstoogmerk die zich specialiseert in gymlessen voor de allerkleinsten: dreumesen, peuters en kleuters (1,5 t/m 6 jaar). Want wist je dat kinderen op deze leeftijd twee keer zoveel beweging nodig hebben als volwassenen? Door al vroeg te ontdekken, spelen en sporten, leg je de basis voor een actief, gezond én gelukkig leven.

Onze lessen zitten vol fantasie en avontuur. Iedere week staat er een nieuw thema centraal dat kinderen meeneemt in een verhaal: van klimmen als een aap in de jungle tot brandjes blussen in het wandrek als een brandweer. Ondertussen oefenen kinderen op een speelse manier belangrijke vaardigheden: klimmen, springen, rennen, mikken, slingeren, rollen, balanceren en nog veel meer.

Maar het blijft niet alleen bij bewegen. Bij Aapjeskooi leren kinderen ook samenwerken, op hun beurt wachten, delen, hun zelfvertrouwen vergroten en hun fantasie gebruiken. Zo groeien ze niet alleen motorisch, maar ook sociaal, emotioneel en cognitief.

Waarom beginnen op jonge leeftijd?
- Bewegen stimuleert motoriek, taal, zelfvertrouwen en sociale vaardigheden.
- Kinderen ontdekken hun grenzen (en leren dat soms op je billen vallen óók bij bewegen hoort).
- Door al jong te starten, leg je de basis voor een leven lang bewegen.

Name: Keepersschool GO!
Description: Keepersschool GO! is er voor keepers die zich graag verder willen ontwikkelen als keeper. Name: Performance Academy
Description:
Our not-for-profit ASC Performance Academy enables young sailors to reach the next level.

Through our team of expert coaches, we offer high quality training for sailors in our class specific programmes and foiling pathway. We help sailors transition into a different class and provide the very best chance of success at every level.

The Performance Academy is a continuation of the brilliant work that the Andrew Simpson Foundation and our not-for-profit Centre’s achieve, creating a pathway of support and opportunities from entry level sailor through to elite athlete.

Our aim is to provide high quality training for sailors to achieve success at every level. We realise this by offering and supporting transition training, class specific training and performance programmes. We also offer international event support and international training camps at our European HQ and at various locations globally.

Organizujemy również sesje relaksacyjnego masażu oraz kobido, a także warsztaty z udziałem fizjoterapeutów i dietetyków. Nasze programy nie tylko poprawiają samopoczucie, ale także zwiększają wydajność i zaangażowanie zespołu. Rekreacyjne zajęcia stanowią doskonałą okazję do integracji pracowników, budując lepszą atmosferę w biurze. Wspieramy firmy w tworzeniu harmonijnego i efektywnego środowiska pracy, kładąc nacisk na wysoką jakość usług oraz pomoc w osiąganiu bardziej zrównoważonego trybu życia przez pracowników.

Name: Mountain Mentors
Description:
WHO WE ARE
A community committed to self-development and support, in the backcountry* and beyond

OUR VISION
Backcountry* spaces where everyone belongs and feels safe

WHAT WE DO
Mountain Mentors facilitates one-on-one mentorship. Each season, we pair mentees and mentors and provide the programming necessary to empower pairs to define their intentions and objectives and to experience growth. In addition to one-on-one mentorships, at the heart of what we do is community. Our program offerings seek to energize, deepen, strengthen, and grow community both in our cohort and broader outdoors community. 

WE OFFER PROGRAMMING TO…
Mountain Mentors serves individuals who are committed to growth and skill development, in the backcountry and beyond. Our programming is offered to marginalized genders including women, women-identifying individuals, and non-binary and gender non-conforming people who are comfortable in a space that centers the experiences of women in the outdoors. We recognize and acknowledge the intersection of race and gender identities and it is our hope that we can provide programming that is inclusive and accessible.

Mountain Mentors serves communities in Greater Vancouver, Squamish, Whistler, and Pemberton. We acknowledge that we operate on the ancestral and unceded lands of kʷikʷəƛ̓əm (Kwikwetlem), Qayqayt, Kwantlen, Semiahmoo, Tsawwassen,  xʷməθkwəy̓əm, Skwxwú7mesh (Squamish), Səl̓ílwətaɬ (Tsleil-Waututh), S’ólh Téméxw (Stó:lō), St̓át̓imc Tmicw (St’at’imc), and Líl̓wat (Lil'wat) Peoples. For an understanding of the geographic areas of these lands, please visit native-land.ca. This acknowledgement is not an endpoint but rather a starting place for our reflection of the history of this land and of the places we learn, recreate, and are in relationship on.

Name: Purdue Outing Club
Description:
What is the Purdue Outing Club?

The Purdue Outing Club is involved with any activity that involves the outdoors. It is as a place for people who enjoy the outdoors to meet each other and have fun.  The club is open to Purdue University students as members, but we often communicate with past alumni and outdoor professionals across the country. 

Do I need Experience?

Nope! The Purdue Outing Club is geared towards beginners discovering the outdoor world and learning from others along the way.

How much does it cost? 

The club dues are $25 for one semester or $30 for the entire year. With a paid membership, you can join any official Outing Club trip with gear rental included!

Where Do We Meet?

Meetings are held Mondays at 7:00 PM at the Co Rec in the Howard Taylor Conference Room.  From the front entrance, instead of swiping in at the front desk, turn left directly before the front desk and walk down the hallway. The room will be on your left. Any changes to meeting times will be announced through the Slack. There are no meetings during the summer.

Name: Hunter Sports Centre
Description:
Sport is a big part of Australian culture and something we’re genuinely passionate about here at Hunter Sports Centre. 

It delivers multiple benefits, including teaching discipline and teamwork, bringing communities together, boosting the economy, and empowering people to lead happier, healthier lives – benefits we’re here to enable.   

Since opening our doors in 1999, we’ve been one of the Hunter region’s premier sporting venues, making sport possible for all. We also empower regional Australian talent and athletes to compete at a national and international level. 

Our Olympic-standard facilities at Glendale include:

•	Athletics centre with nine-lane Olympic running tracks and 10-lane main straight surfaced with Rektotan synthetic
•	Soccer field in the centre of the track
•	Gymnastics centre with 2448-square-metres of floor space
•	Weights areas for athletes and small group fitness clients
•	First aid/physiotherapy room
•	Lighting for night-time events
•	Wheelchair access to all areas and private wheelchair change rooms
•	Access for news crews with facilities for outside broadcast
•	Catering area with full kitchen facilities for functions
•	Parking for up to 240 vehicles

Works for our new up to $45 million state-of-the-art facility expansion will begin in 2022, with completion expected by 2023/24. 

Our expansion includes:

•	Three-storey sport and community centre extension (Stage 1 – 2022)
•	Warm-up facility and athlete testing building (Stage 2) 
•	NSW Trampoline Centre of Excellence (Stage 3) 

Working at Hunter Sports Centre is fun, challenging and rewarding. As well as getting to spend your days with a group of sport-loving people, you can also enjoy great benefits and play a part in nurturing Australia’s future sporting talent.  

Email: customerservice@hsc.org.au

Name: Five Star Swim School
Description:
Five Star Swim School is a family-owned and operated swim school that has been teaching children how to swim since 2010. We are committed to providing a safe and fun learning environment for all ages and abilities.

Five Star Swim School has experienced instructors who use a proven teaching method to help children learn to swim quickly and confidently. Our programs are specialized with a unique teaching style and methods, similar to the American Red Cross style of swim instruction - utilizing repetition of drills. Each class follows a routine that students get easily accustomed to.

We offer a variety of classes for all levels, from beginner to advanced, and private lessons for those who need extra help. Classes are divided by age and skill level. The infant classes start as early as 6 months - Parent & Child class (6:1 Ratio). Children aged 2.5 to 15 are grouped by age categories and separated into appropriate skill levels. With a student-to-instructor ratio of 3:1 in each class, your child will get plenty of attention.

We are proud to be a part of the community and committed to providing quality swim instruction to all children. Our program will help your child learn to swim safely and confidently while having fun at the same time.

Name: Mad Goats Paddling
Description:
What do crazy goats with kayaks have to do with paddling and sauna life, you wonder? The name Mad Goats was created when our CEO and founder, Tomas Hansson, walked in the mountains of New Zealand on a kayaking adventure. When he heard the wild goats bleat, he bleated right back and before he knew what had happened, he was part of the goat tribe - he has been bleating in inappropriate places ever since! 
Wild goats have the qualities we believe are important when kayaking and in life: They are strong, fun, adaptable, and tough. All the characteristic you need to get through this life in style - come join us!

Name: DKSA Deutsche KinderSportAkademie GmbH
Description:
Die Deutsche Kinder Sport Akademie (DKSA) steht für Spaß, Begeisterung und Freude an der Bewegung. Unser Ziel ist es, Kinder und Jugendliche langfristig für den Sport und eine gesunde, aktive Lebensweise zu begeistern.

Mit einem ganzheitlichen und nachhaltigen Konzept verbinden wir Sport, Bildung und Persönlichkeitsentwicklung. Denn Bewegung ist für uns mehr als Training – sie stärkt Teamgeist, Konzentration, Selbstvertrauen und soziale Kompetenzen.

Unsere vielfältigen Programme fördern Kinder und Jugendliche in unterschiedlichen Altersgruppen und Sportarten – von Fußball, Handball und Schwimmen bis hin zu sportübergreifenden Bewegungs- und Präventionsangeboten. Dabei legen wir großen Wert auf pädagogische Qualität, Sicherheit und Freude am gemeinsamen Erlebnis.

Die DKSA engagiert sich bundesweit in Camps, Schul- und Vereinskooperationen, Ganztagesangeboten sowie individuellen Projekten mit Unternehmen, Stiftungen und Kommunen.
Ob Feriencamps, Bewegungsinitiativen oder Bildungsprojekte – überall steht die Förderung von Bewegung, Gesundheit und sozialem Miteinander im Mittelpunkt.

Mit erfahrenen Trainer:innen, einem starken Netzwerk an Partnern und einer klaren Mission schaffen wir Räume, in denen Kinder lernen, wachsen und gemeinsam über sich hinauswachsen.

 Unsere Mission:
Bewegung fördern. Begeisterung wecken. Potenziale entfalten.
#dksabewegt

Name: Science in Soccer Conference
Description:
The goal of the Science in Soccer Conference (SiSC) is to broaden the understanding of science’s impact on our beautiful sport through the lens of an interdisciplinary approach. More specifically, the goal is to comprehend and inform how data sciences and theories impact our decision-making in our field.

The objectives for the SiSC are:
- Unite all supporters, participants, and roles in the game by connecting academic rigor with practical application.
- Highlight experts in the field through skill showcases and research sharing.
- Foster global student involvement with competitions that showcase knowledge and skills for potential employers.
- Offer introductory data science workshops using soccer-specific examples led by experts. 
- Encourage interdisciplinary collaboration and forge organic relationships through informal discussions.

 Date: 
12-13 May 2025

Location:
Wilmington, North Carolina @ UNCW Library Discovery Hall  

Tickets: 
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/science-in-soccer-conference-tickets-1139296178539

Name: Raqball Officiel
Description:
Le Raqball est un nouveau sport collectif de raquettes créé par le français Chris Oven. 

Sur un terrain de 20 mètres par 10, les joueurs (6 par équipe : 3 sur le terrain & 3 remplaçants) ont chacun une raquette dans la main, ils dribblent, passent, coopèrent et tirent vers la cible. 

Pour gagner, rien de plus simple : comptabiliser le plus de points et défendre sa cible face à l'équipe adverse !

Le Raqball est un sport accessible de l'enfant à l'athlète confirmé.

Name: Duin en Bos Bootcamp
Description:
Bootcamp heeft de naam dat het heel zwaar is en dat je er enorm voor getraind moet zijn. Mijn ervaring is dat het menselijk lichaam veel meer kan dan onze hersenen ons willen doen geloven. Ik bied een gevarieerde training waarbij op elk niveau deelgenomen kan worden. De oefeningen zijn aan te passen aan niveau, fysieke en mentale gesteldheid. Ook als je niet per se jouw grenzen wilt verleggen, maar gewoon lekker wilt bewegen, ben je van harte welkom bij de trainingen. 

Ik maak geen gebruik van materialen, behalve dat wat de omgeving ons biedt, zoals bankjes, bruggen, hekjes, heuvels, zandvlakte, boomstammen etc. etc.

We blijven niet op een plek, dus tussen de krachtoefeningen door verplaatsen we ons door middel van wandelen, dribbelen, hardlopen of sprinten.

Mijn trainingen gaan uit van de volgende drie speerpunten:
– Plezier
– Technisch goed uitvoeren van de oefeningen
– Verantwoord

Een uurtje bootcamp biedt onder andere de volgende voordelen: 
– Je bent in beweging; 
– Je bent in groepsverband aan het trainen, wat zorgt voor sociale interactie; 
– Je focust op de oefeningen, waardoor je niet denkt aan andere (negatieve) zaken; 
– Je bent even weg van je scherm (werkplek, mobiel, televisie).

Name: EMS International kft
Description:
EMS Leader was created to form a real community where our fuel is the passion for EMS FITNESS. Our main goal is to provide users with the best tips and ideas, as well as bringing the most wanted and needed components, cool accessories to give your training the unique look of your taste.
Every user is unique. We all know that looking for the same type of equipment does not mean that we have the same EMS device in mind or the same needs. There are studios, gyms who take out their equipment seven days a week, and others who give it a less intensive use, like home users. There are studios who prefer to invest in upgrading their accessories, while others prefer to have the latest device on the market; some are looking for maximum lightness when putting on the suit, while others are considering whether to have the more durable solution…
In the end, what's important is for the studio to be set up properly just how you want it: selecting from among different electrodes, cables, suits, etc. to choose those that best match the way you want to use your equipment.
Our objective is to make sure that you can run your business exactly the way you want and provide you with some extra cool accessories to make your studio even better.
Our mission is to spread out our passion for Ems business combined with the best design and high performance quality with a sharp modern look. A better training experience!
We look forward to connecting and collaborating with interested and enthusiastic ems equipment users to help spread the movement!
