Our mission is to create an environment that gives our users the feeling of victory as often as possible, to make them their most valuable player. The Real Winner. The Asli Vijayta.

Vijayi Bhawa is the daily fantasy sports offering of Mahaayana Labs, a digital sports-tech gaming, entertainment & marketing enterprise, est. in 2021.

Name: BeweegBasis - Develop4sport
Description:
Wij ontwikkelen beweegprofessionals om bij te dragen aan een leven lang actief bewegen.
Wij verzorgen trainingen, workshops en beweegprogramma's op het gebied van sport, bewegen en gezondheid.

Name: IVANGI move and dance GmbH
Description: Wir heißen euch herzlich Willkommen zu einer Vielfalt an Tanz, Bewegung und Unterhaltung.

Name: Sportily
Description:
We are creating a network of fun-loving sport and activity groups, where all children, young people, and their families can try different sports, make new friends and encounter the Christian faith with others.
CIMSPA Employer Partner.

Name: Zoar Outdoor
Description: Zoar Outdoor offers the best  in New England white water rafting trips, paddlesport clinics, zip line canopy tours and kayak rentals for adventurers of all abilities, from beginners to experts.  Based out of our convenient location in the Berkshires in western Massachusetts, Zoar Outdoor river trips, zip line canopy tours and instructional clinics are only 2 hours from Boston and Hartford and just 3 hours from Providence and New York City.

Name: Ready Set Gymnastics
Description:
Founded in 2020, Ready Set Gymnastics is a gymnastics program serving Northern Virginia, MD, and DC.  We offer gymnastics lessons, birthday parties, preschool enrichment classes, private lessons, and more! 

Our mission is to provide high-quality gymnastics instruction in a positive environment using skilled coaches who share our joy of the sport.

Our vision is to bring about a positive change in the sport of gymnastics in the communities we serve by prioritizing fun, safety, and well-being over medals or egos.

Name: GF Patinação Artística
Description:
Trabalhamos promovendo a Patinação Artístcia como aula extracurricular nas escolas para crianças de 4 a 12 anos.
Primeira empresa de Patinação Artística credenciada no Gympass.
Oferecemos aulas particulares personalizadas..

Name: Swimwise
Description:
Innovative mobile swimming solutions for schools, cities, and local communities.

We design, build and operate movable swimming pools (Swimcube & Swimclad) and provide professional swim programs for all ages.
Making swimming accessible, local and sustainable. Anytime, anywhere.

Name: The Crux Grimsby
Description:
The Crux Grimsby – Climb. Connect. Community.

The Crux Grimsby is an independent indoor climbing and bouldering concept currently in development for North East Lincolnshire. Our vision is to create a modern, accessible space that brings people together through movement, challenge, and community.

More than just a climbing wall, The Crux will be a social hub designed to promote fitness, confidence, and connection. From complete beginners to experienced climbers, we aim to offer inclusive facilities, professional coaching, youth programmes, and community partnerships that inspire an active lifestyle.

Located within the historic Victoria Mill site (feasibility in progress), The Crux will combine the area’s industrial heritage with modern design to create something truly unique for the region. The project is being built on strong local research and demand, responding to a growing interest in adventure sports and wellbeing experiences across the UK.

Our mission is simple:
Build a space that challenges people physically, connects them socially, and strengthens the local community.

We’re currently developing financial models, feasibility studies, and partnerships with skilled professionals in marketing, finance, and leisure management to prepare for the next stage of planning and investment.

Whether you’re a climber, local business, or potential collaborator, The Crux Grimsby is about more than walls — it’s about building something lasting for the community.

In development. Coming soon to Grimsby.
 thecruxgrimsby@hotmail.com
 Grimsby, North East Lincolnshire
#ClimbConnectCommunity #TheCruxGrimsby #ClimbingGym #CommunityBusiness #Grimsby

Name: Mission Club
Description: Mission Club is a multi-sports education company operating across Karnataka and Tamil Nadu, committed to delivering quality sports training and fitness programs. With a presence in 25+ schools, 40+ residential societies, and 15+ dedicated centers, Mission Club is shaping the next generation of athletes through structured coaching in skating, football, cricket, gymnastics, and more.

Name: Instituto Próxima Geração
Description:
Instituto Próxima Geração (IPG) - Transformando Vidas por Meio do Tênis e da Educação

Fundado em 2018 pelo ex-tenista profissional Mauro Menezes e pelo técnico de tênis Douglas Santana, o Instituto Próxima Geração (IPG) tem como missão criar oportunidades e transformar a vida de jovens de diferentes comunidades, utilizando o tênis como ferramenta de inclusão e desenvolvimento social.
 
Com o objetivo de formar campeões dentro e fora das quadras, o IPG impacta centenas de jovens anualmente, com cinco sedes em quatro estados do Brasil. Proporcionamos um ambiente que promove o crescimento pessoal e social, onde o esporte vai além das quadras. Nossa formação inclui aulas de tênis, acompanhamento de preparadores físicos, psicólogos, orientação nutricional e cursos complementares como arbitragem e inglês. Nosso compromisso é transformar vidas e gerar impacto positivo na sociedade por meio da educação e do esporte.

A credibilidade do IPG tem se consolidado ao longo dos anos, fruto do compromisso com a excelência e do cumprimento rigoroso das exigências do Ministério do Esporte. Esse empenho tem assegurado a regulamentação anual de nossos projetos. Além disso, a transparência e a gestão responsável dos recursos, por meio da Lei de Incentivo ao Esporte, têm ampliado nosso impacto positivo na vida de crianças e jovens em todo o Brasil.

Junte-se a nós e seja parte dessa transformação!

Name: CREPS AUVERGNE-RHÔNE-ALPES Vallon Pont d’Arc • Voiron • Lyon
Description:
Des missions au service de tous les sportifs et sportives

Formation, haut niveau, développement du sport, jeunesse et éducation populaire, les domaines d’intervention du Creps sont multiples et s’adressent à tous les acteurs du sport. Ses missions répondent à sa vocation d’opérateur des politiques publiques du ministère chargé des Sports et de la Région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.

Attachés à la qualité du service public ses agents sont investis dans le développement de la dimension éducative des pratiques sportives qui est une composante historique de l’établissement.

Trois sites complémentaires

Le Creps est implanté à Voiron en Isère, à la croisée des Alpes et de grandes métropoles, à Lyon, entouré de sportifs et sportives de haut niveau et à Vallon Pont d’Arc en Ardèche, terre des sports et loisirs de nature.

Name: Community Sailing New Orleans
Description: COMMUNITY SAILING NEW ORLEANS INC is a 501c3 organization providing accessible educational and recreational sailing opportunities on Lake Pontchartrain for people of all ages, backgrounds, and abilities.

Name: Cantegril Country Club
Description:
Con una larga trayectoria, el Cantegril Country Club es un referente en lo social, cultural, deportivo y turístico para Punta del Este, Uruguay y la región. 

A través de diversos tipos de Membresías el Club brinda a sus socios el disfrute de una amplia variedad de deportes y actividades culturales, con la libertad de armar su rutina en el día y horario que prefieran. 

Abierto todos los días, de lunes a domingo, el club invita a vivir experiencias inigualables en un entorno de familia y amistad.

10 Canchas de tenis de polvo de ladrillo 
3 Piscinas (dos exteriores, una interior climatizada)
Sala de musculación y aparatos 
Frontón pelota paleta
Salones de fitness y spinning y diversas disciplinas 
Sector juegos para niños
Cancha multiuso de césped sintético para futbol y hockey
Campo de Golf de 18 hoyos, Driving Range, Casilla de Palos, sector de iniciación al golf y jaulas de practica
Pista de equitación
Servicio de cantina y restaurant en ambas Sedes
Vestuarios, Estacionamiento y WiFi en todas las instalaciones

Name: CRAQUES DA VIDA
Description:
Nossa missão social se dá no combate estabelecido pela ONU contra a pobreza e lutas esclarecidas na agenda 21. Trabalhamos com a educação popular através do Esporte e da Cultura.
Visando estimular aspectos pessoais,
sociais, emocionais e cognitivos, além de uma educação integral,
indubitavelmente as atividades desenvolvidas exercem um papel fundamental na formação desses jovens. Além disso, oferecer atividades construtivas e agregadoras e proporcionar um ambiente seguro e acolhedor exerce uma função relevante na diminuição do tempo ocioso que esses jovens possam passar na rua, expostos à uma maior vulnerabilidade.

Name: UniChess
Description:
Unichess nasce dall’unione di due percorsi e da una forte amicizia: quella tra il Grande Maestro Roberto Mogranzini e la Dott.ssa Nadia Ottavi. Dall’esperienza di Roberto, prima come giocatore, poi come allenatore e formatore, e dalle competenze manageriali di Nadia, è nato il sogno di costruire insieme un punto di riferimento per il mondo degli scacchi in Italia e all’estero.
Fondata nel 2018 come Università degli Scacchi – FIDE Academy (un titolo prestigioso conferito dalla Federazione Internazionale a meno di 50 accademie nel mondo), Unichess ha ampliato la propria attività fino a diventare oggi protagonista nell’organizzazione di eventi scacchistici internazionali e nazionali, sia a livello agonistico che culturale.
La nostra missione è aumentare la visibilità e la diffusione degli scacchi, creando nuovi format e continuando a investire nella formazione: nelle scuole, nelle aziende attraverso percorsi di formazione manageriale, e in ambito culturale e sociale. In questo percorso abbiamo partecipato anche a due progetti Erasmus, contribuendo a portare il valore educativo e inclusivo degli scacchi in contesti internazionali.
Ma il nostro sguardo va oltre il presente. Vogliamo che gli scacchi diventino sempre più popolari, parte viva e condivisa del patrimonio culturale. Ogni iniziativa che realizziamo oggi non è solo un evento o un progetto: è un seme che cresce, un tassello di una visione più grande. Vogliamo lasciare alle generazioni future una legacy fatta di passione, conoscenza e opportunità, perché gli scacchi possano continuare a ispirare, unire e formare donne e uomini di domani.
Con una vocazione particolare per l’organizzazione di grandi eventi scacchistici, Unichess contribuisce non solo alla crescita del movimento scacchistico, ma anche alla creazione di un importante indotto sportivo e turistico nei territori che ospitano le nostre iniziative.

Name: La Fédération Française du Milieu Montagnard
Description:
Fédération omnisport fondée en 1978, engagée dans la promotion des activités de montagne tout en sensibilisant son public à la protection des écosystèmes montagnards et ruraux. Nous avons pour mission de former et d’accompagner les passionnés de randonnée et de nature à travers des initiatives respectueuses de l’environnement. Membre du Conseil Social du Mouvement Sportif et de la Fédération Française des Clubs Omnisport, nous sommes une association reconnue d’utilité publique, signataire du contrat d’engagement républicain.
Créée en 1978, notre fédération a su se forger une identité forte au fil des années, en formant des passionnés à travers des stages variés, organisés dans le massif central, les Vosges, les Alpes et le plateau des Millevaches. Chaque année, nous proposons neuf stages en présentiel, qui ont pour but d’obtenir le Brevet Fédéral d’Accompagnateur de Randonnée Pédestre. Ces formations allient un apprentissage technique de niveau 1 à un stage pratique de qualification de niveau 2, permettant ainsi à nos adhérents de devenir des acteurs éclairés de la randonnée. La formation de niveau 2 intègre un module consacré à la découverte et à la sensibilisation des écosystèmes montagnards.
Une formation de niveau 3, essentiellement axée sur l’environnement est en cours d’inscription au RNCP.
Nos formations reçoivent la certification Qualiopi.
Avec près de 1600 membres et plus de 5000 brevets d'Accompagnateur de Randonnée Pédestre délivrés, la FFMM regroupe aujourd’hui une soixantaine de clubs et associations auxquels nous proposons une licence assurance Carte Montagne très avantageuse. Nous sommes fiers de notre parcours et de la passion que nous transmettons pour la montagne et son environnement. 
Notre pôle « Environnement » joue également un rôle essentiel, proposant des séjours de découverte sur des thèmes de la Faune, la Flore et les forêts et la Géologie.

Name: INSTITUTO SUPERIOR DE DEPORTES
Description: El Instituto Superior de Deportes creado el 30 de Agosto de 1963 con el objetivo de formar recursos humanos cualificados destinados al campo del deporte y la actividad física, tiene la satisfacción de presentar su cuerpo docente, integrado por profesionales de reconocida trayectoria académica y con extensa actuación en el mundo del deporte.
Location: Ciudad Autonoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Nostalgym
Description: Heb je zin om te bewegen, niet in een sportschool, maar zoals vroeger tijdens de gym? Het nostalgische gevoel ophalen van het ontwijken van trefballen, slingeren aan de touwen of het slaan van een homerun tijdens slagbal? Wees dan slim en boek je eerste les bij Nostalgym!

Name: Whiteboard Sports / MyHockeyIQ
Description: Empowering youth hockey players to have fun achieving their potential with a simple AI driven platform for coaches and athletes to design and share team and player specific content, extending learning beyond the ice to capture a youth athletes development over a lifetime.

Name: ProsToYou Tennis
Description:
ProsToYou is the Mid-Atlantic's all-in-one racquet sports provider, serving communities with the highest quality programming, management support, and court maintenance services. 

Our coaches, holding the highest certifications in their field, possess decades of experience teaching players of all levels, while our leadership team has a proven track record of success in all facets of the racquet sports industry. 

For each our partners, PTY is committed to providing tailored programs that supports each student to achieve their very best while staying active and healthy for a lifetime.

Name: Guyan’Emploi 973
Description:
Initié par l’APROSEP, la mairie de Saint-Laurent du Maroni et les associations de Guyane prêtes à s’engager ensemble dans la mise en place de nouvelles formes d’organisation de l’emploi, le G.E. PROFESSION SPORT & LOISIRS Guyane démontre une volonté de :

consolider les emplois mis en place
mieux organiser l’emploi dans l’intérêt des salarié, des bénévoles et des adhérents
améliorer la qualité de leurs services et développer des services nouveaux
Ce Groupement d’Employeurs s’intègre dans le disposition PROFESSION SPORT & LOISIRS. 

D’abord installé à Saint-Laurent du Maroni, le GE a vu son activité se développer sur l’ensemble du territoire Guyanais.

Nos missions :

MUTUALISER :

en mettant un même salarié à disposition de plusieurs association
pour simplifier la gestion des ressources humaines
pour développer et consolider l’emploi associatif
PROFESSIONNALISER :

en assistant des clubs et associations dans la création et la gestion d’emploi stables
en aidant à la recherche et à la création de fonds en vue de financer les poste
pour accompagner vers l’autonomie en termes de portage d’emploi
QUALIFIER 

en accompagnant les salariés à la définition et à la réalisation de leur projet professionnel
en proposant aux salariés recruté des formations qualifiantes et/ou certifiantes en adéquation avec leur poste actuel et leurs projets professionnels

Name: Wukong Parkour Point
Description: Wukong Parkour Point es el lugar perfecto para iniciar y progresar en tu entrenamiento de parkour al lado de grandes coaches y excepcionales instalaciones!

Name: Stichting Koprol
Description: Koprol is een sportorganisatie voor iedereen die niet terecht kan of wil bij een reguliere sportgroep. Koprol biedt sport op maat onder professionele begeleiding. Onze begeleiders zijn bewegingsagogen, fysiotherapeuten, psychomotorische therapeuten en zwemcoaches en zij worden ingezet passend bij de betreffende sport. We streven naar een sportieve leefstijl voor iedereen, en daarmee bedoelen we echt iedereen. We zijn een maatschappelijk betrokken organisatie en werken samen met allerlei partijen in het sociaal domein. Onze deelnemers beleven naast het sporten ook plezier aan samenzijn en het uitwisselen van ervaringen op verschillende gebieden. Koprol, als sporten op maat beter bij je past!

Name: MM Academy
Description:
En MM Academy, ayudamos a jugadores de todos los niveles a mejorar su juego con una metodología de entrenamiento basada en la experiencia y la innovación. 

Gracias a la experiencia adquirida por Manu Martín, entrenador de referencia en el pádel profesional, nuestra academia combina técnica, táctica y preparación mental para maximizar el rendimiento en la pista.

 Lo que hacemos:

 Entrenamiento profesional: programas adaptados a cada jugador.
 Formación para entrenadores: mejora tu metodología con nuestro enfoque.
 Academias oficiales MM Academy: expandimos nuestro método a nivel nacional e internacional.
 MM Experience: eventos exclusivos y experiencias únicas de pádel.
Team Building: fortalecemos equipos a través del pádel, combinando deporte y diversión. 

 MM Academy ya está presente en varias ciudades y seguimos creciendo. Si quieres formar parte de nuestra expansión, contáctanos.

Name: AQUA ONE Dive | PADI 5 Star IDC
Description:
Welcome to AQUA ONE Dive, your premier destination for scuba diving and underwater exploration! As a PADI 5 Star IDC Resort, we offer an unparalleled diving experience for enthusiasts of all levels.
At AQUA ONE Dive, we are more than just a scuba diving company; we are passionate ocean enthusiasts dedicated to providing the ultimate underwater experience. Our dive center is located in the breathtaking coastal paradise of Phuket, known for its crystal-clear waters, vibrant marine life, and diverse underwater landscapes.
We are proud to be a PADI 5 Star Instructor Development Center, which means we uphold the highest standards of professionalism and safety. Our certified PADI instructors will guide you through your scuba journey, whether you're just starting out or looking to advance your skills. We provide a full range of PADI scuba diving courses from beginner to professional level. 
If you are looking to do some fun diving, then we are definitely the place to be. Join our experienced guides on incredible underwater adventures at Racha Island, Phi Phi Island, King Cruiser Wreck, Similan Island, and our beautiful local dive sites while learning about the marine ecosystems and the importance of conservation. Embark on unforgettable dive vacations and explore the best diving with a group of like-minded enthusiasts.
AQUA ONE Dive is committed to preserving the underwater world we love. Join us in our conservation efforts and discover how you can make a positive impact on the oceans. Whether you're seeking adventure, serenity, or a newfound appreciation for marine life, AQUA ONE Dive offers you the best experience like no other. We are truly the ultimate boutique dive experience.

Name: Playground
Description:
Vi var de kidsa som ikke ble helt frelst på fotball eller håndball, men som utfoldet og utfordret oss selv på andre arenaer. Som fant mestring og inkludering i den uorganiserte idretten. Som drømte om en gigantisk hall hvor vi kunne klatre, skate og herje som vi selv ville.

Playground er stedet vi drømte om da vi var kids. Vi samler actionsport under samme tak, og skaper gode og trygge rammer for kidsa som kommer etter oss. Vi organiserer det uorganiserte.

Målet er ikke å bygge en destinasjon. Det er å bygge kultur.

Name: Tricademy - School of Movement GmbH
Description:
Wir sind der Ansicht, dass Sport und Gesundheit einander ergänzen und unterstützen sollten. Deshalb lassen wir in unsere Arbeit stets alle Aspekte des Lebens mit einfliessen. Es ist uns wichtig, dass unsere Kundinnen und Kunden nicht nur ihre sportlichen Ziele erreich, sondern dass sie dabei auch ihre Gesundheit fördern. Gehen wir achtsam mit diesen Dingen um, stehen uns alle Türen offen. Ganz nach unserem Motto: 
...be ready to surprise yourself!

Menschlichkeit, grosse Neugier und der Wille, das absolut Beste aus Sport und Gesundheit herauszuholen: diese Dinge verbinden wir, Fabian Kremser und Patrick Benz, mit gemeinsam über 25 Jahren Erfahrung im Spitzen-, Leistungs- und Profisport.

All das lassen wir auch in unsere Arbeit mit den Kundinnen und Kunden der Tricademy einfliessen. Wir vertreten die Ansicht, dass Sport niemals auf Kosten der Gesundheit getrieben werden sollte. Deshalb gilt bei uns jederzeit: Deine Ziele sind unsere Ziele. Ob du deine ersten 5km am Stück laufen möchtest oder es dein Traum ist, Profisportlerin / Profisportler zu werden, spielt für uns keine Rolle: wir holen dich da ab, wo du es brauchst und gehen mit dir jeden Schritt bis zum Ziel!

Name: W4 Youth
Description:
Since its humble beginnings in 2009, W4 Youth has evolved into a force for positive change in West London, becoming an established Charity in 2011. 

Today, we're embarking on our most ambitious project yet: the creation of a  Youth & Community Centre in Southfield Recreation Ground in Acton.

Currently, our dedicated team operates out of a vibrant Youth Hub located on the very site where our new Centre will rise. From Tuesday to Friday, between 4-8 pm, the Hub buzzes with energy and creativity. We offer a dynamic range of activities—Football, Basketball, Street Dance, Drama, Music, and more—designed to ignite the passions of young people aged 11-19.

Our mission is simple yet vital: to provide a safe, inspiring space where youth can learn, grow and thrive. 

Now, as we raise the funds needed to make this vision a reality, we invite you to join us in shaping the future of our community.

Together we can change lives!

Name: Protect & Defend B.V.
Description:
Het is niet voor niets dat steeds meer mensen Krav Maga beoefenen. Met toenemende dreigingen en intimidatie in allerlei vormen is een grote mond niet altijd voldoende. Krav Maga leert je jezelf te verdedigen en maakt je in korte tijd weerbaar(der), zelfverzekerd en bewust.

Wil jij…

jezelf leren verdedigen tegen geweld of bedreigingen?
weerbaarder worden in een relatief korte tijd?
fysiek én mentaal sterker worden?
je angsten overwinnen en je zelfvertrouwen ontwikkelen?
duidelijk NEE kunnen zeggen en op je strepen staan?
technieken leren en tegelijkertijd werken aan je conditie?
weten wat je moet doen als iemand je wurgt of met een mes aanvalt?
jezelf tegen meerdere aanvallers verdedigen?
Wij leren mensen van alle leeftijden en achtergronden sterk in hun schoenen te staan. Middels ’s werelds best geteste zelfverdedigingsmethodes en trainingsprincipes brengen we jouw fysieke en mentale kracht naar topniveau. We verleggen je grenzen en verrijken jouw welzijn door gezonder te leven, beter te bewegen, je zelfvertrouwen en persoonlijke kracht te verruimen en je gevoel van veiligheid te vergroten.

Daarnaast leveren de trainingen meer zelfvertrouwen, zelfdiscipline en doorzettingsvermogen op. Je traint de regie te pakken en te bepalen hoe de situatie eindigt. Krav Maga leert je veilig thuiskomen en sterker in je schoenen te staan. Het is een compleet pakket van fysieke en mentale beheersing in bedreigende en gevaarlijke situaties

Name: SPORTS LOVERS
Description:
Work out anywhere, anytime. Discover the many benefits of working out at home. With an experienced personal trainer. Sportslovers.com is great for anyone at any level with any goal! Start today and get instant access to all the videos.
Want to join Sports Lovers?

Name: Zlatibor basket
Description: Priča je počela davne 1976. godine na obroncima Zlatibora, planine smeštene u srcu zapadne Srbije, području izuzetne klime, vode i raznovrsnog biljnog sveta u kojem dominiraju borovi i jedna raritetna vrsta “zlatnog bora” po kome je ova planina i dobila ime. I poput zlatnih borova , retkih i vrednih u svom okruženju, iz podnožja ove planine počeo je da buja jedan drugi svet – košarkaški. U početku stidljivo, kao kamp u kome će svoje prve košarkaške korake napraviti što više dečaka i devojčica iz tadašnje Jugoslavije, da bi ubrzo postao internacionalni. Sredinom 90- tih prerastao je u Sportsko društvo “Junior”, a od 2003. godine nosi naziv Akademski košarkaški kamp “Profesor Aleksandar Nikolić” .

Name: Snowsports Nederland
Description:
Skileraar opleidingen en snowboardleraar opleidingen.

Snowsports Nederland biedt opleidingen aan via Oostenrijkse skileraarverbanden en biedt daarbij begeleiding, trainingen en cursussen aan die het behalen van het diploma bevorderen.

Name: Manu Ledesma Academy
Description:
Manu Ledesma Academy, located in Blue Ash, Cincinnati, is dedicated to nurturing young soccer talent through top-tier training and comprehensive educational programs. 
Our mission is to develop well-rounded athletes who excel both on and off the field. 

Join us for an unparalleled soccer experience and be part of the future of the sport. 

 #MLAcademy #SoccerExcellence #TrainWithTheBest

Name: ROOTS Premium Gym
Description:
Roots Premium Gym, gevestigd in Utrecht, is meer dan alleen een sportschool - het is een levendige gemeenschap gewijd aan persoonlijke groei en welzijn.
Met onze 3 locaties en onze buitenruimte bieden we:

De Box:
De Box op de Tractieweg (Utrecht) is onze gym, waar wij groepslessen, personal training en kleine groepstrajecten geven voor leden en zakelijke klanten.
Bij onze groepslessen wordt rekening gehouden met ieders niveau en persoonlijke aandacht, flexibiliteit en gezelligheid staan bij ons hoog in het vaandel. Wij bieden PowerFit, UltimateFit, BarbellFit, Olympic weightlifting, Strongfit, Calisthenics en Bootcamp trainingen aan.
Personal Training is inclusief metingen, je eigen schema's en veel persoonlijke aandacht. 
We bieden ook onze Be Your Best 8-weken/6-maanden trajecten aan. Deze trajecten zijn een combinatie van groepslessen en personal training, in een vaste groep met een vaste trainer 2x/per week samen trainen.

De Studio:
Bij de Studio van ROOTS op de Vlampijpstraat (Utrecht) kun je terecht voor een ruim aanbod in yogalessen, mobility trainingen en sportmassages. De locatie is perfect om te ontstressen en tijdens de lessen te bouwen aan de flexibiliteit en kracht van jouw lichaam en geest. Wij bieden de volgende lessen aan: Hatha, Vinyasa, Pilates,, Animal Flow en mobility trainingen.

Teambuilding:
ROOTS teambuilding is de beste plek van Utrecht voor jouw teambuilding activiteiten om elkaar (nog) beter te leren kennen. Stap uit jouw normale omgeving en laat alle gebruikelijke rollen en functies los. Zo zie je ieders karakter in een nieuw licht en bouw je een sterkere band met jouw team! Wij creëren een teambuildingdag voor je bedrijf of je sportteam op basis van je teamwensen.

Name: THE:REFEREE
Description:
Wir sind mehr als nur Unparteiische auf dem Spielfeld.
Wir sind Entscheidungsträger in Echtzeit, Profis unter Druck, Kommunikatoren auf Augenhöhe – und Menschen mit Charakter.

Als erfahrene Schiedsrichter bringen wir Klarheit, Integrität und Verantwortung dorthin, wo es drauf ankommt – ob auf dem Platz, auf der Bühne oder in der Öffentlichkeit.
Ob als Speaker, Markenbotschafter oder in der Medienarbeit: Wir stehen für Authentizität, Glaubwürdigkeit und den Blick für das Wesentliche.

Gemeinsam mit starken Partnern entwickeln wir neue Perspektiven.

Name: Segelschule Thunersee
Description: Wir sind die älteste und grösste Segelschule der Schweiz. Natürlich lernst du bei uns Segeln, von de ersten Erfahrung auf dem Thunersee, bis zum Hochseeschein. Segeln ist aber weit mehr. Es eignet sich fürs Teambuilding und als Firmenevent.

Name: ViSi Sports
Description:
ViSi Sports is een onderscheidende voetbalschool gespecialiseerd in motorische vaardigheden en fundamenteel bewegen. ViSi Sports is geen voetbaltechnische voetbalschool of keepersschool, maar ViSi Sports focust zich op het sport specifiek bewegen van de voetballer en keeper. In onze visie leer je voetbal techniek en keepen bij de club en voetbal specifiek bewegen bij ons.

Met onze jarenlange kennis op het gebied van trainen op motorische vaardigheden en fundamenteel bewegen, voetbaltechniek, scouting en transferzaken proberen we je verder te helpen in de voetballerij. Jouw intrinsieke motivatie en mentaliteit speelt daarbij de belangrijkste rol, wij geven de handvaten, maar zonder motivatie, inzet en mentaliteit is het onmogelijk het maximale te bereiken.

We begeleiden je bij trainingen, blessures, transferzaken en geven, op verzoek, trainingen aan groepen. We begeleiden en adviseren enkel spelers en keepers die ook bij ons in training zijn.

ViSi Sports bestaat uit de volgende onderdelen;

ViSi Sports Training
ViSi Sports Recovery
ViSi Sports Management
ViSi Sports Events

https://www.visisports.nl/

Name: Legends Sports Academy HK
Description:
Legends Sports Academy is a multidisciplinary sports academy based in Hong Kong. We have a particular and unique approach to youth sports development, offering football classes to kids (2.5 to 12 years old) and private swimming classes for all ages. Our program gives all our students an excellent and balanced sports development curriculum.
 
We aim to contribute to the development of sports in Hong Kong with our expertise and provide an opportunity for Sports to be accessible to all.

Name: Tennis Squad Ltd
Description: We're a group of like-minded professionals delivering award-winning club, coaching, competition and consultancy services with partner clubs in South Wales.

Name: Soft Hands Hockey League
Description: The Soft Hands Hockey League provides an optimal, revolutionary, roller hockey experience for all skill levels. Through combining high-energy gameplay with video production & social media; league highlights, news, and electrifying content come alive in a digital space. Acting as the first of its kind, the SHHL creates a world where recreational roller hockey meets entertainment.

Name: BUBBLES Kids Club
Description:
Bubbles Kids Club est un concept innovant de club multi-activités pour les enfants de 4 mois à 12 ans. Bubbles offre un panel complet d’activités dans une ambiance ludique et chaleureuse. Mêlant plaisir et santé, le club propose des prestations de qualité allant de la Gym au Judo, en passant par la Danse et les Arts Martiaux. Sans oublier, la Motricité, la Baby Gym, les activités Montessori, et les activités créatives.

LES COURS :
-	Gymnastique, dans un studio entièrement aménagé et sécurisé avec du matériel de qualité
-	Danse princesse, un cours entièrement pensé pour les petites filles
-	Danse classique dès 3 ans, une activité à la fois artistique et sportive
-	Judo, dès 3 ans : une éducation physique amusante et attrayante
-	Bose, en plein essor dans le monde du sport
-	Arts & Crafts : des ateliers d’éveil artistique permettant de soutenir la motricité fine, tout en stimulant la créativité et l’imagination
-	Activités Montessori, pédagogie éducative qui repose sur le concept selon lequel l’enfant est libre de choisir ses activités

ORGANISATION D’ANNIVERSAIRES ET EVENTS :
Intérieur et extérieur, prix sur demande
Privatisation de l’établissement pendant 2 heures, Animation et encadrement des enfants par 2 animateurs, Accès à l’aire de jeux et aux machines de musculation, Une activité sportive de 1 heure, Gâteau d’anniversaire (selon le pack choisi), Cartons d’invitations imprimés avec enveloppe, Party bags, Arche de ballons décorative, Décoration de table thématique, Ballons gonflés à l’Hélium

GARDERIE :
Tous les mercredis, à la journée ou demi-journée, à partir de 4 ans

AIRE DE JEUX :
Les tout-petits ont accès à une zone de jeux entièrement sécurisée. Les plus grands pourront s’amuser dans notre espace machines (pour les enfants de 5 à 8 ans)

STAGES VACANCES :
Des stages thématiques sont proposés aux enfants pendant toutes les vacances scolaires

BABY-SITTING : 
Sur réservation pour les enfants de plus de 4 ans.

Name: FB CURVES 3D GYM
Description:
In today’s high-performance sports environment, seeing is understanding. Visualisation has become one of the most powerful tools for learning, and our fully interactive 3D platform takes this to the next level.

Our platform delivers exceptionally accurate 3D representations of gymnastics and trampoline skills straight from the Code of Points. With the ability to rotate, zoom, slow down, and view movements from multiple angles, complex elements become clear, accessible, and easy to understand.

Whether you are a gymnast/trampolinist refining technique, a coach developing smarter teaching methods, or a judge sharpening evaluation skills, our tools accelerate learning and deepen understanding. By transforming how skills are seen and analysed, our videos and apps help unlock performance potential and bring gymnastics and trampolining to life like never before.

Name: Orston Shooting Ground
Description:
Located just outside Nottingham in the Vale of Belvoir – 10 minutes from the A1 and 15 minutes from the A46; easily accessible from London, North-east and the Midlands. Ample hard-standing car parks; gravel pathways for easy access around the entire ground with full disabled access on the grounds and clubhouse. Fully stocked Gun Shop with over 200+ guns in stock, shotgun cartridges, shotgun accessories, shooting accessories, and a huge range of Country Clothing.

Our ever-expanding layouts consists of 13 sporting stands over 53 acres, game shooting arena that includes 2 High Towers ranging up to 100ft as well as a grouse butt, two Down-the-Line (DTL) layouts, 2 Skeet layouts, ABT Layout & Sport Trap Layout.

We are set within a manicured piece of Nottinghamshire countryside with gravel pathways to guide you around the course and layouts; a welcoming clubhouse to relax in with full catering facilities and licensed bar. 

You will never be disappointed with the vast array of different targets we offer with the sporting targets being changed every week.

We also have a tuition sporting course that is perfect for beginners and where we host most of our groups and party shoot days.

The Ground is available for individual practice with self-timer release clay traps (Promatic Claymate). Tuition is available with any of our friendly and fully qualified coaches, or to advise on try guns and fitting from the Gun Shop. 

It’s also the perfect venue for Corporate events and Stag or Hen parties.

We host local and national competitions and events throughout the year, including Ladie's Days and Young Shot’s Days – please check our website for more details.

Name: NEXT-GEN Blueprint Basketball
Description:
NEXT-GEN Blueprint Basketball is a transformative player development program dedicated to empowering generations of highly disciplined, skilled, and purpose-driven athletes—both on and off the court. Our mission is to shape future leaders through a comprehensive blueprint that combines elite basketball training, character development, and life mentorship.

At NEXT-GEN, we go beyond the game. We instill core values such as discipline, resilience, teamwork, and accountability, ensuring that every athlete grows not only in skill, but also in mindset and purpose. Whether you're an emerging player or an advanced competitor, our program is designed to unlock full potential through structured training, mental toughness, and holistic growth.

With a firm belief in building legacies, NEXT-GEN Blueprint Basketball prepares athletes to excel in sports, lead in their communities, and succeed in life. We are not just developing better players—we are developing better people.

Name: PICTURIDE
Description:
Picturide est la référence du coaching en ligne pour les sports de glisse, aquatiques et urbains.
Wingfoil, windsurf, kitesurf, surf, skate, paddle… Progresse dans ta discipline grâce à des coachs pros sélectionnés pour leur expertise et leur pédagogie.

Ton coach de glisse, dans ta poche.
Envoie les vidéos de tes sessions — filmées par toi ou par un proche — et reçois une analyse technique personnalisée, avec annotations, corrections ciblées et conseils concrets.
Pose toutes tes questions matos ou réglages à ton coach, quand tu veux, sans prise de rendez-vous.
Un coaching expert, flexible, accessible.

Name: Kensington & Chelsea Gymnastics Academy
Description:
At Kensington & Chelsea Gymnastics Academy, we provide premium, boutique gymnastics coaching for children in London’s most exclusive borough.

Our sessions run in small groups (1:4 ratio) and through personalised 1:1 coaching, ensuring every child receives the attention they deserve. Classes are held at St Philip’s Church (W8), More House School (SW1), The Kensington Studio, or directly at clients’ homes.

 Our Mission
To help children discover the joy of gymnastics, building confidence, strength, and lifelong health.

 Our Vision
To make the Kensington & Chelsea Gymnastics Academy a recognised symbol of excellence in children’s health and fitness — combining world-class coaching with scientific expertise.

 About the Founder
Dr. Stefan Kolimechkov (Coach Stefan) is a 3-time London Gymnastics Champion, PhD in Physical Education, and published researcher with peer-reviewed articles on gymnastics and children’s fitness. His work has been presented at international scientific conferences, making Kensington Gymnastics one of the only academies in the UK led by a coach-researcher.

 Why Families Choose Us
	•	Exclusive, boutique environment in Kensington & Chelsea
	•	Best coach–student ratio in London (1:4)
	•	Evidence-based coaching backed by scientific research
	•	Personalised experiences for every child

 Learn more and explore our published research at: https://kensington-gymnastics.uk

Name: Agility Golf
Description:
Créée en 2009 par Laurent de MIOL, à la fois professionnel de golf et artiste sculpteur, Agility Golf intervient dans 3 domaines spécifiques : 

 La création/conception personnalisée et réalisation d’espaces de golf en intérieur ou extérieur. 
Vous avez envie de faire plaisir à vos collaborateurs golfeur ou non ? Nous gérons l’implantation d’un centre d'entrainement sur mesure au sein même de votre entreprise ou de votre établissement et assurons le programme de développement de ce lieu.  

 La gestion de l’enseignement et de l’entrainement de joueurs de tous niveaux. 
Nous organisons des cours collectifs, d’entrainements personnalisés et de parcours accompagnés, en abonnement à l’année, au trimestre ou ponctuel. 
Nous possédons un laboratoire mobile d’analyse du mouvement de golf équipé des dernières technologies (Trackman,Smart2Move, Allyane, Sam Puttlab). Accompagné de notre équipe d’experts, ces outils permettent aux néophytes de progresser rapidement et durablement et aux très bons joueurs de perfectionner leur jeu de golf.

 L’organisation d’évènements et de journées découvertes. 
Grâce à nos concepts et à nos installations entièrement modulables, le golf peut être pratiqué sur tout type de surfaces et d’espaces. Nous permettons la découverte et la pratique d’une nouvelle activité physique de proximité ouverte à tous et intergénérationnelle.   
Les sculptures golf créées par Laurent de MIOL, sont uniques au monde. Installées lors d’évènement elles allient le design et le jeu du golf.  

Toutes nos prestations sont encadrées par une équipe de professionnels spécialisés dans les domaines de l’apprentissage.

 Visitez notre site, rejoignez-nous et n’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour tout renseignement !

Description:
Global Training Formation est un organisme de formation et centre de formation d’apprentis (CFA) créé le 01/10/2007 qui propose de se former ou de se perfectionner dans les métiers du sport. Habilité par la Délégation Régionale Académique à la Jeunesse, à l’Engagement et aux Sports (DRAJES) d’Ile De France et  évalué conforme au Référentiel nationnal qualitité QUALIOPI pour les Actions de formation et actions de formation par apprentissage.

Description: We are a 360°service sport agency equipped for the digital age. We stand apart from traditional sports agencies by combining innovative perspectives, creative ideas, and seamless end-to-end execution in every project we undertake.

Name: Junior Basketball Academy (JBA)
Description:
At Junior Basketball Academy, we’re dedicated to nurturing not just the athlete, but the individual. Our skills classes on weekends and school holiday camps are more than just a place to play basketball; they’re a vibrant community where your child can build confidence, develop a strong sense of belonging, and foster meaningful connections and friendship.

Through our carefully designed programs, we impart essential skills and knowledge that go beyond the court. Each session is an opportunity for your child to express themselves, empowering them to make decisions with confidence.

Here at Junior Basketball Academy, we celebrate every shot, every pass, and every new friendship formed. It’s a place where teamwork and collaboration are just as important as points scored.

You can trust us to provide a safe and engaging environment for your child. Enrol them in our school holiday camp, and watch as they grow into independent, skilled, and happy Basketballers.

Name: Confederation of Sports and Recreation Industry
Description:
The Confederation of Sports and Recreation Industry (CSRI) is the only Apex Industry Association and business entity in India, which deals in sports and also connects the complete eco-system of the sports Sector i.e. Sports, Physical Education, Fitness and Leisure. It is a voice of Indian Sports and Recreation Industry, which promotes economic activities around the concerned sectors and also aggregates the views of different experts for influencing policy change through engaging and involving policymakers and the sports fraternity.

It is the belief of CSRI, that there is huge business opportunity in and around the Sports and Recreation sectors. The need of the hour, is to convert the untapped areas of sporting activities into self sustaining economic ventures and thereby, creating a dynamic sports industry. The world over, it is a multi-billion dollar industry propelled by gigantic demand. CSRI believes that there are many ventures around the sports and recreation industry but all operating in silos. There is a need to link the unconnected dots and present a holistic view before the market and policy makers for an optimal outcome.

CSRI also believes in aggregating this unorganised market in an organised manner in order to highlight and tap the hidden and latent demand. There are various indispensable industries within the sports, physical education, fitness and leisure sectors, which need to be aggregated through various parallel initiatives like Sports Law and Arbitration; Sports Infrastructure and Maintenance; Capacity Building and Skill Development for creating sports experts and generating gainful employment; Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and Sponsorship for sports financing.

Name: One Play Development

Description: The International Telematic Martial Arts Organization was born to create a strong connection between martial arts instructors from different parts of the world. Name: B-Graffos International, S.L.
Description: Often the problem in sports is not physical, it is mental. Graffos trains the mind to improve sports performance. Neuroplasticity, the scientific principle that allows us to stimulate the mind using our hands. Calligraphy exercises connect the hand with the brain in an intimate relationship that allows to stimulate the mind to improve skills such as concentration, self-esteem, resilience, motivation, competitiveness, etc. We use fine motor skills as a vehicle for graphomotor neurological stimulation. Calligraphy allows to control the gesture, the smallest detail is very important, this helps to improve important skills. This is our incredible tool; it exists and provides us with a large amount of biometric data capable of providing AI solutions. Our experience with high-performance sportsmen and women is our guarantee. Graffos is not only for athletes, in schools with primary school children, we have achieved an improvement of more than 10% in concentration and self-esteem.
Location: SANTA CRUZ DE LA PALMA, Santa Cruz de Tenerife

Name: Victory Adventures
Description:
Many adventurers and explorers face challenges such as inadequate preparation, unclear goals, and team co-ordination difficulties, leading to stress and frustration. 

At Victory Adventures, we understand these issues deeply and provide tailored strategies to manage them effectively. 

With our expert guidance, you'll start your adventure feeling fully prepared, aligned with your team, and equipped for success.

Expedition Satellite Communications and Nutrition providers.

Name: ThemA Sport
Description:
Siamo una società sportiva riconosciuta dal CONI, attiva dal 1981.
Oltre 10.000 persone sono coinvolte insieme a noi nella promozione dello sport come strumento di crescita, formazione, prevenzione e innovazione sociale.

Promuoviamo la crescita personale e la progettazione partecipata per massimizzare l'impatto delle nostre iniziative.
Operiamo in modo sostenibile, rispettando l'ambiente e promuovendo pratiche ecologiche.

Crediamo nel potere dello sport per generare benessere, che non significa prendersi cura della salute ma anche della socialità e delle relazioni.
Il nostro modello ha come obiettivo la cooperazione fra partner per generare impatti sul territorio e creare innovazione sociale.

La nostra missione è sintetizzata in quattro progetti :

Outdoor : promuoviamo dell'attività sportiva all’aria aperta per valorizzare la biodiversità ed accrescere lo sviluppo dei territori Italiani

Scuola : promuoviamo l'attività motoria nelle scuole per favorire la crescita personale, i valori di inclusione e socialità fra le nuove generazioni

Aziende : promuoviamo attività di well- being nelle aziende per promuovere il benessere psico-fisico dei dipendenti, per migliorare la work-life balance e le performance lavorative.

Formazione: Promuoviamo progetti di formazione dedicata ai tecnici del movimento per accrescere le competenze e sviluppare progetti condivisi.

Name: XLPRO Bewegen & Leefstijl

Wij bieden expertise, professionaliteit en creativiteit in fitness en leefstijlverandering. Daarom bieden we een grote variatie activiteiten aan op verschillende locaties, met onze sportclub in Stadshagen als thuisbasis. 

Wij werken inclusief, kleinschalig en persoonlijk. En op deze manier brengen wij wekelijks ruim 260 clubleden in beweging. Een hechte sportcommunity! XLPRO is ook erkend leerbedrijf.

Name: Power Yoga Collective
Description:
At Power Yoga Collective, we believe in the power of community and the transformative impact of Hot power yoga. Since our inception in 2009, we’ve grown from our roots in Canada to become a vibrant, global community dedicated to empowering individuals at every stage of their yoga journey. 
Our mission is to create a space where everyone–from beginners to seasoned practitioners–can explore, grow, and thrive. With in-person classes, yoga teacher training, and online offerings, we provide a comprehensive yoga experience that meets the needs of our diverse community. Whether you’re stepping onto the mat for the first time or deepening your practice, our studios are designed to be a place of learning, connection, and transformation. 


We’re excited our about expansion across North America, starting in Cleveland, Ohio. As we grow, we remain committed to our core values: speaking straight, listening generously, honoring commitments, and fostering a sense of belonging for all. 

Join us at Power Yoga Collective and become part of our community.

Name: Cerebral Palsy Sporting and Recreation Association
Description:
Here at CPSARA, we are driven by a single goal, to encourage both sporting and recreational opportunities for people of all ages with cerebral palsy and other neurological conditions.

We are dedicated to supporting children, adults and their families with cerebral palsy by providing sporting opportunities and leisure activities with an emphasis on inclusion and enjoyment. There are many sports, events and levels of competition for you as an athlete to pursue. Participation in sport can be just for fun and fitness but can also be pursued to International and Paralympic level! 

The association supports athletes on their sporting journeys, firstly by providing information and tools to help connect you with your chosen sport and thereafter by connecting you with fellow athletes, the latest event information and recognising your sporting achievements.

There is a big emphasis on the enjoyment of being involved in sport, having fun and building strong friendships! CPSARA organises regular social and recreational activities for our members, families and friends throughout the year. These include picnics, “Come and Try” days, fundraising events, yearly awards nights and our monthly newsletter.

CPSARA is also delighted to have a number of high profile ambassadors who share their personal experiences and knowledge with members and the community with the single goal of encouraging people with cerebral palsy to become members and participate in sport and recreation activities.

We also want to make sure every participant feels supported and guided on the sporting journey. And that’s why we’ve introduced our Mentor program which aims to support new, upcoming athletes to reach their goals and maybe even become the next Paralympians!

Name: La Escuelita MTB
Description:
NOSOTROS 

La Escuelita MTB nace a mediados de 2018 en Santiago, fundada por Jorge Arenas, agrónomo de profesión, entrenador e instructor de esquí, y apasionado por el mountain bike.
Ese mismo año, Jorge se certificó con la PMBIA (Professional Mountain Bike Instructors Association), profesionalizando su pasión y adquiriendo los conocimientos y herramientas necesarios para formar a nuevos ciclistas.
Nuestro objetivo es que, a través de la bicicleta, los alumnos desarrollen habilidades que trasciendan en sus vidas. La confianza, superación, motivación y compañerismo son, sin duda, algunos de los grandes valores que este deporte nos entrega.
Nos preocupamos por adaptarnos a las capacidades de cada alumno, priorizando siempre la seguridad. Avanzamos paso a paso, de menos a más, disfrutando cada entrenamiento en un ambiente de amistad y confianza.


NUESTROS VALORES

Nuestra sociedad requiere una educación capaz de formar personas íntegras, preparadas para enfrentar una realidad compleja, diversa y cambiante. Por ello, buscamos que nuestros alumnos vivan y compartan en torno a los siguientes valores:
 Respeto
 Responsabilidad
 Empatía
 Tolerancia
 Perseverancia
 Compañerismo


NUESTROS ENTRENAMIENTOS

Trabajar en las diferentes etapas del aprendizaje, desde el nivel inicial hasta las primeras fases de la especialización.
Desarrollar habilidades de equilibrio sobre ruedas en terrenos variados.
Potenciar cualidades físicas básicas como la resistencia, la fuerza y la velocidad.
Desarrollar y afianzar la técnica en subidas, bajadas, terrenos planos y senderos.
Aprender nociones básicas de mecánica de la bicicleta.
Practicar un deporte entretenido en contacto con la naturaleza.
Fomentar el compañerismo, la amistad y el cuidado del entorno natural.

En nuestras academias, no solo formamos jugadores de fútbol, sino también personas íntegras y comprometidas con su comunidad. Únete a nosotros y sé parte de la familia Alianza Lima, donde cada joven tiene la oportunidad de convertirse en la próxima estrella del fútbol peruano.

Name: Sport Sphere
Description:
Sport Sphere is a global platform connecting athletes, clubs, and staff to make sport recruitment and opportunities more affordable, transparent and accessible. 

Starting with rugby, our platform makes it easy to showcase your talent, discover real opportunities, and connect directly with people that matter. Whether you’re a player, coach, support staff or club, Sport Sphere is designed to simplify the process and open doors. 

Why join Sport Sphere?
• Built for Sport - tailored to athletes, support staff and clubs
• Fast & Focused - get seen by the right people quickly
• Opportunities at every level - from grassroots to semi-professional
• Direct Connections - no recruiters, agents, or middlemen 

From the beginning, our goal has been simple: break down the walls in sport. We have seen first-hand how expensive, fragmented and exclusive the system can be. That’s why Sport Sphere exists: the first step to unify open doors, and make meaningful sporting connections possible on a global scale.

Name: Dany KUHN
Description:
J'ai troqué le Digital Marketing pour devenir Coach Sportive à Lyon 

 Course à pied / Trail Running en coaching personnel (programmation à distance ou séance privée) et collectif avec le groupe Lyon City Goats qui se réunit chaque lundi, mardi à 19h à Vieux Lyon. Entre technique, préparation mentale, nutrition, équipement et bonne humeur, le tout agrémenté d'une programmation progressive et adaptée, je vous aide à atteindre vos objectifs (chrono / finisher). 

 Parce que bouger sans douleurs devrait être une norme, je vous accompagne dans vos objectifs sportifs mais aussi de vie : pouvoir vous affranchir de vos douleurs de dos persistent, être capable de porter vos petits-enfants, vous remettre à la course à pied, reprendre confiance en vous, reprendre le sport après une blessure.

 CrossFit Level 1 Trainer : Apprentissage et perfectionnement des mouvements. Ensemble, on identifie vos facteurs limitants et on travaille dessus : mobilité, souplesse, force, coordination, explosivité... 
 
 Mon histoire avant le coaching sportif : 
Après avoir travaillé avec des entrepreneurs & startups dans le Sport & la Tech pendant 9 ans en France et à l'International, je poursuis l'accompagnement vers des objectifs... Sportifs !

 Digital Nomad & profil International : je sais prononcer Eyjafjallajökull parce que j'ai fait deux saisons en Islande, j'ai terminé mes études à San Francisco  & mes voyages pro & universitaires m'ont portée jusqu'à Boston, Denver, Munich, Singapour, Bangkok, Kunming etc...

Name: Doğada Yaşam Okulu
Description:
2018 yılı Haziran ayında kurulan Doğada Yaşam Okulu 2019 yılı içerisinde 16.000 kapı giriş sayısına ulaşmıştır. İstanbul’un kamp ve doğa temalı en büyük tesisi olma yolunda emin adımlarla ilerlemektedir. Bünyesinde bulunan orman ve sahil bölümleriyle yeşili ve maviyi buluşturan Doğada Yaşam Okulu, yurt içi ve yurt dışı yüzlerce kamp organizasyonunda bizzat görev alan eğitmenlerimiz konularında uzman ve sertifikalılardır.
Kendi iç eğitimleri ile sürekli olarak gelişen ve araştıran genç kadromuzla her şartta ve ortamda kamp organizasyonları yapacak kapasitedeyiz.
Macera ve keşif, gençlerin gelişiminde önemli unsurlardır. Kendinden emin ve zorluklara karşı dirençli olmaları için kendilerini tanımaları ve kapasitelerini keşfetmeleri önemlidir. Bu alanda doğada yaşam ekibi olarak düzenlediğimiz eğitimler ve doğa kampları ile katılımcıların kendilerinitanımalarını, kendi güç, zeka ve yeteneklerine inanmalarını, kendilerine güvenmelerini ve takım çalışması becerilerini artırmalarını hedefliyoruz.
35 kişiye ulaşan ekibimiz ile düzenlediğimiz 8-12/13-17 yaş katılımcılara yönelik yaz kampları, 8-12/13-17 yaş katılımcılara yönelik sömestir kış kampları, anne-çocuk kampları, baba-çocuk kampları, özel şirket kampları, yetişkin kampları ve okul programları ile 2500’ün uzerinde katılımcıya ulaştık.

En Gimnasios Pacific, creemos que una vida activa y saludable es fundamental para alcanzar el bienestar y la felicidad. Con más de 20 años de experiencia en la industria del fitness, somos el gimnasio más grande de Chile y nos enorgullece ofrecer a nuestros miembros instalaciones de primera clase, programas de entrenamiento innovadores y un ambiente acogedor y motivador.

Nuestro objetivo es ayudar a cada persona que entre por nuestras puertas a alcanzar sus metas de salud y fitness, ya sea que estén buscando perder peso, aumentar su fuerza y resistencia, mejorar su flexibilidad o simplemente sentirse mejor consigo mismos. Para lograr esto, contamos con un equipo de profesionales altamente capacitados y apasionados por su trabajo, quienes trabajan en estrecha colaboración con nuestros miembros para crear programas personalizados y adaptados a sus necesidades individuales.

En Gimnasios Pacific también nos comprometemos a promover un estilo de vida saludable y sostenible. Por eso, ofrecemos una amplia variedad de clases y actividades para todas las edades y niveles de habilidad, incluyendo yoga, pilates, entrenamiento funcional, spinning y mucho más. 

Si estás buscando un gimnasio que te apoye en tu camino hacia una vida más activa y saludable, Gimnasio Pacific es el lugar perfecto para ti. Únete a nuestra comunidad fitness y descubre todo lo que tenemos para ofrecer. Te esperamos!

Natuurlijk Klimmen maakt sport in de natuur toegankelijk, inclusief en betekenisvol.

Name: La Forge Fitness & Performance
Description:
La Forge est une salle de sport à taille humaine située à Ploufragan (Côtes-d’Armor), fondée par Marine Connan et Mathieu Artières.
Nous proposons des entraînements en petits groupes de 8 personnes maximum, encadrés par des coachs expérimentés, dans un cadre structuré, exigeant et bienveillant.

Notre promesse : offrir un véritable accompagnement, quel que soit le niveau, avec une attention portée à chaque mouvement, chaque posture, chaque progression.
Ici, pas de surpopulation, pas d’entraînement laissé au hasard.
Chaque séance s’inscrit dans une programmation construite, pensée pour faire progresser dans la durée, sans brûler d’étapes.

Nous accueillons aussi bien des débutants que des profils plus confirmés, avec une approche tournée vers la performance pour tous.
L’ambiance est sobre, respectueuse, concentrée.
On ne vient pas se montrer, on vient s’entraîner sérieusement, ensemble.

La Forge, c’est aussi une aventure collective : en avril 2025, nous emmenons 30 adhérents participer à Hyrox Paris, dont plusieurs n’avaient jamais couru il y a 4 mois.
Une preuve que l’engagement, le cadre et l’accompagnement permettent de dépasser ce que l’on croyait possible.

Abonnement avec engagement (6 ou 12 mois), carnets sans limite de durée, coaching individuel sur mesure.
Chaque parcours est suivi, chaque objectif est construit.

La Forge. Un lieu pour progresser, avec méthode et exigence.

* Comprometimento com os alunos e todos os frequentadores da Praça (Comunidade).

* Responsabilidade  em realizar um trabalho sério e agregado.

*Respeito; com todos alunos, pais, apoiadores, e todos os moradores do bairro.

*Amor; ao trabalho realizado e as pessoas nele envolvidas.

*Qualidade : do trabalho em todos os âmbitos possíveis.

*Preparação dos nossos alunos na formação de um cidadão como um todo.

Name: Vibe Football
Description:
Vibe Football is your destination for expert football coaching in Sydney, Australia. Our team of experienced coaches are equipped to work with players of all ages, and specialise in providing programs tailored to each player’s unique needs. Our evidence-based approach ensures that our players receive the highest level of instruction and support, helping them to reach their full potential on the field.

Vibe Football offers young people the opportunity to participate in a truly unique football experience. Our approach is centred on the well-being and development of each child, guided by three strategic goals: supporting the well-being of the child, aligning with the principles outlined in the United Nations Convention on the Rights of the Child, and collaborating with the child to develop a football identity that is true to them.

We utilise the theoretical framework of Ecological Dynamics and incorporate methodologies and principles of a Constraints Led Approach to enhance skill acquisition. This informs our non-linear pedagogical approach to teaching and learning, ensuring that every child has the opportunity to reach their full potential.

Name: eBIKE PREMium
Description:
- E-Bike Verleihkonzept für Hotellerie & Tourismus mit All-Inklusive-Service sowie der Verkauf von neuen und gebrauchten E-Bikes, Rennrädern und Gravelbikes. 

Seit Anfang Oktober 2020 bläst frischer Wind durch das Gewerbegebiet von Ebbs bei Kufstein/Tirol.
Mit dem bestehenden Verleihkonzept für renommierte Hotels und den Tourismus mit einem unvergleichbaren PREMium All-Inklusive-Service agieren wir ganz im Sinne der Hoteliers. In weiterer Folge haben Privatpersonen die Möglichkeit, E-Bikes aus dem Verleih der Hotels nach ein bis max. zwei Saisonen zu stark vergünstigten Konditionen zu erwerben.
Derzeit findet man auf über 1000m² Fläche knapp 1400 E-Bikes von namhaften Herstellern wie Bianchi, Merida, Orbea, Haibike, Lapierre und Specialized.
Unsere Ambitionen für die Zukunft sind groß. Das Umweltbewusstsein der Menschen, die Wertschätzung zur Natur sowie die eigene Gesundheit und das Wohlbefinden gewinnen einen immer höheren Stellenwert in unserem Leben. Mithilfe elektronischer Unterstützung ist es jedem möglich, sich fit zu halten.“ Es muss nicht immer ein neues E-Bikes sein. Unsere Bikes haben teilweise nur wenige Kilometer am Tacho. Nach einem gründlichen Service, sowie Austausch der Verschleißteile sind diese teilweise wie neu und werden von uns mit 2 Jahren Garantie verkauft. So bietet sich die Möglichkeit für Jedermann und jedes Budget sich ein E-Bike zu leisten“ – so Geschäftsführer Christian Prem.

Name: KAIT. Asociación Vasca de Gestión del Deporte.
Description:
El grupo KAIT, Asociación Vasca de Gestores del Deporte, se constituye formalmente como tal, el 25 de Octubre de 1989, como resultado de la inquietud de un grupo de profesionales del deporte, que unidos inicialmente por lazos de amistad pretenden potenciar el estudio, análisis y opinión en lo concerniente al área del Deporte, la Educación Física y la Actividad Físico-Recreativa.

Desde su origen, y tras más de tres décadas de vida, KAIT ha demostrado una evidente vocación de servicio a las instituciones y a la sociedad, hasta convertirse en una referencia en los diversos ámbitos en los que se desarrolla el hecho deportivo en nuestro país. Esto ha sido posible gracias a la aportación de sus socios, bien de forma colectiva o de forma individual.Quedan atrás numerosos opiniones transmitidas por medio de nuestra revista PLAZAN, verdadero instrumento oficial de comunicación del grupo y exponente de su ideario, además de innumerables aportaciones concretas al ámbito local, foral, autonómico o ajeno al mismo, como otras referidas al ámbito educativo o federativo.

Description:

Wat is Bushcraft?
Bushcraft is een verzamelnaam voor vaardigheden die nodig zijn om in de natuur te verblijven. Een bushcrafter trekt graag de natuur in en probeert te leven van wat de natuur te bieden heeft. Het omvat kennis en technieken zoals het bouwen van onderkomens, vuur maken, water vinden en zuiveren, voedsel verzamelen en bereiden, navigeren en het herkennen van eetbare planten en diersporen.

Name: VBAdrenaline.com

The site will also grow to bring insight into what is going on with recruiting, prospect battles, inside scoops, and dive deeper into the "art and science of recruiting" than any other site around.  VBA wants to bring faces to the names you read about with interviews from coaches and athletes that make up the sport, and take a different approach to covering the sport and promoting it than any other website. #EnjoyYourRide

Name: The Little Gym Pinheiro Manso
Description:
O The Little Gym Pinheiro Manso faz parte de uma cadeia já com mais de 400 ginásios espalhados pelo mundo, e é o mais recente espaço na cidade do Porto dedicado aos mais pequenos!
O nosso programa foi desenvolvido para crianças entre os 4 meses e os 12 anos de idade, com uma abordagem não-competitiva e uma grande proximidade aluno/professor.
As aulas são dadas por profissionais altamente qualificados e experientes em trabalhar com crianças, tornando as aulas ainda mais divertidas e seguras. As crianças adoram estas aulas, pois são realizadas de forma lúdica e descontraída, permitindo que se divirtam enquanto aprendem a importância da atividade física para a saúde e o bem-estar. Os exercícios são adaptados a diferentes idades e níveis de habilidade, garantindo que todas as crianças possam participar e sentir-se motivadas para continuar a praticar atividades físicas.
Os pais também podem ficar tranquilos, sabendo que os seus filhos estão em boas mãos e que estão a desenvolver habilidades importantes, como a coordenação motora, o equilíbrio e a flexibilidade. Além disso, a prática de exercícios físicos ajuda as crianças a terem uma melhor qualidade de sono, a controlar o peso e a melhorar a autoestima.

Name: DFW Running Talk
Description:
Look, you've probably stumbled across a dozen running podcasts recorded in someone's closet by people who think a 10-minute mile is "pretty fast."
This isn't that.

"DFW Running Talk" is what happens when someone who actually runs decides to showcase the absolute legends hiding in plain sight across the Dallas/Fort Worth metroplex. Elite coaches who'll make you realize your training plan is garbage. Local athletes posting times that'll hurt your feelings. "Everyday" runners who are secretly doing extraordinary things.

Name: Covered Bridge Outfitters and Lodge
Description: Covered Bridge Outfitters & Lodge is a luxury fishing and hunting destination for outdoor enthusiasts from all over the world. Located on over 135 acres of pristine natural land with private access to the Conneaut Creek, our ORVIS-endorsed fly-fishing guides have access to private waters nationally recognized for legendary steelhead fishing, both on property and nearby. Guided hunts for deer, turkey, pheasant and waterfowl are arranged on and around this stunning property. Our luxury lodge provides everything you need when not on the water or on a hunt - comfortable accommodations, great food (private chefs), and endless fishing and hunting tales around the fire pit at night. Our convenient location, just one hour from Cleveland, Ohio and close to private airports, offers seasoned anglers and hunters, beginners, couples, friends and corporate groups a chance to truly get away from it all for the trip of a lifetime. #Steelhead #Trout #Hunting #LakeErie #Orvis

Name: Les Enfermés Dehors
Description:
Les Enfermés Dehors, an association of common interest which allows youths and families with precarious financial ressources to practice mountain sports with professionals. 
A FFME Club. 
The objective is to discover the local mountains and share the values of ecological transition. The opportunity to practice and learn to become autonomous in various mountain activities: climbing, hiking, mountaineering, ski touring, via ferrata, mountain biking... and to share with all types of players in mountain areas. 
Several formats are offered: 
- Enfermés Dehors youth camps over 4 days, with bivouacs during school breaks 
- The Enfermés Dehors Academy, every Wednesday afternoon 
- Specific outings and events in partnership with local organizations around Albertville

Name: Salty Sailing
Description:
Established in 2018, Salty Sailing is an RYA-accredited sailing school located in Cowes, known globally as the 'Home of Yachting' on the Isle of Wight. 

Our mission is to make sailing accessible to people of all abilities, creating a welcoming, fun and professional environment for you to learn, relax and enjoy your time on the water.

Our experienced and qualified team are passionate about delivering exceptional sailing and powerboating experiences tailored to every individual's needs. Whether you're looking to advance your skills through RYA-certified training courses, planning a unique corporate event, or seeking an unforgettable all-inclusive sailing holiday, we have something to offer you.

We take pride in our friendly, professional and compassionate approach, going the extra mile to accommodate our clients and ensure their time with us is memorable and rewarding.

Name: CORE
Description:
CORE is een plek voor members en experts die niet stil willen blijven staan.
Wij geloven dat groei ontstaat in verbinding en dat niemand het alleen hoeft te doen.

Daarom biedt CORE een persoonlijke en overkoepelende formule die mensen helpt om (weer) in beweging te komen. Wij creëren een omgeving waar ontwikkeling, samenwerking en blijvende vooruitgang centraal staan.

Samen bouwen we aan groei.
Samen vormen we CORE.

Name: LiFEsports at the University of Maryland
Description:
Our Mission: To prepare youth for life and leadership through sport.
Our Vision: To be the national exemplar in sport-based positive youth development.

The University of Maryland has partnered with Ohio State University's LiFEsports Initiative to expand and further the impact of their nationally-acclaimed program for community outreach, experiential learning, and research.

LiFEsports was founded on the belief that all youth deserve the opportunity to engage with caring adults in intentionally designed sport- and recreation-based activities. For us, these data indicate that we must continue to expand our reach to ensure today’s youth reap the well-documented social, emotional, and physical benefits of participating in sport.

JD Racing Services is a Belgian company that offers a full service to stakeholders in automotive racing. We try to create the one-stop-shopping formula for pilots, racing teams, sponsors and race fanatics.
We believe to be the first company to create value and solutions for the offering and demanding side in automotive sports.
JD Racing Services (JDRS) is created by experienced entrepreneurs with the love for speed and a very diversified and wide network of business people, race pilots and infamous instructors. This cocktail enables us to match complementary people resulting in great cooperations and results !

Name: Canadian Drone Soccer
Description:
Bringing the Future of STEM Education to Life with Drone Soccer! 

Imagine a sport that combines gaming, robotics, aerospace, and AI—all while teaching students the STEM skills of the future. Welcome to Drone Soccer Canada, a one-of-a-kind, high-energy, tech-powered sport designed to engage, educate, and inspire!

 For Schools & Educators – Nurture & instill STEM basics and roots at High school levels.
 For Colleges & Universities – A direct pathway to automation, aviation, AI, and engineering careers, giving students the edge in tomorrow’s job market.
 For Community Centers & Playdiums – A fast-growing, inclusive, and accessible esport that fosters teamwork, problem-solving, and innovation.
 For Cities & Youth Programs – A powerful initiative to boost STEM engagement, workforce readiness, and social inclusion through cutting-edge technology.

More than just a game—Drone Soccer is a movement. We are building the next generation of tech leaders, engineers, and innovators by making STEM learning fun, immersive, and real-world applicable.

We’re expanding across Canada and looking to partner with schools, colleges, universities, community hubs, and industry leaders. Want to bring Drone Soccer to your organization?

Let’s connect and make it happen! 


#DroneSoccerCanada #STEMEducation #EdTech #FutureOfLearning #Innovation #InclusiveSports

Name: YourWave
Description:
Discover the ultimate watersport paradise with YourWave on the breathtaking Lake Garda in Italy! We specialize in offering the most trendy watersports, all conveniently located in one amazing place. Dive into the excitement with our wakesurfing, eFoil, foil, and JetSurf lessons and rentals. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced enthusiast, our expert team is here to guide you through every wave.

But that's not all - YourWave is renowned for crafting tailor-made programs suited for any group size, be it families or corporate events. Experience an all-inclusive adventure that combines lake activities with the enchanting beauty of Lake Garda's surroundings. From wine tasting and cycling to paragliding and boat trips, we offer a rich tapestry of experiences that cater to every taste.

For those looking to dive deeper into the world of (e)foiling, we are proud dealers and a test center for Liftfoils efoils and foils, the market leaders in foiling technology. Whether you're looking to purchase or simply want to experience the thrill of riding the latest in efoil water sports, our team is dedicated to providing an unforgettable experience.

At YourWave we're not just about the sports; we're about creating memories that last a lifetime. With our luxury Nautique G23 Paragon boat, state-of-the-art equipment, and personalized instruction, every moment spent with us is designed to be safe, fun, and exhilarating. Join us on Lake Garda and make your watersport dreams a reality.

Créée en 2019 par deux amies, elle sensibilise son public à la biodiversité, au design durable, à l'environnement, au recyclage et à l'upcycling.

Name: Handbollförbundet Väst
Description:
Handbollförbundet Väst bildades 1947, då under namnet Göteborgs Handbollförbund (GHF). 

2021 blev Handbollförbundet Väst ännu större i och med projektet handbollens regionalisering. Nu är de geografiska gränserna: Västra Götalands län, Värmlands län, delar av Hallands län och delar av Jönköpings län. 

Idag är Handbollförbundet Väst ett aktivt förbund som arbetar för att bredda och sprida handbollen och handbollens värderingar, framförallt i vårt distrikt, men även nationellt och internationellt. Vi har kansli i Göteborg, Skövde och Karlstad.

Name: Skyhawks Sports Milwaukee
Description: Skyhawks Sports Milwaukee provides safe, skill-based and FUN youth sports programs. Name: Dafy C’est Permis
Description:
Dafy C’est Permis (DCP) est l’école de conduite moto du groupe Dafy, pensée pour celles et ceux qui veulent bien plus qu’un simple permis : une vraie formation, exigeante, structurée, et portée par la passion du deux-roues.

Notre engagement : former des motards responsables, confiants et prêts à affronter la route avec sérieux et maîtrise.

Nous proposons :

 Le permis A1, A2 et la passerelle A
 La formation 125 cm³ pour titulaires du permis B
 Des formules classiques ou intensives, selon vos objectifs et vos disponibilités
 Un accompagnement personnalisé tout au long du parcours : inscription, plateau, circulation
 Des moniteurs expérimentés, bienveillants et passionnés, pour vous encadrer dans les meilleures conditions

Notre pédagogie repose sur l’exigence, la rigueur et la proximité avec nos élèves. Parce que conduire une moto ne s’improvise pas, nous mettons tout en œuvre pour que chaque élève reparte avec plus que le permis : une vraie culture de la moto.

Dafy C’est Permis, c’est la référence des motards exigeants.

It allows users to CONNECT with peers and coaches, COMPETE against friends and rivals and COMPARE themselves to others see how they stack up.  The true brilliance of this App is as a recruiting tool, where coaches can view athlete profiles and search for athletes that match specific metrics for any given sport.  We are building stronger athletes using science and data.

Name: BOR Grupa | Centrum Edukacji o Bezpieczeństwie
Description:
BOR Grupa to kadra najwyższej klasy specjalistów, których misją jest świadczenie kompleksowej obsługi w zakresie związanym z edukacją i zabezpieczeniem bezpieczeństwa i ochrony życia w warunkach, zarówno codziennego funkcjonowania, jak i w sytuacjach zagrożenia. 

Jeśli dostrzegasz zagrożenia i chcesz nauczyć się reagować, ale nie masz czasu na specjalistyczne szkolenia, a Twoim marzeniem nie jest zostanie zawodowym żołnierzem, postaw na zabawę i czas wolny, wybierz mądrą rozrywkę. Powierz nam realizację tej misji!

Prowadzimy szkolenia z zakresu bezpieczeństwa osobistego, kursy w ramach ośrodka kształcenia: kursy zawodowe, instruktorskie, specjalistyczne, doradztwo, audyty i inne. Realizujemy imprezy tematyczne, spotkania firmowe, wyprawy terenowe, szkolenia i szkolenia specjalistyczne z zakresu samoobrony, strzelania, survivalu, taktyki i technik interwencji, ochrony i ochrony osobistej. 

Programy szyjemy na miarę potrzeb naszych Klientów. Bazujemy na naszych autorskich systemach z zakresu samoobrony i strzelectwa. Zajęcia realizujemy na terenie wybranym przez Klienta.

DZIAŁAMY JAKO:
 BOR Grupa Centrum Edukacji o Bezpieczeństwie
 Ośrodek kształcenia BOR Grupa Niepubliczna Placówka Kształcenia Ustawicznego 
 BG Agencja Ochrony Osobistej
Stałym miejscem, w którym prowadzimy nasze szkolenia i kursy, jest stworzona przez nas w Krakowie Zielona Strefa - Centrum Sportu, Rekreacji Ruchowej, Szkoleń i Edukacji.

Współpracujemy z wykwalifikowaną kadrą, którą stanowią doświadczeni trenerzy i instruktorzy różnych form aktywności: strzelectwa, sportu, sportów walki, wspinaczki, survivalu, ratownictwa medycznego, off-roadu i innych. Część z nas to byli funkcjonariusze służb specjalnych, wojska, policji, z doświadczeniem w zagranicznych misjach bojowych, czy jako specjaliści MSZ do spraw ochrony. Są wśród nas mistrzowie świata w sztukach walki, czy posiadacze czarnych pasów w sportach walki.

Name: Shaolingua
Description:
Chez Shaolingua, nous croyons que la motivation est le moteur de tout apprentissage ! 

C’est sur cette conviction que Shaolingua a développé un univers ludique pour donner aux enfants l'envie de découvrir le chinois mandarin et sa culture. 

 Nos produits, conçus pour les petits explorateurs de 8 à 12 ans, les plongent dans des aventures passionnantes mêlant missions créatives et objets immersifs, à intégrer dans leur quotidien.

 Fondée sur la ludopédagogie et une approche plurisensorielle, notre méthode suit les recommandations de la neuropédagogie : un apprentissage loin des écrans pour favoriser la curiosité, l'engagement et l'ancrage des connaissances. 

 Prêts à embarquer pour un voyage éducatif hors du commun ? Rejoignez notre communauté sur LinkedIn et visitez notre site pour plonger dans l'univers de Shaolingua.

Name: MC Group Dancing School Ssd Srl
Description:
Fondata nel 2005 da Michela Cerrone nel cuore della Brianza, la realtà MC Group è oggi un riferimento importante per tutto il nord Italia e una realtà stimata in tutto il panorama nazionale.

MCG vanta credits di rilievo a livello nazionale ed internazionale ed offre al suo interno stili e corsi per tutte le età e livelli. 

Un ambiente che, da 17 anni, rappresentata un concreto e affidabile punto di ritrovo per migliaia di famiglie e ballerini, oltre che essere uno studio di formazione tra i livelli più alti di Italia.

Oggi, sotto la direzione di Michela e la codirezione di suo marito Vincenzo Gallone, MC Group registra oltre 200 tesserati e consolida i suoi benefici sociali e artistici sul territorio.

Dal 2017, MCG è main partner ufficiale di Brianza Dance Competition, evento di rilevanza nazionale ufficialmente riconosciuto dal Coni per entità, qualità ed ottima organizzazione.

Migliaia i partecipanti provenienti ogni anno da tutta Italia che approdano al Palazzetto più grande della Brianza e sempre più numerose le sinergie con partner e sponsor che regalano fiducia ad un evento in evidente scalata.

Name: Youth Ability
