Bij Youth Ability staat het bevorderen van sport en beweging voor kinderen centraal. We werken nauw samen met iedereen die betrokken is bij het stimuleren van een actieve levensstijl voor de jeugd. Of het nu gaat om tijdelijke ondersteuning op scholen, begeleiding bij buitenschoolse opvang, of het organiseren van grootschalige sportevenementen—wij zijn er om te helpen. We werken samen met diverse sportaanbieders voor kinderen en streven ernaar een positieve impact te hebben op zowel hun fysieke als mentale ontwikkeling.

Name: Victory Club Dubai
Description:
What does “community” mean? In Dubai, many residential communities boast world-class facilities, yet new residents often feel disconnected when they first arrive. This “ghost town” phenomenon can lead to missed opportunities for connection and sacrifices to health and well-being over time.

Victory Club was created to change that.

Rooted in the UAE’s vision, we aim to make sport a cornerstone of the nation’s identity. At Victory Club, we bring healthy, affordable lifestyles right to your doorstep, bridging the gap between facilities and people. Our mission is to ignite a sense of belonging, transforming neighborhoods into vibrant, thriving communities. With a focus of physical and mental well-being, we foster stronger, more connected, and sustainable communities, creating a lasting legacy of empowered active living.

- Abdulaziz AlQasem, Founder

Our residency, launching in November 2025, offers players aged 18–25 a unique blend of elite soccer training, cultural immersion, and touristic lifestyle in one of Europe’s most captivating settings. 

We’ve partnered with the professional club Episkopi F.C., granting participants full access to high-performance training grounds, UEFA-licensed coaches, and comprehensive soccer infrastructure. Our program is crafted for amateur and semi-professional players aiming to refine their skills, prepare for college-level play, professional trials, or simply seeking an extraordinary European experience.

Name: National Brotherhood of Snowsports
Description:
The National Brotherhood of Snowsports (NBS) is a trailblazing organization dedicated to promoting diversity, equity, and inclusion in Snowsports. Since our founding in 1973, we’ve been committed to creating access and opportunities for people of color to engage in skiing, snowboarding, and other winter sports.

Through our network of regional clubs, mentorship programs, and world-class events, we empower individuals to connect, learn, and thrive on and off the slopes. Whether you’re a seasoned Snowsports enthusiast or just starting your journey, the NBS is here to support, inspire, and celebrate your passion.

Join us in building a more inclusive future in Snowsports. Together, we’re breaking barriers and elevating experiences in the winter sports world.

Let’s carve new paths—together!

Name: Project Playmaker NI
Description:
Project Playmaker is a Belfast-based football initiative focused on more than just the game. 

We’re here to develop technical skills while helping young players grow as leaders, build life skills, and gain confidence—both on and off the pitch. Our goal is to inspire the next generation, empower future leaders, and positively impact our communities.

Through quality coaching, mentoring, and innovative training, we create opportunities for players of all backgrounds and abilities. 

Football isn’t just about winning—it’s a tool for building character, resilience, and teamwork.

A First-of-Its-Kind Football Facility in N. Ireland:

Plans are underway for a state-of-the-art football facility—the first of its kind in Ireland. This cutting-edge centre will combine advanced technology with expert coaching and mentoring. Once established, the facility will:
	•	Provide top-level training to help players sharpen skills and reach their potential.
	•	Support junior and senior teams, including Irish League clubs, with specialist coaching and rehab.
	•	Offer an inclusive space for individuals with disabilities, ensuring access to quality football coaching.
	•	Deliver leadership and life skills programs, shaping confident, well-rounded individuals.
	•	Give back to the community, supporting local initiatives and grassroots football.

Schools Coaching & Local Hero Program:

While the facility is in the works, Project Playmaker is already making an impact through outreach programs:
	•	Schools Coaching Program – A six-week primary school program combining football training with life skills, promoting teamwork and confidence.
	•	Local Hero Program – A 6-week program for 13 - 17 year olds that blends leadership and football coaching. Participants can obtain an IFA coaching badge to prepare for future coaching roles.

By building a strong foundation, Project Playmaker aims to encourage the next generation of players, coaches, and leaders to create a brighter future for football in N.I .

Name: Footgolfclub
Description:
Het ultieme doel bij Footgolf is natuurlijk de hole-in-one! Je scores worden bijgehouden door een zogenaamde marker. Degene die de voetgolfbaan aflegt in het minst aantal schoten mag zichzelf Footgolf-winnaar noemen!

Wat is Footgolf?
Bij Footgolf, ookwel voetgolf genoemd, wordt het beste van beide sporten gecombineerd. Je kunt je traptechniek etaleren en je speelt op een perfect geprepareerde grasmat op een officiële golfbaan. Naast inzicht, precisie en traptechniek moeten spelers ook rekening houden met
bunkers, waterhindernissen en wind in het heuvelachtige landschap.

Officiële sport
Voetgolf is sinds 10 jaar een officiële sport in Nederland. Tijdens het eerste NK Footgolf in 2009 werd duidelijk dat deze sport meer eist dan alleen
de juiste traptechniek. Vele oud-internationals, zoals Roy Makaay en Ruud van Nistelrooy, hebben deelgenomen aan dit jaarlijkse kampioenschap
waarbij onder meer Theo Janssen en Kenneth Perez al Nederlands Kampioen Footgolf zijn geweest.
Footgolf-instructeur Sam van Bracht is o.a. Nederlands Kampioen Footgolf en staat tevens in de Top-15 op de Footgolf Wereldranking!

Uitje
Footgolf kan beoefend worden door vele groepen. Ideaal als bedrijfsuitje, teamuitje, voetbaluitje, vrijgezellen- of vriendenuitje. Ondanks dat veel
voetbalverenigingen voor Footgolf kiezen, is dit ook zeer geschikt voor andere sportverenigingen of groepen. Footgolf kan natuurlijk gespeeld worden door jong en oud, man en vrouw. Ook voetbalervaring is geen vereiste, al is het wel handig als je enige vorm van balgevoel hebt.
Kun je het op conditie niet meer bijbenen, géén probleem, met de juiste traptechniek kun je héél ver komen…

Name: HDC San Diego (Hockey Development Center)
Description:
HDC San Diego is a premier hockey training center providing unique, effective, and measurable programs to individuals, small groups, and teams. We offer athletes of all levels a comprehensive facility where they are able to work one-on-one with our accredited trainers to help reach their maximum potential.

Our center is divided into four zones which focus on a different area of development.

1. Fusion Skating Zone - Designed for development of individual skills such as skating, shooting, stick handling, passing and peripheral vision. The zone consists of our unique Hockey Skating Treadmill and other specialized technologies.

2. Shooting Zone - Created for player’s puck-handling skills development, with a focus on shooting and stick handling. 

3. Testing Zone - Area where we test a player's fitness level using a specialized diagnostic system to create a customized and measurable training plan and set goals.

4. Gym Zone - Zone with a focus on improvement of conditioning and coordination skills including cardio, strength, plyo, functional-stretching, and agility.

Name: QB COLLECTIVE
Description:
The QB Collective exists at the intersection of elite talent and NFL expertise.

Founded in 2016 by Richmond Flowers III – former NFL player, scout, coach, and now one of football's leading coaching agents – the Collective was built on a singular belief: quarterback prospects deserve access to pro-level instruction.

That vision created the country's premier quarterback development incubator. Past camp coaches include NFL luminaries like Sean McVay, Kyle Shanahan, and Mike McDaniel, alongside general managers like John Schneider and current offensive/defensive coordinators. These aren't guest appearances by the coaches. They're invested in sharing the strategic frameworks, mental game, and leadership principles that define NFL-ready quarterback play.

The results validate the model. Alumni include Caleb Williams, Bryce Young, Drake Maye, Justin Fields, Julian Sayin, CJ Carr, and more. These quarterbacks didn't just attend a camp. They accessed mentorship and game insights otherwise unavailable to them. They studied film with the coaches who design NFL offenses. They learned pre-snap reads from the architects of the game. 

What makes the Collective distinctive is the curriculum. Well beyond on-field mechanics, we provide classroom instruction on schemes, play sequencing, leadership, and the mental processing required to be a pro. It's comprehensive QB development delivered by NFL coaches.

Richmond's unique aforementioned path gives him a perspective that shapes everything the Collective does. He understands what separates playing college footballs to excel in college and beyond, and he's built an organization that bridges that gap.

Now, the Collective is expanding. Regional quarterback camps bring the methodology to more athletes. Each program is powered by the same principle: elite instruction creates elite outcomes.

The Collective represents where football's future is shaped by its present leaders.

Name: Minds in Motion - The Catalyst's role of Sports Psychologists
Description:
About the book
Minds in Motion: The Catalyst’s Role of Sports Psychologists explores how psychological interventions are transforming sport and performance. Brought together by two leading experts, it examines mental resilience, self-regulation, well-being, ethical practice, and other vital aspects.

Divided into three sections—Performance, Well-being, and Ecosystem—it blends science with real-world case studies on perfectionism, anxiety, and identity, offering evidence-based strategies for holistic athlete and practitioner support. This book is not just for sport psychology practitioners, but also for athletes, coaches, and anyone engaged in the sporting ecosystem who seeks to understand and apply the power of the mind in sport

Met aandacht en respect voor ethiek, fair play en familiewaarden stelt zij zich ten dienste van alle clubs om hen te ondersteunen in hun dagelijkse werking. Name: Defence Lab
Description:
Defence Lab offers the most complete and effective self-defence programs. Our combat systems are based on real experiences, so it’s a methodology that continuously evolves to adjust to the urban environment.

Based on the study of everything that surrounds the human being, both physically and mentally, we create programs that stimulate self-knowledge and teach you martial arts and self-defence in a fun, intuitive and effective way.

Since we created Defence Lab, we live in a constant search for perfection. We are thorough in our work of observation and research, we think about creative solutions for the problems we detect in the real environment and test them until we get the result we are looking for. With all this information we create the best study methodologies.

Our programs will not discover you the absolute truth, with them you will learn to ask your own questions and explore until you find your own answers. No one can tell you where the limits of your life are, only you can discover and overcome them.

Name: REBALL
Description:
REBALL is an elite individual football development organisation based in Devon, founded by Harry Ross. Before founding REBALL, Harry coached at Crystal Palace, Burnley, and West Ham, where he saw firsthand how difficult it can be for even the most technically gifted players to consistently transfer their ability into the exact scenarios they face in games.

REBALL was created to complement the work clubs already do by adding the final layer of context so that excellent technical development directly translates to game impact. Through position-specific, scenario-based training, REBALL layers in the where, when and why alongside the how, helping players apply their ability with greater effectiveness.

The REBALL methodology identifies all the exact scenarios players face in the game according to the position and movement mechanics of defenders and attackers. Players are then coached with the specific tactical, movement and technical information they need to instantly increase their success in the exact scenarios they face in the game.

The concept has been successfully implemented with professional players at Truro City and Plymouth Argyle, as well as players at Saints Southwest, Argyle Community Trust, and Torquay United. Promising results have shown how REBALL can sit naturally alongside existing club programmes as an additional layer of value to contribute to the game success of players.

REBALL is currently in discussions with Edu Rubio (former West Ham & Wolves Assistant Manager) to join as a co-founder, and with Guy Parkin (former owner of Pro Football Support) to help roll this training out into clubs.

At REBALL, we’re here to complement the work you already do. Whether you're a player, club, or football organisation, we're here to support.

Name: Soccerkinetics
Description:
Soccerkinetics – Die Zukunft des Fußballtrainings
 
Der Fußball wird immer schneller, anspruchsvoller und komplexer. Technik, Übersicht und Handlungsschnelligkeit sowie eine hohe Bewegungsqualität sind entscheidende Faktoren für den Erfolg auf dem Platz. Genau hier setzt Soccerkinetics an. Unser innovatives Trainingskonzept kombiniert aktuelle sport- und neurowissenschaftliche Erkenntnisse mit langjähriger Praxiserfahrung auf dem Platz, um Fußballer jeder Alters- und Leistungsstufe gezielt weiterzuentwickeln.
Durch Einflüsse aus dem differenziellen Lernen, Dual-Task-Training, Neuroathletiktraining und der Movement Culture schaffen wir ein Entwicklungsumfeld, das nicht nur die Technik und Spielintelligenz verbessert, sondern auch Verletzungen gezielt vorbeugt. Unser Credo: „Dein Training muss so komplex sein, dass dein Spiel die Erholung ist.“
 
Hinter Soccerkinetics stehen die Gründer Alexander Glöckle und Simon Jans, die ihre Expertise als Trainer, Sportwissenschaftler und Mentalcoaches nutzen, um das Fußballtraining auf ein neues Level zu heben. Gemeinsam entwickeln wir Methoden, die bereits von Bundesligavereinen, ehemaligen Nationalspielern und ambitionierten Nachwuchstalenten genutzt werden.
 
Unser Ziel ist klar: Wir revolutionieren das Fußballtraining – nachhaltig, wissenschaftlich fundiert und praxisnah.
Mehr Infos unter unserer Website oder auf unserem Instagram @soccerkinetics
 
„Trainiere heute, worüber andere erst morgen nachdenken“

Description:

Name: Football Friends
Description:
Football Friends is dé plek waar kinderen vanaf 6 jaar, één keer per week of vaker, naast hun eigen voetbalclub kunnen trainen. Bij ons draait het om de ontwikkeling van talent op elk niveau, maar intrinsieke motivatie is essentieel om je thuis te voelen op onze voetbalschool. Of je nu één keer per week komt trainen of vaker, bij ons willen we het beste uit elke speler halen. Iedereen is gelijk en zodra je bij ons aansluit, maak je deel uit van onze familie. Tijdens onze trainingen streven we naar beleving en passie door middel van oefeningen en persoonlijke aandacht. We combineren veldtrainingen met regelmatige fysieke trainingen zonder bal om spelers op alle vlakken te ontwikkelen. Bij Football Friends gaan we er altijd voor om het maximale uit elke speler te halen, ongeacht welke stap je zet in de voetbalwereld.

Over onze oprichters:

Nick Kuylaars, voormalig profvoetballer, is gepassioneerd in het ontwikkelen van spelers. Zijn natuurlijke leiderschap zorgt voor maximale beleving en resultaten van onze spelers. Naast zijn werk bij Football Friends is Nick nog steeds actief bij Wezel Sport in België en is hij hoofdtrainer van JO16-1 bij VV Geldrop.

Christian Erades, een optimistische en oprechte verbinder met jarenlange ervaring in het ontwikkelen en laten groeien van bedrijven, evenals in de voetbalwereld. Als medeoprichter bewaakt hij de structuur en het DNA van Football Friends en biedt hij ondersteuning aan onze spelers, zowel op als buiten het voetbalveld.

Nick en Christian streven ernaar een oprechte en wederzijdse klik met onze spelers te hebben, gebaseerd op vertrouwen. Alleen dan kan het maximale worden bereikt. Al onze spelers delen dit DNA en hebben een intrinsieke motivatie en drive, die we natuurlijk ondersteunen. Plezier staat voorop en maakt elke training een feest. Samen vormen we een hechte familie, herkenbaar aan onze mooie trainingspakken en kleding.

At Anybody Can Run, we have a deep-rooted passion for running and a commitment to fostering a vibrant community of runners from all walks of life. As specialists in organizing and managing both virtual and on-ground races, we provide a platform that transcends age and ability, making running accessible to everyone.

With years of industry experience under our belt, our dedicated team of experts brings an unparalleled level of professionalism and creativity to every race we organize. Our mission goes beyond the finish line. We believe in empowering individuals to embrace their inner runner, to conquer challenges, and to achieve personal milestones. As sports wear manufacturers, we understand the importance of quality gear in enhancing the running experience. We craft sports apparel that marries comfort, functionality, and style, ensuring that every step you take is supported by the best in performance wear.

Join us on this exhilarating journey of self-discovery, determination, and celebration. Whether you're a seasoned runner or just starting out, Anydbody Can Run is here to be your partner in achieving greatness. Let's lace up and make strides towards a healthier, happier, and more connected world through the joy of running.

Run with passion. Run with purpose. Run with Anybody Can Run.

Name: İSTANBUL AVRUPA SPOR KULÜBÜ
Description:
Kulübümüz 2018 yılının Şubat ayında; ulusal ve uluslararası sportif projeleri ve çalışmaları 
başarıyla hayata geçirmek amacıyla kurulmuştur. Bu amaç doğrultusunda, kulübümüz Dünyaca ünlü spor kuruluşu olan FareNetwork’a ‘’We Will Beat Discrimination With Football’’ isimli uluslararası bir spor projesi hazırlamıştır. Bu projemiz dünyanın 60 ülkesiyle beraber eş zamanlı olarak 16-25 Ekim 2018 tarihlerinde İstanbul ilinin, Silivri ilçesinde ve Selimpaşa mahallesinde başarıyla uygulanmıştır. Bu elde edilen başarıdan sonra UEFA tarafından projemiz, 30 Mart -03 Nisan 2019 tarihleri arasında Londra’ya davet edilerek, İngiltere’nin en ünlü stadyumlarından biri olan Wembley Stadyumu’nda, dünyanın 60 ülkesinden gelen katılımcılara sunum yapma şansını elde etmiştir
***************************************************************************Kulübümüz uluslararası sportif projelerde elde ettiği başarılarının yanı sıra, fiziksel sportif çalışmalarla da kısa bir süre zarfında yüksek başarılar kazanmıştır. İstanbul’da 5 ilçeyle birlikte; Tekirdağ, Antalya, Bursa, İzmir ve Kocaeli şehirlerinde 4-15 yaş arasındaki çocuklara yönelik, sportif çalışmalarına devam etmektedir. Kulübümüz 4 yıl gibi kısa bir zaman diliminde yaklaşık 1000 öğrenciye başarıyla spor eğitimi vermiştir. İstanbul Avrupa Spor Kulübü olarak, yurt içindeki sportif çalışmalarımızın dışında, 2021 yılının ekim ayı itibarıyla Hırvatistan'ın başkenti Zagreb'de sportif çalışmalarımız başlamıştır. Kulübümüz 2022-2023 Sezonlarında, Ülkemizde en az ‘20 Şehirde’ Yurt Dışında da en az ‘5 Ülkede’ Sportif Çalışmalar yapma hedefiyle, planlamalarına devam etmektedir. Tüm bu sportif projeler ve sportif fiziksel çalışmalar dışında, İstanbul Avrupa Spor Kulübü olarak en büyük amacımız; çocuk ve gençlerimize sporu sevdirmek, etik değerlere saygılı ve ilkeli spor eğitimi sunmak ve geleceğin sporcu, antrenör, ve yöneticilerine iyi bir başlangıç niteliği taşıyabilecek, kalite düzeyi yüksek ortamlar oluşturmak.

Name: Beat Best

Aporta la mejor recomendación para mejorar el rendimiento, acelerar la recuperación y minimizar el impacto de lesiones de los deportistas de resistencia (carrera, ciclismo y natación). 
Calcula tus necesidades nutricionales y de hidratación minuto a minuto para cada sesión de entrenamiento, carrera o recuperación.
Utilizando la tecnología más avanzada y los datos de los usuarios, a través de un potente algoritmo de IA, Beat Best ofrece de la forma más fácil y accesible asesoramiento y consejos de nutrición e hidratación personalizados, específicos y técnicos; basados en el conocimiento científico que aporta nuestro equipo de experimentados nutricionistas, especializados en rendimientos deportivo. 
Estas recomendaciones facilitan a los deportistas de resistencia mejorar su preparación, rendimiento y recuperación. 
Más allá del deporte, Beat Best tiene la visión y el propósito de ayudar al usuario con prevención de enfermedades comunes, gestión de alergias e intolerancias alimenticias, estados de ánimo y salud mental; facilitando hábitos de vida saludables, sostenibles, bienestar personal.

Name: Schweizer Skischule Meiringen-Hasliberg
Description:
Herzlich willkommen bei der Schweizer Skischule Meiringen-Hasliberg!

Seit 70 Jahren leben wir Wintersport. Unser motiviertes und bestens ausgebildetes Team freut sich, die grosse Begeisterung am Schneesport mit Ihnen zu teilen. Unsere 160 Ski- und Snowboardlehrerinnen und -lehrer
kennen ermöglichen Ihnen ein unvergessliches Wintererlebnis. Ob für Kinder oder Erwachsene, ob mit Ski, Snowboard, Telemark oder Langlauf, wir garantieren Ihnen ein vielseitiges Angebot: von Gruppenkursen oder Privatunterricht über Schneeschuh- und Skitouren bis zu Events und Teamanlässen.

Name: Book Your Trainer
Description: Book Your Trainer verzorgt resultaatgerichte programma’s op basis van jouw gemeten potentie voor een periode van 12 weken. Wij zijn ervan overtuigd dat het succesgevoel schuilt in het verbeteren van jouw zelfbeeld en -zorg als deelnemer. Onze intentie is dat je je beter gaat voelen over jezelf.

Name: UNITS pel bàsquet
Description: Units pel Bàsquet és un projecte que té com a objectiu promoure la inclusió social i la igualtat d'oportunitats a través de l'esport, en concret, del bàsquet. A través d'una col·laboració entre una entitat social i una entitat esportiva, es busca descobrir el potencial de les persones mitjançant la pràctica esportiva. Així, es pretén crear un espai on tothom, independentment de les seves capacitats, puguin gaudir del bàsquet i aconseguir uns objectius comuns.

Name: She Plays Football
Description:
She Plays Football is the UK’s only online hub for girls aged 6–16 (and their parents) who love football and want to improve their game. Featuring a by position training curriculum created by our Technical Director Cori Daniels, a UEFA 'A' female coach, expert advice, tips, and insights, everything you need to support and inspire her football journey!

Key offerings of the online hub include:

●	Expert Advice and Tips: From mental resilience to peak physical performance, She Plays Football’s support extends far beyond the white lines, teaming up with leading experts, including sports psychologists, doctors, nutritionists and performance scientists, to offer invaluable advice for girls and their parents. 

●	Inspiration from the Best: Discover exclusive stories from professional female players and rising stars who share insights on their journeys, challenges, and triumphs.

●	Position-Specific Training by Cori Daniels: A specialised training programme from UEFA A-licensed coach Cori Daniels, featuring drills and exercises tailored to each position, empowering young footballers to progress independently.


We are dedicated to providing advice and expert coaching by UEFA 'A' & 'B' coaches to develop the next generation of females in football, providing access and tools for every stage of her journey to nurture her growth and performance so SHE can be the best SHE can be.

Name: YOU. The Gym Arnhem B.V.
Description: YOU The Gym biedt personal training op maat. Op basis van jouw wensen en doelen stellen we een persoonlijk trainingsprogramma samen. Dit programma bestaat uit intensieve één-op-één trainings sessies waarin verschillende, op jou afgestemde, workouts aan bod komen. Wil je afvallen, sterker of fitter worden, lekker in je vel zitten, beter slapen of gewoon een stok achter de deur, kom dan naar YOU. Samen maken we jouw ambities waar!

Name: BASKET INSTITUTION
Description: Basket Institution es una asociación sin ánimo de lucro constituida en 2022 legalmente en la Comunidad Valenciana con el único fin de utilizar actividades deportivas como vehículo de educación de las nuevas generaciones. El pilar de Basket Institution es la diversidad, formación, experiencias y rendimiento.

Name: Blackburn Athletics
Description:
Blackburn Athletics propose des entraînements à haute intensité de 45 minutes, adaptés à tous les niveaux. Nous avons créé des thématiques diversifiées et nous travaillons avec les meilleurs entraîneurs de l'industrie pour vous offrir une ambiance conviviale et inclusive. Avec une programmation soutenue par la science, nos cours vous feront non seulement vous sentir chez vous mais vous aideront également à atteindre vos objectifs.
Nous avons également à coeur de redonner à la communauté. À l’ouverture de notre premier gym, en 2017, nous avons créé le fonds BBA qui permet de financer des activités et des installations sportives pour des jeunes dans sous la loi de la protection de la jeunesse de la Montérégie.
À ce jour, ce sont plus de 850 000$ qui ont été remis à la Fondation du Centre jeunesse de la Montérégie grâce au fonds BBA!

Name: Trained Mentors Sports Academy Pvt Ltd
Description:
ABOUT US:
Trained Mentors Sports Academy Pvt Ltd is formed with the objective of providing physical and mental growth of youngsters and development of their calibre through various sports activities. 
TMSA Pvt Ltd was incorporate on 27 May 2016 and rapidly growing to become Mumbai's foremost Sports Resources Company with a unique 360-degree product ecosystem. 
TMSA experience is that our students flourish in an active, fun and safe environment. at Trained Mentors Sports Academy, we believe that participation is the key. We do not claim to turn your child into an elite athlete, but we will develop them, harvesting potential no matter how great or small. We encourage competition in a healthy manner, however it's not all about winning and it's not selective.
Trained Mentors Sports Academy, as well as experiencing a wide range of sports, our students benefit from weekly team building activities which stretch the imagination and broaden horizons. Making new friends, learning respect for each other, enhancing communication and leadership skills, we see each student's self-confidence grow as they achieve their goals.

TMSA VISION 
Our vision is to identify, support and nurture students so that they can reach their potential as outstanding sportsmen and sportswoman as well as outstanding young individuals.
TMSA Mission 
Providing activities that meet the needs of a variety of student interests and abilities.
Fostering a culture committed to excellence and reaching the highest possible level of achievement.

Name: UNIQUE LOFT
Description:
Wir sind leidenschaftliche Aerialistinnen, Tänzerinnen und bewegen uns seit vielen Jahren mit Begeisterung in verschiedenen Bereichen wie Tanz, Aerial und gymnastischen Disziplinen.

Mit Unique Loft haben wir uns den Traum vom eigenen Studio erfüllt, in dem wir unsere Freude an Bewegung und Körperbewusstsein weitergeben möchten.

In persönlicher Atmosphäre bieten wir
Aerial Sling, Aerial Hoop, Aerial Yoga, Pilates und Bodyfit
- für jedes Level und mit viel Herz.

Wir freuen uns darauf, unsere Leidenschaft mit euch zu teilen und hoffen, dass auch ihr bei uns die passende Stunde für euch entdeckt.

Euer Unique Loft Team
Jenny | Nicole | Rebecca | Piera

Ga het avontuur aan en geniet van alles wat het buitenleven mooi maakt. Samen met je gezin, familie, vrienden of collega’s.

Name: Cricket Performance Lab
Description:
What if you could take you batting average from 6 to 56 just by using the right bat? 
 
In a world first, hundreds of cricketers from professionals to club players, from juniors to Premier League, are getting a professional bat fitting that’s changing their game. 
 
A New facility in Moorabbin Victoria, has been purpose fitted with this state-of-the-art technology that not only takes the guesswork out of choosing a bat, but goes a step further by assessing the BPI (Balance Point Index) of every bat and discovers the best one for your style of play. 
 
So, you can still have Grey-Nicholas or Kookaburra, it just needs to have the right BPI number for you. 
 
What’s more every one of the players that the Cricket Performance Lab have fitted, has improved their game. This includes some of the biggest names in cricket like Glen Maxwell & Sophie Devine. Some premier players have increased their average by over 70%. 
 
This is not a nice to have, this is an essential if you want to get dramatically better at batting right now!

The Cricket Performance Lab bat fitting service changes the game. 

World first cricket technology and the expert knowledge of the CPL Master Fitters Chris Hall and Shannon Young provides players with the highest level of service available in world cricket. 

For the first time ever, the guesswork is taken out of purchasing a cricket bat. The process allows the fitting masters to scientifically assess the physical performance and swing dynamics of a player to fit them with the perfect custom cricket bat.

Name: Chuck & Oaks Golf Shop

Name: Windwalker Farms Sporting Clays
Description: Windwalker Farms Sporting Clays is committed to providing opportunities for the shotgun enthusiast. We have been rated one of the top 10 shooting clubs in the state of Texas and among the top 15 in the nation. We are best known for our unique shooting stations and world class targets. Our current layout has two sporting clay courses with a total of 30 stations, along with a 5-stand, and a trap and skeet field. Our courses have varying levels of difficulty, so whether you are a beginner or an expert, you can have an enjoyable day of shooting. The club is host to numerous corporate and charity shoots including the Oilmans and Bustin for Badges. Windwalker  is your one-stop shop for all your shooting needs. Shooting lessons and recoil pad installations are available by appointment with co-owner Gary Hightower a level 1 NSCA instructor. Our onsite pro-shop. offers a wide selection of clothing and shooting supplies including firearms and ammunition.

Name: Speed Mechanics
Description: The vision at Speed Mechanics is to bring elite-level training methods to the masses. We want to make high-performance programming accessible to all levels. We accomplish this by providing tailored training plans, coaching, and consulting services.

Name: Stockholm Sport Academy
Description:
Stockholm Sport Academy - Det självklara träningsvalet för barn och ungdomar!

Som Stockholms mest etablerade sportskola erbjuder vi träning av hög kvalitet till våra medlemmar. 

Vi har sedan 2003 varit med och främjat idrottsutövandet i Stockholm. 
Under den här perioden har vi lärt upp och vidareutbildat ungdomar och tränare till nästa steg i sina tränarkarriärer. Hos oss får du kunskaper och erfarenheter som du kommer ha nytta av hela livet. 

Stockholm Sport Academys Filosofi och Målsättning
– Erbjuder allsidig & omväxlande träning där alla de fysiska egenskaperna tränas
– Vill sprida och öka medvetandet om att motion och hälsa är viktigt
– Har inte utslagning, elitsatsning eller liknande, vi önskar skapa ett långsiktigt lärande och förmedla att träning är en livsstil
– Vill på ett roligt sätt inspirera ungdomar till att vara mer fysiskt aktiva och skapa en god vana att behålla livet ut

Name: Tom Dean Swim School
Description: Our mission is to foster a love for swimming while building strength, discipline and water safety skills. Whether you are just starting or striving for excellence we are here to guide every stroke of your journey.

Name: Spaces for Youth
Description:
Spaces for Youth builds capacities and bridges communities to empower young people through sport and play. With it, we develop life skills, improve social inclusion and create opportunities for social participation. We do this, because we believe in the transformative power of sport and play, and in a world where every young person thrives and leads.

Spaces for Youth is a common initiative of ISA Youth and SPIN Sport Innovation. We combine 10+ years of operational implementation experience with 10+ years of strategic concept development in sport for development. But most importantly, we share one passion: To make a positive change to the life of youngsters through sport and play.

Name: Special Olympics Alaska
Description:
Special Olympics Alaska exists to provide year-round sports training and athletic competition in a variety of Olympic-type sports for children and adults with intellectual disabilities. We provide continuing opportunities for athletes to develop physical fitness, to demonstrate courage, to experience joy and to participate in a sharing of gifts, skills and friendship with their families, other Special Olympics athletes and the community.

The Special Olympics mission remains as vital today as it did when the movement was founded in 1968. Special Olympics strives to create a better world by fostering the acceptance and inclusion of all people.

Name: Rugby Academy Ireland
Description:
We are an international, independent academy based in Ireland.  Our aim is to assist young athletes, male & female, to enhance their skills levels in rugby and life to become professional rugby players OR to attain a level commensurate to their ability after attending the Academy.

This is achieved by a twin approach. "Rugby Development" & a “Learning Pathway Programme” (LPP). The LPP is a great selection of qualifications that are available at both the academy and online to set students up with an improved skillset regardless of whatever level of playing they achieve once they've graduated.

Name: US Harbors
Description:
US Harbors is used annually by over 12 million people who rely on the site for daily tides, monthly tide charts, weather, and boating and fishing news. With current coastal conditions and forecasts, marine weather, buoy data, NOAA charts, weather radar, access to marine supplies and services, fishing reports, and local events in 1,500+ harbors, it is the perfect resource for people who have one foot on land and the other on the water. 

US Harbors started the annual "Best Harbor in the US" contest, and National Harbormaster Appreciation Day, celebrated annually on October 8th. 

USHarbors also provides digital marketing services and advertising programs to help coastal and marine businesses reach marine-friendly audiences around the country.

Name: IFDIS - FORMATIONS AUX MÉTIERS DU SPORT
Description:
Organisme de formation dans les métiers du sport depuis 2005, IFDIS agrège à la fois savoirs théoriques universitaires, recherche, expériences pratiques de terrain et intégration de solutions technologiques innovantes exploitant les Data.
Précurseur de formations à distance et mixtes utilisant les plateformes d’enseignement à distance facilitant l’organisation personnelle des apprenants.
Les savoirs dispensés sont utilisables de façon transversale, quelque soit l’objectif fixé : haute performance sportive, sport santé, loisir, bien-être.

Name: High Point Urban Adventures
Description:
High Point Urban Adventures helps individuals and organizations thrive through experiences on the ground and in the air! Our goal is to inspire hope through life changing adventures! 

High Point Urban Adventures is located in Tulsa, Oklahoma at the largest indoor/outdoor educational ropes course in North America! We have seven steel challenge courses with heights up to fifty-five feet, and a forty-foot indoor rock climbing wall. 

We work with people of all ages to help with personal and team goals. We offer scheduled groups, open groups, and customized events for corporate groups, schools, church youth groups, and social service organizations. 

High Point Urban Adventures is an entity of High Point Youth Ranch, Inc. It is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization that is committed to providing a safe haven for empowering youth to overcome adversity and realize God's purpose for their lives.

Name: Coach Support
Description:
We are the supporters of federaties, clubs and coaches in developing their full coaching potential. 

We are 3 experts with years of experience that we would like to put to service for creating a positive environment for coaches to excel in developing talent.

Name: Acenta Padel Tour
Description:
Acenta Padel Tour brings together players across Scandinavia in a unique mix of competition, community, and passion for the game. As an established tournament platform, the tour continues to grow — with a long-term ambition to explore new markets and create more opportunities for player development and community engagement.
A part of Acenta Group

Name: Swerve Club

Name: Fietsvalpreventie.nl
Description: Welkom op het LinkedIn account van Fietsvalpreventie.nl. Wij zijn een team van vier enthousiaste fysiotherapiestudenten die samen dit initiatief gestart zijn. ons idee is ontstaan na het zien van de schrikbarende cijfers van ongevallen op de fiets. Wij willen hier als toekomstige zorgprofessionals een rol in kunnen spelen. Hoe wij dit doen? Met fietsvalpreventie trainingen willen we de fietsvaardigheden en de eventuele fietsangst van de deelnemers verbeteren. Samen op weg naar een veilig en zelverzekerd fietsend Nederland!

Name: Padel Arena Frihamnen
Description:
Välkommen till Padel Arena Frihamnen – Göteborgs mest centrala Padelarena belägen bara ett stenkast över älven till centrum! 

Här i Frihamnen finns fem inomhusbanor och två utomhusbanor. Även en shop med allt du behöver till din Padel. Du tar dig enkelt hit med cykel, bil, spårvagn eller buss.

Vi erbjuder spel- och träningsmöjligheter för alla åldrar och nivåer! Du kan spela spontant eller delta i någon av våra många aktiviteter både på vardagar och på helger.

För den tävlingsinriktade finns möjligheter att delta i seriespel eller tävlingar med olika upplägg, för alla nivåer. Oavsett om du spelar i herr-, dam- eller mixed-klass. 

Du hittar information om lediga tider, aktiviteter och tävlingar samt gör din bokning genom MATHCi.

Vill du ta din Padel till en ny nivå kan du göra det genom träning i Frihamnen Padel Academy med över 140 andra deltagare. Vi har även träning för barn och ungdomar i vår Juniorakademi.

Här i finns goda möjligheter att nätverka med andra lokala företag och exponeras genom Frihamnen Business Club. Vill du bli en del av våran härliga gemenskap och synas i hallen? Hör av dig till oss redan idag!

Hos oss kan du också boka ditt nästa event, är det dags för kick-off eller konferens hjälper vi dig gärna vidare!

Du kan läsa mer på vår hemsida https://www.pgspadel.com. Vill du kontakta oss gör du det på info@pgspadel.com eller telefon 0730-623159.

Hoppas vi ses i hallen snart, varmt välkommen!

Name: SportConnector BV
Description:
SportConnector bemiddelt in sportdocenten en -coaches voor scholen en sportverenigingen. Wij brengen de vraag en het aanbod binnen de sport bij elkaar. SportConnector is een en jong, dynamisch en snelgroeiend bedrijf die sportdocenten en -coaches, verbindt met sportverenigingen en scholen.

Het doel van SportConnector is om vraag en aanbod van sport en spel voor scholen en sportverenigingen bij elkaar te brengen. Dit doet SportConnector door bemiddeling in gekwalificeerde sportcoaches en sportdocenten. SportConnector wil ervoor zorgen dat op school en bij de vereniging iedereen door gekwalificeerde sportdocenten en -coaches wordt begeleid. Hiermee wordt sporten en spelen nog gemakkelijker, toegankelijker en flexibeler voor iedereen.

Uiteindelijk moet dit ertoe leiden dat meer sport- en spelcoaches op een eenvoudige en flexibele manier in de buurt sport en spel kunnen aanbieden EN dat meer mensen op een eenvoudige en flexibele manier sport en spel kunnen beoefenen.

Name: Vamos Racquets
Description:
Vamos Racquets is a community-first racquets club reimagining how people move, play, and connect.

We’re not your typical club—and that’s the point. From padel and pickleball to good vibes and fitness, Vamos is designed to welcome everyone: first-timers, lifelong athletes, and everyone in between. Our spaces are whimsical but intentional, inspired by the rhythm of racquet sports.

We’re proud to be the founding Wellness + Fitness partner of ArenaLife, a first-of-its-kind wellness and community ecosystem located on the Arena corporate campus in East Hanover, NJ. As the movement hub of ArenaLife, Vamos helps create a new kind of workplace experience—one built around energy, connection, and everyday wellbeing.

Members get access to:
  Padel + Pickleball
  Vamos Fitness
  Coworking & Café
  Outdoor spaces (amphitheater, bocce courts, fire pits)

This is more than a place to play. It’s a place to belong.

If your company is looking for a modern wellness or community engagement partner—let’s connect.

#VamosRacquets #ArenaLife #WorkplaceWellness #PadelNJ #PickleballNJ #CommunityFirst

Name: SportsCool West Essex
Description: SportsCool raises aspirations, makes sports accessible to all, and most importantly, makes sports FUN. As a result, we see the children we work with blossom into confident, healthy and aspiring individuals.

Name: FAN D'O Carquefou
Description:
FAN D'O a ouvert ses portes le 21 juin 2018. 
Entre Thouaré-sur-Loire et Carquefou, FAN D’O vous accueille dans deux espaces complémentaires : aquatique et fitness, dédiés à la forme et au bien-être. 
L'espace aquatique : des activités aquasports accessibles 6J/7, du matin au soir en petits groupes pour un suivi attentif et des résultats visibles. L’apprentissage de la natation débute dès 4 ans pour les enfants et dès 4 mois pour les bébés nageurs, avec un maître-nageur présent dans l’eau pour accompagner chaque enfant. 

L'espace fitness : dans une ambiance bienveillante et conviviale, pratiquez le yoga, le Pilates, le renforcement musculaire, le stretching, la danse intuitive ou le cardio training... Des cours limités à 10 participants pour garantir un accompagnement personnalisé à chaque séance.
 
Véritable centre à taille humaine, nous offrons des cours pour les plus sportifs comme les plus frileux à la pratique sportive. 
Profitez de  votre accès 15jours découverte pour un prix tout doux, à 45€.
Réservation par téléphone au préalable ou inscription via la plateforme HeitzFit 4 dont le code centre est le 4233.

Name: S Sport Academy
Description: أكاديمية S الرياضية هي أكاديمية رياضية متخصصة في تدريب مختلف الرياضات، تتميز بوجود مدربين ذوي خبرة في مجال التدريب الرياضي، بالإضافة إلى توفيرها لبيئة رياضية داخلية مريحة ومناسبة لكافة الفئات العمرية.

Name: Inclusive Sport
Description:
Inclusive Sport believes in the power of physical activity and sport to enhance and transform lives. We put the participant at the centre of all our services ensuring everyone feels safe, feels welcome and most importantly feels valued. To ensure everyone is included in all our provision we use our three key values. We SHOW COMPASSION, strive to BE INSPIRATIONAL and always endeavour to provide a sense of BELONGINGNESS for all our beneficiaries.

Inclusive Sport works with a wide range of people and celebrates diversity. We work with children, young people, adults and people in later life. We specialise in working with people with additional needs and disabilities and are led by a management team that are inclusion experts with a wealth of experience teaching in schools as well as coaching in the community.

Areas We Cover:

We are based in Whitstable and the areas that we have covered in the past are:

Whitstable
Faversham
Canterbury
Herne Bay
Margate
Broadstairs
Ramsgate
Deal

Further Afield

If we can help at all, we are always happy to have a discussion about whether we can cover your area. Get in touch with us to find out more.

Name: Hockey Wallonie Bruxelles
Description:
Hockey Wallonie Bruxelles a pour but d’administrer, d’organiser, de favoriser et de contrôler le développement et la pratique du hockey sur gazon et en salle en région de langue française et en région bilingue de Bruxelles-Capitale, sous tous ses aspects et ce à un niveau récréatif, compétitif et de haut niveau. Elle a notamment comme but de contribuer par ses activités à l’épanouissement et au bien-être physique, psychique et social de ses membres et de contribuer au développement de programmes de détection, de perfectionnement et de suivi des sportifs qui présentent des potentialités qui permettent d’augurer des résultats signifiants à l’occasion des Jeux Olympiques d’été ou d’hiver, des Championnats du Monde, d’Europe ou de toutes autres compétitions de haut niveau.

Pour organiser les championnats nationaux et donner du support aux équipes nationales, elle collabore avec la Royal Belgian Hockey Association et Hockey Vlaanderen.

Hockey Wallonie Bruxelles a été créé en 2012.

From our Training Centre in the Swiss Alps, we bring you a cutting-edge blend of nature-based sports science and professional training expertise.

Description: At Quinit Boxing, we are not just another boxercise class. We are a school of boxing, dedicated to teaching the art and discipline of boxing to individuals of all backgrounds and skill levels. Whether you aspire to compete in the ring or simply want to learn the fundamentals of the sport, our experienced team of trainers is here to guide you on your boxing journey.

Name: COGNIGOALS
Description:
COGNIGOALS (www.cognigoals.com) is a sports education startup headquartered in Kailua, Hawaii, and coaching and development support in Kiel, Germany. We are dedicated to developing the new generation of creative and polyvalent football players through our systematically designed exercises, brought to you by expert cognition coach Matthias Nowak.

At COGNIGOALS, we believe in enhancing tactical variability and taking your team's performance to new heights. We begin by focusing on a fundamental skill: making your players two-footed (ambidextrous). Our revolutionary approach has unlocked the secret to leading players of any age and level to true two-footedness in a relatively short time. Don't just take our word for it; experience the results yourself!

As the long-time technical and creative coach for FC Bayern Munich, Matthias Nowak is renowned for his expertise and innovation in the field of motor-cognitive training. All training material provided by COGNIGOALS is personally presented by Matthias, ensuring you receive the highest quality content from one of the world's most experienced cognition coaches.

Our learning platform is designed to make motor-cognitive training easily understandable and accessible. Each exercise is carefully explained, empowering you to comprehend and effectively teach it to your players. With COGNIGOALS, you can confidently sharpen your profile as a certified cognitive coach in football, opening up new, engaging, and lucrative career prospects.

Join us on this exciting journey as we revolutionize sports education and empower coaches to unlock their players' full potential. Together, let's elevate the game and shape the future of football!

Name: Australian African Sports Association
Description:
The 'AASA' will be bridging the gaps to unite the Australian and African communities for a fairer and a culturally advanced Australia through Sports. 

Sports and education are the ultimate combination in giving youths a disciplined life by providing them with choices and allowing them to take on responsibilities at a young age. We believe in designing programs with the youths and not for them.

Focusing on what they want and how they see themselves accomplishing and managing the programs with the assistance from the association. 

The 'double AASA' thrives on giving our youths opportunities, pathways and a decision-making forum which gives them the motivation to gain better results thus driving their inner passion to succeed.

To find out more and 'walk the walk of change together' contact us at: contact@theaasa.com.au or via the website www.theaasa.com.au

Name: SP Football Consulting
Description:
SP Football è una piattaforma di alta formazione dedicata agli allenatori di calcio ed altre figure che propone videocorsi e percorsi online progettati per aiutarli a crescere professionalmente e a migliorare le proprie competenze. 

Fondata da Sergio Pellegrino, allenatore con licenza UEFA A spagnola e sostenuta da collaborazioni con professionisti di rilievo come Filippo Galli, Silvio Broli ed altri, SP Football si distingue per il suo approccio innovativo e focalizzato sulla pratica.

Missione
SP Football mira a colmare il divario tra teoria e pratica nella formazione degli allenatori. Troppo spesso, i corsi tradizionali si concentrano esclusivamente sugli aspetti teorici, lasciando poco spazio all'applicazione pratica. SP, invece, propone un metodo formativo che unisce solide basi teoriche a esperienze pratiche, per preparare allenatori pronti ad affrontare le sfide reali sul campo.

Offerta Formativa
La piattaforma di SP è progettata per soddisfare le esigenze di allenatori di ogni livello, con una gamma completa di percorsi formativi. 

Percorso di affiancamento 
Gli aspiranti allenatori possono accedere a un percorso di affiancamento mirato per affrontare con successo l'accesso richiesto dalla scuola allenatori spagnola.

Videocorsi e Percorsi Online
Oltre ai corsi per la Licenza UEFA, SP Football offre master su specifiche aree tecniche e tattiche, come i principi individuali di gioco e le competenze strategiche per allenatori di giovanili. Questi percorsi sono ideali per chi desidera specializzarsi in aspetti particolari del gioco o per coloro che vogliono migliorare la propria comprensione del calcio moderno.

Approccio Digitalizzato e Interattivo
SP Football sfrutta la tecnologia per offrire un'esperienza formativa all'avanguardia. 
Gli iscritti possono accedere a una piattaforma digitale personalizzata

Name: Aryangateways Sports Foundation
Description:
Why? is it that a country of population more than a 130 crore not even able to make position in top ten Olympic nations. The answer can be found in the fundamentals: unavailability of facilities to potential talent at grassroots level. Other nations start working on their talent from kid-stage and prepare the champions. We prepare them after being champion when no need is left. 
“A tree is used to irrigate in roots from begging not on leaves when they start to fruit.”

Why?  Choose Aryangateways  Sports Foundation (AGSF):
AGSF, a sportspersons managed non-profitable organization working mainly in rural India. Noble Aim is to provide assistance to the talented youth in sports at grassroots and erect them as champions. In our champion building mission your contribution is must. Strong youth means a strong Nation.  
We currently coaching & supporting hundreds of players in the field of Target Shooting, Martial art, Wrestling & Kabaddi. Many of our players have represented India at National/International/Asian/Olympic level and decorated the pride and honor of the nation with their sweat and blood.

Two (2) Players represented India at Tokyo Olympics, 2021. Gold Medal in Asian Games, 2018
One of our ‘Shooter’ grabbed the best sportsmen award in India. The “Arjuna Award” in 2020.
National and domestic medals & trophies are grabbed in quintals by our players in last twelve years.
International Medals in kilograms collected by the players prepared by ‘Aryangateways Sports Foundation’.

PRESENTLY PROVIDING THE COACHING IN:
1.	Shooting  2. Karate   3. Kabaddi  4.) Martial Art  5.) Sports Meditation
**  Special classes for girls for self defense by highly experienced coaches.

AGSF involvement in Sport & Development:
In very minimum words, after a long 14 years hard work our players reached from hot tin-shed to Olympics. We gained a lot of experience in the field of target shooting sport. Even if being in distress we produced the Olympians.

Description:
Padel ist mehr als ein Sport – es ist ein Lebensgefühl.

Beim Padel Culture Club geht es nicht nur um den nächsten Punktgewinn – es geht um die Leidenschaft, den Teamgeist und die unvergesslichen Momente auf und neben dem Court.

Wir bringen die Magie dieses Spiels in dein ganzes Leben – mit unserer Padel Academy, einzigartigen Padel Reisen, hochwertigem Merchandise und aufregenden Events. Ob Anfänger oder Pro – bei uns wirst du Teil einer Community, die Padel lebt. Denn für uns gilt: The Court Needs Your Magic.

Name: Academias de Fútbol Andrés Díaz
Description:
Empresa líder a nivel nacional en la organización de clases de fútbol, campamentos de verano/ invierno y eventos deportivos.

Name: Rugby Touraine CD37
Description: Le Comité Départemental Rugby 37 est une association de loi 1901.  Nous représentons la fédération française de rugby à l'échelle du département. Nous comptabilisons près de 2500 licenciés en Indre et Loire. Nos trois principales missions sont le développement du rugby, la formation auprès des jeunes mais aussi des entraineurs et l'organisation des compétitions sur notre territoire.

Name: Master Kobi Krav Maga
Description:
Today, we take great pride in being one of the largest Krav Maga organizations in the world, with a mission to preserve the technical and philosophical purity of Krav Maga, ensuring the integrity of Imi Lichtenfeld’s legacy, its founder.

Founded and led by Grandmaster Kobi, 8th Dan and a direct student of Imi, our organization stands out for its commitment to excellence. All instructors are trained and supervised directly by Grandmaster Kobi, undergoing rigorous training, refresher courses, and continuous development. Additionally, we organize regional, national, and international events, providing thousands of students with solid and reliable training across 19 states in Brazil, as well as in Argentina, Mexico, Portugal, Canada, and the United States.

More than just an organization, we are a community that values discipline, respect, and realistic self-defense. With the responsibility of teaching a combat system that can mean the difference between life and death, we ensure that every student has access to original, efficient Krav Maga, free from unnecessary adaptations.

Name: Sailing School Serbia
Description:
From River Basics to Open Sea Mastery.

Founded by national sailing champions, Sailing School Serbia is the region’s premier nautical education center. We offer a complete pathway for aspiring sailors—combining the accessibility of river sailing in Belgrade with internationally recognized IYT training at sea.

Our Educational Pathway:

 Step 1: The Basics (Belgrade) Start your journey on the Danube and Sava rivers. We use agile "Microtoner" class boats to teach the fundamentals of wind dynamics and maneuvering close to home. It is the perfect first step to fall in love with sailing.

 Step 2: IYT Certification (The Sea) Take your skills to the open water. As an authorized International Yacht Training (IYT) partner, we conduct intensive skipper courses at sea, granting you globally recognized licenses to charter boats anywhere in the world.

 Step 3: Advanced Training For certified skippers who want more. We offer advanced navigation, regatta training, and spinnaker handling for those who want to move from "competent" to "expert."

Professional Services:

 Corporate Team Building: We don't just host events; we build teams. Our "Business at Sea" programs use sailing to improve communication, leadership, and crisis management in a real-world environment.

 Yacht Transfer & Logistics: Professional boat delivery services for owners and charter companies. We ensure secure, timely, and technically proficient transfers of vessels.

Join us. Whether you want to escape the office for an afternoon in Belgrade or captain a yacht on the Mediterranean, your journey starts here.

Name: Get Flexible
Description:
Get Flexible staat voor kwaliteit, balans en flexibiliteit!

Onze missie is om ieder persoon en bedrijf te inspireren een healthy lifestyle na te leven. Onze passie is om onze  ervaring en kennis te delen, zodat ons doel, gezondheid en meer balans bij zoveel mogelijk mensen bereikt kan worden. Een gezonde balans van binnen en van buiten is in onze ogen onmisbaar. Ieder doet dit op zijn eigen manier. 

Wat wij bieden?

- Exclusieve personal training in GET RAWW
- Bedrijfsfitness bij o.a. Liberty Global
- Zwemlessen (privé en small group) @Club Pellikaan
- Voedingsadvies en fysiotherapie
- Personal training bij Club Pellikaan

Get Flexible is een Nederlands bedrijf met nationale en internationale ervaring. Gestart in 1995 door Hans Veldhuizen, die graag zijn passie in sport deelt. Het is gegroeid tot een organisatie met een core business in fitness, zwemmen en events, met als doel: “happiness and balance with quality in everyone’s life“.

In de jaren '90 verdiende Get Flexible zijn credits door het overnemen van een aantal groepslessen bij Nike European Headquarters in Hilversum. Nike had vertrouwen en gaf de kans aan Get Flexible om alle Sport & Wellness activiteiten over te nemen op Nike EHQ in Hilversum.

Sinds dat moment is het bedrijf enorm uitgebreid met meerdere activiteiten door heel Nederland. In de afgelopen jaren heeft Get Flexible meer dan duizend mensen geholpen het doel te bereiken, daarmee is er een network van mensen ontstaan die allemaal dezelfde passie hebben, namelijk sport. Of het in de gym, het zwembad of waar dan ook, de werknemers van Get Flexible gebruiken hun ervaring en inspiratie om mensen te helpen hun doel te behalen. Het integrale aanbod is onze kracht, we geven service op maat.

Happiness as a key to make life so much better.

Name: iPlayMe2
Description:
iPlayMe2 empowers racquet sport-clubs and playing facilities to efficiently drive their play-oriented programs, be those competitive in nature, or open-play, recreationally oriented.  It works through a club admin portal, and a free player app.  Available globally, and in eight (8) European languages.

See our intro video here -> https://sport.iplayme2.com/ClubVideo25

Book yourself a live demo with us via our Calendly -> https://calendly.com/pstratta

Name: ME Sports in the Community
Description:
Providing sports coaching & activity based education & instruction to schools, pre-schools, colleges, clubs, councils, nurseries, community groups & independent organisations throughout Leicestershire & the Midlands.

In schools, we are delivering an excellent standard of physical education as well as breakfast clubs, lunchtime clubs & after-school activities in a wide range of sports from football & rugby right through to gymnastics & dance. Our teacher training programmes are a popular way for schools to develop PE alongside staff

We're also available to colleges, councils, clubs, & government funded or independent organisations for our qualified & experienced coaches to deliver sport specific or multi-sports sessions, whether it be a regular contract or simply a one-off event

Our own regular multi-sports, dance, gymnastics & football clubs are held in venues throughout Leicestershire as well as a host of holiday clubs during the year. The football sector of ME Sports in the Community is the Matt Elliott Football Development Scheme, where Matt, in his capacity as Sports Director oversees our academies, development centres, soccer schools & casual clubs with the children benefiting from his experience as an ex-professional & international footballer

Cycling Development is a recent addition to our product services, where cycling support can be provided in schools or the community by our team of expert instructors in the form of balance bike sessions, learn to ride programmes, basic cycling skills & bike maintenance workshops

We also provide a number of pre-school & nursery settings with FUNdamental sports skills activities, CycleBugs, Mini Movers & our SoccerTots sessions are particularly popular

Our extensive work within the community now sees us also delivering a number of adult activities such as walking football as well as cycling, running & walking clubs.  On top of this we regularly deliver sports related qualifications, short-courses and adult learning.

Name: MB SoccerSkills
Description: MB SoccerSkills is de eerste voetbalschool in de regio die zaal en veldvoetbal combineert. Deze ervaring geeft ons vandaag de dag veel voordeel in voetbalsituaties, zowel op het veld als in de zaal. Name: Zentrum Aktiver Prävention GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Schon für die Allerkleinsten gibt es mit der Ballschule Heidelberg, Viet Vo Dao und Ballett ein qualifiziertes Sportangebot. Pädagogisches Verantwortungsbewusstsein in Balance mit sportlicher Erfolgsorientierung ist Grundlage dieses Ausbildungskonzepts. Erstklassige und erfahrene Tennistrainer kümmern sich um unsere lernwilligen und leistungsbereiten Tennisspieler - vom Anfänger bis zum Tennisprofi. Gruppen- und Einzeltraining sowie Workshops im Badminton und Squash vervielfältigen die Lern- und Verbesserungsmöglichkeiten für Sportler jeden Alters.

Genauso wie im Zentrum Aktiver Prävention (ZAP), das von dem führenden Fachmagazin der Branche, der bodyLIFE, zum "Fitness-Club des Jahres" und vom DSSV zum "Studio des Jahres" gekürt worden ist. Im ZAP haben Sie alle Möglichkeiten, Ihre aktive Lebensgestaltung so optimal wie möglich zu fördern. Trainer, Fitness- und Gesundheitsberater sowie Physiotherapeuten mit unterschiedlichen Wissensschwerpunkten vereinigen ihre Kompetenzen zu Ihrem Wohl. Eine hohe fachliche Kompetenz im Bereich des gesundheitsorientierten Fitnesstrainings, ein spezielles Betreuungssystem sowie ein moderner Gerätepark, helfen Ihnen dabei, Ihre Ziele zu erreichen. Verschiedene Fitness- und Rehabilitationskurse, Behandlungen in unserer Physiotherapie sowie Entspannungsmöglichkeiten in unserer Wellness-Oase vervollständigen das Angebot für Ihre Gesundheit und Fitness.

In Sachen Ausrüstung und Bekleidung steht Ihnen unser Shop-Team beratend zur Seite. Im ZAP Sportshop finden Sie ein große Auswahl an Sportartikeln aus den Bereichen Fitness, Running und Racket Sport.

Zum Essen und für den gemütlichen Ausklang - z. B. nach Ihren sportlichen Aktivitäten - lädt Sie unser Restaurant Marea ein. Lassen Sie sich von unserem Speisenangebot begeistern sowie vom Serviceteam und den Gaumenfreuden unseres Kochs verwöhnen. Genießen Sie eine entspannte Zeit, bei Kaffee und Kuchen, auf unserer schönen Gartenterrasse mit Teich oder in geselliger Runde an der Bar.

Name: Scarborough Rugby Union Football Club
Description:
Scarborough RUFC has been in existence for nearly 100 years. Following a meeting of rugby enthusiasts at Scarborough’s Pavilion Hotel in 1926, the town’s first rugby club was formed.

Matches were first played on Seamer Road, at Scarborough Athletic Football Club’s ground. The majority of sporting men and the press laughed at the idea of a rugby match being of interest to anyone in Scarborough, but by the end of the fourth game the Club had a gate of more than 1,000.

After the Athletic ground era, the Club moved to Newby in the late 1920’s. The site progressed over the years, but as the Club grew and teams of all age groups were added, there became a need for more pitches, more changing rooms, more showers, more everything!

In January 2009, the Club finally moved to their present home at Silver Royd following the completion of the J. M. Guthrie Clubhouse. With the support of John Guthrie and a number of loyal members and volunterrs, we’re now proud to be one of the best amateur rugby facilities in the country.

Scarborough RUFC’s progression from a meeting of like-minded chaps in 1926 to the first-class complex we have today is one of fellowship, generosity and hard-work. Without these virtues, Silver Royd would not exist.

Name: YourHealth personal training
Description:
YourHealth personal training helpt u bij het vinden van de optimale balans tussen werk, gezondheid en ontspanning. Onze coaches trainen u aan huis of buiten, helpen met het bereiken van een sterker fysiek lichaam en geven leefstijltips.
Wij zijn ruim 20 jaar ervaren in coaching en personal training en staan dagelijks klanten bij die al jarenlang met volle tevredenheid bij ons trainen. YourHealth pt is actief in de provincies Gelderland, Utrecht, Brabant, Limburg, Noord- en Zuid-Holland.

Name: H0 GOLFHOUSE
Description:
El punto de encuentro para los amantes del golf en Madrid.
H0 es el nuevo punto de referencia para los que disfrutamos del golf en Madrid. H0 es para todos:

 H0 GOLF ACADEMY : la mejor tecnología adaptada a todos los niveles.
 Para los que no tenemos tiempo de jugar en un campo entre semana.
 Para los que queremos mejorar nuestro juego de manera ágil.
 Para los que queremos aprender en un entorno más divertido, seguro y cómodo.

Name: Socatots Vlaardingen en Schiedam
Description:
SOCATOTS is het grootste bewegingsprogramma voor kinderen van 1 tot 5 jaar, geïnspireerd door voetbal.

Wereldwijd nemen meer dan 2 miljoen kinderen uit 60 landen wekelijks deel aan SOCATOTS lessen.

Wij zien dat kinderen steeds minder in beweging zijn met alle gevolgen van dien. De missie van SOCATOTS Nederland is om onze kinderen te leren dat sporten en bewegen bij het leven hoort en vooral erg leuk is. Dit doen we door, op een zo vroeg mogelijke leeftijd, bewegingslessen aan te bieden zodat sporten en bewegen natuurlijk gedrag wordt.

Ons belangrijkste doel is om de motorische, mentale en sociale ontwikkeling van kinderen te bevorderen met voetbal als grootste inspiratiebron.

De actieve deelname van de ouder of voogd is verplicht en vormt een essentieel onderdeel van ons programma. Het zorgt ervoor dat de band tussen ouder en kind wordt versterkt. Onderzoek heeft aangetoond dat dit een zeer positieve bijdrage heeft op het zelfvertrouwen en gevoel van eigenwaarde van kinderen.

Tijdens het SOCATOTS programma ontwikkelen kinderen o.a. hun motoriek, lenigheid, taal en coördinatie. Zij leren het herkennen van letters, cijfers, kleuren en het verschil tussen links en rechts.

Er wordt aandacht besteed aan 6 onderdelen van beide voeten waarbij de basisvaardigheden van het voetbal aan bod komen.

Dit alles door samen vooral plezier te maken in een veilige leeromgeving, zonder enige vorm van competitie onder leiding van gekwalificeerde coaches.

Elk kind ontvangt een SOCATOTS tenue.

Name: Grenada Bluewater Sailing
Description:
Grenada's Bluewater Sailing is an RYA Training Centre based in the Caribbean. We offer the full range of RYA sailing courses, from RYA Day Skipper through to the RYA Yachtmaster Certificate of Competence. Whether you are a complete novice who would like to learn to sail, or a seasoned skipper interested in developing your skills, our experienced RYA instructors will provide the level of training that you require.

Our Caribbean RYA Training Centre offers much more than high quality tuition – we will introduce you to the tropical paradise of Grenada & the Grenadines. Cruise around the breath-taking archipelago and discover deserted white sand beaches, clear aquamarine bays and vivid coral reefs. Swim with turtles, hike in rainforests, and immerse yourself in traditional Caribbean culture.

Volcanically-formed, the dramatic islands of Grenada & the Grenadines create the perfect destination for an RYA learn to sail holiday or a Caribbean crewed yacht charter. The secluded anchorages throughout the islands are perfect for a lunch stop or overnight stay. After an amazing day of sailing, you can relax and watch the mesmerising Caribbean sunset with a rum punch in hand.

Name: DAB Pickleball
Description: DAB Pickleball provides communities the opportunity to learn and experience the game of pickleball in a nurturing environment. DAB Pickleball navigates its multi-generational consumers through a physical and mental transformation process by eliminating barriers to equity. DAB Pickleball is affordable for all consumers and available to meet the needs of its consumers 24/7, virtually and in person. Consumers will invest in this opportunity because of our transparency, product quality, curriculum results, and the organization’s integrity.

Name: NXG
Description:
OUR VISION
AT NXG, OUR MISSION IS TO ELEVATE FOOTBALL TRAINING AND DEVELOPMENT BY PROVIDING WORLD-CLASS FACILITIES AND EXPERTISE FOR PROFESSIONAL TEAMS AND ACADEMIES.

We are dedicated to cultivating a diverse sports industry ecosystem that integrates elite coaching, cutting-edge educational programs, and seamless operational support.

By fostering collaboration between Thai and international talent, we create an environment that nurtures growth, excellence, and cultural exchange.

Our goal is to redefine the sports landscape in Thailand through sustainable innovation, setting new standards for athlete development and sports performance. We are committed to not only advancing the skills of athletes but also contributing to the long-term evolution of the industry, ensuring that every aspect of our approach supports the future of football and the broader sports community.

Name: Fédération Départementale des Chasseurs du Doubs
Description:
La Fédération Départementale des Chasseurs du Doubs représente les intérêts des 7 500 chasseurs du département. Elle fédère 518 Associations Communales de Chasse Agréée (ACCA), 43 Associations Intercommunales (AICA) et 190 sociétés de chasse privées.
L'Etat a confié aux Fédérations plusieurs missions d'intérêt général :
- l'organisation des formations théoriques et pratiques de l'examen du permis de chasser,
- la gestion des plans de chasse individuels,
- La gestion des ACCA/AICA,
- la validation annuelle du permis de chasser,
- la prévention des dégâts agricoles occasionnés par le grand gibier et leur indemnisation.

Cependant, les missions des Fédérations sont multiples et dépassent largement le cadre fixé par l'Etat.

 La Fédération des Chasseurs du Doubs a notamment pour objet:
- de participer à la mise en valeur du patrimoine cynégétique et à la gestion de la faune sauvage,
- d'assurer la promotion et la défense de la chasse,
- d'organiser la formation continue des chasseurs,
- de conduire des actions d'information, d'éducation et d'appui technique à l'intention des gestionnaires de territoire et des chasseurs,

Name: École de neige Rod Roy Snow School
Description: Rod Roy Snow School is a travelling ski school based in Montreal that provides bus transportation to its members. When it comes to ski hills, we love variety! Rod Roy ski and snowboard programs visit mountains in the Laurentians, Eastern Townships and Vermont. Rod Roy Snow School was inducted into the Canadian Ski Instructor Alliance (CSIA) Hall of Fame in 2006.

Name: LUNA Movement
Description:

Name: SportsKey
Description:
Talent Viewed Differently. 

The world of sports is changing rapidly. We're seeing more programs for young athletes, a huge increase in women's sports participation, and a greater demand for fairness at all levels. At SportsKey, we're not just observing these changes; we're actively shaping the future of talent identification and development by thinking outside the box.
 
Through decades of experience in sport science and practice, we believe that traditional methods are outdated. They often rely on subjective opinions, focus too much on temporary performance, and can be biased by an athlete's age, maturity, location, background, or past experience. That's why we've brought together Australia's leading sports scientists and professionals to completely reimagine how we find and nurture talent.
 
Our approach is all about uncovering the unique strengths within each athlete. We've developed practical and scalable tools designed to meet the specific needs of athletes, parents, and sporting organisations, no matter where they are in their journey. Instead of just looking at early performance, we focus on objectively measuring skill, coordination, and growth. This gives our partners the clearest and most confident way to identify long-term potential.
 
At SportsKey, our mission is simple: to create equitable, efficient, and future-focused talent identification that empowers every athlete to thrive.

Name: Posture Lab: Pilates Studio
Description:
Posture Lab Pilates Studio is a modern Pilates and movement studio based in Kuala Lumpur, dedicated to helping individuals and organizations move better, feel stronger, and live with balance.

At Posture Lab, we believe movement is more than exercise, it’s a foundation for physical health, mental clarity, and long-term wellbeing. Our approach combines Pilates, posture correction, core strengthening, and mindful movement to support everyday life, recovery, and performance.

We offer group Pilates classes and private Pilates sessions (Mat and Reformer), suitable for beginners through to advanced practitioners. Each session is designed to improve postural alignment, mobility, flexibility, and functional strength, with a strong focus on spinal health, injury prevention, and body awareness.

Our private classes provide personalised coaching for clients recovering from injury, managing back or joint pain, postnatal recovery, or simply seeking a tailored Pilates program. Group classes create an energising and supportive environment while maintaining high-quality instruction and attention to form.

Posture Lab also delivers corporate wellbeing and wellness programs for companies in Kuala Lumpur and across Malaysia. Our customised corporate Pilates sessions, workshops, and wellness events help teams reduce stress, improve posture, increase energy, and support employee wellbeing, ideal for Wellness Days, offsites, and ongoing workplace health initiatives.

Led by a certified and experienced Pilates instructor, Posture Lab blends technical expertise with an empathetic, lifestyle-focused approach. Whether you are an individual looking to build strength and confidence, or an HR leader planning a meaningful corporate wellness initiative, Posture Lab is here to support your journey.

Move better. Stand taller. Live with balance.

To democratize cricket coaching by providing accessible, high-quality, and personalized training for players across the nation. We believe that with the right guidance, any cricketer can reach new heights and make their mark on the pitch.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐕𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧
We envision a world where every cricket enthusiast has the opportunity to connect with experienced coaches, gain the confidence to play at their best, and foster a lifelong love for the game. Our goal is to build a community driven by a passion for cricket and a commitment to excellence.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐕𝐚𝐥𝐮𝐞𝐬

Name: Reid Baseball
Description:
𝙊𝙬𝙚𝙣 𝙍𝙚𝙞𝙙 is a former NCAA Division I pitcher at Baylor and Winthrop Universities who has spent more than two decades in baseball as a ballplayer, coach, and mentor. Since 2009, Coach Reid has worked in nearly 30 countries across five continents, impacting both athletes and coaches — from youth beginners to elite Senior National Teams and professionals. 

In 2016, he launched Reid Baseball, delivering coach education, ballplayer development, and performance programs that blend technical training with principles from positive psychology. Guided by his “𝘽𝙚𝙮𝙤𝙣𝙙 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝘽𝙖𝙡𝙡𝙥𝙡𝙖𝙮𝙚𝙧” philosophy, Coach Reid develops people first, ballplayers second — helping individuals, groups, and teams handle adversity, build resilience, and maximize their performance on the field and in life.

𝘼 𝙒𝙤𝙧𝙙 𝙛𝙧𝙤𝙢 𝘾𝙤𝙖𝙘𝙝 𝙍𝙚𝙞𝙙

“Baseball is a game of moments — big and small. My role is to prepare you for each one, not just with your glove or bat, but with who you are. I coach to develop people who respect themselves and others, feel empowered, act with integrity, and lead disciplined lives. The lessons we learn and the experiences we share go far beyond the field — because the teammate you are is the person you’ll become.”

Name: Colégio São Gonçalo SP
Description:

Em 2005 implantamos o Ensino Médio, com matrículas para a 1ª, 2ª e 3ª séries do antigo colegial.

Nossa localização favorece e facilita o acesso, por situar-se a uma quadra da estação Marechal Deodoro do Metrô.

A qualidade no ensino deve-se a proposta educacional de nossa Escola, visando à construção de conhecimentos, a constante busca de novas informações, atualizações e estímulo a novas descobertas.

Acreditamos na importância da conscientização de nossos alunos a respeito da realidade social que nos cerca, com intenção de orientá-los para que se tornem cidadãos capazes e atuantes social, política, cultural e economicamente.

Viver e conviver em sociedade requer envolvimento, participação e compromisso.
Como ponto forte e facilitador de nossa proposta, destacamos o intenso interesse e envolvimento dos pais e familiares, interagindo e participando ativamente de nossas atividades artísticas, esportivas e culturais.

Nossos professores e Coordenação passam durante o ano por constantes processos de aperfeiçoamento através de cursos de capacitação, congressos e palestras, além de dispor, em todas as disciplinas, de um laboratório pedagógico para enriquecimento das aulas.

Name: Mukuru Shujaa

We give young people a chance to reimagine and believe more in their dreams while enjoying their childhood. Our safe play spaces within the community and well trained coaches embody child-led peer support groups that inspire children as agents of change.

Our proven approach increases school attendance and enrollment rates, promote healthy lives, ad nurture the career potential of young people  and lead to positive attitudes towards learning.
