Name: La Promesse de l'Aum
Description:
Vous le savez, si vous l'avez déjà expérimenté. Et je peux en témoigner, puisque je pratique le yoga depuis 25 ans. 

Un cours de yoga, c'est un moment de pause, un cadeau que l'on se fait à soi-même. En étirant le corps, en respirant profondément, en restant centré sur l'instant présent, nous retrouvons la sérénité, l'énergie, la joie, l'enthousiasme... 

Le yoga, tout le monde voit à peu près ce que c'est. Mais le yoga Iyengar ? 

Le yoga Iyengar est une forme de Hatha Yoga, c'est donc un yoga postural. Il existe différentes familles de postures de yoga : debout, assise, couchée, vers l'avant, vers l'arrière, en torsion, posture abdominale ou inversée... chacune de ces familles incluant des dizaines de postures. 

L'objectif ? Étirer le corps - la colonne vertébrale, les articulations, les fascias, les muscles... - pour simplifier, on pourrait dire qu'il s'agit de stretching.

Mais le yoga Iyengar permet également de réaligner le corps. 

Vous en avez sûrement tou(te)s fait l'expérience. Dans notre vie quotidienne, notre environnement de travail n'est pas toujours ergonomique : des heures tassé(e) derrière un bureau ou dans sa voiture, ou debout derrière un comptoir, on porte des charges lourdes, on ne prend pas le temps de manger sainement... et, le soir, on rentre chez soi, épuisé(e), et on s'affale sur le canapé... après avoir fait la cuisine, le ménage, nourri les enfants, etc...  

Nous passons notre vie à courir après le temps et nous finissons par payer la facture !

Le gros avantage du yoga Iyengar, ce sont les supports utilisés pour adapter les postures au corps de chaque élève. 

Vous manquez de souplesse, vous ne faîtes pas beaucoup de sport, vous avez mal aux genoux, au dos ou ailleurs ? 

Aucune importance : en utilisant des blocs en liège, des coussins, des couvertures, des sangles, des chaises, chaque posture est adaptée pour que vous puissiez pleinement en bénéficier sans vous blesser... 

Alors, ça vous tente ?

Name: Valley Sport (Goulburn Valley Sports Assembly Inc.)
Description:
Valley Sport is not-for-profit sporting organisation located in Shepparton, Victoria which supports grass root sport and recreation clubs in the local governments areas of:

Name: Elswick Community Pool and Gym
Description:
Hello and welcome to Elswick Community Pool and Gym. Re-opened in September 2019 by local activists after a four-year closure, we’re an award-winning social enterprise and registered charity powered by passionate volunteers and a professional staff team.

In our lovely warm, uniquely shaped, accessible pool we offer lane and family swimming, Aquafit classes, fun inflatables, pool parties and male and female only sessions. Additionally, we run both group and one to one swimming lessons from the tiniest of toddlers with their parents up to adult classes at any age. Our Swim England and STA accredited lessons start from age 4 with friendly instructors and lots of support to ensure you enjoy learning to swim. Lastly, we also deliver RLSS lifeguard courses and host clubs for scuba diving, triathlon training and other exciting pursuits.

Additionally, we have a well-equipped gym with a range of cardiovascular and weight stack machines, free weights and dumbbells. We can also help you make exercise plans and support you to achieve your goals. Most importantly, we have dedicated male and female only gym sessions.

The fitness studio is where we hold a range of classes from Pilates to Zumba, we’re always here to advise on what would best suit your level of fitness. Additionally, we have rooms to hire for meetings, community events and parties. Get ready to make a splash in the heart of Elswick where fitness meets community spirit!

Name: The Authority for Integrity in Maltese Sport (AIMS)
Description:
In a world where ethical failures and corruption are visible challenges, The Authority for Integrity in Maltese Sport (AIMS) stands as a beacon, striving to eliminate unsporting behavior and promote the values of integrity, fair play, and equality in Maltese sports.

At AIMS, our primary objective is to combat various threats to the integrity of sports, ranging from the use of illegal performance-enhancing drugs to match fixing, manipulation of competitions, anti-money laundering, and all forms of harassment and abuse. While acknowledging Malta's commendable sports integrity environment, we aim to further reduce instances of unsporting behavior by implementing policy, regulations and educational initiatives.

We work tirelessly to ensure that the principles of good governance, integrity, fair play, and equality are not just ideals but integral components of the sporting community. Core values which we want to share across all stakeholders in the Maltese sporting landscape.

Name: Southern Illinois HappyFeet Soccer
Description:
HappyFeet is an exciting mobile soccer clinic for children aged 2-6. Our non-competitive “Story Time with a Soccer Ball” approach is used at daycares, preschools and recreation centers. We're committed to helping children form HEALTHY EXERCISE HABITS using the world's most popular game, soccer!

We use familiar songs, stories, nursery rhymes and fun games to introduce soccer to children as young as two years old. Our unique curriculum triggers your child's imagination by taking their soccer ball, Bob the Bobcat, on adventures to the zoo, the movies, and even an enchanted castle! Our philosophy and curriculum encourages children to tame their bobcat with their learned deceptive dribbling and ball striking skills. We leverage creative play and the important developmental skills it provides to make fitness and soccer their favorite weekly activity!

OUR HISTORY
The original HappyFeet program started in 1988 when Kansas City's La Petite preschools ran field trips to Andy Barney's indoor soccer facility. Andy thought teaching soccer to 3,4 & 5 year olds would be easy. After 6 stressful back-to-back, one-hour lessons, Andy quickly realized that an educational curriculum sensitive to the needs of young children needed to be developed. It was then that stories such as "Hiawatha, the Dribbling Indian" and "Gus, the Banana Gobbling Gorilla" were created. Later nursery rhymes and songs such as "Roll, roll, roll the ball" to the tune of "Row, row, row your boat" were added.

Name: SP Football Consulting
Description:
SP Football è una piattaforma di alta formazione dedicata agli allenatori di calcio ed altre figure che propone videocorsi e percorsi online progettati per aiutarli a crescere professionalmente e a migliorare le proprie competenze. 

Fondata da Sergio Pellegrino, allenatore con licenza UEFA A spagnola e sostenuta da collaborazioni con professionisti di rilievo come Filippo Galli, Silvio Broli ed altri, SP Football si distingue per il suo approccio innovativo e focalizzato sulla pratica.

Missione
SP Football mira a colmare il divario tra teoria e pratica nella formazione degli allenatori. Troppo spesso, i corsi tradizionali si concentrano esclusivamente sugli aspetti teorici, lasciando poco spazio all'applicazione pratica. SP, invece, propone un metodo formativo che unisce solide basi teoriche a esperienze pratiche, per preparare allenatori pronti ad affrontare le sfide reali sul campo.

Offerta Formativa
La piattaforma di SP è progettata per soddisfare le esigenze di allenatori di ogni livello, con una gamma completa di percorsi formativi. 

Percorso di affiancamento 
Gli aspiranti allenatori possono accedere a un percorso di affiancamento mirato per affrontare con successo l'accesso richiesto dalla scuola allenatori spagnola.

Videocorsi e Percorsi Online
Oltre ai corsi per la Licenza UEFA, SP Football offre master su specifiche aree tecniche e tattiche, come i principi individuali di gioco e le competenze strategiche per allenatori di giovanili. Questi percorsi sono ideali per chi desidera specializzarsi in aspetti particolari del gioco o per coloro che vogliono migliorare la propria comprensione del calcio moderno.

Approccio Digitalizzato e Interattivo
SP Football sfrutta la tecnologia per offrire un'esperienza formativa all'avanguardia. 
Gli iscritti possono accedere a una piattaforma digitale personalizzata

Name: PeakPlay
Description:
PADEL LESSONS

We don’t want to sound too full of ourselves, but we’ve had people tell us they learned more from us in just 10 minutes than they did in a whole year elsewhere. We suggest you give our lessons a try. We believe strongly in the concept of group training. After all, becoming a great football player isn’t just about practicing kicking the ball by yourself. Consistency and working together are the keys to mastering the fun art of playing the Tasty Way.

CLINICS & CAMPS

If you’d like to organize your own camp, we’re happy to travel anywhere in the world. We can offer intensive padel camps for your club or friends or help educate your coaches about the Tasty method! Our trips always include some cool stuff, on- and off-court lessons, and exciting exhibition matches.

A minimum of 3 days in Europe and at least 1 week outside Europe is required. Please reach out to us for more information.

CLUB CONSULTING

Ever thought about starting your own club or academy? We’ve helped many successful clubs get started from scratch. We can assist in training your coaches, setting up an academy, scheduling padel activities, and most importantly, building a community!

COACHING COURSES

Tired of teaching the basics? Our teaching approach might not be the only one, but we believe it’s the best. We coach all levels, from beginners to pro players. You can organize a coaching course or visit our Academy to become a certified Tasty Coach.

We get you started and provide you lesson package to run a full season of trainings for your clients. With us, you

Name: Top Speed Golf
Description:
Here's what we provide at Top Speed Golf:

-Learn the moves that REALLY matter in golf. Don’t waste your time with thousands of debilitating thoughts on things that won’t help your performance. Focus on the 5 pieces of the swing that actually improve your game.

-Improve faster with the only learning system that is truly step by step, all based on the latest learning research.

-User-friendly course layout with game-changing step-by-step video programs rather than random tips that confuse you.

Top Speed Golf specializes in online golf instruction with a system developed by Clay Ballard, who has spent thousands of hours and several years learning biomechanics and how the top players in the world move their bodies in the golf swing.

There are 5 pieces to the system that, when performed correctly, give you about 95% of the results in your swing:

1. Stable & Fluid Spine

2. Power Turn

3. Top Speed Lag

4. Compression Line

5. Straight-Line Release

Name: City Community Tennis - Jensen's Tennis
Description:
City Community Tennis is based in the heart of Sydney, Australia since 1988. We live and breathe tennis and are open and accessible to anyone wanting to earn tennis or to have a game! Member or not, everyone is welcome. 

Winner of the 2019 Tennis NSW Award for Most Outstanding Tennis Centre (Metropolitan) we offer court hire, lessons, competitions, social tennis, tennis racquet and ball purchases too. With 12 full-size tennis courts across 5 locations and 4 mini-courts for you to choose from, there's somewhere to play within minutes of the Sydney CBD and local universities.  Our online booking and payment system means you can book and pay for courts and programs online 24/7 and can access the tennis court with a PIN at the security gate.

For the frequent player we offer a membership package with loads of discounts.Tennis is our passion, which is why we aim to keep it affordable and accessible to people of all ages and levels of ability. We run an adaptive tennis hub for players with disabilities and the NSW Wheelchair Tennis Hub in partnership with Tennis Australia and Wheelchair Sports NSW. Our Prince Alfred Park Tennis Courts are home to the University of Technology Sydney (UTS) Tennis Club and elite tennis team. Our uniquely cosmopolitan and international mix of players means you might even see ATP or WTA tour player on the court right next to you!

City Community Tennis is managed by Jensen's Tennis, a family owned business originally founded by Eddie Patrick Jensen in the 1930's. We have received numerous awards over the years including: Tennis NSW Finalist Most Inclusive Tennis Initiative 2021, Winner Most Outstanding Tennis Club NSW 2019 and 2017, Finalist Most Outstanding Tennis Club NSW 2018. Tennis Australia Newcombe Medal Finalist Most Outstanding Tennis Club 2017Finalist Most Outstanding Tennis Club 2015, Finalist Most Outstanding Tennis Community 2014, Winner Most Outstanding Tennis Community 2013 and Winner Most Outstanding Tennis Club 2012.

Name: AVENTURE FLOREVAL
Description:
Depuis 2018, le parc Aventure Floreval propose aux entreprises un service d’organisation de séminaires et de journées de team building sur mesure. 

Laissez-vous porter par notre savoir-faire pour construire ensemble votre journée idéale. Nos activités de team building proposées par notre parc (22 parcours d’Accrobranches, Olympiades, Laser Game, Bootcamp, Escape Game, etc.) s'adaptent à vos envies et au niveau de vos collaborateurs.

L'avantage de notre parc est que vous pouvez organiser toutes vos activités au même endroit sans avoir à vous déplacer durant la journée.

Nous vous ferons vivre une journée unique de cohésion d’équipe, hors des sentiers battus, pleine d’émotions et de sensations.

Nous avons une capacité d'accueil de plus 100 personnes pour vos séminaires dans notre maison forestière (jusqu’à 250 personnes en version cocktail et barbecue) et 800 personnes pour l'organisation de vos activités de Team Building. Le parc peut évidemment être entièrement privatisé pour votre entreprise !

Créé par Alain Pater, Aventure Floreval a ouvert ses portes en 2005. Situé en bordure du parc naturel de la Haute Vallée de Chevreuse, les infrastructures sont au cœur d’un espace naturellement vallonné de 1 000 hectares.

A 30 minutes de Paris, Aventure Floreval est un parc de loisirs qui a été labellisé Qualité Tourisme, Partenaire officiel de "Paris Je t'aime" et fait partie du Syndicat des Loisirs Actifs (SLA). 

Le parc Aventure Floreval respecte en outre les valeurs écologiques du fondateur. Les structures du parc et toutes les activités s’intègrent à l’environnement sans avoir de répercussion sur la faune et la flore environnante. 

Le parc est ouvert du 23 mars au 29 octobre 2023.

Organisation, gestion des participants, anticipation des conditions météo, contactez-nous, nous répondrons à toutes vos questions avec plaisir.

Coaching options:

• Accelerate:  Online, group, coach-led programmes
• Elevate: Personalised 1-to-1 coaching

Whether you're returning from injury, chasing a goal or breaking through a plateau, you'll get the structure and support to achieve results you thought were behind you.

We believe your best cycling years are still ahead.

Train smart. Ride strong. Live fully.

 Ready to ride stronger? Learn more on our website or message us directly.

Soy Martí, y hace un año empecé a construir lorari, una app que nace de una idea muy simple: hacer más fácil la vida de los profesores de yoga y pilates freelance, y acercar el bienestar al aire libre a más personas.

lorari es una plataforma donde cualquier persona puede descubrir y reservar clases de yoga, meditación u otras actividades saludables en espacios abiertos, guiadas por instructores independientes con experiencia.

El objetivo es doble:
 Facilitar a los usuarios el acceso a clases auténticas en entornos inspiradores como la playa, el parque o la montaña.
 Ayudar a los profesores a gestionar mejor sus clases, pagos y alumnos, todo desde un solo lugar.

El proyecto está en fase final de desarrollo y ya hemos empezado a construir una comunidad increíble de profes que nos están ayudando a mejorar cada detalle.

Gracias por seguir de cerca este proyecto que empezó con una idea caminando por la playa de Barcelona y que hoy está muy cerca de hacerse realidad.

Name: Kings River Custom
Description:
Introducing Kings River Custom (KRC) – a realm where craftsmanship, precision, and artistry converge to give birth to the epitome of custom 1911 pistols. With a formidable team of seasoned Custom 1911 Gunsmiths boasting an unparalleled 110+ years of collective experience, KRC stands as a testament to the legacy of artisanal firearm creation.

At the heart of KRC's ethos lies a passion for perfection and an unwavering commitment to producing the most exceptional custom 1911 pistols available today. This assembly of master gunsmiths, each a virtuoso in their craft, harnesses their decades of expertise to forge pistols that are not just weapons but works of art that transcend time and function.

The KRC team is composed of individuals who have honed their skills through countless hours of dedicated labor and continuous refinement. Their hands have breathed life into metal, their eyes have scrutinized every minute detail, and their expertise has been passed down through generations of gunsmiths. Each artisan possesses a deep reverence for the legacy of the 1911 platform, coupled with an innovative spirit that drives them to push boundaries and embrace modern technology while respecting the timeless traditions of gunsmithing.

With a focus on delivering excellence, KRC is positioned to become the premier destination for Custom 1911 aficionados. The meticulous attention to detail, the fusion of traditional craftsmanship with contemporary innovation, and the dedication to creating heirloom-quality pieces ensure that KRC's custom 1911 pistols are destined to become prized possessions for generations to come.

In a world where mass production often overshadows the art of meticulous creation, Kings River Custom stands as a beacon of authenticity, offering a sanctuary for those who seek a truly custom and unparalleled 1911 experience.

Name: SENTR
Description:
We are supercharging social sport. 

Our mission is to use our digital superpowers for good: by getting more people to play sport more often. 

Sentr enables players to track and share their achievements, compete with their friends and teammates, and boost their enjoyment of the game.

That means no more lost match report emails, or top scorers on spreadsheets!

With thousands of matches already uploaded from all over the world, we have an audacious vision: to be the record of the world's team sport matches with software that makes amateurs feel like pros.

Because we know that it doesn’t matter whether you’re playing Champions League or Sunday League, we all want to bask in the glory of victory, work out where it all went wrong and be the best player we can be.

Name: Expand Sports
Description:
Steigere dein Wohlbefinden durch den Aufbau guter Gewohnheiten.
Bewegung ist längst keine Selbstverständlichkeit mehr, die sich organisch aus dem Leben ergibt. Das moderne Leben serviert uns Bequemlichkeit auf dem Silbertablett, und es erfordert Mut und Willenskraft, sich dieser Verlockung zu entziehen. Doch genau hier liegt deine Chance: Immer wieder aufzustehen, zu stehen statt zu sitzen, die Treppe statt den Lift zu nehmen – all das macht Bewegung und Gesundheit zu einer bewussten, persönlichen Haltung. Es geht nicht nur darum, Bewegungsmöglichkeiten aktiv und selbstverständlich zu nutzen, sondern darum, eine Tugend zu kultivieren, die tief in unserer genetischen DNA verankert ist.
Location: Oetwil / Oetwil an der Limmat, Zurich

Name: Spéléo Québec
Description:
Fondé en 1970, Spéléo Québec (Société québécoise de spéléologie) est un organisme à but non-lucratif, reconnu comme organisme national de loisir (ONL) par le ministère de l’Éducation du Québec. Nous regroupons les spéléologues, les canyoneurs et canyoneuses, les gestionnaires et propriétaires de sites de pratiques, ainsi que les acteurs et actrices qui s’impliquent de près ou de loin dans ces activités hors du commun.

 
La spéléologie, c’est l’exploration, la découverte et l’étude des cavernes et autres phénomènes associés. En plus d’être une activité de plein air, une dimension scientifique majeure contribue à alimenter la passion des spéléologues. Un intérêt pour la géologie, la géomorphologie, la découverte, les étroitures, les gouffres ou simplement l’esthétisme des cavités souterraine vient rassembler les pratiquants et pratiquantes de cette activité, pour former une communauté chaleureuse.

 
Le canyonisme (ou canyoning) est une activité de plein air qui consiste à parcourir un cours d’eau encaissé présentant souvent un dénivelé important et un débit d’eau plutôt rapide. Ce parcours aventure amène le pratiquant ou la pratiquante à utiliser diverses techniques de progression pour franchir différents obstacles tels que des cascades, des chutes et des toboggans. Récemment pris en charge par Spéléo Québec, cette activité relativement méconnue rassemble pourtant des adeptes passionnés et aventuriers. Nous sommes fébriles de développer des projets en partenariat avec les acteurs et actrices du milieu.

 
Nos membres se forment et se perfectionnent dans les stages offerts par l’École québécoise de spéléologie, et s’outillent de techniques avancées pour parcourir le monde dans le but d’élargir leurs horizons, contribuant ainsi à faire rayonner le Québec à l’international. La transmission de notre passion pour la spéléologie et le canyonisme à de nouveaux adeptes motivent et guident notre travail, ainsi que nos projets.

Name: Floating Wave BTG mbH
Description:
Die Floating Wave Beteiligungsgesellschaft mbH mit Sitz in Hamburg entwickelt innovative und nachhaltige Lösungen im Bereich künstlicher Surfwellen, um urbane Wasserflächen in attraktive Freizeit- und Sportdestinationen zu verwandeln. Unser erstes Projekt, die Floating Wave Hamburg, wird 2026 im Fischereihafen eröffnet und bietet ein einzigartiges Surf-Erlebnis in zentraler Citylage.

Unser Konzept kombiniert moderne Surftechnologie mit nachhaltigem Design und schafft multifunktionale Orte für Sport, Gastronomie und Events. Dank modularer Bauweise und Mobilität ist die Floating Wave flexibel an verschiedene Standorte anpassbar und ermöglicht eine globale Skalierung.

Unsere Technologie setzt neue Maßstäbe in Sachen Nachhaltigkeit: 54 % weniger Energieverbrauch und bis zu 80 % weniger Wasserbedarf machen die Floating Wave nicht nur umweltfreundlich, sondern auch kosteneffizient.

Mit der Floating Wave schaffen wir nicht nur eine Attraktion für Hamburg, sondern bieten eine schlüsselfertige Systemlösung mit enormem Wachstumspotenzial. Gemeinsam mit Partnern wie MEYER Floating Solutions bieten wir unsere pontongestützten künstlichen Surfwellen weltweit an, um urbane Surfspots in Hafenstädten und Küstenregionen zu etablieren.

Erfahren Sie mehr über unsere Vision und Projekte auf unserer Website: www.floating-wave.com.

#UrbanSurfing #Sustainability #Innovation #FloatingWave #Hamburg

Name: Mixed Fight Center by Yohan Lidon
Description:

Les 20 ans d’expérience mondiale dans la boxe professionnelle de Yohan Lidon et l’expertise de René Même, préparateur physique de renom, ont permis de concevoir un espace performant, fonctionnel et complet tant au niveau des disciplines proposées que des services associés .

Name: Veadeiros Rafting
Description:
A Veadeiros Rafting nasceu a partir das experiências vividas por um grupo de amigos praticantes de kayak de águas brancas, que ao procurar boas corredeiras e cachoeiras para saltar ao longo de mais de 10 anos, acabaram explorando os mais incrustrados rios do maciço rochoso da Chapada dos Veadeiros, percebendo que nem os moradores nem os guias e nenhum ser humano teve o privilegio de conhecer a Chapada dessa forma, pois só é possível atravessar as isoladas regiões através da navegação em corredeiras.

A nossa missão é compartilhar o nosso estilo de vida com nossos clientes, transformando em roteiros os rios isolados, transparentes, repletos de peixes, acampando nas margens, conhecendo moradores incríveis, dividindo as experiências que só um destino com muitos tipos de rios e diferentes níveis de dificuldades como a Chapada dos Veadeiros pode oferecer.

A equipe Veadeiros Rafting é especialista em levar pessoas que gostam de aventura a lugares pouco ou nunca visitados pelo homem, oferecendo expedições que vão de 9 km a 7 dias de duração, não importa se você quer um passeio rápido e fácil ou uma das maiores expedições de rafting do Brasil, a Veadeiros Rafting tem o que você procura!

Description: MyOutdoorJoy is a family-friendly local Charlotte-region outdoor recreational company focused on teaching adult beginners and those looking to build on past outdoor experiences, new skills ranging from hiking to SCUBA diving, as well as classroom topics such as emergency prepping and keeping your pets safe on the trails. Name: Institut Sports Océan
Description:
Établissement de la Ville des Sables d'Olonne, l'Institut Sports Océan est un centre de nautisme et de glisse, un centre de formation mais aussi un centre d'hébergement-restauration, idéalement situé entre le lac de Tanchet et la plage.

Il occupe une place particulière au sein de la politique sportive et nautique des Sables d’Olonne, et s’inscrit dans la dynamique touristique de la destination. 

SON SECTEUR NAUTIQUE :
- découverte et initiation des scolaires du territoire des Sables d’Olonne aux activités nautiques et à la culture maritime
- découverte, initiation et perfectionnement de la population locale et touristique aux activités nautiques, particulièrement pendant les vacances scolaires
- promotion et orientation de la population locale et touristique vers toute l’offre nautique du territoire
- accompagnement des associations nautiques locales dans leur développement, notamment à travers la mise à disposition d’espaces et de matériels
- gestion des espaces municipaux de pratiques nautiques


SON SECTEUR SÉJOURS :
- accueil de groupes en stages sportifs
- accueil de classes en séjours scolaires
- accueil de séjours collectifs divers
- accueil de séminaires et réunions à la journée


SON SECTEUR FORMATIONS :
-  accueil, organisation et production de formations à l’encadrement des activités sportives, particulièrement nautiques

Name: JET Winterswijk
Description:
EMS training: Veilig trainen in een persoonlijke sfeer. Tijdens EMS training worden gedurende 20 minuten je grootste spiergroepen gestimuleerd door elektroden. Op deze manier verhoog je je spiermassa, uithoudingsvermogen en vitaliteit. Ze noemen deze manier van trainen ook wel weerstandstraining. EMS Is vergelijkbaar met de werking van ons eigen zenuwstelstel. Ons lichaam verstuurt namelijk dagelijks miljoenen signalen via ons zenuwstelstel met als doel informatie van onze spieren te ontvangen en te verwerken. 20 minuten EMS training staat gelijk aan 3 uur klassieke krachttraining.   
 

Yin Yoga: Yin Yoga is een rustige vorm van yoga.  Tijdens de Yin lessen houd je een aantal minuten stretchhoudingen vast. Op die manier wordt het bindweefsel opgerekt en gestimuleerd. Hierdoor herstelt en verbetert je mobiliteit en flexibiliteit. Je wordt uitgedaagd om jouw grenzen te verkennen en te verleggen. Van je hoofd weer naar je lijf. Daarbij kom je ook nog in een diepe ontspanning terecht. Je hoeft hiervoor niet lenig te zijn, deze vorm van yoga wordt ook veel door mannen beoefend. 
 

Voedingsbegeleiding: Misschien duurt het 100 dagen om een nieuwe gewoonte eigen te maken, maar deze gewoonte verandert de rest van je leven. Heb jij liefdevol die schop onder je kont nodig, maar ook iemand die klaar staat voor je. Kom dan eens bij mij op bezoek, ik geef je praktische tips en handvaten mee voor een gezonder voedingspatroon. Ik help je graag.

Name: LEAD Field Hockey
Description:
Welcome to LEAD, your go-to platform for everything field hockey.

Under the leadership of Thomas Briels, a four-time Olympian, European and World Cup champion, and Euro Hockey Hall-of-Famer, we've assembled a team of field hockey experts eager to share their wealth of knowledge with you.

Our mission is simple yet powerful: to provide the best hockey video resources for players, coaches, and fans around the world to improve their skills and expertise. 

Imagine having a personal playbook at your fingertips, filled with top-quality video content that not only teaches you skills and tactics but also immerses you in the heart and soul of the sport. That's what LEAD is all about – providing you with a dynamic digital platform that brings the essence of field hockey to life in a way that's engaging, informative, and inspiring.

We believe that field hockey is more than just a game; it's a journey of growth, camaraderie, and self-discovery. That's why we've created a diverse range of videos, from technical drills to tactical insights, crafted by world-class players and trainers who share your passion for the sport. Whether you're a beginner looking to learn the basics or a seasoned player aiming to refine your skills, LEAD has something for everyone.

But LEAD is more than just a collection of videos – it's a community of like-minded individuals who share a common love for field hockey. It's a hub of inspiration, where you can stay up-to-date with the latest trends and strategies that define success in the game.

So, why do we do what we do? Because we believe that field hockey has the power to transform lives – to instill discipline, resilience, teamwork, and a sense of achievement. We're here to support you on your journey, to provide you with the tools and knowledge you need to thrive both on and off the field. Our goal is to elevate the level of hockey around the globe.

Join us on our exciting journey.

Welcome to LEAD – your digital playbook for the game we love.

Name: Cricket For Girls
Description:
Cricket for Girls works with schools and clubs to guide and support the delivery of a high quality girls cricket programme. We pride ourselves on providing schools and clubs with a service that will ensure they can deliver a sustainable programme by focusing on two main areas:

1. Training the teachers and coaches
2. Inspiring the pupils and players

Firstly, we focus on facilitating teachers and coaches development through our Teachers and Coaches CPD Courses and Online Learning Hub.All content has been designed and written by our Founder and Head Coach, Lydia Greenway OBE.

Secondly, we deliver taster sessions, masterclasses, school/club awards evenings and day camps in schools and clubs to ensure pupils/players continue to have the opportunity to be coached by high quality coaches.

Description:

Det måste gå att göra solglasögon av bästa kvalitet utan att de ska behöva kosta lika mycket som solglasögon från de mest kända varumärkena - och det gick!

2021 lanserades ALPE Eyewears första kollektion av sportglasögon - Stelvio - som både är snygga och håller extremt god kvalitet. Skillnaden är det låga och pressade priset.

Ge dig ut i spåret (eller utanför om du föredrar det) och känn dig samtidigt riktigt cool och snygg - det ingår i priset!

Name: Turks and Caicos Islands Football Association (TCIFA)
Description:
The Turks and Caicos Islands Football Association (TCIFA) is a non-profit organisation in the business of football development throughout the Turks and Caicos Islands. The TCIFA has been in operation since 1996, and a member of FIFA, since 1998. The TCIFA’s Grassroots Development Plan is a crucial extension of the continuous efforts of the TCIFA to develop and expand grassroots football in the Islands. The implementation of these structured programmes has helped the Association create newly qualified coaches and has assisted the Department of Sports and Education with the establishment of football in the school’s curriculum. The schools have furthered been supported by the provision of equipment and the establishment of annual competitions organized and played at the TCIFA National Academy.

This initiative has seen a huge growth in the number of youth players actively participating in the sport. The benefit of this has allowed the Association to set up dedicated Centres of Excellence for both boys and girls.

The growth in football has impacted not only our youth and grassroots program but has extended to and embraced other age groups and areas of the game.

Name: SKILL UP Training Canada
Description:
We are dedicated to shaping the future of soccer in Clarington, Ontario, by offering top-tier Futsal training designed to elevate the skills and capabilities of young players. Futsal, an indoor variant of soccer, provides a unique platform for honing essential soccer skills.

Our program emphasizes agility, precision, quick decision-making, and exceptional ball control. Our expert coaches create an immersive learning environment, catering to beginners and advanced players alike. Players enhance their technical prowess and develop a deep understanding of teamwork, strategic play, and tactical thinking.

Our training center boasts state-of-the-art facilities, ensuring that each player receives the attention and guidance necessary to unlock their full potential. We cultivate a passion for the sport while instilling valuable life skills such as discipline, perseverance, and self-confidence.

As passionate proponents of soccer's positive impact on youth development, we are committed to fostering a sense of community among players, parents, and coaches. Join us on this exhilarating journey as we harness the power of Futsal to shape well-rounded, skilled, and confident soccer players who embody excellence both on and off the field. With Futsal as our driving force, we are dedicated to creating a generation of athletes who carry Clarington's name to new heights in the world of soccer.

Name: Polski Związek Szermierczy
Description:
Misja Polskiego Związku Szermierczego

Rozpowszechnianie i dbanie o rozwój szermierki jako dyscypliny sportowej zapewniającej szeroko pojęty rozwój człowieka.

Rozwój ten ma charakter wszechstronny – obejmuje zarówno sprawność fizyczną i zdrowie, jak i osobowość. Kształtuje cenne cechy i  umiejętności: zespołowość, współpraca, dążenie do doskonałości, rycerskość – szacunek dla przeciwnika, szacunek dla trenera i sędziego. Buduje wzajemne zaufanie i poczucie odpowiedzialności.

Name: Sulky Passion
Description:
Découvrez une activité unique et inédite en Normandie ! 

Liberté, vitesse, adrénaline sont au rendez-vous de ce baptême en sulky sur la plage de Cabourg ou à la campagne, à travers les bois et entourés de prestigieux haras.

Équipé des pieds à la tête, embarquez sur un sulky double aux côtés d'un driver expérimenté et laissez-vous guider pour une course de trot magique en toute sécurité. Les plus téméraires pourront s'essayer à prendre les rênes de leur cheval de course, toujours sous contrôle du driver.

Tels des jockeys entrainant les champions aux courses mythiques, Grand Prix d'Amérique ou Prix des Ducs de Normandie, ressentez la puissance de votre monture au rythme des sabots sur le sable au ras des flots.

Vous ne prenez qu’un risque : être mouillé par les embruns et les éclaboussures d’eau de mer !

Créez vos équipes : en famille, entre amis. Ou, à travers un séminaire d’entreprise / team building : occasion idéale de créer des souvenirs et de renforcer la cohésion au sein de votre équipe.

 06-51-41-46-77
 chazal.constance@gmail.com
 sulky-passion.com

Name: BLAZE
Description:
Blaze is the leading sports & fitness management team providing the best training, branding, and recruiting services for the complete athlete. Blaze is changing the world one athlete at a time by training champions for life! We offer assessments, training, strength & conditioning services as well as promotion of athletes to help you elevate your game! Call us to join the team or experience our services.

We integrate faith-based and scientifically sound custom training, branding, events, and gear in our state of the art athletic facility.

Our vision is to be the leading sports & fitness management company who connect athletes with a team of professionals that guide athletes on an exciting adventure of personal mentorship, comprehensive training, competitive experiences, and strategic positioning that transforms the motivated athlete into an inspiring life long champion that compete at the highest levels and leaves a legacy by positively impacting their communities personally and professionally.

Our culture is based on a family-friendly, collaborative, supportive system, managed in a fast paced, scientifically grounded, positive, team oriented community!

Our Blaze Coaches will help You

Discover your path
Be victorious on your journey
Inspire the champion in all of us

Name: Vechten met de Meiden
Description:
Vechten met de Meiden (VMDM) heeft als doelstelling het vroegtijdig aanpakken, of voorkomen van een negatieve ontwikkeling, van de mentale- en fysieke gezondheid van niet- sportende meiden tussen de 12 en 15 jaar. 

Gedurende 20 weken worden de deelneemsters met behulp van vrouwelijke rolmodellen en verschillende interventies ondersteunt in het verbeteren van hun zelfbeeld, zelfvertrouwen en vitale leefstijl.

Name: Urban Xtreme Ltd
Description:
Welcome to Urban Xtreme, your ultimate destination for a unique and exhilarating experience! Step into a world where adrenaline meets entertainment, featuring an array of thrilling activities that are guaranteed to leave you buzzing with excitement.

At Urban Xtreme, we offer an invigorating mix of activities, including axe throwing, a rage room, and retro gaming, providing a one-of-a-kind fusion of fun and high-energy adventure. Whether you're seeking a release for pent-up stress or simply looking for an exciting outing with friends, our venue promises an unforgettable time.

Experience the thrill of axe throwing in a safe and controlled environment, where you can unleash your inner warrior and test your skills in a competitive and engaging setting. Our expert instructors will guide you through the art of axe throwing, ensuring a safe and enjoyable experience for all participants.

For those seeking an unconventional way to release stress and tension, our rage room offers a unique outlet for letting off steam. Let loose and break, smash, and destroy a variety of objects in a controlled environment, allowing you to release any pent-up emotions in a safe and exhilarating manner.

Step back in time with our retro gaming area, where classic video games and arcade machines await. Immerse yourself in a nostalgic journey through the golden age of gaming, challenging friends and family to classic battles and reliving the excitement of retro gaming culture.

Our venue is designed to cater to individuals, groups, and special events, offering a memorable experience for parties, team-building activities, and celebrations. Whether you're planning a unique corporate event or a thrilling birthday party, Urban Xtreme provides an exciting and engaging backdrop for any occasion.

Safety is paramount at Urban Xtreme, and our experienced staff are dedicated to ensuring a secure and enjoyable environment for all our guests. We maintain strict safety protocols and guidelines, prov

Name: Creating Champions Peru
Description:
We are always looking for interns, thesis writers and volunteers from Germany, Switzerland, Austria and France for the positions in sports coaching, marketing and web development.

Creating Champions Peru (CCP) is a young and dynamic organization for social assistance in sports who offers children by professional sports training a fair and real opportunity to let their dreams come true.

Name: VDCC All Abilities Cricket
Description:
At Valleys District Cricket Club, we believe cricket is more than just a game – it’s a community. In 2021, we proudly launched the All Abilities Cricket Program to provide a safe, inclusive, and supportive space for neurodiverse children and young adults to enjoy the game we all love.

Our program is specifically designed to welcome participants of all abilities, ensuring every individual has the opportunity to engage, grow, and thrive through cricket. From the start, our mission has been to create a space where everyone feels valued and included, regardless of their level of experience or confidence.

Held every Friday evening during the cricket season, our sessions are packed with fun, laughter, and teamwork. Each week, participants engage in group activities tailored to their needs, supported by our dedicated team of coaches and volunteers. These activities focus on skill-building, confidence development, and fostering friendships within the cricket community.

Name: DIVERSION NATURE
Description:
Diversion Nature – Séjours & excursions à vélo en liberté 

Après 19 ans dans l’industrie, j’ai choisi de mettre mon expertise au service d’un projet aligné avec mes valeurs. Bénévole à l’Ardéchoise de 2016 à 2021, j’ai été membre du conseil d’administration de 2019 à 2021, puis directeur en 2021 et 2022. Cet engagement dans l’un des plus grands événements cyclistes d’Europe m’a permis d’acquérir une solide expérience en organisation de séjours et en gestion d’événements d’envergure.

En parallèle, mon rôle d’élu au bureau du Parc Naturel Régional du Pilat (2020-2021), sur les enjeux du tourisme, m’a apporté une connaissance approfondie du territoire et du tourisme durable.

C’est avec cette expérience et cette passion que j’ai fondé Diversion Nature, une invitation à découvrir l’Ardèche Verte et le massif du Pilat autrement, à vélo, en autonomie ou accompagné.

 Un voyage à vélo, autrement
• Séjours de 1 à 4 jours, en autonomie ou accompagnés
• Itinéraires variés et accessibles grâce à l’assistance électrique
• Des pauses gourmandes et des rencontres avec des acteurs locaux engagés
• Un tourisme respectueux, loin des foules, favorisant l’immersion et la convivialité

 Un territoire à explorer autrement
Explorez l’Ardèche Verte et le massif du Pilat, entre routes secrètes et paysages préservés, aux portes de Lyon, Saint-Étienne et de la Vallée du Rhône.

 Envie d’évasion ?
Que vous soyez cycliste aguerri ou débutant, seul, en duo, en famille ou en groupe, nous vous accompagnons dans votre aventure.

 Contactez-moi pour en discuter !

 07 84 14 42 54
 www.diversion-nature.fr

Name: APEXGOLF INSTRUCTION
Description:
We were established in 2021 with the intention of being the best indoor teaching facility. We are using the best technology in golf to improve your game and practicing experience.

We have FULLSWING simulator technology, with the most realistic playing experience out there. It also includes the club-head-at-impact camera system, which is instrumental in improving your game. All lessons and practice sessions are recorded and accessible to the student.

We also have 4-D Motion Sensors to capture all movements of the body throughout the swing. We do custom club fitting with the FULLSWING technology measuring all aspects of the game to make sure you get the right equipment.

We have 25+ years of teaching as PGA Certified Instructors and thousands of lessons taught. We are here to improve your game and take it to the next level. Come and train with APEXGOLF.

Call us to schedule in Draper: 385-253-7390  
Call us to schedule in Salt Lake City: 801-906-0489

Name: Bootcamp Wommels
Description:
Bootcamp Wommels geeft Bootcamp trainingen in de buitenlucht in en rondom Wommels. Door een sportfysiotherapeut wordt je op een verantwoorde manier uitgedaagd je grenzen te verleggen. Dit doen we met eigen lichaamsgewicht, maar ook met leuke, uitdagende materialen. Doel is om iedere les anders in te richten, met mogelijkheid om op ieder niveau jezelf uit te (laten) dagen!
Naast Regular Bootcamp, bieden we ook enkele malen per jaar 'Mommy's Bootcamp' aan. Dit is een specifiek programma voor de vrouw die aan het herstellen is na de bevalling en dit op sportieve wijze, lekker buiten wil doen.  Bij het programma Mommy's Bootcamp zijn ook andere professionals betrokken: een bekkenfysiotherapeut, een orthomoleculair therapeut en een life coach. Naast Bootcamp lessen, vinden er binnen dit programma ook bijeenkomsten plaats.

Name: ESCUELA NÁUTICA CABO MAYOR
Description:
Escuela Nautica Cabo Mayor ofrece la posibilidad de obtener todas las titulaciones náuticas de recreo: licencia de navegación, PNB, PER, ampliación PER, Patrón de Yate y Capitán de Yate.
Somos la única escuela homologada en Cantabria que imparte la HABILITACIÓN A VELA de la mano del ex-regatista olímpico Alejandro Ramos.
También ofrecemos un novedoso y eficaz sistema de formación teórica on-line que garantiza un 100% de aprobados para que estudies desde y cuando quieras.
El programa Post-titulaciones ofrece opciones para poder seguir navegando una vez obtenido el título. Mensualmente se organizan salidas y formaciones para todos los niveles, participación en regatas, travesías formativas, clases de iniciación y perfeccionamiento.
Somos la base del proyecto nacional Sea Starlight en Cantabria: navegación y astronomía se unen para ofrecer salidas con observación y degustación. Experiencia de Realidad Virtual entre el mar y las estrellas. Visitas al planetario de la Escuela Superior de Náutica de Santander.
Contamos con instructores de larga trayectoria profesional con puertos base en Santander, Castro Urdiales.

Name: MOVE FITNESS PLACE
Description:
Somos un centro deportivo que promueve hábitos de vida saludables y un mejor equilibrio entre cuerpo y mente para mejorar la salud a través del ejercicio físico. 
Con clara vocación hacia la calidad y el cuidado, combinamos conocimientos en teoría del entrenamiento, biomecánica y fisiología a través de una amplia propuesta de actividades y servicios deportivos.
Para ello, contamos con un equipo de profesionales con amplia experiencia en el ámbito de la salud y del rendimiento deportivo que te pautarán y acompañarán en tu entrenamiento para facilitarte la consecución de tus objetivos.
Location: Boadilla del Monte, Community of Madrid

Active Oman
Description:
أكتيف عُمان هي وجهة رائدة للترفيه، الرياضة، والتجارب التفاعلية في مسقط، سلطنة عُمان.

With growing interest from youth, families, and corporate groups, Active Oman is emerging as a dynamic hub for active lifestyles and vibrant experiences in the Sultanate.

Name: INFMS CC
Description:
Infms CC exists to disrupt the traditional cycling landscape and establish a culture of Inclusion, Diversity and Empowerment on a Grassroots, not-for-profit level.

The Veluwe is our canvas on which we draw knobbly tyred lines and we love nothing more than exploring the backcountry to discover its intimate beauty and unlock its hidden secrets. Respect for nature and our environment is an essential part of our approach in the outdoors. Sharing the stoke it brings whilst taking responsibility to protect it is a non-negotiable.

As a small but tight knit community we also stand to support local organizations and groups with an environmental or social/cultural focus. Sharing a positive energy with others and being able to impact other peoples lives for the better is what motivates us immensely.

Name: CFA Stade Montois
Description:

Name: Zaži Tatry
Description:

Name: WuDae
Description:
Fysiek en mentaal sterker worden! 

WuDae is 6 dagen per week geopend. Er zijn meer dan 20 lessen (in de avond, ochtend & het weekend), in een eigen school, centraal gelegen in Den Haag.

Bij WuDae krijgt je professionele begeleiding van onze deskundige leraren. In onze eigen school train je in groepsverband in een gezellige, gemoedelijke sfeer. Dankzij persoonlijke aandacht kun je op je eigen niveau aan een gezond, sterk en fit lichaam werken. Wil je liever privéles? Ook dat is mogelijk.

Bij WuDae train je wanneer het jou goed uitkomt. Want we zijn het hele jaar door zes dagen per week open. Ook tijdens vakantiesperiodes kun je volgens een aangepast rooster trainen. Onze sportschool ligt in het centrum van Den Haag en is goed bereikbaar.

Wing Chun is ongeveer 300 jaar geleden door een vrouw, genaamd Ng Mui, in China ontwikkeld. En vernoemt naar haar eerste leerling Yim Wing Chun. De stijl is vooral bekend geworden door Ip Man. Een van zijn leerlingen was de legendarische Bruce Lee.

Wing Chun Kung Fu is een zelfverdedigingstijl waarbij je je lichaam traint om logisch en slim te reageren in gevechtssituaties. Je leert hoe je via instinctieve reflexen de kracht van je tegenstander gebruikt om hem of haar te overmeesteren. Zelfs als deze groter en sterker is.

Bij sportschool WuDae leer je in het begin vooral de basisconcepten van Wing Chun, die bewezen effectief zijn. Daarnaast leer je bijvoorbeeld hoe jij je legaal verdedigt tegen een agressor. Het uiteindelijke doel is dat je je aanvallend leert te verdedigen binnen de vijf afstanden: trap, stoot, knie/elleboog, clinch en grond.

Onze leraren begeleiden je, zodat jij meester wordt in Wing Chun. Train je regelmatig, dan voel je dat je lichaam gezonder en sterker wordt. Hierdoor verbetert je concentratie en kun je beter omgaan met stress. Je ervaart dat je meer energie hebt bij andere activiteiten. Ervaar het zelf: meld je nu aan voor een gratis proefles.

Name: Well Street
Description:
Bienvenido a Well Street – Más que un gimnasio en Oleiros.

No somos un gimnasio, ni una clínica deportiva; pero combinamos lo mejor de ambos mundos para darte un servicio único y multidisciplinar.

En Well Street te guiamos de manera lúdica y personalizada, para que consigas la mejor versión de ti mismo. Estudiamos tu caso y nos adaptamos a tus necesidades, para que mediante el entrenamiento personal, el asesoramiento nutricional y la fisioterapia, ganes calidad de vida.

Estamos tan seguros de nuestro método, que te invitamos a una valoración gratuita en nuestro Wellness Club.
 ¿A qué esperas para invertir en salud?.

Name: Javier Calduch - Psicología Deportiva
Description:
Servicios de psicología deportiva para el alto rendimiento, deporte amateur y familias.

Trabajo con clubes y entidades deportivas en formaciones para padres, colaboraciones de psicología deportiva y asesoramiento a profesionales. 

Trabajo con empresas y equipos de trabajo de asesoramiento para potenciar el rendimiento empresarial.

Name: Aikido Dojo am Gleisdreieck Berlin
Description:
Das Aikido Dojo am Gleisdreieck besteht seit 1995 und wurde gegründet von Ulrike Serak. Sie ist eine der wenigen Frauen weltweit, die hauptberuflich Aikido unterrichten und Mitbegründerin der Aikido Förderation Deutschland. Ihre Aikido Ausbildung begann sie bei Meister Asai in Düsseldorf. Seit vielen Jahren ist sie Schülerin von Christian Tissier Shihan, von dem sie den 6. Dan Aikikai erhielt.
Seit 2004 leiten Ulrike Serak und Max Eriksson Ohlwein die Schule gemeinsam. Max übt Aikido seit seinem 17’ten Lebensjahr und unterrichtet auch das klassische Kenjutsu der Kashima No Tachi Schule. 2015 erhielt er den 5. Dan Aikikai.
Unsere Räume befindet sich zwischen Schöneberg und Kreuzberg, in der geographischen Mitte von Berlin. Auf 140 Quadratmetern Übungsfläche unterrichten wir Erwachsene, Kinder und Jugendliche von 6 bis 76 Jahren in Aikido und japanischem Schwerttraining.

Name: Ligue Francophone de Hockey
Description:
La Ligue Francophone de Hockey (LFH) a pour but d’administrer, d’organiser, de favoriser et de contrôler le développement et la pratique du hockey sur gazon et en salle en région de langue française et en région bilingue de Bruxelles-Capitale, sous tous ses aspects et ce à un niveau récréatif, compétitif et de haut niveau. Elle a notamment comme but de contribuer par ses activités à l’épanouissement et au bien-être physique, psychique et social de ses membres et de contribuer au développement de programmes de détection, de perfectionnement et de suivi des sportifs qui présentent des potentialités qui permettent d’augurer des résultats signifiants à l’occasion des Jeux Olympiques d’été ou d’hiver, des Championnats du Monde, d’Europe ou de toutes autres compétitions de haut niveau.

Pour organiser les championnats nationaux et donner du support aux équipes nationales, elle collabore avec l’Association Royale Belge de Hockey (ARBH) et la Vlaamse Hockey Liga (VHL).

La LFH a été créée en 2012.

Name: Yonder Adventure Company
Description:
Yonder Adventure Company is a leading UK-based outdoor adventure provider specializing in tailor-made experiences that connect individuals and groups with nature in unique and exciting ways. Offering a wide range of adventures, from guided hikes and mountain treks to bespoke outdoor challenges and team-building events, Yonder Adventure Company is dedicated to delivering memorable experiences that push boundaries and foster personal growth.

Whether you’re looking to escape the daily grind, embark on a thrilling adventure, or build stronger connections within your team, Yonder Adventure Company offers expert guidance, exceptional service, and a commitment to sustainability. With a deep love for the outdoors and a passion for adventure, we help you step out of your comfort zone and into the extraordinary.

Explore your limits with Yonder Adventure Company — where every journey is an adventure! #letsgoyonder

Name: APASO Santé
Description:
Je suis Solène, enseignante en activité physique adaptée basée à Eysines et alentours.

L'objectif principal de ma micro-entreprise est de rendre le mouvement accessible à tout le monde. En intégrant un programme avec Apaso, :
- Réalise des bilans de condition physique
- Fixe des objectifs atteignables à la hauteur de tes ambitions
- Pratique une activité physique qui te plait et te correspond, en sécurité, encadrée par une enseignante APA qualifiée avec l'expérience du terrain.
- Bénéficie d'un suivi de ta progression, de conseils avisés, de motivation externe et d'un accompagnement de qualité.

Au cours du programme, visualise et ressens l'évolution puis continue de pratiquer encore et encore ! 

Je propose des activités variées, en intérieur, en extérieur, en individuel ou en groupe. Nous déciderons ensemble des activités à mettre en place : renforcement musculaire, course à pied, natation, danse, boxe, ... Je créerai le programme adapté à tes besoins et des contraintes mais aussi et surtout, à tes envies.

Le mot d'ordre reste : PLAISIR ! alors profitons ensemble de séances d'activités physiques dans la bonne humeur pour se sentir bien dans son corps mais aussi dans sa tête.

J'espère créer une communauté de personnes ayant la volonté de se créer une nouvelle routine sportive, de partager des séances de sport mais aussi des instants conviviaux, dans la bienveillance, le rire et la joie ! 

Solène

Name: Malaika Golf
Description:
Malaika Golf stands as a living tribute to Angel Eaton, a trailblazer who etched her name in the annals of Tanzanian sports history as the first female professional golfer. The name "Malaika" is symbolic in itself, signifying "Angel" in Swahili, mirroring not just Angel's identity but also her unwavering spirit of determination and excellence that has defined her remarkable journey.

This is a virtual sanctuary with a mission to reshape the golfing landscape in Tanzania. Malaika Golf is resolutely dedicated to nurturing the sport, sowing the seeds of unity and disseminating love through a common passion for golf.

At its core, Malaika Golf is driven by an unyielding commitment to foster golf in Tanzania across all generations. Whether it's about cultivating the talents of young, budding juniors or honing the skills of seasoned adults, this platform serves as a wellspring of wisdom and inspiration. Here, golf enthusiasts of all ages and diverse backgrounds converge, creating a thriving community that contributes to the game's growth and evolution in Tanzania.

This page is a living testament to the transformative power of sports, capable of transcending boundaries and uniting people under the banner of golf.
Location: Dar es Salaam, Dar es Salaam

Name: Ecole Golf
Description:
Founded in 2014, Ecole Golf is a vast project that aims to make high-level training accessible to everyone, especially the youngest. In the spring of 2016, after having collected data for two years from more than 700 amateur members of the Merits of the FFGolf (including the best in each category), 84 Golf Schools and several thousand amateurs of different levels, we open www.ecole-golf.com. Bringing together several hundred documents in free access, our website allows everyone to progress, train and assess themselves as a high-level player.

Since 2016, our Academy located at Golf de Lezza has been particularly committed to continuing the work carried out in recent years. We have chosen the best analysis technologies to equip our academy: TrackMan for the analysis of the trajectory and the club, Smart2Move for the analysis of your supports and Coach Now for the video analysis of your swing. Used during each of our sessions and completely portable, our technological tools will allow you to obtain an analysis worthy of the best professional players in all areas of play.

Name: Santa Barbara Trapeze Co.
Description:
SB Trapeze: Elevating Experiences & Strengthening Community Bonds

Located in Santa Barbara, SB Trapeze is more than a trapeze school—it's a nexus of innovation, trust, and community engagement. We cater to a diverse audience, from individuals seeking thrill to businesses aiming for unique team-building experiences.

For Individuals: Dive into trapeze, whether celebrating a birthday, engaging in after-school activities, or enrolling in our year-round camps. Our expert trainers ensure a blend of safety and exhilaration.

For Businesses (B2B): Our trapeze sessions redefine corporate engagements, fostering trust, collaboration, and genuine connections.

Educational Experiences: We're proud to offer schools trapeze sessions that align with state standards. Our curriculum is meticulously crafted to provide educational value pre, during, and post-trip, making learning both fun and impactful.

Community & Sustainability: As custodians of the park, our green-certified establishment is a beacon of environmental sustainability. We actively engage in community welfare, hosting events and workshops that resonate with community spirit.

Special Programs & Partnerships: Our commitment to community extends beyond our sessions. We collaborate with nonprofits like Teddy Calm Unity, donating to special programs. Additionally, our brand partnerships amplify our reach and impact.

Join SB Trapeze, where we're not just about flying high but about elevating experiences, fostering community ties, and championing education.

Name: SafeSport
Description: SafeSport is an innovative suite of services that provides proactive support to sport and active recreation organisations to improve their policy, practice and response to integrity issues.   From an initial guided assessment, evaluation and resulting action plan, to the provision of ongoing support at differing levels (based on organisation size and need) SafeSport services can be tailored to elevate and maintain the highest standards of integrity for sport and active recreation organisations.

Name: bikebuebe
Description: MTB/E-MTB Fahrtechnik, Touren & Weekends, Privat-Coaching, Kinder- und Jugendkurse, Skills Sessions, Touren à la carte

Name: Climb Up Caen
Description:
Une expérience humaine et sportive unique
Les salles d'escalade du groupe Climb Up sont conçues comme des lieux de vie ouverts à tous, l’ensemble des activités verticales y sont proposées : escalade à corde, bloc, fun climbing... Par son aspect non traumatique et pour ses bienfaits physiques, sociaux et psychiques, l'escalade en voie permet d'accueillir un large public (enfants, personnes âgées, personnes en situation de handicap...). Toutes ces activités s’articulent autour d’un espace de détente convivial et attractif.

Un service de qualité et sécurisé
Nous ne cessons d’innover et d’optimiser nos process. Notre maîtrise du métier se nourrit quotidiennement des échanges entre collaborateurs des différentes salles du groupe et dans l'écoute des idées de chacun et chacune sur le terrain.
Nous mettons l'accent sur la qualité de l'ouverture, de l'encadrement et de l'accueil dans nos salles afin d'offrir une expérience escalade riche à nos grimpeurs. 

L’humain, au centre de la vision du groupe Climb Up. 
Des équipes dynamiques, compétentes et soudées constituent la force du concept Climb Up. Chaque équipier apporte son savoir-faire et son expérience afin de faire grandir et mûrir le concept de nos salles. 

Une volonté de se développer respectueusement.
L'escalade est initialement un sport qui se pratique en pleine nature, il nous tient donc à cœur de démocratiser notre discipline dans le respect de l'environnement en sensibilisant au quotidien les grimpeurs, en maîtrisant notre empreinte carbone et en faisant de notre mieux pour avoir un impact positif sur la société. Le fonds de dotation Climb Up nous permet notamment de soutenir des projets d'escalade inclusive afin de faire profiter à tous des bienfaits de notre sport.

Une expertise reconnue dans la gestion de salles d’escalade.
Les années d’expériences nous permettent aujourd’hui de maîtriser pleinement de la création à l'exploitation d'une salle d'escalade.

Name: Stichting Move2Exceed
Description:
Stichting Move2Exceed is een jonge non-profitorganisatie die de vitaliteit onder mensen met enige vorm van beperking wil bevorderen.  
Move2Exceed beoogt de vitaliteit en een gezonde leefstijl te stimuleren en te bevorderen voor mensen voor wie dat door een fysieke, mentale of sociale beperking minder vanzelfsprekend is. De stichting richt zich daarbij in eerste instantie op mensen met een verstandelijke en/of lichamelijke beperking en overige specifieke doelgroepen zoals bijvoorbeeld kwetsbare ouderen of jongeren met een (psycho-) sociale problematiek. 

Vitaliteit en een gezonde leefstijl vertaalt de stichting met name in beweging, gezonde voeding en ontspanning. De stichting werkt vraaggericht en biedt maatwerk in overleg met de zorginstelling.

Move2 gelooft in de eigen kracht en mogelijkheden van mensen met een beperking. Iedereen is in staat op enigerlei wijze te bewegen en zich een gezonde leefstijl aan te meten. 
De stichting wil bijdragen aan het langer en zo veel als mogelijk zelfstandig functioneren van mensen met enige beperking en hun (sociale) welbevinden bevorderen.
Move2 gelooft dat de doelgroep door gerichte mentaal-fysieke training en een gezonde leefstijl, meer zelfredzaam is en meer zelfvertrouwen krijgt. Hierdoor zullen zij op andere wijze een beroep doen op hulp en zorg.

Resultaat kunnen vaak beweegactiviteiten zijn gericht op het versterken, stimuleren en verbeteren van ADL-handelingen, gezondheid, positiever zelfbeeld, zelfredzaamheid, sociale contacten en zelfvertrouwen. Maar uiteindelijk staat plezier en beleving bij onze activiteiten centraal. Elke activiteit moet weer een feestje zijn en zo moeten de cliënten het ook ervaren. Ook worden vaak behandeldoelen van cliënten gekoppeld en proberen we sport multidisciplinair onderdeel te laten zijn van de behandeling en visie van cliënten en organisatie. 

Move2 werkt met sportprofessionals, gespecialiseerd in specifieke doelgroepen en met stagiairs van relevante (meest Hbo-)opleidingen.

Our Approach:

1. Grassroots Development: We believe in nurturing talent from the ground up. Our programs are designed to identify and develop young athletes, providing them with the skills and opportunities to excel.

2. Sports-Specific Training: Our expert coaches offer tailored training regimens that cater to the unique demands of each sport. From technique refinement to strategic play, we ensure our athletes are prepared for the highest levels of competition.

3. Strength and Conditioning: Peak physical performance is critical for success in sports. Our strength and conditioning programs are scientifically designed to enhance athleticism, reduce injury risks, and improve overall performance.

4. Nutritional Guidance: Proper nutrition is the cornerstone of athletic excellence. We provide personalized nutrition plans that fuel our athletes' bodies and minds, optimizing their performance and recovery.

Join us at Born Elite as we harness potential and cultivate champions, steering India towards Olympic greatness.

Name: Schoolsport071
Description:
Schoolsport071 wil schoolgaande jongeren met een leeftijd tot 18 jaar stimuleren/motiveren tot een gezonde en actieve levensstijl. Door middel van het aanbieden van een breed en gevarieerd sport- en beweegaanbod, willen wij derhalve een positief duurzame verandering teweeg brengen bij deze doelgroep.

Doordat wij direct aansluiten bij het derde doel van de Sustainable Development Goals ‘Goede gezondheid en welzijn’, maakt dat ons een constructieve partner binnen de gemeente Leiden.

Om hieraan bij te dragen, geven wij inhoud binnen de Leidse Educatieve Agenda. Het zesde thema ‘Gezondheid en Bewegen’ speelt hierin een belangrijke rol. Vanuit dit thema zijn de doelen:

‘het bewegen onder en na schooltijd zijn goed op elkaar afgestemd’;
en ‘kinderen weten (beter) welke sport bij hen past’.
En dit zijn nu juist dé activiteiten waarin wij kunnen voorzien. Hierbij wordt ingezet op een breed, eigentijds en laagdrempelig kennismakingsaanbod in samenwerking met Leidse (e.o.) sportverenigingen.

Wij werken aan de hand van deze vier kernwoorden:

Verbinding
Schoolsport071 werkt met verschillende partijen samen met als doel kinderen meer te laten bewegen. Door een groot professional netwerk, bestaande uit basis- en middelbare scholen, sportverenigingen, commerciële sportaanbieders, Leidse Vakgroep Bewegingsonderwijs Leiden, Incluzio Leiden (Rijnland Beweegt), SOL Leiden, de gemeente Leiden, Zoeterwoude, Voorschoten en Oegstgeest willen wij de doelgroep een zo’n breed mogelijk aanbod aanbieden en binden aan één of meerdere beweegaanbieders.

Inclusiviteit
Alle schoolgaande kinderen op het basis- en voortgezet onderwijs in Leiden, Zoeterwoude, Oegstgeest (en Voorschoten) plus kinderen op een peuterspeelzaal of kinderdagverblijf zijn van harte welkom bij ons activiteitenaanbod. Wij streven ernaar om ons activiteitenaanbod toegankelijk en veilig voor iedereen aan te bieden. Ons motto is daarom ook: meedoen is belangrijker dan winnen!

Name: Adaptive Expeditions
Description:
At Adaptive Expeditions, our purpose is clear: to empower individuals with injuries and disabilities by offering transformative adventures and expeditions. Guided by our dedicated team, you’ll not only embark on remarkable journeys but also uncover the boundless possibilities within yourself. 

Whether you were born with a disability or acquired one as a result of a life-changing injury, our dedicated team will enable you to achieve incredible feats of endurance and resilience. Along the way, we will create a community of like-minded individuals who empower each other to challenge social norms and redefine what many think possible for individuals with disabilities.

Our Story:

In the summer of 2016, Darren Edwards experienced a life-altering Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) during a near-fatal climbing accident, rendering him paralyzed from the chest down. Despite this profound challenge, Darren, an avid climber, mountaineer, and former soldier, refused to let his disability extinguish his passion for adventure. Supported by a proactive network of friends and family, he embarked on a journey to redefine his limits, exploring new avenues of exploration on water, wheels, and skis.

Since that pivotal moment, Darren has led injured and wounded veterans on a kayaking expedition from Land’s End to John O’ Groats, completed seven marathons in seven days across seven continents on a handbike, rowed across the English Channel, and traversed Europe’s largest icecap on a sit-ski as part of the first all-disabled team to accomplish this daring feat.

In the summer of 2023, Darren, alongside his close friend Nick Morrall, united their passions and experiences to establish Adaptive Expeditions. Their vision was to provide individuals with disabilities the same opportunities, support, and encouragement to push their boundaries and discover their newfound potential.

• Fysiek en mentaal fit worden.

Hieronder onze uitgebreide aanbod!

• 1 op 1 leerlingbegeleiding op maat

Name: SurfLab
Description:
SurfLab, backed by Techstars, is an end-to-end surf progression platform that personalises and accelerates surfers’ development.

It combines cutting-edge AI with real expert coaching to help surfers move past the plateau and keep improving, wave after wave, session after session. 

At the core of our platform is real-time personalisation technology applied to proven surf theory built around line-by-line progression, a model that maps your journey from Line 1, a first paddle in the whitewash, to Line 5, pro-level surfing in big swell.

SurfLab captures each surfer’s progress, analyses their movement and delivers the right drills, content and feedback based on exactly where they’re at in their journey. 

The system adjusts in real time as surfers improve, regress or shift their goals. Training is matched to skill level, surf trips are aligned to ability, and gear suggestions are based on the conditions surfers are looking to conquer.

Name: ProMind Insight
Description: ProMind Insight utilizes advanced Personality Recognition Technology that goes beyond traditional methods. By taking a quick snapshot of a person’s face, the system reads over 4,000 different facial aspects that define personality, generating 1.9 billion data points across its neural network in a matter of seconds. These rapid reports are unbiased, consistent, and scalable. The technology is rooted in extensive scientific research, backed by over 3,500 peer-reviewed papers on the causality between genetics, hormones, and personality. ProMind Insight's testing indicates an impressive 95% consistency rate, which is notably higher than traditional self-reported personality tests, and importantly, the system cannot be gamed.

Name: Trust Sports Emporium
Description:
The Trust Sports Emporium (TSE) is a multi-purpose sports and entertainment venue in Accra, Ghana with facilities for sports, social, health, and entertainment, business & corporate events and activities. The TSE is managed by the Trust Sports Emporium Limited and owned by the Social
Security and National Insurance Trust (SSNIT). It is Ghana’s latest multi-sports facility developed with a special focus on creating a pipeline of world champions from what, in Ghana, is commonly referred to as “lesser-funded” sports such as Boxing, Badminton, Table Tennis, Swimming, Fencing, etc. 

The Trust Sports Emporium (TSE) houses Seven (7) facilities; namely Bukom Boxing Arena; Ga Mashie Sports Hall & Gym; Bukom Fitness & Physio Centre, Mudor Conference Centre, Bukom International Pool (FINA 10 Lane Olympic-Size Swimming Pool with auxiliary facilities for international competitions); Ring Restaurant & Sports Bar and Trust International Hostel. The Emporium also hosts offices for ADB Bank (a universal bank), and ADD Pharma (a pharmaceutical company).

The Trust Sports Emporium (TSE) is certainly one-of-a-kind in Ghana and in the sub-region in terms of the sheer variety, quality, and the one-stop-shop option it offers for competitive sports, healthy active lifestyle, business & corporate events, and social activities. The very unique attraction of TSE is
the ability to cater for a trident of industries; Sports and Fitness, Hospitality and Health.

The TSE mission is to generate a pipeline of world-class athletes and other performers through the provision of modern sports and events facilities within a professionally managed environment which also delivers a great experience and benefits to other users, fans, and our communities. 

Our facilities are also ideal for entertainment and social events.

We promise you convenience, quality, and possibilities.

Clube Criativo visa proporcionar uma experiência educacional e criativa de contraturno, autêntica às crianças. Como cada ser humano é único e irrepetível, a experiência de escolarização e o trajeto de desenvolvimento de cada criança são também únicos e irrepetíveis.  Ela, como ser em permanente desenvolvimento, deve ver valorizada a construção da sua identidade pessoal, assente nos valores de iniciativa, criatividade e responsabilidade.  
Prestar atenção à criança tal qual ela é; reconhecê-la no que o torna único e irrepetível, recebendo-a na sua complexidade; tentar descobrir e valorizar a cultura de que é portador; ajudá-la a descobrir-se e a ser ela própria em equilibrada interação com os outros - são atitudes fundadoras do ato educativo e as únicas verdadeiramente indutoras da necessidade e do desejo de aprendizagem.

Name: Voetbalschool Focus
Description:
Zonder plezier geen ontwikkeling

Bij Voetbalschool Focus geloven we dat kinderen pas echt stappen maken als ze met plezier trainen. Daarom hebben we ons vernieuwde concept gelanceerd, waarin techniek, inzicht en spelplezier de rode draad vormen.

 Groepstrainingen
Elke zondag trainen tientallen kinderen in de onderbouw (O7 t/m O13) en bovenbouw (O14 en ouder). In kleine groepen werken ze aan:
	•	Basistechniek: dribbelen, passen, aannemen, afwerken en nog veel meer!
	•	Samenwerken en keuzes maken
	•	Inzicht, tweebenigheid en het lezen van situaties
	•	Toepassing in wedstrijdvormen

 Personal Trainingen
Voor spelers die dat extra stapje willen zetten, bieden we 1-op-1 trainingen. Hier ligt de nadruk op persoonlijke doelen, motoriek, coördinatie en techniekontwikkeling met directe feedback.

 Focus Camps
In de schoolvakanties organiseren we driedaagse Camps vol plezier, toernooitjes en extra trainingen. Een unieke mix van ontwikkeling en fun.

 Voor trainers en clubs
We weten dat jeugdtrainers vaak vrijwilligers zijn. Daarom delen wij oefenstof, kant-en-klare trainingen en tips via onze social media (Instagram, Facebook en LinkedIn). Zo maken we samen jeugdvoetbal leuker én leerzamer.

 Onze missie
Kinderen laten groeien met plezier en zelfvertrouwen. Want wij zijn ervan overtuigd: zonder plezier, geen ontwikkeling.

 Wil je meer weten? Neem een kijkje op www.voetbalschoolfocus.nl of stuur ons een bericht.

Name: Miracle League North Bay
Description:
About Us:
Miracle League North Bay is a leading advocate for inclusive sports and community engagement in the North Bay area. Our mission is clear: to empower individuals of all abilities to experience the joy of sports, with a primary focus on adaptive baseball.

What We Offer:
We offer adaptive baseball programs and other recreational activities that we modify to ensure everyone can participate, thrive, and create community regardless of their physical or cognitive challenges. Our facilities are designed to eliminate physical barriers, featuring specialized rubberized turf field for easy mobility, making sports accessible for all. Our dedicated volunteers serve as buddies and coaches, providing valuable support and fostering a community of encouragement. We've built a warm and welcoming community where participants and families find a sense of belonging. Beyond sports, we're passionate about promoting inclusivity through outreach and education to inspire understanding and support. Our calendar includes a range of recreational opportunities beyond baseball, such as basketball, holiday parties, movie nights, and social gatherings.

Get Involved:
Miracle League North Bay relies on the generosity and dedication of supporters. Whether you're an individual, a local business, or a community organization, there are numerous ways to get involved and help us create more opportunities for individuals with disabilities to experience the magic of sports and community.

Join Our Mission:
Miracle League North Bay is committed to breaking down barriers, fostering a sense of community, and rewriting the script on what's possible. Join us today and be part of something truly miraculous. Together, we champion inclusivity and make a difference, one game at a time.

Reconnu pour l’organisation de tournois de renommée mondiale – notamment le Corsican Circuit – et pour son engagement en faveur de la démocratisation du jeu, le Corsica Chess Club combine performance sportive, excellence pédagogique et valeurs de partage.

Avec une équipe d’entraîneurs qualifiés, de bénévoles passionnés et d’arbitres expérimentés, le club œuvre à :

Former la nouvelle génération de joueuses et joueurs

Offrir des compétitions de haut niveau accessibles à tous

Développer le rayonnement culturel et éducatif des échecs en Corse et au-delà

Notre ambition : faire des échecs un outil de développement personnel, d’ouverture culturelle et de convivialité en Corse.

Name: Middle River Outfitters
Description:
We offer fly fishing trips and instruction on several private, stocked streams near Staunton, Virginia. 

Nestled between the Allegheny and Blue Ridge Mountains, the meandering streams of the valley offer anglers an idyllic fishing destination. With over 20 years of experience fishing along streams and brooks off the Potomac and Shenandoah Rivers, Justin exudes a passion for educating both novice hobbyists and serious anglers. He spends his free time volunteering for a variety of local conservation non-profits and organizes a weekend clinic to introduce young would-be fly fishermen (and women) to his sport. 

From mountain to meadow, Shenandoah Valley offers endless opportunities to target a variety of species including smallmouth bass, musky, rainbow trout, brook trout and brown trout. Join us for a day out on the water wading or floating. 

In addition to day trips, we also offer weekend getaway vacation packages. All of our packages offer private water fishing within the Shenandoah Valley and surrounding forests. A plethora of small streams drain into the 56 mile long Shenandoah River. These rivers tumble down from the mountains through rhododendron and hardwood forests and ancient slabs of limestone. Sunlight dapples water through heavy canopies and birds and the sounds of the forest abound. Fishing these tiny streams lets you experience every pool, waterfall, and rise as you climb over ferns and mossy rocks.


All packaged trips include accommodations with modern amenities (unless camping), transportation, meals & snacks, drinks, and all gear necessary.  Concierge and customized trips available. 

Whether you are just beginning, trying to learn a technique, or brushing up for a trip let us get you on the right foot. Open practice and casting areas allows us to provide you the feedback you need. Join Justin in fishing for trout and smallmouth bass along the banks of the Shenandoah.

Description:

- le bien-être et l'épanouissement physique et social de ses pratiquants; c'est le sport non-compétitif, sans performance, sauf la sienne !

Description:
