Siamo un centro certificato PADI gestito da 3 istruttori esperti che opera nelle acque degli arcipelaghi di "La Maddalena" e "Lavezzi"; offriamo immersioni guidate ai subacquei certificati, corsi PADI per tutti i livelli ed escursioni snorkeling per le isole dell'arcipelago di La Maddalena.
Questa pagina e' stata creata in particolare per offrire la possibilità di candidarsi a chi fosse interessato a conseguire il brevetto da Divemaster (partendo anche dal corso open water quindi dall'inizio) o a fare pratica come istruttore già certificato in modalità Internship, ovvero ripagarsi il costo del corso lavorando e facendo esperienza.
Siamo operativi da meta' Maggio a fine Settembre e possiamo adattare il percorso formativo/lavorativo in base alle esigenze del candidato.
Non sono richiesti particolari requisiti ma spirito di collaborazione, idoneità fisica e adattabilità.
Si prega di allegare un C.V. o comunque una descrizione del proprio percorso lavorativo, scolastico e personale all'indirizzo pollodivingasd@gmail.com

Description:
Prestige Padel began with a dream to introduce padel in Montreal. Starting in 2021, a team of long-time padel players took the first steps to make this dream a reality.
The goal of Prestige Padel is to bring the sport to people around North America by opening quality centers where people can have an amazing experience while learning the sport, meeting other players and staying fit and active by doing something they love.

Prestige Padel a commencé avec un rêve d'introduire le padel à Montréal. Depuis 2021, une équipe de joueurs de padel de longue date a fait les premiers pas pour faire de ce rêve une réalité.
L'objectif de Prestige Padel est d'apporter ce sport aux gens de toute l'Amérique du Nord en ouvrant des centres de qualité où les gens peuvent vivre une expérience incroyable tout en apprenant à jouer, en rencontrant d'autres joueurs et en restant en forme et actifs en faisant quelque chose qu'ils aiment.

Name: Lakshyan Foundation
Description:
Our Philosophy
True athletic greatness is forged not only in the pursuit of victory but in the relentless commitment to growth, resilience, and the spirit of unity that uplifts both self and community.

At Lakshyan Foundation, we empower athletes to pursue their dreams by providing them with a nurturing environment and the right support at every stage. Our focus extends beyond just performance, we are committed to developing well-rounded individuals who not only achieve sporting excellence but also contribute to their communities and inspire future generations. Together, we are building a brighter future for sports and creating a positive impact in the lives of many.

Our Vision
To become a leading institution in nurturing world-class athletes by fostering excellence, inclusivity, and growth. Our goal is to elevate Indian sports to global recognition, inspiring athletes to reach their full potential and positively impact their communities and the nation.

Our Mission
To provide top-tier coaching, facilities, and holistic support, fostering athletes' skill development and character growth. We promote sportsmanship, discipline, and resilience, empowering athletes from diverse backgrounds to excel and contribute to both the sports community and society.

Name: Vitathlon
Description: Weight loss program - nordic walking - fitness

Name: Camp Illahee
Description: Camp Illahee is a Summer Camp for Girls located in Brevard, North Carolina.

Name: ACE Athletic Centre
Description:
Calgary's brand new multisport facility, providing Volleyball, Basketball, Pickleball, Gaming & More.  Providing Kids, Youth & Adult Recreational/Competitive Sports Opportunities For The Calgary Community.

Home of “Dave’s” licensed lounge.

Name: PFS Padel
Description: PFS Padel is Premium Padel Court Manufacturer & Supplier

Name: Vancouver Adaptive Snow Sports
Description: Vancouver Adaptive Snow Sports (VASS) runs skiing and snowboarding programs for persons with a disability at Grouse, Seymour and Cypress Mountains. VASS makes the mountain experience accessible to all. VASS is a registered non-profit society (89254 2168 RR0001), operated by a dedicated group of volunteers, which includes an active Board of Directors, program coordinators, instructors and administrators.

Name: Stages-triathlon.com
Description:
Stages-triathlon.com est le leader dans l'organisation de stages à l'attention des triathlètes. Nous organisons des stages de perfectionnement natation, des stages de préparation Ironman et depuis 2021 une série de stages itinérants sous le label Triathlon Camp Tour World Series
La volonté affichée de nos stages itinérants est de vous faire vivre un moment unique et incroyable.

Nager, pédaler et courir dans les plus beaux endroits de France, de Corse, du sud du Portugal, de Majorque, des Canaries ou encore de Thaïlande .... un privilège !!!!

Un stage itinérant c'est :

- Un hôtel différent chaque soir et sélectionnés par notre équipe
- Un parcours différent chaque jour
- Une équipe logistique qui a pour mission de rendre votre séjour le plus agréable possible
- Un coaching professionnel avec des thèmes de travail spécifiques sur les deux séances quotidiennes
- des moments de convivialité entre passionnés du triathlon
- et de nombreuses autres surprises.

Chaque Triathlon Camp Tour est limités à 20 athlètes.

Plus d'infos : https://www.stages-triathlon.com/triathlon-camp-tour/

#triathlon #ironman #triathlontraining #ironmancoach #ironmantraining #triathlonworld #trainright #triathloncamp

Name: Comité Essonne de Tennis
Description: Situé à Sainte Geneviève des Bois, le comité départemental à pour mission d'organiser et développer le tennis dans les clubs du département, conseiller et aider les clubs dans leurs démarches administratives, être le lien entre les clubs Essonniens, la ligue d’Ile de France et la Fédération Française de Tennis. De même, il encourage la pratique d'un tennis convivial et accessible aux clubs au moyen de ses 10 courts (couverts et terre battue), sa salle de préparation physique et ses salles de réunion, disponibles à la location.

Name: TNP "The Next Prospect" Hockey
Description: Dedicated Hockey Professionals on a mission to support the growth of the next prospect. Developing on-ice talent and cultivating skills off the ice that will last a lifetime.

Name: Camp Tekakwitha
Description:
CAMP TEKAKWITHA IS
A French speaking summer camp located in the state of Maine, USA. Located on the shores of Lake Androscoggin, on a vast natural area of over 11 million square feet, this summer camp, recognized for the quality of its human relations, offers numerous activities for children from 8-13 years and a special program for teenagers 14-17 years focused on mountain trekking.

Name: Sfantà - chiusa
Description:
Sfantà è un'associazione senza scopo di lucro che si è occupata di diffusione della consapevolezza della sicurezza nella natura. È nata nel 2022, per ricordare Federico Lugato, ed è stata chiusa nel 2025. 
Ringraziamo tutte le persone volontarie che l'hanno animata in questi anni, e chi ci ha sostenuto in altri modi. 
La pagina rimane come archivio storico delle attività svolte, ma non verrà più mantenuta attiva.

Scarica gratuitamente il Vademecum per tornare a casa la sera, sulla sicurezza in montagna. Stampalo e diffondilo: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1wyH-eLnzqDu7y_mNyNC_IqgHY7CrsVYo/view

Name: ZerOne
Description:
ZerOne is the first of its kind: a state-of-the-art sports facility transforming sports performance and rehabilitation with advanced technology and specialized services. Inside, HOCKEYOLOGY offers cutting-edge hockey development, while ATHLETICARE, a sports performance clinic, provides a full range of diagnostic, medical, and allied health treatments and services. We've also partnered with GaMa using artificial intelligence and machine learning tools for advanced data analytics, empowering athletes and coaches with precise performance insights. ZerOne is all about enhancing athlete well-being and maximizing potential in a dynamic, one-of-a-kind setting.

Opening 2024.

Name: Sportfondsen Nijmegen
Description: De NV Sportfondsen Nijmegen is een sociaal-maatschappelijke onderneming die zich inzet voor sportdeelname in het algemeen en zwemvaardigheid een zwemveiligheid in het bijzonder. Met vier accommodaties in verschillende stadsdelen en een geschiedenis van bijna 100 jaar zijn we niet weg te denken uit het Nijmeegse sport- een recreatielandschap.

Name: JUMP Sports Development Center
Description:
Welcome to Jump Sports Development Center! 
A state-of-the-art indoor/outdoor multi-sports complex located in Puerto Rico  and founded by NBA star José Juan Barea and hotelier businessman Ricky Newman. 

Scheduled to open its doors in 2024, our cross-disciplinary facility is designed to provide top-tier training and support to athletes of all levels.

With multiple courts, a rehabilitation center, a sports-performance gym, on-site lodging accommodations, and more, JUMP Sports Development Center offers an extensive range of amenities.

Our mission is clear: to create a space where professional athletes can elevate their performance, young athletes can strategically develop from fundamental motor skills to specific sports skills, and individuals of all ages can enjoy sports in a clean and wholesome family atmosphere.

We aim to be the premier destination for sports tourism in the Caribbean, attracting teams worldwide. Simultaneously, we strive to be a go-to hub for sports education and skill enhancement.

Join us on this exciting journey as we redefine sports development in Puerto Rico!

Name: The Golf Room
Description:
Welcome to The Golf Room – Where Passion Meets Precision!

Elevating Your Golf Experience | Premier Golf Performance Center | Dublin, Ohio

At The Golf Room, we believe that every golfer is unique, and their journey to improvement should be as well. Our team of experienced professionals combines a deep understanding of the game with the latest advancements in technology, creating a tailored experience for each individual. Whether you're a beginner looking to master the basics or a seasoned pro aiming for peak performance, The Golf Room is your ultimate destination for player development.

Our 17,000 square foot facility houses twelve Trackman hitting bays, a 4,000 square foot short game area with Puttview and fully equipped gym, ensuring that each player has exactly what they need to enhance their golf game.

We offer private lessons, group lessons, club fitting, golf fitness, mental performance coaching and more! Ready to take your game to the next level? Connect with us at info@thegolfroom.com to explore personalized coaching, cutting-edge technology, and a golf experience like no other!

Name: Clinic Factory = Sportworkshops voor Kinderopvang, Campings en Vakantieparken
Description: Sterke workshops, goed materiaal en enthousiaste, professionele trainers voor de groep. Zo werd Clinic Factory in 2012 geboren. Nu, ruim 13 jaar later, zijn we nog steeds dé partner voor kinderdagverblijven (KDV), peuteropvang (POV), buitenschoolse opvang (BSO) en campings & vakantieparken die op zoek zijn naar een unieke, sportieve toevoeging aan hun programmering. Van Judo tot Basketbal, van Strongman tot onze unieke StrongMini Gym: een échte sportschool voor de allerkleinsten van 2 tot 4 jaar. Een Clinic Factory workshop is niet iets voor elke dag, maar wél iets dat elk kind minstens één keer per jaar meegemaakt moet hebben!

Name: Y.E.T.I (Youth Experiential Training Institute)
Description:
Vision 
All Young People Have The Opportunity for Outdoor Adventure and Time In Nature  

Mission
Y.E.T.I. works alongside young people in South King County and beyond to pursue the benefits of inclusive outdoor adventure. 


Y.E.T.I. offers afterschool outdoor programs, school and partnership field trips and weekend adventures through the school year. learn more at goyeti.org

Name: Netball America
Description:
Netball America is the driving force behind the development of Netball in the United States.  In addition, our members and programs are located in Canada, USVI, Colombia, Uganda and South Africa.

Netball America is a USA not-for-profit (501c3) membership based assocation that uses Netball as a vehicle for the promotion of participation, individual progress, team unity, good health, while uniting communities through positive change.

Name: Todos Pelo Esporte
Description:
O "Todos Pelo Esporte" é uma associação sem fins lucrativos que foi estabelecida em 2013, tendo como principal objetivo oferecer a prática esportiva para crianças e adolescentes, mostrando sua importância para o convívio social, a educação, a saúde, o bem-estar e a competição.

Contribuir para a formação educacional e esportiva de crianças e adolescentes com o objetivo de desenvolver suas potencialidades dando-lhes condições e oportunidades para o desenvolvimento como pessoas, cidadãos, futuros profissionais e futuros atletas.

Visão

Ser reconhecida como organização que desenvolve a prática do esporte e o incentivo ao estudo, pois acreditamos que a Educação Esportiva seja o alicerce para crianças e adolescentes se tornarem cidadãos para enfrentarem as dificuldades do mundo.

Valores

Disciplina, Dignidade, Cooperação, Fraternidade, Lealdade, Perseverança, Solidariedade, Respeito, Zelo pelo Patrimônio, Orgulho de pertencer ao Instituto, Tolerância, Iniciativa, Ética, Fé e o mais importante para o sucesso, AMOR.

Name: Sportsy
Description: Sportsy is a creator driven training and education platform for sports. We partner with influential creators in the sports training industry and empower them with the tools they need to create, deliver, and monetize best-in-class training experiences at scale.

Name: Effort Pozuelo
Description: Centro de entrenamiento personalizado. Acondicionamiento integral de deportistas, rehabilitación de lesiones, embarazo saludable y ejercicio de mantenimiento son los servicios estrella de Effort Pozuelo.

Name: Groove Spot
Description: A Groove Spot é um Clube de Danças Urbanas, sediada em Vila Nova de Famalicão, que surge em Setembro de 2012 da convergência de alguns profissionais do meio que, já trabalhando em Vila Nova de Famalicão, avançaram para um projecto onde a excelência técnica está aliada a valores humanos elevados, democratizando o acesso à dança como forma de arte e de bem-estar físico e psicológico. A partir de 2015 convergimos energias com a empresa DanceWorks, o que nos possibilitou ainda melhores condições de formação para os nossos sócios e colaboradores.

Name: First Serve Tennis
Description: First Serve Tennis serves the Montclair, NJ area with clinics, lessons, and tournaments for players of all ages and all levels. Founded in 2020, directors Aaron Reznik and Matthew Slowinski have used their tournament and college-level experience to serve over 2000 youth and adult players. They aim to help develop and grow their player's skills and passion for tennis through technical instruction, drills, and of course, lots of games. First Serve Tennis has built an amazing community of tennis lovers and can't wait to see what lies ahead!

Name: Capybara Sports
Description: Welcome to our blog, where we explore the intersection of sports and architecture worldwide. From the design of state-of-the-art stadiums and arenas to the use of innovative technology to enhance the fan experience, we delve into the world of sports architecture to bring you the latest news, insights, and trends. Join us as we explore the fascinating world where sports and architecture meet.

Name: BIG CITY Lescar
Description:
Big City, c’est un complexe multi-activités de plus de 7 000 m² à Lescar, conçu comme une véritable "ville dans la ville", où se rencontrent sport, détente, travail et convivialité.

 Activités sportives pour tous
Padel Ground : 8 terrains couverts sur 3 200 m², ouverts à tous les niveaux
CrossFit Wolf Spirit : espace dédié à l'amélioration de la condition physique dans un cadre stimulant
Autres disciplines : yoga, danse cabaret & heels, lyrical jazz & contemporain 

 Foodcourt Henri
Un foodcourt moderne et chaleureux réunissant 6 stands de restaurateurs indépendants, proposant une cuisine variée aux saveurs locales et internationales : tapas, pizzas & pâtes, desserts & pâtisseries, wok & sushis, burgers & viandes, salades & plats de bistrot.
Le tout dans un espace convivial équipé de 2 écrans géants, 3 bars, 3 salles et 2 terrasses pour profiter à tout moment de la journée.

 Bien-être & santé
Des prestataires bien-être & santé de qualité sont présents sur place :
Gaya : soins esthétiques comprenant manucure, coiffure, soins du visage et du corps, ainsi qu’un espace santé regroupant kinésithérapeutes et ostéopathes.
Les Hommes ont la Classe : coiffeur-barbier dédié aux hommes, pour un moment de soin et de style.

 Espaces professionnels
Salles de séminaire et de réunion équipées, adaptées aux événements professionnels et teambuilding

 Adresse : 1 rue Saint-Exupéry, 64230 Lescar
 Site web : big-city.fr
Horaires : Ouvert 7j/7, de 08:00 à 23:30 

Rejoignez-nous pour une expérience unique où sport, gastronomie, bien-être et travail se conjuguent au quotidien.

Name: Sport7 Labs
Description:
Sport7 | MMA ecosystem services & platform
Sport7 provides tools and services for MMA federations and organizations to accelerate athlete development and improve ecosystem coordination.

We deliver platform tools designed to scale MMA development worldwide.

From federation onboarding to fighter activation, we provide structured programs and scalable frameworks that help grow participation, visibility and partnerships.

Name: TWEE12
Description:
Bij TWEE12 hebben we een passie voor coachen op hoog niveau. 

Iedere sporter verdient kwalitatieve toptrainingen. Of je nu een sportachtergrond hebt of in jaren niets hebt gedaan, wij zijn er om je plezier te laten vinden in onze trainingen. We zijn ervan overtuigd dat je je bij ons direct thuis zult voelen, ongeacht het fitnessniveau dat je nu hebt. Bij ons draait het om jou. We pakken de draad op vanaf jouw basis.

Je kan bij ons terecht voor CrossFit, personal training, leefstijlcoaching, postpartum training en bedrijfsfitness. Ons team staat voor je klaar in Nijverdal en Almelo.

Name: SaferBoater
Description:
The Drivers Education for Boaters course 
SaferBoater 501(c)3 NonProfit is the only hands-on training system that teaches you everything you need to know about operating boats safely on the water.

First-time boat ownership is at an all-time high. And if you are like most new boat owners, you’re excited to get out on the water for the first time.

It’s important to have fun while being safe. And THAT is where we come in.

SaferBoater is the only Certified South Carolina training center for US Sailing, US Powerboating, and BoatUS . 

We offer on-the-water classes to build the skill levels of novice powerboaters and sailboat drivers in Charleston, Beaufort, and Columbia SC. 

Powerboating :
Our classes are broken down by Adult, Youth and a Women's only class, and will certify you with a 3 certifications :
- US Powerboating Safe Powerboat Handling Certificate
- NASBLA Approved Boaters Education Course
- SCDNR - State Boating Education Card

Sailing :
Through our classes, you can learn to sail and also qualify for a US Sailing Certification, which is essentially an International Boaters Driver License , which will allow you to rent a boat up to 47' in any international destination.

Visit us at SaferBoater.org to see our class schedule and learn more!

You have the power to Make Boating Fun Again by learning the skills every captain needs to run their own ship.  You will be back out on the water, enjoying some fun in the sun before you know it.

After all, isn’t that why you bought your boat in the first place?

Name: NovoScuba
Description:
NovoScuba is a next-generation digital diving agency redefining how people learn, explore, and connect through scuba diving. We blend ocean adventure with cutting-edge technology — offering online certifications, virtual dive simulations, and digital tools that make diving more accessible and engaging than ever before.

Our mission is to create a global community of divers who are informed, confident, and environmentally conscious. Whether you’re taking your first breath underwater or advancing your professional dive career, NovoScuba brings the world’s oceans to your screen — and your next dive within reach.

Ethlete Lab Academy (ELA) is a new gaming lounge that aims to provide a safe and welcoming environment for casual and aspiring professionals interested in gaming to connect, compete, and improve their skills.

We offer a unique and unforgettable experience that caters to the diverse interests and needs of our gamers, with state-of-the-art equipment and technology, a variety of games, and education from our expert staff.

Contato: https://conecta.bio/duplacarreirabrasil

Name: Sierra Sport Paladin
Description:
*Background* 
Sierra Sport Paladin (SSP) is a non-profit sporting organization that was founded on January 25, 2019, with the intention of providing a strong alternative for youth growing up in neighborhoods where urban violence is prevalent. SSP was created as a tool of development to rebuild communities as part of a larger endeavor to alleviate poverty.

Sierra Sport Paladin also recognizes the growing role that sports play in promoting tolerance, respect, and the realization of development and peace. It also highlights the contributions that sports make to women’s empowerment by eradicating gender-based disparities. Individuals can participate in sports to support marginalized communities in places where they would otherwise be excluded, as well as vulnerable individuals.

Sierra Sport Paladin fosters the mental development of young people. It offers an area where the next generation may socialize, exchange cultures, learn social skills, and grow as individuals in a supportive setting, which supports the objectives of social inclusion, health, and education in addition to community building

 *Mission* 
To guarantee that there are frequent sporting events around the nation, to publicize and increase understanding of the health advantages of sports, and to inspire everyone, especially young people, to engage in sports as a means of maintaining their physical and mental well-being. To serve lovers of sports with high-quality sports, strive to foster a culture of love and peace among sports practitioners. We support the notion that everyone, regardless of socioeconomic background, should have access to sports and physical activities, and we prioritize sport for all. We also strive to safeguard the physical and mentalwell-being ofathletes, making sure they have the support and treatment they need to succeed on and off the field.

 *Vision* 
The goal of Sierra Sport Paladin is to establish itself as a national leader in the advancement of sports and athlete care.

Name: Abilities Unleashed
Description:
Activate Inclusion Sports Day encourage and empower kids to explore sporting opportunities in their local communities

Activate Inclusion Sports Days (AISD) are one day programs designed to promote the pathways for inclusion sport and active recreation programs in local community areas and encourage students with a disability to participate in community sport and active recreation on a regular basis.

Name: Ecole de Vélo MCF LILLE
Description:
MCF LILLE est une école de vélo du réseau national MCF (Moniteurs Cyclistes Français) : 73 écoles labélisées et plus de 1000 moniteurs de vélo professionnels diplômés d'état. 

Les moniteurs MCF ont suivi une formation complète (plus de 1 000 h) sur la pédagogie de l’apprentissage à vélo et la connaissance des publics, ils sont tous titulaires de diplômes d’état jeunesse et sport, disposent d’une carte professionnelle garantissant leur honorabilité et d’une assurance responsabilité civile professionnelle. 
Avec plus de 20 ans d’expérience dans l’encadrement à vélo, la qualité des interventions et le professionnalisme des Moniteurs MCF sont reconnus et plébiscités. 
Ils sont les experts numéro 1 de l’enseignement du vélo. 

L’Ecole de vélo MCF LILLE est installée au B’twin Village (Lille), où elle dispose d’un local, de terrains de pratique spécialement aménagés pour l’apprentissage et la pédagogie à vélo (indoor et outdoor), de différents parcs de vélo, de salles de réunions...
MCF Lille propose ses services aux particuliers, aux entreprises, aux collectivités, aux établissements scolaires, aux associations... 
MCF LILLE n'est pas là pour fabriquer des champions, sa vocation est de vous rendre heureux à vélo... Découvrir, progresser, s'amuser. 
Les méthodes d'apprentissage développées par MCF LILLE sont de pédagogie positive : Par l'écoute et la bienveillance, développer la confiance en sois et l'autonomie. 
Le vélo, mais pas que !
La grande spécialité de MCF LILLE est le vélo, mais, les moniteurs adorent aussi le BMX, la Trot, le Skate... L'équipe à donc développé ses compétences et son savoir faire pour vous proposer une Ecole de Freestyle en parallèle de son Ecole de vélo... Yeah ! 
Depuis 2013 ans, plus de 44000 enfants et adultes sur plus de 6000 formations, animations, cours, séances ou stages ont bénéficié des compétences et du savoir faire des moniteurs professionnels diplômés d’état MCF LILLE.

Name: LAP Basketball
Description:
LAP BASKETBALL est une structure créée par Nicolas LANG pour permettre aux joueurs et joueuses passionnés et ambitieux de progresser et d’atteindre leur plein potentiel. 

Le but de LAP est d’amener le basket de haut niveau, son exigence et sa complexité, au plus grand nombre à travers le coaching privé, les formations en lignes et les évènements.

Name: Trainpub AG
Description: Auf Trainpub werden erlernte Fähigkeiten und Wissen von unabhängigen Anbieter:innen im Sport gesammelt und für sportinteressierte Menschen zugänglich gemacht. Zudem fördert dieser Marktplatz die Vernetzung im Sport und soll den Horizont für Sportbegeisterte erweitern.

Name: De Fitfabriek Bergen op Zoom
Description:
De Fitfabriek is een organisatie, die de inwoners van de gemeente Bergen op Zoom meer in beweging brengt.
In samenwerking met lokale organisaties in Bergen op Zoom zorgen wij voor een structureel sport en beweegaanbod voor de inwoners van de gemeente Bergen op Zoom.

Name: GB Go Beyond
Description: Our goal at GB GO BEYOND is to help kids achieve the highest level of success on the court and field, but more importantly, in life. From our Founder, former Rutgers Men's Basketball captain, Geo Baker: "As a kid, I was blessed to have the mentors I did around me continuously supporting and encouraging me to reach new heights. I want our trainers within GB GO BEYOND to be able to do the same." All of our trainers have played their respective sport at the collegiate level and have stood out as extraordinary community members as well. Learning under us goes beyond the sports.

Name: District de l'Eure de Football
Description:
Rattaché à la Fédération Française de Football et à la Ligue de Football de Normandie, le District de l'Eure de Football a pour missions principales d'organiser, d'encadrer, de réguler la pratique du football amateur et de haut niveau et la formation des joueuses ou joueurs, des entraîneur(e)s et arbitres, sur l'ensemble du territoire de l'Eure.

Il fédère  112 clubs qui ont pour mission l'enseignement et la pratique du football.

Name: Every Sportcenter
Description: Träning, tävlingar, kurser och mycket mer!

Name: Family F.C. - Parent's Favourite Football Coaching App
Description:
Family F.C. is the world's favourite football coaching app for parents of kids aged 4-11.

Whether new to coaching or already a football fan, Family F.C. gives parents the confidence to teach real football/soccer skills through easy-to-follow sessions, helping their kids become better players and develop new skills.
Location: All over the football and soccer world

Name: Remouv
Description:
Mémoire, gestion du stress et des émotions, motivation, communication, concentration, prise de décision : développez vos soft-skills grâce au mouvement, à l'expérimentation ludique et au questionnement cognitif pour reprendre confiance en vos compétences et faciliter votre réengagement. 
 
Remouv associe l’activité physique et ludique pour se questionner sur la façon dont vous fonctionnez dans un environnement pratique, lié au jeu et à l’action. 

Comprenez vos capacités et vos lacunes, identifiez vos émotions et vos sources de motivation, afin de mieux les utiliser au quotidien.

Ce projet s’inscrit dans l’appel à projets d’Innovation lancé par Pôle emploi Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes et l’Etat, dans le cadre du Plan d’investissement dans les compétences (PIC)

Plan Investissement #Compétences #AvecPôleEmploi #AuvergneRhôneAlpes #innovation

These courses are taught by qualified and passionate instructors, who are dedicated to providing high-quality instruction and personalized support, thus contributing to the continuous growth and improvement of the participants.
The association is also strongly committed to promoting a positive and inclusive environment, where every individual, regardless of their ability, can feel welcome and appreciated. SR works to break down barriers and create spaces accessible to all, supporting and encouraging active participation and inclusion.
Finally, Skate Republic plays a crucial role in supporting and collaborating with other local organizations and initiatives, thus expanding its influence for the promotion of skateboarding and its positive impact on the community.
Thanks to its dedication and constant commitment, Skate Republic has become a reference in the world of skateboarding, not only as a meeting place and practice, but as a real driving force for the growth and diffusion of skate culture.

Name: Pitch & Padel
Description:
Pitch & Padel is a next-generation, padel-led, multi-sport venue concept designed around how people want to play, move and connect today.

As participation sport continues to evolve, so too must the spaces in which it takes place. Pitch & Padel has been created to move beyond traditional single-sport facilities and towards modern, flexible venues that prioritise experience, accessibility and long-term sustainability.



At the heart of Pitch & Padel is padel — one of the fastest-growing sports in the UK. Rather than treating padel as a standalone offering, our approach positions it as the anchor within a broader multi-sport environment, supporting wider participation, social play and repeat engagement.

Pitch & Padel sits within the second generation of padel operators.

The first wave introduced the sport and proved demand. The next phase is about doing it better — with smarter design, stronger community integration and venues built to last.

Our model prioritises thoughtful venue design, balanced programming and inclusive participation, creating spaces that work for beginners and experienced players alike, as well as individuals, families and organisations.

While padel is central to our identity, Pitch & Padel is ultimately about play in its broadest sense.

Our venues are designed to accommodate padel alongside complementary sports and activities, creating dynamic, social environments that remain active throughout the day and week. This multi-sport approach supports cross-participation, maximises venue utilisation and encourages people to return regularly.

From the outset, Pitch & Padel has been developed with commercial sustainability in mind. By combining padel with complementary activities and experiences, our venues are designed to be adaptable, resilient and scalable.

Name: SpArtAble
Description:
About SpArtAble

Sports is often called a universal language, yet accessibility in sports and fitness still remains a privilege. SpArtAble was founded to change that.

We are a sports and arts initiative dedicated to creating inclusive spaces for differently-abled individuals and the elderly. Our mission is to empower people through sports, fitness, and creative expression—ensuring that everyone, regardless of ability, has equal access to opportunities for growth, health, and joy.

At SpArtAble, we recognize the barriers that exist today: accessible sports facilities are rare, elderly individuals often face social isolation due to limited fitness opportunities, and professional sports still see very few disabled athletes at higher levels. Beyond this, companies and schools continue to lack awareness about accessibility, leaving many individuals struggling in daily life.

Our vision is to change these realities. We aim to create a community where differently-abled individuals, children, and older adults can come together through movement, creativity, and shared experiences. Alongside sports and fitness, our arts programs span across craft, painting, music, dance, theatre, and creative workshops—offering spaces for self-expression, innovation, sustainability, and joy. Through these initiatives, as well as interactive experiential sessions, we also work to build empathy and understanding—bridging the gap between ability and society.

SpArtAble is more than an initiative; it is a movement towards an inclusive, accessible, and compassionate future.

Join us in making this vision a reality. Together, we can reshape what inclusion in sports and arts truly means.

Name: Snowsports Zwolle
Description:
Voor velen is de wintersportvakantie de mooiste tijd van het jaar. Het is alleen jammer dat de wintersport weer zo snel voorbij is. Ook ik, Alexander de Boer, eigenaar van Snowsports Zwolle, herken dat probleem. Toen ik op mijn derde voor het eerst op de lange latten stond, vond ik dat geweldig. Sindsdien is skiën mijn passie, waar ik dan ook altijd mee bezig ben.
Hoe beter mijn techniek werd, hoe meer plezier ik aan de wintersport beleefde. Dat is wat mij ertoe bracht om een lerarenopleiding tot skileraar te volgen en enkele jaren later de Oostenrijkse vervolgopleidingen (Landes 1, Landes 2, Alpinkurs) te volgen. Ik heb vele jaren lesgegeven op meerdere rolbanen in Nederland. In eerste instantie als bijbaantje tijdens mijn studie aan de TU Delft. Maar ook toen ik een fulltime baan had, werkte ik als parttime-skileraar in de avonduren.

Name: Stichting Weerbaar Eindhoven
Description:
Weerbaar Eindhoven is een stichting die zich richt op het versterken van de mentale en fysieke weerbaarheid van de inwoners van Eindhoven. 

Door middel van psycho-fysieke weerbaarheidstrainingen, sport en spel, willen we een sterkere, veiligere en veerkrachtigere gemeenschap opbouwen. Onze focus ligt op het toegankelijk maken van deze programma’s voor iedereen, ongeacht leeftijd, achtergrond of fysieke mogelijkheden.

Veiligheid en zelfvertrouwen zijn essentieel in de huidige samenleving. Ondersteund door bewezen methoden zoals Krav Maga, biedt Weerbaar Eindhoven een praktische en effectieve manier om zowel fysieke als mentale weerbaarheid te verbeteren. In een steeds diverser wordende stad is het van belang dat onze trainingen inclusiviteit bevorderen en voor iedereen beschikbaar zijn.

Onze diensten omvatten:

Toegankelijkheid voor allen: Trainingen en cursussen zijn ontworpen voor verschillende leeftijden en fysieke mogelijkheden, inclusief mensen met beperkingen.

Diversiteit en inclusie: We werken samen met scholen, bedrijven en maatschappelijke organisaties om een breed en divers deelnemersveld te bereiken.

Beweegprogramma’s voor iedereen: Naast weerbaarheidstraining bieden we fitness- en conditieprogramma’s, aangepast aan diverse niveaus van gezondheid en fitness.

Weerbaar Eindhoven helpt de stad veiliger en gezonder te maken, door bewoners in staat te stellen effectief te reageren op uitdagende situaties. Daarnaast wordt het gemeenschapsgevoel versterkt door gezamenlijke trainingen, wat bijdraagt aan een gezondere levensstijl voor iedereen.

Met uw steun kan Weerbaar Eindhoven een realiteit worden en een veilige, inclusieve en veerkrachtige gemeenschap creëren. Sluit u aan en maak samen met ons een verschil in het leven van veel Eindhovenaren.

Name: ParentPlayer
Description:
At ParentPlayer, our journey began with a profound personal experience that ignited a passion for supporting young athletes and their families. The driving force behind our company is my own story—a tale of early promise, dashed dreams, and ultimately, redemption through helping others navigate the complex world of elite football.
From the tender age of 8, I was scouted by professional clubs, signing contracts and being set up for a career in football. The trajectory seemed promising, with lucrative offers and a professional contract on the horizon by the age of 17. However, despite the external success, internally, I was struggling. The passion that once fueled my love for the game had waned amidst the politics, commercial pressures, and personal challenges.
By 17, I found myself emotionally and physically drained, on the brink of burnout. The relentless pursuit of success had taken its toll, leaving me disillusioned and disconnected from the sport I once adored. In a pivotal moment, I made a decision that would alter the course of my life forever—a mere five-minute call to the youth development officer, expressing my desire to walk away from it all.
Little did I know, that seemingly inconsequential decision would become a turning point, leading me down a path of self-discovery and purpose. It left me grappling with profound regrets and unanswered questions, yet ultimately paved the way for a deeper understanding of the challenges faced by young athletes and the crucial role of holistic support in their journey.
ParentPlayer was born from the ashes of my own disillusionment—a commitment to ensuring that no young athlete would ever have to navigate this tumultuous terrain alone. Our mission is deeply personal, rooted in the belief that every player deserves the guidance, mentorship, and support to not only fulfill their potential on the pitch but also thrive beyond the game.

Name: Dún Laoghaire - Rathdown Sports Partnership
Description:
The Irish Sports Council was established in July 1999 under the Irish Sports Council Act. In response to the functions ascribed and the requirements of the Act, the Irish Sports Council produced its first Statement of Strategy, 
A New Era for Sport in 2000. During the period covered by this strategy, the Irish Sports Council established its first twelve Local Sports Partnerships (LSPs). In their second strategy – Sport for Life – the ISC again supported the continued expansion of the LSP network, with a further four LSPs established in 2004. Since the publication of the current strategy; Building Sport for Life 2006-2008, the remaining 17 LSP’s have been established and there is now full national coverage. 
The Irish Sports Council has since been renamed Sport Ireland and they continue to fund and act as the national lead for the network of Local Sports Partnerships across the country.  

The Local Sports Partnership initiative is set up to act as a forum for sport at a local level which is charged with improving opportunities to participate in sport for every member of the community. The key aims of the LSPs are to increase participation in sport and to ensure that local resources are used to best effect.

Dún Laoghaire-Rathdown Sports Partnership was set up in 2008. DLR Sports Partnership works closely with the Dún Laoghaire-Rathdown County Council’s Sports Development Office and other key partners to promote participation, inclusion and coordination in sport at a local level.

All those statutory bodies, organisations and groups operating in Dún Laoghaire-Rathdown with a responsibility for or interest in sports development are invited to participate in the Local Sports Partnership. This includes the involvement of the Local Authority, Education & Training Board, HSE, third level sector, sports clubs, schools and local voluntary/community organisations.

Name: Boxing Company Dordrecht
Description:
Tactisch inzicht, teambuilding, doorzettingsvermogen, durf, doelgerichtheid en het vermogen om grenzen te blijven verleggen met als doel het beste uit jezelf te halen. Dit zijn de persoonlijke pijlers die de basis hebben gelegd voor de Boxing Company. Founders Bart Voet en Rudy van Laere weten als oudgedienden van de elite-eenheid van de Luchtmobiele Brigade namelijk als geen ander hoe je barrières moet doorbreken om je doelen te kunnen bereiken.

Met deze instelling startten zij eind 2014 op veler verzoek van moeders aan het schoolplein met een laagdrempelige, leuke en intensieve workout in een gymzaal te Oud-Beijerland en Tiel. Boksen, één van de meest uitdagende en steeds populairder wordende trainingsmethoden, werd het middel om de vrouwen fitter te maken. Al snel kreeg het beestje een naam en was Pink Boxing een feit. Bijna net zo snel konden beide mannen hun baan bij Defensie opzeggen, want het sloeg aan! De dames waren zodanig enthousiast dat zij thuis vertelde over de Pink Boxing lessen. Dit maakte mannen geïnteresseerd en dat was de eerste aanzet tot Cross Boxing, een vergelijkbare maar next level workout voor zowel mannen als vrouwen. De groei bleef aan waardoor Bart en Rudy een eigen Boxing Company en (hoofd)kantoor konden openen in Oud-Beijerland.

Boksen moest voor iedereen worden. Dit is gestart met de innovatieve producten Pink Boxing en Cross Boxing waarbij boksen toegankelijk werd gemaakt voor het brede publiek. Dit breidde al snel uit met een compleet arsenaal aan groepslessen en maatwerkprogramma’s. De basis van een sterke franchiseformule was geboren. Fitnessprofessionals kunnen profiteren van een all-in franchiseconcept dat binnen no-time is uitgegroeid tot een grote ‘boxing community’.

Description:
Burns Elite Training (BET) is a highly specialized basketball skill enhancement program meticulously designed for basketball players. As an organization we're firmly rooted in the mission of fostering empowerment in our athletes through the game of basketball.

At BET, we aim to craft the holistic player. We emphasize the importance of a robust foundational skill set encompassing deft ball handling, accurate shooting, and precise finishing. It is this meticulous attention to fundamentals that catalyzes future success for our athletes. With a solid foundation in place, we then expand their skill repertoire, integrating advanced techniques and dynamic movements.

Once a player has mastered the nuances of a particular skill, our objective shifts to facilitating drills that mimic game-speed scenarios for numerous repetitions. It is in these moments that game habits are cultivated. To seamlessly translate these acquired skills into live-game performance, we emphasize the need for athletes to continually operate these drills at game speed. As time progresses, you'll witness the evolution of a BET athlete, one who intuitively adapts to defensive strategies due to the unshakeable foundation they have built. This is no coincidence, but a testament to the unyielding dedication demonstrated by both our staff and athletes in the relentless pursuit of developing the complete player.

• Assurer la formation et le perfectionnement des encadrants, des arbitres et des joueurs,

• Contribuer au mieux vivre ensemble par des actions d’éducation par le sport.

Elle fédère aujourd’hui 30 pays membres, 1 cité-Etat membre, 27 institutions sportives nationales dont 15 Fédérations Nationales de Rugby , 5 Comités Nationaux Paralympiques, 3 Fédérations Nationales pour personnes à mobilité réduite, 1 Fédération Nationale Sport pour Tous, 1 Fédération Nationale de Touch Rugby et 2 Fédérations Nationales de Rugby à 7 en Fauteuil.

Name: BounceBack Training
Description:
I’m a former 5’2” Division 1 basketball player, National Champion, and founder of BounceBack Training — a brand, mindset, and skill development dedicated to helping young athletes, rise through adversity and reach the next level.

My journey hasn’t been traditional — I battled to earn my scholarship, competed at the highest collegiate level, and proved that heart, hustle, and resilience can outweigh the odds. I’ve since built a career rooted in mentorship, leadership, and community, working with youth, brands, and organizations to create real impact through sport.

Through BounceBack Training, I provide skills training, mentorship, and inspiration for athletes chasing their dreams — whether it’s making a team, earning a scholarship, or finding confidence through the game.

Name: Total Running and Conditioning
Description:
At Total Running and Athletic Conditioning, we believe that ordinary people are capable of extraordinary feats and that living an active lifestyle can transform your life in more ways than one. We also believe that these goals can be accomplished while balancing the real world, family, and work life. It is our passion at Total Running & Athletic Conditioning to help people reach their endurance goals, while never losing their joy for the sport.

We offer several different training plans for running, soccer, and golf with unparalleled communication. We can help coach/train you virtually.

Name: My Expedition Rocks
Description:
Bringing the outdoors to you is what we enjoy doing, as in our opinion some of the best adventures happen on our doorsteps.  Providing a range of activities tailored to meet the needs of your group, whether educational or corporate, we will ensure it is an event to remember.

We are able to provide activities at a number of venues across Yorkshire.  So whether it is Bushcraft and Archery, to Climbing and Mountain Walking, we can arrange a programme to suit you.

We can also arrange residential itineraries, this can be in our large Bell Tents, or in accommodation to suit the comforts of your group.  Though we do enjoy the extensive benefits of a camping trip enjoying late night chats around a camp fire, we can't deny the comfort of a scenic hostel or hotel.

Name: Achieve 360
Description:
At Achieve 360, our aim is to provide an all in one programme that gives aspiring footballers everything they need to succeed — on and off the pitch.

We combine 1-1 mentorship, online programmes, in person development and group/environment support to help players - Live, Think, and Play like a Pro 

We truly want to help all players, targeting ages 11-18, to be more positive, forward thinking and to be young leaders, while also developing high performance, a relentless drive and elite habits - with enjoyment at the forefront of it all.

AKTIVITÄTEN UND SPORTMÖGLICHKEITEN

Wir bieten allen abwechslungsreiche, aufregende Sport- und Aktivferien an traumhaften Reisezielen. Unsere professionellen Trainer begleiten Dich persönlich durch eine breite Palette an Sportarten. Unsere Angebote eignen sich für Singles, Paare und Familien. 

Sportferien in einzigartiger Atmosphäre mit dem Sportplausch Team: ungezwungen, freundschaftlich, einzigartig, professionell und familiär! Auch dieses Jahr geben wir unter der spanischen Sonne alles, damit Du ins Schwitzen kommst.

Name: HECOstix
Description:
HECOstix are revolutionizing the way we exercise our cognitive skills through fun and effective training applications. Used by medical professionals, top level performance coaches, and educators around the world, HECOstix are bringing smiles to the faces of everyone who uses them. 

The concept is simple. Each grip (3) is independently colored allowing the participants to call out color and hand combinations. While the HECOstix are tossed in the air, each receiving person must ascertain the information and make the correct catch. 

Example: Player A tosses HECOstik to Player B while calling out Red/Right and Player B must catch the red leg with their right hand. 

Unlike catching tennis balls, HECOstix provide layers of added stimuli which makes training new and exciting with every throw. Traditional ball training methods are simply outmatched. 

HECOstix are used to improve:
Hand Eye Coordination 
Reaction Speed
Decision Making
Information Processing
Cardiovascular Training
Overall Cognitive Function

Description: Top-quality sports gear for athletes at all levels. From footballs to boxing kits, we provide premium equipment for footballers, boxers, and sports enthusiasts. Gear up for greatness!

Name: Mondo Acquachiara
Description:
Acquachiara nasce con lo scopo di contribuire allo sviluppo della pratica sportiva ed in particolare degli sport acquatici sul territorio, erogando i migliori servizi all’utenza attraverso il supporto di personale qualificato e competente ed a strutture/attrezzature all’avanguardia.

Fondata da Franco Porzio, campione olimpico di pallanuoto, icona sportiva ed imprenditore, che nel 1997 decide dare vita ad un grande progetto nel quale trasportare tutta la sua passione e la sua competenza. Prende forma in questo modo una struttura che ricoprirà in breve tempo un importante ruolo sociale, nonché una fucina sportiva per i tanti giovani che le frequenteranno.

Ogni impianto del Mondo Acquachiara è fornito delle migliori attrezzature e di strumenti all’avanguardia, che permettono di svolgere attività fisica in piscine e palestra, nel caso dell’impianto “Frullone”, moderne e confortevoli. Dai corsi “classici” di nuoto per adulti e bambini, a quelli di acquafitness, con il W.Cross, W. Trakking, Hydrobike, passando per la palestra ed i corsi di fitness, ogni attività è seguita da un team di professionisti preparati e qualificati. 

Nel panorama sportivo l'Acquachiara è diventata un'eccellenza nazionale ed internazionale potendo contare su un bacino d'utenza notevole: oltre 40.000 famiglie orbitano intorno alle due strutture.
In campo agonistico è presente nel settore pallanuoto con la squadra maschile nel massimo campionato (Serie A2).

La società si distingue, non solo sotto l'aspetto sportivo, ma anche e soprattutto nell'aspetto sociale con i suoi innumerevoli progetti solidali che coinvolgono, da oltre 25 anni, costantemente, giovani, scuole, associazioni benefiche ed umanitarie.

Oggi Acquachiara è una realtà leader nel panorama degli sport acquatici e riconosciuta tale a livello nazionale dagli addetti ai lavori, nonché un punto di riferimento per tutti quelli che cercano un luogo dove mantenersi in forma, ritrovare il benessere e divertirsi.

Name: The Lob Dubai
Description: At The Lob, we’re redefining the sport and wellness experience. Inspired by padel’s roots in Mexico and the calm of Bali, our space blends movement, recovery, and community. With six indoor padel courts, a mindful Movement Room, Reformer Pilates studio, and Infrared Sauna, every detail is designed with purpose. Description:
Elevate Performance Academy | Empowering Young Lives Through Sport & Mentorship

At Elevate Performance Academy, we believe in the power of sport to transform lives. Having witnessed firsthand how sport can steer young people away from negative influences, we are committed to providing high-quality sports education, mentorship, and development programs that create real opportunities for the next generation.

We work closely with schools, young athletes, and communities to deliver:

We’re always looking to connect with schools, businesses, and sponsors who share our vision. If you're interested in collaborating, supporting our programs, or learning more, let’s connect!

At Curve Test Centers, we are revolutionizing the way player performance data is captured and understood. Our unique "Ball, Body, and Brain" methodology provides comprehensive, data-driven insights that go beyond traditional metrics. We deliver clear, verifiable data that scouts, recruiters, and coaches can rely on to make informed decisions, streamline their recruiting efforts, and enhance the development of young athletes.

We pride ourselves on offering detailed, objective assessments that are tailored to the specific needs of each player, helping them unlock their full potential. Our reports are designed to simplify the scouting process, enabling you to identify and cultivate top talent with precision and confidence.

Join us in redefining trust in player performance data. Visit us at www.curvetestcenters.com to learn more or REGISTER for testing.

Name: Sorpasso.ch
Description:
Jugendförderung im Leistungssport

 Sorpasso ist eine Plattform zur Förderung junger, vielversprechender Sport-Talente – insbesondere im Motorrad-Rennsport, aber auch in anderen Disziplinen, wo die Jugendförderung nicht institutionalisiert ist.

 Unser Ziel ist es, Schweizer Sportlerinnen und Sportler auf dem Weg an die Spitze zu begleiten – sportlich, technisch, finanziell und menschlich.

 Dabei steht nicht der kommerzielle Erfolg im Vordergrund, sondern die nachhaltige Talentförderung, Ausbildung und Entwicklung junger Athletinnen und Athleten.

 Welcher Mehrwert bietet ein Sponsoring bei Sorpasso.ch?
Ein Engagement bei uns bedeutet:

 Direkte Jugendförderung im Leistungssport
 Nachhaltige Investition in die nächste Generation
 Emotionen erleben, die nur der Sport ermöglicht
 Teil werden einer werteorientierten und zukunftsgerichteten Bewegung
 Positiver Imagetransfer durch Engagement im Nachwuchsbereich
 Einfluss auf die Entwicklung von Schweizer Sportpersönlichkeiten
 Teil der Geschichte zu sein

Name: DEBUT SPORTS AGENCY
Description:
Debut Sports Agency is a premier sports management firm dedicated to providing top-notch representation and management services to athletes across a range of sports. With a team of experienced professionals who are passionate about sports and dedicated to helping clients achieve their goals, Debut Sports Agency has established a reputation for excellence in the industry.

Whether you are a rising star looking to make your debut on the professional stage or an established athlete seeking new opportunities and challenges, Debut Sports Agency has the expertise and resources to help you succeed. From contract negotiations and endorsement deals to marketing and branding opportunities, our agency is committed to maximizing your potential and helping you achieve your dreams.

Name: Fighters Club Bern
Description:
Der Fighters Club Bern wurde am 01.01.2009 von Stefan (Stef) Christen und Michael (Mike) Krieger gegründet. Seit rund 15 Jahren werden im Fighters Club Bern Kickboxtrainings angeboten.

Unser abwechslungsreiches Kickbox-Training ist sowohl für Frauen und Männer, Anfänger wie auch für Fortgeschrittene und Kämpfer geeignet. Dabei werden die verschiedenen Stufen getrennt und die Übungen dem Können der jeweiligen Gruppe angepasst. Wir sind zudem Mitglied des schweizerischen Kickboxverbands WAKO und auch Mitglied des Verbands SCOS.

Unser Training soll Spass machen und jede und jeder gibt was sie / er kann. Bei uns herrscht ein kollegialer und freundlicher Umgang und wir begegnen uns respektvoll und auf Augenhöhe.

Name: Speed Demon Coaching
Description:
Our mission at Speed Demon Coaching is to help people of all ages and ability levels learn HOW to RUN FASTER!

Our motto is TRAIN SMART = RUN FAST!

At Speed Demon Coaching we offer Speed Development Coaching Courses and Training Programs for Novice to High-Performance Athletes, Coaches, PE Teachers and Parents.

Speed Development Coaching courses:

Running fast is an essential skill for most sports, whether you are playing football, basketball, baseball, hockey, cricket competing in cross country, running on the track or just wanting to get really fit and run faster.

If you are a coach, a parent or a PE teacher, Speed Demon Coaching is where you’ll learn how to coach people to run faster ! The Little Speed Demon Coaching course has been designed by Dr Andrew Dawson, a high-performance track coach and sport scientist with more than 30 years’ experience coaching athletes of all ages and ability levels to run faster.

When you sign up to the Little Speed Demon Coaching course you’ll join a community of coaches, parents and teachers who will help you develop your speed, power and agility coaching skills. You can choose between several different courses designed for different sports, age groups and ability levels. Installing the app is free of charge.

Speed Development Coaching:

Speed Demon Coaching offers a range of on-line courses suitable for parents, Physical Education (PE) teachers and community level coaches. These courses have been designed by Dr Andrew Dawson an award winning coach educator with more than 30 years’ experience and designing and teaching coaching and sport science at both Deakin University and Victoria University in Melbourne, Australia.

Dr Dawson combines his knowledge and experience in coaching and sports science education with his extensive experience and success as a high-performance track coach.

You can sign up to our coaching courses and training programs via our website or  install the Speed Demon Coaching app. Easy as that!!

Description: Outdoor Recreation and Georgia Tech (ORGT) is a student-led group that offers a wide range of outdoor adventure trips for Georgia Tech students. With numerous open-enrollment trips each year, there's something for everyone, from beginners to experienced outdoors enthusiasts. The trips are led by skilled Georgia Tech students and alumni who are passionate about the outdoors and have a wealth of knowledge to share. We offer backpacking, bikepacking, mountain biking, cascading, caving, mindfulness outdoors, rock climbing, sea kayaking, and whitewater kayaking.

Name: Boulders
Description:
Boulders is a modern network of climbing gyms offering climbing experiences and training facilities for all levels, from beginners to experienced climbers. 

In addition to the climbing facilities, every gym has its own café area where you can enjoy an organic coffee or snack and get inspired for your next climb.

We work hard to promote an inclusive and welcoming atmosphere, regularly hosting events and courses for all levels that strengthen the climbing community. Whether you’re completely new or highly experienced, the friendly staff is ready to ensure you have a fantastic experience.

Boulders is open every day of the week, 361 days a year.

and peer networking opportunities. 

The next course starts in September 2025! Application is now open at esnce.eu !

Name: touchtennis Italy
Description:
Siamo la società titolare in esclusiva della licenza per lo sviluppo e la diffusione del touchtennis sul territorio italiano. 
Ha due sedi operative a Torino e Roma.

È costituita da professionisti con pluriennale esperienza nel mondo dello Sport.

touchtennis Italy sviluppa e sostiene l’organizzazione di eventi, tornei internazionali e  nazionali e manifestazioni dimostrative, lo sviluppo di scuole di addestramento e affiliazione di circoli si vuole compattare il piccolo movimento spontaneo già presente e far crescere in modo rilevante il numero di praticanti.

Il touchtennis è il nuovo e coinvolgente raquet sport. Simile al tennis, un campo di dimensioni ridotte, regole semplici e una pallina di gomma piuma pressata lo hanno reso in breve tempo popolare in molti paesi.

SEMPLICE, DIVERTENTE E ACCESSIBILE sono le 3 parole d’ordine alla base dello sviluppo in Italia del touchtennis.

Puoi inviarci un email e sarai ricontattato o iscriverti alla nostra newsletter scrivendo a italy@touchtennis.com.

Name: de TennisJuf

Name: Raise My Game
Description: Raise My Game is a performance planning system for athletes.  This ground-breaking new process involves sorting competency cards to help identify super strengths or areas to work on. A targeted plan is then built and shared with the athletes' circle of support. Other card decks also support athlete transition, campaign review, team culture review and coach development planning. Clients include High Performance Sport New Zealand, The Hurricanes Alumni, Nuku Ora and Tatai Whetu Waitaha (the Canterbury Sport Development Agency).

Name: Volmosys
Description:
Providing performance insights like never before, Volmosys accurately captures player motions and ball trajectories to provide previously unseen content and levels of analysis, which can be viewed through traditional media formats or mixed reality.

Using markerless motion capture, players can play freely and naturally, without the need for cumbersome suits. This captures accurate 3D biomechanic data, either in-lab or at live games, providing instant feedback to improve techniques, bowling speeds or golf swings, as well as minimising injury risk by identifying subtle changes in how players move.

Using a multi-camera setup, advanced computer vision algorithms process each camera’s feed to create an accurate reconstruction of players and the scene in 3D. This allows the end-user to move around and position themselves to watch the scene from any or every angle, affording greater analysis of player biomechanics and deeper insights into performance.

The most accurate and affordable biomechanics and swing capture technology for golf using 3 GoPro’s or iPhones. Our multi-camera 3D tracking results in more accurate data sets when compared with single camera tracking or 2D video analysis. This allows golf coaches to diagnose mistakes more easily and have players hitting longer, straighter, and more often, in less time.

Whilst cricketers and coaches can access new performance data and quantify things like power hitting potential utilizing metrics such as X-factor, bat speed and timing efficiency. Data driven feedback can be used to compare players or scout those with the potential to succeed at the highest level.

This no markers, no sensors approach to 3D biomechanical analysis is a fraction of the price of other systems. By taking a hands-off approach and training key club personnel, it is accessible and affordable for players, coaches and teams globally.

➤ Request a demo to see it in action.

 Le combat à distance, au corps à corps, au sol et les arts internes sont enseignés dans un même lieu (Jujitsu, Judo, Jujitsu Brésilien, Qi Gong, Méditation)

 Une structuration de cours unique pour développer l’humain de façon complète (esprit/corps/technique)

 L’intégration de techniques puissantes de Qi Gong et méditation à chaque début et fin de cours

 Un esprit d’entraide et prospérité mutuelle par la pratique des cercles de parole


Basé sur 30 années d’expériences du fondateur, dirigé par un ancien athlète de haut-niveau (Pôle Espoir, Pôle France, INSEP), avec un parcours semé de diverses formations en thérapies brèves, formé par des enseignants hors norme, c’est une pédagogie d’excellence et humaniste qui vous est proposée. 

 Les arts martiaux comme moyen de développement personnel, collectif et spirituel pour une véritable transformation dans votre vie, ça vous dit ? 

 Rendez-vous au 19 rue Nollet, l’Antre du Phénix des Batignolles.

Name: Ä V N T Y R
Description:
Jag har alltid ett mål att skapa trygga, roliga och lärorika äventyr som är värda att minnas. Genom att inkludera hela gruppen i processen av planering, riskanalys och beslutsfattande där stor vikt läggs på att varje individs röst blir hörd vill jag skapa en känsla av "högt i tak", delaktighet och gemenskap.

Det är så vi skapar ett lyckat och säkert äventyr.

Tillsammans helt enkelt.

Vi tycker också att det ska vara enkelt att dra ut på äventyr. Väl ute så anser vi att det ska präglas av glädje och ett prestigelöst deltagande. Vi ska helt enkelt ha riktigt riktigt roligt tillsammans.

Så varför krångla till det. Gör det enkla och häng med oss på äventyr. Välj nåt av våra färdiga event eller hör av dig och berätta vilket äventyr just Du vill göra. Vi hjälper gärna till.

Name: Templepilots Paragliding
Description:
Temple pilots is a dream born of love and passion for freedom and flying. We are a 25 year old, certified, registered and operating school with APPI Inte. Temple pilots is the only 5 star rated school in the country with the most active paragliding club with over 600 active pilots. We have the largest team of 11 Instructors and are committed to making safe and competent pilots. We conduct nationally Certified Basic to Advance Courses, Progression, SIV, Cross Country, Thermalling, Tandem, Professional Instructor Courses and Certified Equipment Sales. Avi Malik our C.F.I is an ex IAF fighter pilot with over 25 years in aviation. Temple pilots also regularly conducts flying tours to Bali, Bir, Bilaspur, and in Europe.

Teaching for us is a rare privilege... especially teaching to fly. It’s both an honour and a deep responsibility to be trusted to fulfill your dream to touch the skies. We get a lot of energy from student’s enthusiasm for learning to fly. It’s a delight to regularly meet a fresh group of very stimulating personalities, as very special and unique people decide to fly.
There are interesting group dynamics and it's very challenging to meet individual and collective demands of the group. Dealing with their risk and danger assessment, varying anxiety levels, fluctuating levels of motivation and confidence, attitudinal counseling and fear management is a journey we take together of shared challenges and mutual triumphs.

Mission
• To continue with high standards of paragliding training, certification and education
• To continue being committed to make safe, competent, happy and certified pilots
• To fulfill all pilot needs from quality training, top class equipment and a safe flying environment
• To conduct club coaching and tuition, advance clinics, cross country and flying tours to different destinations in India and around the world.

Bursa ve çevre şehirlerde tüplü dalış, serbest dalış ve deniz kızı yüzüşü üzerine tek eğitim verebilen yer olan Bursa Dalış Akademisi, toplamda 30 üzerinde dalda uzman dalıcı eğitimleri verebilen Bursa'nın tek dalış merkezidir. Description:

Ankara’da 2 ve İstanbul’da 2 olmak üzere toplam 4 şubesi bulunan şirket; konseptine dâhil ettiği yeni iştiraklerle (Tekstilde ‘‘BOB STORE’’, hizmet sektöründe ‘‘BOB COFFEE.CO’’ ve eğitim alanında ‘‘BOB AKADEMİ’’) de hizmet vermektedir.

‘‘Personal Coaching’’ sektörünün kurucusu olan ve lider konumunu gün geçtikçe güçlendiren BOB GYM; kişisel amaçlar doğrultusunda çeşitli test ve ölçümlerle, insan organizmasının metabolik-psikolojik ve sosyolojik gereksinimleri dâhilinde, üyelerine özgü antrenman ve beslenme programları oluşturur.

Teknolojinin son olanaklarından faydalanan şirket, benzersiz bir üye takip sistemine sahiptir. BOB GYM, üyelerini sağlıklı bir şekilde izlemek için, kendi yazılım programını (BOB GYM CRM) oluşturmuştur. Söz konusu programı, yine kendi oluşturduğu mobil uygulama (BOB GYM APP) üzerinden üyelerinin de erişimine açmıştır. Tüm bunlarla birlikte şirket, eğitmenler ve beslenme danışmanları başta olmak üzere, ilgili BOB GYM personeli ile üyeler arasında bir köprü kurmuştur.

BOB GYM; egzersiz yapmak isteyen kişilerin ideal vücut kompozisyonlarına ulaşmasında onlara rehberlik eder. Bunu gerçekleştirirken somut verilerle desteklenmiş doğru antrenman programları uygular ve bu özverili yolculuklarında onlarla yürür…

Name: Expand Your Game
Description:
Expand Your Game’s mission is to inspire female soccer players to focus on their mental wellness, empowering them to cultivate a healthy relationship with the game and maximize their performance.

Players estimate that up to 90% of the game is mental, yet they typically spend 10% or less of their total training focused on developing the mental side of their game. When mental skills training is not prioritized, impossibly high, unrealistic expectations of perfection and win-at-all-cost mentalities can dominate the soccer experience. This creates a very narrow definition of success and sets in motion a self-defeating cycle in which players can start to define their self-worth based on performance, which is a dangerous spot when it comes to mental wellness. 

We strive to help players redefine success and rediscover the joy in soccer by giving them tools to navigate the pressure, grow their confidence, play with consistency, build mental toughness, and lead from everywhere.

By growing their mental toolkits, players can elevate their game to the next level, overcoming mental hangups that have become a limiting factor in their performance. At Expand Your Game, our mission is to empower players to become their own best inner-coach, stay in the game by focusing on what they can control, and show up as the type of person and teammate they want to be, in the good times and the bad. 

Whether you're seeking in-depth 1-on-1 mental skills training, or easy-to-digest content inside our Community, we offer a range of options to help parents, players, and coaches navigate the world of competitive and elite youth soccer with a healthy striving mentality.

Description: Notre but : Susciter des vocations de pompier chez les jeunes mais aussi leur faire découvrir les engagements que cela impose. Les jeunes peuvent donc s’orienter avec une très bonne idée de ce qui les attends, que ce soit comme pompier volontaire ou avant de s’engager dans des études de pompier professionnel. Ce programme est dispensé dans le cadre d’une concentration ouvert aux secondaires de 2e cycle à Québec. Cette formation d’environ 70 heures est répartie sur une année scolaire. Les jeunes ont aussi la possibilité de participer à des séances supplémentaires comme pour les manœuvres sur un plateau technique de lutte contre les incendies, l’intégration à une équipe de pompiers professionnels le temps d’une journée, etc. Il est également organisé des séances comme pour les activités sportives représentant le métier de pompier ou encore du bénévolat pour la préparation et la participation du Noël des pompiers lors de la distribution de cadeaux aux enfants défavorisés. En plus des visites des casernes de pompier professionnel ou volontaire, le programme intègre la découverte de métiers connexes, par la présentation et la visite de sites comme la SOPFEU, une brigade incendie industrielle, une compagnie ambulancière, etc.

Name: Instituto Cultural Semifusa
Description:
O Instituto Cultural Semifusa é uma entidade sem fins lucrativos que visa democratizar o acesso aos bens culturais, estimular o protagonismo juvenil na periferia e desenvolver ações que contribuam para a construção de novas narrativas positivas para Ribeirão das Neves reforçando o sentimento de pertencimento dos moradores para com o local em que vive.

Fundado em 2009, o Semifusa conta com profissionais da história, ciências sociais, marketing, publicidade, assistência social e química em seu quadro e busca através da produção cultural contribuir para a formação cidadã e profissional dos envolvidos em seus projetos.

 

O intuito é desenvolver novas formas sistemáticas de inserção dos jovens na sociedade e estimular o crescimento dos mesmos. O Semifusa entende que as práticas culturais são essenciais para o fortalecimento do vínculo no território e também para desenvolver novas tecnologias a fim contribuir para desenvolvimento social, intelectual e cidadão da população de uma cidade.

 

O Coletivo está integrado a Rede Internacional de Periferias, a Rede de Afroempreendedores da RMBH, a Rede dos Trabalhadores a Cultura de Ribeirão das Neves e ao Circuito Metropolitano de Saraus e desenvolve diversas atividades como debates,  Oficinas, a Feira das artes da Região metropolitana, o Sarau do Ribeirão, o Festival Pá na Pedra de Artes integradas, o Festival Neves Encena de teatro e dança e ganhou prêmios como o de iniciativas inovadoras na economia criativa na categoria melhor modelo de gestão do Ministério da cultura em 2013.

Name: AFTERMATCH Life Beyond Sport
Description:
The career of an athlete is, for the most part, an experience filled with passion, adrenaline, and emotions. Athletes, immersed in intense training, often forget about one of the most crucial aspects of their sports career – the moment it comes to an end. The AFTERMATCH project is an initiative directed towards athletes, offering them a chance for comprehensive development  and a peaceful future. 

 A challenge for athletes, especially in the first years after concluding their sports career, is finding new meaning in life and a professional path that would bring them satisfaction, allowing them to utilize their skills. In response to these issues, the AFTERMATCH project was born, with its main goal of supporting athletes in transferring skills acquired during their sports career into the job market post-retirement. The project aims not only to introduce innovative solutions but also to promote dual career practices for athletes as a philosophy of strategic action and earlier career path planning after sports retirement.

 AFTERMATCH is an investment in the future, not only for professionals but also for young enthusiasts taking their first steps in sports. Successes in this context are not only momentary results but also enduring gains in skills and competencies, forming the foundation for activities after concluding the sports career stage. The project's objective is to create a systemic solution for sports associations and clubs supporting the dual career of athletes by developing a shared training model based on the rich experience of international partners. This innovative approach aims to equip future dual career educators with the necessary skills to provide support to professional athletes at every stage of their careers.

 We encourage you to follow our profile, where we will keep you updated on the progress of the AFTERMATCH project.

Name: CRADLE SPORTS
Description:
Cradle Sports is a social enterprise with several social goals at its core which include social inclusion, healthy life habits, and youth empowerment through life skills. Through our various activities, Cradle Sports addresses SDGs 3, 4, 5, 8, 15, 16 and 17. Our model includes revenue-generating activities that enable the organisation to raise funding to effectively offer pro bono services to the less advantaged children in our society particularly targeting youth in the slums.
Cradle Sports believes in a healthy, active and physically literate society where children and youth grow up to enjoy high quality lives, free from ‘lifestyle’ diseases. Sports offer great potential for building healthy lifestyles and cohesive communities. 
OUR PROGRAMMES
The Cradle Sports approach is translated into actions through six different programmes:
1)	Athletics for Development(A4D)
A4D uses Athletics as a platform to address some of the SDGs. The A4D methodology is effective in delivering both sports and other development education for example well-being, health and inclusion to children as well as imparting important life skills.
2)	School Sports Programmes
The Ministry of Education and Sports, through the National Physical Education and Sports policy (NPESP), recognizes the importance of physical education (P.E.) in schools and has therefore made it compulsory. We provide PE and train teachers on effective and fun PE delivery 
3)	Children Clubs, Tournaments & Competitions
We enable schools to set up Sports Clubs and organise inter-school and inter-academy leagues and sports competitions.
4. Training of Coaches
We provide training of coaches at different levels. Our core curriculum is for coaches working with young children (primary school) and A4D.
5. Facility Development
We develop and manage sports facilities. Our goal is 100 community sports facilities around the country.
6. National Health and Fitness Public Awareness campaign
We are passionate about building a healthy society

Name: Knights of the Sea
Description:
Camelot's - Knights of the Sea, mission is to educate 10,000 people every 5 years directly or indirectly on the joys of diving and educate where it can the importance of oceanic protection and the impact our societies have on the ocean and ultimately the planet.

Diving is amazing, you get to live weightlessly in a different world for some time away from the stresses of life and technology when diving you get to look into the eyes of alien life forms and watch them go about their daily lives.

By reducing barriers to entry, smart social media promotion, build a global network we aim to bring the experience of diving to everyone.

Camelot is based in the Philippines a small island called Malapascua and this is our first diving school where we organise everything to enable you to experience diving. Our team will organise everything for you to come to us from advising on flights, travel connections, and transport to the diving school. While you are with us you will learn about the ocean, and the environment and of course, you will learn to dive under the umbrella of PADI with some of the best dive instructors in the world. Our resort has rooms to suit all budgets and is set on one of the most beautiful islands in the world.

While immersing yourself in diving in the ocean world, you will get to meet macro critters smaller than your little fingernail, beautiful fish and sharks that are just simply curious to meet you too.

You will dive into coral gardens that will take your breath away and learn about the delicate balance of life under the ocean. Once you leave us you will gain a seat at the Camelot round table as a “Knight of the Sea” armed with the education on how you can make a difference.
