Name: PI Global Sports
Description:
PI Global Sports is an integrated sports ecosystem designed to structurally and sustainably optimize all processes, stakeholders, and stages that emerge from the practice of sport.

Our approach understands sport not as an isolated activity, but as a living system involving athletes, coaches, referees, institutions, leagues, technology, education, and social context. We work to organize, professionalize, and connect each of these elements under a shared vision.

PI Global Sports develops and integrates educational models, competitive structures, technological solutions, and support programs, adapted to the reality of each territory and aligned with principles of good governance, social impact, and long-term sustainability.

Based in Mexico and Spain, we drive projects that aim to create real development opportunities through sport, caring not only for performance but also for the human and professional growth of everyone within the ecosystem.

At PI Global Sports, we believe in structure before improvisation, impact before discourse, and in building strong ecosystems to transform sport from within.

Name: Flight Cadets | Disc Golf School
Description:
Disc Golf desde los 5 años #Discgolf

Flight Cadets es una iniciativa deportiva centrada en la creación de una red de escuelas de Disc Golf a través de un método de entrenamiento propio y unificado. Involucrándonos en la difusión, crecimiento y desarrollo de este deporte:

- Actuando desde edades tempranas
- Impartiendo una técnica estudiada
- Asesorando en la prevención de lesiones
- Fomentando el respeto y la actitud positiva

El Disc Golf es un deporte individual, cuyo fundamento teórico está basado en el Golf tradicional. En este caso sustituimos los palos y bolas por discos, y los hoyos por canastas. Es un deporte de fácil adaptación, que nos permite utilizar multitud de espacios como lugar de entrenamiento. 

La decisión de difundirlo y acercarlos a los más jóvenes se debe a que el disc golf es un deporte que contribuye al desarrollo físico, cognitivo y emocional del alumno. Es el deporte perfecto para que los niños aprendan a controlar la frustración y sus emociones. Fomenta el respeto por la naturaleza y también el deporte familiar (independientemente del nivel pueden jugar juntos padres e hijos). 

Nuestra formación va acompañada del diseño de campos y la organización de eventos, para que los alumnos pongan en práctica lo aprendido y puedan compartir la experiencia con sus padres.

Flight Cadets es la primera escuela de Disc Golf en España.

#FlightCadets #DiscGolf #DiscGolfSchool

In addition to our individual fishing excursions, Drift Guide Co. also offers tailored experiences for corporate events, team-building activities, and client appreciation outings. We understand the importance of fostering connections, and there’s no better setting than the peaceful, scenic Bow River to strengthen relationships and create memorable experiences. Our guided trips are perfect for companies looking to host unique events that encourage teamwork, relaxation, and bonding.

From building stronger internal relationships to impressing clients with a personalized outdoor adventure, Drift Guide Co. delivers unforgettable experiences that go beyond traditional corporate events. "Ginhawa" is a Visayan term for breath. Through our breath, we ground ourselves to what is present and become mindful of the current moment. This facilitates awareness, relaxation, and acceptance. All of which are essential aspects to freediving.
Freediving courses are being taught by Instructor Keith Ocampo. He had his zero-to-hero training program at Freedive HQ. Learn freediving and be guided accordingly through the Molchanovs philosophy.

Name: ZERO! ParaHockey Stichting
Description:
Het is voor iedereen bekent dat sporten belangrijke is voor niet alleen een gezonde ontwikkeling in het algemeen, maar ook goed is voor een algehele goede gezondheid. Niet alleen het actief bezig zijn is belangrijk, maar vooral ook de sociale contacten die je opdoet tijdens het sporten zijn heel belangrijk.

Iedereen neemt het maar voor lief dat sporten de gewoonste zaak van het leven is, maar voor mensen met een beperking is het een grote uitdaging om te gaan sporten.

Ons doel is dan ook om zoveel mogelijk mensen met een verstandelijke danwel een lichamelijke beperking (niet afhankelijk van een rolstoel) te stimuleren om te gaan sporten en in ons geval aan het hockeyen te krijgen.

Om ons doel te bewerkstelligen organiseren wij open hockey clinics voor enerzijds potentiële/aspirant sporters die kennis willen maken met het ParaHockey en anderzijds voor ParaHockey G/LG sporters (spelers en keepers) die hun skills willen verbeteren.

Sport zorgt voor verbroedering, sociale ontwikkeling, zelfvertrouwen en vooral plezier. Iets wat de ZERO! ParaHockey Stichting maar al te graag aanbied.

+ Führungskräfte: Steigern Sie Ihre Entscheidungsfindung und Resilienz durch gezielte neuronale und körperliche Stimulation.

+ Mitarbeiter: Verbessern Sie Konzentration und Stressbewältigung für erhöhte Produktivität und Wohlbefinden am Arbeitsplatz.

Stressbewältigung durch integriertes Gehirntraining.

Name: Jonathon Guyer Boxing
Description:
Welcome to Jonathon Guyer Boxing, where we believe in the transformative power of boxing beyond the physical. Our mission is to help those in need by instilling a mindset that is unique and invaluable in both personal and professional realms.

At Jonathon Guyer Boxing, we understand that the true essence of boxing lies not in the punches thrown but in the mental fortitude it cultivates. Boxing teaches us to stay calm under pressure, to face challenges with resilience, and to push through adversity with unwavering determination. These skills are not just beneficial in the ring but are crucial for success in the professional world.

Our program is designed to foster a strong, composed mindset in our students. We emphasize that the punches and physical techniques are merely tools to develop the inner strength required to navigate life's toughest moments. By focusing on mental toughness, we prepare our students to excel in their careers, relationships, and personal growth.

Our dedicated coaches are committed to guiding each student on their unique journey. We believe in personalized training that addresses individual needs and goals, ensuring that everyone can benefit from the powerful lessons boxing has to offer. Whether you're looking to boost your confidence, improve your stress management, or simply become a more resilient individual, Jonathon Guyer Boxing is here to support you every step of the way.

We are also proud to introduce our thriving YouTube channel, Jonathon Guyer Boxing. In just the last six months since its inception, our channel has rapidly gained popularity, nearing 1,000 subscribers and amassing 200,000 views. Our content focuses on the mental and physical aspects of boxing, offering tutorials, motivational videos, and insights into how boxing can enhance your life. Join our growing community and be part of a movement that values the profound impact of a boxing mindset.

Name: Ascension Elite Football
Description:
Authenticity. Education. Fortitude. Competition.
These four pillars define who we are at Ascension Elite Football.

Officially founded on April 23, 2025, Ascension Elite was created to elevate the standard of football development and exposure for athletes, parents, and coaches.

Our Ascension Elite Football Camps are built differently. Each event begins with an education session that equips players, parents, and coaches with valuable insight into recruiting, player development, and navigating the football journey. Afterward, athletes compete through skills and drills, 1-on-1 matchups, and 7-on-7 periods, creating an environment that blends competition, connection, and growth.

Beyond our camps, we provide media coverage for football programs nationwide — capturing gameday atmospheres, campus culture, and the stories that make football special. From Division III programs to the highest levels of college football, we aim to showcase the passion, preparation, and tradition that define the sport.

As we continue to expand across the country, our mission remains the same: to educate and connect as many people as possible to the opportunities football provides. The game has molded us — teaching discipline, leadership, sacrifice, and teamwork — and through Ascension Elite, we’re committed to giving back to the sport that shaped who we are.

Name: FPA CURSOS
Description:
Nosso negócio

A FPA (Formando Profissionais de Academia ou Acadêmicos) é uma empresa que oferece cursos extracurriculares na área de Educação Física, Nutrição e Fisioterapia.

Visão

Oferecer uma gama maior de cursos na área de educação física e saúde por todo brasil, com objetivo de atender as necessidades do crescente mercado de profissionais para atividade física.

Objetivo da FPA

Apresentar aos alunos e professores de Educação Física, fisioterapeutas e profissionais da área da saúde e educação, através de cursos gratuitos e pagos, tendências de mercado de trabalho, conhecimentos práticos e teóricos e possibilidades de colocação profissional atribuídas a sua área de atuação.

Academias/empresas associadas

São academias/empresas que permitem o acesso dos cursandos em suas dependências por um período de 3 a 6 meses, seguindo o regulamento interno das academias e do acordo entre FPA Cursos e cursandos. Hoje, contamos com mais de 300 academias associadas em várias regiões de São Paulo.

Missão (razão de existir)

Oferecer às academias associadas, escolas, clubes e etc, professores especializados para atuarem em vários seguimentos de Educação Física, fitness, saúde e Wellness. Ensinar a ensinar, desenvolvendo autonomia e polivalência dos profissionais e encaixando-os no mercado de trabalho. Colaborar como patrocinadora de eventos esportivos e atletas (amadores e profissionais) incentivando o esporte no Brasil.

Visão de futuro

Aumentar o número de academias/empresas associadas. Atingir um número maior de alunos, capacitando-os e especializando-os com o objetivo de atender a grande demanda no mercado de trabalho. Oferecer nossos cursos por todo o Brasil presencial e também on line com o objetivo de atender solicitações recebidas. Ter cursos de pós graduação – breve

Name: Double Why - Fiberglass Pools
Description:
At Double Why, everything started with two simple questions:
Why settle for less?
Why not have more?

That’s where our name comes from — Double Why.

We believe asking the right questions leads to better ideas.
In 2008, we saw that most pools in Egypt were made with concrete.

They took months to build, were hard to clean, and cost too much to keep working. So we asked:
Why not build pools that are faster, stronger, and easier to enjoy?
The answer was fiberglass.

Today, Double Why is Egypt’s top fiberglass pool company.
 We create pools that are smart, stylish, and easy to care for.

 From small homes to big resorts, we help people enjoy beautiful outdoor spaces.
We are proud to be:
 The only fiberglass pool maker in Egypt with ISO 9001:2015 certification — a global sign of quality and trust.
 The only company in Egypt with an adjustable mold system — so we can build any shape or design you dream of.
 The only one using the latest world-class fiberglass technology — for stronger, longer-lasting pools.

At Double Why, we don’t just build pools.
We build peace of mind.
We build better ways to relax.

Name: Qieez
Description:
Qieez biedt verschillende Qigong lessen & workshops aan voor zowel kinderen (4 t/m 12 jaar) als professionals die met kinderen werken. Qigong is een eeuwenoude Chinese bewegingsleer.

De maatschappij is steeds meer gericht op resultaten en presteren. Kinderen ervaren meer stress, bewegen minder, zitten steeds meer in hun hoofd en veel op hun telefoon of tablet. Ze krijgen veel informatie van buitenaf waardoor ze vooral naar buiten gericht zijn. Hoe meer informatie je van buitenaf krijgt, des te belangrijker is het om aandacht te geven aan je binnenwereld. Qigong kan kinderen helpen om lekkerder in hun vel te zitten en meer rust en ontspanning te ervaren.

Er zijn voor kinderen meerdere mogelijkheden om de Qigong oefeningen te leren: in een privéles of een groepsles. Daarnaast kun jij als ouder met je kind (van 4 tot en met 12 jaar) samen de oefeningen leren. Werk je met kinderen (4-12 jaar) en wil je de kinderen Qigong oefeningen leren? Aan de hand van Zweeds onderzoek is een lesplan ontwikkeld. Met dit lesplan kunnen professionals die met kinderen werken deze oefeningen zich snel eigen maken.

Mijn praktijk ligt in de vrije natuur. Als het weer het toelaat, trainen we buiten, anders binnen.

Name: Sport International Solidaire (SPORTIS)
Description:
SPORT International Solidaire (SPORTIS) est une association de solidarité internationale et de coopération par le sport qui oeuvre à la fois en France et à l’étranger. La mission de SPORTIS est “d’assurer la promotion et le développement de programmes de solidarité et de coopération internationale intégrant des Activités Physiques Sportives et Artistiques auprès de populations en situation de détresse, de grande misère ou de précarité sociale. Elle participe en France au mouvement d’éducation à la citoyenneté et à la solidarité internationale”

SPORTIS a été fondée en novembre 2014 par un collectif de porteurs de projets de coopération internationale par le sport (Tunisie, Algérie, Palestine, Maroc, Sénégal). Elle agit à l’international et en France auprès des exilés. Son fonctionnement associatif permet à chacun, particulier ou organisation, d’adhérer et de contribuer à son projet.

SPORTIS a établi son siège social dans le Gers, en région Occitanie (ex. Midi-Pyrénées). Elle est affiliée à la FSGT (Fédération Sportive et Gymnique du Travail), membre du CROSI (Collectif Régional des Organisations de Solidarité Internationale d’Occitanie) et d’Occitanie Coopération.

Name: Orange County Youth Sports Foundation (OCYSF)
Description:
Today, we stand united as a Board composed of local leaders, business owners, professionals, and retirees who share a deep passion for sports and a commitment to supporting those in need within our community. We believe that participation in sports has profoundly shaped our identities, achievements, and the connections we’ve made throughout our lives.

It’s disheartening to acknowledge that, despite our vibrant and resource-rich community, there are still children in Orange County who are deprived of the opportunity to engage in youth sports—opportunities that are not just enriching but, in many cases, life-saving. We recognize the immense value that sports bring, from fostering physical health and emotional resilience to building social skills and leadership qualities.

We cannot stand by while some children are left behind, simply due to circumstances beyond their control. We are committed to ensuring that every child, regardless of their socioeconomic background, has access to the benefits of youth sports. By providing these opportunities, we are not just helping them stay active; we are giving them a better chance to succeed in life, both academically and professionally.

OCYSF is a 501 (c)(3) nonprofit comprised of OC business professionals devoted to improving young lives through athletics and education.

Name: Esprit Randonnée
Description:
Pourtant issues de sphères très différentes, c’est notre envie urgente d’agir pour la nature à travers notre métier qui nous a lié. Conscientes qu’on ira plus loin dans cette action en partageant et en transmettant nos connaissances et notre regard sur l’interaction entre l’homme et la nature, nous avons fait le choix d’unir nos pas; ceux d’une soignante et ceux d’une écologiste pour vous faire découvrir les richesses de notre île, s’émerveiller face à la diversité et prendre conscience de la fragilité.

Point de militantisme ou de prosélytisme, juste une envie de partager et d’apprendre ensemble. Nous prenons à cœur de planter des graines sans jugement/ culpabilité, juste pour adoucir 

On est convaincues qu’on ne peut pas tout changer d’un seul coup de baguette magique. Mais qu’on peut et qu’on doit accompagner, pas à pas, progressivement, les uns et les autres à faire bouger leur point de vue sur la nature et notre mode de fonctionnement de manière générale. En faisant des propositions aussi simples, courtes et inattendues qu’elles puissent être. Et dans notre domaine, le tourisme, il est crucial de participer aussi à la transition qui doit s’opérer dans le monde en général.

Amandine 
Passionnée par la nature et l’Homme, j’ai dédié ma vie professionnelle à leur service. Mon expérience dans le monde scientifique a nourri ma curiosité et m’a ouvert les yeux sur les beautés de la nature. En tant qu’accompagnatrice en montagne je suis au service du citoyen en partageant, sensibilisant et éduquant à la vie sous toutes ses formes. Aujourd’hui, j’aime marier ces deux passions pour essayer de mieux comprendre le monde.

Manal
« Je n’ai pas de racines, mais j’ai des ailes ». Citoyenne du monde et « multikulti » , je me sens chez moi à La Réunion. Après une carrière éclectique dans la santé et le commerce international, ma rencontre avec cette île a bouleversé mes priorités qui se sont orientées vers la valorisation de la nature.

Name: Jelly Bean Sports
Description:
Coach Pickles' Jelly Bean Sports

Revolutionizing Early Learning Through Sports
Chicago-based Coach Pickles' Jelly Bean Sports is the industry leader in early learning sports instruction, curriculum development, and research. Since 2009, we've pioneered the revolutionary approach of teaching sports to children as young as 18 months using developmentally appropriate methods that align with how young minds actually learn.

What Makes Us Different
While teaching sports to young children isn't new, and teaching children in developmentally appropriate ways isn't new, combining both approaches is our breakthrough innovation. We've transformed early childhood sports from an afterthought into a cornerstone of child development.

Our Services

Program Delivery
Regional early learning sports development programs for families
On-site preschool recreation and sports programming

Curriculum & Resources
Packaged preschool recreation and sports curriculum for organizations
Complete training aids and materials (launching soon)

Thought Leadership
Published research in journals and trade publications
Speaking engagements and expert interviews
Consulting services for recreation and sports organizations

Our Mission & Impact
We champion early learning sports development as a powerful tool for:

Building Physical Literacy through evidence-based, play-centered programming
Combating Childhood Obesity with engaging, age-appropriate activities
Increasing Girls' Sports Participation from the earliest ages
Improving Access to quality sports programming for all children

Expertise & Credibility
Our team brings together the best minds in early childhood development, movement science, physical literacy, active learning, sports methodology, and the broader dynamics of youth athletics. We don't just teach sports—we advance the entire field through research, innovation, and proven results.

Partnership Opportunities
Employment and investment opportunities are available

Our Behn Hurricanes AAU program bakes training directly into team development, with 35 boys and girls teams from 3rd grade through high school, supported by year-round camps and clinics. Name: Gotham Archery
Description:
Are you looking for an original, one-of-a-kind exhilarating and unforgettable experience for your next corporate event? Whether it’s a holiday party, a team-building exercise or a way to say thanks for a job done well, Gotham Archery offers a unique solution for your next company outing.
 
With 40+ available lanes, we’re able to accommodate private groups large and small. We provide instruction and all the equipment necessary to safely introduce you to the world of archery. Please note that we are an alcohol-free venue but we’ve teamed with some of the great local bars and restaurants in Carroll Gardens, Boreum Hill and Gowanus for post-archery celebrating.    
 
At Gotham Archery, we will custom-tailor each event to your specifications and needs. Beyond archery, we offer you the chance to learn Axe Throwing. From team-based competitions to employee bonding exercises, we create an environment where your team will not only want to stay and enjoy themselves but also be able to engage in a truly new experience.  
 
Contact us at https://www.got-archery.com/event and let us help you coordinate a truly memorable event that you and your employees will be talking about for months to come.

Name: Omni Sports International
Description:
We are an organization dedicated to the provision and promotion of sports with over 8 years in the industry. Our goal is to be the most sought-after, multi-program coverage and trusted sports provider in Asia. 

At OmniSports International, we run by three core ethics, namely; Serious fun – Listening to the coach – Helping one another. These are present at the start of every session our coaches partake in. Underpinning these guiding principles is the vision we have for the company, which is; “Develop Healthy and Empowered People Through Sports!” 

Not only do we provide coaching, but we also offer community service, tournaments, events and facility management as well. Our role as the facility manager overseeing management, maintenance and effective operation makes us the best possible choice of superb efficiency and professional service provider.

Name: ÁREA POLE
Description:
Somos un equipo de profesionales apasionados por el pole dance, comprometidos con ofrecer un espacio inclusivo, seguro y lleno de energía para todas las personas que deseen explorar y fortalecer su cuerpo y mente.

Ofrecemos clases para todos los niveles, desde principiantes hasta avanzados, adaptando las rutinas y enseñanzas a las necesidades de cada persona. Creemos que el pole dance es más que un deporte, es una forma de arte que combina fuerza, flexibilidad, resistencia y creatividad. Nos enorgullece ser un lugar donde cada uno puede sentirse libre de expresar su autenticidad mientras disfruta de un ambiente amigable y motivador.

Name: Zporter
Description:
Zai & Zporter is seeking to revolutionize youth football through a data-driven, AI-powered platform. The company aims to create a more personalized and engaging football experience for young players, coaches, and parents by:
- Collecting comprehensive data: Zporter gathers a wide range of health, training, and match data for individual players.
- Developing an AI coach: Zai, the AI coach, provides personalized training plans, insights, and support to players.
- Building a community: Zporter creates a network where players can connect, share experiences, and track their progress.
- Data ownership: Players retain ownership of their data, fostering a sense of empowerment and control.
Key features and benefits:
- Holistic approach: Zporter focuses on the individual player rather than just the team or club.
- Personalized AI coaching: Zai offers tailored training plans and advice based on individual data.
- Data privacy and ownership: Players have complete control over their data.
- Global reach: The platform aims to expand internationally to cater to a wider audience.

Name: Geology Rocks Adventure Tourism
Description:
Geology Rocks Adventure is an Outdoor Adventure and Education Provider. We're based in the Mourne Mountains in Northern Ireland and also operate along the Causeway Coast. 

We cater for various sectors of the community, including but not limited to:

- Corporate Teams
- Charity Organisations
- Schools & Youth
- Family & Friends

Our packages range from single sessions that last from 2.5 hours to multi-day residential trips. All trips are bespoke to your company needs incorporating a range of activity, food and accommodation options. 

Simply get in touch with us to discuss your ideal trip for you and your team.

Name: AVUI Sea Academy
Description:
AVUI offers comprehensive instruction in both motor and sailing boats, equipping individuals with the skills needed to navigate effectively and pass sailing license exams successfully. 

We provide a structured curriculum tailored for beginners and advanced learners, ensuring a thorough understanding of seamanship and navigation techniques.

We offer a diverse range of activities catering to individuals and businesses:

- SAILING LICENSES Courses: Comprehensive training programs designed to prepare individuals for various sailing licenses. These courses cover both theoretical knowledge and practical skills required to obtain licenses for motor and sailing boats.

- SAILING for BEGINNERS: Tailored courses are available for novices, providing fundamental sailing skills and knowledge necessary to navigate boats effectively, emphasizing safety and basic seamanship.

- MOORING & ANCHORAGE Courses: Specialized instruction is provided on proper mooring and anchorage techniques, teaching students how to safely and securely dock and anchor boats in various conditions.

- ADVANCED NAVIGATION Courses: For experienced sailors seeking to refine their skills, the school offers advanced navigation courses focusing on more intricate aspects of sailing, including navigation in challenging conditions and by-night.

- TEAM BUILDING & INCENTIVES for ENTERPRISES: Customized programs aimed at fostering teamwork, leadership, and camaraderie among employees. These experiences utilize sailing activities to strengthen collaboration and communication within corporate teams.

- SAILING SUMMER CRUISES in SARDINIA: Captivating and immersive sailing experiences during the summer months, allowing participants to explore the breathtaking waters and coastline of Sardinia while applying their sailing knowledge in a practical setting.

Name: Dskate Hockey
Description:
Dskate Hockey is a revolutionary #hockey + #diabetes sports-education program for youth living with Type 1 Diabetes and their families.

Dskate is the home of #t1dhockey and the leader in #type1 #diabetes #hockey #support

Description: Lacrosse the Globe is committed to providing cost-free lacrosse training to build a global family of young lacrosse players, nurturing their skills, and promoting the values of sportsmanship, respect, and inclusivity.

Name: Sportika Labs
Description:
Sportika Labs is a global platform that builds and scales youth sports franchises through a full-cycle business model.
We connect entrepreneurs, clubs, and brands through scalable youth sports programs that unite education, technology, and business innovation - creating impact for children and sustainable growth for partners.

What We Do
- Develop and launch full-cycle youth franchise programs
- Provide operational infrastructure - from methodology and IT to marketing and sales
- Collaborate with clubs, brands, and local operators to grow youth sports globally

Our Impact
- 750+ youth franchises launched internationally
- 1,000+ coaches trained and certified
- 120,000+ kids engaged in structured sport programs

Name: Körperfreunde
Description:
Sport. Egal wo.

Wir sind ein junges Unternehmen in Osnabrück und haben uns zum Ziel gesetzt, Fitness im Arbeitsalltag neu zu definieren. Sport bedeutet für uns nicht nur Anstrengung sondern auch körperliches und mentales Wohlbefinden. 

Wir bieten Bewegungskonzepte an, die die körperliche und mentale Gesundheit fördern. Der Teamgedanke steht ganz klar im Vordergrund. Gemeinsam aktiv sein verbindet und stärkt den Zusammenhalt.  

Unsere Kurse zielen auf die Mobilisierung des Körpers, den Abbau von Verspannungen, den Muskelaufbau und die Stärkung des Herz-Kreislauf-Systems. 

Zusätzlich bieten wir Ergonomieberatung, Gesundheitstage, Vorträge, Schulungen und Coaching an – diese können je nach Wunsch persönlich oder digital stattfinden.

Name: Academia Sport Batel
Description:
Há mais de 14 anos a Sport Batel se tornou uma das academias mais conceituadas em Curitiba.
Tendo como foco a mudança no bem esta e na vida de seus alunos, nossa academia possui uma estrutura moderna e aparelhos de última geração.
 Oferece além das aulas de Musculação o Spinning, Pilates de Solo, Jump Class, AeroLocal, Ginástica Localizada, Duathlon entre outros, buscando sempre as melhores alternativas em um ambiente motivador.

Name: Academias Alianza Lima - Digisports
Description:
En las Academias de Fútbol Alianza Lima, nos dedicamos a la formación y desarrollo integral de jóvenes futbolistas en el Perú. Inspirados por la rica historia y los valores del club Alianza Lima, promovemos la pasión por el fútbol, la disciplina y el trabajo en equipo. Nuestro objetivo es identificar y potenciar el talento desde edades tempranas, brindando una educación deportiva de calidad y fomentando valores esenciales como el respeto, la responsabilidad y la excelencia.

Operamos bajo el prestigioso nombre de Alianza Lima, una institución reconocida y con mucha historia en el fútbol peruano, asegurando que nuestros alumnos reciban una formación de primer nivel. A través de nuestra red de academias en Lima (Chorrillos), Chiclayo, Chincha, Tarapoto y Huacho.

En nuestras academias, no solo formamos jugadores de fútbol, sino también personas íntegras y comprometidas con su comunidad. Únete a nosotros y sé parte de la familia Alianza Lima, donde cada joven tiene la oportunidad de convertirse en la próxima estrella del fútbol peruano.

Name: CEL Sports / The Richard Moore Sports CIC
Hebei Kangna Yipin Sports Equipment Co., Ltd.
Description:
Welcome to Hebei Kangna Yipin Sports Equipment Co., Ltd., your trusted partner for high-quality sports equipment since 1972. Originally founded as Changshancheng Sports Goods Factory, our company has evolved over the decades into a leading manufacturer and supplier of sports equipment, officially establishing itself in 2007.
Strategically located in the Golden Triangle area of Beijing, Tianjin, and Hebei, our company benefits from convenient transportation links, ensuring efficient delivery and service. As an integrated professional enterprise, we excel in research, design, production, sales, and customer service.

Our journey began in 1990 with the registration of the "000000" brand trademark. Since then, we have been dedicated to producing a wide range of high, medium, and low-end sports equipment for educational and competitive purposes. Our commitment to innovation, detail, and excellence has paved the way for our sustained growth and success.

Name: Aim-For
Description:
At Aim-For Solutions Ltd., we design digital platforms that elevate mental health and unlock mental performance — helping athletes and learners thrive under pressure, build resilience, and pursue excellence.
Founded by ex-professional footballers, our tools were first adopted in elite football environments and are now trusted across cricket, education, and wider sport. From academies to national programs, we support individuals and teams with structured, evidence-informed systems that foster self-awareness, focus, and long-term development.
Whether you're building future professionals or nurturing personal growth, Aim-For delivers scalable, athlete-first solutions that make mental performance visible, coachable, and impactful.

Name: Ride the Wave Project
Description:
Het Ride the Wave Project is gestart vanuit de liefde voor de surfsport en het willen helpen van jongeren (14 t/m 23 jaar) met als doel gelijke kansen in de samenleving. 
Fun, surf & friendship zijn de kernwaarden die ervoor zorgen dat deelnemers zich gezonder en gelukkiger gaan voelen zodat ze een betere toekomst kunnen opbouwen. 

Het project wordt met donaties gefinancierd en vrij van kosten aangeboden aan de deelnemers. 

Het succesvol doorlopen van een fase biedt nieuwe ervaringen, opent deuren en geeft een stevige basis voor de toekomst! Deelnemers die alle 5 de fases succesvol doorlopen hebben kunnen zelfs internationale werkervaring opdoen!

Description:
Building stronger bodies. Want het leven is zoveel makkelijker met een sterk lichaam. Met jouw succesplan, opgesteld door je personal trainer, werken we samen aan jouw doelen. Ben jij klaar om het gesprek met jezelf aan te gaan en te werken aan je sterkste zelf?

Doe eens mee met een groepsles Crosstraining, Power HIIT, Box & Burn of werk aan je persoonlijke doelen met een van onze coaches.

Name: H2O In Action - Action Sports School
Description:
At H2O In Action, the focus is on small groups, where we can give individual attention to each person who chooses us. We personalize the teaching method to the individual characteristics of each person because we are all different. But we have one thing in common, the passion for the Sea.
H2O In Action is more than a surf school, it’s a family.

Our sessions are always accompanied by instructors with extensive sea and teaching experience, and our students are grouped by age and learning level. We always choose to have small groups so that the number of students per class guarantees attentive and dedicated monitoring by each instructor.
Sessions take place in the surf spot where there are the best conditions for each level of learning.

Name: Technik vor Taktik - Der Fussball-Podcast von Markus Steffen
Description:
Der Fussball Podcast zum Thema Technik von. Wir beleuchten verschiedene Fussballtechniken, Trainingsmethoden und alles rund um den Fussball. Willst du als Trainer oder Spieler besser werden und dich weiterbilden? Dann findest du hier spannende Themen und Gäste aus dem professionellen Fussball. Wir beleuchten Themen wie Trainingsgestaltung, mentale Stärke, Korrekturpunkte und vieles mehr. 
Mein Name ist Markus Steffen und ich bin Techniktrainer für Fussballprofis. Ich trainiere Spieler aus folgenden Ligen: 
1. Bundesliga, 2. Bundesliga, 3. Liga, Regionalliga, NLZ-Spieler (Nachwuchsleistungszentren). Spieler von Borussia Dortmund, Schalke 04, VFL Bochum, Hannover 96, Fortuna Düsseldorf und vielen anderen Profiklubs gehören zu meinen Klienten. 
Wenn dich Technik interessiert, dann bleib dabei!

Name: Highballs Golf
Description:
Indoor en outdoor golfen met behulp van Trackman Technology. Breng uw golfervaring naar een ander niveau! Zowel beginnende, gevorderde als zakelijke golfer zijn bij ons welkom! 

Komt u individueel of in teamverband, voor lessen, om te trainen, wilt u zakelijk netwerken, heeft u een bedrijfsfeestje of wilt u gewoon lekker een balletje slaan? Het is allemaal mogelijk naar uw wensen bij Highballs Golf.

Naast indoor golf ook outdoor golf. U kunt bij en met ons het gehele jaar door uw golfkwaliteiten verbeteren en daardoor uw golfplezier vergroten.
De mogelijkheden van Highballs Golf zijn zo uitgebreid dat vrijwel alle facetten van het golfspel te beoefenen en te verbeteren zijn. Van 18 holes golfen op St. Andrews tot wekelijkse trainingen! 

Namens het team van Highballs Golf hopen wij u graag te mogen verwelkom!

Name: Biomecaswing by JJ Rivet
Description:
The Biomecaswing concept is dedicated to enhancing your movement through a scientific methodology that meticulously analyses the key parameters influencing the body's ability to execute precise sporting gestures.

Founded and developed by Jean-Jacques Rivet, the Biomecaswing solutions cater to individuals of all levels, from top-tier athletes to enthusiastic amateurs. Whatever your specific challenges may be, we specialize in crafting unique optimisation solutions tailored to your needs.

Our programs are entirely bespoke, and personalised solutions await you at our headquarters, located at The Stoke Park Academy, within the luxurious Stoke Park  Golf and Country Club.

Biomecaswing extends beyond a network of partners, teachers, and golf professionals; it encompasses collaboration with the sports industry, physiotherapists, doctors, chiropractors, as well as institutions and scientific committees.

Discover a holistic approach to sports movement improvement with Biomecaswing – where science meets personalised optimisation, ensuring a tailored solution for every individual.

Name: Hightide Kayak School
Description:
We love Sea Kayaking, Paddlesports, and supporting people in achieving their goals. For us delivering unforgettable experiences and inspiring coaching is at the heart of what we do. Coming to hightide is about more than just taking a course, it’s a lifestyle and about joining a community of like-minded people who love what they do.

We are the most specialised Sea Kayak Coaching School in Switzerland providing courses, tours, rentals and a whole host of British Canoeing (BC) personal skills, leadership and coaching awards. BC is at the forefront of Coaching theory and practice and their qualifications are recognised worldwide as a benchmark for quality and professionalism.

Our team of British Canoeing qualified guides and coaches are led by Dave Storey, the only Performance Sea Kayak Coach and one of just three Advanced Sea Kayak Leaders (5 Star) in Switzerland.

Rated 1st place for ‘activities’ in Interlaken (Tripadvisor 2018)

Name: Fitboxing România
Description:
De ce Fitboxing?
Pentru că meriți O TRANSFORMARE COMPLETĂ A CORPULUI ÎN DOAR 8 SĂPTĂMÂNI!

Cele 47 minute de zero-contact box combinat cu o serie de exerciții în ritmul muzicii sunt formula perfectă să scăpi rapid de kilogramele extra, să-ți tonifiezi corpul, să elimini stresul și să te distrezi!

Eficient & Distractiv
Fitboxing-ul combină diferite tehnici și mișcări din box, kickboxing și muay thai cu aerobic și cross training. Echipat cu propria pereche de mănuși de box, lucrezi în ritmul muzicii executând o combinație de mișcări și lovituri cu pumnii, coatele și genunchii. Adversarul tău: un sac de box care nu dă înapoi!

Rezultate Rapide
Cu fiecare sesiune de Fitboxing, elimini din tensiunea și anxietatea de zi cu zi, în timp ce rezistența, agilitatea, forța și coordonarea cresc.

Pentru Absolut Oricine
Și cel mai bun lucru: nu trebuie să fii în super formă ca să-ți placă Fitboxing-ul. Trainerii noștri te vor ghida cu răbdare, ca rezultatul să fie cel dorit: mai sănătos și mai relaxat!

Name: Het Marnix
Description:
Stichting SpACe

Stichting Sportbedrijven Amsterdam-Centrum (SpACe) beheert en exploiteert de gemeentelijke sportvoorzieningen in stadsdeel Amsterdam-Centrum: sportcentrum Het Marnix, Sporthal Oostenburg en Sportpark Parkschouwburg. 

Het Marnix is een multifunctioneel sport- en wellnesscentrum met twee zwembaden, een sporthal, een spa- en healthclub, een horecagelegenheid, fysiotherapie en een ondergrondse fietsenstalling. Allemaal onder één dak. Samen een dynamisch centrum dat net zo energiek is als de stad Amsterdam. Sporthal Oostenburg is een multifunctionele sporthal in de Oostelijke binnenstad. Sportpark parkschouwburg is een multifunctionele outdoorsportaccommodatie in hartje Amsterdam.

Name: PARAPENTEannecy.fr
Description:
Bienvenue en Haute-Savoie à Annecy pour votre baptême en parapente ! 

Pris en charge par notre équipe de professionnels et nos moniteurs diplômés d'Etat, laissez-vous aller pour un vol au-dessus du lac d'Annecy ! 
Nous nous occupons de vous depuis le décollage jusqu'à l'atterrissage où votre pilote vous posera en douceur. Durant le vol, laissez-vous porter par la voile, vous pourrez ainsi voler comme un oiseau et goûter à cette sensation de liberté que procure le vol libre. 

A faire ou à offrir grâce à la vente de bon cadeau en ligne 

Les photos et vidéos sont incluses sont pour tous les vols !

Qu'attendez-vous pour vous lancer ?!

Name: Vélorail Sud Alsace
Description:
Une évasion originale en pleine nature ! 
Un coin d’Alsace entre champs et forêts… entre faune et flore ! 

Venir au vélorail, c’est aussi devenir acteur d’un mode de tourisme plus responsable et écologique. 
Le vélorail est l’un des seuls moyens de transport qui ne rejette aucune émission de CO2 et qui donc n’a aucun impact environnemental. 

C’est une cyclo-draisine légère, propulsée par l’énergie musculaire des pédaleurs. 
Dotée, de 2 postes de conduite chacun équipée d’un frein, il faut minimum être 2 personnes d’au moins 1m40 pour propulser le vélorail.

Une privatisation est possible pour des sorties de cohésion d’équipe.

Name: Vita & Gröna Bandet
Description:
Fjällfararnas Vita & Gröna Band är inte en led. Det är ett äventyr och en upplevelse för livet. Med egen kraft färdas fjällfararen längs sin egenvalda rutt genom fjällkedjan, från Grövelsjön till Treriksröset, eller tvärtom.

Turen kan genomföras antingen sommartid eller under vintern och Bandens färg visar när turen görs. Hänsyn till miljön, klimatet, fjällandskapet, människorna och djuren är en ledstjärna och en självklarhet.

Att färdas genom hela fjällkedjan ger erfarenheter och minnen som stannar kvar. Du har tid att bara vara, hinna uppleva och reflektera. Du behöver fylla dina viktigaste basbehov – att hålla dig varm, torr, mätt och trygg – men inte mer, om du inte vill. Du får nya kunskaper, både om dig själv och om fjällandskapet du färdas igenom. Och som en fin bonus erbjuds du oväntade chanser till fantastiska möten och kanske till och med nya vänner för livet.

Grâce à la confiance de ces clubs pro, ce sont des entraîneurs des académies qui viennent partager leur expérience en Suisse pour nos joueurs.

Un partenariat avec Motion Lab au Mont-sur-Lausanne permet aux jeunes de s’entraîner durant la pause hivernale en petits groupes et de bénéficier des compétences de Motion .

Entouré de notre staff, nous nous efforçons d’améliorer constamment la qualité et l’offre des camps proposés, pour satisfaire parents et participants. Nous misons sur des personnes de confiance, ayant une connaissance du terrain et étroitement liées aux partenaires régionaux (clubs, communes, sponsors, etc.).  Star Sports a pour but principal de faire progresser les jeunes joueurs de nos régions dans un contexte ludique et bienveillant.

Name: Safer in Water
Description:
SAFER IN WATER is a swimming teaching methodology developed from the causes of drowning. It is the reflection of an in-depth study of drowning in children. This study, done in 2013, tested children aged 3 to 6 years after learning to swim. With this study we were able to see that the responses given by children in at-risk situations do not focus on any particular swimming style, varying according to the conditions they were in, the conditions of the aquatic environment, the individual characteristics of the child as well as the psychological state of the moment. It was the answers given by the children as well as the variation of the states mentioned that allowed us to elaborate the skills proposed by SAFER IN WATER.

In practice, the SIW Methodology is a Program of Prevention and Safety in Aquatic Environment, applied to children, which has the following objectives:
- the conquest for autonomy and survival,
- the acquisition of respect and liking for water,
- the monitoring of the child's psychomotor development.

This methodology aims, through diverse, playful teaching and experiences that are very close to reality, to transmit the knowledge and experience necessary for the safety of a child in case of an accident in the water.
There are no standard answers for survival, there are skills that each child must choose to perform according to the situation that presents itself. In the same situation different children will give different answers, it is at this point that we verify the cognitive ability that children develop to solve problems.

L'objectif de Prestige Padel est d'apporter ce sport aux gens de toute l'Amérique du Nord en ouvrant des centres de qualité où les gens peuvent vivre une expérience incroyable tout en apprenant à jouer, en rencontrant d'autres joueurs et en restant en forme et actifs en faisant quelque chose qu'ils aiment.

Name: Box´n Burn Ridderkerk
Description:
Bij Box'n Burn geloven we sterk in toegankelijkheid en begeleiding. We streven ernaar om een omgeving te creëren waarin iedereen, ongeacht ervaringsniveau, zich welkom voelt. Ons doel is om de wereld van (kick)boksen toegankelijk te maken voor iedereen, en we zijn ervan overtuigd dat dit mogelijk is met de juiste begeleiding.

Bij ons staat persoonlijke aandacht centraal. We begrijpen dat het aanleren van de juiste technieken essentieel is voor het genieten van de sport en het behalen van optimale resultaten. Daarom zorgen onze ervaren instructeurs ervoor dat je alle aandacht en begeleiding krijgt die je nodig hebt om de technieken onder de knie te krijgen. Of je nu een beginner bent of al ervaring hebt, bij Box'n Burn streven we ernaar om iedereen te helpen zijn of haar doelen te bereiken.

Wij vinden dat sporten leuk moet zijn en dat plezier een cruciaal onderdeel is van een gezonde en actieve levensstijl. Onze lessen zijn ontworpen om niet alleen effectief te zijn, maar ook om plezier en enthousiasme op te wekken, waardoor je gemotiveerd blijft om door te gaan.

Ook geloven we dat een algehele fitheid essentieel is voor een gezond lichaam en een sterke geest. Door te investeren in functionele krachttraining, zul je merken dat je niet alleen sterker wordt, maar ook een algeheel gevoel van welzijn ervaart.



Bij Box'n Burn gaan we verder dan alleen sporten; we creëren een gemeenschap waarin iedereen wordt aangemoedigd om zijn grenzen te verleggen en zijn potentieel te ontdekken.

Name: 3Ptenniscoaching
Description:
Le centre d’entrainement de haut niveau 3P tennis coaching est une association loi 1901 à but non-lucratif basée dans la commune de Bures-Morainvilliers (Yvelines, 78). La structure encadre et accompagne des joueuses et des joueurs qui souhaitent développer leur potentiel et/ou devenir professionnel.le.s. 

La vision du centre repose sur les 3P : Progrès, Plaisir et Performance. 
Ces trois notions sont complémentaires et indispensables pour progresser de façon continue et s’épanouir. Les progrès réalisés chaque jour permettent à l’athlète d’augmenter sa confiance en lui ainsi que son estime. Les progrès amènent au plaisir et la motivation de l’athlète l’amène à se découvrir chaque jour davantage. Les athlètes qui sont en phase avec leur projet, qui allient progrès et plaisir peuvent accéder à la performance. 

Au 3P notre approche de la performance est axée autour du jeu, de l’adaptation et de la combativité. L’entrainement technique, physique ou mental est au service du match, au service de la tactique. La conviction de l’équipe de coachs est que la formation mentale est primordiale pour se développer et s’épanouir en tant que futur.e sportif.ve de haut niveau.

Name: Airfly Bretagne
Description:
Airfly Bretagne : 1er simulateur de chute libre en Bretagne !
Vivez l’expérience de la Chute Libre lors de vos évènements professionnels !

Cette activité unique en Bretagne est l’incentive idéal pour votre séminaire.

Le simulateur de chute libre est situé sur la zone de loisirs de Cap Malo, un lieu dédié aux loisirs et incentives à quelques minutes de Rennes.
La chute libre dans le simulateur Airfly Bretagne est une expérience unique où le rêve de voler devient réalité. Ouvert aux débutants dès 5 ans comme aux confirmés, Airfly Bretagne offre les sensations d’une véritable chute libre, exactement comme lors d’un saut en parachute (sans la peur de sauter de l’avion !). Le temps de chute libre à Airfly Bretagne est au minimum 2 fois plus long qu’un saut en parachute tandem. Activité outdoor, Airfly Bretagne fonctionne par quasiment tous les temps.

Name: ATHLIUM
Description:
La réussite résulte d’un processus structuré, rigoureux et quantifiable. C’est pourquoi nous avons opté pour un chemin singulier : la fusion des compétences. Un coach technique, un préparateur physique et une préparatrice mentale travaillent main dans la main, dans un même langage, autour d’un même objectif : la progression du joueur.

Athlium s’adresse à celles et ceux qui choisissent la lucidité plutôt que l’illusion, la méthode plutôt que la facilité, le progrès durable plutôt que le résultat immédiat. Notre promesse n’est pas la victoire rapide : notre promesse, c’est un cadre, une méthode et des objectifs clairs.

Notre approche conjugue globalité, précision technique et rigueur clinique. Elle s’appuie sur la biomécanique, le mental, et des données tangibles, mesurables et reproductibles. Chaque axe, chaque mouvement, chaque attitude sont modélisé pour créer un progrès tangible.

Athlium est votre partenaire de progression, un laboratoire de performance, un espace où le golf devient une science et une quête intérieure. Chaque joueur trouve les conditions idéales pour se transformer, durablement et profondément. Nous créons une expérience All in One : un accompagnement haut de gamme, moderne et inspirant, où la créativité, la précision et la rigueur scientifique s’unissent au service d’une seule voix – la vôtre.

Name: Dribbl

Since 1995, we’ve been teaching kids of all ages the fundamentals of basketball, in a fun and safe environment. We like to focus on things like teamwork and sportsmanship rather than points and trophies. That said, we want our young athletes to walk away knowing how to handle the ball. Desde St. Andrews hasta Pebble Beach, las mejores canchas están a tu alcance.

The Golf Club CR es un espacio pensado para todos, desde jugadores amateur hasta profesionales en busca de perfeccionar su técnica. Además, trabajamos con Callaway, una de las marcas más prestigiosas del golf, para ofrecerte equipamiento de primera calidad y acceso a nuestros servicios de ajuste y personalización de palos.

Nuestros entrenadores son de nivel internacional, preparados para ayudarte a mejorar tu swing, perfeccionar tu técnica y llevar tu juego al siguiente nivel. Con nuestras clases personalizadas y asesoramiento experto, siempre tendrás el respaldo necesario para alcanzar tus objetivos.

En The Golf Club CR no solo encuentras golf, encuentras una comunidad. Ya sea que quieras divertirte con amigos, mejorar tu juego, o simplemente pasar un buen rato, aquí tendrás todo lo que necesitas para disfrutar del mejor golf indoor.

Te esperamos para que vivas una experiencia única, rodeado de lujo, tecnología, y todo el confort que mereces!

Samen maken we je dromen werkelijkheid en sleep ik je er doorheen waar nodig is.

In 2017 heeft oprichter Rick besloten om zich te gaan richten op het totaal plaatje, namelijk een gezonde geest in een fit lichaam. Name: ACEPTA EL DESAFÍO
Description:
Acepta el Desafío es una competición entre empresas del País Vasco que cuenta con 12 actividades en las que pueden inscribirse aquellas PYMES o grandes empresas que quieran participar con sus trabajadores. 
El desafío comienza en marzo y, hasta junio, se desarrollan las diferentes actividades. A finales de junio celebramos la gala final en la que se realizará la entrega de premios y se reconoce la participación de cada una de las empresas y participantes. 
Cada empresa podrá realizar su inscripción hasta el 15 de febrero.
Puede participar cualquier empresa con domicilio en el País Vasco, ya tenga 2 ó 10.0000 trabajadores. Tu empresa si quiere puede participar solo en una actividad y ser el campeón de esa actividad o participar en más actividades y llegar a ser el campeón del torneo. 
Además, una empresa puede presentar en cada actividad el número de equipos que considere aunque para la clasificación final del torneo solo puntuará el equipo mejor clasificado en cada actividad. Por lo tanto; El número no importa, importan las ganas!

Name: Urban Tracks
Description:
Urban Tracks – The Future of Running
Why
We believe everyone deserves access to safe, inspiring places to run. Cities are full of obstacles — traffic, poor lighting, hard surfaces. Urban Tracks was created to remove those barriers and bring the joy of running to every neighborhood.

How
We design innovative running facilities that blend seamlessly into public spaces. From concept to construction, we guide the process with a focus on community, health, and movement. Our tracks are organic, inviting, and always tailored to their surroundings.

What
Urban Tracks offers three solutions that transform how and where people run:

 Urban Track
A permanent running route for parks, campuses and city spaces. Designed with curves, slopes, lighting and time-tracking — ideal for training, events and everyday runs.

 Urban FlowTrack
A compact, public 200m loop for schools and urban neighborhoods. It promotes play, movement and inclusion for all ages. Its the best introduction track after the mobile stadium. Also possible with technological innovation such as pacelightning an timing systems. 

 Mobile Athletic Stadium
A pop-up track with modular banked turns. Built to excite kids at events, schools and sports festivals. We bring athletics to where it’s needed most.

Together, we’re building a healthier, more active society — one track at a time.

Urban Tracks. The future of running is now.

Name: NeuroSport
Description:
When the physical potential between athletes is essentially equal, what differentiates the best? The
answer is your ability to execute under the most difficult circumstances. That ability comes from being
mentally prepared and possessing mental toughness. The good news is every person’s mental game
can be developed, just like physical strength and agility. The problem is few people know where to
start. We can help.

Serious science – real results.
The NeuroSport Assessment pinpoints the strengths, preferences, and limitations of an individual
based on the Myers-Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI), the most widely-used psychological instrument in
the world. Thousands of amateur and professional athletes, coaches, and trainers have taken the MBTI
with stunning results. When you understand “how you’re wired,” you can maximize both your physical
and mental potential.

How it works.
NeuroSport founder and professional athlete, Anne “Kip” Watson, MA, LPC, begins with a one-on-one
consultation to understand your unique goals and challenges. Once you’ve completed the
NeuroSport assessment, Kip creates a detailed analysis with specific recommendations for improving
training and motivation, relating to coaches and parents, and dealing with game-day stress. Kip then
conducts a hands-on, two hour Strategy Session to walk through your profile, answer questions, and
create plan for growth.

Name: Coaching Ultra
Description:
Coaching Ultra aide et accompagne les coureuses et les coureurs à se faire plaisir dans l'ultra. 

La longue, voire très longue distance, avec du dénivelé, est un sport à part entière. 

Ce n'est pas le prolongement des courtes distances. 

C'est allure différente, c'est un effort musculaire différent, c'est un effort cardio vasculaire différent, c'est un effort mental différent, c'est une durée d'effort différente. 

Et donc, ça nécessite une approche et une préparation propre. 

L'objectif de Coaching Ultra est d'accompagner des coureurs amateurs. De faire en sorte qu'avec un métier prenant (ou pas), avec une vie sociale fournie (ou pas), avec une vie familiale intense (ou pas) : on réussisse à terminer ses ultras. 

Trouver un équilibre de vie dans lequel l'ultra trouve toute sa place. 

Renforcer son équilibre pour se découvrir physiquement, mentalement, au milieu de la Nature et dans le partage pendant des dizaines, voire des centaines de kilomètres. 

Le faire en se respectant, en respectant son corps, en respectant les autres pans de sa vie, en se faisant plaisir et en étant en meilleure santé. 

Apprendre à utiliser son corps et les capacités de tout son être pour réussir à atteindre ses objectifs. 

Considérer que la performance, comme le dit Patrick Berhault, "on l'aime pour ce qu'elle représente dans la démarche et le chemin de l'homme, pour es pensées, les efforts, les conceptions, pour l'adaptation qu'elle demande". 

La performance n'est pas qu'un classement ni qu'un temps sur une liste d'arrivée.
