Description: Somos GIUBODY ELECTROFITNESS, somos una Empresa enfocada en la salud y bienestar, usando la mejor tecnlogía para el entrenamiento físico, para que su vida sea plena.

Name: Octopus Watersports Co.
Description:
Octopus is one of the prominent Companies which is located Albida’a to provide highest Quality Watersports services in Kuwait. A team of well experienced Instructors joined to establish a watersports operation center to be the hub for all water sports activities. Octopus has been established to be the best and unique watersports center in Kuwait.

Octopus workforce holds all the necessary Certification from Kuwait Authorities. All sea trips will be heading to Kuwait islands and diving spots, which have unique potential of marine diversity. 

Octopus is the only company providing a mobile Scuba Tanks Air Filling & Renting station in Kuwait. A customized truck containing air filling compressor and diving products was built All divers and dive centers located in Kuwait. You could use the application to book your preferred date and time to refill your Scuba tanks in your chosen location without carrying or moving your Scuba tanks to anywhere from your location. This is the first truck in the GCC countries or even in the Middle East.

In addition, a customized speed boat was built for Octopus’s valuable customers. It is located in Khiran Resort Port which is the closest location for the most famous diving spots and islands such as Qarouh and Umm Al Maradim islands. The boat equipped with the best and latest equipment to operate any trip safely and easily. Snacks and drinks will be provided for our customers for free of charge.
Location: Mövenpick Hotel & Resort Al Bida'a, Kuwait

Name: SportBuddy.de
Description:
Empowering Connections Through SportBuddy's Vision 

At the heart of our mission lies the profound belief in the power of unity and connection. SportBuddy is not just an app; it's a catalyst for forging meaningful connections and cultivating a dynamic sports community that thrives on shared passions.

 Revolutionizing Connections, One Game at a Time 

Imagine a world where every sports enthusiast effortlessly connects, where the thrill of the game extends beyond the field. SportBuddy is on a mission to transform this vision into reality by providing a cutting-edge, user-friendly app designed to seamlessly organize and attend sports events in your city.

 Building Bridges, Fostering Comradery 

More than just a platform, SportBuddy is a movement that fosters unity and comradeship among participants. Whether you're a seasoned athlete or a casual sports enthusiast, our app is engineered to bring people together, breaking down barriers and creating a vibrant tapestry of shared experiences.

 Your Game, Your Community, Your SportBuddy 

Together, let's make every sports moment count. SportBuddy: where connections are made, friendships are forged, and the spirit of sportsmanship flourishes.

#SportBuddy #ConnectingThroughSport #CommunityThrive

Name: Studio11 Madrid Dance Center
Description: La 1ª Escuela de Baile y Salud creada por profesionales para público exigente

Name: Clearmindsports
Description:
Bij ClearMindSports draait het om meer dan alleen sporten – het gaat om kracht, focus en groei. Onze 24/7 gym biedt exclusieve toegang voor leden die op hun eigen tijd willen trainen, met dynamische groepslessen die je helpen je grenzen te verleggen. Hier bouw je niet alleen je lichaam op, maar ontwikkel je een scherpe, doelgerichte mindset.

Dit is waar je kracht écht tot leven komt. Dit is ClearMind.

Name: PlayOn Tennis Academy
Description: PlayOn is a Tennis Academy that develops tennis players of all ages and skill levels to unleash their full talent and become the next UAE champions.

Name: JustGoo
Description:
Dagelijks verzorgt JustGoo buitensporttrainingen gericht op hardlopers, wandelaars en trailrunners. Middels een 40-tal ervaren trainers bieden wij een gevarieerd trainingsprogramma aan op meerdere locaties gelegen in Maastricht, Sittard, Valkenburg, Bunde, Eijsden en Sibbe. Iedere hardloper, wandelaar en trailrunner kan op elk niveau bij ons terecht. 

Ontelbare mensen hebben bij JustGoo de eerste stappen gezet naar een actiever en vitaler leven. Want juist het sociale aspect van lopen in groepsverband zorgt ervoor dat mensen blijven bewegen. Vaak blijven onze sporters na afloop van de training dan ook nog graag even napraten met hun loopmaatjes onder het genot van een gezond drankje. 

Naast het reguliere trainingsaanbod verzorgt JustGoo ook in-company trainingen en cursussen op maat.

Name: Skipzen
Description:
SkipZen est une société spécialisée dans la formation nautique, la sécurité en mer et l’accompagnement des plaisanciers.
Elle propose des prestations dédiées aux particuliers — formations plaisance, coaching navigation, convoyage, services aux propriétaires et entretien de bateaux — ainsi que des programmes professionnels pour les entreprises, incluant team building, ateliers sécurité et expériences nautiques sur mesure.
SkipZen place la prévention, la pédagogie et le respect du milieu marin au cœur de chacune de ses interventions.

Name: ELITE Soccer Academy
Description:
ELITE SOCCER ACADEMY
Mit Spaß, Freude und Leidenschaft Fußball spielen
5 Länder, 1.500+ Spieler, 80+ Events im Jahr – seit 2008 leben wir Fußball mit Herz und Leidenschaft.

Name: Sup en Surf Nijmegen
Description: Sup en Surf Nijmegen is een watersport & evenementenbedrijf. Wij verzorgde de gaafste activiteiten op en rondom het water. Dit kunnen we niet alleen en doen we samen met ons fantastische team!

Name: POWER FOREVER SWIM LTD
Description:
" Swimming is not a luxury, it's a life skill because you might never know when you need it " 

Power Forever Swim is a company that provides high quality swimming lessons to all ages and abilities. Our point of difference is that we conduct lessons within the comfort of your own swimming pool or within the aquatic facilities of your residential complex.
Our unique swim program, delivered by our team of highly skilled and experienced teachers, enables students to learn in a relaxed and fun environment.
The lessons are broken down into simplistic units that allows students to easily gain confidence quickly and easily, ensuring that the correct stroke technique is understood and adopted from the very first lesson.
Our swimming programs are tailored to fit the individual according to their age and abilities. 
For babies to toddlers the lessons are filled with fun and engaging drills, that will keep your child wanting to come back for more and in the process, preparing them for an important life skill and help them understand the safety elements around water.
For Teenagers and Adults, our lessons are structured around your goals, providing the feedback required to improve and perfect your technique and at the same time building confidence in your swimming abilities.

Swimming is a journey, let Power Forever Swim lead you along the way!

Name: RVC - Centre Vélo
Description: Education, Animations et Aménagements cyclables
Location: La Roche-sur-Yon, Pays de la Loire

Name: Elite Boxing Club
Description: Elite Boxing Club è una palestra nata nel 2014, specificamente dedicata alle discipline di combattimento, con un approccio finalizzato al raggiungimento di una preparazione atletica ottimale unita allo sviluppo delle capacità di determinazione e concentrazione mentale. Per questo motivo alle discipline di combattimento (pugilato, kick boxing, muay thai, savate, MMA) affianchiamo attività di preparazione atletica (cross training, running) a cui abbiamo riservato un’area specifica della nostra struttura.

Name: SUP Lass Paddle Adventures
Description:
SUP Lass Paddle Adventures was founded by paddle board enthusiast, Caroline Dawson. Caroline is an accomplished stand up paddle board (SUP) Instructor and Adventure Guide, with a passion for all things outdoors.

Located on the edge of the Clwydian Range and Dee Valley AONB, SUP Lass Paddle Adventures has doorstep access to a range of breath-taking paddle locations, including the majestic River Dee, the world-famous Llangollen Canal, plus an array of Welsh lakes and coastlines.

Name: ParkourONE Berlin
Description: Wir von ParkourONE verstehen uns als ganzheitliche Bildungseinrichtung. Mit all unseren Parkour-Angeboten wollen wir die Potentialentfaltung, Werthaltung und Gesundheitsförderung (physische, soziale und psychische) der Teilnehmer_innen unterstützen – sei es in unseren regelmäßigen Klassen, in Workshops, Kursen, Fortbildungen oder anderen Events. Alle Angebote werden von unseren ausgebildeten Coaches und Headcoaches (Parkour nach TRUST) und langjähriger Erfahrung begleitet.

Name: International Island Games Association
Description: To foster and encourage friendship through sporting activities between Island Communities, and to provide opportunities for sportsmen and sportswomen to participate in international sport.

Name: Reef Oasis Diving Center
Description:
“Deep Connections, Bigger Opportunities”
Build industry relationships, discover career paths, and explore collaborations in the diving world.

Name: Pasta LAB SP
Description:
Experiencias gastronomicas
Workshops, cursos, treinamentos e eventos.
Aulas customizadas, individual ou grupo
Eventos corporativos "Team building"

Name: The 1% Club
Description: The 1% Club was founded with the vision to educate and empower the next generation of runners. Through mini-seminars, training and positive coaching, we are reaching across Central Massachusetts to set young runners up for success. Runners are learning how each 1% adds up on their path to becoming a strong athlete as we strive to provide affordable resources.

Name: The Coxswains Journey
Description:
The Coxswain’s Journey” is a podcast dedicated to the art and science of coxing in the sport of rowing.

As a coxswain, the host has a unique perspective on the sport and shares insights on various aspects of coxing, including strategy, technique, leadership, and communication. Through personal experiences and interviews with other coxswains, coaches, and athletes, the podcast provides valuable tips and advice to listeners who want to improve their coxing skills.

Ultimately, the podcast aims to inspire coxswains to become better leaders and contribute to the success of their teams. If you’re interested in the sport of rowing or want to improve your coxing skills, “The Coxswain’s Journey” is the perfect podcast for you.

Name: La pêche au féminin
Description:
The English Version will follow ...

 La Pêche au féminin, c’est bien plus qu’un sport.
C’est une porte d’entrée vers la reconnexion à soi, à la nature, et à une communauté de femmes inspirées et inspirantes.

Depuis plus de 17 ans, Joannie de Lasablonnière partage sa passion pour la pêche à la mouche à travers des formations, des retraites en nature et du mentorat, pensés par et pour les femmes.

Qu’on soit curieuse, débutante ou passionnée, chaque expérience vise à :
 Développer des compétences techniques et de plein air
 Retrouver confiance en soi par l’action
 Créer des liens forts, bienveillants et durables
 Se déposer, respirer, apprendre autrement

 Une canne à pêche à la main, un monde à explorer au féminin.

 La Pêche au féminin is more than a sport.
It’s a doorway to reconnect with yourself, with nature, and with a vibrant community of women.

For over 17 years, Joannie de Lasablonnière has shared her passion for fly-fishing through workshops, nature retreats, and mentoring programs—designed by and for women.

Whether you're curious, a beginner or an experienced angler, every experience is crafted to:
 Build technical and outdoor skills
 Reclaim confidence through action
 Foster genuine, supportive connections
 Breathe, rest and learn differently

 With a fly rod in hand, there’s a whole world to discover — the feminine way.

Name: Ecole des Métiers du Sport by GTF . Biarritz
Description:
Formation en alternance au BP JEPS AF spécialité Educateur Sportif. 
Centre de formation professionnel aux métiers du sport à Biarritz depuis 2018.
Notre UFA, ou Unité de Formation pour Apprentis, dépend du CFA, Centre de Formation pour Apprentis, Global Training Formation situé à Paris.

Name: Xrossover Sports
Description:
Xrossover Sports: Transforming Athletes, Elevating Games 

At Xrossover Sports, we redefine the future of sports and wellness through cutting-edge technology and innovation. Our flagship products, the Xrossover Basketball Vest and XOver Trainer 24/7 On-Demand Training, leverage AI and cloud-based platforms to revolutionize basketball training.

 **What Sets Us Apart:**
- Xrossover Basketball Vest: The 'Wearable Coach' refining techniques and fostering muscle memory for swift skill enhancement.
- XOver Trainer 24/7: AI-driven, on-demand training providing real-time biomechanical analysis for unparalleled performance improvement.

 **Global Impact:**
Catering to individual players, coaches, teams, and parents, our solutions bridge the gap between personalized training and community engagement. Join us in reshaping the future of sports, one perfected practice at a time.

 **Timing and Opportunity:**
With basketball's surging popularity, technological advancements, and a commitment to global accessibility, Xrossover Sports stands at the forefront of innovation, bringing unparalleled training experiences to enthusiasts of all ages.

 **Mission:**
Empowering athletes, inspiring excellence, and setting new standards in sports and wellness. Xrossover Sports is where perfect practice makes perfect.

 **Join the Xrossover Movement!**
Explore our game-changing solutions and be part of a community dedicated to unlocking athletic potential. Let's redefine the rules and elevate the game together. #XrossoverSports #GameChangers

Name: ATOME
Description: Épicentre de l'escalade et de la dégustation en centre ville d'Annecy, au coeur des Galeries Lafayette.

Name: MSF Markelo
Description: MSF Markelo is een personal training studio gevestigd in Markelo, gespecialiseerd in het aanbieden van op maat gemaakte trainingsprogramma's. Bij MSF Markelo kunt u terecht voor diverse vormen van training.

Name: Honte Quest SRL
Description: Honte Quest SRL ofera lectii de initiere in Go pentru toate varstele.

Name: NANDCO Coaching
Description:
Depuis 2015, plus de 250 sportifs de tous niveaux m’ont accordé leur confiance pour les accompagner à se dépasser, à prendre soin de leur santé, à oser se lancer des défis. 

Ensemble, nous construisons des plans d’entrainements réalistes et adaptés à leur vie professionnelle et personnelle. 

Ecouter, planifier, féliciter, se questionner, réconforter, challenger, motiver, expliquer, ré-ajuster, recentrer… est mon rôle au quotidien, un rôle riche et humain que j’affectionne particulièrement.


Diplômée d'un BPJEPS APT, d'un DU en Préparation Physique et d'un DU en Préparation Physique spécifique au Trail Running, également professeure de Pilates, je vous propose un accompagnement complet.

Name: Rubicon Robotics
Description: Rubicon Robotics develops AI-enabled robots that film swimmers underwater from the side of the pool, combining precise physical videography with automated AI analysis to streamline film study. Rubicon’s integrated system delivers, within seconds, the level of feedback that would otherwise take coaches hours to compile – if even possible at all – making high-value insights accessible to any athlete and providing a powerful training tool for both D1 programs and everyday swimmers alike.

Name: AUG 90
Description:
AUG 90 provides post-match analysis to Augment Understanding of the Game.

Football (soccer) video footage is collected and coded using professional analysis software. Attacking and defending clips are organized with telestrations embedded and detailed coaching points to enhance game intelligence. Take-home video analysis presentations include match statistics and personalized objectives formed by self-evaluation and coaching perspectives. Interactive debriefs can be scheduled additionally to discuss the analysis and selected clips which support an individual development plan (IDP). 

Company founder, Justin Moose, is passionate about helping players improve performance and increase motivation. His professional playing career spanned over a decade, where he played under 9 managers in 4 different countries. Through this experience, he gained a unique and detailed understanding of various playing styles and systems. Additional knowledge of positional expectations, tactics and strategy has been obtained through earning a MSc in Football Coaching and Analysis. He has a track record of identifying and developing players to compete at Southampton FC, a world renowned academy. 

AUG 90 primarily works with individuals, but team and opposition analysis are available upon request. From youth amateurs to the elite professional level, AUG 90 aids player improvement through off-pitch learning and reflection.

Name: Tanzschule Danceorama
Description:
Wir sind die Tanzschule, die garantiert Schwung und Spass in dein Leben bringt. Egal wie alt du bist, egal welchen Tanzstil du lernen willst, egal ob du Anfänger, Wiedereinsteiger oder fast schon Profi bist. Unser Motto lautet: «Raus aus dem Alltag und hinein ins Vergnügen». Los, komm und tanz mit – wir freuen uns auf dich!

Du willst neuen Schwung und Spass in dein Leben bringen? Wir sagen: «Willkommen im Danceorama». Vergiss den Alltag und lass dich entführen in eine Welt, die tanzt, swingt und Menschen happy macht. «Man muss das Leben tanzen».

Welcher Tanzstil passt zu dir? Auf unserer Webseite findest du viele Paartänze und coole Tanzstile und Tanzrichtungen. Bei uns kannst du fast jede Art von Paartanz kennen lernen. Bei der Kursauswahl hast du die Qual der Wahl!

Wenn du Einsteiger*in bist, empfehlen wir dir einen Grundkurs 1 zu besuchen. Der Klassiker für den Anfang und der ideale Kurs für Einsteiger ohne Vorkenntnisse.

Name: Pro Tennis Academy
Description:
PRO Tennis Academy, established in July 2020, is a prominent force in the Middle East's sports training and facility management landscape. Founded by Syed Zohair Raza and Syed Abbas Raza, both passionate tennis enthusiasts,
the academy offers a diverse range of sports, including tennis, padel, football, and pickleball. With 15 strategically located facilities boasting +40 courts, we provide unparalleled access to state-of-the-art amenities.

Name: DROP Pickleball
Description:
Impulsamos a través de la formación el aprendizaje, la práctica y el desarrollo de habilidades de Pickleball en Bizkaia para niñas/os, jóvenes, adultos y personas mayores.

Nuestra misión es ayudar a cada persona a descubrir el pickleball y llegar a su mejor versión.

DROP no es solo el golpe más estratégico y más importante del Pickleball, también son nuestros valores: Diversidad, Respeto, Oportunidad y Pasión.

Name: Sportbedrijf Zwijndrecht B.V.
Description:
Wij bewegen Zwijndrecht. Letterlijk en figuurlijk.

Sportbedrijf Zwijndrecht zet zich dagelijks in voor een vitaal en actief Zwijndrecht. We stimuleren en ondersteunen inwoners om te sporten, te bewegen en te werken aan een gezonde leefstijl. Of je nu baantjes trekt in het zwembad, meedoet aan een sportactiviteit, of bij een vereniging betrokken bent — wij creëren de omstandigheden waarin iedereen zich welkom, veilig en gestimuleerd voelt om in beweging te komen.

Onze missie: iedere inwoner van Zwijndrecht in beweging brengen én houden.
We doen dit samen met scholen, verenigingen, zorg- en welzijnspartners en de gemeente. Daarbij zetten we in op laagdrempeligheid, duurzaamheid, gastvrijheid en sociale betrokkenheid.

Sport verbindt, versterkt en verrijkt — en daar dragen wij elke dag met trots aan bij.

Name: GKHQ Ltd
Description: GKHQ provide coaching and support to Goalkeepers of all ages and abilities; from grassroots junior keepers to world class professionals, in an elite goalkeeping environment.

Name: We Win Soccer
Description:
ORIOL ROMEU and EDU ALBACAR formed WE WIN SOCCER with the intention of helping young people to enjoy experiences related to the world of soccer both in Spain and anywhere in the world.
We organize soccer training camps so that the players can improve their skills. We have several training camps to adapt to your needs. They will be able to enjoy training with coaches of a level equivalent to UEFA A and UEFA PRO, participation in tournaments, friendly matches and much more.
We use a global methodology, with the aim of helping in the development of the 
different structures that make up the player: technical, tactical, social, physical and psychological.

Name: Instinkt Mx
Description:
Instinkt es una empresa emergente de turismo ecológico que ofrece recorridos guiados de senderismo por México. Llevamos a nuestros clientes a lugares mágicos y únicos. Siempre asegurándonos de tener un impacto positivo con las comunidades que cuidan nuestros recursos naturales. Cada caminata es un paso adelante en nuestro esfuerzo por fortalecer el tejido social de México.

Programas de team building y liderazgo.

Senderismo, Cañonismo y Alta Montaña.

Name: Locker Room Central
Description: At Locker Room Central, we are revolutionizing athlete management by providing coaches, trainers, and athletic programs with the tools they need to elevate performance and streamline operations. Our platform offers real-time insights and comprehensive data, enabling coaches to craft personalized training plans that help athletes reach their full potential. Whether you're managing a high school team or a competitive club, Locker Room Central enhances visibility, facilitates goal setting, and promotes injury prevention, ensuring your athletes train smarter and compete safer. With an easy-to-use interface and robust analytics, we empower teams to achieve excellence on and off the field. Unlock the future of athlete management with Locker Room Central.

Name: IMAJIM-Coach
Description:
L’accompagnement en coaching chez IMAJIM commence dès notre rencontre et s’arrête lorsque vous êtes arrivés à destination.

Votre rythme, notre méthode : nous vous emmenons
avec bonne humeur et rigueur jusqu’à la promesse que vous vous êtes fixée.

DREAM TEAM COACHING
Rejoindre la Dream Team Coaching c’est vous assurer de notre engagement à vos côtés, pour vous permettre de garder intacte votre belle motivation et atteindre vos objectifs !

Les valeurs de notre équipe et notre concept 3D vous permettront de garder votre Cap, toujours avec le sourire !

DREAM TEAM BUILDIND
Une entreprise comme une équipe, à l’instar de notre corps, se muscle, se surpasse, se coordonne, se renforce pour donner le meilleur d’elle-même.

En faisant appel au « team building » de IMAJIM, vous faites le pari d’une équipe plus forte, plus soudée, plus heureuse !

Name: Vision Football
Description:
At Vision, we pride ourselves on our approach to development, working to create positive habits not only in the player, but also in the person. Because being a good player is not enough.

Vision Football coaches over 700 players weekly, across our 6 partner clubs in the Northern Suburbs Football Association. Vision also competes in some of the biggest academy tournaments in the country, with our own, year-round dedicated Academy Squads.

Name: Pelican
Description:
Pelican is gespecialiseerd in unieke kampen, lessen en events op en rond het water.
- Pelican School: Leer windsurfen, zeilen, suppen en kitesurfen onder leiding van onze gediplomeerde monitoren.
- Pelican Camps: Beleef de coolste zomer van je leven tijdens onze unieke watersportkampen voor kinderen van 6 tot 16 jaar.
- Pelican Aquapark: Beleef de ultieme waterpret in onze opblaasbare waterspeeltuin.
- Pelican Events: Ontdek de leukste watergames tijdens onze events op maat voor groepen, scholen en bedrijven.

PELICAN EVENTS
Met Pelican Events creëren we een echte summervibe met een ongedwongen sfeer. We bieden volledig uitgewerkte formules aan met exclusieve watergames op maat van groepen, scholen en bedrijven. In een uitzonderlijke omgeving zal je begeleid worden door onze eigen professionals.

Name: CGS
Description: CGS Academies is dedicated to teaching character, leadership, and life skills through sports formation. We engage Rwandan youth (ages 5-15) to develop a love of sports through football and volleyball training. With 600 children currently enrolled, our goal is to expand to 1,000 participants by the end of the year, across multiple locations in Rwanda. We are a nine year old, professionally-driven organization that is overseen by Catalytik Group, an international company with multiple Rwandan investments.

Name: Vega Yüzme Kursu
Description:
Vega Yüzme Kursu, yüzme yeteceğinizde devrim yaratmak için eşsiz hizmet gayesiyle kurulmuştur. İstanbul’un kalbinde; Kadıköy ve Başakşehir bölgelerinde faaliyet gösteren Vega Yüzme Kursu, kısa sürede İstanbul sınırlarını da aşan öğrenci portföyüyle en bilinir yüzme kurslarından biri haline gelmiştir. Sağlıklı yüzme havuzlarına sahip olan özel tesisleri, 20 deneyimli antrenörü ile İstanbul’da yüzme garantili kurs veren tek yer olarak öne çıkmaktadır.

Dijitali en iyi kullanan spor merkezlerinden biri olmanın gururuyla Vega Yüzme Kursu'na dair bilgi verebilmek ve yüzmeye ilişkin en özel paylaşımları takipçilere ulaştırmak gayesiyle bu kanal kurulmuştur.

"Yüzme tutkunuzu hayata geçirin."

Detaylı bilgi ve tüm sorularınız için aşağıdaki iletişim kanallarını kullanarak 7/24 ulaşabilirsiniz.

Web: https://www.vegayuzmekursu.com
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vegayuzme/
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@VegaYuzmeKursu

Name: Xtreme Edges Hockey Ltd
Description: The UK's #1 Power Skating Organisation

Name: Not Forgotten Farm, LLC
Description:
Not Forgotten Farm is an equestrian facility located in Eastern Hanover County providing educational content and boarding services. We are convenient to Richmond City, Ashland, Mechanicsville, New Kent and Henrico County and only 15 minutes from I-95, 295, and 64. 

Not Forgotten Farm, LLC is owned by Jodie & William Kavanah. The farm name pays tribute to Will’s military ties, Jodie’s deceased parents who gave her the horse foundation, and the forgotten horses- typically, the OTTB or difficult horse. 

Our mission is to help you “get better with horses”. We leave our mission open to your own interpretation based on your goals individually and with your horse. Jodie has a diverse background with horses and held a corporate position for over 10 years. William balances the equation with his research and data driven mindset and joining the horse world later in life. Both Jodie and William have unique professional experiences that allow them to take unbiased opinions and recognize patterns which is important when speaking on different topics in the horse industry. Their combined experience allows them to speak not only to the training and care of horses, but also to the business, ethics, and everyday realities of the industry. Their goal: to share honest, useful insights to help others Get Better With Horses.

To learn more about us, please visit https://notforgotten.farm and follow us on Facebook, Instagram and TikTok.

Name: Indy Chess
Description: We incorporated in March 2023 as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit dedicated to growing chess in Indianapolis.  We have weekly chess nights, monthly tournaments, summer camps, classes/workshops, and more!

Name: WatchForward
Description:
Our Vision: What if the discipline of a champion athlete could be translated into code?

At WatchForward, we believe that the principles of elite performance—resilience, data-driven strategy, and unbreakable discipline—are universal. Our mission is to build an ecosystem of open-source, AI-powered tools that help ambitious individuals apply these principles to their own lives.

We're not just another app for tracking metrics. We build technology that understands the process of performance, the importance of recovery, and the power of a resilient mindset. Our approach is human-centric, transparent, and community-driven.

Founded by former Italian rowing champion and business developer Pierluigi De Rogatis, WatchForward is an early-stage venture building in public. We are on a journey to explore the intersection of human potential and artificial intelligence.

Follow our journey as we build the next generation of performance technology.

Name: ASD LA COMUNE
Description:
Siamo un’associazione nata nel 1987, con sede a Milano, che si occupa di attività sportive, una realtà che pone in modo chiaro l’attenzione sull’aspetto formativo ed educativo dello sport: non parliamo di fitness fine a se stesso, ma è la crescita della persona che ci sta a cuore.
Varcando la soglia delle nostre 2 sedi, troverete un clima positivo, propositivo e pieno di passione, una casa con dei nomi e non dei numeri. Nelle nostre sedi è possibile praticare molteplici attività di ginnastica, danza, arti marziali e discipline orientali, a partire dai 2 anni fino ad arrivare alla terza età.

Name: Dublin Sports
Description: Dublin Sports is a youth sports development company that hosts community-based sporting events around the Southern New Hampshire area. Our week-long, half-day camps are aimed at improving skills for young athletes and building community through sports. We want to bring people together. And our priority is to provide a safe and fun environment where young athletes of all experience levels can play sports, make friends, and have fun.

Name: My Cycling Coach
Description: Helping Founders, Directors & Professionals Who Cycle, Sustainably Lose 10kg While Increasing VO2max by 15-20% to Supercharge Health & Performance On & Off The Bike.

Name: Real Madrid Foundation EFP Dubai
Description: Real Madrid Foundation EFP Dubai brings the internationally recognized programs of the Real Madrid Foundation to the UAE through a partnership with ISD Dubai Sports City. Located at ISD Dubai Sports City, our programs welcome children and youth aged 4 to 17, offering opportunities to participate in football activities in a safe and engaging environment.

Name: Escola Mãozinha de Ouro
Description:
Missão: Oferecer espaço para construção de uma educação integral na primeira infância, valorizando o contato com a natureza, brincar livre e os princípios cristãos. Wir freuen uns dich in unserem Zentrum für Leistungsdiagnostik und Sportwissenschaft in Graz begrüßen zu dürfen. Unser Ziel ist es, dich durch innovative Behandlungen zu unterstützen und deine Leistungsziele zu verwirklichen. Dein Wohlbefinden steht für uns an erster Stelle, daher legen wir großen Wert auf individuelle Betreuung und persönliche Aufmerksamkeit.

Ein besonderes Highlight unseres Leistungsdiagnostikzentrums ist unser Hypoxie-Raum, der es ermöglicht, Höhentrainings ohne die Notwendigkeit von Bergen durchzuführen – und das bis zu einer Höhe von 5000 Metern über dem Meeresspiegel. Mit modernster Ausstattung wie Ergometern, Laufbändern und Rudergeräten bieten wir optimale Trainingsmöglichkeiten für deine Bedürfnisse.

Bist du neugierig geworden? Wir freuen uns darauf, gemeinsam mit dir deine Ziele zu erreichen und dich auf deinem Weg zu unterstützen!

Description:
Waterford Sports Partnership (WSP) was established in 2002 by Sport Ireland (formerly the Irish Sports Council) as part of the Local Sports Partnership initiative with the aim of increasing participation in sport and physical activity in County Waterford.

OUR MISSION is that, together, we make Waterford a place that has a positive culture of people playing sport and being active. We want people to enjoy participating and the many benefits it brings to their health, happiness and our community.

What we do….

- We listen to and for the needs of participants, current and potential, and with our partners, provide and promote a wide range of sport and physical activity opportunities and supports,
- We support our partners, the providers of opportunities (sports clubs, schools, communities and commercial operators), so that they can develop and increase their capacity to deliver sustainable participation opportunities,
- We consider the places where sport and physical activity, organised or casual, happen and increase awareness, accessibility and inclusion,
- We work with local and national agencies, networks and funders to increase mutual understanding and target resources and effort to maximise impact,
- We promote a positive culture of enjoyable sport and physical activity experiences.

Who we work with….

- We focus our efforts on increasing the participation of those with low participation rates from a number of target groups….

Young people and youth at risk | People with a Disability | Women and teenage girls | Men | Older Adults | Disadvantaged people | Ethnic Minority groups

while also supporting those who promote participation in sport and physical activity…..

Volunteers | Sports coaches and instructors | Club officials and administrators
Physical activity leaders | Community leaders | Teachers | Health workers
in many different places…

Sports Clubs | Schools | Communities | Commercial and public facilities | The natural environment

Name: LB Keeprs
Description:
Bij LB Keeprs draait alles om het ontwikkelen van complete, zelfverzekerde en aanvallende keepers. Elke training start met een uitgebreide warming-up, gevolgd door een gerichte keeperstraining waarin we focussen op de technische en tactische aspecten van het keepersvak. 
Denk hierbij aan het trainen van wedstrijdsituaties zoals het verwerken van voorzetten, één-tegen-een-duels en het inschatten wanneer je als keeper uit je doel moet komen of juist moet blijven staan.

Bij LB Keeprs geloven we in een proactieve speelstijl. We trainen keepers om aanvallend te keepen, oftewel: niet passief op de doellijn blijven staan, maar anticiperen op situaties en zelfverzekerd eigen keuzes maken. Fouten maken is daarbij een onderdeel van het leerproces. Door situaties te herkennen en hierop in te spelen, ontwikkel je jezelf tot een moderne, allround keeper. 

Na 15 tot 25 trainingen voeren wij een uitgebreide trainingsanalyse uit. Hierin kijken we samen naar jouw voortgang: waar ben je sterker in geworden en welke punten verdienen nog extra aandacht? Deze inzichten gebruiken we om jouw ontwikkeling verder te stimuleren. 

Omdat een training nooit hetzelfde is als een wedstrijd, komen wij graag kijken bij jouw wedstrijden. Tijdens deze wedstrijdanalyse beoordelen wij hoe je de geleerde technieken in de praktijk brengt. Samen met je coach, ouder(s)/verzorger(s) en jouzelf bespreken we de wedstrijdmomenten, zodat jij nóg beter voorbereid bent op toekomstige uitdagingen in het doel.

Ben je enthousiast geworden? Neem dan gerust een kijkje op onze website voor meer informatie over onze trainingen en werkwijze. Heb je vragen of wil je je aanmelden? Stuur ons gerust een e-mail, we denken graag met je mee!

Website: www.lbkeeprs.nl 
E-mail: info@keeprs.nl

Met de trainingen van LB Keeprs til jij jouw keeperskwaliteiten naar een hoger niveau!

Name: World Pool Association (WPA)
Description:
The World Pool Association (WPA) is the international governing body for the sport of pool, which includes various cue sports such as 8-ball, 9-ball, 10-ball, straight pool, and others. The WPA was established in 1987 and is responsible for organizing and promoting the sport of pool on a global scale.

The WPA sets rules and standards for cue sports competitions, conducts world championships, maintains rankings of players, and promotes the development of the sport in different countries. The organization collaborates with national pool associations around the world to coordinate and regulate pool events, establish uniform rules, and promote fair play.

The WPA is also involved in promoting gender equality in cue sports, with efforts to support and develop women's pool competitions and increase opportunities for female players at the professional level. Additionally, the WPA works to foster youth development in cue sports through initiatives such as junior championships and training programs.

The WPA is recognized by the International Olympic Committee (IOC) and is actively working towards inclusion of cue sports in the Olympic Games. The organization aims to advance the sport of pool and provide opportunities for players of all levels to compete at the highest level on the international stage.

Name: Skudin Surf
Description:
Skudin Surf brings the sport of surfing to people of all ages and abilities in a fun, positive and safe environment. Partnered with Hurley and Yeti, the company offers a range of private instruction, group lessons, camps, corporate events, and birthday parties for adults and children in the seaside towns of Long Beach, Lido-Nickerson Beach, and Rockaway Beach (67th Street). Thousands of surfers travel to us every summer from the tri-state area and across the country to participate.
The Skudin family has been teaching surfing for over 30 years. Parents Dave and Beth Skudin surfed together as children in the 60’s with Beth’s dad Dick Bolton. They continued Beth’s fathers tradition and shared their love of the sport with their four boys. The family comes from a heritage of lifeguards, swimmers, and surfing champions. Dave and Beth raised their children in some of the most famous surf spots in the country, and have lived in Hawaii, the Outer Banks of North Carolina, and Long Beach, New York.
Today, two of the Skudin sons – Cliff and Will – continue their families’ tradition of teaching others the joy of surfing.

Description:
We specialize in small group and individual training because it enhances the quality of training by allowing for more personalized attention and instruction. 

In a smaller setting, we can focus on each player's specific needs, ensuring they receive specialized feedback and guidance. 

Individual and small group training also maximizes the number of repetitions each player can complete within an hour, promoting skill development. 

This fosters a more intense and engaging training environment, leading to quicker improvement and greater overall effectiveness in player performance.

Name: Fondation MMA
Description:
Bienvenue chez Fondation, votre salle d'arts martiaux mixtes grand public, un véritable lieu de vie pour les passionnés d'arts martiaux de tous niveaux ! Nous offrons des horaires d'ouverture étendus pour s'adapter à votre emploi du temps chargé, ainsi qu'un espace de restauration pour recharger vos batteries après l'entraînement.

Notre salle est bien plus qu'un simple endroit pour pratiquer : c'est un lieu de rencontre et d'échange où vous pouvez vous connecter avec d'autres membres de la communauté. Que vous soyez débutant ou expert, nous avons des cours adaptés à chacun, animés par des instructeurs qualifiés.

Rejoignez nous pour découvrir une nouvelle façon de vivre les arts martiaux mixtes, où l'apprentissage, la convivialité et la restauration se rencontrent pour créer une expérience inoubliable.

Name: Oakville Swim Academy
Description:
Oakville Swim Academy has remained the premiere swimming instructional facility in Southern Ontario for the past 15 years.
With an unwavering emphasis on technical success, we approach swimming lessons biomechanically, ensuring that swimmers of all ages and skill-sets get from Point A to Point B safer, quicker, and more efficiently. 

Our commitment to providing excellent aquatic programs for children, teenagers and adults is at the forefront of our work. We strive to enhance healthy lifestyles and the well-being of our community in a safe, and welcoming environment.

Name: The Swing Station
Description: Located in the heart of the Salt Lake Valley in West Jordan, Utah, THE SWING STATION is a brand new 23000 square foot facility boasting 35' high batting cages.  6 - 50' x 15' cages and 9 70' x 15' cages and most can be rolled back to open up large infield areas.  Individual Memberships as low as $50 per month, Team Memberships as low as $500 per month, and the public is also welcome to rent cage time with no membership necessary.   18000 square feet of turf, amazing brand new building.   Pocket Radar, Rhapsodo, Bata pitching machines, mounds, 9-squares, brand new real leather baseballs and softball (no need to bring your own) and on and on!   *Gym coming soon, Pitching padded throw wall coming soon*

Name: SMAC Africa
Description:
SMAC Football Academy
SMAC is a Football Academy dedicated to bringing out the utmost potential to the youth around the country with the help of our coaches through sports. Discipline and consistency are the main purposes to create identity and motivation to become the best players in the world. 

SMAC Sports Centre
At SMAC Sports Center, we believe in the power of sports and fitness to transform lives. Our state-of-the-art indoor facility is designed to cater to individuals of all ages and skill levels, providing a dynamic and inclusive space for the community to come together, stay active, and pursue their athletic goals.

Name: ONS Leefstijl & Trainingscentrum

Name: Swizzy Golf
Description:
Formerly Golf Pro Inc., Swizzy Golf is the first company to power live, remote golf lessons with on-screen annotations and enhanced swing analysis features. It's pretty simple - think Zoom or FaceTime…but you can draw on the screen, pull up content from a video/photo library (in real time), and more.

Our technology was born from the dream to make golf more welcoming than ever - giving everyone in (or aspiring to join) the golf community instant access to high quality lessons regardless of skill level, location, or financial status.

Name: Mind2Run
Description: Het plezier i.p.v. de prestatie staat bij Mind2Run centraal. Vanuit deze visie stimuleert en motiveert Mind2Run mensen om in beweging te komen en om hun leefstijl te veranderen. De fysieke en mentale vitaliteit die hierdoor ontstaat, is de opmaat naar een fitter en gezonder leven.

Name: Foundation Fighting4Power
Description:
“Ontdek je kracht met Fighting4Power”

In de Fighting4Power-classes worden meiden en vrouwen in een veilige omgeving getraind met oefeningen gebaseerd op Thaiboksen. 
Al na korte tijd merk je de effecten zoals o.a.;   
Het versterken van doorzettings-en concentratievermogen
Het vergroten van zelfvertrouwen en discipline
Het ervaren van het veilig voelen bij jezelf
Het opbouwen van fysieke en mentale kracht
Het opbouwen van weerbaarheid en conditie
Het vinden en vasthouden van motivatie
Het durven opkomen voor jezelf
Het verbeteren van lichaamscoördinatie en balans
 

De Fighting4Power-lessen zijn laagdrempelig en voor alle meiden &: vrouwen toegankelijk; er is geen bepaalde ervaring nodig om mee te kunnen doen aan de trainingen.

De trainingen zijn ook uiterst geschikt voor meiden en vrouwen met een vorm van emotionele schade en psychische klachten, die daardoor hun gevoel van kracht en eigenwaarde zijn kwijtgeraakt. Het laten voelen van kracht en zelfwaardering in het heden helpt het verleden te verwerken en preventief toekomstige problemen, of de herhaling hiervan, te voorkomen.

Name: Indoor Beach Alkmaar
Description:
Indoor Beach Alkmaar is gevestigd in een gaaf industrieel pand. Er is ruim 125 kuub zand gestort om 3 beachvelden aan te leggen.

Beachsporten zijn de laatste jaren steeds populairder aan het worden. En wat is er nu leuker dan met je voeten in het zachte zand een partijtje beachvolleybal, tennis of voetvolleybal te spelen? En dat het hele jaar door ongeacht het weer buiten.

Naast de beachsporten is dit dé plek voor bedrijfsuitjes, teambuildingsactiviteiten en particuliere gezelschappen, bijvoorbeeld met onze eigen Expeditie Robinson. Na deze activiteit kun je lekker borrelen bij onze beachbar.

Er is zoveel mogelijk op het zand, dus het aanbod van activiteiten zal alleen maar groeien.

Heb je zelf een leuk idee? Neem contact met ons op.

Name: Chogogo Kiteschool
Description:
Chogogo Kiteschool, the only floating kiteschool in Bonaire, is run by a team of enthusiastic people. It is a small team with a big heart. We believe personal relationships and dedicated attention is what will make your kite surfing experience different from any other. We believe the best way to learn is by one-on-one lessons tailored to your needs to learn at your own pace.

We are located in the Bay of Kralendijk accompanied by the beautiful sight of Klein Bonaire. Our unique kite surfing location is centrally located, quiet and spacious. But starting from our Trimaran means we can also go to unique places, organise trips and have fun on the waters of Bonaire. Ideal for both beginners and the more advanced kite surfers. 

Fly High, Be Safe and Have Fun!

Som una assessoria esportiva especialitzada en salut i rendiment, oferint planificacions esportives, assessorament nutricional, psicologia esportiva i rehabilitació sempre personalitzant i adaptant-nos a les necessitats dels clients.

Treballem amb un enfocament integral, combinant ciència, experiència i personalització per garantir que cada client trobi el seu camí cap a una millor salut. Ja sigui per millorar el teu rendiment esportiu, adoptar hàbits saludables o recuperar-te d’una lesió, t’acompanyem en cada pas del procés.

 Servei disponible a Vic i Osona.

Serveis:
- Entrenaments i planificacions personalitzades.
- Anàlisi antropomètric i valoració corporal.

Name: Whakatū Girls Rugby Trust
Cape to Cape MTB
Description:
Cape to Cape is Australia's largest and most popular mountain bike stage race. Based in Margaret River Western Australia, this iconic riding experience includes access to stunning private trails, vineyard visits, brewery finishes and some of the warmest hospitality the region has to offer.

Starting at Cape Leeuwin lighthouse and finishing four days later up at Cape Naturaliste, the course makes its way through a network of trails along the coast, through National Parks, forest, farm lands, mountain bike parks, and bush before heading up to the northern cape of the South West WA region.

Roughly 200km and 2,500m of climbing in total, each day’s riding is between 34km and 59km and has its own special terrain and environment to keep things interesting with a mix of fast flowing single trail, farm tracks, groomed downhill trails and fire trails – many through private land that can only be ridden while racing the Cape to Cape.

There's nothing too technical and it's ridable for anyone with a reasonable level of fitness and MTB skills.

Name: Yacht Company
Description:
Firma Yacht Company od 2017 roku specjalizuje się w consulitingu i organizacji eventów w przemyśle jachtowym, swoim profilem działalności obejmujemy także kompleksową pielęgnację jachtów żaglowych i motorowych. Od kilku lat zdobywamy doświadczenie w przygotowywaniu jednostek do regat, celów rekreacyjnych oraz na potrzeby imprez firmowych. 

 W każdym z powyższych przypadków ważny jest wygląd łodzi. Profesjonalne przygotowanie jednostki do sezonu, utrzymanie nieskazitelnego wyglądu oraz jesienna konserwacja są niezbędnymi elementami do uzyskania pełnej satysfakcji z bezpiecznej żeglugi. Do każdego z elementów wyposażenia starannie dobieramy środki, tak aby uzyskać jak najlepszy efekt.

 Wszystkie nasze przedsięwzięcia opieramy na dokładnym poznaniu i analizie potrzeb danego klienta, realizując powierzone zadania zgodnie z wcześniej przyjętymi założeniami. Za nadrzędny cel stawiamy sobie:
 zapewnienie najwyższej jakości, 
 utrzymanie efektywności finansowej,
 zapewnienie efektów zgodnych z wizją naszych klientów.
Dzięki temu oszczędzają oni czas i pieniądze, jednocześnie zyskując spokój i satysfakcję z realizowanych projektów.   

 Działamy zgodnie z myślą „Sailing is Our Passion”, dlatego nasz zespół tworzą profesjonaliści i pasjonaci o wszechstronnej wiedzy na temat rynku jachtowego. Jesteśmy otwarci na zagraniczne podróże służbowe niezbędne do zapewnienia najwyższych standardów. Jednocześnie dbamy o dyskrecję, zapewniając naszym klientom poufność w zakresie realizacji danego projektu.

 Jeśli podobnie jak dla nas, również dla Państwa żeglarstwo jest pasją, zachęcamy do pozostania z nami w kontakcie i powierzenie nam Państwa pomysłów i projektów, które z ogromną przyjemnością zrealizujemy tak, by spełniły lub przewyższyły Państwa oczekiwania.

Traditional coaching methods rely on subjective observation, leading to inconsistent feedback and slower skill development. Advanced Impactor eliminates this gap by providing AI-driven insights into batting, bowling, and fielding techniques, allowing for precise performance analysis. Our platform combines AI-adaptive training, remote coaching, and gamification to create an engaging and structured learning experience.

For players, this means personalized, data-backed coaching at their fingertips. Coaches can track player progress, assign drills, and review performance in real-time. Parents gain access to clear insights into their child’s growth, while scouts and academies can make informed talent assessments using AI-generated analytics.

We are building AI to revolutionize how players train, how coaches teach, and how talent is discovered.

Name: DC Dynamics
Description:
Since 2008, DC Dynamics has been revolutionizing the basketball scene in Dansoman and beyond. What started as a pay-to-play basketball program has evolved into a dynamic organization dedicated to developing both skills and character among young people.

In response to the challenge of older players struggling to pay dues, we initiated a groundbreaking coaches training program. This not only empowered our players but also enabled us to expand our reach into school leagues, community leagues, and recreational corporate leagues.

Proudly, we've achieved significant milestones in 2022 and 2023:
- Trained over 30 young coaches
- Employed (part-time) four coaches and 17 referees (including 6 females)
- Engaged approximately 700 young people across various age groups

Our mission goes beyond basketball; it's about creating opportunities for Ghanaian youth and contributing to the socio-economic growth of our nation. Now more than ever, the need for our work is evident, and the impact we can make is profound. With dedication and commitment, we're determined to create a brighter future for the youth of Ghana.

Name: High Five Martial Arts
Description:
Sport en bewegen hebben veel positieve effecten op de leerlingen én op de sfeer op school. Kinderen die op school sporten, blijken zich beter te kunnen concentreren op de lesstof. Maar bewegen doet meer: het vergroot hun zelfvertrouwen, veerkracht en doorzettingsvermogen. Eigenschappen die op alle vlakken in hun (verdere) leven van grote meerwaarde zijn.

High Five Martial Arts biedt sportlessen die niet alleen zorgen voor een betere fysieke conditie, maar die de leerling ook mentaal en emotioneel ‘steviger’ maken. Onze lessen worden gegeven op basis van Tang Soo Do. Deze oosterse verdedigingskunst is niet agressief en gebaseerd op de waarden respect, discipline en stijl.

We hebben onlangs de werkzaamheden voor onze particuliere school uitgebreid met een aanbod voor scholen in de gemeente Leeuwarden. We zijn inmiddels op diverse scholen aan het werk en de reacties zijn zeer positief. Niet alleen de leerlingen zijn enthousiast, maar ook de ouders en de leraren zien de meerwaarde voor de leerlingen en de school.

Name: Girls Rule the Court
Description:
Girls Rule the Court (GRTC) is a program curated by USTA Mid-Atlantic Foundation to promote health, wellness, and teamwork while building self-esteem through tennis for young girls. The program teaches the basics of tennis to girls in a fun and rewarding environment led by female tennis coaches and mentors. 

As a nonprofit organization, USTA Mid-Atlantic Foundation envisions Girls Rule the Court as a way to help close the gap on physical and wellness opportunities offered for young girls, increase sport participation among girls, and promote multigenerational connection and mentorship through positive female coaches and role models. Reaching young girls in under-resourced communities with Girls Rule the Court is a critical component of the program.

Name: Envision Golf
Description:
Envision Golf is establishing the first-in-Portland 10-bay indoor golf center at Bridgeport Retail Center to participate in a new and fast-growing market for indoor golf simulator entertainment. We will enable serious and new golfers to play real golf indoors, hitting golf balls at an immersive 3D golf course as cutting-edge tech tracks spin, club speed, impact, distance, and direction. and provides visuals as if you were on a course. Players drive, pitch and putt on some of the world’s best courses.  We will set up the venue as a fun, casual but vibey place to play golf, eat good food, and drink with friends. We are looking to be the finest destination for year-round golf, lessons, and parties in the Portland area.
•	10 GolfZon Premier simulator bays, rated by Golf Digest as the best in the world over the past five years allow users to play on over 200 courses, or choose among several golf-skills building games individually or as groups of up to 6 people per bay.
•	Seasonal indoor golf leagues let players compete over a series of weeks as individuals or teams up to 3 people for exciting prizes. 
•	Delicious quick-prep foods kitchen serving specialty sausages, sandwiches, salads, and other tasty treats to enjoy as you play. There will also be a full bar and café style sitting area to enjoy the environment.
•	Two private luxury VIP golf bays can each accommodate up to 15 people or can be collectively cordoned off to host and cater events up to 60 people for corporate and private parties. Our entire facility can also be reserved well in advance.
•	A resident golf pro is on hand to offer lessons and clinics to good and aspiring players whether they are youth or old, men or women. 
•	Envision Golf Pro Shop has new and gently used golf clubs for sale, rental clubs and demo equipment, and supplies you can use at our facility and everywhere. Also schedule customized club fittings and testing at our facility.

Description:
Somos la escuela decana de todas las escuelas de Andalucía.
Fundada en 1997 como Escuela Náutica de Recreo.

Homologados por la Junta de Andalucía (Instituto Andaluz del Deporte- IAD).

Academia Náutica de Recreo (ANR-MA-1). Impartimos la formación destinada a superar las pruebas teóricas de todos los títulos, licencias y certificados náuticos de recreo: Patrón de Navegación Básica-PNB, Patrón de Embarcaciones de Recreo-PER, Patrón de Yate-PY y Capitán de Yate-CY.

Escuela Náutica de Recreo ENR-PMV-MA-2.
Homologada para certificar las prácticas de Seguridad y Navegación. Las prácticas de radio operador de corto alcance (ROCA), y radio operador de largo alcance (ROLA).

Ambas prácticas (Seguridad y Navegación y Radio), son obligatorias para la obtención de los actuales Títulos Náuticos de Recreo de PNB,PER,PY y CY.

Igualmente, estamos homologados para certificar las prácticas complementarias de vela y las pràcticas complementarias de "ampliación PER" (nuevas atribuciones hasta 24 metros de eslora y navegación entre la Península y Baleares).

También estamos homologados para expedir la Licencia de Navegación, para el gobierno de embarcaciones de hasta 6 metros, y sin límite en la potencia de los motores.

Nuestro profesorado, con amplísima experiencia en la formación y en la navegación en embarcaciones de recreo y deportivas, tiene Titulación Profesional de Marina Mercante. La máxima titulación de recreo y certificado de especialidad profesional de recreo.

Members enjoy access to cutting-edge TrackMan technology, premium surroundings and a club culture built on quality, hospitality and passion for the game.

PRIME is more than a place to train – it’s a place to connect, learn and experience golf in a new way.

As part of our concept, we are developing the PRIME Performance Lab – a dedicated area within the club focused on exploring golf technology, biomechanics and performance.
Here, real playing experiences meet precise data analysis – helping players better understand movement, efficiency and technique.

Our mission: to make golf measurable, inspiring and social.

Your Space. Your People. Your Club.

Name: King Performance Ideology
Description:
Our history involves several years of experience in world-leading academic research and professional sport environments. Therefore, our current practice involves making informed decisions on training application with a unique blend of evidence-based and cutting edge science, shaped by real world applied experience from high-achieving environments.


Our vision is to be leading providers to elite and aspiring athletes and organisations in the U.K. Our roots lie in football and the North West of the U.K., yet our interest is to widen our services to a multitude of sports and levels of play. We strive to work with like minded individuals and organisations, no matter their situation. Therefore, our all-inclusive structure means there are no boundaries to you, the client.

Our philosophy is built on two key foci - individual care and long-term support. With the notion that "nobody is made the same" we pride ourselves on the extreme detail within our individualised approach. Furthermore, with the ever-changing environments of professional sport, we believe that stable support is required for long-term success. Our intimate approach provides great advantages over the generalised model that is held in most organisations. With time constraint barriers, suboptimal athlete to staff ratios, fatigued and conflicting philosophies and cultures, the requirement for a new level of service is necessary.

Description:
De Kinderyogaschool
Samen met Moniek Beelen zijn wij de oprichtsters van De Kinderyogaschool.
Een naam met een breed te dragen missie om elk kind in aanraking te laten komen met ontspanning.
Wanneer jij kalmte ervaart, kun je luisteren naar de signalen van je lichaam.
Wanneer jij kalmte ervaart, kun jij jezelf geven waar je behoefte op dat moment ligt.
Wanneer jij kalmte ervaart, gaat inspiratie en fantasie stromen.
Wanneer jij kalmte ervaart, groei jij naar een zelfbewuste jij!

Middels online aanbod, fysieke lessen op meerdere locaties bieden wij diverse yogavormen aan voor kinderen. Peuteryoga, kinderyoga, tieneryoga, wobbelyoga en ouder-kind yogalessen.

Onze missie uitdragen kunnen wij niet alleen.
Daarom spreken we jou aan! Professional die werkt met het kind.
Hoe tof is het wanneer jij kinderyoga kan aanbieden aan de kinderen op jouw werk.
En ook andere kinderyogadocenten. Zonder jullie geen landelijke dekking van De Kinderyogaschool. Wij staan voor het kunnen waarborgen van de kwaliteit van lessen zodat het niet zomaar een leuke les is dat je aanbiedt maar dat je er staat, met kennis en kunde. Verdieping, achtergrond en overstijgend vakinhoudelijke training is wat wij opzetten.

Opdat het kind van vandaag, opgroeit tot de bewuste krachtige persoon die je nu al bent!

Name: Soccer School
Description:

Soccer School curriculum instills important values and life lessons, fostering personal growth. Coaches serve as mentors; teaching resilience, self-confidence, fair play, and teamwork. This approach develops competent athletes alongside well-rounded individuals. 

Soccer School ensures that children not only learn on the pitch but also benefit from their experiences of it. Soccer School places a strong emphasis on our wellness program in which the children learn about the importance of proper nutrition, healthy daily practices, and mental health.

Soccer School has developed an inclusion program in collaboration with leading health network institutions in each region it serves. This program aims to provide a supportive environment for children and those children with special needs, enabling them to participate in and enjoy the sport. By embracing inclusion, Soccer School promotes diversity, empathy, and understanding, further enhancing its curriculum's impact on the development of young athletes.

Founded by a dynamic team of tech enthusiasts and sports lovers, our goal is to empower athletes, coaches, and sports organizations with technology that enhances performance, optimizes management, and strengthens community engagement. 
Our Vision 
We envision a thriving sports ecosystem in India, where every athlete has the resources and support they need to succeed. By harnessing the power of advanced technology, we aim to break down barriers and make sports more accessible and enjoyable for everyone. Our mission is to foster a culture of data-driven coaching, increase medal counts at all competition levels, and help position India as a global sports powerhouse. 
Our Solutions 
Our SaaS solutions are designed specifically to address the unique challenges of the Indian sports ecosystem. Whether it’s performance analytics, training management, fan engagement, or event organization, our solutions offer comprehensive support for all stakeholders, including: 
Athletes: Access valuable insights into performance metrics, training routines, and injury prevention strategies.

Sports Organizations: Streamline event management, fan engagement, and day-to-day operations with ease.

Name: Guru Dive
Description:
Hedefimiz, yeni dostluklar, yeni arkadaşlıklar ve yeni buddyler yetiştirmek üzere kurulmuş, sualtı severlerden oluşan bir dalış Eğitim Merkezidir.
İŞİMİZ DALGIÇ YETİŞTİRMEK.

ÖNCELİKLE SAĞLIKLI, SAYGILI, DİSİPLİNLİ, BİLGİLİ, TAKIM OYUNCUSU ve HATALARINDAN DERS ÇIKARAN, yeni nesil dalgıçlar yetiştirmeyi amaçlıyoruz. Bu başlıklar altında her yaş grubuna özel dalış eğitimi programlar düzenliyoruz.

Kurucumuz Özgür ÖZBEK, sualtı ve denizlerimizle ilgili, gelecek nesiller için bir şeyler bırakabilmek peşinde olduğundan, bu isteğine 2014 yılında GURU DIVE kuruluşuyla yola çıkmıştır. Bünyesinde birçok Guru eğitmen ve Asistan barındıran dalış merkezimiz bu yönüylede Türkiye deki sayılı dalış okulların birisidir. 30 Yıla varan dalış tecrübelerini aktarmak isteyen eğitmenlerden oluşur.

Geleceğimiz olan yeni nesiller, çocukluğundan beri hep istemiş ama doğru bir başlangıç noktası bulamayanlar, korkularıyla yüzleşmekten kaçanlar, elinden tutan olmadığı için doğuştan BALIKADAM olup da profesyonel olamayanlar, işte hepimiz için muhteşem bir fırsat; ister birebir ister grup olarak eğitim alabilirsiniz. 

GURU DIVE HERKESİ SU ALTINI KEŞFETMEYE GÖTÜRÜYOR.

Name: Denver Tennis Park
Description:
The Denver Tennis Park is a nonprofit, non-membership organization committed to:
- Advancing youth development through tennis
- Creating equitable access to tennis in communities of color and across all socio-economic groups
- Establishing partnerships to support youth and communities reach their potential
- Ensuring positive tennis experiences for all who learn, practice, and play tennis

The Denver Tennis Park was formed in 2018 and is based out of our indoor/outdoor tennis facility located adjacent to Denver Public School's All City Stadium. The DTP offers youth programing that uses tennis to support life skill development. We provide programming at our facility as well as in communities, including local schools, public courts, and with partner organizations also committed to youth development.

Through our partnerships with Denver Public Schools and the University of Denver Division I tennis teams, the DTP reaches youth and community members from throughout the metro area. 

Additionally, the DTP offers adult and youth programming, standing court times, court rentals. Visit our website to learn more.

Name: TurfTalk
Description:
Founded in December 2023, TurfTalk is a premier online community that unites football enthusiasts who play on turfs. Our platform caters to both casual players and passionate amateurs, providing a space where football lovers can connect, share experiences, and grow together. With a commitment to fostering a vibrant football culture, TurfTalk bridges the gap between players of all levels, creating an inclusive and supportive environment for everyone.

TurfTalk is dedicated to promoting local talent through a variety of exciting initiatives. One of our flagship programs, Project Amateurs, aims to identify and nurture emerging football talent in the community. Additionally, we organize the prestigious Legacy Cup tournament, which has quickly become a highlight for amateur footballers. By offering structured competitions and professional exposure, TurfTalk helps players develop their skills and gain recognition in the football world.

Beyond major tournaments, TurfTalk also actively supports underground futsal events, providing more opportunities for players to showcase their abilities. Our platform keeps members informed about the latest activities, events, and comprehensive turf information in Dhaka. Through TurfTalk, football enthusiasts can stay connected, informed, and engaged with the vibrant football scene, making the most of every opportunity to play and excel.

Name: Epic Treks
Description:
Vodimo vas na transforamtivna treking putovanja !

Epic Treks je butik agencija za avanturistička putovanja, specijalizirana za iskustvene treking ture u Himalaje i druge veličanstvene krajeve svijeta!

Naše ture vode iskusni vodiči, inspirirani lokalnim znanjima i tradicijama, a namijenjene su putnicima koji traže više od običnog odmora.

Svako putovanje pažljivo je osmišljeno da bude poziv na ponovno povezivanje s prirodom, unutarnju ravnotežu i upoznavanje lokalnih kultura.

Bilo da tragate za izlascima sunca na vrhovima, koracima kroz drevne hodočasničke staze ili jednostavno tišinom ispod zvjezdanog neba, naša je misija pomoći vam da putujete prema van, ali i prema unutra.

Dobrodošli u Epic Treks, gdje počinju epske avanture !

Trainingen op de motor, verzorgt door Erik Eggens, 6-voudig Nederlands kampioen en voormalig 3e van de wereld. Op geheel eigen wijze geeft Erik vorm aan de trainingen. Wij bieden diverse trainingsvormen aan: privétraining, Small Group Training of trainingsdagen.

BY EGGENS | Sport

BY EGGENS | Voeding

BY EGGENS | Merchandise
Een collectie bestaande uit hoodies voor kinderen en volwassenen: voor zowel jongens, meisjes, heren als dames.

Name: Club 030
Description:
Club030 is dé kickboksschool in Kanaleneiland waar jongeren begeleid worden in hun persoonlijke en professionele ontwikkeling. Opgericht door Abdelouahid Osrout, Walid Beqqali, en Nabil Balikane, drie gepassioneerde en ervaren coaches met een diepe voorliefde voor kickboksen, werken wij met veel passie aan het versterken van zowel de fysieke als mentale kracht van jongeren.

Wat wij bieden:
 Kickbokstrainingen en Talentontwikkeling – Wij begeleiden jongeren niet alleen in de sport, maar helpen hen ook om zelfdiscipline, doorzettingsvermogen en zelfvertrouwen te ontwikkelen.
 Wedstrijden en Competitie – Jongeren krijgen de kans om zich te meten in wedstrijden, waarbij we hen zowel mentaal als fysiek voorbereiden op topniveau.
 Kickboks Lessen – Wij bieden lessen in krachttraining en fysieke vitaliteit, essentieel voor een gezonde levensstijl en prestaties op en buiten de mat.
 Maatschappelijke Betrokkenheid – Wij zetten ons in voor de lokale gemeenschap en begeleiden jongeren die extra steun nodig hebben, zodat zij hun potentieel volledig kunnen benutten.
 Bedrijfstrainingen en Sprekers – Bij Club030 kun je ook terecht voor inspirerende sprekers en teamuitjes. Samen met je bedrijf werken we aan teambuilding en motivatie door middel van kickboksen en andere sportieve uitdagingen.

Onze missie is om jongeren te empoweren en te ondersteunen op hun weg naar succes, zowel op persoonlijk als professioneel vlak. We combineren onze passie voor kickboksen met maatschappelijke betrokkenheid en creëren zo een veilige en stimulerende omgeving waar iedereen het beste uit zichzelf kan halen.

Description:

At The Scouts Corner, we combine football intelligence with professional insight to support players, coaches and teams at all levels of the game. Our core mission is to identify, analyse, and help unlock potential through expertly prepared scouting reports and performance analysis.

Whether you’re a player seeking honest feedback, a coach wanting to understand your team better, or a parent looking to support your child’s football journey — we provide the detailed insights that make a difference.

What We Do
We specialise in preparing high-quality scouting reports focused on individual player analysis and team performance analysis. Every report is designed to break down the game in a way that’s easy to understand, but rich in insight.

L'esperienza e la pratica della guida professionale finalmente a tua disposizione!

Name: Sweetspot Training
Description:
Triathlon ist unser Leben, Sweetspot das Programm!

Doch was bedeutet eigentlich „Sweetspot“? Für uns ist es der Bereich der Perfektion, die Optimale Balance zwischen Belastung und Entlastung, die Basis für optimale, ganzheitliche und langfristige Entwicklung.

Mit zusammen mehr als 40 Jahren Triathlonerfahrung haben Geri, Mario und Christophe diese Erfahrungen miteinander verschmolzen und arbeiten nun als SWEETSPOT Team zusammen, um dich bestmöglich zu trainieren! Wir lieben es die Entwicklung von Athleten zu begleiten und wollen deinen Traum mit dir gemeinsam erfüllen, egal ob Sporteinsteiger oder Ironman-Bestzeit. Planung ist das Eine, Betreuung das Andere.

Wir arbeiten gemeinsam an deinen Zielen, mit dir – in engem Kontakt und Austausch. Keine Limitierung der Kommunikation. In ständigem Austausch via Whatsapp. Du kannst uns jeden Tag erreichen, denn jeder Traum besteht aus vielen Zwischenzielen und den dazugehörigen Herausforderungen.

Willst du uns etwas genauer kennenlernen? Dann hör doch mal in unseren Podcast, indem wir in zahlreichen Folgen über alle Facetten unseres Sports plaudern.

Name: Adventure Park ''Adrenaline''
Description:
The Adventure Park offers an exhilarating outdoor experience amid treetops. Activities include navigating challenging obstacle courses and the thrill of a 50-meter zip line. The Tree-Top Courses feature rope bridges, swinging logs, cargo nets, and more. Secured by safety harnesses and cables, participants enjoy testing their agility and strength. To accommodate all ages and skill levels, courses vary in difficulty. Some are closer to the ground, while others pose more demanding challenges at greater heights. The park's highlight is the zip line ride, where visitors glide along cables suspended between trees. The rush of speed and freedom provides a unique aerial perspective. Safety is paramount. Before zip lining, participants receive instructions and proper safety gear. Trained staff ensure a secure and enjoyable experience. The park aims to create a memorable outdoor adventure, blending excitement with a profound connection to nature's wonders. Guests can embrace their physical and mental potential while savoring the beauty of the environment from an extraordinary vantage point. The Tree Top Climbing Park presents an opportunity to escape the ordinary and embark on a remarkable journey.

In conclusion, the Adventure Park stands as a thrilling testament to the wonders of outdoor exploration. It beckons adventure seekers to engage with nature, conquer challenges, and revel in the delight of an adrenaline-charged escapade amidst the treetops. With its commitment to safety and expertly crafted courses, this park invites visitors to embrace the thrill, forge lasting memories, and cherish an authentic connection with the natural world.

Name: Cast A Thought
Description:
Angling is a totally inclusive sport that offers no barriers to those wishing to participate, and an immediate reward to those who take part. Going fishing is not only a great way to stay active and healthy but it is also a perfect activity to help calm your mind, reduce anxiety, fight off depression and promote relaxation.

Following the Covid pandemic the numbers of people with signs of mental health and other wellbeing related issues increased considerably.  No section of the population was exempt.  This has put an added pressure on organisations and support services.

Our programmes are aimed at children, young people and adults whether this in terms of support with mental health and wellbeing issues, or supporting those who live with long term health issues or are vulnerable to social isolation.  

We work in partnership with organisations, schools, youth centres, local NHS trusts and the community, to offer a programme of activities that will meet the five steps to wellbeing, identified by the NHS.  These steps are;

Connect with other people - The development of good relationships are important for mental wellbeing as they can build a sense of belonging and give an opportunity to share positive experiences.  Connecting with others will also provide support and enable the giving of support to others.
Be physically active – As an outdoor sport angling contributes to maintaining a healthy lifestyle.  Although sedentary activity it benefits both physical and mental health. 
Learn new skills – Angling can contribute to personal and social development.  Whether learning new skills, or building knowledge to support current, it helps to build a sense of purpose, boost self confidence and raise self esteem
Give to others - angling engages participants in community activities and can lead on to other activities such as volunteering.
Take notice - being mindful of the surroundings helps participants recognise their thoughts and feelings.

Our team of experienced instructors and support staff are dedicated to creating an inclusive and supportive environment where everyone can learn and enjoy the sport of surfing and other watersports.

In addition to providing high-quality surfing and watersports instruction, we are also committed to promoting social engagement and community building through our programs. We believe that spending time on the water can be a transformative experience, and we strive to create a welcoming and supportive community that fosters personal growth, self-confidence, and social connection.

Whether you are a seasoned surfer or a beginner looking to try something new, we invite you to come join us at Blue Spirit. Name: Gymkhana Gymnastics Inc.
Description:
Gymkhana was opened in 1977 by founders Ed Swerdlow and Elliott Sanft, both competitive gymnasts for the University of Pittsburgh. Gymkhana’s original location was in Shadyside. After outgrowing the Shadyside space, the business moved to the current location at The Factory building in Point Breeze in 1986. With the desire to positively impact more children in Pittsburgh, Gymkhana subsequently opened three more locations: Bethel Park in 1983, Monroeville/Plum in 1984, and Wexford in 2010.

Just three years after opening, Gymkhana launched its competitive team program in 1980. The founders had a drive to offer succeeding generations the many benefits which they have derived from gymnastics: physical and mental fitness, team camaraderie, and a sense of accomplishment and self-worth. Over the years, Gymkhana’s coaching staff has successfully led our gymnasts to numerous individual and team placements at local, State, Regional, and National competitions.

Gymkhana’s mission statement is to foster the physical, emotional and social development of children through unparalleled gymnastics instruction. This mission is now carried out by Gymkhana’s Leadership Team, which is made up of Ed, Elliott, Leah, Liza, and Luke.

Gymkhana prides itself on being a family business, with many of the current instructors and coaches having been Gymkhana students themselves. Carrying on the family traditions at Gymkhana, many of the students are also the second or third generations of Gymkhana families.

The impact Gymkhana Gymnastics has on children reaches well beyond the scope of gymnastics. Gymkhana has helped countless kids increase their confidence, awareness, concentration, and the ability to persevere. Gymkhana looks forward to continuing these values and traditions for many years to come.

 Tailored Corporate Events: Elevate team dynamics with our customized corporate events, designed to promote collaboration, communication, and camaraderie. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the sport, our events cater to all skill levels.

Description:
Hook A Lip est une entreprise dédiée au guidage de Pêche à la Mouche. 
La Pêche à la Mouche est une technique particulière, en lien étroit avec l'observation de l'environnement, de la compréhension du milieu aquatique, de la faune et de la flore de ce biotope. 
Clément COUMES BALOCCHI vous propose des stages pour tous publics et tous niveaux allant de la découverte au perfectionnement. 
Aussi, afin de revêtir la panoplie complète du Moucheur, des cours de montage de mouches sont proposés. Ils consistent à vous apprendre à confectionner vous même vos propres artifices qui vous serviront à tenter de leurrer des poissons lors de vos parties de pêche; quoi de plus gratifiant? 
Enfin, Hook A Lip vous guide en France (Ariège, Aude, Haute Garonne) mais également à l'Etranger (Italie, Espagne, Slovénie) via des séjours créés sur mesure ! 

PS: Contrairement à certaines idées reçues, être pêcheur ne veut pas dire tuer des poissons et détruire un écosystème, bien au contraire. Etant des 'utilisateurs' de nos cours d'eau, nous sommes les premiers à en noter les évolutions, qu'elles soient positives ou négatives et ainsi pour voir agir en conséquence en alertant, sensibilisant, formant et en respectant  nos amis poissons en les laissant repartir dans de bonnes conditions.

Name: The Fit Society Pilates & Lagree Studio
Description:
Transform Your Body and Mind with Lagree and Pilates

Lagree is a revolutionary, high-intensity, low-impact workout that combines strength, endurance, core stability, and flexibility into a single session. Using innovative equipment like the Megaformer, which is a machine that looks like a sliding bench and it offers a challenging yet safe way to sculpt your body, burn calories (up to 700 per session!), and improve muscle tone. This workout is perfect for replacing high-impact activities like CrossFit, traditional strength training, or cardio-intensive sessions all while being kinder to your joints.

Pilates, on the other hand, focuses on mindful movement, core engagement, and posture alignment. It’s ideal for improving flexibility, reducing stress, and enhancing overall mental well-being. By integrating breath control and precise movements, Pilates promotes a strong mind-body connection, leaving you feeling rejuvenated after every class.

Together, these methods are the ultimate fitness solution, offering:
	•	Strength and Toning: Build lean muscles without the bulk.
	•	Calorie Burn: Experience an efficient, full-body workout that boosts your metabolism.
	•	Low-Impact Safety: Protect your joints while improving endurance and flexibility.
	•	Mental Clarity: Feel empowered and stress-free with every mindful session.
	•	Versatility: Suitable for all fitness levels, from beginners to athletes.

Whether you’re looking to replace high-impact workouts or simply enhance your fitness routine, Lagree and Pilates deliver transformative results for your body and mind.
