La peur de la différence, c'est aussi la peur de se voir soi-même dans l'autre.
 La société, de manière générale, a longtemps considéré le handicap comme une incapacité. On observe toutefois aujourd'hui une évolution autour du sujet, notamment en termes de lois, de structures d’accompagnement, d’aide financière en fonction du taux d’incapacité, de logement.
Cependant il reste encore des efforts considérables à faire en ce qui concerne l'inclusion, l’accès à l'emploi, l’accès au patrimoine culturel français et au sport. 
Ces problématiques sont au cœur des actions que nous menons chez Handi'ProActif.

 Notre objectif ? Favoriser l'inclusivité.

Name: Goode Walks
Description:
Goode Walks offers guided walks for individuals, corporate clients & businesses, and all kinds of groups wanting to get outside and enjoy the great outdoors.

Companies looking for team-building out of the office environment allowing staff to relax and interact socially, or away day experiences for employees or clients, can build a customised package to suit their needs. The business benefits of leaving the day-to-day work environment behind are well documented – so get outside to refresh and motivate your team and boost their performance.

And you can also arrange Netwalking days for your team, clients or suppliers - giving everyone the chance to network in a relaxed outdoors environment.

Walks are tailored to suit your needs, and can be run anywhere in Essex, Suffolk, Hertfordshire, East London - and generally across East Anglia and South East England.

Owner Julian Goode is a Mountain Training qualified Lowland Leader, is Outdoors First Aid qualified, a certified MHFA Mental Health First Aider - and member of the Mountain Training Association, British Mountaineering Council, and Institute for Outdoor Learning.

Whether you want to get out into the countryside but don't know how to do so safely, or where to go; want to start walking for health and fitness, or to boost your wellbeing and mental health; you can explore the outdoors with an experienced and knowledgeable professional, enjoying bespoke walking experiences.

Goode Walks also offers walks providing introductions to navigation and map reading for those wishing to build their skill level and confidence to venture outdoors alone or lead their family or friends groups walking or hiking in the future.

Julian Goode is also a Leave No Trace qualified trainer - in the seven principles of Leave No Trace, which provide a framework for minimum impact practices for anyone visiting the outdoors.

Name: Dětský ranč Hlučín z.s.
Description:
Vítejte na místě bez bariér, kde je integrace zdravotně postižených samozřejmostí.

Snažíme se smysluplně naplnit volný čas dětí bez rozdílu věku a zdravotního stavu. Dáváme jim prostor pro vzájemná setkávání a hry, ve kterých se mohou rozvíjet a budovat si přátelské vztahy.

Pomocí koní, zvířat a zábavných volnočasových aktivit chceme zároveň předcházet drogové závislosti a kriminální činnosti mladistvých.

Prostřednictvím hipoterapie pomáháme dětem trpících dětskou mozkovou obrnou, psychickými poruchami, poruchou pohybového ústrojí a roztroušenou sklerózou i dětem s nestabilním sociálním zázemím a těm, které se ocitly v nelehké životní situaci.

Provoz, veškerá činnost i výstavba na ranči probíhá díky finanční pomoci sponzorů a díky obětavým rodičům a dobrovolníkům.

Spolupracujeme s odborníky z řad pediatrů, psychologů, dětských neurologů i fyzioterapeutů – ti všichni poskytují poradenství i konkrétní pomoc bezplatně, v duchu motta: „Dnešní pomoc může být půjčkou do budoucna“.

Name: Endzone Academy
Description:
Endzone Football Academies purpose is to develop Australian gridiron football players in all facets of life and establish them on the international stage. 

Our story starts in 2019 with Coach John Booker who was in Australia coaching the Brisbane Rhinos. He noted 3 teenagers had a shot at making division 1 football and set about developing a program to help them. It started with some resistance bands in the office and then grew to the lawnmower shed, at which point Strength and Conditioning coach Sam Arnold got involved. Since then, we’ve gone through many iterations and are now based at Perform360 Coorparoo and our fields are at Griffith University Gridiron Club, Nathan Campus. To date, 10 players have received 11 scholarships to colleges in the USA totalling almost 2.5 million dollars. 

In 2023 we have brought on board former Division 1 College Coach Makana Garrigan and will be incorporating a life skills component to the program. This includes goal setting, time management, financial literacy, nutrition and meal prep, recovery, public speaking, resume writing and interviewing. Our goal is for every player to develop the tools to make better choices in life which will in turn help them focus their time and energy on realizing their football dreams.

Name: Skyhawks & SuperTots NOLA

Camps range from soccer to baseball to our popular multi-sport camp where kids sample three different sports (Soccer, Basketball, and Baseball) in one camp. To learn more about our programs, visit www.skyhawks.com.

Name: BALLERXSCOUT
Description:
Our Mission -

To become the go-to global platform for football information advice and guidance's (IAG) empowering players and families with the tools, insight, and tailored pathways they need to succeed in the ever-changing football landscape.

We believe every player, no matter their background, deserves to be seen and given the opportunity to develop. 

That’s why we don’t just scout talent, we share knowledge and create opportunities. Whether you’re a grassroots player dreaming of a trial or an academy prospect looking for your next step, we’re here to ensure you have the understanding, support, and guidance to make the right decisions for your journey.

We’re not a talent agency.

We don’t just collect players and hope for the best. We focus on what’s real: understanding your strengths, needs, and the best possible route for your growth.

We’re not a faceless scouting group.

Behind every player, there’s a story. A family. A journey. And we’re here to give every player a voice, a plan, and most importantly, a path.

We are the Official IAG Platform for Football Families and Players, and we’re here to disrupt the game.

We attend 1v1 events and showcase trials to make sure you understand every possible pathway and opportunity. 

We're breaking down barriers, removing the guesswork, and giving you real insight into how football works, so you can take control of your career.

Name: Peak Tennis International
Description:
Peak Tennis International is a tennis and wellness community based in Leysin, Switzerland, in the Swiss Alps. For over ten years, we have been helping children, teenagers, and adults grow through sport, connection, and challenge.

We design camps in Switzerland, Austria, and the United Kingdom, as well as local classes in Leysin and specialist retreats that combine tennis with breathwork, mindset, and health practices. From summer and winter camps to weekend tennis and language programs, and adult fitness, every experience is built to be fun, challenging in the right way, and deeply supportive.

On court, our coaches focus on strong foundations, innovative tactics and a love for the game. Off the court, we focus on developing confidence, resilience, leadership, and everyday habits that stay with our players long after they leave the court. Small groups, clear feedback and individual attention allow every player to feel seen and to progress at their own pace.

We collaborate closely with schools, families and partners who share our belief that sport is a powerful classroom for life. Through our foundation projects, including support for education in Zambia, we also invite our community to make a positive difference beyond their own goals.

Peak Potential. Peak You.

Name: CaddieVision
Description:
To those who love to play, golf is much more than a sport.  

It's a quest to beat the odds and to conquer the course that often seems just beyond reach. With the club in your hand and the crisp grass underneath your feet, golf ignites a constant yearning to be better and to push yourself further. It teaches the relentless pursuit of improvement which makes every step forward feel like a triumph. 

Golf is also an investment. 

While every golfer wants that perfect shot, not everyone has the time or budget to pay for a golf instructor, rangefinders, swing analyzers, and putting aids to help you lower your handicap. 

This is especially true if you're a beginner and fall within the handicap range of most golfers in the US. 68.18% of male golfers and 69.12% of female golfers are in the handicap range of 10-34.

Designed by golfers, for golfers.  
The app and wearable solve the problems of uncertainty and decision fatigue that plague golfers on the course. CaddieVision gives you real-time visual and audio feedback to help you make data-informed decisions quickly, reducing anxiety and indecision during play, and improving your handicap in record time.

Canine Conditioning Workshops: Focus on the physical needs of dogs to ensure they can join in water activities.
Customized Training Plans: Designed to align with the owner’s lifestyle and paddlesport goals, ensuring consistent progress.
Events & Activity Days: Promote paddlesports and canine companionship, emphasizing safety, preparation, and environmental awareness.
The program utilizes positive reinforcement, and humane methods, and aims to inspire pet owners to enjoy memorable adventures with their dogs.

Name: Pallas, éducation et ludopédagogie
Description:
Pallas éducation et ludopédagogie est une association d'intérêt général ayant pour objet de sensibiliser par le jeu, développer et valoriser les savoirs humains essentiels chez les jeunes entre 11 et 25 ans.

Via des scénarios d'escape game, nous abordons des connaissances dans 6 grandes thématiques: 
-Connaissance du corps, du cerveau et des émotions 
-Connaissance de la nature 
-Prendre soin des êtres sensibles 
-Autonomie au quotidien 
-Connaissance du droit 
-Entreprendre 
Nous les valorisons ensuite par le passage d'un quizz et l'obtention d'un badge. 

Nous proposons à nos partenaires (collège, lycée, mission locale, centre socio-culturel, maison de quartier, espace jeunes...) des prix accessibles afin de démocratiser ces savoirs et permettre au plus grand nombre d'être bien dans ses baskets, autonome au quotidien, d'avoir confiance en soi et de faire valoir ses droits.

Name: Ladies AllRide
Description:
Women's Mountain Bike Skills Camps
This isn’t just about getting better at mountain biking.

Since 2010, we’ve been passionate about helping women discover the powerful connection between mountain biking and life. We believe this transformative sport is a catalyst for growth, change, and meaningful connection with oneself and others. Time and again, we witness how mountain biking can boost physical and mental health, inspire courage, build self-belief, and reveal what’s possible - both on and off the bike.

Ladies AllRide Mountain Bike Skills Camps are dedicated to bringing women together to build confidence, learn valuable skills, and embrace the joys and challenges of mountain biking - all in a fun, supportive, and welcoming environment.

Whether you’re a first-timer or a seasoned shredder, prefer group rides or solo adventures, you belong here! We warmly welcome ALL skin colors, body types, fitness levels, WTFNB riders and ages 18 and up. 

We carefully place each participant into small groups based on an in-depth questionnaire - ensuring everyone feels welcomed and ready to thrive!

ALLRIDE: Est. 2003 ~ AllRide is more than a name - it’s a message.

We believe everyone who is able should All Ride bikes to experience the joy, fun, community, and life-changing lessons they bring. Our mission is to help more people unlock the transformative power of mountain biking - a thrilling and challenging sport that nourishes the mind, body, and spirit. Using mountain biking as a tool, we strive to help people discover their potential and what they’re truly capable of. 

Let’s All Ride together soon! 

Our title sponsor is Liv Cycling with Presenting sponsor SRAM / RockShox and supporting sponsors like Wild Rye clothing, SMITH glasses and helmets, Crankbrothers Pedals, pumps and tools, Muc-Off Cleaning and lube, G-Form protection - and many more!

Name: Park Wola
Description:
Park Wola to najciekawszy i jedyny taki rodzinny park zabaw w Krakowie dla dzieci i dorosłych, działający w dwóch lokalizacjach (Park Wola Kasztanowa 1 i Park Wola Sodowa 5). Park rozrywki Sodowa jest obiektem całorocznym, natomiast obiekt Kasztanowa sezonowym – działającym od wiosny do jesieni. Każdy z parków funkcjonuje od poniedziałku do niedzieli. Zapewniamy wyjątkowe atrakcje dla dzieci – Kraków jest ciekawy o każdej porze roku!

Plac zabaw dla dzieci (Kraków) latem zapewnia wszystkim Gościom najwięcej radości – na świeżym powietrzu działa ogrom atrakcji dla całej rodziny. W wydzielonych strefach gastronomicznych można natomiast odpocząć i posilić się przed dalszą zabawą.

Zimą w Park Wola Sodowa uruchamiana jest hala pneumatyczna, w której Goście mogą grać w tenisa. Park zabaw udostępnia także wyposażenie oraz miejsce do uprawiania sportów różnego rodzaju. Do tego w Wola Parku Sodowa organizowane są także zimowe urodziny dla dzieci! 

Serdecznie zapraszamy!

Name: Sport Business Science
Description:
I Europejski Kongres Sportu i Turystyki to wyjątkowy projekt na sportowej mapie Polski i Europy.

W ciągu trzech dni chcemy zebrać w jednym miejscu najważniejsze osoby w polskim i europejskim sporcie. Działacze, trenerzy, zawodnicy, sportowe media, a przede wszystkim krajowi i europejscy decydenci spotkają się w jednym miejscu, by rozmawiać o wyzwaniach, jakie stają przed sportem w trzeciej dekadzie XXI wieku.

Coraz większa monetyzacja sportu, wzrost znaczenia sportu jako gałęzi gospodarki, wykorzystanie nowoczesnych technologii w różnych jego obszarach, czy też coraz większa rola sportowców jako ambasadorów różnych postaw społecznych – te zagadnienia wymagają szerokiej i systemowej debaty z udziałem wszystkich zainteresowanych rozwojem sportu i turystyki.

Tak trudne wydarzenia jak pandemia COVID 19 i rosyjska agresja w Ukrainie wywołały falę zmian w wielu obszarach funkcjonowania sportu. Jak sobie z nimi radzić, jak dostosowywać się do nowej rzeczywistości i w jaki sposób kształtować przyszłość sportu? Między innymi o tym będziemy dyskutować w trakcie paneli, spotkań i warsztatów w ramach organizowanego wydarzenia.

Name: Soccer Blade
Description:
Soccer Blade is a modern football platform built to make the game easier to learn, more enjoyable to explore, and more accessible for players, coaches, and fans. The site combines expert knowledge with interactive digital tools, creating a unique space where football education meets creativity and fun.

Designed and developed by people with real on-field experience, Soccer Blade focuses on clear, practical explanations of the sport. The platform includes formation creators, drill builders, interactive quizzes, and coaching resources that translate complex football ideas into simple, usable insights. Whether someone is preparing a training session, studying the tactics of their favorite club, or exploring football culture, the tools are built to guide them step by step.

Soccer Blade also produces evergreen content that blends analysis, storytelling, and real football understanding. Articles are written with the voice of a coach and the passion of a long-time supporter, creating an approachable learning experience for every level of fan. From youth development and match strategy to club history and iconic moments, each resource aims to deepen the audience’s connection to the game.

The platform’s quizzes and mini-games bring an interactive edge rarely seen in football media. Users can test their knowledge, challenge friends, and discover how well they really understand the sport. These experiences are designed to entertain, but also to teach, helping players and fans build confidence through play.

What sets Soccer Blade apart is its commitment to clarity, accuracy, and accessibility. Every tool and article is crafted with attention to detail, modern design, and a genuine respect for the sport. The goal is simple: make high-quality football education open to everyone, from beginners to lifelong supporters.

As Soccer Blade continues to grow, it remains focused on building smart tools, engaging content, and innovative experiences.

Name: AFS - Athletics Football | Soccer Support - Playerdevelopment
Description:
AFS-Individualtraining

Der Fußball ist eine vielseitige komplexe Mannschaftssportart, die verschiedene Fertigkeiten und Fähigkeiten benötigt. Um einer optimalen Entwicklung gerecht zu werden, müssen wir das Mannschaftstraining wie ein Puzzle auseinandernehmen. Der kleinste gemeinsame Nenner ist das Individualtraining und diesem widmen wir uns.

￼

Warum Individualtraining, um schneller zum eigenen Ziel zu kommen?

 Im Individualtraining steht der Spieler unter dem Fokus des handelnden Trainers. Der Trainer kann nach einer IST-Analyse für den Spieler ein optimales Training bezüglich seiner Stärken und Schwächen ausarbeiten. In der Trainingsarbeit hat der Trainer die Möglichkeit, diese Stärken und Schwächen direkt anzusprechen und zu coachen.

Onder begeleiding van een gekwalificeerde trainer, die weet hoe hij mensen kan motiveren. Ook het groepsverband draagt daar aan bij. Geen tijd of zin om de deur uit te gaan, of om tussen de spierbundels in de sportschool te trainen? Geen probleem. Misschien is een Personal Trainer dan ideaal voor jou! Tijdens een Personal Training krijg je dus individuele begeleiding, die precies is afgestemd op jouw doelstelling(en).

Er is niet veel ruimte nodig voor een goede work-out. Ik neem alle benodigde materialen mee en dan we samen aan de slag.

Name: The Talented Mind
Description:
Mindset Coaching for Athletes

I help athletes maximise their performance by developing their mental fitness. I work with aspiring athletes on the pathway to elite or professional sports. 

I also support sports parents and coaches by giving them insights into sports psychology and teaching them key tools & techniques to help their athletes increase their mental fitness.  

It's widely recognised that developing mental strength is vital for competitive athletes. In fact most elite athletes these days work with a sports therapist or mindset coach. I believe there's a huge gap in support for athletes on the pathway to elite sports - and that's why I'm driven to do this work. 

I have first-hand experience of competitive sport (fencing was my thing!). And I often wonder what might've been if I had access to a mindset coach.  I'm now a parent to two aspiring athletes - rugby and athletics are their things! These experiences fuel my passion to support the mindset development of athletes and their families. 

Using the principles and theories of sports psychology, peak performance and behavioural sciences, I have created a suite of services to help athletes increase their mental fitness. My programmes and workshops will help athletes to boost their performance and reach their true potential. I focus on instilling a winner's mindset to give athletes a distinct competitive advantage. 

How do I help athletes take their performance to the next level? 

I offer the following option; for Athletes, Parents & Coaches

   - 1:1 Coaching (in person)
   - 1:1 Coaching (online) 
   - Online Courses
   - Workshops 
   - Personalised Development Programmes

Follow my page for tips and insights into developing a winner's mindset.

Name: Snellerzwemmen.nl
Description:
Mijn naam is Rob Kwaaitaal, eigenaar en oprichter van Snellerzwemmen.nl.

In 1985 nam ik op vijftienjarige leeftijd aan mijn eerste triathlon deel. Ik had toen niet kunnen bedenken dat er nog honderden wedstrijden zouden volgen!

Ik vind het leuk om de kennis en ervaring die ik heb opgedaan in meer dan dertig jaar duursport door te geven aan andere atleten. Om mij verder te bekwamen in het trainen en coachen van atleten heb ik in 2015 deelgenomen aan de opleiding Triathlon Trainer Niveau 3 van de Nederlandse Triathlonbond. Daarnaast heb ik de opleiding tot certified Swim Smooth coach gevolgd. Daarvoor heb ik cursussen in Engeland en Australië gevolgd. Ik ben de enige Nederlandse zwemtrainer met het Swim Smooth-certificaat. Swim Smooth is een methode voor triatleten en open water zwemmers om beter en sneller te leren zwemmen.

Eind 2015 heb ik Snellerzwemmen.nl opgericht. De missie van Snellerzwemmen.nl is om zwemmers en triatleten sneller en makkelijker te leren zwemmen. Dit doen we op basis van de Swim Smooth methodiek. Meer informatie over Swim Smooth vindt u hier.

De visie op trainen van Snellerzwemmen.nl is gebaseerd op de volgende vier pijlers:
– plezier in de sport (alleen dan kan je blijven trainen en ontwikkelen)
– stap voor stap verbeteren (progressie maak je geleidelijk en niet in een keer)
– kwaliteit boven kwantiteit (niet eindeloos km’s trainen maar er voor zorgen dat je zo efficiënt mogelijk beweegt)
– veel variatie in je training (je moet steeds je lichaam weer verrassen met nieuwe trainingsprikkels)

Graag helpen wij u om ook sneller te gaan leren zwemmen!

Le CDOS 68 (Comité Départemental Olympique et Sportif du Haut-Rhin) représente le CNOSF (Comité National Olympique et Sportif Français) et le mouvement sportif sur le territoire haut-rhinois. 

Le CDOS 68 a pour mission de : 
- Représenter et fédérer le mouvement sportif
- Défendre et promouvoir le sport et ses valeurs éducatives
- Accompagner la structuration et le développement du mouvement sportif

Pour répondre à ces missions, le CDOS Haut-Rhin mène différentes actions dans chacun des axes déployés par le CNOSF : Sport éducation & citoyenneté, Sport-santé & bien-être, Sport & professionnalisation, Sport & politiques publiques. 

Le CDOS dans le Haut-Rhin représente :
- 181 931 licenciés ;
- 1 944 clubs sportifs ;
- 61 Comités Départementaux.

Name: Trainen met de Top
Description:
Het idee voor Trainen met de Top is ontstaan omdat wij een behoefte zagen in het Noorden voor dit concept. Jaarlijks staan er honderden bedrijventeams aan de start van de 4 Mijl van Groningen, een van de grootste wedstrijden van Nederland. De weken voorafgaand aan de 4 Mijl zie je het aantal hardlopers in de omgeving Groningen exponentieel toenemen.

Je ziet dat de deelnemers graag goed voorbereid aan de start staan, maar eigenlijk niet weten waar ze moeten beginnen. Wij worden dan ook vaak gevraagd om de beste tips and tricks. Hier willen wij met Trainen met de Top op inspelen met het aanbieden van clinics, presentaties en loopschema's.

Voor bedrijven, maar ook de individuele fanatieke of beginnende hardloper kan bij ons terecht. Wij zorgen op een laagdrempelige manier voor professionele begeleiding naar jouw sportieve prestaties!

Name: Albany Ballers Abroad
Description:
Albany Ballers Abroad began with four high school basketball teammates from the small town of Albany, California. Driven by a shared passion for the game and a desire to make a difference, we connected with a community in Chimaltenango, a rural city in Guatemala. There, we introduced basketball for the first time — building not only skills, but lasting bonds with an incredibly welcoming community.

What started as a single trip has grown into an annual tradition. For the past four years and counting, we’ve returned to continue sharing our love of basketball, and learning and connecting with all the friends we’ve made along the way.

In addition to running the basketball camp, we partner with Partner for Surgery to help support their mission of providing surgical care to those in need in rural Guatemala. Through fundraising efforts and on-the-ground support, we are proud to help out the community we love so much.

At Albany Ballers Abroad, our mission is simple: to connect through sports, empower through community, and make a lasting positive impact.

Name: HILL GOLF CENTER
Description:
Un centre convivial à la pointe de la technologie:
Tout confort, entièrement chauffé ou climatisé, notre centre dispose de 4 simulateurs de golf équipés de la technologie Trackman et analyse vidéo, d’un putting green de 80m2 équipé de Puttview et Capto, d’un espace Fitting multi-marques, d’une salle de réunion et d’un espace de convivialité/détente avec bar et TV (petite restauration possible). 

Géré par une équipe d’enseignants passionnés:
La structure a été inaugurée en septembre 2019 par les deux frères Hill, Scott et Michael. Depuis, l’équipe s’est étoffée avec un ami d’enfance, Sébastien Berthou. Tous les trois ont joué sur le circuit professionnel, ont une grande expérience de l’enseignement, sont complémentaires et s’attachent à des valeurs qui leur semblent essentielles comme la bienveillance, la rigueur et la convivialité.

Une technologie au service de l’enseignant mais aussi de l’élève:
Chez nous, vous pouvez prendre des cours individuels ou collectifs avec l’analyse vidéo et trackman. Vous pouvez également réaliser un stage de golf avec leur concept indoor, outdoor (entraînement dans notre centre et parcours accompagnés sur les plus beaux golfs des Landes). Nous avons chacun nos spécialités, du putting au driving.

Un endroit incontournable pour le fitting:
Si vous souhaitez changer de club, du putter au driver, vous avez aussi la possibilité dans notre centre d’essayer toutes les plus grandes marques. Notre œil avisé d’enseignant et professionnel du fitting est une réelle valeur ajoutée pour déterminer le club qui vous sera le mieux adapté. Travaillant en partenariat avec Golf’One 40, vous pourrez directement commander auprès d’eux votre nouveau matériel.

Des offres pour les entreprises
Augmentez votre image de marque grâce à de l’affichage dynamique au Hill Golf Center, sur notre site internet et nos réseaux sociaux. 
Vous pouvez aussi renforcer la cohésion de vos équipes en organisant un Team Building alliant initiation et concours !

laserXpark è il rivoluzionario action game che combina alta tecnologia e sport in un'esperienza outdoor in grado di offrire tanto divertimento e un elevato tasso di adrenalina.

Una battaglia a squadre dove azione e strategia diventeranno fondamentali per la vittoria finale. Un'esperienza entusiasmante a contatto con la natura da condividere in famiglia,, con amici e colleghi.

Name: Born To Marathon School of Athletics
Description:
Born to Marathon School of Athletics (BTMSOA) is a non-profit organization dedicated to developing athletes who excel at national, regional, and international levels.  Our comprehensive program combines physical and theoretical training, focusing on both athletic excellence and holistic development. Athletes participate in sessions three times a week, designed to enhance their skills and prepare them for competitions.

BTMSOA goes beyond athletics by offering nutrition education, life skills training through activities like agriculture, and homework assistance for in-school athletes. We believe in nurturing well-rounded individuals who are not only successful athletes but also responsible, healthy, and educated members of society.

Our commitment to global exposure is evident in our exchange programs with countries such as South Africa, Japan, Italy, and Kenya. These programs broaden our athletes’ perspectives, offering them valuable experiences that contribute to their growth both on and off the field. At BTMSOA, we are passionate about empowering our athletes to reach their full potential and make a lasting impact in the world of sports.

Name: Ostre Debiuty
Description:
Chcesz wprowadzić swoją firmę w świat strategicznego myślenia? A może rozegrać partię szachów z arcymistrzem?

 Witaj w świecie mistrzów szachownicy! 

Jesteśmy pasjonatami szachów – potrafimy przewidzieć wiele ruchów w przód i sprowadzić każdą strategię do „pionu”. 

Tworzymy profesjonalne kursy prowadzone przez arcymistrzów i doświadczonych trenerów. Spotkasz wśród nas wielokrotnych medalistów mistrzostw Polski i turniejów międzynarodowych, którzy z przyjemnością podzielą się z Tobą tajnikami tej królewskiej gry.

Od podstaw po zaawansowane taktyki – odkryjesz, jak szachy wpływają na strategiczne myślenie, poziom koncentracji i zdolność przewidywania.

Wybierz interesujący kurs, figury w dłoń i do dzieła – czas na ostre otwarcie!

Name: 3s League
Description:
3s League is Orange County’s premier youth 3x3 basketball league, launching in early 2026!

We’re building a league that’s fun, local and development-driven. Every detail is designed to give kids more opportunity and confidence on the court—without the stress, cost and travel of traditional leagues.

For Kids: Fast-paced 10-minute games and small rosters mean more touches, more development and more fun. 

For Parents: 4-week seasons with back-to-back games make participation simple and convenient. Families enjoy a stress-free experience while kids get maximum playing time, and parents are in and out of the gym in just 45 minutes.

For Coaches: Athletes return sharper, more skilled and more prepared. 3x3 develops decision-making, spacing and ball-handling skills that translate directly to 5x5 success.

3s League is more than a league—it’s a new way to experience youth basketball. By combining development, fun and innovation, we’re creating a community where every player, parent and coach wins!

Name: Grav-fitt
Description:
Grav-Fitt is opgericht vanuit een passie voor gezondheid, beweging en persoonlijke groei. Met de overtuiging dat iedereen het recht heeft op een energiek en gebalanceerd leven, biedt Grav-Fitt hoogwaardige personal training, lifestyle coaching en bedrijfsfitness/-coaching aan. Onze missie is simpel: mensen helpen het beste uit zichzelf te halen, op een manier die 100% clean en puur is.

Onze Visie
Bij Grav-Fitt geloven we dat een gezonde levensstijl niet ingewikkeld hoeft te zijn. Door te focussen op natuurlijke methodes, transparantie en wetenschappelijk bewezen principes, maken we duurzame gezondheid toegankelijk voor iedereen. Wij staan voor een eerlijke en oprechte aanpak die jou helpt je doelen te bereiken én vast te houden.

Personal Training
Grav-Fitt biedt op maat gemaakte personal training aan waarbij we verder kijken dan alleen oefeningen. We helpen je een sterke basis op te bouwen, je conditie te verbeteren en fysiek sterker te worden – altijd afgestemd op jouw doelen en behoeften.

Lifestyle Coaching
Gezondheid is meer dan trainen. We ondersteunen je bij het ontwikkelen van een gezonde levensstijl door advies over voeding, slaap en stressmanagement. Ons doel is dat jij je niet alleen beter voelt, maar ook beter functioneert in het dagelijks leven.

Bedrijfsfitness
Bedrijven die kiezen voor een gezonde en vitale werkomgeving zijn succesvoller. Grav-Fitt biedt vitaliteitsprogramma's en fitnessoplossingen aan die bijdragen aan gezonde en energieke teams. Dit versterkt niet alleen de medewerkers, maar ook de organisatie als geheel.

Wat Maakt Ons Uniek?
100% Clean & Puur: Grav-Fitt staat voor een natuurlijke en eerlijke aanpak zonder korte-termijn oplossingen of ongezonde praktijken.
Individuele Begeleiding: Wij geloven in maatwerk. Ieder mens is uniek en verdient een plan dat volledig aansluit bij zijn of haar doelen.
Resultaatgericht: Onze focus ligt op duurzame resultaten, zowel fysiek als mentaal.
Holistische Aanpak: We kijken naar he

Name: British Swim School of Salt Lake City
Description:
British Swim School is the premier survival and stroke development swim lesson provider, utilizing highly-trained swim instructors to teach lessons that focus on safety, fun and skill development to infants (as young as 3 months), toddlers, children, teens and adults, across all ability levels - including children and adults with special abilities.

With the core mission of “Survival of the Littlest” we utilize water survival programs that enable children to survive a water accident, countering the troubling statistic that drowning is the #1 cause of accidental death for children under 5 years old.

Started in the basement of founder and prior CEO Rita Goldberg’s Manchester home in 1981, the British Swim School business was brought to the U.S. ten years later, and began franchising in 2011. Most recently, British Swim School was acquired in early 2019 into the Buzz Franchise Brands family, which includes Pool Scouts, a pool cleaning and maintenance company and Home Clean Heroes, a residential cleaning company.

What sets British Swim school apart? Our owners operate their schools out
of existing facilities, such as fitness centers, health clubs, and hotels, taking advantage of an often-underutilized space and reducing the barrier to entry for many potential owners. The advantage to our swimmers is their ability to select from multiple locations based on proximity and class schedule.

Regardless of the location, our one-of-a-kind gentle and fun techniques
and curriculum-based program is focused on achieving prescribed goals before advancing to the next level in the program.

Name: Football Helper
Description: At Football Helper, we advise our clients in the areas of football education, fantasy football advice, unique systematic analysis (USA), and Esports gaming strategy for EA’s NFL Madden 23.

Name: MFS Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Die Münchner Fußball Schule wurde 1998 gegründet. Inzwischen ist unser Unternehmen die Partnerschaftsgesellschaft MFS – Schuppke, Niedermeier & Partner. Die 14 Partner und ca. 100 angestellten Trainer arbeiten Tag für Tag an der Zukunft der Münchner Fußball Schule. Unsere Angebote sind vereinsunabhängig, aber -unterstützend, sodass wir unsere jungen Fußballer mit Hilfe unserer ganzheitlichen Ausbildungsphilosophie sportlich und persönlich weiterentwickeln. Alleine in der Region München und Umland kooperieren wir mittlerweile mit über 90 Vereinen und fördern ca. 7.000 Kinder pro Jahr (Stand 2019).

Ziel ist es, unsere einzigartige Philosophie weiter nach draußen zu tragen. Die Marke MFS soll Kinder und Trainer allen Alters begeistern und für alle interessierten Fußballer zugänglich gemacht werden. Auf dieser Basis haben wir in den letzten Jahren einige nationale und internationale Lizenzstandorte aufgebaut. Diese erstrecken sich international mittlerweile über Österreich, Italien und Portugal bis nach China, Japan und die USA.

Deutschlandweit sind wir sehr stolz, neben Standorten in NRW, Hannover, Berlin, Regensburg und dem Großraum Franken nun auch die Region Baden-Württemberg als fußballverrücktes Bundesland erschließen zu können. Unter dem Namen MEINE FUSSBALLSCHULE BADEN-WÜRTTEMBERG (MFS-BaWü), haben wir hier zwei Lizenzstandorte mit entsprechender Gebietsaufteilung:

In unserer Startregion Oberschwaben und Bodensee leiten aktuell Partner der MFS München gemeinsam mit Trainern aus der Region die ersten Standorte im südlichen Baden-Württemberg. Wie in allen Regionen und Lizenzgebieten gibt es auch für unsere Trainer in Baden-Württemberg Trainerfortbildungen in mehreren Modulen. Auf diese Weise lernen die Trainer, unser Trainings-Know-how vor Ort umzusetzen. Die Briefings finden dabei wöchentlich statt.

Den Großraum Stuttgart/Mittlerer Neckar bespielen exklusiv Angelika Gunzenhauser und Ex-VfB-Torhüter Helmut Roleder.

Name: Endurance Athlete Racing, LLC
Description:
Endurance Athlete Racing works with beginner and experienced athletes to successfully reach their desired goal. We incorporate initial assessments determining the athlete’s current condition. A detailed personalized plan is developed for the athlete to attain that goal.

Name: Politiche e Strategie delle Società Calcistiche - UniTE
Description:
L'Università degli Studi di Teramo consolida il cammino di formazione ed innovazione nel sistema calcistico. Ciò avviene in continuità con il percorso tracciato negli anni Novanta, quando fu il primo ateneo in Europa a strutturare in proposta didattica studi e ricerche (Corso di perfezionamento, poi Master, poi Corso di Specializzazione, poi Corso di Laurea, poi Dottorato di Ricerca) dedicati allo sport ed al calcio in particolare, coinvolgendo come docenti alcuni degli attuali vertici del sistema calcistico a livello nazionale, europeo e mondiale e formando studenti oggi coinvolti in club professionistici di livello. 
Questa eredità viene oggi declinata nel I Corso di Formazione in POLITICHE E STRATEGIE DELLE SOCIETA’ CALCISTICHE, riconosciuto ed accreditato dalla FIGC quale percorso formativo per l’accesso diretto all’esame di abilitazione federale per “direttore sportivo” (Elenco speciale ex legge 23 marzo 1981 n.91).
L’iniziativa attivata dall’Università degli Studi di Teramo e dalla Fondazione UniTE in collaborazione con ADICOSP (Associazione Direttori e Collaboratori Sportivi) è finalizzata alla preparazione delle figure manageriali delle società di calcio e consente l’abilitazione professionale. 
L’iniziativa di UniTE è concepita per coinvolgere tutte le aree di gestione di un club calcistico, al fine di poter assicurare un elevato livello di preparazione e più sbocchi lavorativi all’interno dei rapporti contrattuali con il club calcistico professionistico. 190 ore di lezione in modalità mista 
(online + 3 sessioni in presenza), 6 aree formative - 5 indirizzi tematici,136 insegnamenti - oltre 70 docenti
L’intera offerta formativa  – informazioni e dettagli sono comunque reperibili sul sito istituzionale (UniTE_Politiche_e_strategie_delle_societa_calcistiche) - sarà somministrata in formato “misto” (blended learnin metodology), abbinando le lezioni in distance a quelle in presenza fisica (3 sessioni) . Scadenza iscrizioni: 4 ottobre 2022.

Name: Cheza
Description:
Welcome to Cheza, the home of traditional African sports innovation, cultural preservation, and sports diplomacy. Founded in 2013, the Cheza Assciation is on a mission to redesign, rebrand, and globalize traditional African games—starting with Kwepena (ChezaDodge)—to create opportunities for youth empowerment, community development, and economic growth.

What We Do

At Cheza, we believe that traditional African sports hold the key to social change, health, unity, and economic opportunities. Through our innovative approach, we transform these indigenous games into structured, competitive, and modern sports with professional rules, gameplay equipment, leagues, and international participation.
Our Key Focus Areas:

 Reviving Traditional African Sports
We research, document, and modernize indigenous African games like Kwepena (ChezaDodge), Omweso, Bladda, Duulu, Sonko, Tug of War, and Jump Rope, preserving Africa’s rich cultural heritage.

 ChezaDodge – Africa’s First International Traditional Sport
In partnership with the World Dodgeball Association, Cheza has secured global recognition for Kwepena (ChezaDodge) as a professional sport, working towards making it Africa’s first Olympic sport.

 Sports Diplomacy & Global Recognition
Through international tournaments and partnerships, we promote African sports worldwide. Cheza has been featured on BBC, Al Jazeera, VOA, CGTN, RFI and was hosted by the President of Uganda for its impact on sports development.

 Cheza Leagues & Tournaments
We host structured competitions, building player and fan engagement for traditional sports.

 Community Impact & Youth Empowerment
Cheza works with schools, universities, and communities to promote education, employment, and well-being through sports.

 Environmental Impact
We produce game balls from recycled polythene, supporting sustainability and sports in underserved communities.
 Locations: Uganda, Rwanda, Kenya, South Sudan, Cote d'Ivore

Name: JB33 Foundation
Description:
JB33 Foundation is about giving opportunities. From supporting young players and easing the financial pressures on families, to strengthening clubs with the resources they need, our aim is to carry Josh’s spirit forward.

Josh Baker was just beginning what promised to be a bright cricketing career. Cricket had always been close to his heart, and he embraced life with joy and big dreams. His love for the game, and for the people around him, continues to inspire everything we do. 

Following the devastating loss of their son, Lisa and Paul Baker created the JB33 Foundation in his memory. The foundation supports local cricket clubs across the Worcestershire, helping them grow and thrive while also making sure vital safety measures, such as life-saving defibrillators, are in place. 

At its heart, the JB33 Foundation is about giving opportunities. From supporting young players and easing the financial pressures on families, to strengthening clubs with the resources they need, our aim is to carry Josh’s spirit forward. Today, his legacy lives on whenever a player steps onto the pitch with the chance to follow their own dreams. 

Donate: https://www.justgiving.com/charity/jb33foundationcio

Pour les plus téméraires, fans de Call of Duty et autres Fornite, profitez d'une partie de Laser Game Outdoor en équipe, dès 8 ans.

Name: Box3 Motorsport Ltd
Description:
Unleashing Performance. Redefining Track Experience.

Box3 Motorsport is where elite driver coaching meets race team precision. Whether you're a novice chasing your first podium or a professional team fine-tuning for championship success, Box3 delivers a complete, immersive motorsport experience.

We don’t just coach—we engineer progress. From high-impact simulator sessions to full race-day support, every service is built to elevate performance behind the wheel and in the garage. Our team combines professional-grade instruction, cutting-edge data analysis, and deep mechanical insight to help drivers extract every tenth.

What We Do:
Driver Coaching: Personalised 1:1 training that targets racecraft, consistency, and confidence.

Track Preparation: In-depth circuit familiarisation, line work, braking zones, and overtaking strategy.

Vehicle Setup: Data-led adjustments to suspension, tyres, aero and balance—tailored to both driver and circuit.

Simulator Training: Realistic pre-event preparation using advanced sim technology.

Race Support: Strategy, physical and mental prep, and full team integration to ensure you're sharp and ready when the lights go out.

Data Analysis: Powerful telemetry insights turned into actionable gains.

At Box3, you're not just another driver. You're part of a focused, professional program built around your goals. Whether it’s your first track day or your next season in GT racing—we’re here to make sure you go faster, smarter, and safer.

Whether you’re passionate about sport, leadership, or personal development, we provide a world-class learning environment where you can thrive.

Our NSW College of Sport students are taught by industry experts with real-world experience in a real-world campus situated within the Cricket New South Wales' headquarters at Sydney Olympic Park. Our people are not just educators—they’re mentors who are committed to helping you develop the skills, knowledge, and mindset needed for a successful career in the sports, recreation and health industries

UOW College has a proud history of delivering quality education through vocational training and academic pathways. Its programs are designed to prepare students for future employment or to serve as pathways into university degrees, all with the goal of setting students up for a successful future.

By learning from professionals who have been in the field, students gain insight and practical knowledge that goes beyond theory.

The mission of the Sunrise Recreation and Park District is to be responsive to its communities’

 Offering a variety of affordable recreation and learning opportunities to individuals of all
ages and abilities,
 Providing clean, safe, well‐designed parks and facilities,

 Supporting economic development,

 Increasing cultural unity,
 Protecting environmental resources,
 Facilitating community problem solving, and

Name: Body Inverso personal training studio Den Haag
Description:
Body Inverso is een personal training studio waar persoonlijk ook écht persoonlijk is en waar jij altijd welkom bent om samen met ons aan je doelen te werken. We helpen je graag. Of dat nou in de vorm van personal training, duo-training of small group training is. De deur staat voor je open en samen werken we niet alleen aan een gezond lijf maar ook aan een fijne balans tussen werk en privé. Bij ons geen loze beloftes of halve aanpak. Als we ervoor gaan, dan staan we naast je gedurende het gehele traject. 

Wij hebben namelijk één missie, we willen onze klanten niet alleen training en coaching meegeven, maar ook de kennis waarmee ze hun levensstijl kunnen veranderen en volhouden. 

Wij geloven dat een gezond en fit lijf niet alleen wordt behaald door een paar uur per week te sporten. Wij helpen je daarom niet alleen op het gebied van training, maar ook op het gebied van voeding, gedrag en een goede balans tussen werk en privé. Kennisoverdracht is daarom een belangrijk onderdeel van onze coaching, zo zorgen we er namelijk samen voor dat jij, ook na het traject, weet hoe je jouw gezonde levensstijl kunt volhouden. 

Iedereen is uniek, daarom vinden wij het belangrijk dat je bij ons écht persoonlijke begeleiding krijgt. Onze trainers en coaches zijn er voor jou. Of je nou even die schop onder je kont nodig hebt, een stevige peptalk of een luisterend oor en gedegen advies. Samen nemen we de tijd om te kijken naar de huidige situatie, vervolgens stellen we een duidelijk en helder plan op om te werken aan jouw doelen. Elke week evalueren we de afgelopen week, wat ging er goed en wat kan er beter? Zo zorgen we voor duurzame gedragsverandering en een fijn proces.

Name: Middlesex in the Community
Description:
Middlesex in the Community is the charitable arm of Middlesex Cricket.

Its purpose is to promote cricket in the seventeen London boroughs that form the cricket county of Middlesex and its surrounding areas.

The objectives of Middlesex in the Community are to promote community participation and engagement in cricket by providing and assisting in the provision of facilities (land, buildings & equipment) and activities that promote the advancement of health, education, community development and recreational sport for people residing, working, in education or visiting the 17 London Boroughs of Middlesex.

Activities we undertake

- To deliver programmes and use cricket as a vehicle in the community to advance the charity's objectives

- To provide grant assistance to cricket, education and community organisations to improve environments for cricket participation.

- To provide greater access to cricket opportunities for underrepresented groups.

- To increase the number of state schools engaged with cricket via coaching, teacher training and engagement offers.

- To train, mentor and support cricket’s workforce and volunteers.

Name: VITALISPORT
Description:
Somos VitaliSport, una empresa líder en soluciones integrales para la gestión deportiva y recreativa. 
En VitaliSport, nos dedicamos a ofrecer servicios excepcionales que abarcan todos los sectores, brindando soluciones especializadas en la gestión de eventos deportivos y recreativos con presencia a nivel nacional. 
Nuestra Misión: 
En VitaliSport, nuestra misión es clara: proporcionar soluciones de gestión de eventos deportivos y recreativos de primer nivel que trasciendan las expectativas. 
Nos enorgullece destacar nuestra capacidad para operar a nivel nacional, adaptándonos a diversos formatos de negocio y ofreciendo experiencias memorables en cada evento que gestionamos.

Lo que nos Define: 
•	Gestión de Torneos Deportivos: Desde la planificación hasta la ejecución impecable, nos aseguramos de que cada torneo deportivo sea una experiencia única y exitosa. 
•	Gestión de Eventos Recreativos: Creamos momentos inolvidables en eventos recreativos, diseñados para entretener y unir comunidades. 
•	Celebraciones Inolvidables: Ya sea un hito corporativo o una celebración comunitaria, damos vida a cada evento con profesionalismo y dedicación.

Por qué Elegir VitaliSport: 
•	Experiencia Nacional: Operamos en todo el país, llevando nuestras soluciones a comunidades de todos los rincones. 
•	Versatilidad Empresarial: Nos adaptamos a diferentes formatos de negocio, ofreciendo flexibilidad y personalización. 
•	Profesionalismo y Amabilidad: Mantenemos un tono formal y amigable, asegurando relaciones sólidas y duraderas con nuestros clientes.

Estamos emocionados por la oportunidad de colaborar con su empresa y llevar sus eventos al siguiente nivel. En VitaliSport, no solo gestionamos eventos, creamos experiencias que perduran en el tiempo.

Name: Indian Academy Of Sports Dentistry
Description:
Indian Academy for Sports Dentistry (IASD) an initiative by Indian Dental Association (IDA) is a forum for dental professionals interested in treating and preventing orofacial trauma; advising athletes and coaches on the importance of good oral health and its impact on performance and working with fellow professionals at major sporting events.

The intension behind initiating IASD was our findings that athletes have a neglected and underestimated Oral Health and it directly influences their performance. In the current era of competitiveness, even milliseconds count for winning medals, trophies or breaking records. Thus, Indian Academy for Sports Dentistry's Certified Dentists are the game-enhancers involved in the optimal performance of athletes.

Activities include the collection and dissemination of information on dental athletic injuries and the reinforcement of research on the prevention of dental injuries to athletes.

The IASD also hosts an annual symposium consisting of scientific and business sessions dealing with this growing health care concern.

Name: Robo-Pong by Newgy.com
Description:
Robo-Pong by Newgy.com is the World leader in Table Tennis (Ping-Pong) Robots. Robo-Pong is renowned for high quality, smartly engineered products that are also affordable as they are designed for in-home use.  

Robo-Pong by Newgy.com is an interactive robotic machine used to practice or play Table Tennis (Ping-Pong) anytime, no partner required! Robo-Pong is one of the best home-use products for family fitness, fun and entertainment as well as for competition training. Professional & Olympic players have utilized Rob-Pong to prepare for high level competition for over 30 years.

Multiple models available, Robo-Pong fits virtually any standard Ping-Pong tables or conversion top game table. It's easy to set up, use, take down, store when not in use or transport alternate locations.

In addition to the Robo-Pong, we also manufactures and sell a variety of other Table Tennis (Ping-Pong) products, supplies and equipment. Table Tennis balls, rackets, court barriers and other robot accessories, such as our original Pong-Pal, Robo-Tote & Robo-Caddy.

Our innovative Newgy products were originally designed to bring the game of Ping-Pong and the sport of Table Tennis into the mainstream USA market. Our intended goal was to elevate both the game and the sport to a level the rest of the world already recognizes.

Name: KASI
Description:
Named after the Swahili word for “speed,” KASI is a smartphone and smartwatch application that puts a sophisticated coach in runners’ ears, coaching them while they run. By leveraging real-time biometric data and AI coaching technology, KASI provides an immersive, personalized training experience that’s the closest thing to having a human coach. And if the runner already has a human coach who is far away, KASI revolutionizes remote coaching, enabling the coach to observe the athlete’s workout and coach him or her in real-time, even without being in person.
https://www.runkasi.com

Name: DISD (Dutch Institute for Self Defense)
Description:
The Dutch Institute for Self-Defense (DISD), founded in 2020 by Franklyn Hartkamp — the founder of Krav Maga in the Netherlands — empowers individuals through self-defense and resilience training. Building on decades of expertise, DISD offers high-quality programs rooted in Krav Maga to enhance well-being, safety, and preparedness.

Since introducing Krav Maga to the Netherlands in 1998, Franklyn has trained over 1,100 instructors globally, equipping professionals in law enforcement, education, healthcare, and security with real-world skills.

DISD’s mission is to make self-defense widely known, accessible, and accepted — not just as a personal safety tool, but as a life skill and inclusive sport embraced by communities.

Het Dutch Institute for Self-Defense (DISD), opgericht in 2020 door Franklyn Hartkamp — de grondlegger van Krav Maga in Nederland — versterkt individuen via training in zelfverdediging en weerbaarheid. Op basis van decennia aan expertise biedt DISD hoogwaardige programma’s die gericht zijn op welzijn, veiligheid en paraatheid.

Sinds hij Krav Maga in 1998 introduceerde in Nederland, heeft Franklyn meer dan 1.100 instructeurs wereldwijd opgeleid. Hij voorziet professionals in handhaving, onderwijs, zorg en beveiliging van essentiële vaardigheden voor de praktijk.

DISD heeft als missie om zelfverdediging breed bekend, toegankelijk en geaccepteerd te maken — niet alleen als middel tot persoonlijke veiligheid, maar ook als levensvaardigheid en inclusieve sport die door gemeenschappen wordt omarmd.

Name: SPORTAX PLUS
Description:

Con más de 490 m2, Sportax presenta los diferentes departamentos: Fisioterapia y osteopatía, Entrenamiento personal, Nutrición clínica y deportiva, tecnificaciones, formación deportiva, psicología deportiva, Podología y biomecánica y medicina deportiva

Name: Pushing Horizons: Step by step
Description: Pushing Horizons: Step by Step is a podcast about how running transforms lives. I’m Ashish Pant, and running changed mine, one step at a time. Through honest conversations with fellow runners, we explore stories of growth, grit, and inspiration. I created this podcast in the hope that these voices spark something in you, just as they did in me. Whether you're new to running or a seasoned marathoner, join us as we dig into the heart of the run and keep pushing our own horizons, together, step by step. Every stride holds a story, and every story has the power to move us forward.

Name: Pilates Stube GmbH

Kraftaufbau, Schmerzlinderung, Steigerung der Beweglichkeit – ob im Personal Training oder in den Kleingruppen, deine Bedürfnisse stehen bei uns an erster Stelle.
 
Wir bieten dir aber viel mehr als Körpertraining und versprechen nicht nur Muskelkater, sondern ein ganz neues Körpergefühl.

Die Pilates Stube in urbaner Atmosphäre ist ein mit Liebe und Klarheit gestalteter Kraft-Ort für Körper und Geist. Ready – Set – Glow? Gerne beraten wir dich persönlich.

Name: Pacific Rover LLC
Description: Embark on a journey of unparalleled fly fishing and spearfishing adventures with Pacific Rover LLC. Our meticulously crafted trips extend across diverse and picturesque locations, including the vibrant waters of Mexico, the rugged landscapes of Alaska, the scenic beauty of Washington, and the coastal allure of California. Whether you're seeking the thrill of chasing trophy fish or the serene tranquility of high-elevation lakes, our expertly guided excursions cater to both fly fishing and spearfishing enthusiasts. At Pacific Rover, we go beyond the catch, offering valuable insights into casting techniques, gear selection, and the fundamentals of river entomology. Our team is dedicated to ensuring an immersive and educational experience, allowing you to elevate your skills while exploring some of the most captivating fishing destinations. Join us at Pacific Rover LLC where each trip is a harmonious blend of expertise, excitement, and the natural beauty that defines these remarkable fishing grounds.

Name: KVS PT
Description:
KVS Personal Training – Jouw reis naar een gezonder en sterker lichaam

Bij KVS Personal Training helpen we mannen en vrouwen die willen aankomen in spiermassa of vetmassa willen afvallen, om hun persoonlijke fitnessdoelen te bereiken. Met een 1-op-1 aanpak, gepersonaliseerde trainingsschema’s en 6-wekelijkse metingen, bieden wij een holistische benadering gericht op leefstijlverbetering.

Onze missie is om gemotiveerde individuen te begeleiden bij het transformeren van hun fysieke gezondheid en welzijn. Met jarenlange ervaring, NASM-gecertificeerde trainers en een op maat gemaakte aanpak, zorgen wij voor duurzame resultaten en langdurig succes.

Wat bieden wij?

Persoonlijke begeleiding gericht op jouw doelen.
1-op-1 training voor optimale focus en motivatie.
Gepersonaliseerde trainingsschema’s en leefstijladvies.
6-wekelijkse metingen om vorderingen te monitoren.
KVS Personal Training staat voor kwaliteit, toewijding en resultaatgericht werken.

Ben jij klaar om jouw fysieke doelen te bereiken? Neem vandaag nog contact met ons op voor een gratis intake en ontdek hoe wij jou kunnen helpen.

Name: Total Soccer eXperience
Description:
Becoming the greatest version of yourself is all we can ever hope to do.  Some players will be born with attributes such as speed, insight and competitive personalities. However, the one attribute no one is born with is TECHNIQUE.  This is exactly what Total Soccer addresses, because it’s what everyone needs. The amazing part is that once the technique is addressed, that same player will suddenly experience growth in foot speed, with more comfort they will see the game more clearly and the better they perform the more their confidence and competitiveness they will demonstrate in each game.

Programs such as:

Description:
Akademi İstanbul, 2003 yılından bugüne, 6-18 yaş arası çocuklara ve gençlere yönelik sportif çalışmalar yapan, bireysel gelişimlerine olumlu yönde katkı sağlayan, güvenilir ve tecrübeli, hayat boyu unutulmayacak deneyimler sunan büyük bir ailedir.

Geçtiğimiz 20 yıl içerisinde, çocuk ve gençlere yönelik sportif eğitim hizmetleri ve Türkiye genelinde sportif organizasyonlar düzenleyen Akademi İstanbul; 2011 yılı itibariyle spor kulübü olarak da faaliyete geçmiş olup, basketbol ve voleybol okulu çalışmaları, sömestir dönemlerinde kayak ve snowboard eğitimleri, Basketbol Turnuvaları, hafta sonu spor eğitimi organizasyonları, yaz dönemlerinde rüzgar sörfü kampları, yurtdışı spor organizasyonları düzenlemekte, her yıl yüzlerce çocuk ve gencin tatillerine heyecan katmaktadır.

Name: Kenosha Community Sailing Center
Description:
The Kenosha Community Sailing Center (KCSC) is organized exclusively for charitable, scientific and educational purposes. More specifically it is a collaborative effort between local organizations and schools. Its goal is to educate Kenosha youth in the sport of sailing while integrating academic, leadership and life skills.

The KCSC also promotes awareness of and access to the Kenosha Harbor and Lake Michigan’s resources and environment for people of all ages through the sport of sailing.

The KCSC is a nonprofit group of sailors who want to share our love of Lake Michigan with all of Kenosha.

Name: loopritme
Description:
Als werkgever heb je op allerlei manieren baat bij fitte werknemers. Ze zijn lichamelijk en mentaal flexibeler. Productiever en energieker. Én beter bestand tegen drukte. Een werkgever die zorgt voor fitte werknemers profiteert algauw van minder ziekteverzuim en van de lagere kosten die daarvan het resultaat zijn. En als je als werkgever een investering doet in de fitheid van je werknemers, voelen diezelfde werknemers zich meer gewaardeerd en sterker betrokken bij het bedrijf, de organisatie of de instelling. 

Genoeg redenen dus om in te zetten op een fitte werkvloer! Daarmee helpt loopritme,  met hardloopprogramma’s op maat.

Name: ARC Running
Description: ARC Running seeks to guide all runners toward healthier running. This is achieved not only through running form analysis and training design, but physical therapy where runners can Assess, Rehabilitate, and Condition (ARC) their running pain through a proven set of recovery modules. Runners may purchase a membership to access the complete set of our self-guided tools as well as book personalized services with a physical therapist and/or running coach.

Name: Martial Arts University
Description:
At Martial Arts University, our mission is to bring the discipline, skills, and knowledge of martial arts to anyone around the globe through innovative and engaging online education. We offer a diverse range of martial arts styles, all from the comfort of your home. Our comprehensive curriculum includes a variety of martial arts styles from different cultures and traditions. Our online model allows you to learn at your own pace, on your own schedule. With a combination of live classes, recorded sessions, and interactive forums, you can fit your training around your lifestyle. Join a global community of martial arts enthusiasts. At Martial Arts University, you are never alone in your journey. Engage with fellow students and receive personalized feedback. Our supportive environment is designed to keep you motivated and connected. At Martial Arts University, we believe that the spirit of martial arts transcends physical boundaries. Join us and become part of a legacy of excellence, tradition, and continuous growth.

Martial Arts University

Name: Kitesurf Technologies
Description:
Kitesurf Technologies is a startup that is revolutionizing the world of kitesurfing by creating an immersive, hyper-realistic indoor simulator that allows users to practice and improve their skills anytime, anywhere. Our innovative solution aims to make kitesurfing accessible to everyone, regardless of location or weather conditions, and we believe it will be a game-changer in the industry. With our advanced technology, users can experience the thrill of kitesurfing without being limited by traditional barriers. 

One of the main challenges of learning kitesurfing is the lack of accessibility, particularly for those who live far from instructors or bodies of water and are limited by weather conditions. This can make the learning process difficult and frustrating. Our immersive kitesurf simulator solves this problem by providing users with the opportunity to practice and improve their skills anytime, anywhere. The realistic, immersive experience offered by our simulator makes the learning curve smoother and allows users to enjoy the sport regardless of their location.

Kitesurf Technologies offers a personalized and modular learning experience to help users improve their skills and progress at their own pace. Our system assesses each student's skill level and recommends an appropriate starting point. As the student masters each skill, the system unlocks new levels, allowing the student to gradually advance to more challenging settings. This flexible approach helps students learn at their own pace and ensures that they are continuously challenged and motivated to improve.

Name: Ric Fit
Description:
Originally from Long Island, New York, I - Eric Friedlander - have been playing football for about 23 years and have been in the fitness industry for about 13 years. 

I am currently playing professionally in Latvia, and have experience all over Europe. 

I started Ric Fit 6.5 years ago with ONE purpose : to help footballers from all backgrounds and ages get the best results in the most efficient way possible in order to reach their full potential.

What drives me? Making the world healthier and happier, one person at a time. 

The investment of time in both football & fitness has absolutely changed my life for the better! The beautiful game has taught me a lot about myself, others and life as a whole.

The biggest lesson this journey has taught me : if you work extremely hard, and you are disciplined, patient, persistent and you never give up, anything is possible!  

Along with my professional career, I decided to become a Personal Trainer after realizing how much fitness has improved my life. I now want to help others improve their lives as well.

With the right mindset, training, nutrition and recovery, I am positive anyone will feel better, move better, look better & perform better.

Who doesn’t want that?

And the best part? 

All of the knowledge I’ve gained over the years is in the Ric Fit Academy App. 

Whether you’re a player, parent, coach or club - our innovative features will bring you and your team’s performance to the next level. 

Want in ? You’ll love it - guaranteed.
→ ricfitacademy.com

Name: AIN'T WE WOMEN (Association)
Description:
Fondée en 2020, Ain’t We Women est une association féminine engagée pour l’épanouissement des femmes à travers le sport, la culture, le bien-être et la créativité.

Nos actions visent à lutter contre l’isolement, favoriser la confiance en soi, encourager l’expression et l’autonomie, pour toutes les femmes qu'importe l'âge, la résidence, la profession ou encore les croyances.

Nous défendons un accès au sport plus inclusif, libérateur et accessible, tout en combinant d’autres leviers d’émancipation comme l’art, la parole, la solidarité et la mise en mouvement.

Nos formats sont variés : activités sportives, ateliers créatifs, événements solidaires, cercles d’échange, accompagnement individuel et collectif.

L’association a déjà permis à plusieurs centaines de femmes de sortir de l’isolement, de développer leur confiance en elles et de créer des liens durables au sein d’une communauté bienveillante et inclusive.

Notre approche est joyeuse, bienveillante et portée par la sororité.

Notre objectif : offrir à chaque femme un espace pour se révéler, bouger, créer, s’affirmer.

Name: Dean Greenwood Swim School
Description:
At Dean Greenwood Swim School (DGSS), we do more than teach swimming — we develop people.

For over 30 years, DGSS has been a trusted leader in swim education and water safety, now operating across six indoor pool sites throughout Auckland. Our purpose is simple and powerful: teaching skills for life — not only for our swimmers, but for our team as well.

We’re proud to be a values-led organisation that puts people first. Our instructors, lifeguards, customer service teams, and leaders are supported to grow in confidence, capability, and leadership, whether they’re just starting out or building a long-term career in aquatics, education, or people leadership.

 Our Values
Our values shape how we work together and how we show up for our swimmers, families, and communities:

Teamwork: We support one another and work collaboratively across our six sites
Communication: We value clear, respectful, and open communication at all levels
Commitment: We take pride in our work and consistently deliver high-quality experiences
Positive Attitude: We bring energy, optimism, and a solutions-focused mindset to what we do
Initiative: We take ownership, show leadership, and look for ways to improve

 Our Work
Across our six Auckland locations, our teams deliver high-quality swimming and water safety programmes for all ages and abilities — from babies and preschoolers through to school-age swimmers, adults, and inclusive programmes. Every role at DGSS plays a part in helping people feel safe, capable, and confident in and around the water.

Name: SOCATOTS Nederland
Description:
SOCATOTS is het grootste bewegingsprogramma voor kinderen van 1 tot 5 jaar, geïnspireerd door voetbal.

Wereldwijd nemen meer dan 2 miljoen kinderen uit 60 landen wekelijks deel aan SOCATOTS lessen.

Wij zien dat kinderen steeds minder in beweging zijn met alle gevolgen van dien. De missie van SOCATOTS Nederland is om onze kinderen te leren dat sporten en bewegen bij het leven hoort en vooral erg leuk is. Dit doen we door, op een zo vroeg mogelijke leeftijd, bewegingslessen aan te bieden zodat sporten en bewegen natuurlijk gedrag wordt. 

Ons belangrijkste doel is om de motorische, mentale en sociale ontwikkeling van kinderen te bevorderen met voetbal als grootste inspiratiebron.

De actieve deelname van de ouder of voogd is verplicht en vormt een essentieel onderdeel van ons programma. Het zorgt ervoor dat de band tussen ouder en kind wordt versterkt. Onderzoek heeft aangetoond dat dit een zeer positieve bijdrage heeft op het zelfvertrouwen en gevoel van eigenwaarde van kinderen. 

Tijdens het SOCATOTS programma ontwikkelen kinderen o.a. hun motoriek, lenigheid, taal en coördinatie. Zij leren het herkennen van letters, cijfers, kleuren en het verschil tussen links en rechts. 

Er wordt aandacht besteed aan 6 onderdelen van beide voeten waarbij de basisvaardigheden van het voetbal aan bod komen. 

Dit alles door samen vooral plezier te maken in een veilige leeromgeving, zonder enige vorm van competitie onder leiding van gekwalificeerde coaches. 

Elk kind ontvangt een SOCATOTS tenue.

Name: Calgary Rangers Soccer Club and Sports Association
Description:
The Calgary Rangers Soccer Club and Sports Association (referred to by members as “Rangers,” “the Rangers,” “Rangers Soccer Club,” or “RSC”) was incorporated as a society in Alberta in 2001 to provide recreational and competitive opportunities for children throughout Calgary through the sport of soccer.

Our philosophy is and continues to be to provide all of our youth with the opportunity to play soccer while delivering quality instruction. This philosophy to succeed is based on developing soccer skills in an environment that is fun and encourages risk taking and creativity.

The history of the Calgary Rangers Soccer Club begins far before 2001. Our organization started as a grassroots House League program operated by the Strathcona Community Association. For almost 20 years, the House League tradition has continued, allowing young players to experience soccer in a place where fun is first and foremost. Today, the organization has grown to support teams of both genders in the Calgary Minor Soccer Association (CMSA) tiers. Also, it includes several Adult Men and Adult Women teams, which play in the Calgary United Soccer Association (CUSA) and Calgary Women’s Soccer Association (CWSA), respectively.

The organization has not forgotten its roots and continues to run one of the largest House League programs in the city. Rangers also pioneered the concept of Under 4 Soccer, a program offered now in both Indoor and Outdoor for players age 3.

There are many reasons why Rangers as an organization is unique. Unlike many organizations, we offer technical excellence through our academy Program to all members, House League or CMSA. While sessions are optional, the Academy Staff provide expertise in various areas for every age level in our organization.

We also offer many unique opportunities, such as summer camps, Tours and travel experiences. Our mission is to serve the Rangers community by providing soccer programs for ages three to sixty-three.

Welcome to our community.

Name: AIPTA
Description:
AIPTA is an AI-powered SaaS platform built for gyms, trainers, and physiotherapy clinics to deliver real-time movement correction, injury prevention, and recovery-focused workouts. Using camera-based pose estimation, AIPTA tracks posture, joint angles, and range of motion during exercises, offering instant feedback like “Straighten your spine” or “Knees too far forward,” ensuring users perform movements safely and effectively.

Designed for both general fitness and post-injury rehabilitation, AIPTA helps clients recovering from conditions like ACL tears, slip disc, or shoulder injuries follow guided, corrective routines built by their trainers or physios. Every movement is tracked, scored, and stored, helping professionals monitor progress remotely and reduce the risk of re-injury.

The trainer dashboard allows for assigning custom routines, viewing error heatmaps, and analyzing improvement trends. Users access workouts via their phone, tablet, or gym kiosk, making it seamless whether in-clinic or at home.

AIPTA blends the precision of AI with the expertise of human coaches, transforming how gyms and clinics deliver personalized training, at scale.

Description:

Ob im Stadtpark, auf dem Campingplatz oder als Spielplatz-Ergänzung: Die SpieleBoxx wertet öffentliche Flächen und Plätze auf und erhöht die Lebensqualität für Jung und Alt. Von Sportgeräten wie Frisbee und Fußball über Sandspielzeug bis hin zu Springseilen und Beachball: Bei der Befüllung der Fächer sind dem Betreiber kaum Grenzen gesetzt. So fügt sich jede SpieleBoxx perfekt in die Umgebung, in der sie steht.


Vorteile auf einen Blick:

    Ort der Aufstellung beliebig wählbar
    Kein Stromanschluss erforderlich
    Kein Internetanschluss erforderlich
    Keine Betriebskosten, keine Gebühren
    Freie Wahl der Spiele
    Nachverfolgbarkeit & Nutzungsstatistiken


So geht's:

1. QR Code an der Tür per Smartphone scannen
2. Dauer der Ausleihe wählen und Mietzeitraum bezahlen
3. Schloss per Bluetooth öffnen und Artikel entnehmen
4. Zum Ende des Mietzeitraums Schloss erneut öffnen und Artikel zurücklegen


Produktdetails:

-Einzeln zu öffnende Fächer mit Flügeltür
-Digitale Schließtechnik mit Bluetooth-Schlössern mit je einer CR123A Batterie
-Fronten und Korpus aus pulverbeschichtetem Stahlblech
-Sichtfenster aus pflegeleichtem und bruchsichreren Acrylglas
-Lichtgraue Verkleidung als Witterungsschutz


Technische Basis:

Die SpieleBoxx setzt für die technische Abwicklung auf das digitale Betriebssystem chayns. Dadurch ist nicht nur ein robuster Betrieb, sondern zugleich eine permanente technische Weiterentwicklung gewährleistet. Über 4,5 Millionen Menschen besitzen bereits ihre eigene chayns.ID, mit der sie die SpieleBoxx nutzen können. Und für alle anderen ist sie per Single Sign On in Sekundenschnelle erstellt.

Name: Evolution Performance
Description:
In today’s high-pressure world, whether you’re leading a business, a team, or performing on the field, the ability to stay calm, focused, and resilient under stress is what separates good from great.

Professionals, business owners and high performers face relentless demands and complex decisions. Athletes and coaches navigate intense competition, expectations, and constant performance scrutiny. In both arenas, stress, expectations and pressure is high and often we either don't have the awareness or tools to manage this or we just don't take the time to prioritise ourselves. 

That’s why I founded Evolution Performance: to bridge the gap between elite sport and corporate performance. With over 20 years of experience coaching athletes and leaders, I help high performers develop the mindset, systems, and habits needed to thrive under pressure and succeed personally and professionally.

Our flagship “Thrive Under Pressure” workshops blend nature-based challenges with evidence-based mindset training, resilience tools, and performance breathing practices. The result: improved decision-making in high-stakes situations, reduced stress and burnout, and stronger, more connected teams.

Alongside our group experiences, I work one-to-one with athletes, executives, and teams, helping them manage well-being, balance ambition with recovery, and build sustainable high performance that lasts beyond any single season, event, or project.

If you’re a leader, HR/L&D professional, coach, or athlete ready to perform at your best without burning out let’s connect and explore how we can build your capacity to thrive under pressure.

Name: PAGOJO
Description:
Unentdeckte Potenziale freischalten!

Der Nutzen der Kampfkunst geht weit über die körperliche Betüchtigung hinaus:

Werte, Mindset, Psychologie, Methoden & Strategie 

Dies sind Anspekte, die in der Kampfkunst ebenfalls gelehrt werden und einen großen Einfluss auf die Art und Weise haben können, 
wie wir das Leben und die Arbeitswelt meistern.

Nicht umsonst sind Werke wie  "sunzi - die Kunst des Krieges"
im asiatischen Raum ein Standartwerk für alle erfolgreichen Geschäftsleute.

Mit unseren Workshops & Coachings, kannst du Impulse in deinem Unternehmen setzen, ganz neue Perspektiven einnehmen und neue Wege beschreiten.

Was bieten wir an?

- Teambuildingevents
- Selbstverteidigungskurse
- Yin Yang -> die Kunst, mit Weißheit die 
richtigen Entscheidungen zu treffen 

- STARKE Mitarbeiter! Selbstbewusstsein aufbauen

- Resilienz & Burnout Prävention
Emotionen erkennen und verstehen

- Effektivität & Lean Thinking Prinzipien in der Kampfkunst

- Nein sagen können!
Mangelnde Konfliktfähigkeit abschaffen
und Grenzen zwischen Mitarbeitern wahren

Der Elemente-Workshop:

Lerne dich und dein Team besser kennen.

Was macht euch aus?
Was macht dich aus?

Welche Stärken und Schwächen hat jeder Einzelne und warum ist das eigentlich so?

Warum ist der eine immer pünktlich, während der nächste grundsätzlich 5 Minuten zu spät zum Meeting kommt?

Wie kann man das Konfliktpotenzial innerhalb der Teams minimieren?

Die Lösung liegt dabei auf der Hand:  Verstehe dein Gegenüber und dich selbst.

Eine gemeinsame Verständnisgrundlage kann die Zusammenarbeit vollkommen verändern.

We offer multiple climb and route options including: 
- Climb Aconcagua in 12 Days
- Climb Aconcagua in 12 Days with Oxygen
- Ameghino Valley Route
- Polish Glacier Direct Route w/ traverse
- Normal Route w/ porters

We also offer guided climbs throughout the Andes including:
- Ojos Del Salado (22,615ft)
- Nevado Juncal (20,163ft)
- Tupungato Volcano (21,681ft)
- Bolivia Classic Climbs (Pequeno Alpamayo - 17,618ft, Huayana Potosi - 19,974ft, and Illimani - 20,201ft)
- Bolivia Technical Climbs (Illimani - 21,201ft, Ancohuma - 21,095ft and Illampu - 20,873ft)

Name: Run with Marjolein
Description:
Houd jij ook zo van hardlopen? Ben je geïnteresseerd in een gezonde, actieve leefstijl en balans tussen lichaam en geest? Wil je je graag bekwamen in de levenskunst?

Lees dan op Run with Marjolein mee over wat hardlopen je kan leren over persoonlijke groei en transformatie. 

Naast blogs met tips over levenskunst & hardlopen, bied ik binnenkort running therapy aan, zodra ik mijn opleiding tot gecertificeerd running therapist heb afgerond. 

Running therapy zet hardlopen in als therapie bij klachten als stress, burn-out en depressie. Ideaal voor mensen wat ondersteuning kunnen gebruiken om letterlijk en figuurlijk in beweging te komen. 

Stuur me een bericht als je meer wilt weten over hardlopen, runningtherapie of wilt samenwerken! Ik vind het leuk om van je te horen!
