Name: Crazy Running
Description:
Crazy Running offers fun running, track and field and conditioning programs for athletes of all ages, starting at 3! Challenging exercise is made fun and age-appropriate. We Play Crazy, Run Hard!

We’re all about sparking driven, passionate, athletic lifestyles! Our one-hour programs are typically one or two days a week for 8 weeks. Athletes can train with us year-round through various conditioning and speed & agility programs: Winter Conditioning, Spring Training, Youth Summer Speedsters and Track & Field, Adult Summer Strength & Speed, Fall Training, Family Training, Team Building & Special Events, and Personal Training. While offerings may vary by location, the fun and fitness stay the same!

If you’re looking for a fulfilling career that merges your passion for sports with the excitement of entrepreneurship, consider the Crazy Running franchise! We’re on a mission to improve the health and futures of our communities through running!

Name: Divers & Co.
Description:
Divers & Co is a premier 5-Star PDI IDC dive center located in Egypt in both Cairo and Hurghada city, offering a full range of diving services for divers of all experience levels. From beginner courses to advanced certifications, Divers & Co's team of qualified instructors are dedicated to providing a safe and educational experience for all guests.

One of the standout features of Divers & Co is Serenity Liveaboard boat. Serenity Liveaboard offers a unique and unforgettable diving safari experience in the Red Sea region in Egypt. With a variety of trip options to choose from, guests can explore some of the best dive sites in the area. With comfortable cabins, delicious on-board dining options, and a professional crew, Serenity Liveaboard provides a truly unforgettable and immersive dive experience.

In addition to its well-trained crew, the Serenity Liveaboard is equipped with all necessary safety equipment, including life jackets, emergency oxygen, first aid kits, fire system, and communication devices. The vessel also adheres to strict safety protocols and procedures to ensure that all dives are conducted in a safe and controlled manner.

Join Divers & Co. Serenity Liveaboard Boat for an adventure of a lifetime as you explore the wonders of Egypt’s Red Sea underwater world in comfort and style.

Name: Christian Melucci Coach & Bike Fitting
Description:
Sono qui per supportarti in ogni passo del tuo percorso. Il mio impegno è aiutarti a scoprire il tuo potenziale, a superare le tue sfide e a goderti ogni momento del tuo viaggio sportivo. Con dedizione, passione e una guida esperta, raggiungerai i tuoi traguardi e scoprirai nuove vette di successo personale e atletico.

Sarò un supporto tecnico anche per la tua posizione in sella:

Personalizzazione: Ogni atleta è unico. Il mio approccio è altamente personalizzato, adattando le analisi e le soluzioni biomeccaniche alle caratteristiche specifiche di ciascun individuo.

Precisione: Utilizzo tecnologie all'avanguardia per effettuare misurazioni precise e fornire raccomandazioni basate su dati accurati.

Prevenzione: Un corretto posizionamento e una buona tecnica possono prevenire una serie di infortuni comuni nel ciclismo. La prevenzione è sempre meglio della cura.

Educazione: Mi impegno a educare gli atleti su come il loro corpo si muove e come possono migliorare la loro tecnica per ottenere migliori risultati e maggiore comfort.

Inizia oggi a migliorare la tua esperienza ciclistica. 
Con il giusto supporto biomeccanico, puoi pedalare più forte, più a lungo e con maggiore comfort. 
Alleniamoci insieme per trasformare i tuoi sogni in realtà e per raggiungere - e superare - qualsiasi tuo obiettivo. Sono qui per te, pronto a motivarti, guidarti e celebrare ogni tuo successo.

Ti aspetto per iniziare questo straordinario viaggio insieme. Facciamo squadra e conquistiamo la tua linea di arrivo!

www.christianmelucci.com
www.ergomotionlab.it

Name: GO2COACH
Description:
Go2Coach – Train. Empower. Elevate.

Go2Coach is a cutting-edge sports training platform transforming how coaches, academies, sports clubs, and schools deliver athlete development. We bridge the gap between in-person coaching and digital tools, making structured, high-quality training accessible anytime, anywhere.

Our mission: make elite-level training accessible, scalable, and personalised so every athlete can train like a pro year-round.

Who We Help:

Coaches & Academies   – Upload and assign drills, track progress, monetise your expertise, and expand your reach.
Schools & Clubs – Standardise training, support volunteer coaches, and centralise resources.
Athletes – Access elite programs, repeat drills, track improvement, and stay motivated.

Key Features:

 - Upload custom videos and programs
 - Assign training to individuals or teams
 - Monitor progress and provide feedback
 - Access ready-to-use drills for multiple sports
 - White-label branding for organisations

From basketball shooting programs to grassroots sports skills, Go2Coach helps players master fundamentals, boost performance, and maintain momentum between seasons. Our technology is cloud-based, interactive, and scalable, supporting single teams to nationwide programs.

Why Go2Coach:

 - Year-round athlete engagement
 - New revenue opportunities
 - Stronger brand positioning
 - Time savings for coaches

We work with professional athletes, schools, and academies across Australia and are expanding into India, Indonesia, and North America.

Train. Empower. Elevate.

#SportsTechnology #AthleteDevelopment #Go2Coach #TrainEmpowerElevate #YouthSports #Coaching #SportsAcademy #PlayerDevelopment #SportsInnovation

Name: Nautic Holidays
Description:
L’histoire a commencé en 2012 avec l’idée de créer un centre de formation pour former les moniteurs de jet ski suite a un cruel manque de places en centres et surtout des formations négligées. Suite à plusieurs échecs de demande d’agrément dans un secteur relativement verrouillé, l’idée de créer Nautic Holidays est arrivée en 2016.

Devenir centre de formation BPJEPS Motonautisme étant compliqué nous nous orientons sur les séjours de vacances spécialisé dans le nautisme afin de devenir la référence dans les activités nautiques. L’accueil de groupes d’enfants en centre de loisirs ou scolaires est possible et grâce à nos compétences d’encadrement, nous sommes sollicités pour intervenir sur des séminaires d’entreprise dans tous le Sud-Ouest.

2020, l’année ou tout se concrétise, nous intégrons un local en bas du port de Capbreton, faisons des travaux afin d’avoir enfin un bureau pour accueillir nos clients. Nous construisons une salle de cours et l’histoire des permis bateau commence.

Effectivement notre équipe de formateurs déjà enseignants depuis 2012 rend crédible ce nouveau secteur d’activité qui comprend le permis côtier, le permis fluvial/eaux intérieures, le permis hauturier, le CRR ainsi que les cours de perfectionnement à la navigation et mise en main de votre bateau.

Étant maintenant habilité centre de formation, nous lançons la formation des métiers du sport plus connu sous le sigle de BPJEPS (Brevet Professionnel de la Jeunesse, de l’Éducation Populaire et du Sport) afin d’être Éducateur Sportif dans une discipline choisi (Motonautisme, Activités de la Forme).

Toujours en restant dans notre philosophie, qui est de dispenser de la formation de qualité, avec différents formateurs, chacun les meilleurs dans leur domaine.

Même si ce n’est plus notre activité principale, nous serons toujours ravis d’organiser sur mesure vos séjours de vacances, séminaires ou/et événements grâce à notre carnet d’adresse qui regorge d’activités & lieux insolites...

Name: MindLeague Sport & Salute Mentale
Description:
MindLeague è la prima piattaforma formativa gratuita dedicata agli operatori sportivi per renderli consapevoli ed efficaci nell’esercizio del proprio ruolo educativo, portando la salute mentale al centro del percorso sportivo dei giovani atleti. Nasce da una visione chiara: la salute mentale è un diritto, non un privilegio, e lo sport può diventare uno dei luoghi più potenti per favorirla e tutelarla.
Lavoriamo su un principio semplice: gli allenatori sono tra i punti di contatto più influenti nella vita di un adolescente. Per questo offriamo strumenti applicabili, progettati con linguaggio sport-specifico, affinché ogni allenatore possa riconoscere segnali di disagio, comunicare con maggiore consapevolezza e creare un ambiente dove ogni atleta si senta visto, accolto e capace di crescere.
Il nostro modello formativo gratuito rende la conoscenza accessibile anche alle realtà sportive più piccole, perché il benessere non deve dipendere dal budget di una società, ma dalla qualità della relazione che un allenatore costruisce con i suoi atleti.
MindLeague sfida la vecchia cultura sportiva che separa benessere psicofisico e performance. Noi crediamo che la vera forza nasca dall’incontro tra tecnica, relazione e consapevolezza emotiva. Così consentiamo agli allenatori di poter esercitare consapevolmente il proprio ruolo educativo, generando un impatto sociale reale sulla comunità giovanile.
Perché oggi più che mai, La Salute Mentale scende in Campo.

Name: OCR Macedonia
Description:
OCR Macedonia is the leading obstacle course racing (OCR) organization in Macedonia, dedicated to promoting physical endurance, teamwork, and outdoor adventure. Established in 2019, we have become a hub for athletes and fitness enthusiasts from Macedonia and beyond, hosting thrilling races that challenge participants to push their limits in diverse and scenic locations.  

Our Mission: 
To create unforgettable OCR experiences that inspire people to embrace challenges, foster resilience, and build a strong, supportive sports community in Macedonia.  

Our Achievements:
- Hosted 4 successful races since 2021, with growing participation each year.  
- Welcomed athletes from across Europe, including Serbia, Italy, and Kosovo, to our events.  
- Collaborated with local and international businesses to strengthen the OCR community.  
- Officially recognized by World Obstacle (FISO) and the European Obstacle Sports Federation as the national governing body for obstacle sports in Macedonia.  

Why Choose OCR Macedonia? 
- Challenging Courses: Our races feature a mix of physical and mental challenges designed for participants of all skill levels.  
- Stunning Locations: From mountain trails to park forests, we showcase Macedonia’s natural beauty.  
- Community Spirit: Join a network of passionate athletes, volunteers, and supporters who value teamwork and perseverance.  
- Professional Organization: We prioritize safety, inclusivity, and unforgettable experiences at every event.  

Whether you're an athlete looking to test your limits, a company seeking team-building opportunities, or a brand interested in sponsoring dynamic events, OCR Macedonia is your gateway to the thrilling world of obstacle course racing.  

Join us in our mission to push boundaries and build a stronger, fitter community!

Name: Aloha Tri
Description:
Triathlon coaching with Aloha spirit!

We help you achieve your racing and fitness goals via expert coaching, bespoke programmes and good dose of inspiration. Get faster, build endurance, learn good technique with our support and you will see results fast!  

Our triathlon coaching ethos is based on Aloha Spirit. The Aloha Spirit refers to a powerful way to resolve any problem, accomplish any goal, and to achieve any state of mind or body that you desire. 

Whether you are looking for a triathlon coach or need help with the individual sports – swimming, cycling or running – we have the experience and track record you need. Join our global team of athletes of all ages to make this year your fittest and most successful yet!


ABOUT US:
Founder and head coach Rav Dighe has been a triathlete since 1982. One of his first big races was the Chicago Triathlon in 1984 at the age of 16. He has represented England at both the European and world long distance triathlon championships and raced in over 18 Ironman races, as well as over 300 multisport events globally. 
In Oct. 2016, he competed in the Ironman World Championships in Kona, Hawaii. 

After 20 years in IT and a decade of coaching, he became a full time triathlon coach in 2015. He holds British Triathlon Level 2, TrainingPeaks and Ironman University coaching certificates.

 Do swimming lessons take away valuable learning time due to travel?
 Are you restricted by limited pool availability or forced to choose which year group can attend?

We have a better solution.

Introducing our on-site pop-up swimming pool service — a fully equipped, high-quality setup delivered straight to your school.

 We provide:

A heated pool within a professional marquee
A qualified Level 2 swimming instructor
All necessary equipment and documentation

A structured timetable of 30-minute lessons for groups of up to 10 pupils

 Plus, we can also offer after-school club options twice a week to support:

Private lessons at discounted rates
Junior Lifesaving sessions
or other revenue-generating activities

 Interested in finding out more? Let’s talk. Share your preferred days and times, and we’ll visit your site to discuss options and assess the best location for your pop-up pool.

Let’s make swimming accessible, fun, and stress-free — right at your school.
#SwimmingEducation #SchoolSwimming #PopUpPool #CurriculumGoals #OnSiteLearning #EducationSolutions

Name: Open Spaces Sports Group
Description:
Open Spaces Sports Group is a dynamic sports organisation focused on revolutionising the sports industry in Ghana and West Africa. Our mission is to create opportunities for aspiring athletes and nurture their talent, ultimately contributing to the growth of sports in the region.

At OSSG, we are passionate about developing grassroots sports, particularly football, and providing a platform for young athletes and to pursue their dreams of becoming professional players. We believe that through sports, we can empower individuals, foster community engagement, and promote healthy lifestyles.

Our comprehensive approach includes the establishment of non-league football leagues, youth academies, player transfer agencies, and the development of top-notch sports facilities across the country. In addition, we have ventured into the exciting real of eSports, allowing us to tap into the growing global phenomenon and provide aspiring gamers with opportunities to compete at an international level.

With a dedicated team of experts and strategic partnerships with industry leaders, OSSG is committed to creating a sustainable and impactful sports ecosystem. Join us on this exhilarating journey as we shape the future of sports in Ghana and West Africa.

#SportsDevelopment #GrassrootsFootball #EmpoweringAthletes #eSports #CommunityEngagement

Name: Cal Sailing Club
Description:
The Cal Sailing Club is a non-profit, volunteer-run sailing and windsurfing club that offers lessons, recreation, and free programs for the general public and for summer programs. Members get lessons and, after achieving ratings, use of the club's fleet of 26 dinghies, 6 keelboats and 80 windsurfing boards including novice, intermediate, and advanced designs. Located on the south side of the Berkeley Marina, CSC's major activity is teaching sailing and windsurfing safety.

The club's programs for the general public and organized groups include Introductory Sails, land sailing school (in cooperation with the Nature Center and the Pegasus Project), summer sailing for youth groups including Berkeley and Albany YMCA's and Berkeley Youth Alternatives, windsurfing seminars, lectures, and clinics. These services are provided by club volunteers.

Membership dues and volunteer work provide access to lessons and recreational use of the club's equipment. There are no charges for lessons or use of equipment. Members have to pass rating tests and contribute work in order to achieve ratings. Qualified members can bring non-member friends out sailing as their guests.

Name: Pickleball Xpress

Our Commitment to Excellence

Unmatched Amenities

Coaching Expertise

Our team of dedicated instructors, including the accomplished Amie Crisera, a stalwart in the local sports community, is here to guide players in honing their skills. Regardless of your skill level, our coaching team is committed to your success.

Events and Tournaments

For those who thrive on competition, we offer an exciting calendar of events and tournaments. However, we also recognize that pickleball is as much about fun as it is about winning. Social gatherings, themed tournaments, and community-building activities ensure there's something for everyone.

Location and Accessibility

Situated conveniently in the heart of the Northeast, our facility is easily accessible to locals and neighboring areas. We're proud to serve the region's pickleball community and be an integral part of the vibrant sports scene.

A Place to Connect

Pickleball Xpress is more than a facility; it's a place to connect. Here, a diverse group of individuals, all brought together by their shared love for pickleball, form friendships, hone skills, & create lasting memories.

Wilt u ontdekken wat bedrijfsyoga voor uw team kan betekenen? Stuur een email naar:
 info@mindsenseful.nl

Description:
Quest Adventure Sports Academy "QASA" is a premier adventure sports training academy founded in 2018. It is an initiative started by Jehan Driver, an Course Director & Instructor in a variety of aquatic sports including Kitesurfing, Windsurfing, Sailing, Kayaking and Stand up Paddle to promote and develop the aquatic sports at a grassroot level within the country. The aim is to encourage and inculcate an aquatic sports & beach culture in India and train athletes, instructors and individuals with a passion for aquatic sports.

QASA provides quality education to all aspects of the said aquatic sports with a gambit of recreational & professional courses, lifesaving & rescue while considering regional conservation & protection of natural resources. It is also a PADI Dive Center providing Scuba diving in Rameswaram & a NauticEd Sailing School which provides sailing courses in India on a luxury sailing catamaran seaQuest.

QASA hosts a boutique home stay Kathadi North which is suited for travellers who would like to stay on the premises while pursuing a water sports course.

All courses are designed to help candidates either 'Discover' a new sport or get trained and become certified in a sport. QASA is accredited by Sports, Physical Education, Fitness & Leisure Skills Council- SPEFL-SC, an initiative under Skill India Campaign.

Name: Carla coacht
Description:
Als ondernemende mama weet ik als geen ander hoe het is om alle ballen hoog te moeten houden.
 Je hebt continu het gevoel dat je tekort schiet in je gezin en in je werk. 
 Je komt maar met moeite, of misschien helemaal niet, toe aan rust en ontspanning voor jezelf.
 Je denkt aan het einde van (bijna) iedere dag “Zo, deze dag heb ik weer overleefd. Op naar morgen.”.


Ik heb daar gestaan. 

Ik weet hoe het voelt & ik weet dat ook jij het kunt veranderen.


Hoe zou het voor jou voelen om in de komende 100 dagen een moeder te zijn:
 Die geen schuldgevoelens meer ervaart 
 Die “ja” durft te zeggen tegen zichzelf 
 Die ook kan floreren in haar werk
 Die niet over haar grenzen gaat
 Die zorgt dat ze zelf ook eet en drinkt
 Die kan genieten van een kappersbezoek
 Die 's avonds niet uitgeblust is als de kinderen in bed liggen.

Je hebt elke dag voldoende energie als je opstaat & je gaat met een ontspannen gevoel naar bed.


Benieuwd hoe ik jou hierbij kan helpen?
Stuur mij een bericht of boek een vrijblijvend kennismakingsgesprek en ik hoop jou snel te ontmoeten.
06 17 37 87 62
info@carlavanklink.nl
https://calendly.com/carlacoacht/carla-coacht

Description:
Tier One Performance is dedicated to giving the best advantage, experience, and training for all of its athletes for their specific sport. Specializing particularly in baseball, our Coaches have years of experiencing coaching athletes from elementary skill level all the way to the collegiate level. Tier One Performance Coaches travel all over the Houston area to athletes with the drive and tenacity to listen and practice their sport craft consistently. By giving them proper instruction, tools, and knowledge, T.O.P. athletes are on a faster and more direct track at improving in all aspects of their game. What separates T.O.P. from the rest of the competition is that we focus on development both on and off the field. With our T.O.P. programs, we teach and prepare the human body for excellence. Basketball and Track training programs will soon be involved.

Tier One Performance was founded by Jordan Powell and Mitch Matulia in Houston, Texas. Both were All-State high school baseball players and scholarship athletes for Division 1 colleges. They have both had pro style experiences and have multiple connections to the MLB, Independent League, and Minor League system. After dedicating years of their life to the sport they both decided it was time to give back to communities and to serious students of the game who want the knowledge and the assistance they have to offer.

Name: Training Grounds, Martial Arts
Description:
Welcome to Training Grounds!

We aim to empower individuals through Martial arts, by fostering physical and mental strength, discipline, and respect. 

Our vision is to provide members with a welcoming and supportive environment where everyone can achieve their full potential, and we offer disciplines including: 
Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, Muay Thai, Boxing, Wrestling and Women's Self Defence. 

We also offer our Training Grounds KIDS ACADEMY, where we offer BJJ and Muay Thai for kids from 3.5yrs of age. 

Our Training Grounds Kids Academy is first and foremost about kids having fun and feeling part of a group whilst learning new skills. 

Martial arts is great for fitness, confidence and developing self-defence skills. It also improves children’s sense of respect, focus and discipline. When they join the Training Grounds Martial Arts Academy, kids learn about the importance of team work, improve their listening and social skills, and get a sense of achievement. They are surrounded by positive role models and of course they make lots of new friends along the way.

And finally we are passionate about our Women's Self Defence program, and offer monthly workshops as well as corporate training and seminars. 

Come in for a ONE WEEK FREE TRIAL and check us out!

Name: Mike's Gym
Description:
Welcome to Mike's Gym! 

At Mike's Gym, we are dedicated to helping individuals achieve their fitness goals and lead healthier, more active lives. With a passion for fitness and a commitment to excellence, our team of certified trainers and coaches provide a supportive and motivating environment for your fitness journey.

 About Us 
 Personalized Training: We understand that everyone's fitness needs are unique. Our customized training programs cater to your specific goals, whether it's weight loss, muscle gain, or overall well-being.

 State-of-the-Art Facilities: Our gym is equipped with top-notch equipment and modern facilities to ensure you have everything you need for an effective workout.

 Group Classes: Join our diverse range of group fitness classes, from high-intensity interval training (HIIT) to yoga, designed to keep you engaged and motivated.

 Nutritional Guidance: Achieving your fitness goals requires a balanced diet. Our nutrition experts offer guidance and meal plans to complement your workouts.

 Community Support: Join our fitness community and connect with like-minded individuals who share your passion for a healthier lifestyle.

 Our Mission 
We believe that fitness is not just about looking good but also feeling your best. Our mission is to inspire, educate, and empower our members to make positive, lasting changes in their lives through fitness and wellness.

Join us at Mike's Gym, and let's embark on a journey towards a healthier, stronger, and happier you! 

Connect with us today and start achieving your fitness goals together.

#MikesGym #FitnessJourney #HealthyLiving #PersonalTraining #WellnessCommunity

Every player is unique, therefore AHFC provides a development pathway for each player with no limitations other than their own ability and aspirations. Name: Sports Performance Lab CPH
Description:
Hos Sports Performance Lab tilbyder vi to stærke grene, der begge bygger på den nyeste teknologi og videnskab: Sundhedsfremmende løsninger og Præstationsoptimering. Vi er drevet af en mission om at skabe et sundere, stærkere og mere produktivt samfund – uanset om du er på jagt efter longevity eller ønsker at tage din fysiske præstation til det næste niveau.

Sports Performance Lab leverer to kraftfulde løsninger: Sundhedsfremme og Præstationsoptimering. Vi er her for at revolutionere din tilgang til sundhed og performance, ved at bruge cutting-edge teknologi, evidensbaserede metoder, og præcise fysiologiske tests til at tage dig til næste niveau – uanset om dit mål er longevity eller at blive den bedste version af dig selv.

Sundhedsfremmende Gren
Vi leverer holistiske sundhedsstrategier, der er skræddersyet til dig eller dit firma, med alt fra data-drevne sundhedstjek til personlige træningsplaner, der forebygger livsstilssygdomme og giver dig vedvarende energi. Vores fysiologiske tests går dybere end standard tjek – vi analyserer din krop i detaljer, så du kan nå dine well-being mål hurtigere og smartere.

Præstationsoptimerende Gren
Hos Danmarks eneste Hyrox-specifikke fysiologiske testcenter specialiserer vi os i at skræddersy avancerede træningsprogrammer, der er baseret på VO2 max, laktattests, og dine fysiologiske data. Vi tager videnskaben bag performance og gør den personlig, så du får de bedste resultater – hver gang. Vores træningsmetoder er designet til dem, der ikke bare vil træne – men dominere.

Med Sports Performance Lab får du en high-performance kultur, der fokuserer på sundhedsfremme og maksimal præstation. Vi skaber langvarige resultater gennem state-of-the-art teknologi og fysiologisk indsigt, så du kan opnå det ultimative niveau.

Name: Indian Society of Sports Scientists
Description:
The Indian Society of Sports Scientists (ISSS) is a government-approved organization dedicated to advancing sports science, physical education, and sports anthropometry in India. Officially registered under the Societies Registration Act (1860), ISSS brings together academicians, sports professionals, researchers, and industry leaders to promote excellence in sports performance, wellness, and athlete development.

We serve as a dynamic platform for research, knowledge sharing, certifications, professional training, and collaborative projects across the fields of sports science, fitness technology, human performance, injury prevention, and sports analytics.

 Key Focus Areas:
• Publishing the Indian Journal of Sports Scientist (IJSS) – A peer-reviewed journal for cutting-edge sports science research.
• Organizing national and international conferences, seminars, and workshops.
• Providing certification courses in sports analytics, physical education, coaching, and sports performance.
• Facilitating industry-academia collaborations, consultancy, and policy development.
• Promoting health & wellness initiatives, injury prevention programs, and community outreach.

 Membership Categories:
• Student, Professional, and Lifetime Memberships for individuals
• Institutional and Corporate Memberships for universities, sports federations, and fitness organizations

 Vision: 
To build a world-class ecosystem for sports science research, athlete performance optimization, and sports education in India, while fostering global collaborations and technological integration through AI in sports and sports data analytics.

Join ISSS and be a part of India’s growing sports science movement.

Name: Musica Limburg
Description:
Musica Limburg is opgericht op 2 juni 2018.
De vereniging is ontstaan door een fusie tussen de fluit- en tamboerkorpsen “St. Hubertus” Haanrade en “Wilhelmina” Kerkrade.
Twee verenigingen met een zeer rijke muziekgeschiedenis met veel succesvolle deelnames aan wedstrijden en concoursen in binnen- en buitenland.
Deze kwaliteiten zijn nu samengevoegd in één nieuwe vereniging. Te weten: Musica Limburg.
Naast musiceren worden gezelligheid en kameraadschap met een Hoofdletter geschreven.

Wat doen wij?

Concerten
Tijdens concerten spelen wij verschillende moderne muziekstukken, die niet alleen uitdagend zijn om te spelen, maar ook herkenbaar zijn voor het publiek: van klassieke werken tot film- en popmuziek.


Straatoptredens
Het begeleiden van een schutterij of het deelnemen aan een optocht. Je ziet ons regelmatig op straat in binnen- en buitenland. Hier spelen wij een combinatie van traditionele marsen tot moderne popmuziek. 


Festivals
Wij houden wel van een uitdaging! Jaarlijks zie je ons op meerdere festivals waar wij ons maar al te graag laten beoordelen door een deskundige jury.

Name: Nowa Forma - Studio Treningu Personalnego
Description:
Pasja, owszem, ale i wiedza! 
Nową Formę tworzy zespół specjalistów i specjalistek - trenerów personalnych, fizjoterapeutów oraz dietetyczki, którzy razem - jako team - prowadzą do treningowego (zdrowotnego? A może sportowego?) celu. Na postępy treningowe w Nowej Formie mogą liczyć: 
- amatorzy, którzy od bardzo dawna nie mieli wiele (albo zupełnie nic) wspólnego ze sportem 
- zawodowi sportowcy (trening przygotowania motorycznego, off-season) 
- młodzi przyszli sportowcy 
- osoby, które chcą wrócić do sprawności po urazie, kontuzji, operacji, a także osoby z chorobami przewlekłymi, które chcą rozsądnie i bezpiecznie korzystać z dobrodziejstw aktywności fizycznej 

Studio zostało zaaranżowane od podstaw w pięknej, secesyjnej kamienicy - jednej ze słynnych zabytkowych "perełek" poznańskich Jeżyc. Treningi odbywają się na kameralnych i dobrze wyposażonych salach, za zamkniętymi drzwiami. Tylko Ty i trener (lub trenerka), lub... Ty i towrzysz, bo w ofercie są także treningi DUO. 

Twórczynią Nowej Formy jest trenerka Karolina Januszewska, która właśnie tutaj wdraża w życie swoją ideę holistycznego spojrzenia na ciało - wykraczającego daleko poza ściany sali treningowej, korzystające z wiedzy i nauki (stąd obecność fizjoterapeutów i dietetyczki), ale też wieloletniego doświadczenia w pracy trenerskiej. Absolwentka poznańskiej Akademii Wychowania Fizycznego oraz prestiżowego Institute Of Motion prowadzi podopiecznych Nowej Formy do ich najlepszej formy!

Name: Kung fu in Qi gong Zenit
Description:
Pot Kung Fuja in Qi Gonga

Naše razumevanje kung fuja presega zgolj učenje tehnik in kombinacij. V osrčju naše prakse je celostni razvoj – od krepitve moči, koordinacije in ravnovesja do gradnje discipline in spodbujanja zdravja. Vadba kung fuja je potovanje, ki vodi k bolšemu telesnemu in duševnemu počutju. Redno ukvarjanje s to starodavnim obliko veščine izboljša vašo kondicijo, zmanjša stres ter pozitivno vpliva na vaše splošno zdravje in dobro počutje.

Qi Gong, je globoko ukoreninjena veščina z več tisočletno tradicijo. Ponuja naraven in preventiven pristop k ohranjanju zdravja telesa in duha. Naša praksa združuje gibanje, dihanje in meditacijo, s poudarkom na naravni drži in sproščenosti. Skozi redno vadbo postopoma krepimo fizično telo in razvijamo umsko osredotočenost. Ozaveščeno dihanje služi kot most, ki povezuje um in telo, s čimer kultiviramo naše telo, energijo in duha.

Pridružite se nam na poti raziskovanja in osebnega razvoja.

Name: Growth Sports Academy
Description:
Growth Sports Academy is a leading sports organization based in Jammu and Kashmir, founded by Aadil Manzoor Peer. The academy is dedicated to promoting sports and providing world-class training to young athletes in the region.

The academy offers training in various sports, including cricket, Rugby, Pencak Silat, Chess, Carrom, Icestock, Winter Games, Adventure Sports, Self Defense, basketball, and athletics. The academy's training programs are designed to develop the physical and mental abilities of athletes and provide them with the skills and knowledge they need to compete at the highest level.

Under the leadership of Aadil Manzoor Peer, the academy has made significant strides in promoting sports and developing young athletes. The academy has produced several talented athletes who have gone on to represent the state and the country at various levels.

In addition to its training programs, the academy also organizes several sports events and tournaments throughout the year. These events provide a platform for young athletes to showcase their skills and compete against others across the region.

Growth Sports Academy is committed to using sports for social development and community building. The academy works with local schools and community organizations to provide sports training and promote healthy lifestyles among young people.

Growth Sports Academy is a dynamic and innovative organization that is making a significant contribution to the development of sports in Jammu and Kashmir. Through its training programs and events, the academy is helping to develop the next generation of sports stars and leaders, and promoting sports as a means of social and community development

Kidokinetics partners with local centers and schools to get your kids moving more by having fun through our evidenced-based sports enrichment and P.E. programs. Our goal is to make our classes so fun that the kids don’t even realize that its real exercise.

Name: iFUTBOL
Description:
Hoi! Leuk dat je een kijkje neemt op onze page.

Wij zijn iFUTBOL, een nieuwe organisatie die zich richt op het meeste halen uit spelers met talent, ambitie, en vooral heel veel passie voor de sport.

"Waarom de naam iFUTBOL?" hoor ik je al denken, en terecht! Bij ons is de speler/speelster het belangrijkst. "Ik sta centraal, ik ben waar het om gaat." is een mindset die wij de spelers bij iFUTBOL graag vanaf het begin mee willen geven. Alle beslissingen en overwegingen worden genomen op basis van wat het beste is voor de speler zijn/haar welzijn en progressie.

Hoe gaan wij te werk? Wij bij iFUTBOL houden een datagedreven en doelgerichte werkwijze aan. De trainingen, die variëren van 1 op 1 tot kleine groepen bestaande uit meerdere spelers, zijn doel- en positiegericht en worden altijd opgenomen, zodat er naderhand op een zo gedetailleerd en zorgvuldig mogelijke wijze mee gereflecteerd kan worden. Zo boek jij als speler/speelster ook de meeste progressie. Naast de voetbaltrainingen beschikken wij ook over de benodigde faciliteiten om het fysiek van de speler/speelster verder te ontwikkelen, in de vorm van een sportschool.

Ben jij nou geïnteresseerd en wil je meer weten? Stuur ons dan gerust een DM, en laten we kijken wat we voor elkaar kunnen betekenen!

Team iFUTBOL

Name: L' Accademia Del Calcio
Description:
L’associazione Sportiva nasce da un’idea di D’Arienzo Pietro, con la partecipazione dei suoi amici, tutti legati da una forte passione per il calcio. Dopo molti anni passati nei campi di calcio, da calciatori e poi da istruttori/allenatori, abbiamo deciso di unire le nostre esperienze per metterle a disposizione degli atleti che decidono di avvicinarsi a questo magnifico sport.

Gli obiettivi del A.D.C. ( L'Accademia del Calcio ), sono quelli di poter offrire dei servizi di supporto agli atleti ( anche alle società sportive che lo richiedono ), per permettere loro di migliorarsi quotidianamente, non solo sull’aspetto tecnico, ma anche in quello comportamentale per renderli dei veri sportivi.

La nostra Accademia offre la possibilità a tutti gli atleti, grazie alla professionalità degli Istruttori/Allenatori, Preparatori Atletici, ed altri professionisti del settoredi svolgere allenamenti sulla base di schede personalizzate al fine di migliorarsi, non solo tecnicamente ma su tutti gli aspetti. A.D.C. è molto attiva anche nell’organizzazione di Meeting Formativi ed Informativi in Aula, Tornei, Stage, Ritiri Sportivi, Raduni ed Eventi Sportivi, per una maggiore consapevolezza dei benefici che può trasmette lo sport.

Description:
ProPerform Sport Mentoring is a career development programme for people who wish to work in sport. We provide our clients with an aspirational approach so that they can motivate themselves to develop their brand and establish a reputation as a successful sporting professional. Our programme was founded in 2008 by Robert Kielty who has been mentoring and consulting in professional and elite sport for over 25 years.
Career opportunities in sport are hugely competitive and are often dependant on the support structures that individuals have access to. Our programme therefore provides experienced Mentors who help clients construct a unique career plan. We have a live schedule of workshops from esteemed Sporting professionals, an online community of practice network connecting clients to industry as well as an exclusive industry placement when they are required to provide that much sought after experience. Applicants have the flexibility to join via an online programme as well as attend our live face to face schedule.
Our mentees come from different populations. Very often they are graduating students from school, college or university who recognise the need for an individual career plan or a network in which to promote their attributes. We also attract existing sporting professionals who may have reached a career ceiling or wish to diversify into other sports employment.

Name: Hi-Tech Sailing
Description:
HiTech Sailing:

Hi-Tech Sailing was founded in June 2023 by Steve Kennedy, a Physical Educator with over 20 years experience in education and coaching and 30+ years of sailing experience. 

Recognising a gap in learn to sail courses between the various dinghy sailing courses offered locally and big boat charters or British courses with practical elements that must be completed overseas, Hi-Tech sailing uses the 20ft long, SB20 with its open deck and simple design that makes it the perfect introduction to keelboat sailing (although responsive like a dinghy). The number of crew (3-4) needed to sail the SB20 makes it an ideal family boat and many family groups have enjoyed taking up the sport and bonding over shared experiences with us.

The SB20 happens to be the largest and most competitive racing fleet in Singapore meaning that Hi-Tech learn to sail courses provide a direct pathway into racing. Students will be introduced to other sailors and boat owners and be given many opportunities to join as a crew once competent in the various roles and skills. 

Hi-Tech Sailing works with schools to not only provide sail training courses for students but deliver them with in line with the latest pedagogy and approaches to learning expected from International Schools.

Our coaches are qualified and experienced sailors who can adapt and differentiate their lessons based on the weather and learning needs of the group. The coach is onboard during lessons offering a controlled and safe environment but challenging students who gradually take over full control of and responsibility for the boat. We are one of the few genuine environmentally sustainable activities as we are powered by 100% wind, water and human energy (or as one of our students said, “rice power”).

Based at the very instagramable Raffles Marina in Tuas (Tuas Link MRT) where the SB20 racing fleet resides, the location is perfect for learning to sail with almost no traffic and open waters.
Location: Geylang, Central Singapore Community Development Council

Description: Beyond revamps the process of athlete development through a holistic approach that improves performance by working from the inside out. Athletes often prioritize improving physical features exclusively to optimize athletic performance. As a result, mental and emotional components of being a competitor are neglected and ultimately hinder progress. Beyond encourages athletes to use training as a platform to improve both tangible and intangible characteristics that will maximize performance and translate into life beyond sport. Beyond Development offers customized strength and conditioning programs in addition to athlete mentality and leadership training to athletes ranging from 10 to 18 years of age, as well as, high school and collegiate sport programs in Northeast Ohio.

Name: GINGA

Powered by machine learning AI algorithms, innovative hi-performance wearable electronics and a digital ecosystem of mobile and cloud applications; Ginga brings soccer analytics to the players of all levels. Its focus is on the game, which is the fun part of the sport. 

Measuring every movement and instant of each session. Providing specific and accurate metrics to monitor technical or physical performance. Producing benchmarks and statistics to log and gauge results versus personal targets and progress. It does it all. 

Ginga is about the joy that soccer brings to those who play it and those who watch it. Ginga is all about spending time with the ball to master it. Ginga is about the beauty of the game. 
Ginga is the art of soccer!

Name: Strands IF Hudiksvall
Description:
Strands IF i Hudiksvall är en av Hälsinglands största idrottsföreningar med 2000 medlemmar. Av dessa är drygt 1200 aktiva.  Vi är en flersektionsförening som idag bedriver handboll, friidrott, konståkning och fotboll. Allt från barngrupper till seniorlag. För att driva och utveckla föreningen har vi 180 fantastiska ledare, ett stort nätverk av engagerade föräldrar, ett kansli, fyra sektionsstyrelser och en huvudstyrelse som hjälps åt.
 
Varje sommar sedan 1979 arrangerar Strands IF Hudik Cup - en av Sveriges största helgcuper i fotboll. 2025 deltog 386 lag och 6500 deltagare och lockade hela 18 000 besökare till Hudiksvall.
 
Projektet Hej Aktivitet är Strands IFs bidrag till ett ännu bättre samhälle. Vi agerar spindeln i nätet mellan kommun, näringsliv och föreningar och arrangerar aktiviteter som Aktivitetsklubben, Fotbollsfredag, Fritidsbanken, Bolltrollarna och Gåfotboll. Genom aktivitet skapas ökad meningsfullhet, hälsa, inkludering och integration för människor i Hudiksvalls kommun. Tack vare våra samarbetspartners kan vi erbjuda alla våra aktiviteter inom Hej Aktivitet gratis.
 
Vi arrangerar Blodomloppet i Hudiksvall i maj varje år tillsammans med GeBlod Gävleborg och Hälsingemarknaden i september tillsammans med Hudiksvalls IF och HUFF. 
 
Välkommen till Strands IF - du med!

Festina Lente Yoga is een Yogastudio in het midden van Nederland. Bij ons kun je in een relaxte sfeer volledig in verbinding met jezelf komen. We bieden diverse soorten yoga aan, zowel live als online. De lessen variëren van dynamisch tot heel rustig, net wat jou past! Ons team docenten is uiteraard ervaren, enthousiast en staat voor je klaar om jou te begeleiden bij wat je nodig hebt om weer die ontspanning en rust in jezelf te ervaren. 

Je kunt de studio ook huren (per uur/ dagdeel). Informeer naar de voorwaarden door te mailen naar info@festinalenteyoga.nl

Name: Alta Climbing and Fitness Gym LLC
Description:
Introducing Alta Climbing, Arizona's premier destination for rock climbing enthusiasts. Proudly featuring the state's only Olympic-sized 15-meter competition speed wall, our facility offers a diverse range of climbing experiences, including route, lead, speed, and bouldering walls, along with Moon & Tension board training and a dedicated climbing team training area.

Alta Climbing is more than just a multi-facility gym, training center, cycling and yoga studio; it's a vibrant community. Founded by the Eaves siblings, who grew up exploring the rugged terrains of Rock Canyon in Provo, UT, our gym embodies their lifelong passion for adventure and family. Raised in a family of ten, the Eaves siblings discovered that climbing builds confidence, strength, and resilience.

We are proud to host the USA Climbing 2024 Collegiate National Championships, showcasing our top-notch facilities and commitment to the climbing community. Our membership grants access to both Alta Climbing and Alta Boulders, providing a wide range of indoor climbing terrains, youth and adult programs, fitness classes, and community events for all ages.

Join us at Alta Climbing Gilbert and experience the ultimate climbing adventure. Whether you're a seasoned climber or a beginner, we welcome you to be part of our family and reach new heights with us. 

Interested in a corporate membership? Let us know at info@altaclimbing.com

Name: SikSé Sport Santé
Description:
Siksé a été crée pour promouvoir le sport en entreprise sur 2 axes:
- le premier proposer à vos salariés des solutions santé par le sport pour prévenir et limiter les troubles musculosquelettiques c’est à dire ces « petits maux » qui nous gâchent notre quotidien en entreprise (mal de dos, problème cervical, tendinite à répétition dû à une tache répétitive).
- le second proposer à vos salariés une manière ludique de se divertir ou de développer la cohésion d’équipe par le sport. Par des séances hebdomadaires ou de manière plus ponctuelle pour un séminaire ou un événement spécifique.

Je m’adapte à vos besoins et vous apporte des solutions et des idées par le sport pour le bien être et la santé de vos salariés.

Name: Rush Creek Yacht Club
Description:
Rush Creek Yacht Club was founded on the shores of Lake Ray Hubbard in 1969.  Since then, RCYC has become a landmark for sailing in the Dallas area and the US.
Our Youth Sailing Program is one of the only year-round programs in the Dallas area. RCYC is dedicated to promoting the principles and traditions of Corinthian yachting.

Name: Journey Through 18
Description:
Journey Through 18 is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization on a mission to empower young girls from diverse backgrounds in Houston, Texas, through the transformative sport of golf by providing programming in golf instruction, tournament preparation, mentorship, and access to local events that promote personal growth and build self-confidence. 

The Journey Through 18 organization was founded in 2021 by Maulana Dotch, a PGA/LPGA Professional. Journey Through 18 leverages the game of golf's unique qualities and the LPGA*USGA Girls Golf program's curriculum to develop its members' core life values and skills during adolescence, guiding them on their journey from the first hole to the age of 18. 

Journey Through 18 believes in fostering an inclusive environment that provides today's diverse female youth with the friendships, mentors, fundamental life skills, and inner strength gained through sport, which will establish the next generation of diverse, confident, and empowered women of tomorrow.

Name: Football net
Description: Football net was founded in Bosnia and Herzegovina by two former football professional players which have experience from the pitch to the board room. The goal of Dynami is to be the first company in the Balkan region to assist, develop and position sports in an international market. Not only do we represent athletes (transfer, contracts, financial, and post career), we assist organizations to position themselves in a competitive situation within the world of sports (associations, agencies, clubs). The founders saw the absence of a company in the region that can offer all you need in one place and with the focus always being the client. Dynami is here to provide you with the tools to reach the potential within the sporting world.

Name: Tag Sports CIC
Description: Tag Sports is a Community Interest Company that has been created with the aim to increase participation in sport and exercise across the United Kingdom, in order to benefit the health and wellbeing of the communities it works in.

Name: Miyagi For Golf
Description: Miyagi For Golf is your answer for learning golf online and in the comfort of your own home. Join Don on Zoom for training anywhere. Download the Skillest online golf training app to connect to Don NOW!

Name: BAFL
Description: We identify and develop promising talents from underserved communities, and help build livelihood opportunity through sports, to transform the Indian sports ecosystem for nurturing talent and enabling systemic change for future generations to thrive.

Name: Trail Squad
Description:
Trail Squad is a travel company focused on running epic trail races across the globe.
Trail Squad takes participants through a journey of pre-race training and community, cherrypicked races, and superbly executed trips to the race destinations.

Name: SBN: For the Kids
Description: A sports and sporting education non-profit 'Sporting Their Future'. We work to provide resources and education for youth in order to level the playing field and give them the reins to their own lives. We want kids to understand that they can have control over their future with just a little support.

Name: International Mountain Climbing School
Description:
The International Mountain Climbing School (IMCS) is a guide service specializing in rock and ice climbing, backcountry skiing, mountaineering, and avalanche education in North Conway, New Hampshire. Our certified guides provide safe access to technical climbing in the White Mountains, including Cathedral Ledge, Whitehorse Ledge, Crawford Notch, Cannon, and Mt. Washington. We offer a progression of instruction from beginners to experienced climbers. 

IMCS rents climbing gear, camping equipment, and outerwear/accessories. Located within International Mountain Equipment, we outfit our clients with proper gear for their outdoor experiences. We organize the Mount Washington Valley Ice Fest, the largest ice climbing event in the northeast.

Name: Basketball Skills Academy
Description: We provide basketball coaching and instruction for all levels.

Name: The Sports Zon
Description: The Sports Zon is a india’s biggest news website for all sports like cricket, football, kabaddi, hockey, tennis, chess etc. We are the first news website to bring all the latest news and updates about all your favorite sports. You are welcome to visit our website and stay connected with us through all our social media pages.

Name: City Cricket Academy
Description:
City Cricket Academy is a premier cricket centre of excellence based in Leicester, UK, offering year round coaching for all ages and abilities, from beginners to professionals.   

Our state-of-the-art six-lane indoor centre and partnership with Leicester Grammar School provide all weather coaching, 50 weeks a year, seven days a week.  

With highly qualified ECB coaches, many of whom are former international and first class cricketers, we deliver expert group and one-to-one coaching, holiday camps, masterclasses, net and bowling machine hire, and much more in a friendly, inclusive environment.  

We’ve expanded internationally with our academy in Dubai, offering the same high quality coaching, top class facilities, and City Cricket Academy ethos to cricketers in the UAE.   

Whether you're training in Leicester or Dubai, you're part of the City Cricket Academy cricketing family where passion meets performance.

Name: Skyline Sports Academy
Description:
Skyline Sports Academy specializes in teaching swimming, football, and archery classes.

Our highly qualified, experienced and friendly staff are dedicated to helping children of all ages and abilities to develop their confidence and abilities in both sports.

We offer a wide range of swimming, football, and archery, from beginner to advanced levels, that meets all the needs of all our students.

We’re committed to ensuring that our students are kept physically active and engaged.

Name: 52 Sports
Description: With more than 10 years experience in China working in the sports industry, we provide assistance to our clients needs. From coaches who are willing to come to China and want to contact clubs, to clubs who are looking for sponsorships with local brands. We also operate for companies that buy sport equipment in China and want to send it to other countries. Whatever you need from Sports & China , we can help you to make it happen.

Name: FC Falcons
Description:
Falcons FC is the independent soccer team of Bentley University, built and managed entirely by students.
From coaching to sponsorships, social media, and operations, every aspect of the club is student-led, merging sports, business, and leadership.

Based in Waltham, Massachusetts, Falcons FC currently competes in the APSL (American Premier Soccer League), a semi-professional competition.
In just one season, we rose from 43rd to 6th place nationally and won the first trophy in Bentley soccer history. Our team is international, bringing together players and managers from diverse backgrounds, united by passion, resilience, and the drive to succeed both on and off the field.

We compete against top-level programs such as Harvard, Boston University, and UMass, proving that dedication and teamwork can rival tradition and resources. Beyond the field, we create opportunities for sponsors and partners to connect with a vibrant student community through sport, media, and events.

Name: Hux Sport
Description:
Hux Sport is een sportschool met een breed aanbod aan groepstrainingen in een gemoedelijke, open en sportieve sfeer. Initieel gestart met kickboksen en inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een sportschool met bokszaktrainingen, Club Joy Power, circuit, steps, spinning, yoga, tabata en een grote fitnessruimte. Naast het grote sportaanbod hebben we ook een sportmasseur in huis voor het onderhoud van de spieren en als blessurepreventie. 
De mens achter de sporter staat centraal, waarbij discipline, respect en persoonlijke aandacht belangrijke kernwaarden zijn. Personal trainingen op mentaal-fysiek vlak worden veelvuldig gegeven. Bij Hux Sport train je op jouw eigen niveau en krijg je de begeleiding die daar bij past.

Name: Solid Water Digital Fitness Studio
Description:
A digital-first fitness studio that offers results-oriented classes. 

Leading companies worldwide are awakening to the significance of employee well-being. Solid Water Studio stands as an answer, particularly for hybrid and remote teams in pursuit of an inclusive wellness solution.

Solid Water brings:

 Intimate Sessions: Limited to a select few – six participants per class.
 Global Access: Traveling or remote? No barriers to your tailored workouts.
 Holistic Approach: Beyond the ordinary – no apps, boot camps, or generic routines.
 Proven Outcomes: Tailored plans, tangible results.
 Injury-Prevention: Progress without compromising on well-being, underpinned by bespoke feedback.
 Sustainable Transformation: Embrace gradual yet lasting progress for enduring results.

Ready to improve employee satisfaction twofold?

Solid Water offers exclusive B2B packages. To request a quote please fill in a form or visit: https://www.solidwaterstudio.com/business

Name: Soccer Shots Waukesha
Description:
Engaging children’s soccer program with a focus on character development
 Ages 2-8

Name: SHARK SPORTS & EVENTS
Description:
Dive Into Excellence:
Shark Sports & Events Is Revolutionizing
The Game & Redefining India's Sporting Horizon!

Name: BodyMind.Golf
Description:
Wir sind die Experten für Konstanz in Golf

Dabei nutzen wir sowohl mentale Strategien als auch dynamische Bewegungsprinzipien, um Golfer*innen zu einem lockeren, freien Schwung zu verhelfen.

Du gewinnst dadurch mehr Länge, mehr Konstanz und einen stressfreien Golfschwung, damit du gesund und ohne Altersgrenze schmerzfrei spielen kannst.

Unser Konzept ist einmalig, weil es durch zwei Experten in den Bereichen Mentaltraining und Physiotherapie entstand. Wir sind schon über 25 Jahre in diesem Bereich tätig und brachten schon tausende Golfer*innen in ihrem Spiel weiter.

Das ist unsere Passion!

Name: Club De Pádel UPB
Description: El Club de Pádel de la Universidad Privada Boliviana (UPB) campus Santa Cruz, es una iniciativa institucional orientada a fomentar la práctica del deporte, la vida saludable y la integración universitaria a través del pádel. Promovemos y organizamos espacios de formación, competencia y recreación para estudiantes y docentes fortaleciendo el espíritu deportivo y los valores de trabajo en equipo.

Name: Sportz Ville
Description:
Sportz Ville is a Global Sports Management company aimed at providing end to end services to clients through organizing sports events.

Conducted 150+ public and corporate sport tournaments pan India since 2012.

Have catered multi-activity sport events for sport enthusiasts aged between 3 – 70 years.

What we do?
Indoor Sport Events
Outdoor Sport Events
Employee Engagement Programs
Marathons
Corporate Outing
Virtual Events

Name: FUTVO
Description:
FUTVO is a sports-tech startup founded in Germany and built for Latin America. Our mission is to redefine how people connect, play, and experience sports by bringing players, communities, and sports facilities together in a single digital ecosystem.

We are creating the first platform that truly empowers both the managers and the users of sports spaces, from local football fields to new multi-sport venues. With FUTVO, booking, organizing, managing, and sharing sports activities becomes simple, modern, and accessible for everyone.

For us, sports represent much more than competition; they embody community, identity, and culture.  
FUTVO is not just a platform. It is the beginning of a movement that brings the spirit of sport into the digital age.

Name: GROUPE PIERRE BRIAND FRANCE
Description:
Le GROUPE PIERRE BRIAND FRANCE est un réseau d'agences hybrides d'animation et de gestion. 

Notre mission est de créer et de développer des marques de service à fort impact social pour encourager la pratique d'activités sportives et de loisirs, lutter contre les inégalités socio-éducatives et réduire les disparités d'offre de loisirs entre les territoires.

Name: Rugby Patrons Society (Kenya)
Description: We are a non-profit organsition focused on boosting grassroots Rugby to bring the game of Rugby to another generation of Kenyans.

Name: StreetSkills
Description: De missie van StreetSkills is om iedereen te laten ontdekken hoe talentvol zij met de bal zijn! Dit doen wij door het geven van freestyle voetbal workshops en shows met een top team van Nederlandse freestylers!

Name: TRIP NATURE - TURISMO DEPORTIVO
Description:
Trip nature es start-up especializada en el turismo deportivo, de deportistas a deportistas.

Conociendo de primera mano las necesidades de nuestros clientes, creamos experiencias deportivas y de ocio dentro y fuera de España.

Descubre con nosotros parajes naturales tan mágicos como la Costa Mediterránea, donde encontramos todo lo necesario para cubrir las necesidades de todo deportista: un clima idóneo tanto en verano como en invierno, rutas espectaculares por carretera y montaña, instalaciones modernas y acondicionadas para la práctica deportiva, la playa a escasos minutos del hotel y un sin fin de experiencias que queremos que descubras.

Name: Soccer SideKicks
Description: Soccer Sidekicks operates as an elite enrichment program, partnering with schools and daycares throughout the USA, providing weekend leagues tailored for children aged 18 months to 6 years. Soccer Sidekicks delivers age-specific soccer practices via a unique curriculum that uses engaging activities. We integrate songs, music, stories, nursery rhymes and much more with soccer skills, drills and exercises.

Name: IKMA Netherlands
Description: IKMA Netherlands is een vooraanstaande Krav Maga school, aangesloten bij de IKMA - Gidon System uit Israël. Wij specialiseren ons in zelfverdedigingstrainingen voor alle leeftijden en niveaus. Met ervaren instructeurs en een focus op realistische situaties, bieden wij trainingen die je fysieke en mentale weerbaarheid vergroten. Word sterker, zelfverzekerder en beter voorbereid met IKMA Netherlands.

Name: Cindy's Swim School
Description:
If you're looking for a community of people who are passionate about the water, love swimming, and support each other throughout their swimming journey, then Cindy's is the right place for you!

Roughly 10,000 people have swim with Cindy's Swim School since our story began over a decade ago! We're even lucky enough to still have some customers with us who've been here from the start. 

Alongside our behind the scenes staff we have a team of supportive, trained, teachers who are so excited to help you begin your swimming journey. All of our teachers are either Swim England or Swimming Teachers Association Level 2 qualified or above.  They all hold relevant first aid certification and all have up to date DBS certificates – to ensure the safety of your children. 

Each of our teachers has their own passion for swimming, whether that's teaching babies, training competitive swimmers, or supporting young people with learning difficulties. We'll match you with the best teacher for you!

Name: La Baladeuse
Description:
La Baladeuse

Découvertes Sportives & Balades Culinaires

Je vous propose des activités de :
- Team Building de Plein Air, Local, Ecologique & Gourmand 
- Séminaires et accompagnements d'entreprises personnalisés

Name: Crossfit Portet sur Garonne
Description:
Viens relever des défis dans une ambiance de folie et en toute sécurité !!

Si tu veux partager des moments inoubliables et aller au bout de toi même en dépassant toutes les limites que tu te fixes, tu es au bon endroit ! Une équipe survoltée et pleine de ressources t'attend pour t'en faire voir de toutes les couleurs. 
Notre volonté ? Un accompagnement personnalisé pour vous permettre d'atteindre votre objectif de condition physique et de santé.

Name: Alto Padel
Description:
Alto Padel es una academia y un proyecto audiovisual fundado por Adan Ponce, con el objetivo de ayudar a jugadores de todo el mundo a mejorar su rendimiento en la pista. Actualmente somos la comunidad de pádel número 1 en Portugal en redes sociales, con más de 135.000 seguidores y más de 10 millones de visualizaciones.

Creamos contenido técnico y educativo en YouTube, TikTok e Instagram, alcanzando a miles de jugadores cada semana. Además, desarrollamos formaciones online, organizamos eventos y gestionamos una academia presencial en Portugal.

 Nuestros objetivos:  Consolidar Alto Padel como academia física y online de referencia en Europa.
 Ampliar nuestra presencia internacional y crear una comunidad global.
 Colaborar con marcas y patrocinadores que apuesten por el crecimiento del pádel.
 Ofrecer formaciones, clínicas y contenido exclusivo para todos los niveles.

 Buscamos alianzas estratégicas con marcas, clubes y profesionales del sector que compartan nuestra visión y quieran formar parte de este crecimiento.

 Si representas una marca o empresa y quieres colaborar o patrocinar nuestros contenidos, ponte en contacto con nosotros.

 linktr.ee/AltoPadel

Name: Blua Blue
Description:
Blua Blue is the exclusive watersports partner of La Reserva Club de Sotogrande. Come join us on the 17,000 square-meter sports lagoon, next to the beach club, for jetboarding, efoiling, SUP, kayaking and more! It is a safe wave and wind free environment, just 10 minutes from our store in the Sotogrande port, that is the perfect place to try out and learn how to ride all the boards we sell.

Book your watersports equipment upon arival or in advance by contacting Wayne at lareserva@bluablue.com

Name: TEAM 9.23
Description: Creamos experiencia, masificamos y tecnificamos el deporte realizando torneos con optima organización. Buscamos que los menores alcancen sus sueños.

Name: Ride Along Activities
Description:
Ride along is en jong en dynamisch bedrijf gericht op uitdagend activiteiten. Denk hierbij aan; longboardworkshops, snowboardtrainingen of andere toffe activiteiten. Onze kwaliteit ligt bij de persoonlijke benadering en onze enthousiaste instructeurs die iedereen laten genieten van een optimale beleving.

Sinds maart 2017 zitten wij gevestigd in de oude Koepel van Breda. Wij hebben hier een fantastische kantoorruimte met een geweldig stuk terrein. Vanuit hier worden dus ook alle activiteiten gestart. Kom naar de Koepel en ‘Ride Along’.

Name: UK Academies of Gymnastics & Trampolining
Description:
UKAG offers recreational Gymnastics and Trampolining classes for all children aged 4-14 years. 

We run from schools, leisure and community centres across the UK.

UKAG has its own awards and coach training program and is widely used across he UK.

Name: JACQUISA TÉNIS

Angolan Tennis club making History 
First Angolans to have ITFJUNIOR points after 15+ years 
Young players destined to change the world

Name: The BarBelles Effect
Description:
The Barbelles Effect | Empowering Women Through Sport, Wellness & Community

The Barbelles Effect is more than an event — it’s a movement. We unite women from all walks of life around sport, wellness, personal growth, and empowerment, creating a holistic platform where strength meets purpose.

Through competitions, wellness experiences, expert-led workshops, and curated networking, we foster a safe, inspiring, and high-energy environment for women to push boundaries, break limits, and unlock their full potential.

Our vision extends beyond Mauritius: we aim to build a global network of empowered women, attracting international athletes, industry experts, and brands who share our mission. We offer a premium platform for sponsorships and partnerships, connecting companies with an engaged, professional, and high-impact audience.

Why join The Barbelles Effect?

Reach: Connect with ambitious, driven women and professionals who value performance, wellness, and growth.

Impact: Support a movement that goes beyond sport to promote mental health, entrepreneurship, and holistic empowerment.

Innovation: Be part of a one-of-a-kind experience that blends competition, wellness, community, and business opportunities.

One movement. Every woman. No limits.

Name: SYNC SPORTSS
Description:
Welcome to Sync Sportss! We are your ultimate gateway to the vibrant world of sports, where we believe that sport is more than just a game — it is a way of life. At Sync Sportss, we aim to connect sports' energy, excitement, and passion with everyday life, making it an integral part of our community.

We envision a world where sports inspire and unite people across the globe. By connecting sports to life, we aim to promote a culture of health, fitness, and community spirit. Follow Sync Sportss for the latest sports updates and become a part of our growing community of sports enthusiasts. Whether you are a casual fan or a die-hard supporter, Sync Sportss has something for everyone.

Join us on this exhilarating journey and let’s sync sportss to life!
 
#syncsportss #sportsupdates #community #fitness #health #passion

Name: Aelite Club
Description: Situé sur l’axe central de Waterloo, Ælite Club est un centre Fitness Premium d’une superficie de 2200 m2 caractérisé par un design luxueux et de standing, couplé d’une technologie d’entrainement hors normes et d’un encadrement professionnel toujours plus pointu.

Name: Cleveland Pickleball Center
Description: Cleveland, Ohio’s first Top-of-the-line Pickleball Center! Coming  Email Us

Name: Golf AI Tech Australia
Description: Golf AI Tech is an Australian company behind AICad - Bmotion(https://aicaddie.ai) — an AI-powered, human-guided Neuro Looper - Humome, designed to make golf more fun. Bmotion enhances Neuro plasticity leverages flow theory, and applies motivational neuroscience to create a brain-powered joy loop. Our singular focus is your mind. Our broader vision is a healthier, more connected world, Blueprints for a healthier world through advanced OFF course golf informatics, Consumer informatics for a healthier world by uncovering a neuro pathway via myeloarchitectonic proliferation enhancing brain health and cognitive longevity.

Name: Head Above Water Midland
Description:
COM Aquatics: Learn to Swim is passionate about three things: 

1.) Providing the highest quality water safety instruction in West Texas.
2.) Teaching children to swim using efficient, effective, evidence-based methods. 
3.) Serving our community to the best of our ability.

Name: Formation Lut discri sport
Description:
En réponse à une demande sociale et professionnelle forte en matière d'égalité entre les femmes et les hommes dans le
sport (plan de féminisation dans les fédérations, parité dans les instances dirigeantes, lutte contre les violences sexistes
et sexuelles, mesure d'impact égalité autour des grands événements sportifs, politique budgétaire sensible au genre,
convention pour l'égalité dans le système éducatif), l'UFR STAPS de Lyon 1 propose une formation qui permet de lutter
contre les discriminations et les violences de genre dans le sport et l'EPS. 
OBJECTIF :
Cette formation vise à outiller les acteur·rice·s dans la mise en place de politiques et/ou pédagogies d'inclusion et de lutte contre les discriminations et les violences de genre.
PUBLICS CONCERNÉS : Tout public (professionnel·le·s ou bénévoles) engagé·e dans les métiers du sport, de l'EPS et/ou les organisations privées, associatives, marchandes et publiques, évoluant dans les secteurs des Activités Physiques et Sportives.

Name: FC Ukkie voetbal
Description: Iedere zondagochtend hebben wij voor de leeftijdsgroep van 2 tot en met 5 jaar FC Ukkie voetbal trainingen! In de gymzaal maken we spelenderwijs kennis met voetbal. Aan de hand van doelen die de motorische ontwikkeling van het kind doormaakt trainen we voetbalgericht maar zijn we ongemerkt ook een grote motorische ontwikkeling aan het door maken!

Name: Sportsmonkey Social Sports
Description:
Sportsmonkey is the premier recreational sports & social club in Houston, Katy and The Woodlands. We offer intramural sports leagues and various social events to Houston’s young professionals. We offer a variety of leagues including, but not limited to, softball, flag football, basketball, volleyball, soccer, kickball, bowling, golf and more.

 In addition, we have experienced staff that will help plan and implement corporate wellness for your organization. We have worked with companies of all shapes and sizes and are always willing to tailor a program specific to your organization. Event options include, but are not limited to: private leagues, charity fundraisers, networking events, field days, tournaments, fun-filled happy hours and more!

Name: Pro Padel Academy
Description:
We are Pakistan's first padel academy featuring internationally certified coaches.

Training at more than over 12 locations across Karachi, we are proud to be the torchbearers of the next generation of padel superstars from Pakistan.

Name: Santa Barbara County Trails Council
Description: The Santa Barbara County Trails Council is a grassroots membership organization that has worked vigorously on behalf of people of Santa Barbara County to enhance the county’s trail network for over 50 years. We are inclusive in our support for volunteering, collaborating and advocating for trail access on behalf of hikers, runners, bikers, equestrians and all others who use trails for outdoor recreation. To achieve our goals we provide trail-related planning, design, mapping, construction and maintenance for city, county, state and federal agencies.

Name: Self Defence Central Dojo
Description: Reminder: please book in to your classes for the week. It helps us personalise, plan and structure our focus groups.

Name: Tiago De Paula BJJ | Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Academy
Description:
Welcome to Tiago De Paula BJJ, where European and World Champions train. Led by Professor Tiago De Paula, we offer top-tier Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu training for all levels, from beginners to professionals. In addition to technical mastery, we focus on discipline, respect, and physical fitness. For businesses, we provide specialized team seminars designed to enhance team-building, stress management, and strategic thinking through BJJ principles. Experience a unique environment where athletic and mental strength are cultivated by a team of experts.


#BrazilianJiuJitsu #BJJ #SelfDefense #Fitness #TeamBuilding #StressManagement #Strategy #BJJTraining #MartialArts #TiagoDePaulaBJJ #BJJCommunity #TeamSeminar

Name: Temple Performance
Description:
Temple Performance is an online strength and conditioning business, which aims to support amateur athletes and teams to reach their athletic potential using evidence-based sports science. 
Services offered: 
- Bespoke S&C programs to enhance your sporting performance.
- Personalised training programs for endurance events (e.g. marathon/ triathlon), helping you to balance training with your work and social life. 
- Training load management and rehabilitation of musculoskeletal injuries.

Name: Brain’o - Sport, Art & Tech
Description:
Brain’O est un centre multidisciplinaire innovant pour enfants, adolescents, jeunes et adultes à Nabeul.

Nous proposons des clubs et des ateliers créatifs, sportifs, technologiques et linguistiques dans un espace convivial, stimulant et sécurisé. Notre objectif est d'offrir à chacun l'opportunité d'apprendre, de s'épanouir et de développer de nouvelles compétences, dans une ambiance ludique et bienveillante.

Nous favorisons l'apprentissage par la pratique et l'expérience, à travers :

 Des clubs d'art et de créativité : peinture, théâtre, céramique, chant…
 Des activités sportives : gymnastique, zumba, cardio, activités motrices…
 Des clubs technologiques : robotique, programmation, Scratch…
 Des ateliers de langues pour tous les niveaux
 Des formations en création de contenu, marketing digital et design graphique à partir de 12 ans jusqu’aux adultes

Nous avons également pensé aux parents ! Un espace café climatisé avec Wi-Fi est disponible sur place pour leur permettre de se détendre ou de travailler pendant que leurs enfants participent aux activités.

Name: The Vancouver Basketball Foundation
Description: The Vancouver Basketball Foundation is a non-profit, community-first organization situated in the heart of Vancouver's Grandview-Woodlands community. We create meaningful opportunities for underserved youth and young adults to connect, grow, and thrive through sport and play. We break down barriers and create inclusive spaces where every young person can build their physical, mental, and social well-being through our cost-free, interconnected programs, camps, leagues, and events.

Name: Fiji Sports Council
Description:
Established in 1978 by an Act of Parliament, the Fiji Sports Council is dedicated to promoting and developing amateur sports and recreation across Fiji. Our Vision is to be the best. Our mission is to create an environment of success while our values are Service Excellence, Passion, Ownership, Respect, and Teamwork.

In a rapidly changing world, the Fiji Sports Council remains a beacon of excellence, continuously adapting to meet the growing demands of sports and recreation. Our primary objective is to provide state-of-the-art facilities for all Fijians and fulfill the sporting needs of the Pacific region.

Despite challenges post-COVID, our commitment to safety and excellence has enabled us to serve athletes, enthusiasts, and communities, fostering a vibrant sporting culture that unites people.

With oversight of over 20 sports facilities, we work alongside stakeholders to ensure these spaces cater to a diverse range of sporting disciplines and events.

From world-standard stadiums to grassroots initiatives, our focus remains on providing world-class infrastructure and fostering community engagement. Together with our stakeholders, we are shaping the future of sports and recreation in Fiji and beyond.

With a strong focus on quality,  durability and performance, we specialize in sports infrastructure development, synthetic turfs, courts and training setups for various sports.

Als u deze bekijkt kunt u freerunning lessen aanbieden alsof u zelf al jaren de sport beoefend.

Alle lespakketten zijn perfect geschikt voor het aanbieden van een lessenreeks met lessen van 90 minuten. Bij het beginner lespakket krijgt u een lessenreeks van 2 lessen, bij het Medium lespakket een lessenreeks van 4. Het Pro lespakket bevat daarnaast ook twee losse lessen met de volgende thema’s: speed en freestyle. 

Al deze informatie is uit jaren ervaring samengesteld en heeft daarom de juiste opbouw en is voorzien van alles dat u moet weten. Als docent kunt u dus uitdagende, veilige en spectaculaire freerunning lessen geven.

Ook kunt u onze professionals inschakelen om workshops op uw school te verzorgen!

Name: HER Rugby Academy
Description:
Today for tomorrow - building pathways, people and possibilities for women’s and girl’s rugby in Victoria.

Her Rugby Academy is the first program of its kind in Victoria. Built by women, dedicated to empowering women and girls in Rugby. Her Rugby Academy doesn't just build players; we build the team behind the team: coaches, referees, medics, managers, volunteers.

Powered by a group of women committed to furthering opportunities for girls and women through the game we love, Her Rugby Academy was founded, and is spearheaded, by two visionary women with deep experience in Rugby, community and the development of others.

Her Rugby Academy programs include an 8 week High Performance Academy (admission by application), coach upskilling workshops, school programs and Rugby camps. Working closely with other State and national bodies, we aim to grow and deepen opportunities for women and girls in Victorian Rugby.

Name: Silicon Valley Sports Officials Association
Description:
At the Silicon Valley Sports Officials Association (SVSOA), we are dedicated to upholding the principles of sportsmanship and fair play. What sets us apart is our unwavering focus on providing officiating services exclusively for high school athletic contests. By specializing in this area, we concentrate all our efforts on cultivating the highest quality high school sports officials in Silicon Valley.

Our board of directors, sports directors, and assigners are driven by a singular commitment—to deliver the best high school sports officials in Northern California. We pride ourselves on surpassing the training standards set by the California Interscholastic Federation (CIF) and the Central Coast Section (CCS). Not only do we meet the required training hours, but we exceed them, ensuring that our officials are equipped with unparalleled expertise.

When you entrust SVSOA with officiating your athletic contests, you can be confident in our ability to provide a safe and fair environment for all participants. Our officials are meticulously selected and rigorously trained to deliver unbiased and professional officiating in every game. We understand that your goal is to host well-officiated contests, and it is our goal to provide the most highly skilled and trained officials to achieve that objective.

We take immense pride in our reputation for excellence, and we are more than willing to provide contact information for local athletic directors who can vouch for the quality of our services. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we assure you that choosing SVSOA as your high school officiating organization will not leave you disappointed.

When it comes to elevating the standard of high school sports officiating in Silicon Valley, SVSOA stands unrivaled. Join us in creating a thriving sports community built on integrity, professionalism, and the pursuit of excellence.
