Name: Lake St. Clair Sailing School
Description:
About Lake St. Clair Sailing School

American Sailing
Lake St. Clair Sailing School has been certifying students to sail for over 25 years. The School is an American Sailing Association ASA certified training facility that gives sailors of all experience levels an opportunity to become more competent and confident in their abilities.

Lake St. Clair Sailing School gives sailors of all experience levels an opportunity to become more competent and confident in their abilities. If you choose to venture beyond the sailing basics, we’ll expand your horizons by teaching you to navigate with electronics and with the stars. Become certified at advanced or offshore levels, and the world’s oceans will become your highways and by-ways. You can learn it all or select the things that interest you the most.

Our Mission
The mission of Lake St. Clair Sailing School is to make sailing and yachting accessible to all sailing lovers. To transform lives through sailing classes and sunset sailing that inspire learning. To teach people to sail safely and confidently.

Ci impegniamo per aiutare le aziende a promuovere una filosofia di benessere psicofisico tra i propri lavoratori. Attiviamo corsi sportivi per i dipendenti e per le loro famiglie, sfruttando il know-how dei migliori istruttori presenti sul territorio nazionale.
Siamo convinti che lo sport possa essere uno strumento di team building e che possa alleggerire i dipendenti che sono anche genitori delle preoccupazioni riguardo le attività extra-scolastiche dei figli.

Community Engagement: Join a growing community of sports enthusiasts, participate in tournaments, and enjoy social events that celebrate the spirit of the game.

Our Vision:

To create a dynamic sports hub in Gurugram that fosters health, wellness, and camaraderie through the exciting sports of padel and pickleball!

Our Commitment to Growth:

We are in the process of expanding our infrastructure to better serve our community. With ample space available, we have exciting plans for the future, including:

Additional Courts: Increasing the number of courts to accommodate more players and events.

Enhanced Facilities: Upgrading amenities to provide a comfortable and enjoyable experience for all visitors.

Community Programs: Introducing new initiatives to engage and inspire our local community.

We are committed to transparency and will keep our community informed about our progress and developments. Stay tuned for updates as we continue to grow and improve.

Les avantages de RubAce :

- Des disponibilités flexibles pour vos emplois du temps : vous n’êtes plus obligé de respecter un créneau horaire et pouvez maintenant jouer quand vous le voulez et où vous le souhaitez.

- Découvrez de nouveaux clubs et terrains de tennis et entraînez-vous là où vous êtes, ou simplement testez de nouvelles surfaces pour vos prochains matchs.

Name: NOVA Coaching
Description:

Whether you're a seasoned athlete or just starting your endurance journey, our mission is simple: to empower you to thrive in sport and life.

What sets us apart? Our coaching team is led by former Great Britain athletes, including an Olympian. With experience competing at the highest levels, we bring unparalleled expertise and a champion’s mindset to every training plan.

We know that every athlete is unique. That’s why we focus on personalised training plans tailored to your specific goals, lifestyle, and commitments. By listening to your needs and challenges, we create smart, effective strategies that fit seamlessly into your daily routine—helping you unlock your full potential.

Our approach prioritises:
 Athlete-First Philosophy: Your goals, challenges, and well-being always come first.
 Realistic Training Plans: No unrealistic demands—just achievable, impactful sessions that work for your schedule.
 Balance and Growth: We’re here to help you excel in fitness without compromising your personal or professional life.

Ready to take your endurance training to the next level? Let’s make it happen, together.

 Visit our website: https://novacoaching.my.canva.site/

Cu o experiență de aproape 20 de ani în utilizarea plăcilor, știm că longboarding-ul electric reprezintă o alternativă excelentă de mobilitate urbană și o activitate distractivă, dar riscantă, așa că am decis să creăm @E-Skate Brașov prin care să oferim cursuri și antrenament de utilizare a unui longboard electric, nu doar să închiriem echipamentele celor interesați.
---

Name: Massage Hippique
Description:
Equestrian sport without understanding is like a jumping course without obstacles. I stand for knowledge, skill, and respect – as the foundation for performance, recovery, and horse welfare.

I am Angelique Schreurs, founder of Massage Hippique. With over 20 years in equestrian sport – from dressage and jumping to coaching at international eventing level – I know how deeply horses shape our lives. In 2003, I became the first Dutch professional certified in Equine Sports Massage in the USA, and since then I have built one of Europe’s most unique education platforms for equine health and performance.

Massage Hippique bridges the gap between sport and wellbeing. Too often horses suffer because signals are missed or only symptoms are treated. My mission is to give riders, instructors, therapists, and clubs the tools to see what others miss, prevent injuries, and create horses that move freely, willingly, and with confidence.

We provide:

Professional programs (Sports Massage, Motion & Mind, Core Dynamics, Multi-Disciplinary Therapist – up to 4 years, accredited by VPSN, GRO, CRKBO).

Online courses & memberships, with optional exams and international access.

Tailored education for equestrian clubs and associations worldwide.

Clinics, seminars, and retreats in the Netherlands, Spain, the UK, and beyond.

What makes us unique? A functional, holistic, and practical approach: from cause, not symptom. Knowledge that is directly applicable in training. Education that works for individual riders, professionals, and entire equestrian communities.

Horses trained with this knowledge show greater freedom of movement, fewer injuries, and improved recovery. Riders gain confidence and clarity. Clubs build healthier, stronger equestrian cultures.

 Massage Hippique is available internationally, both online and on location.

 Let’s connect – whether you are a rider, instructor, therapist, or club searching for professional, scalable education. Together we create a future where

Description:

At RUSH, we pride ourselves on offering a comprehensive player pathway led by passionate professional coaches who truly care about the success of your child on and off the court. From Rookie Ball to our flagship Spark League and everything in between, our program curriculum is carefully designed to ensure our players receive maximum feedback, quality coaching, and high-rep sessions every time they take the court. 

Our flagship program, called Spark League, is an innovative and exciting twist on traditional development leagues. Offered for Boys and Girls ages 8-14, the Spark League combines the best parts of rep basketball like team practices, weekly games, and quality coaching, with the best part of house leagues, like local games and less travel, and offers a unique basketball experience right here in Midtown Toronto.

At RUSH, our innovative club philosophy is designed with long-term athlete development in mind, ensuring players are continually challenged to improve their skills and take their game to the next level, while also recognizing that we are working with children - not mini-professional athletes.

Name: PTG-CENTER
Description:
Mijn naam is Derieuw Gianni, 𝘁𝗿𝗼𝘁𝘀𝗲 𝗲𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗮𝗿 𝘃𝗮𝗻 𝗣𝗧𝗚-𝗖𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗘𝗥.

Op de ruiter in Roeselare ligt mijn praktijk, een feelgood waar iedereen terecht kan. 
Samen met mijn team Tom, Gianny, Emily, Kevin en Marlies streven we 100% mee voor jullie doelen.
We zetten ons elke dag in om vernieuwende trainingen te geven zodat jullie getriggerd blijven.
Heb je zin om te sporten, last van rugpijn of bang voor blessures? 𝗗𝗮𝗻 𝗯𝗲𝗻 𝗷𝗲 𝗯𝗶𝗷 𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗮𝗮𝗻 𝗵𝗲𝘁 𝗷𝘂𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗲 𝗮𝗱𝗿𝗲𝘀.
Het leukste aan mijn job? elke training ... letterlijk! Ook het beste van mezelf geven voor m'n klanten. Je ziet de lach op hun gezicht, de appreciatie ... ik kan van geluk spreken dat ik mensen zie transformeren naar geluk ... met zichzelf! 

𝗢𝗼𝗸 𝘇𝗶𝗻 𝗼𝗺 𝘁𝗲 𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲𝗻 𝗯𝗶𝗷 𝗼𝗳 𝗺𝗲𝘁 𝗣𝗧𝗚?

Dit is van belang zodat wij als trainer uw lichaam perfect in evenwicht kunnen krijgen. Om de 8 weken doen we een herscreening zodat we samen uw evolutie kunnen zien en bespreken. 

𝗔𝗮𝗻𝗯𝗼𝗱:

- Small group training: van 2 tot 5 personen
- Bedrijfsfitness: workouts bij het bedrijf zelf 
- Salsa lessen vanaf 20 april 2022 
- ... 
De eerste sessie is gratis, zo kunnen we kennismaken.

𝗪𝗶𝗹 𝗷𝗲 𝗺𝗲𝗲𝗿 𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗼? 𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗼@𝗽𝘁𝗴-𝗰𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿.𝗯𝗲

Name: Taiwan Green Running Race Alliance
Description:
Four prominent road-running organizing bodies in Taiwan have launched the Green Running Race Alliance with the support of the National Science and Technology Council and the assistance of National Tsing Hua University. This Green Running Race Alliance is supported by the Taipei Marathon (Taipei City Government), New Taipei Wan Jin Shi Marathon (New Taipei City Government), Taiwan's Rice Heaven Tianzhong Marathon (Changhua County Government, and the Shukang Recreation Sports Association), Chinese Taipei Association of Ultrarunners and H2U Sports Biji. Indeed, two of these running races received the gold label of the World Athletics. Today, these five entities have decided to join forces to promote the environmental sustainability of running events. The initial stage of this Alliance is to carry out joint marketing. The Alliance would promote the environmental sustainability of each event, encouraging runners to support and recognize these efforts collectively. Another important task of the Alliance soon is to establish a set of criteria for an environmental sustainability certification for running events.
Before forming this Alliance, some of aforementioned organizations had hosted the event sustainability forum since 2021. The Chinese Taipei Association of Ultrarunners, National Tsing Hua University, and carbon footprint specialists developed the framework for the carbon footprint analysis for the running events. Such a framework received approval from the Ministry of Environment in 2022—the first kind in the sports

Name: UNITED BLACK GOLFERS ASSOCIATION - UBGA
Description:
The United Black Golfers Association (UBGA), founded on March 3, 2014, is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization based in Laurelton, Queens. Our mission is to create opportunities for men and women interested in the game of golf, offering a platform for engagement, unity, personal growth, and enrichment through the sport. We strive to foster an inclusive and supportive community that uplifts and empowers golfers of all skill levels.

In addition to promoting the game, UBGA is dedicated to giving back to the next generation. Each year, we provide scholarships to deserving high school seniors who are committed to furthering their education. Whether pursuing a college degree or enrolling in trade schools, our scholarship program aims to ease the financial burden for students, supporting their journey toward success.

At UBGA, we believe in the power of golf to create lasting connections, inspire confidence, and develop leadership skills. Through our events and initiatives, we foster an environment where individuals can grow both on and off the course. Join us as we continue to build a stronger, more united community of golfers while making a lasting impact on the lives of young students.

Name: Performance Unlimited Inc.
Description:
Performance Unlimited is Charlotte’s highest-rated sports performance company and the city’s first and longest-standing soccer and lacrosse-specific training program.

Founded in 2010, we’ve spent over a decade helping young athletes move better, play faster, and compete with confidence—without breaking down their bodies. From beginners to elite players, our programs are rooted in sports science, built around individual assessments, and led by expert coaches who understand the unique demands of field sport athletes.

We’ve trained over 3,000 athletes, including middle and high school standouts, NCAA scholarship winners, and professionals in the MLS, NFL, NBA, and Olympic circuits. Our approach delivers speed, strength, agility, and injury resilience in an environment that builds confidence—not burnout.

Whether your athlete plays soccer, lacrosse, or another high-speed field sport, Performance Unlimited offers the region’s most proven system for long-term athletic development.

Name: Hans Dorfner Fußballschule
Description:

Wir möchten den Jungs und Mädels auf spielerische Art und Weise den Fußball näher bringen – ob blutiger Anfänger oder Profi am Ball, jeder kommt bei unseren Camps auf seine Kosten! Unser Ziel ist es, den Kindern ein Lächeln ins Gesicht zu zaubern und ihnen abwechslungsreiche und tolle Fußballtage zu bieten.
Unsere Philosophie „Freude und Spaß am Fußball“ vermitteln wir nun bereits seit 29 Jahren und freuen uns sehr auf jeden neuen Teilnehmer & jede neue Teilnehmerin sowie auf alle Wiederholer-Kids!

Bei uns geht es um Teamgeist, es geht um Bewegung, aber vor allem um Spaß!

Name: Lavender Bay Kayaking
Description:
Vianney, the founder of Lavender Bay Kayaking, embarked on this venture in 2021 following a challenging battle with severe Crohn’s disease. Struggling with the complexities of his condition and the emotional toll of multiple treatment failures, Vianney found solace in the rhythmic embrace of the water. Delving into the serene tranquility of Sydney Harbour at Sunrise and Sunset became his daily ritual – a beacon of hope that pulled him out of the depths of depression.

Through his intimate connection with nature, Vianney discovered a profound truth: the power of pausing, reflecting, and finding solace in the present moment. Inspired by his own journey, Lavender Bay Kayaking was born – a sanctuary where small groups of individuals, guided by Vianney himself, embark on a journey of release, reflection, and connection amidst the breathtaking beauty of the Harbour.

Understanding the importance of prioritising well-being and nurturing a harmonious work-life balance, our kayaking tours offer a transformative experience for your team. By immersing themselves in the natural splendour of Sydney Harbour, participants unwind, recalibrate their spirits, and forge deeper connections with both nature and one another.

Name: Finale for Nepal
Description:
Finale For Nepal è un’associazione di volontariato, nata nel 2009, che si occupa di fornire istruzione e alloggio a bambini in Nepal che altrimenti non ne avrebbero la possibilità.
Le attività socio/educative di supporto alle popolazioni scolastiche in età compresa tra i 4 e i 18 anni nascono conformemente all’oggetto sociale.
Tutte le cariche sociali sono gratuite e i volontari prestano la loro attività a titolo gratuito. Tra membri del consiglio direttivo e volontari collaborano a questo progetto circa 20 persone.
Le attività di Finale for Nepal sono descritte principalmente sul profilo Facebook e l’evento sportivo ha lo scopo di raccogliere fondi per il nostro orfanotrofio..
Dopo il terremoto del 2015 abbiamo seguito e concluso diversi progetti di ricostruzione di scuole. Garantendo l’accesso agli studi a circa 300 bambini.
Il nostro progetto principale è una casa famiglia in periferia di Kathmandu, che ospita attualmente 20 bambini orfani e garantisce loro l’accesso all’istruzione, cibo, vestiti, alloggio, cure sanitarie e tutto ciò di cui abbiano bisogno. Finale for Nepal sostiene  economicamente, oltre alle spese di cui sopra, il costo del direttore, della governante, dell’assistente e l’affitto dell’immobile.
Tutti i ragazzi provengono dalle zone dell’ovest del Nepal, notoriamente zone estremamente povere.
Il turnover 2023 prevede l’uscita di 3 ragazze che andranno all’università per cui si stanno cercando borse di studio e l’ingresso di 3 nuove bambine a maggio che coincide con l’inizio dell’anno scolastico nepalese.

Name: Køge Nord Sport Center
Description:
Centralt på Sjælland finder du Køge Nord Sport Center, som er det ideelle sted for sportsevents, møder, kurser, konferencer, udstillinger og mindre messer. Med let adgang fra motorvejen og Køge Nord Station lige i nærheden, er vores beliggenhed både praktisk og tilgængelig.

Vores faciliteter inkluderer to sportscentre, et i Køge Nord og et i Lille Skensved, hvilket gør os til en af de største idrætsfaciliteter i Køge. Siden åbningen i 1972, og med tilføjelsen af Skensved Hallen i 1992, har vi udvidet vores tilbud betydeligt.

I Køge Nord Sport Center har vi over 4.500 m², der omfatter 3 haller, 4 holdsale, 4 mødelokaler og et fitnesscenter. Skensved Hallen tilbyder yderligere 2.500 m² med 1 hal, 1 holdsal og et fitnesscenter. Vores rummelige og fleksible lokaler kan tilpasses alle typer arrangementer, fra små møder til store begivenheder, og vi tilbyder også forplejning som en del af vores services.

Velkommen til Køge Nord Sport Center, hvor vi sætter rammerne for begivenheder i topklasse!

Yoga & Reiki Changes werkt op verschillende locaties:
- Bij bedrijven – wekelijkse lessen en workshops gericht op vitaliteit en stressreductie.

- In een eigen praktijkruimte – voor persoonlijke sessies in een rustige setting.
- Online – flexibel en toegankelijk voor iedereen.

Ik combineer mijn werk als IT-manager met mijn rol als yogadocent en Reiki-behandelaar. Juist die combinatie maakt mijn benadering praktisch, toegankelijk en herkenbaar voor mensen die op zoek zijn naar balans zonder zweverigheid.

Aanbod:
- Vinyasa Yoga lessen & workshops
- Reiki behandelingen
- Vitaliteitsprogramma’s op maat voor organisaties
- Online & offline sessies

Beweging is verandering. Verandering is groei.
Yoga & Reiki Changes helpt mensen om die beweging te maken – fysiek, energetisch en mentaal.

Name: be your body - coaching sportif à domicile et online
Description:
En fonction de vos besoins et de votre budget, je vous aide à l’aide de mes suivis à domicile et/ou online à atteindre vos objectifs et enfin vous sentir bien dans votre corps et votre tête. 

 Mon programme phare, le programme SUPERWOMAN en version Premium ou Ebook, est un programme intensif qui a déjà fait ses preuves auprès de nombreuses adeptes.

 La promesse? Moins 2 à 6 kgs en 3 mois et une confiance en soi au top, grâce principalement à du rééquilibrage alimentaire et des séances de sports au poids de corps.

Name: Gertis
Description:
Gertis jest jednym z najbardziej rozpoznawalnych organizatorów szkoleń i turystyki żeglarskiej na Mazurach. Od 2006 roku zapewniamy kompleksowe usługi w oparciu o nowoczesną flotę jachtów, profesjonalną kadrę oraz wieloletnie doświadczenie. 

> Organizujemy eventy firmowe - rejsy chill&fun, regaty firmowe 
> Prowadzimy kursy dla dorosłych na polskie uprawnienia żeglarskie i motorowodne oraz międzynarodowe certyfikaty kompetencji. 
> Przygotowujemy propozycje wyjazdów "szytych na miarę" - szkolenia indywidualne, rejsy rodzinne, weekendowe doskonalenie umiejętności żeglarskich, kursy dla obcokrajowców
> Oferujemy do czarteru bluesrockową flotę jachtów klasy Maxus - od 24 do 34 stóp długości

Naszą specjalizacją są szkolenia dla osób dorosłych, ale w ofercie znajdują się też obozy młodzieżowe i wyjazdy rodzinne. 

We wszystkich naszych działaniach szczególną uwagę zwracamy na zachowania ekologiczne. Pochodzimy z Mazur i to miejsce jest dla nas ważne.

Name: Canottieri San Cristoforo
Description:
San Cristoforo Rowing Club is a key hub for water sports in Milan. Founded on the Naviglio Grande in 2009, it is now a lively and inclusive club dedicated to promoting rowing, canoeing, and other outdoor disciplines, with a strong focus on sports education, well-being, and the personal growth of each member.

We welcome athletes of all ages and skill levels—from children to adults, from amateur enthusiasts to competitive athletes—offering courses, recreational activities, school programs, and corporate team-building events. Our mission is simple: to make the Naviglio accessible to everyone, while fostering motor skills, team values, and respect for the environment.

We are also proud organizers of sporting events that bring life to the Milanese canals, and active partners in educational, social, and cultural projects in collaboration with schools, institutions, and local organizations.
Accogliamo sportivi di tutte le età e livelli, dai bambini agli adulti, dagli atleti amatoriali agli agonisti, offrendo corsi, attività ricreative, programmi scolastici e team building aziendali. Il nostro obiettivo è semplice: rendere il Naviglio navigabile per tutti, sviluppando competenze motorie, valori di squadra e rispetto per l’ambiente.

Siamo anche promotori di eventi sportivi che animano i Navigli milanesi, e partner attivi in progetti educativi, sociali e culturali con scuole, enti e realtà del territorio.

Name: Soccer Speed LLC
Description: We aim to develop the complete player in each facet of the game; technical, tactical, and physical. Starting with the fundamentals we improve abilities through personalised, rigorous, and detailed individual or group training sessions. Our tiered training structure ensure each player has the appropriate foundation for continued growth.

Name: H.A.C. - Hybrid Athlete Culture
Description: Discover Hybrid Athlete programs for triathletes, runners, cyclists, and Hyrox athletes. Boost strength and endurance with hybrid training designed for peak performance.

Name: Prespa Run&Fun
Description:
Prespa Run & Fun is a new running and lifestyle event launching on 20 June 2026 in Prespa.

The event features 5K and 10K races set in a scenic natural environment, welcoming both competitive and recreational runners. Beyond the race, Prespa Run & Fun delivers a full experience with live music, a food court, water activities, fun zones, and sponsor activations.

Designed to bring together sport, tourism, and community, Prespa Run & Fun aims to become an annual destination event celebrating active living and outdoor culture.

 Prespa |  20 June 2026

Name: Westerfolds Sports Centre
Description:
Westerfolds began as the Templestowe Swim School by the Kemp family in the 1950’s. As the pool became a success, Ray Kemp proceeded to build squash courts behind the pool during the late 50’s and 60’s. Still a family owned and operated business, the Templestowe Swim School was purchased by Ian Kent in 1994 from DeLucas and was developed into the super site it is today, with multiple facilities including a renovated pool, 8 Squash courts, function room, gym, cafe, day spa and child care centre. Ian’s daughters run the business onsite and will endeavour to continue the family tradition into the future for the various Westerfolds venues.

 

Westerfolds is now the go-to place for Swimming, Squash, and Racquetball in Melbourne.

Our Templestowe location has a Swim School providing lessons for all children starting from 6 months of age, 8 brilliant Squash and Racquetball courts providing casual court hire, pennant teams, and a world-class junior program.  The center stocks a huge range of racquets, shoes, goggles, bathers, and accessories, we can meet all of your equipment needs for the pool and court.

We also have a function space to cater for your events for up to 110 people.

Our newest swim school is located within Goodlife Armadale and offers classes for 4 year olds up to adults. The 22.5 meter long indoor pool caters for group and private classes.

Name: Pingishallen
Description: Vår vision är enkel: att göra bordtennis tillgängligt för fler och samtidigt ge företag möjligheten att stärka relationer, skapa teamkänsla och ha riktigt kul tillsammans.

Name: CreativeFit
Description:
CreativeFit is meer dan een sportschool die zich bezighoudt met het geven van trainingen. Onze focus richt zich ook op de rol die wij spelen in de maatschappij. Vanuit deze maatschappelijke positie maken wij onze leden bewust van een gezond lichaam en de effecten hiervan op de geest. De geest blijven wij prikkelen door de diversiteit aan trainingen die wij aanbieden. Wij geloven dat het lichaam veel meer aankan als de geest sterk genoeg is.

De connectie tussen a strong mind & body.

De diversiteit aan trainingen die wij bieden, zorgt voor de verbetering van je fysieke weerbaarheid en je mentale gesteldheid. Door de veelzijdigheid aan oefeningen wordt het lichaam constant op een andere manier geprikkeld en blijven de trainingen leuk en uitdagend.

Wij zijn ervan overtuigd dat als je mind & body sterk zijn, je meer aankunt en durft als mens.

CreativeFit is meer dan een sportschool. Niet alleen trainen is belangrijk, maar ook de connectie met elkaar. Dit maakt de stap naar de sportschool toegankelijker. Het gevoel dat je deel uitmaakt van hét team. Je bent geen nummertje, maar een persoon. Je ervaart zelf het familiare gevoel wat er heerst.

Name: WhoPlays US, Inc
Description:
WhoPlays US is your gateway to the future of pickleball, available today! Our app provides real-time insights into pickleball players currently on the courts. It allows you to create public profiles, share and like match results, and access comprehensive statistics.

Elevate Your Game with Self-Assess Matches: At WhoPlays US, we're all about empowering players like you to take charge of your pickleball journey. That's why we've made it easy for you to host and participate in self-assess matches, turning every game into a thrilling opportunity to hone your skills.

Connect in Real-Time: With WhoPlays, you'll never miss a moment on the courts. Get real-time updates on players currently playing and find matches instantly.

Form Your Network: Create player groups, follow your favorite players, and stay updated on exciting matches within your network.

Matches: Access match scores from all your courts. Engage with thrilling matches and teams by liking and commenting. Create matches swiftly, and certify results.

Climb the WP-Rank: Our dynamic WP-Rank is designed to encourage players to mix and connect, fostering healthy competition and growth within the community.

Join the pickleball revolution with WhoPlays US, where self-assess matches elevate your game and shape the future of pickleball today!

We also provide bicycle education services to companies, organizations, and governments including rides and workshops.

By bringing together young people from every background, we create a global community where vulnerability is met with strength, isolation turns into connection, and potential transforms into achievement. Through access to pitches, pathways, and people who believe in them, we enable care leavers not just to play, but to thrive on the field, and in life.

Name: MONTANA WHITEWATER INC
Description:
MONTANA WHITEWATER is a family owned business in Bozeman MT, near Yellowstone National Park. It was started in 1992 by Bill Zell. 

We started by running the Gallatin River, and gradually added the Yellowstone River operation. The exclusive Madison River permit became ours in 2006. We added Fly-Fishing instruction to our Gallatin River activities in 2009. We started offering zip line tours in 2010. 
We are truly passionate about creating experiences that our clients treasure forever. Sharing our amazing rivers with our clients is a privilege and a blast!

The rivers we run flow out of Yellowstone National Park. They are among the most beautiful and pristine waters in the lower 48 states. We believe that quality outdoor experiences lead to a greater sense of health and well being. Boating is a passion that we are honored to share with you!

Name: Echo Sierra Tactical
Description:
Echo Sierra Tactical 
Train with Purpose. Operate with Precision.

Echo Sierra Tactical is a veteran owned training and leadership company redefining how people and teams perform under pressure. Based in Charlotte, NC, we blend tactical realism with experiential learning to deliver corporate team building, leadership development, and immersive tactical training unlike anything else in the industry.

Our modular shoot houses are reconfigured weekly, creating fresh, unpredictable environments for every mission. Combined with live-person opposition forces (OpFor) and stress based decision scenarios, participants experience the ultimate test of communication, adaptability, and leadership under fire.

What Makes Us Different:

• Tactical Escape Rooms – Live-action missions combining teamwork, problem-solving, and adrenaline.

• Corporate Leadership & Team Training – Tactical decision making transformed into practical leadership and communication skills.

• Membership Programs – Monthly access for civilians, veterans, and first responders to train and grow continuously.

• Facility Rentals & Custom Scenarios – Law enforcement, military, and corporate teams can design their own mission experiences.

Every scenario is built to push performance, sharpen leadership, and strengthen team cohesion. Whether you’re a company seeking an elite team building experience or an individual looking to enhance tactical proficiency, Echo Sierra Tactical delivers realism with purpose.

Veteran-Led. Purpose-Driven. Mission-Focused.

Train with purpose. Operate with precision.

www.shootCLT.com

Name: Academia de Fútbol Country Club Buenos Aires
Description:
La Academia de Fútbol Country Club Buenos Aires Nuevo Chimbote (ADF Country Club) nació en el año 2017, y tiene como fundador a Luis Ezequiel Ostolaza Salinas.
Su perspectiva y sus ganas por aportar al fútbol Chimbotano, en especial a los niños, adolescentes y jóvenes, hicieron que tome la decisión de empezar con este proyecto. En su primer año el fundador empezó alquilando campos deportivos dentro de los cuales apertura la academia de fútbol para adolescentes de las edades de 11 y 12 años. Para su segundo año ya se contaba con categorías desde los 3 años hasta los 17 años, y un equipo en la tercera división de la liga distrital de Nuevo Chimbote, que en el año 2019 lograría subir a la primera división de la liga distrital. Asimismo, el año 2021, promoviendo a sus canteras, se presenta con otro equipo (Country Club Junior) en la tercera división de la liga distrital de Nuevo Chimbote, logrando 2 años después subir a la primera división de la liga distrital. Desde entonces hasta la actualidad cuenta con 2 equipos en la liga distrital de Nuevo Chimbote, es decir en la primera etapa de la Copa Perú, esto ha permitido que sus divisiones de menores, desde los 3 años hasta los 17 años tengan un referente tanto deportivo como institucional.
ADF Country Club poco a poco ha ido creciendo en recursos de infraestructura como campos modernos propios para los entrenamientos de fútbol, departamento de fisioterapia y rehabilitación, almacén - utilería, camerinos - servicios higiénicos, campos alternativos de vóley y básquet, tribunas, bodega, entre otros espacios más. También ha crecido en recursos de implementos y materiales deportivos de última generación, recursos tecnológicos para el sistema de iluminación y mantenimiento periódico de los campos deportivos, entre otros recursos más. Finalmente cuenta con el recurso humano profesional y capacitado, es decir un equipo de trabajo óptimo, que vela por los objetivos institucionales que favorecen en la formación de los deportistas.

Name: Dwarf Girraffe
Description:
Welcome to Dwarf Giraffe, your premier destination for top-notch event management services and sports opportunities! At Dwarf Giraffe, we specialize in organizing dynamic and exhilarating sports tournaments across a wide range of categories.

Our mission is to provide athletes of all levels with unforgettable experiences and competitive platforms to showcase their skills and passion for sports. Whether you're a seasoned athlete or a budding enthusiast, Dwarf Giraffe offers an inclusive environment where everyone can thrive and excel.

But we're not just about tournaments - Dwarf Giraffe goes above and beyond to support the entire sports community. We understand the importance of skilled coaches, trainers and instructors in shaping the future of sports, which is why we are creating www.dwgiraffe.com, a cutting-edge platform where sports teachers, trainers and coaches can create profiles, showcase their certifications, awards, recognitions, and accolades, and connect with potential part-time or full-time job opportunities at various institutions, universities, corporate, and societies.

At Dwarf Giraffe, we believe in rewarding excellence. Participants who excel in our tournaments have the opportunity to not only claim victory but also unlock exclusive discounted offers. Winners may even earn selection to prestigious academies, where they can receive world-class training sessions at discounted prices.

It’s a vibrant and dynamic community of Dwarf Giraffe! Rooted in a passion for sports and a commitment to excellence, our community is a melting pot of talent, opportunity, and excitement. At Dwarf Giraffe, we believe in the power of sports to unite, inspire, and transform lives. Whether you're a coach seeking new opportunities, a sports teacher looking to make a difference, or a dedicated enthusiast ready to showcase your skills, Dwarf Giraffe is your gateway to a world of endless possibilities. Let's connect!

Name: Soccer Shooters Bristol East
Description:
Soccer Shooters Bristol East brings the joy of football to children in East Bristol and Keynsham through our engaging and developmental programs. We believe that football is more than just a game; it's a powerful tool for building skills, confidence, and character.

Our experienced coaches are committed to providing a positive and supportive learning environment where every child can:

     Master essential football techniques.

     Develop key life skills such as teamwork, communication, and resilience.

     Stay active and healthy.

     Have fun and make new friends!

Whether your child is just starting out or looking to take their game to the next level, Soccer Shooters Bristol East offers a program to suit their needs. We provide a range of options, including after-school clubs, weekend sessions, and holiday camps, all designed to foster a lifelong love of football.

Name: Skydive Pepperell
Description:
Skydive Pepperell is New England’s premier skydiving center and the closest dropzone to Boston, located on a private 60+ acre skydiving-only airport in Pepperell, Massachusetts, near the New Hampshire border. We are a full-service skydiving operation offering tandem skydives, student training, fun jumps, and gear services.

Skydive Pepperell was opened in 1970 by Ted Strong of Strong Enterprises. Since 1990, the dropzone has been woman-owned and operated by Athena Fran Strimenos, better known as 'Fast Frannie.' Skydive Pepperell currently flies a PAC 750XL, one of the safest and most efficient skydiving aircraft available.

Open seven days a week from May through October, our DZ features a spacious grassy landing area, an on-site gear store and rigging loft, and a welcoming community of experienced, passionate skydivers and instructors.

Beyond products, we offer sports training, event arrangements, wellness support, and sports consulting, creating a holistic ecosystem for athletes and sports enthusiasts. 

At Hawu, we are driven by cutting-edge research and sustainable innovation, striving to make sports more competitive, high-performing, and climate-friendly. Our goal is to elevate sports performance while fostering well-being and environmental responsibility.

Description:
Heatree is a Christian outdoor residential centre based in Dartmoor National Park in Devon. We provide outdoor adventure learning experiences for children and young people.

Through adventures in the natural environment, we focus on providing experiences for children and young people to learn about the Christian faith in a way that is relevant and inspiring to them. Regardless of their background, ability or step in their faith journey, individuals explore what makes them unique and what it means to put their trust in others. We empower young people with important life skills and teach them how to face life’s challenges.

We believe that when young people experience challenging and exciting activities in the outdoors and within the Christian environment that Heatree provides, their minds are opened to a new perspective on their life and the world around them. Individuals are accepted and valued for who they are, and we believe this has the power to bring positive and lasting change to people’s lives.

Our motto, "All the Way, the Stealers Way," encapsulates holistic education, nurturing values of discipline, sportsmanship, and unwavering determination beyond the basketball court. Name: Fly Fishing New England
Description:
At Fly Fishing New England, we specialize in immersive fly fishing education and guided experiences rooted in Adventure, Community, and Education. Whether you're looking to explore the wild waters of New England or simply learn how to cast a fly rod, our mission is to make fly fishing more approachable, exciting, and deeply rewarding for everyone.

We offer corporate outings and one-day fly fishing workshops that blend casting instruction, environmental awareness, and team-building activities—a perfect way to get your team out of the office and into nature, sparking creativity, collaboration, and a fresh perspective.

For individuals, we provide personalized instruction and guided trips that help you build confidence, deepen your understanding of fish behavior and aquatic ecosystems, and improve your fly casting and presentation skills. Our goal is to help you feel comfortable on the water and confident in your knowledge—whether you're a total beginner or refining your technique.

Led by a Licensed NH Fishing Guide and lifelong educator, we bring passion, patience, and deep regional expertise to every outing. We’re especially passionate about introducing people to the wild Brook Trout of New Hampshire and the rich fly fishing heritage of New England.

Follow us for tips, trip photos, podcast updates, and info on upcoming classes and events. Let’s get you (or your team) on the water!

Name: Projeto Aurora
Description:
O Projeto Aurora é uma associação civil, sem fins lucrativos nem econômicos, fundado em 12 de janeiro de 2016, com objetivo de promover a inclusão social, o acolhimento, amparo e assistência social para crianças, adolescentes, jovens e adultos de baixa renda e em situação de vulnerabilidade.

O Projeto foi fundado a partir da ideia e trabalho voluntário do fundador João Paulo Farias Costa, que resolveu fazer algo em busca de transformação no entorno do seu local de trabalho, no bairro de Santo Amaro. Desempenhamos nossas atividades voltados ao esporte (basquete), bem como promovendo acesso a cultura, educação, cidadania e integração ao mercado de trabalho.

Nós viabilizamos, incentivamos, massificamos e democratizamos a prática do Basquete com o foco no desenvolvimento de atletas. O Projeto desde sua concepção é desenvolvido na quadra público localizada na rua da Aurora, no bairro de Santo Amaro, em Recife - PE. Hoje temos mais de 60 (sessenta) alunos beneficiados, com idade a partir dos 07 anos. O Projeto Aurora é aberto para todos os interessados, sem nenhum tipo de discriminação e de forma gratuita.

Name: HSKI TRAVEL  / SKI SCHOOL / INCENTIVE
Description:
Firma HSKI, założona w 2003 roku, to prawdziwy lider w świecie turystyki zimowej. Przez dwie dekady nieustannego rozwoju i innowacji, HSKI zyskało miano wiodącej marki, która nie tylko spełnia marzenia miłośników białego szaleństwa, ale także wyznacza trendy w branży.

Teraz, HSKI nie zamierza spocząć na laurach i z niezwykłym entuzjazmem otwiera się na turystykę letnią. To obiecuje kolejne lata niezapomnianych wrażeń, przygód i wspaniałych wspomnień dla klientów firmy.

HSKI to nie tylko świetne usługi, ale także organizacja niezwykłych eventów. Imprezy organizowane przez HSKI są prawdziwą gratką dla uczestników, dzięki połączeniu najwyższej jakości usług z oryginalnym podejściem do tematyki każdego wydarzenia.

Kluczem do sukcesu firmy HSKI są jej wspaniali ludzie - zespół pełen pasji i zaangażowania, który z sercem podchodzi do każdego projektu, stawiając klienta na pierwszym miejscu. To dzięki nim, HSKI może być dumne z realizacji swojej misji - dostarczanie niezapomnianych wrażeń i niezrównanej jakości usług dla swoich klientów.

Poznaj HSKI - firmę, która zachwyca skalą, profesjonalizmem i niewyczerpaną pasją do odkrywania nowych możliwości, a jednocześnie oferuje niezrównane doświadczenia w turystyce zimowej i letniej. Z HSKI każda przygoda staje się wyjątkowa!

Name: Jumping Jack
Description: Jumping Jack is dé urban trampolinehal in Almere. Bekijk de wereld van een andere kant wanneer je over muren loopt of van grote hoogtes naar beneden duikt. Oefen je freerunning skills of maak salto's op de 2400 vierkante meters aan trampolines. Ouders relaxen ondertussen in The Coffee Club met een healthy lunch of heerlijke latte macchiato.

Name: Qbasport
Description:
Qbasport to firma zajmująca się turystyką, sportem i rekreacją.Od 23 lat organizujemy obozy narciarskie i snowboardowe, wind- i kitesurfingowe, przez wiele lat także tenisowe. W nadchodzącym roku wprowadzamy nowy produkt - obozy rowerowe, zarówno MTB jak i RoadBike.

Qbasport to także klub narciarski, dla dzieci, młodzieży, studentów oraz dla pozytywnie zakręconych dorosłych. Organizujemy obozy treningowe, a także zawody narciarskie i snowboardowe. 

Qbasport to firma, która od wielu lat prowadzi również imprezy typu "incentive" - eventy dla firm, zarówno wyjazdowe imprezy, np. zimą wyjazdy na narty, zawody "o Puchar Prezesa" oraz szkolenia narciarskie i snowboardowe. Latem organizujemy imprezy związane z regionem, w którym mieści się nasza firma - Pomorzem tj. eventy żeglarskie, wind&kitesurfingowe, SUP, spływy kajakowe, a także wiele innych. 

Treningi, zajęcia ruchowe i rekreacyjne
Prowadzimy zajęcia dla pracowników firm różnych aktywności ruchowych, takich jak: nordic walking, pływanie, praca nad przeciwdziałaniem negatywnych skutków pracy biurowej np "zdrowy kręgosłup", zajęcia usprawniające, joga itp.

Przygotowanie motoryczne dla sportowców, amatorów i wszystkich pasjonatów ruchu.
Od wielu lat prowadzimy treningi przygotowania motorycznego dla sportowców uprawiających różne dyscypliny, m.in. narciarstwo zjazdowe, windsurfing, kitesurfing, tenis ziemny, koszykówkę, szermierkę i in. Doświadczenie w pracy z aktywnymi sportowcami pomaga w pracy z amatorami, którzy sporadycznie tylko uprawiają w swoim wolnym czasie sport. Prowadzimy zajęcia w wybranych centrach sportu, siłowniach, w terenie, a także w domach naszych klientów. 

Obecnie specjalizujemy się w prowadzeniu zajęć wspomagających działania lekarzy dietetyków w formie zajęć grupowych oraz indywidualnych.

Name: Six Love Tennis
Description: Six Love strives to increase accessibility to tennis by engaging communities and promoting programs that fuel a longtime passion through a love of tennis. We are dedicated to increasing accessibility to the game by providing programs to all, regardless of age, experience or socioeconomic background. We hope to build a community of supportive team members, on and off the court. We strive to share tennis with our communities as a means for opportunity and success. At Six Love, players will develop their tennis skills, interpersonal skills, critical thinking skills, and mental and physical agility. By providing tennis instruction and programs, Six Love will empower all generations to succeed, to become men and women of character both on and off the court.

Name: Inter Academy Fortaleza
Description:
Premiada pelo UEFA Awards, a Inter Academy que é a escola de futebol da Inter de Milão, um dos maiores clubes do mundo, conta com uma metodologia de ensino exclusiva da Inter, com treinamento baseado em 4 pilares de desenvolvimento (técnico, tático, físico e psicológico), pensados para os diferentes níveis de intensidade, de acordo com a idade do jogador.

Mais do que uma metodologia premiada, o que torna a Inter Academy Brazil tão diferente das demais escolas de futebol é a formação dos seus treinadores e treinadoras, que precisam ser registrados em um CREF (Conselho Regional de Educação Física) ou ter experiência comprovada como ex-atletas profissionais de futebol. E na nossa equipe não poderia faltar alguém com a experiência e a qualidade que a Inter de Milão define como padrão, por isso Luiz Henrique Aranha e Flavio Freire são os responsáveis por garantir a excelência da nossa unidade.

Name: CourtPlay India

Name: Allround Training Ede
Description:
Gezondheid als het vermogen zich aan te passen en een eigen regie te voeren, in het licht van de fysieke, emotionele en sociale uitdagingen van het leven.” – Institute for Positive Health

En laat dat nu ook net het motto zijn van Allround Training Ede. Vanuit deze overtuiging trainen en begeleiden wij jou naar een gezonde en fitte levensstijl.

Bij Allround Training Ede heb je de keuze uit verschillende trainingen. Of je nu enthousiast wordt van een outdoor bootcamp, even lekker zweten en werken aan je conditie en techniek tijdens een conditie bokszaktraining, een betere balans op wilt bouwen tussen lichaam en geest of liever in onze trainingsruimte werkt aan je kracht en/of uithoudingsvermogen, er is voor iedereen een passende training. Ook bieden wij diverse verdiepende cursussen aan en personal training die ook echt persoonlijk is.

Hiermee prikkelen wij jong en oud om in beweging te komen en grenzen te verleggen. Samen sporten voor elk niveau maken wij mogelijk in een veilige omgeving.

Wij geloven dat je met een gezonde leefstijl beter presteert en minder vaak ziek bent. We helpen je daarom bij het wekelijks voldoende bewegen, bij het gebruik van de juiste voeding en we inspireren je ook om je jezelf mentaal te ontwikkelen.

Samen werken we aan jouw doel: een gezondere, fittere en sterkere versie van jezelf!

Welkom!

Name: Sigma Swimming
Description:
Sigma Swimming is a 501(c)3 athletic organization that was founded in 2009. Originally formed to meet the needs of 40 swimmers, Sigma grew from 1 location (Sigma Fort Worth Central TWU) to 17 locations, with our 18th location being our first stand-alone aquatics facility (Sigma Fort Worth West).

Today, Sigma Swimming continues its tradition of delivering and incorporating the highest standard of aquatic programming for people of all ages to maximize their experience in water activities.

Our children and adults come from all over the Dallas Fort Worth Metroplex to learn swimming from our experienced and exceptional coaches. Our unmatched curriculum has taught thousands of children and adults how to swim over the 12 years we've been in business. Our competitive swim team, Metroplex Aquatics, is recognized by USA Swimming's Club Excellence Program as a Silver Medal Swim Team, making us the only nationally ranked organization in Fort Worth, Burleson, Cleburne, and Waco.

Name: Kovirami Program
Description:
A Kovirami Program célja, hogy lépésről lépésre segítse az egészséges életmódra váltókat a sport, étkeztés és mentális egészségfejlesztés hármasán keresztül. A vállalkozás megálmodója Nagy-Kovács Ramóna, aki már több éve készít vlogokat saját csatonájára a sport, életmód, család témakörökben. Programunk nem a végletekről szól, hanem egy hosszú távon fenntartható egészséges életmód megvalósításáról. Cégünk folyamatos innovációval igyekszik a hazai piacon egyedülálló termék és szolgáltatás portfóliót kialakítani meglévő és leendő vásárlóink számára.
Kismama Programunk egy olyan, 9 hónapos hozzáférésű csomag, melyben nemcsak laza kismama edzéseket vannak, hanem biztonsággal végezhető kardio, aerobik, gerinctréning, gátizomtorna is. Emellett dietetikai cikkek és mentális egészségfejlesztő videók is várják a kismamákat, természetesen mind a legjobb szakemberektől!

https://kovirami.hu/csomagok/

Name: The Green's Ladies Golf Club, Inc.
Description:
Established in 1954, GLGC proudly stands as the oldest African American women’s golf club in the Delaware Valley. Our story is one of passion, determination, and a deep love for the game of golf.

On May 1, 1954, a historic meeting took place in West Philadelphia that would forever change the golfing landscape for African American women. Ms. Lorraine Sawyer, alongside seven other remarkable women, gathered to lay the foundation of the Green’s Ladies Golf Club. These visionary women were driven by a shared vision – to create a golf club where black female golfers could not only thrive but also be respected in the broader golf community. 

Since our inception, GLGC has ventured far and wide, participating in tournaments along the eastern coast. We’re proud to say that our history is deeply intertwined with the growth and evolution of women’s golf in our community. In 1955, we hosted our very first tournament, marking a significant milestone in our mission to provide a platform for African American women in the golfing world.

Name: Club Atletico Alvarado
Description:
El Club Atlético Alvarado es una institución deportiva y social fundada el 21 de Junio de 1928. El club núclea diversas actividades que tienen como valor fundamental la amistad, el compañerismo, las competencias y la inclusión social, posibilitando así que sea un espacio de encuentro familiar como agente socializador.

Su principal actividad es el fútbol y actualmente se encuentra participando del Torneo "Primera Nacional" siendo la categoría de mayor ascenso argentino. Nuestra entidad fue la primera de carácter deportivo en fundar un Jardín de Infantes (educación inicial) durante la década del 1970; que hoy alberga más de 200 niños diariamente, con instalaciones totalmente renovadas.
Location: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires Province

Name: beitune BikeReisen
Description:
beitune BikeReisen, Naturerlebnis & Fahrtechnik
"Teamspirit und perfekte Touren" so knapp und treffend lässt sich die Unternehmensphilosophie der Radreise- und Fahrtechnikspezialisten aus dem Südschwarzwald umreißen. Denn beitune steht nicht nur für professionell organisierte MTB- und E-MTB-Fahrtechnikkurse, Bike- und Rennradreisen im Schwarzwald, den Vogesen und in den Alpen, sondern noch mehr für: Herzlichkeit und ein variabel konzipiertes Angebot. "Wir bieten Touren und Techniktrainings nicht nur in unterschiedlichen Levels an, sondern inklusive der Möglichkeit, das Level täglich zu wechseln" erläutert Inhaberin Andrea Köngeter. Spezielle-Angebote für Mountainbikerinnen, Personaltrainings sowie individuelle Bike-Erlebnisse für Gruppen und Firmen runden das Angebot ab. Vervollständigt wird das Rund-um-Sorglos-Paket durch hochwertiges Leihmaterial und Testbikes der Marken Centurion und Merida. Ride to enjoy nature!

Name: Footb-All
Description:
Footb-All: Soluciones Integrales para el Fútbol

Footb-All ofrece servicios especializados para entrenadores, jugadores y clubes que desean llevar su rendimiento al siguiente nivel. Con un enfoque en análisis, scouting y formación, brindamos apoyo personalizado para que nuestros clientes puedan alcanzar sus objetivos y crecer en cada etapa del camino.

¿Qué Hacemos?
En Footb-All, entendemos el fútbol como un proceso de mejora constante. Por eso, trabajamos junto a nuestros clientes para ofrecer servicios que abarcan:

- Análisis y Scouting: Realizamos videoanálisis detallados y utilizamos Big Data para evaluar el rendimiento de equipos y jugadores. Nuestros servicios de scouting apoyan la detección de talento y el análisis de rivales, proporcionando informes precisos para tomar decisiones informadas.

- Formación de Entrenadores: Impulsamos el desarrollo profesional de entrenadores a través de programas de formación continua, seminarios y mentoría. Desde tácticas avanzadas hasta gestión de equipo, ayudamos a que los entrenadores fortalezcan sus habilidades y enfoques estratégicos.

- Desarrollo de Jugadores: Ofrecemos planes de entrenamiento y evaluación personalizados, que incluyen aspectos técnicos, tácticos y de rendimiento físico y mental, para optimizar el juego y la confianza de cada jugador.

¿Por Qué Footb-All?
Porque somos más que un proveedor de servicios. Nos convertimos en socios estratégicos que trabajan codo a codo con nuestros clientes, adaptándonos a sus necesidades y objetivos específicos. Nuestro equipo está compuesto por expertos en fútbol y tecnología, con una visión moderna y un compromiso profundo con la evolución del deporte.

En Footb-All, no solo ayudamos a mejorar; we grow together.

Name: PadBike
Description:
PadBike nasce dalla passione di due fratelli, Pietro e Gregorio, per il mondo  della Mountain Bike.
 L'obiettivo di questo ambizioso progetto è quello di facilitare l’interazione e la condivisione di esperienze tra appassionati di questo sport. 
I fondatori di PadBike  vogliono risolvere un problema molto semplice, un problema che li ha toccati personalmente,  ovvero la difficoltà di conoscere nuovi bikers con cui condividere spericolate  avventure sulle due ruote.

Da qui è venuta l’idea di creare una community, un posto virtuale in cui poter mettere in contatto più persone possibili, accomunate dalla voglia di andare in bici e fare nuove amicizie. Questo gli ha portato a Padbike.

Alla domanda cos’è Padbike quindi speriamo di poter rispondere che Padbike è un’opportunità. L’opportunità di creare qualcosa di bello che unisce le persone e costruisce dei legami forti basati sulla possibilità di condividere la stessa passione: quella per la mtb.

Name: VICI
Description:
VICI is an innovative sports training company that empowers athletes from all walks of life to unlock their untapped potential. Our mission is to foster a sense of community, instill positive habits, and provide personalized training programs that help athletes become the best versions of themselves both on and off the field. We envision a world where every athlete has access to high-quality training, support, and resources, regardless of their background or circumstances.

Our core team consists of current college athletes and a professional sports training organization, bringing deep industry knowledge and connections. Additionally, our mentors and advisors include experienced professionals in the fitness industry, college football coaches, and pro sports trainers.

VICI's unique approach combines the expertise of current college athletes, elite pro trainers, and AI technology to create personalized training programs for middle school and high school athletes. Our solution includes live remote training, and pre-recorded digital programs personalized via our finely tuned AI model.

We hope that our platform can bring together communities of committed athletes of all levels, empowering the next generation to be the best one yet.

Name: Tauchausflug.eu
Description:
Tauchausflu.eu ist ein Nürnberger Tauchcenter mit umfangreichem Service.
Tauchausbildung vom Anfänger bis Profi, im Sport-, Mischgas-, Höhlen- und Rebreathertauchen.

Das Ladengeschäft in Nürnberg bietet eine große Auswahl an qualitativ hochwertigen Produkten für den Tauchsport, und die größte Auswahl an Trockentauchanzügen in der Region. Als SANTI Premiumhändler haben wir immer ein Sortiment zur Anprobe, auch DUI und Blackpearl Anzüge haben wir im Verkauf.

Auch nachts können Sie einen Teil unserer Produkte erwerben - im Tauchshop Nürnberg, online.

Ebenfalls besitzen wir eine Füllstation bis 300bar für Luft, Nitrox, Trimix, Argon und Sauerstoff - alle Gase für Sport- und Tec-Tauchen.

Unsere selbst organisierten Tauchreisen sind für unterschiedliche Interessengruppen, aber immer weit ab von jedem Standard.

Arbeiten unter Wasser (Search &Rescue Insprektionen etc.) werden ebenfalls von uns durchgeführt, auch außerhalb der Sporttauchgrenzen.

Name: Jumpfit - Promoting a healthy lifestyle and fitness
Description:
העובדים מהווים ההון האנושי של הארגון.
רמת העובדים ואיכות עבודתם לצד שיתוף הפעולה ביניהם הם היוצרים את הצלחת הארגון/חברה 

בעת האחרונה בארגונים ישנה עלייה במודעות לחשיבות הפעילות גופנית, והשפעותיה על הממשק גוף נפש ותרומתה להעלאת הבריאות, הפוריות והחיוניות של העובד בארגון הנתמכת גם במחקרים
 מקומות עבודה רבים כבר מבינים את תרומת האימון לעובדים ולארגון -ומספקים לעובדים חוויות כושר מסוגים שונים, ובכך גם מעצימים את הגיבוש החברתי כערך מוסף בעבודה 

JUMFIT
נותנים מקום לכל אחד ואחת מהמשתתפים ומכל נקודת פתיחה- להיכנס לכושר ולהתקדם לעבר כל מטרה שכל אחד מציב לעצמו, להצליח ליהנות באמת מפעילות גופנית ו... לראות תוצאות. 
אנו מובילים גברים ונשים מכל קשת הגילאים לחיים בריאים יותר, איכותיים, תפקודיים ונוחים יותר,
 התמחותנו היא בהתאמת האימון לאופי העבודה _( ישיבה ממושכת, העמסה, עמידה ממושכת..) ,עיצוב וחיטוב הגוף, ירידה באחוזי שומן והצרת היקפים ובניית כושר גופני כללי, זאת ע"י אימוני כושר מגבשים מאתגרים וחווייתיים, מגוונים בציוד ובתכניות האימון וכמובן מניבי תוצאות.

בנוסף- אנו מעבירים אירועי כושר חווייתיים ומגוונים לחברות, ארגונים, עסקים ופרטיים, שמטרתם גיבוש בין עובדים, הנאה של חוויה ספורטיבית, יציאה מהשגרה, קידום בריאות ופעילות גופנית, ומהווים טעימה לעבודה הייעודית עם קבוצות האימון.

נשמח לתאם מפגש היכרות בו נעמוד על הצרכים הייחודיים בארגון שלכם ולהתאמת מבנה ואופי האימון לאופי העבודה בארגון , פרופיל העובדים וצרכי הארגון

Name: Ideal Face for Sports Consulting
Description:
At Ideal Face, we are the architects of transformative ideas in the sports and fitness landscape. Founded with a passion for innovation and a commitment to shaping the future of the sports industry, our journey commenced with the establishment of  Face2Face Sports, a testament to our dedication to enhancing the sports experience for enthusiasts worldwide. Building upon this success, we expanded our horizons with the creation of Mudarrib, solidifying our position as pioneers in the sports and fitness domain.

IdealFace serves as the innovation generator, birthing groundbreaking concepts that redefine the way we engage with sports and fitness. Beyond our established ventures, we have an exciting array of products in the pipeline, each designed to elevate the industry to new heights.

Why Choose Ideal Face for Sports Consulting:

- Innovative Solutions:
Our commitment to innovation is at the core of everything we do. From cutting-edge fitness programs to revolutionary sports experiences, we thrive on pushing the boundaries of what's possible.

- Proven Expertise:
With a decade of experience in the sports and fitness industry, we bring a wealth of knowledge and a track record of success. Our background as a Fitness Instructor, Personal Trainer, and Floor Manager ensures a comprehensive understanding of the industry's nuances.

- Entrepreneurial Vision:
Ideal Face isn't just a consulting firm; it's a hub of entrepreneurial vision. Our journey from Fitness Instructor to the establishment of multiple successful ventures showcases our commitment to innovation and strategic thinking.

- Diverse Portfolio:
Beyond  Face2Face Spots and Mudarrib, our diverse portfolio includes a multitude of products poised to disrupt the industry. Stay tuned for the next wave of game-changing solutions.

Embark on a journey with Ideal Face for Sports Consulting, where excellence meets innovation.

Name: Freeride Days Engelberg
Description:
Test! & Explore!

At the Freeride Days Engelberg it’s all about exploring new gear and learning new skills.

Test!

During the two days from 18. to 19. of march you can discover the full range of freeride and touring gear of the best and most innovative brands and manufacturers. 

Test Fee: 20.-

Explore!

Take your skills to the next level! Local mountain guides and ski pros will show you what it takes to move safely, with sound technique and in good style and through the alpine terrain around Titlis.

The Freeride Days offer you the opportunity to individually put together your weekend. Many exciting training modules and gear tests.

Name: Sunshine Wellness Adventures LLC
Description:
At Sunshine Wellness Adventures, we believe that triathlon is more than just swim, bike, and run—it's a journey of physical, mental, and emotional growth. Led by USAT-certified coaches, our mission is to help athletes of all levels unlock their potential and achieve their goals through a holistic approach to training.

We combine expert guidance in technique, endurance, and performance with an emphasis on mindfulness, recovery, and gratitude. Our coaching goes beyond the physical, teaching athletes how to develop mental resilience, prioritize rest, and embrace the process of growth.

Through personalized coaching, we provide customized training plans and ongoing communication to help you stay motivated, overcome challenges, and reach your personal best. For a more immersive experience, our training camps offer an unparalleled opportunity to hone your skills, build confidence, and connect with a supportive community of like-minded athletes.

Whether you're preparing for your first sprint triathlon or aiming to set a personal record in an Ironman, we're here to guide you every step of the way. At Sunshine Wellness Adventures, we don’t just build stronger athletes—we cultivate stronger, more mindful individuals.

Name: Transcend Adventures

Name: Ahora Trigoria
Description: Trigoria was established on maximal attention to improvement. No distractions. Reaching a new level of performance requires attention to detail with a straightforward goal set by experienced professionals. The objective is to capitalize on your training window to diminish falling behind the path, get ready for a competitive season, or improve your weaknesses and shine your strengths.

Name: FUTVOLT
Description:
FutVolt es una propuesta innovadora nacida en Montevideo, que combina fútbol, tecnología, entrenamiento y entretenimiento en un solo lugar.

Niños, jóvenes y adultos pueden poner a prueba y desarrollar sus habilidades futbolísticas en 10 estaciones especialmente diseñadas para trabajar precisión, velocidad, técnica, reacción, visión, pase, fuerza, potencia de disparo y puntería.

El espacio también cuenta con:
	•	Una cancha de Fútbol Tenis Pro,
	•	Una cancha cerrada de 2v2.
	•	Y una cancha de Street Soccer con césped sintético de última generación.

Los padres y acompañantes se involucran activamente observando desde espacios privilegiados y cómodos, mientras disfrutan de un entorno pensado tanto para el deporte como para el encuentro social.

Actualmente, FutVolt se encuentra en proceso de expansión a través de un modelo de franquicias, con el objetivo de llevar esta experiencia única a nuevos mercados.

FutVolt es fútbol como nunca lo viviste: medible, desafiante y divertido.

Name: Soccer Shots Memphis
Description: At Soccer Shots we are an introduction to soccer program that focuses on character development for children ages 2-8. Our goal is to provide a beloved growth experience for every child and a remarkable experience for every family.

Name: Renaud Gris Golf Institut
Description: The Académie Renaud Gris Golf Institut offers a sport-study program to combine high-quality education with elite-level sports training, individual coaching and summer camps in the mountains. As a true training center, we put our expertise and passion at the service of tomorrow's young talents who wish to follow the professional circuit.

Name: Divinement Bien - Montélier
Description:
Divinement Bien Montélier - Centre Sport Santé & Surpoids

Nous accompagnons les personnes souffrant de pathologies ou de maladies chroniques dans la reprise et la pratique d’une activité physique adaptée.

Notre spécialité : l’accompagnement sportif des personnes en surpoids et en situation d’obésité, avec des programmes personnalisés favorisant la santé, le bien-être et la mobilité.

 Ensemble, bougeons pour une meilleure qualité de vie !

Name: Bewegen Zonder Grenzen
Description:
Wij geloven dat sport veel meer is dan alleen fysieke activiteit. Wij zijn ervan overtuigd dat sport een krachtig middel is om persoonlijke grenzen te verleggen, zowel mentaal als fysiek. Door sport te beoefenen, ontdekken mensen hun ware potentieel en leren ze de waarde van zowel individuele inzet als teamwork.

We bereiken dit door een verantwoorde benadering van sporttraining, waarbij we focussen op het veilig en effectief verleggen van grenzen. Dit gaat verder dan alleen motorische of fysieke verbetering; het omvat ook het ontwikkelen van mentale veerkracht en doorzettingsvermogen. Onze methodes zijn gebaseerd op jarenlange ervaring en bewezen technieken die zowel individuen als teams helpen om hun prestaties te maximaliseren.

Wij bieden sportprogramma's aan die gericht zijn op het verbeteren van zowel individuele vaardigheden als teamdynamiek. Ons doel is niet alleen om sportieve prestaties te verbeteren, maar ook om de algehele welzijn en mentale gezondheid van onze deelnemers te bevorderen. Of je nu een beginner bent of een ervaren atleet, onze programma's zijn ontworpen om je te helpen je grenzen op een gezonde en duurzame manier te verleggen.

- Gerrit & Michael -

Name: Sport en Defensie maken weerbaar
Description:
De 'Sport en Defensie maken weerbaar' beweging heeft te doel bij te dragen aan weerbare jongeren doormiddel van de inzet van de kracht van sport en kernwaardes bij Defensie. 

Doelstellingen van de beweging zijn: 
1. Bijdragen aan mentale gezondheid en weerbaarheid van jongeren
2. Sport inzetten als middel voor het oplossen van maatschappelijke vraagstukken
3. Defensie en Sport centraal in de maatschappij
4. Bijdragen aan weerbare samenleving
5. Erkenning en waardering voor veteranen en militairen vergroten
6. Maatschappelijk samenwerken om te beschermen wat ons dierbaar is 

Sport en Defensie maken weerbaar is een initiatief van NV Verbindion Nieuwegein met als maatschappelijke partners:
1. Het Ministerie van Defensie
2. Nederlands Veteranen Instituut
3. Ministerie van Volksgezondheid Welzijn en Sport
4. NOC*NSF
5. CIOS Nederland
6. MBO Utrecht

Ambassadeurs zijn:
1. Ray Klaassens 
2. Ranomi Kromowidjojo

Name: Semmering-Hirschenkogel Bergbahnen GmbH
Description: Der Semmering Hirschenkogel ist ein bedeutendes Sport- und Erholungsgebiet in Österreich, das nur etwa eine Stunde von Wien und Graz entfernt ist. Im Winter können Skifahrer und Snowboarder bei Tag und Nacht am Semmering auf roten, blauen und schwarzen Pisten ihre Schwünge ziehen. Die rund 3 km lange und somit längste Rodelbahn Ostösterreichs ist ein absolutes Winter-Highlight am Semmering Hirschenkogel. Im Sommer freuen wir uns auf alle Gäste - Biker im Bikepark Semmering, Wanderer auf den vielen schönen Wanderwegen in der Semmering Region, Kletterer im Waldseilgarten Hirschenkogel, Actionsuchende beim Millennium Jump und Mountaincart-Strecke, tobende Kinder am Hirschi-Spielplatz und bei der Goldwaschanlage und Sonnenanbeter auf der großen Terrasse im Liechtensteinhaus. Am Semmering ist für jeden was dabei

Name: FlyUp MTB
Description:
In May 2010, FlyUp Ltd launched their first uplift service at the FOD Cannop Cycle Centre. Following its success, the FlyUp 417 Bike Park was built on 100 acres at Crickley Hill Farm and since opening in 2016, has continued to grow. 

One of the UKs largest privately owned bike parks, FlyUp 417 offers a variety of disciplines at a single venue. 

Suitable for all abilities and ages, the trails are there to be conquered by beginners and experts, alike. We offer gravity-fed downhill trails, the renowned uplift service, an indoor pump track, dirt jumps, 4X, a dual slalom, kids' clubs, private coaching, and bike/helmet hire. 

Facilities include an excellent café, the on-site bike shop, and free car parking.

Name: Regina South Zone Taekwondo-Do Club
Description:
Regina South Zone Taekwon-Do Club (RSZTKD) was one of the first of many clubs developed within the STFI. At RSZTKD we help to develop athletic and mental skills through a comprehensive program of patterns, sparring, and physical exercises. Our Club has classes available for all age ranges and levels, from White Belt through the many Degrees of Black Belt.

Under Grandmaster Clint Norman’s supervision, RSZTKD has developed a reputation both nationally and internationally for producing some of the best Taekwon-Do students in the world.

At RSZTKD we promote a fun, family-friendly atmosphere for training and exercise where we encourage all students to test and advance at their own pace. With time, determination, practice, and fortitude you will be able to advance up through the ranks of Taekwon-Do.

Name: Ashwini's Sports Foundation
Description:
Ashwini's Sports Foundation is a non-profit organization with the intent to create a replicable ecosystem that is able to unearth right talent and groom athletes to be consistently on par with the best in the world.  Our focus sports are Athletics, Hockey, Shooting and Swimming.

ASF is based in Gonikoppal, South Coorg with state of the art infratructure that includes a 400mt synthetic track, a hockey astro-turf (under construction), shooting range and a swimming pool. The 27-acre campus is shared with KALS, a school that ensures all round development of the children's mental and physical abilities.

We believe the coach-athlete relationship forms a partnership, and we work with every individual to develop personalized training that will elevate your running to the next level. Since there are no templates or generic plans used, the training will incorporate your unique background, current fitness and goals, while always evolving as training and fitness advance.
Once you make the decision to elevate your running, a Next Best Run Coach will be ready to join you on your journey to improved performance.

Name: Essential Canine Life Skills Ltd
Description:
Following the dog boom of the covid lockdowns my small dog training business rocketed. I was totally committed to raising the standards of dog training and educating dog owners to try and slow down the rate of dogs going into rescue through lack of education (this ethos stands strong today but I have now added the word “quality” education as the ever growing social media trends repeatedly turn out  some poor information.

I couldn’t do it alone and so I formed Essential Canine Life Skills Ltd home of exclusive franchised dog training business serving their own area. This isn’t a numbers game and quality is far better than quality and I personally support the development each individual business to ensure quality brand delivery. Potential franchise owners are vetted and worked with to ensure they have the same drive and motivation to keep improving the quality of education available to dog owners.

#togetherwecanachieve and #morethanjustadogtrainer are strap lines that echo throughout the business as I support the development of trainers into empathetic, sympathetic but honest dog owners.

The Spirit Dog Trainer series of dog trainer courses is currently under going the vigorous accreditation process with the Skills and Education Group and this is just the beginning! 

The dog trainers course is a stand alone course and candidates must have over 20 dogs handling experience and they will not be tied into a franchise areas - this is open to all. Courses can be delivered in house to other canine businesses or by attended our scheduled dates.

Brand Values
Respect & Honesty
Holistic Communication & Problem Solving
Education with Integrity
Making A Real Difference

Teaching and diving happens in a relaxed and safe environment.

Our programs are designed for players of all experience levels — from beginners picking up a stick for the first time to advanced athletes preparing for competitive play. Led by experienced coaches and former collegiate players, NLA combines technical training, game IQ development, and positive mentorship in a supportive, fun environment.

More than just a sports program, we’re building a community that teaches life lessons through the game — discipline, resilience, leadership, and respect.

Our mission: To be the first step in every child’s lacrosse journey — inspiring excellence on the field and character off it.

Name: Studio Sprawnego Ciała
Description:
Historia SSC Studio

Założycielem Studia Sprawnego Ciała jest Paweł Ziemkiewicz. Wieloletni zawodnik sportów walki - Brazylijskiego Jiu jitsu.  Na swojej sportowej drodze spotkał ludzi z różnych dyscyplin sportowych od treningu specjalistycznego pod różne sporty walki przez treningi siłowe na siłowni  czy lekkoatletyczne po specjalistów od przygotowania motorycznego. Po zakończeniu swojej przygody ze startami zainteresował się szerzej tematyką sprawności fizycznej, poprawiania warunków fizycznych pod względem sportowym oraz populacyjnym. 

Studio przy pl. Konstytucji powstało w 2018r. Na początku treningi prowadził sam Paweł z garstką swoich klientów. Z biegiem lat dołączali inni trenerzy, którzy dzielą tą samą wizję - SPRAWNOŚĆ  NA LATA. Po drodze nie obyło się bez kilku mocnych zawirowań, jak lockdown przy Covidzie czy zalanie lokalu przez ulewne deszcze :) 

SSC Studio skupia wokół siebie ludzi, którzy cenią aktywność fizyczną - nie dla ładnego, pięknego ciała, ale dla zdrowia i dobrego samopoczucia, dla sprawności tu i teraz oraz w jesieni życia, dla ludzi, którzy cenią swój czas oraz jakość oferowanych im usług.

Name: A.s.d. Sant’Elena
Description:
On the 12th of June 2021, the Sant’Elena group had been created by three foreign students that were preparing for a university tournament. The first name of the group was “Back to football” and it was in many ways and comeback to origins. First of all, we have to put into context this date. In June 2021, Italy had just undergone its peak in Covid-19 cases and that summer was the occasion for many students to come back to an active social life. Since many of the other sport associations in Venice didn’t start right away after covid, there was an active demand for playing football in the city. 

As most Venetian players had long abandoned the Sant’Elena pitch for its rugged look for better maintained private pitches, this group found an opportunity to make out the best of the only public football pitch in Venice. 

The Sant’Elena area, in the most eastern side of Venice, had always been strictly linked to sports and specifically to football.

However, the first members fo the group weren’t from Venice, some were germans, others from Mozambique or Egypt and some even from Ecuador. This meant that this association was, and is to this day, based on internationality and inclusivity. Seeing that there was a strong base for something more than just a whatsapp group of more than 360 members, three other friends decided to found a proper sport association: l’Associazione Sportiva Dilettantistica Sant’Elena. This meant that new and bigger projects could be carried out: charity matches other than typical games, fully polished tournaments involving more than 40 players with kits and trophies, and the latest and biggest project yet: the “SNT’LN LEAGUE”. A proper league with 10 teams made up of 12 players each with a personalized kit and a different sponsor that meet every two weeks for 5v5 games accompanied with a dj set. The goal of this project is to create a fix sport event for young people in Venice. Associazione Sportiva Sant’Elena wants to promote inclusion through sport.

Name: Fundacja Górnika Zabrze
Description:
Akademia Piłkarska Górnika Zabrze to miejsce, gdzie piłka nożna łączy się z pasją, przyjaźnią i wychowaniem. Naszym priorytetem jest stworzenie bezpiecznego i inspirującego środowiska, w którym dzieci i młodzież rozwijają się nie tylko jako piłkarze, ale także jako wartościowi ludzie, gotowi na wyzwania dorosłego życia.

Za rozwój zawodników odpowiada ponad 30-osobowa kadra trenerów i menedżerów – wykształconych, ambitnych i pełnych pasji. Dzięki ich wiedzy i doświadczeniu młodzi adepci futbolu trafiają w najlepsze ręce.

W Akademii trenuje ponad 900 zawodników w wieku od 4 do 19 lat, reprezentujących klub w blisko 20 drużynach – od lig lokalnych aż po prestiżową Centralną Ligę Juniorów.

Co roku bierzemy udział w ponad 100 turniejach krajowych i międzynarodowych (m.in. we Włoszech, Niemczech, Belgii, Francji czy Czechach) oraz organizujemy własne rozgrywki wewnętrzne, w których uczestniczą wszyscy nasi podopieczni.

Dbamy także o rozwój poza boiskiem – organizujemy obozy sportowe nad morzem i w górach, gdzie piłka nożna łączy się z wypoczynkiem i niezapomnianą przygodą.

Nasze cele są jasne:

wychowawczy – kształtowanie charakteru, dyscypliny i przywiązania do barw Górnika,

edukacyjny – wspieranie rozwoju młodych ludzi,

sportowy – indywidualne podejście do każdego zawodnika i maksymalne rozwinięcie jego potencjału.

Akademia Górnika Zabrze – wychowujemy piłkarzy, kształtujemy ludzi.

Name: Armor Explor
Description:
Mon projet professionnel se concentre sur la création d'expériences éducatives immersives et enrichissantes, principalement destinées aux enfants et au grand public.

En tant qu'éducatrice à l'environnement, mon travail consiste à concevoir et à organiser des animations et des projets environnementaux en partenariat avec les écoles. J'ai à cœur d'offrir aux élèves des opportunités uniques d'explorer et de comprendre les merveilles de la nature à travers des activités ludiques et éducatives.

Par ailleurs, je prévois de mettre en place un "club nature" hebdomadaire les mercredis et samedis, où les enfants inscrits pourront se retrouver pour des activités en plein air, des jeux pédagogiques et des découvertes autour de la faune et de la flore locales.

En période de vacances et les week-ends, j'organise des stages, des journées et/ou des demi-journées d'animation et de sensibilisation à l'environnement, ouverts au grand public, incluant adultes et familles. Ces événements sont l'occasion pour chacun de se reconnecter avec la nature et d'approfondir ses connaissances sur des sujets variés liés à l'environnement.

Les milieux naturels que je mets en valeur sont principalement la mer/les rivières, les bois/forêts ainsi que le patrimoine naturel breton, offrant ainsi des expériences diversifiées et enrichissantes pour tous les participants. Mon objectif est de créer des moments inoubliables et inspirants, tout en encourageant un engagement durable envers la préservation de notre précieux environnement.

Kidokinetics partners with local centers and schools to get your kids moving more by having fun through our evidenced-based sports enrichment and P.E. programs. Our goal is to make our classes so fun that the kids don’t even realize that its real exercise.

Kidokinetics empowers kids from ages 1 to 12 to play confident by providing a fun introduction to sports through 8 different programs offered at local centers, schools, parks and more.
