Name: SANO PADEL
Description:
Fondée en 2022, l'association SANO PADEL est régie par la loi du 1er juillet 1901 et possède un caractère d’intérêt général sportif. 

Son objet vise à l'organisation, l'animation et la promotion d'activités à caractère sportif, social, ou éducatif en lien avec le développement de la pratique du PADEL. 

Les actions se développent au travers d'évènements, animations, stages ou  formations, et favorisent une pratique saine du Padel santé ou en compétition ou animations loisir. 

L'association SANO PADEL intervient en soutien des joueurs et joueuses, animés par des valeurs de fair-play, de sport-santé, de prévention des blessures et du dépassement de soi. 

Bienvenue sur notre page d'actualités réseaux, et merci de votre soutien en faveur de l'accroissement du Padel en France, de la prévention des risques, nuisances ou blessures dans ce merveilleux sport.

LE PADEL en deux mots : 

Loin d'une mode éphémère, le Padel est un sport en pleine croissance qui conquiert chaque jour de nouveaux adeptes. Jeu de raquette, le Padel mixe les règles du squash et du tennis, se pratique en double sur un terrain entouré de 10X20 m entouré de vitres et de grillages. 

Très ludique et convivial, le padel est accessible à tous et se pratique parfaitement en mixte. On dénombre à ce jour plus de 180. 000 adeptes en France. En Espagne, ce sport est Roi, et est prescrit sur ordonnances médicales comme vecteur de sport-santé.

Passionnés et animés par les valeurs du Sport - Santé, nous souhaitons longue et saine vie à SANO PADEL pour une pratique vib(o)rante et ludique ! 

A BIENTOT, 
SANO PADEL TEAM

We work closely with the district, the prevention department at the police station, environmental workers, local clubs and local schools, to ensure that local children and young people in our target areas have a better range of activities and a positive gathering point, where they can experience a sense of belonging and accomplishment



We want to work closely with schools in the local community to best reach out to as many people as possible and adapt the offer to the local community's wishes/needs.



We want to make the threshold for joining our activities as low as possible, so we reach as many people as possible and especially those who need it most.



Through our collaboration with the school, we hope to activate their students more both during and after school, and strengthen the identity of the local community.



Having our offices in the targeted area keeps us close to the action. This makes us easily accessible with the children, schools and the local sports teams in the area.

Name: Gymnastics Excellence
Description:
Gymnastic Excellence helps gymnastic clubs and coaches unlock their full potential by aligning performance with long-term goals. We specialise in gymnastics coaching, athlete development, club growth strategy, and sports leadership training, providing tailored solutions that drive measurable results.

Through workshops, mentoring, and strategic consulting, we equip clubs with the knowledge, tools, and confidence to deliver world-class gymnastics experiences. Our programs include:
Gymnastics skill development & physical preparation workshops
Coach mentoring, leadership & professional development
Program design, planning & implementation
Strategic club growth & business planning
Gymnastics venue design & facility optimisation
Event planning & management
Coach locum and support services

Founded and directed by Peter and Kym Dowdell, Gymnastic Excellence combines decades of expertise in high-performance sport, club management, and international gymnastics leadership.

Peter Dowdell MAT, BA, DipT(PE), is one of Australia’s most respected gymnastics coaches and program directors. He established Queensland’s State High Performance Program and Moreton Bay College Centre of Excellence, producing Olympians, Commonwealth Games medalists, and World Championship representatives. At Gladstone Gymnastics, he and Kym oversaw rapid growth, building a 1,300sqm facility, expanding membership beyond 1,000 gymnasts, and developing national champions.

Kym Dowdell OAM has held leadership roles across international gymnastics governance, event management, and education. As Competition Director for the Sydney 2000 Olympic Games, she staged Men’s, Women’s, Rhythmic, and Trampoline competitions. She later led Gymnastics Queensland through unprecedented growth as CEO and Education Director, and continues to advance coach education, performance pathways, and strategic planning.

At Gymnastic Excellence, our mission is clear:
Assisting Gymnastic Clubs and Coaches to Reach Their Potential.

Description: Welcome to Sportya, the community-based platform created from our passion for delivering an authentic and unique experience for amateur tennis players. With our six levels of play, whether you're a beginner or an experienced player, we have a tennis match waiting for you. Name: Overtime Sports Inc
Description:
Overtime Sports Inc. (OTS) is an innovative venture revolutionizing the youth sports landscape. Our mission is to harness the transformative power of sports to develop well-rounded individuals. At OTS, athletic training goes hand in hand with life skills education, fostering not just physical prowess but also emotional, mental, and social well-being.

Our programs integrate seven key facets of personal development: Mental, Emotional, Relational, Professional, Physical, Spiritual, and Sexual, ensuring a holistic approach to nurturing young athletes. We understand that sports are a powerful medium for growth, teaching invaluable lessons in discipline, teamwork, resilience, and leadership.

OTS’s state-of-the-art facilities repurpose underused brick-and-mortar spaces, turning them into vibrant hubs for sports and community engagement. This strategy is not just a smart real estate play but a commitment to sustainable development and community revitalization. Our centers offer a variety of sports, including emerging games like esports, and are equipped with amenities that cater to modern family needs, such as co-shared workspaces and play areas for young children.

We place a high value on balanced coaching and free play. By creating an environment free from undue pressure, we allow children to explore, learn, and fall in love with sports naturally. This approach helps prevent burnout and keeps the focus on enjoyment and personal development.

In our pursuit to redefine youth sports, we also aim to reshape the role of parents. At OTS, parents are encouraged to be cheerleaders, supporting their children in a healthy, non-intrusive manner. We believe that a supportive family environment is key to nurturing confident, independent, and successful athletes.

Join us at OTS, where sports are more than just games. They are opportunities for growth, learning, and community building. We’re not just training athletes; we’re raising the next generation of leaders, thinkers, and inn

Wir bringen Kids in Bewegung und unterstützen Eltern, Kita-Träger und Schulen bei dieser wichtigen Aufgabe. Mit jährlich über 3.000 Unterrichtsstunden in diversen Bewegungsförderungsprojekten hat sich Sportport zum größten Anbieter im Schulsport entwickelt. Rund 25 ausgebildete Übungsleiter in 6 Bundesländern vermitteln Spaß an Bewegung und sportliche Werte, fördern Gesundheitsbewusstsein und die Teilhabe aller Kinder und Jugendlichen an den Programmen.

Wir sind Partner von öffentlichen Institutionen, Krankenkassen und anderen Unternehmen, die sich in den Bereichen Gesundheitsförderung, Prävention und CSR (corporate social responsibility) engagieren. Name: A.S.D.P.S FOLGORE
Description:
ASD FOLGORE è una società sportiva storica fondata nel 1954 con sede a San Benedetto del Tronto.
Nasce dall’idea del suo Fondatore il Mr.Luigi Ursini con il principio cardine di dare l’opportunità a tutti i bambini provenienti da qualsiasi contesto sociale e culturale di praticare il gioco più belle del mondo il Calcio.
Con quasi 70 anni di storia la Folgore ha toccato diverse generazioni vantando negli anni molti tesserati, questa storicità ha fatto si che intorno alla società sportiva nascesse una  vera e propria comunità che negli anni ha alimentato il progetto sportivo e culturale avviato dallo storico fondatore.
Oggi grazie al grande spirito d’appartenenza che contraddistingue la nostra società dei ex tesserati “FOLGORINI” vogliono continuare  ad alimentare questo senso di comunità mantenendo i stessi principi di un tempo con uno sguardo rivolto al futuro e all’innovazione nell’insegnamento del calcio.
Location: San benedetto del tronto, Ascoli Piceno

Description:
Shikhar: The Mountaineering Club of ARSD College, University of Delhi

Founded in 2017, Shikhar is the official mountaineering and adventure club of Atma Ram Sanatan Dharma College, University of Delhi. Our mission is to foster a spirit of adventure and promote mountaineering and other exhilarating outdoor activities.

As one of the fastest-growing college societies, Shikhar has successfully organized and conducted numerous treks and expeditions to breathtaking destinations such as Kedarkantha, Roopkund, Brahmatal, Chopta Chandrashila and many more. Beyond trekking, we regularly host activities like wall climbing, cycling, and nature walks,bouldering keeping the spirit of adventure alive on campus.

This page serves as a hub for our vibrant community—where like-minded individuals come together to share their experiences, stories, and passion for the mountains. It’s a space to connect, learn, and inspire each other to reach new heights.

We’re excited to connect with fellow adventurers and share our love for the peaks. Follow us to stay updated on our latest expeditions and events, and let’s continue to nurture the spirit of exploration together!

Name: Take Aim Technologies
Description:
At Take Aim our passion is empowering clay target shooters and sportsman to improve their accuracy and elevate their shooting skills to the next level. Our patented SmartShot software uses the ShotTracker’s integrated camera, processor and sensor system to turn your shotgun into an intelligent device.

The SmartShot Software analyzes your shot to deliver immediate feedback on hit and miss accuracy, range to the target, velocity of the target, probability of breakage and the motion of the shooter. The analysis yields the corrections that the shooter needs to make the next shot aimed precisely and on target. This performance feedback is presented on the shooter’s smart phone both audibly and visually via the ClayTracker Pro Application. This information is used as the foundation to provide an incredible learning environment and an engaging social experience.

Name: Newquay Golf Club
Description:
Our picturesque 18 hole course is located in the heart of the county and offers a wonderful introduction to Links Golf to everyone, 

A revered Harry Colt designed course built 1890.
Not only a landmark of natural beauty. Newquay’s iconic Links also possesses a colourful and exciting history that has made it the prestigious Club that it is today. The location of Newquay’s Golf Links is perhaps one of the finest in the world, along the whole length of the wonderful stretch of sand known as Fistral Beach.
Thanks to Colt’s revolutionary designs, the Club has always prided itself on its modern course planning techniques. Over the years, no expense has been soared to make the course the best it can possibly be. In the hottest summers or the coldest winters, the velvety grass of the putting greens will still spring beneath your feet.

People can take part in our events as individuals or create/join teams towards a common target. A great way to get your teams on board and motivated to work together. 

Join thousands of others for the Run Up to Christmas at https://www.runthings.co.uk/events/run-up-to-christmas-2025

Name: Future Stars Summer Camps
Description:
With over 40 years of experience, it’s hard to believe where Future Stars is now. What began as a passion for the game of tennis and a keen interest in sharing what a healthy, complex, and uplifting game it can be, has miraculously turned into a highly satisfying business.


Our first summer camp was a standalone tennis camp at Manhattanville College with no more than a dozen campers. The following year, soccer star Pele ran a hugely successful soccer camp at the same facility with hundreds of kids attending, showing that there was an interest and a need for a soccer camp. When Pele didn't plan on returning, Future Stars took up the mantle and expanded into the world of soccer camps. 

As the saying goes: "The rest is history.” We are now operating 30-40 different programs at multiple locations throughout New York. What was initially focused on sports camps has blossomed into programs in science, technology, engineering, arts, theater, and more.

We are extremely proud of the grassroots development that we have facilitated and some of the trends we have set. We are blessed with an extremely talented and forward-thinking team that constantly anticipates new markets and methods. Most satisfying are the relationships we have nurtured with campers and staff for over 40 years.

ŻEGLARSTWO MAMY W SWOIM DNA

Do ciężkiej pracy napędzają nas nasi klienci, którzy wracają do naszych portów by czerpać pełnymi garściami z tego, co oferują im jeziora. Nasza kadra to doświadczeni instruktorzy, zaangażowani wychowawcy i profesjonalni sternicy. Posiadamy najwyższe kwalifikacje poświadczone uznanymi certyfikatami Polskiego Związku Żeglarskiego, Royal Yachting Association, International Yacht Training. Regularnie organizujemy wewnętrzne unifikacje i warsztaty, uczestniczymy również w szkoleniach zewnętrznych.

Zapraszamy do naszej Akademii.

 For inquiries or to learn more about how we can enhance your squash employment experience, don't hesitate to reach out to us here on LinkedIn or via email at SquashJobs.

#SquashJobs #SquashEmployment #ElevateSquashCareers

Name: Nivaan Plays
Description:
I am an aspiring Grandmaster with a deep-rooted passion for chess that has shaped my journey both as a competitive player and a curious learner. With over 200 prestigious accolades across global, national, and school-level tournaments, I proudly hold the title of World School Chess Champion, alongside distinctions such as Arena FIDE Master and Candidate Master (elect).

Currently a student at Global Indian International School, Singapore, I am committed to academic excellence while continuously honing my strategic thinking and resilience through chess. My achievements have earned me recognition in the Singapore Book of Records, the World Book of Records (UK), and multiple Sports Excellence Awards.

Chess is more than a game to me—it's a path to self-discipline, creativity, and intellectual growth. Beyond the board, I am a community-driven individual who finds purpose in giving back, whether by mentoring young players or contributing to local service initiatives.

I also enjoy exploring diverse interests such as mathematics, public speaking, technology (Python programming), and languages. My journey is one of relentless learning, and I look forward to making a meaningful impact in both the chess world and the broader community.

Name: FITkeeper
Description:
Als FITkeeper bied ik onder andere Personal Training aan in Zeewolde en in de omgeving van Zeewolde. Personal Training in diverse takken van sport en op elk niveau.

Sporten met persoonlijke aandacht
Sporten met persoonlijke aandacht zodat jij je sportieve doel(en) kan bereiken. Samen bepalen wij jouw realistische doel en stellen een plan op hoe we hier naartoe kunnen werken. Denk bijvoorbeeld aan afvallen of aankomen, krachttraining, conditietraining of leniger te worden. Ook bied ik mentale training aan zodat jij je volledig op je sportprestaties kunt focussen. Met FITkeeper als jouw Personal Trainer behaal je het maximale resultaat. 

Allround Sport- en Bewegingscoach
Ik ben een Allround Sport- en Bewegingscoach. Dit betekent dat ik ben opgeleid op diverse gebieden binnen de sport. Dit zijn onder andere Personal Coaching (Personal Training), Sportcoaching, Sportpsychologie, en Sportvoeding.
 
Sport en bewegen is meer dan bijvoorbeeld twee keer per week een uur naar de sportschool. Je hebt namelijk ook te maken met motivatie, concentratie, emotie en gevoelens die het sporten beïnvloeden. Iets wat vaak vergeten wordt, maar zeker een belangrijk deel uitmaakt van jouw sportieve prestaties.
 
Een Sport- en Bewegingscoach stelt individuele trainingsschema’s op, kent de technieken voor het trainen van uithoudingsvermogen, spierkracht, lenigheid en/of jouw energieverbruik. Daarnaast geef ik tips voor het creëren van een actieve(re) levensstijl. 
 
Mensen willen bewuster gaan leven. Hoe ze dat aan moeten pakken is echter niet voor iedereen zo eenvoudig. Als Sport- en Bewegingscoach help ik je ook om je voeding te matchen met jouw sportieve bezigheden.

Name: Bulletproof fitness
Description:
Bulletproof fitness biedt de totaaloplossing voor vertrouwen in je lichaam en jezelf. 

Wij willen mensen bulletproof maken voor alles wat het leven te bieden heeft op fysiek en mentaal gebied. Door verder te kijken dan alleen je training, voeding en slaap, maar juist ook te kijken naar alles eromheen. Je mentale gesteldheid, stress management, je houding op werk en in het dagelijks leven, je manier van bewegen en door het in de gaten houden van je micronutriënten en daar te kiezen voor kwaliteit suppletie waar nodig. 

Wij leren jou op een duurzame manier jouw doel te bereiken en te behouden voor de rest van je leven. Wij lossen de problemen op waar de rest niet de moeite voor wou doen. 

Wij gaan niet mee met de hypes, proberen je niet iets aan te smeren. We zijn er niet voor mensen op zoek naar een quick fix, want die bestaat niet. Wij vertellen je wat je moet horen, niet wat je wilt horen.

Wij helpen je met onze bulletproof methode op weg naar jouw doel. We zien je niet als nummertje of before en after foto, maar behandelen je als persoon. 

Wij doen wat we zeggen en maken geen valse beloftes naar klanten toe die we niet waar kunnen maken.

2. Inspiring the pupils and players

Name: ACA - Associação Catarinense de Altinha
Description:
Associação Catarinense de Altinha (ACA)

Muito além de um jogo.
A Associação Catarinense de Altinha (ACA) estrutura a altinha como esporte oficial e instrumento de desenvolvimento social, conectando empresas, governo e sociedade por meio de um esporte democrático, educativo e transformador.

Promovemos inclusão social, cidadania e desenvolvimento humano através da prática esportiva, atuando especialmente com crianças, adolescentes e comunidades em situação de vulnerabilidade. 
Nossos projetos unem formação, voluntariado, eventos esportivos e programas corporativos que fortalecem o bem-estar, a convivência e o impacto social em Santa Catarina.

 Nossos Valores

Inclusão: esporte para todos, sem barreiras.
Colaboração: trabalho em equipe e parcerias sólidas.
Excelência: qualidade e propósito em tudo que fazemos.
Impacto: transformação social real e mensurável.

 Áreas de Atuação

Altinha Transforma: oficinas gratuitas em escolas e comunidades.
Laboratório de Altinha: esporte como benefício corporativo e conexão com empresas.
Networking Empresarial: marketplace B2B que conecta empresas engajadas com o esporte e o impacto social.
Hub de Talentos: ponte entre profissionais e marcas que acreditam em propósito, cultura esportiva e ESG.
Eventos Oficiais: festivais e campeonatos que celebram o esporte e fomentam o turismo e a convivência.

 Compromisso com os ODS da ONU

A ACA contribui diretamente para os Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável (ODS), com foco em:

ODS 3: Saúde e Bem-Estar
ODS 4: Educação de Qualidade
ODS 10: Redução das Desigualdades
ODS 11: Cidades e Comunidades Sustentáveis
ODS 16: Paz, Justiça e Instituições Eficazes

Com mais de 430 jovens impactados, 10 ações sociais realizadas e 100% de força voluntária, seguimos expandindo o movimento que transforma vidas através da altinha.

 Saiba mais: www.aca.altinha.org.br

Name: Fußballgolf Facilities GmbH
Description:
Die Hybridsportart Fußballgolf ist eine niedrigschwellige Sport- und Freizeitbetätigung für jedermann / jederfrau zwischen 7 und 70 Jahren. Es sind keinerlei Vorkenntnisse, Equipment, Platzreife oder teure Clubmitgliedschaften vonnöten. Jeder kommt "mit dem Runden ins Runde". Spaß- und Teamfaktor sind maximal. Und das an der frischen Luft im Grünen. 
Ob im Familien- oder Freundeskreis, für Kindergeburtstage, Firmen- und Teamevents, Junggesellenabschiede, Fußball- und Sportmannschaften, Sommerfeste: alle finden bei uns eine erlebnisreiche Freizeit- und Erlebnisplattform.
Aktuell betreiben wir drei Fußballgolfanlagen, jeweils mit gastronomischen Einrichtungen im ostwestfälischen Detmold bei Bielefeld (27 Bahnen), in Rehling (aktuell 18 Bahnen, Ausbau auf 36 Bahnen geplant) vor den Toren Augsburgs sowie vor Alpenpanorama im wunderschönen Inzell (36 Bahnen).
Nach Ausbau Rehling werden pro Jahr 80.000 Gäste einer aktiven Freizeitbeschäftigung auf unseren Anlagen nachgehen mit einer Verweildauer zwischen 2,5 bis hin zu 5/6 Stunden.
Eine perfekte Plattform zur Markenplatzierung und -inszenierung im Rahmen von Sponsoringpartnerschaften.
Wir sind auf Expansionskurs und suchen deutschlandweit geeignete Flächen für weitere Anlagen. Der Mindest-Flächenbedarf liegt bei 2,5 Hektar (18 Bahnen) bis hin zu mindestens 5 bis 8 Hektar (für 36 Bahnen).

The school sports system is completely different from district, state level system, where schools play tournaments with their own franchisee schools, which again creates a barrier and does not allow the full utilisation of the sporting potential of a city and discourages from creating a sporting culture of the city.

Name: Bergführer Ennstal
Description:
Christoph und Thomas sind in der atemberaubenden Kulisse des Ennstals zwischen Gesäuse und Dachstein aufgewachsen, wo majestätische Berge und unberührte Natur ihre Kindheit prägten.
Diese einzigartige Umgebung hat nicht nur ihre Wurzeln gefestigt, sondern auch ihre tief verwurzelte Leidenschaft für die Berge entfacht. Schon früh entdeckten die beiden Freunde, dass sie eine gemeinsame Begeisterung für das Bergsteigen und die alpine Schönheit teilen.

Nach Jahren der gemeinsamen Erlebnisse in der Natur haben sie sich dazu entschlossen, ihre Leidenschaft in eine berufliche Richtung zu lenken. Nach der Ausbildung zum staatlich geprüften Berg- und Schiführer haben Christoph und Thomas das Ziel, ihr umfangreiches Wissen und ihre Begeisterung für die Berge zu teilen. Gemeinsam möchten sie nicht nur Herausforderungen meistern, sondern auch anderen die Faszination und den Respekt vor der Bergwelt näherbringen.

Name: Islas Hormigas Club de Buceo
Description:
Somos un club de buceo ubicado en el impresionante entorno de Cabo de Palos, especializado en proporcionar servicios de buceo de alta calidad y experiencias inolvidables en la Reserva Marina de Cabo de Palos.

Nuestro equipo de instructores altamente cualificados ofrece cursos de buceo de todos los niveles reconocidos por las principales organizaciones como FEDAS, SSI, IANTD, PADI, GUE y ACUC. Ya seas un principiante emocionado por descubrir el mundo submarino o un buceador certificado en busca de nuevas aventuras, tenemos el curso perfecto para ti.

Además de los cursos, también ofrecemos bautizos de iniciación en el buceo para que puedas experimentar la sensación de respirar bajo el agua y descubrir la belleza de nuestras praderas de Posidonia y fauna marina.

Nuestras inmersiones guiadas te llevarán a explorar los asombrosos fondos marinos de la Reserva Marina de Cabo de Palos. Conocemos los mejores lugares y nos enorgullece ofrecer inmersiones seguras y emocionantes para buceadores certificados de todos los niveles. Sumérgete con nosotros y maravíllate con la abundante vida marina y los impresionantes paisajes submarinos.

Además de nuestros servicios de buceo, también brindamos un completo servicio de reparación y mantenimiento de equipos, asegurando que tus equipos de buceo estén en perfectas condiciones para que puedas disfrutar de tus inmersiones con total confianza.

En el Club de buceo Islas Hormigas, nos apasiona el buceo y nos esforzamos por ofrecer una experiencia excepcional a todos nuestros clientes. Únete a nosotros y descubre un mundo submarino lleno de maravillas y aventuras emocionantes.

 Si eres un club, entidad deportiva o marca y quieres mejorar tu comunicación, estructurar tu proyecto o explorar posibles colaboraciones, escríbenos.

Name: MK Handball Camp
Description:
Hvordan opstod MK Handball Camp? 
I løbet af foråret 2020 udbrød corona, hvilket satte en stopper for håndboldsæsonen. I den forbindelse opstod behovet for selvtræning, og Handball Fundamentals kom til. Under hele forløbet stod det klart at der var et kæmpe potentiale i Handball Fundamentals. Ønsket om at holde sig igang imens sæson var sat på pause, blev skiftet ud med viljen til at ville tilføje noget nyt til sporten. Nemlig legen med bolden og turde at fejle noget mere. 
Så vi har startet MK Handball Camp, fordi vi har et brændende ønske om at give noget videre til den unge håndboldgeneration. 

Hvad er Handball Fundalmentals? 
Handball Fundamentals er udviklet af fysisk træner for kvindelandsholdet Line Hovgaard-Hansen og medejer og tidligere ind- og udlandsprofessionelle basketspiller Nicolai Iversen. Det er en træning af de helt grundlæggende bevægelser i sporten. Træningsformen er med stor inspiration i basketball, dog er alle øvelserne 100% håndboldrelateret. Da behandlingen af bolden er blandt de vigtigste elementer i håndbold, er en eller flere bolde involveret i øvelserne. Målet med træningen at styrke fornemmelsen for bolden og dermed optimere de individuelle håndboldspecifikke egenskaber.

Hvad er målet så med MK Handball Camp? 
Målet med MK Handball Camp, er at give de unge en uforglemmelig oplevelse. En camp hvor fællesskabet hele tiden udvikler sig, og man skaber venner for livet. En camp der skubber grænser, og er med til at udvikle den enkelte - personligt og sportsligt. 
Så er det en unik mulighed for at blive trænet af nogle af landets mest kompetente indenfor deres fag. 

Så hvis dit barn er U13-U17 spiller, og du gerne vil give dem en uforglemmelig oplevelse, så tøv ikke med at tage fat i os eller følg linket.

Name: Rival Sailing
Description:
We're a recognised RYA Sail Training Centre operating in the beautiful Firth of Clyde in the west of Scotland. We deliver accredited RYA sail cruising courses and informal sailing activities on board legendary Rival 41C sail training yacht East End Endeavour. 

http://www.rivalsailing.co.uk
If you're looking for globally recognised sailing qualifications, we deliver a range of all-inclusive RYA Sail Cruising courses, from Start Yachting (2 days) and Competent Crew (5 days) for beginners, to Day Skipper and Coastal Skipper (both 5 days) for more experienced sailors.

Other sailing services include skippered day sails, holiday charter cruises, mile-builders in the west of Scotland and beyond - perfect for CPD opportunities or a relaxing but adventurous break! We also offer informal sailing tuition to help you brush up on your skills. Suitable for all ages and levels of experience! 

http://www.eastendendeavour.org.uk
We think sailing should be accessible to everyone so we offer Community Sail Challenges through our sister company, East End Endeavour Ltd - a non-profit social enterprise aimed at delivering rewarding sailing opportunities to schools, young people and community organisations. 

Companies looking to fulfil CSR aims can support EEE Ltd by booking a Team-building Cruise during which participants will face challenges and pull together as crew as they learn to sail yacht East End Endeavour. All profits are redistributed to provide more Sail Challenges for young people from disadvantaged areas of Scotland.

Volunteering opportunities (e.g. crewing, maintenance, fund raising) are also available.

Brace yourself for the most exhilarating ride of your life!

As the world's highest gorge swing, this gravity-defying activity will have you stepping, or perhaps diving, off the edge of the waterfall, free-falling into the depths of the 55-storey gorge below. Feel the rush of wind, the breathtaking views, and the pure thrill as you plummet into the unknown.

Discover the thrilling experiences that await you and plan your next adrenaline-packed outing with us. We've got something for everyone!

The conference center entails a large conference hall and for smaller auditoriums with state of the art multimedia hardware for on site use as well as for online conferences and seminars and meetings. 

There are two wood-stove saunas on the shores of the beautiful Kääriku lake.

Exquisite Service: The Alpine Center at Suvretta House offers ski and alpine equipment rentals and sales services and remains open in the summer for outdoor enthusiasts.
Our Mission: To strike the perfect balance between tradition and innovation, providing our guests with unforgettable experiences – all while celebrating the unique nature and energy of the Engadine.

Experience what Suvretta Sports has in store for your next unforgettable journey.

Our core members were formally trained in Japan as soft skill trainers and have conducted training sessions in Japan for over 4 years; in Chile with the Chilean Government and UNDP; on board The Peace Boat which holds special status with the UN and in Canada as a member of the Million Dollar Round Table. Description: Covered Bridge is a Fuzzy Zoeller- designed 18-hole course nestled on a gently rolling plain in the heart of Southern Indiana, only 14 miles from downtown Louisville, Kentucky. Each hole has been laid out to emphasize the natural beauty of the landscape and panorama. The par 72 circuit features five lakes, a meandering creek and is pleasantly forested. Greens are gently contoured, and trap placement is challenging but not punishing. Paved cart paths connect all tees and carts can be driven anywhere on the course's Zoysia grass fairways. Each hole offers a choice of four separate tees matching the course to the ability level of any player. Covered Bridge Golf Club is known for its breathtaking, picturesque golf course views, elegant clubhouse and first-class service. Covered Bridge strives to meet all your needs and then some!

Description:

Art Vermette started The Dive Shop because he loved SCUBA and wanted to contribute to the local SCUBA community. Art has spent the last 34 years ensuring that divers have access to quality gear at affordable prices. He has been, and continues to, train new divers under first the YMCA, and now the SCUBA Educators banner.

Matt Vermette began his diving career in 2013, and as of January 2020 has taken over day-to-day operation of the The Dive Shop. Art continues to teach and be a big part of everything we do.

Description:

TSI founder Mark Mallon has cultivated domestic and international soccer and corporate partnerships to build SOCCER FACILITIES and continue developing players with summer soccer camps and academy training programs in the USA.

Mark Mallon, CEO and Founder of The Soccer Institute ( TSI ) has a distinguished career history of success including youth, high school, ODP, US Soccer Development Academy Director experience and NCAA Division I coaching at  Rutgers, Yale University, and Head Men's Soccer Coach at the University of California - Berkeley (CAL Golden Bears) orchestrating one of the nations best national ranking turnarounds in history - taking CAL from 145th to #2 in October 1996 with wins over UCLA, Stanford, Santa Clara and U. Washington, 

Mark Mallon offers a unique combination of coaching experience, fundraising, and program administration at the youth and collegiate level prior to The Soccer Institute, 

Mark has attained the USSF A license, NSCAA/USC Premier & National Diploma in the USA and traveled to Europe for the  FA Badge - England at Lilleshall, and FA Badge - Scotland at Inverclyde Largs.

On the development side, TSi founder Mark Mallon spearheaded the capital campaign at UC Berkeley for the Goldman Soccer Field in Witter Stadium,  established the adidas Rolling Thunder Scholarship for Men's Soccer at CAL, and developed the seventy five acre campus at The Soccer Institute in Ohio.

Notre action s’inscrit dans une vision à la fois individuelle et collective de la prévention.

Prim’adal développe également des programmes novateurs en Île-de-France dans l’adoption de comportements favorables à la santé.

Name: GP's Badminton & Sports Excellence
Description:
At GP’s Badminton & Sports Excellence, we specialize in delivering professional badminton coaching for kids and adults at our state-of-the-art badminton centers. Beyond our own facilities, we bring exclusive coaching programs to a variety of locations, including community courts, sports clubs, residential apartment clubhouses, corporate campuses, resorts, and hotels—making quality badminton training accessible wherever you are.

What We Offer:
•	Professional Coaching Programs: Tailored training for beginners, intermediates, and advanced players, ensuring holistic skill development.
•	Fitness & Conditioning: Dedicated programs to enhance physical fitness, agility, and endurance.
•	Competitive Training: High-performance coaching for players aspiring to compete at state, national, and international levels.
•	Recreational Badminton: Structured sessions for those looking to enjoy the sport, stay active, and connect socially.
•	Personalized Player Development: Customized plans to address the unique strengths, weaknesses, and goals of each athlete.
•	Tournaments & Events: Regular competitions to provide exposure, build confidence, and foster a competitive spirit

Our Vision:

To inspire and develop individuals through badminton, promoting values of discipline, respect, and continuous improvement.

Why Choose Us:
•	A team of experienced and certified coaches with a proven track record.
•	World-class infrastructure with professional-grade courts and equipment.
•	A democratic and inclusive coaching style that balances discipline with player engagement.
•	Comprehensive management support led by our expert POC, ensuring seamless communication with parents and players.

Whether you’re here to take your game to the next level or simply enjoy the sport, GP’s Badminton & Sports Excellence is your ultimate destination for badminton training and fitness.

Join us to elevate your game and achieve excellence!

At SLT, we believe in the power of structure, discipline, and community. Our mission goes beyond basketball — we prepare young men to become leaders, teammates, and high-character individuals. Every player is supported by a “village” of coaches, mentors, alumni, and families committed to growth and excellence.

Program Offerings Include:
	•	Travel Teams (Pro16/NXTPro circuit + local/regional competition)
	•	Skills Training & Development Clinics
	•	Academic Accountability & College Recruiting Support
	•	Alumni Mentorship Program
	•	Community Service & Leadership Events

With a culture rooted in standards, not shortcuts, SLT Hoops has become a respected force in the NYC basketball scene — developing talent, earning college looks, and building young men who thrive in life.

L'iscrizione al CONI testimonia l'impegno della Kuroi Hane nell'operare secondo gli standard e le linee guida riconosciute a livello nazionale per lo sviluppo e la promozione dello sport.
Guidata dal "Sensei" Giuseppe Maldifassi, la Kuroi Hane si impegna a fornire un ambiente di apprendimento stimolante e sostenitore, dove i giovani atleti possono sviluppare non solo le loro abilità fisiche, ma anche le loro capacità mentali e morali. Mayor Productividad: Mejora la concentración y la claridad mental.
Reducción del Ausentismo: Previene lesiones y alivia el dolor muscular.
Mejor Ambiente Laboral: Fomenta la motivación y el compromiso.

Contáctanos hoy mismo para comenzar a mejorar la salud y el bienestar de tu equipo!

Name: MAS FLECA Equitació, Coaching & Events
Description:
A l'Escola d'Hípica Mas Fleca oferim una àmplia varietat d'activitats dissenyades per a persones de totes les edats i per a diferents objectius. La nostra escola d'equitació proporciona una experiència única que va més enllà de l’aprenentatge tècnic, permetent als alumnes connectar amb els cavalls i viure una relació personalitzada amb ells. Tant si estàs començant com si vols perfeccionar-te en disciplines com la doma, el salt o el trec, les nostres classes s'adapten al teu ritme i necessitats.

També oferim programes de coaching amb cavalls que utilitzen l’intercanvi entre l'ésser humà i l'animal per ajudar a desenvolupar habilitats de lideratge, comunicació i intel·ligència emocional. Els nostres serveis estan pensats tant per a empreses, que volen millorar la dinàmica d'equip, com per a grups i individus que busquen un creixement personal profund i transformador.

Els tallers amb cavalls que realitzem per a escoles, empreses i grups proporcionen una experiència educativa pràctica, on els participants no només aprenen sobre el maneig i la cura dels cavalls, sinó que també desenvolupen valors fonamentals com l’empatia, la responsabilitat i la comunicació no verbal.

A més, a Mas Fleca organitzem esplais multiactivitats per a nens i joves durant Setmana Santa, Estiu i Nadal, on els més petits tenen l'oportunitat de créixer personalment mentre gaudeixen de l'entorn natural i realitzen activitats divertides i formatives.

Per aquells que busquen organitzar esdeveniments privats, les nostres instal·lacions són l’espai perfecte per a aniversaris, celebracions familiars o activitats per a empreses. En un entorn natural i tranquil, els nostres esdeveniments es poden personalitzar per a qualsevol ocasió especial.

A Mas Fleca, combinem l’amor pels cavalls amb una filosofia de creixement personal i professional, creant un espai on cada activitat és una oportunitat de connexió, aprenentatge i transformació.

Name: Premier Goalkeeper Academy MY
Description:
Premier goalkeeper academy has training programs designed specifically for goalkeepers of all ages and skill levels. The academy's primary goal is to develop the physical, technical, and tactical abilities of goalkeepers, so they can perform at their best on the field. Here's a description of what a typical goalkeeper academy might look like:
Customized development plans: The goalkeeper academy would offer customized development plans for goalkeepers of all ages, taking into account their individual strengths and weaknesses. Each goalkeeper would have a personalized plan designed to help them improve their skills, fitness, and game understanding.

Experienced coaches: The academy would have a team of experienced coaches who specialize in training goalkeepers. These coaches would have the knowledge and expertise needed to develop a goalkeeper's abilities in all areas, from shot-stopping to distribution.

Age-appropriate training: The academy would provide age-appropriate training, so young goalkeepers can develop their skills in a safe and fun environment. The training sessions would be designed to be challenging but not overwhelming, so goalkeepers can learn and improve without feeling discouraged.

Technical training: The academy would focus heavily on technical training, as this is a critical area for goalkeepers. The technical training would include exercises to improve footwork, handling, diving, and distribution, among other skills.
Tactical training: The academy would also provide tactical training to help goalkeepers understand the game better. This training would include things like positioning, communication, and decision-making, all of which are essential for goalkeepers.

Fitness training: Goalkeepers need to be physically fit to perform at their best, so the academy would provide fitness training to help goalkeepers develop their strength, speed, agility, and endurance.

Name: Association Esprit XV
Description:
L’association Esprit XV a été créé dans le but d’apporter une plus-value éducative, personnelle et professionnelle, aux jeunes de Quartiers Prioritaires de Ville (QPV), notamment ceux de la ville de Mantes-la-Jolie. 
Elle s’appuie sur la pratique du rugby, porteuse de riches valeurs humaines, sociales et citoyennes. Il s’agit d’offrir à ce public, des moments d’évasions et de bien-être, qui peuvent parfois cruellement manquer à un mode de vie et un quotidien parfois difficile.

Les publics visés par les différentes actions mises en place par l’association sont :
-	Les élèves de maternelle, primaire, collège ou lycée issues des zones QPV
-	Les jeunes personnes de 16 à 25 ans en situation de décrochage scolaire ou d’exclusion.
-	Des personnes plus âgées peuvent intégrer le dispositif, dans le sens où toutes personnes voulant avancer ne peuvent être exclues encore une nouvelle fois dans son parcours personnel.

Les ressources humaines du projet :
Qui est plus qualifié que des gens du sérail. Les personnes amenées à intervenir sont des anciens joueurs du club, joueurs actuels et surtout issu de la ville quel que soit le quartier d’origine. 
Ils ont eux-mêmes vécu une situation d’exclusion en raison de ses origines qu’elles soient culturelles ou sociales.
La mixité des intervenants permettra de comprendre que le vivre ensemble est possible car visible à travers des exemples vivants qui se retrouvent à s’occuper d’eux.

Pour cela l’association Esprit XV vise à :
	Favoriser l’accès au dispositif pour les hommes et les femmes pour favoriser la mixité.
	Favoriser et promouvoir la prévention comme vecteur d’intégration, 
	Favoriser et promouvoir la pratique sportive, 
	Favoriser et promouvoir la réussite éducative à travers l’accompagnement à la scolarité
	Favoriser l’accès à des stages ou à des emplois, en lien avec un projet professionnel défini, grâce aux différents acteurs externes intégrés au projet et à notre propre réseau de connaissances professionnelles.

Name: ADAPT Qualifications
Description:
A.D.A.P.T. (Art du Déplacement And Parkour Teaching) Qualifications is the global awarding body for coach education in parkour / freerunning.

We work closely with accrediting bodies, parkour communities and sports coaching authorities around the world to create the highest standard of coach education possible and to provide the industry benchmark for parkour instruction.

The ADAPT methods and standards were created by the original and most experienced coaches of the discipline, and are constantly being refined and updated with the latest coaching science while also maintaining the spirit, values and principles of the discipline. It represents a set of coaching standards with which practitioners can learn how to pass on the fundamental principles, methods and values of the art accurately, safely and competently.

Recognised on the European Qualifications Framework as well as by the American Council of Exercise (ACE), National Academy Of Sports Medicine (NASM), and government sports authorities such as Unione Italiana Sport Per tutti Nazionale and Sport England, A.D.A.P.T. is delivered worldwide to support and develop thousands of professional coaches.

Description:
The Florida Aquatics Swimming & Training (FAST) facility is the premier swimming, training, and competition venue in the Southeastern United States. Located in Ocala, the heart of Central Florida, FAST features an indoor 10-lane 50m/25yd competition pool and a 8-lane 50m/25yd/25m outdoor competition pool. Our training facility also features a 2,475 sq. ft. dryland fitness center providing an excellent opportunity to train out of the pool as well.

FAST is equipped with the top-tier equipment to train, host, and engage in aquatic activities at the local, state, regional, and national levels. With seating for up to 2,000 spectators, everyone can enjoy the action while cheering on the competition.

The mission of FAST is to train swimmers and athletes of all ages and abilities to go beyond their best through exceptional coaching, premier facilities, and cutting-edge athletic programming. From learning to swim to professionals, FAST is always empowering our athletes to go beyond their best.

FAST offers learn-to-swim programs and swim lessons for all ages and abilities, along with aquatic fitness, open swim, life-saving water training for lifeguards and rescue personnel, and other various programs. FAST is home to the local high school teams, the FAST Falcons club team, and the FAST Falcons Masters.

Our elite aquatic center is equipped to train, host, and engage in recreational activities at the local, state, national, and global level. From learning to swim to professionals, FAST is committed to supporting our swimmers recreationally and competitively.

Name: GamePlan Analytics
Description:
While physical and technical education for youth soccer players is consistently approaching a higher standard, we believe that most players lack tactical awareness and creativity on the pitch. At Gameplan, we aim to bridge this gap by providing in-depth, personalized insights and actionable feedback, which otherwise are only available to players at top professional clubs. With our expert analysis, we have helped players around the world gain a competitive advantage over their peers and achieve their personal goals.

Our team of experts consists of accomplished professional soccer players and coaches who are passionate about the game and committed to helping our players succeed. Our team helps players understand the tactical nuances of every situation on the field, empowering them to make better decisions, use the space around them more effectively, and ultimately set themselves and their teammates up for success.

Whether you're a beginner who is trying to break into the sport, a youth player who is having ambitions to play professionally or collegiately, a professional player who is looking for objective, expert feedback, or even a coach with aspirations to improve their tactical skillset, GamePlan has the tools and expertise you need to take your game to the next level.

Reach out to learn more about how GPA can up your game IQ today.

Name: Resenha Beach
Description:
Centro de Esportes de Areia | Divinópolis, MG

Resumo dos Produtos e Serviços

No Resenha Beach, nos dedicamos a oferecer uma experiência esportiva completa e inclusiva. 

Nossos principais produtos e serviços incluem:

- Futevôlei: Organizamos aulas e torneios de futevôlei e locações de quadras, atendendo desde iniciantes até jogadores avançados. Proporcionamos um ambiente competitivo e ao mesmo tempo acolhedor.

- Beach Tennis: Oferecemos aulas, campeonatos de beach tennis locações de quadras, uma modalidade que vem crescendo e conquistando muitos adeptos. Nossos instrutores são qualificados e apaixonados pelo esporte.

- Vôlei de Praia: Com quadras bem equipadas, realizamos locações e competições de vôlei de praia, incentivando a prática deste esporte dinâmico e divertido.

- Peteca: Promovemos a prática da peteca, um esporte tradicional e querido por muitos, proporcionando diversão e atividade física para todas as idades.

- Treinamento Funcional: Disponibilizamos aulas de treinamento funcional na areia, focando no condicionamento físico, resistência e bem-estar. Nossos treinos são adaptados para todos os níveis de condicionamento.

- Eventos e Torneios: Organizamos diversos eventos esportivos ao longo do ano, incluindo torneios internos e competições abertas, fortalecendo a comunidade esportiva local e regional.

Inclusão Social: Nosso compromisso é com a inclusão e o respeito. Oferecemos atividades adaptadas para pessoas com deficiência, garantindo que todos possam participar e se beneficiar do esporte.

No Resenha Beach, acreditamos no poder transformador do esporte e estamos comprometidos em proporcionar um ambiente onde todos possam se sentir bem-vindos, desafiados e inspirados. Venha fazer parte da nossa comunidade e descubra como o esporte pode melhorar sua vida!

ATA showcases tennis as a pathway to education and sporting careers, providing a nurturing environment for skill development and academic excellence.

Mission: To develop world-class African tennis players by providing structured training, a competitive pathway, and a holistic coaching philosophy that nurtures discipline, teamwork, and character development.

Vission: Empower young minds through tennis, enabling them to excel academically and athletically, and to become global role models in sports and life.

Name: apnoe4surfers
Description:
Im eintägigen apnoe4surfers-Kurs lernst du, deine Komfortzeit unter Wasser zu verlängern und deine Kontrolle über Körper und Atmung auch in kritischen Situationen zu behalten.  

Das komplette Kursprogramm besteht aus verschiedenen Theorie- und Praxisblöcken u.a. lernst du in einem Atemworkshop verschiedene Atemtechniken, die dir helfen, dein gesamtes Lungenvolumen sinnvoll einzusetzen.

Der praktische Teil im sicheren Pool beinhaltet statische Tauchübungen, in welchen die erlebten Atemtechniken zur Anwendung kommen. Mit aktiven Übungen im Wasser erfährst du, wie ein «wipeout» oder «holddown» unter Wasser auszuhalten ist und wie du in unübersichtlichen Situationen die Ruhe bewahren kannst. Mit Rettungs- und Sicherheitsübungen runden wir das abwechslungsreiche apnoe4surfers-Programm ab.

Name: Super Duper Tennis
Description:
Super Duper Tennis, part of SUPER DUPER SPORTS, is a mobile kids' tennis program in NYC and New Jersey, dedicated to teaching the FUNdamentals of tennis to children ages 3-10. We transform unconventional spaces into kid-friendly tennis courts with equipment designed to fit young players, making the game accessible, enjoyable, and easy to learn. Our focus is on creating an educational and exciting environment that boosts self-esteem, builds confidence, and fosters a love for the game.

Our simple teaching techniques use relatable tennis terminology, and our progressive, game-based curriculum ensures every child improves their skills, succeeds in hitting, and—most importantly—has fun! The core of our curriculum is grounded in the ABC's of tennis—Agility, Balance, Coordination, Speed, and Strength—helping to develop well-rounded athletes.

Recently, we’ve expanded into another exciting racquet sport—PICKLEBALL—for ages 10-13, teens, and adults, offering even more opportunities for everyone to enjoy a super duper experience!

Description:
Fitter Younger provides an exciting and unique event called the 'School Marathon Relay'. This event has been used successfully by Schools across Ireland as a simple and effective fundraising event, with the fantastic amount of over €1,000,000 being raised by these schools!
The event involves getting all the pupils, along with willing staff members, to combine their efforts to run the distance of a marathon in a relay format. It is fully inclusive with pupils of all abilities able to participate!

Name: Tour de Kili
Description:
Tour de Kili is a mountain bike race on the slope of the “roof of Africa”, Mount Kilimanjaro. It is an ideal race for someone looking for a well-organized stage race that is affordable and fun, one you can actually complete no matter your skill and fitness level. As Tour de Kili aims to bring people together, you’ll experience sharing your love for cycling with both locals and internationals. On top of that, as it is organised by the local social enterprise One Bike Tanzania the revenues from the registration fees will be used to fund one of their social projects: Women on Bike. 

As a mountain biking goal it is a lifetime achievement award, a top three on the bucket list, what some people have said is the “best week of my life”. What better way to travel than by doing what you love in an amazing location while having a positive social impact!

Name: Sand Beach Sports
Description:
Nossa jornada começou faz tempo, com nosso fundador Alessandro Lazzarini, tenista profissional que trouxe muitos títulos e alegrias para Itatiba. Sandrinho, como é conhecido, fundou a academia com apenas uma quadra de tênis e ao longo dos anos, sua reputação no esporte cresceu, assim como a demanda por aulas. O crescimento trouxe novos professores para a equipe e a busca por novas modalidades de esporte.

Hoje temos, além do tênis, as quadras para esportes de areia, com professores e educadores físicos qualificados e renomados, mas que são super parceiros e acolhedores. Você disputa com jogadores de vários níveis, se quiser a competição pode ser forte, mas se preferir pode só queimar várias calorias se divertindo muito.

Temos um restaurante com pratos autorais que trazem muita energia e sabor para o seu dia, do café da manhã ao jantar. Um ambiente perfeito para comer e beber bem com muita resenha. Temos também nossa loja de roupas e acessórios esportivos com as melhores marcas do mercado e atendentes que entendem do assunto para te ajudar na melhor escolha.

Já falamos da paisagem? Simmm, é que ela é tão linda, que não sai da cabeça, ficamos esperando a hora de sentir essa energia da natureza.

Mas tem algo que ainda não te contamos, o mais especial é que aqui você tem um lugar para sua família, inteira, até os cachorrinhos tem um espaço só para eles. Não tem idade, nem gênero, todo mundo joga junto, come e bebe junto, comemora cada avanço e vitórias juntos, aprende com as derrotas e compartilha aquilo que falamos no começo, tempo de qualidade juntos. 

Aqui no Sand Beach Sports, você pratica mais que esporte, pratica a paz da natureza, das boas amizades e da família.

Dazu gehört auch ein individueller Fitness- bzw. Ernährungsstil – nicht jeder mag Gruppentrainings oder Fitnesszentren…und nicht jeder will auf leckere Naschereien verzichten. Egal welchem Typ du entsprichst, ich überrede Dich nicht mit all deinen «ungesunden Gewohnheiten» aufzuhören. Ich kann dir höchstens Ratschläge geben und dich zu etwas anderem motivieren. Name: Women's Football Centre
Description:
The Women’s Football Centre (WFC) is an initiative which runs a free summer Skills Centre in Wellington, Aotearoa New Zealand for women 18 years and older.

Instagram: www.instagram.com/womensfootballcentre/
Facebook: www.facebook.com/womensfootballcentre/

The Skills Centre was established in 2023 with the aim of creating a welcoming, empowering and non-judgmental environment for All Women* (aged 18+) to learn football or return to the game after a break.

By targeting underrepresented and often under targeted demographic of women - 18 years +, the WFC seeks to promote inclusivity in football. 

Created by footballers for footballers, the initiative has been particularly timely harnessing the increased visibility of women’s football in New Zealand due to the 2023 FIFA Women’s World Cup.

Name: THE SURREY HILLS ADVENTURE COMPANY LIMITED
Description:
The Surrey Hills Adventure Company – or simply The SHAC – exists to reconnect people with nature through immersive, purposeful outdoor experiences.

Based in the heart of the Surrey Hills AONB, we offer open water swimming, paddleboarding, cold water training, youth development programmes, and bespoke adventures that prioritise safety, community, and wellbeing. Our mantra: Safety first. Experience always.

What began as a grassroots movement has grown into a year-round adventure community. We work closely with landowners, educators, and partner organisations to unlock the potential of natural spaces in a low-impact, high-value way.

In 2025, we launched SHACADEMY – our outdoor training and skills development programme. Designed to nurture the next generation of outdoor professionals, SHACADEMY offers hands-on experience and real qualifications in open water lifeguarding, paddleboarding, event delivery, and more. It’s the beating heart of our mission to grow a safer, more skilled and connected outdoor workforce.

Whether you’re dipping your toes in for the first time, training to become a lifeguard, or looking to partner on a land-based outdoor project — SHAC is here to guide, inspire, and lead the way.

Description:
Willkommen im Shinzen Dojo Berlin

Eintauchen in die Welt des Kyokushin Karate: Im Herzen Berlins verbindet das Shinzen Dojo traditionelle Kampfkunst mit zeitgemäßer Praxis, wobei die persönliche Entwicklung jedes Einzelnen im Mittelpunkt steht.

Philosophie & Weg des Karate

Kyokushin Karate ist nicht nur eine physische Disziplin, sondern auch eine Lebensphilosophie. Wir bei Shinzen vermitteln diese Kunst mit einem tiefen Respekt für ihre Traditionen und einer aufgeschlossenen Perspektive für die Anforderungen der heutigen Zeit.

Training von Körper & Geist

Unser anspruchsvolles Training zielt darauf ab, sowohl den Körper als auch den Geist zu stärken, indem wir nicht nur technische Fertigkeiten, sondern auch Charakter und mentale Stärke fördern.

Die Macht der Gemeinschaft

Im Shinzen Dojo finden Sie eine unterstützende Gemeinschaft, in der jeder von den Erfahrungen der Anderen lernen kann, während er seinen eigenen Weg im Karate geht.

Erfahrung & Leidenschaft der Trainer

Unsere Trainer vereinen tiefe Kenntnisse des Kyokushin Karate mit einer Leidenschaft für das Lehren, um eine inspirierende, fordernde und unterstützende Lernumgebung zu schaffen.

Engagement für Exzellenz

Das Shinzen Dojo engagiert sich dafür, dass jedes Mitglied seine Höchstleistung erreicht, indem es eine Atmosphäre schafft, die sowohl persönliche als auch martiale Exzellenz fördert.

Bereichern Sie Ihr Leben durch die Praxis des Kyokushin Karate und werden Sie Teil unserer Gemeinschaft im Shinzen Dojo Berlin.

Name: Global Legends Sports Network
Description:
At Global Legends Sports Network (GLSN), we’re not here to chase the usual headlines or cater only to the A-list names. Instead, we’ve built a platform specifically for the B- and C-list retired professional athletes—the ones who played at the highest level and made a tangible impact on the fields, courts, or in the ring but never had the spotlight long enough to build a lasting brand. We recognize your unique value and appreciate it.

We see you. And more importantly—we understand the challenges and opportunities you face in your post-sports career. We’re here to support you and help you realize your value.

GLSN is a media platform and career transition powerhouse designed to help former athletes from the NBA, NFL, MLB, UFC, Boxing, and beyond take control of their next chapter. While others celebrate the past, we are fully committed to shaping your future and helping you transition to a successful career after your sports career.

Name: Discover Paragliding

Please visit our website for more information and to see a few videos of our fantastic training location.

Name: Uganda Marathon

We invite everyone from all over the world, aged 12-65+, to experience the 2025 edition as we are celebrating our 10th anniversary. 

Explore the Pearl of Africa through breathtaking landscapes, gorilla trekking, and safari extensions. Make a difference in education, health, and community development. Join us at ugandamarathon.com and be a part of a cause that makes every step count.

Learning new skills isn’t easy, but we see it as an opportunity to have a little fun along the way. As a beginner, it can be difficult to venture into the great outdoors without knowing what you need to know to enjoy it, or survive if your life depended on it. 

We aim to remove the guesswork of choosing valuable skills to learn and introduce them in ways that are much easier to comprehend. Follow us on our journey to educate others in the skills we desperately need in an age ruled by technology.

Name: Centrum Ruchu Perfecto

Many young athletes have improved their physical abilities at Centrum Perfecto, preparing to achieve success in their respective sports. Simultaneously, adult clients, especially those who work at desks, regain their fitness and health through programs designed to counteract the negative effects of a sedentary lifestyle.

We are the creators of the popular slogan "homo smartphonicus," addressing health issues related to excessive technology use. Our innovative approach promotes healthy habits and intelligent training methods, catering to the needs of both athletes and individuals leading a sedentary lifestyle.

The strength of Centrum Perfecto lies in our cohesive philosophy, encompassing motor preparation programs, personal training, corrective exercises, and swimming lessons. All our trainers are selected based on their strong interpersonal skills and deep understanding of movement.

Name: Your Very Own Athletic Trainer
Description:
The go-to resource for parents on sports injuries. 

Who do you turn to when your child suffers a sports injury? Have you ever wished you had access to your very own athletic trainer? Now you can! 

Hi! I’m Rachel, an Athletic Trainer and an expert at sports injuries.
And I want to be Your Very Own Athletic Trainer!

Athletic Trainers are highly qualified, healthcare professionals specifically trained in the prevention, examination, diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation of medical conditions and emergent, acute and chronic injuries. 

There is so much misinformation on the television and internet about what injuries are and how they are managed. I want to educate you on the truth, to give you the knowledge so you can be informed about what is going on and best practices. 

Not every athlete has access to an athletic trainer for injury prevention or management. No one there to triage sports injuries. Or make a referral to a physician. Or properly rehabilitate injuries and get them safely back to playing. 
Studies have shown that proper management of sports injury allow for expedited treatment and can prevent injuries from becoming more severe.

Learn more about common sports injuries, as well as how to manage sports injuries to help your children get back on the court or playing field safely.

Description:
Rainbow Scuba Hawaii is a professional scuba diving and ocean charter service based in Honolulu, Oahu. We specialize in guided scuba tours, private boat charters, and advanced underwater operations—including marine asset recovery, underwater equipment inspection, and salvage services.

Founded and operated by licensed boat captain and certified scuba instructor Kenneth Goetz, Rainbow Scuba Hawaii brings over 20 years of maritime and diving experience to every excursion. Our focus is safety, professionalism, and delivering unforgettable, personalized ocean adventures in the waters surrounding Oahu.

Whether you’re a first-time diver, experienced explorer, or in need of underwater technical support, we offer trusted, small-group and private experiences backed by local knowledge and hands-on expertise.

⸻

 Our Services Include:

⸻

 Why Choose Rainbow Scuba Hawaii?

Based in Honolulu, HI |  Serving visitors, residents, and professionals across Oahu

Name: OFF-Water Efoil
Description:
Off-Water Efoil Rental Experience in Toronto:

Are you ready to embark on an extraordinary aquatic adventure that pushes the boundaries of traditional water-sport? Look no further than our Off-Water Efoil Rentals in Toronto. With our cutting-edge technology and breathtaking locations, we offer an experience that's as exhilarating as it is accessible for everyone.

Revolutionary Efoil Technology:
Our Efoils are equipped with state-of-the-art electric hydrofoil propulsion systems, providing an electrifying sensation of effortlessly gliding over the water's surface. These eco-friendly and electric-powered boards give riders a taste of the future, with quiet, emission-free operation that's both thrilling and environmentally responsible.

No Water Needed:
One of the most remarkable aspects of our Off-Water Efoil Rentals is that you can enjoy the excitement of hydrofoiling without the need for open water. We've carefully selected prime locations in Toronto, including calm bays and inlets, where you can experience the thrill of Efoiling even if you're far from the vast open sea. It's the perfect solution for those looking to explore the wonders of hydrofoil riding in an urban setting.

Beginner to Pro:
Our Efoils are suitable for riders of all skill levels. Whether you're a complete novice or an experienced rider, our team will provide comprehensive training to ensure you're comfortable and confident on your Efoil. It's a sport that's easy to learn and immensely rewarding, with options for riders to progress from leisurely gliding to mastering tricks and maneuvers.

Scenic Toronto Backdrops:
As you Efoil along the water, you'll be treated to stunning views of Toronto's skyline, picturesque harbors, and charming waterfront landscapes. It's a unique perspective of the city, and the perfect opportunity to capture unforgettable moments.

Name: Master Yang's Martial Arts Center
Description:

We are the Capital District's premier location for martial arts and we work together to help everyone achieve their goals and become the best they are capable of becoming.

Those who choose to train at Master Yang's Martial Arts Center have a desire to achieve a high standard of excellence in all aspects of their lives and are willing to commit to constant improvement.

Our martial arts instructors work to further develop this desire to improve in our students by getting them to set personal goals so their motivation to excel comes from within. To us, this is truly the best form of leadership.

We are black belt martial artists who stand tall and live strong. That’s what sets us — and our students — apart from the crowd.

Je werkt aan je conditie en kracht en intussen word je van een beginneling omgeschoold tot een bokser. Name: Full Football Scout
Description:
In the modern world of football, our team of experts, cover football world around the globe to find talents, help them grow and connect them to the clubs. 

Our offered packages to the clubs consists of the following:
1) Player Scouting: A complete technical and tactical report will be created in line with performance data and a video report for the player asked by the club.

2) Team Analysis: We will create a complete guide on how your opponent plays plus important notes about opponent's players. Our ideas about how to play will also be included.

3) Transfer Recommendation: Upon request from clubs, using our comprehensive database and experience of our team, we will find you a list of promising players that can have an immediate impact and improve the squad. We can also check the availability of the players if needed.

4) Intermediation: Whether you have used our scouting options or you have other players in mind, we can help you contact the player thorough our connections inside the agents' community.

Don't hesitate to contact us via email for any further information.

Our Dream is to Make Football more Beautiful in an Ecosystem that Everyone can Grow. 

FullFootballScout@Gmail.com

Description:
Welcome to our Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu club on Södermalm, Stockholm!

We are a club that offers training for all levels – from complete beginners to top-level competitors in Sweden. Whether you're new to the sport or an experienced practitioner, there's a place for you with us.

At our club, you’ll have the chance to develop your strength, agility, and technique in a motivating and supportive environment. But it’s not just about physical training – we also focus on building a strong community where friendship and camaraderie are key. Here, you'll find training partners who encourage and support you on your journey, both on and off the mats.

So why not take the step and become part of our community? With us, you'll not only grow as an athlete – you'll have fun, feel great, and make friends for life. Welcome to the club, we look forward to training with you!

Description:
Golf Like a Girl is dedicated to empowering women and girls through the game of golf. Founded with the mission to increase access to golf for all women and girls, we offer free lessons and affordable golf apparel. Our goal is to create an inclusive environment where women can thrive in the sport, building confidence and community. Join us in changing the narrative of golf to be more welcoming and accessible for everyone.

Golf Like A Girl is a non-profit organization, dedicated to providing women and girls an accessible pathway to golf. The Golf Like A Girl program starts with a free lesson, taught by an LPGA professional at golf course across 24 states and three countries. 

We are currently looking for more coaches to join my paid national coaches network to help deliver the Golf Like A Girl program and a Fundraising Coordinator. 

We are also seeking sponsors and donors to help fund single lessons, lesson series, and tournaments. 

There is a Golf Like A Girl clothing line funds the free lesson program. Check it out at GolfLikeAGirl.co/store.

Name: Historic Bethlehem River Tours
Description: Take a guided tour on the Lehigh River in Historic Bethlehem, Pass the steel stacks and get your souvenir photo under these iconic blast furnaces. After a 5 mile paddle, trade in your kayak for a bicycle and ride back on the D&L trail, a Smithsonian institution affiliate. This makes for a fun, relaxing activity for groups, parties, or individuals. Name: Divers Incorporated
Description:
We have been a PADI Dive Center since 1985 and our commitment to the Adventure, Conservation and Exploration of the Underwater World has never been greater. Our store staffs one of the most experienced PADI Course Directors in the area and has four PADI Master Scuba Diver Trainers on staff. Each of our instructors have been with PADI exclusively for most of their careers and all of them love to scuba dive.

Divers Incorporated is also a PADI Five-Star Instructor Development Center. As a PADI Five-Star Instructor Development Center we teach exclusively through the PADI System of Diver Education which is quite literally "the way the world learns to dive." At our dive center, you can learn every level of the PADI System of Education from Beginner to PADI Divemaster to PADI Open Water Scuba Instructor to PADI Master Scuba Diver Trainer.

Divers Incorporated is also a PADI TecRec Dive Center. This distinction means that you can learn to be a true underwater explorer from some of the best technical divers in the area, many of who are also some of our on-staff intructors. A PADI TecRec Dive Center is able to bring you to a level of diving that few people achieve. Technical Divers are the best our sport has to offer. We can provide you the tools and skills to perform dives few are capable of or can even imagine. We offer full support for Hollis Prism 2 Rebreathers and Stock everything a technical diver may need.

Divers Incorporated has a long history of innovation so that we can be YOUR Dive Center. Check out what we have to offer and let us know how we can help you get the most out of being a scuba diver

Name: WS Reign Sports
Description:
TEAM. EFFORT. ATTITUDE.

West Seattle Reign Sports (WSR) is a community-driven youth sports organization dedicated to empowering athletes, families, and coaches through volleyball, basketball, and multi-sport programming. Founded in West Seattle, our mission is simple yet powerful: create opportunities for growth on and off the court while fostering teamwork, resilience, and leadership.

We offer a full pathway for athletes — from introductory clinics and leagues to elite national travel teams — while ensuring accessibility through scholarships, payment plans, and community partnerships. Our programs are built on three core values: player development, coaching excellence, and community impact.

 Player Development – Training athletes to master technical skills, develop competitive IQ, and gain the confidence to reach their potential.
 Coaching Excellence – Our staff of experienced coaches and mentors are committed to modeling integrity, accountability, and the growth mindset we expect from every athlete.
 Community Impact – We believe sports should be accessible to all. WSR offers need-based scholarships, youth volunteer opportunities, and partnerships with schools and local organizations to expand access.
 Pathways to the Future – Supporting families through college prep, recruiting guidance, health and wellness resources, and life-readiness tools.

With more than two decades of coaching experience driving our vision, WSR continues to grow as a hub for competitive teams, inclusive programming, and meaningful community engagement. Our long-term goals include securing a dedicated facility, expanding boys’ volleyball and basketball, and employing full-time staff to sustain opportunities for generations to come.

At WSR, we believe sports are more than competition — they are a foundation for lifelong success, resilience, and confidence.

 Learn more: https://westseattlereign.com

Description:
The Rustic Athletic Club (RAC) is non-profit sport club located in the Rustic and Maple Leaf neighbourhood in the City of Toronto. The club was founded in 2022 by two local business and sport professionals, as they identified a need for sport activities for youth and adults within the community.

These sport opportunities will provide a healthy, fun and safe environment for children and adults to develop and grow.

Currently, RAC offers soccer programming for boys and girls aged 4 to 12. In addition to this, Rustic AC competes at the senior level in the Ontario Soccer League and have plans to add a women's competitive team that will compete in the Ontario Women's Soccer League in the near future. 

Current programs include soccer and ball hockey. We will be starting a baseball and tennis program in 2024.

The easiest way to stay updated on current programs is to add RAC on Instagram: @rustic_ac. 

We always encourage neighbourhood residents to contact us with any ideas for programming you would like to see implemented in our community.

We do this because we know that children are far more likely to stay interested in sport and try new activities if they feel confident and positive about their skill levels in a number of different areas. As a non-profit organization, our mission is to provide underprivileged youth with an opportunity to discover their potential, foster their passion for shooting, and develop the skills they need to succeed both on and off the court.

At Flow Shooting Academy, we envision a future where every child discovers their potential, cultivates a love for the game, and emerges as a beacon of leadership and positivity in their communities. Name: Djursholms Tennisklubb
Description:
Djursholms Tennisklubb är sedan flera år tillbaka en av Sveriges största tennisklubbar, både när det gäller antalet medlemmar och storlek på juniorverksamheten. Djursholms Tennisklubb har till uppgift att främja tennisspelets utveckling i Danderyds Kommun, i första hand i Djursholm. Klubben började som självständig klubb den 28 april 1943.

Omfattningen av verksamheten har utvecklats i takt med tillgången på inomhusbanor. Det började med en bana i gamla tennishallen vid Djursholms slott. Sedan fick DjTK disponera två banor i Norrängsgården och byggde även två tältbanor intill dessa. 1984 ersattes dessa med en ny tennishall med fyra banor. 1997 ödelades hela hallen och Norrängsgården genom en brand och vi fick bygga en ny hall som stod klar 1998. Sommaren 2022 gjordes ett rejält omtag då vi byggde om hela entrédelen vilket resulterade i ny shop, reception och cafédelen byggdes om till en Bistro, där vi idag kan äta ordentligt lagad mat.  Dessutom gjordes en tillbyggnad innehållande tre padelbanor som håller toppklass. På kort tid har vi fått igång en padelverksamhet med juniorträningar, seniorträningar och gruppspel. De två anrika grusbanorna belägna vid Djursholms Slott bjuder in till spel under utomhussäsongen. Både fasta tider och strötider går att boka.

Fram till klockan 23 på kvällarna har vi uthyrda kontrakt till enskilda personer eller grupper. Banorna har en hög beläggning, över 95%! Detta beror naturligtvis på den omfattande organiserade junior- och seniorverksamheten men också på ett effektivt utnyttjande av alla lediga tider genom klubbens bokningssystem MATCHi.

Djursholms Tennisklubb har ett många sponsorer och ett utvecklat sponsorprogram. Våra sponsorer hjälper oss att hålla nere kostnaderna för ungdomsverksamheten, ha flera tränare och färre deltagare i varje grupp. Våra sponsorer är mycket viktiga för klubben och vi värdesätter dem högt.
Klubben har en noga formulerad verksamhetsidé, vision, kvalitetspolicy och klart uttalade mål.

Name: WingS Academy
Description:
"At the Wings Academy, we empower young minds to unlock their potential, developing key skills and personal growth to become confident individuals who make a positive impact in the world."

**Our Philosophy & Mission**

The WingS Academy opens the doors to a world of possibilities and supports young people in realizing their full potential. We believe that each student is unique and has their own journey. Our goal is to accompany each student on this journey and help them discover and develop their talents and abilities. It's not just about academic success - we also aim to help our students become confident and responsible members of society. Inspired by the latest findings in psychology, sports science, neuroscience, and behavioural research, we offer an environment for personal growth that addresses the whole person - intellectually, emotionally, socially, as well as physically. Our programs are designed to develop essential skills such as self-confidence, determination, empathy, resilience, critical thinking, collaboration, mental work, and physical activity. We believe in the importance of leadership skills and foster them through our offerings. Ultimately, our goal is to provide our students with the tools to achieve their dreams.

Welcome to the WingS Academy - where every journey is unique!

**Our Programs for Holistic Growth and Well-Being**

The WingS Academy offers programs that prioritize the holistic growth and well-being of students. In a positive, collaborative, and safe environment, we utilize non-violent communication to create a supportive learning atmosphere Our programs incorporate the Cybernetic Loop, emphasizing the connection between mind and body, to enhance both mental and physical health. Through mindfulness practices, breathing techniques, full-body workouts, and our “Circle of Awareness”, we aim to develop critical life skills and promote overall growth.
