This ambition is pursued through targeted initiatives designed to broaden youth engagement by integrating table tennis into school curriculums, and by systematically developing a world-class infrastructure of coaching and officiating talent, thereby laying a robust foundation for India's future success in the sport.

Catering to a diverse range of enthusiasts and aspiring professionals, 7x Table Tennis Academy delivers a suite of premier services:

* Expert Coaching: Professional coaching for all skill levels, from foundational training for beginners to advanced tactical development for competitive players, available through both group and personalized sessions.

* School Partnership Programs: Collaborative initiatives with educational institutions to introduce and develop table tennis at the grassroots, fostering young talent and promoting active lifestyles.

* Scholarship Opportunities: Dedicated programs to support and empower exceptionally talented players, providing resources and pathways for their continued advancement in the sport.

*  Corporate Table Tennis Engagements: Custom-designed table tennis events and tournaments for corporate organizations, aimed at enhancing employee engagement, team building, and promoting workplace wellness.

At Peak Play, we envision a future where the athletic experience is one of continuous support, where challenges are seen as opportunities for growth and learning. We strive to keep families united and to make a significant, positive change in the lives of athletes. Our ultimate aim is for every athlete to emerge from their journey not just successful in their sport but as thriving, happy, and healthy individuals capable of conquering the world because of their experiences. This means cultivating strong, healthy relationships and becoming resilient, well-rounded individuals.
We see Peak Play as a platform not just for the athlete but for parents too, offering them the knowledge and skills to foster growth and lead a new generation of supportive parenting in the highly competitive and often overwhelming world of athletics. We are dedicated to creating a world where the athlete's journey is a collaborative effort filled with support, understanding, and hand-in-hand guidance through the ups and downs of sports. Our 'why' is clear—to ensure no athlete feels damaged, alone, or lost but instead emerges from their athletic endeavors discovering their 'peak' as both a person and a player.

Chi cammina solo può partire oggi, ma chi viaggia in compagnia deve attendere finché l’altro non è pronto.

Henry David Thoreau

Una pagina e un blog in cui condividiamo le nostre passioni, cercando di trasmettere l’amore per la natura e il meraviglioso mondo che ci circonda.

Step on step, la tua prospettiva cambia quando avrai sollevato il piede per fare il passo che ti permetterà di scoprire nuovi scorci, profumi, colori e pensieri.

Attendendo che i nostri piccoli viaggiatori possano proseguire il cammino sui loro piedini, condividiamo con voi le nostre avventure, speranzosi di potervi stimolare in modo che possiate farne parte anche voi e condividere con Noi un cammino insieme a Voi e ai vostri piccoli camminatori.

Name: DESANTOS Martial Arts
Description:
Who We Are And Why You Should Train Here
Since we’ve opened, we’ve been dedicated to changing the lives of people one person at a time, through martial arts, education and coaching. We strive to provide a safe, comfortable and welcoming atmosphere for all students and family members. We take pride in creating an environment for individuals to achieve, develop and succeed in their personal goals.

We strongly believe that martial arts can be for everyone, regardless of age, gender or experience levels. Throughout all of our programs, students will not only learn the necessary skill sets to protect themselves, we stand behind our realistic and practical approach, confident it will enable every member to achieve greatness and live their best life.

Founder and Grandmaster Veronica De Santos is an 8th-degree Black Belt who has been teaching martial arts for more than three decades. Through her hard work, experience, and all that she has given back to the martial arts community, she has earned the title of Kwan Jan Nim — a Korean term which means Master Instructor or Master of one’s house. She established her school in 1988, and was incredibly honoured to be awarded the rank of 8th-dan in June, 2022.

In 1999, Kwan Jan Nim De Santos was the first woman to be inducted in the North American Martial Arts Hall of Fame. Having won numerous championships in her competitive years, she was ranked as one of Canada’s top female fighters in 1988 and 1989 and also won Ontario’s Amateur Athlete of the year for the same years. While being a highly decorated competitor, her true passion is teaching and watching her students achieve their goals. She also teaches self-defence and anti-bullying courses for a wide array of organizations.

Whether you’re 3 or 73 (or anywhere in between) looking for fitness, fun, discipline, or self-defense, we have a spot for you at DeSantos Martial Arts!

MGS Sports Consulting: Transformando Experiências Esportivas em Oportunidades de Desenvolvimento.

Bem-vindo à MGS Sports Consulting, sua parceira dedicada ao mundo das experiências esportivas enriquecedoras e projetos esportivos inovadores. Somos especialistas em proporcionar aulas esportivas para escolas, desenvolvimento de projetos esportivos e serviços de consultoria de alta qualidade.

Na MGS Sports Consulting, estamos comprometidos em elevar o padrão das experiências esportivas, acreditando que cada atividade física pode ser uma oportunidade de crescimento, aprendizado e diversão. Desenvolvimento de Projetos Esportivos:

Prestação de Serviços:
Nosso compromisso com a excelência se estende aos serviços de consultoria, garantindo suporte especializado em todas as etapas, desde o planejamento até a implementação.

Nosso Compromisso:
Na MGS Sports Consulting, buscamos constantemente atualizações e inovações no cenário esportivo. Estamos empenhados em oferecer experiências excepcionais, onde cada cliente não apenas desfruta de atividades esportivas, mas também colhe benefícios tangíveis em termos de desenvolvimento pessoal, saúde e habilidades sociais.

Por Que Escolher a MGS Sports Consulting:

Comprometimento com a qualidade e inovação.
Abordagem personalizada para atender às necessidades exclusivas de cada cliente.
Foco no desenvolvimento holístico por meio do esporte.

Conecte-se para uma experiência esportiva além das quadras!

Name: Coach Moe Athletics LLC
Description:
Coach Moe Athletics has one mission, Building Better Athletes.  Coach Moe is the only Certified Speed and Agility Coach in the Omaha Metropolitan Area and he used that knowledge to create the Total Athlete Training system.  The Total Athlete System is the core of every program we offer. 

Our cornerstone program is Coach Moe's Basketball Academy.  Coach Moe uses the skills he honed training future and current NCAA Div I and II players to create a program that combines Speed and Agility training with fundamental basketball skills and footwork to give young basketball players a solid foundation.  

If you are looking for more intense training, Coach Moe offers 1 on 1 Basketball Training or Speed and Agility Training.  This 1 on 1 training is the same kind of training Coach Moe has provided to his college-bound Basketball, Volleyball and Football players.   This training is rooted firmly in our Total Athlete Training system. 

We offer also general Speed and Agility training for athletes of all ages and experience levels.  Contact us for details.

Our instructors are certified by the ASA and are knowledgeable, experienced, and passionate about sailing. They will provide hands-on training and personalized instruction to ensure that each student gains the skills and confidence needed to become a competent sailor. The classes are designed to accommodate busy schedules, with both weekday and weekend opportunities.

Our goal is for your daughter to maximize her strengths and limit their weaknesses. We will give her all the tools to fulfill her potential. That is our goal and expectation, for your daughter to be taught the college way and become confident in her abilities.

Name: Star Trek
Description:
We are a group of Trek Enthusiasts who would be more than happy to help if you are going for that once in a lifetime experience. Guess what ? It is absolutely free !

All you need to promise us is that you will not litter the trails and pickup any trash that you see destroying the pristine mountains.

We will help with trek information, safe trekking guidelines, health issues, sanitation and more.

Please note that this is not our full time job but a way of giving back to the mountains and the communities around them that have helped us grow so much as characters, so do expect some delays in replying and connect with us well in advance.

If one of us is taking a break and if you are willing to, he/she might accompany you, manage and guide you on your trek at no extra cost !

Do you want to lose weight, build muscle, or prepare for a competition? We know that everyone is unique and has different goals. That's why we tailor our tests and coaching sessions to your individual needs. Our program is designed to help you achieve your goals through individual sports diagnostic analysis and training at your fitness level. 

We believe that everyone has the potential to improve their performance and recover simultaneously. Our vision is to help you find the best possible balance between effort and relaxation to achieve your goals in everyday life. Knowing at what level you should train is important to having fun and sticking with it in the long term.
Our focus is on a holistic approach that considers both physical and mental aspects. We want you to become physically fitter and improve your mental well-being. Only when you are in harmony with yourself can you develop your full potential?

Reestdal Outdoor is het buitensportbedrijf gelegen op camping 't Reestdal in Balkbrug (Drenthe/Overijssel). Reestdal Outdoor heeft zijn naam te danken aan het prachtige natuurgebied het Reestdal, dat zich kenmerkt door heide, bos en het beekdalriviertje 'De Reest'.

Name: Alliance Jiu Jitsu Londrina
Description:
A Alliance é uma das escolas de Jiu Jitsu mais premiadas do mundo, sendo 15 vezes campeã mundial, com mais de 300 unidades em 27 países.
A nossa unidade em Londrina, com inauguração prevista para dezembro de 2025, tem o propósito de oferecer uma experiência premium em Jiu Jitsu — unindo excelência técnica, acolhimento familiar, profissionalismo e estrutura de alto padrão.

Name: Sportschool van den Nieuwendijk
Description:
Sportschool van den Nieuwendijk is al sinds 1965 een begrip in de regio Zaanstreek. Met een uniek aanbod in Japanse vechtkunsten, moderne martial arts, kracht- en conditietraining bieden wij niet alleen sport, maar ook persoonlijke ontwikkeling en maatschappelijke betrokkenheid.

Wij hebben jarenlange ervaring in het begeleiden van kinderen, jongeren en volwassenen, binnen het (voortgezet) onderwijs, maar ook via maatwerktrajecten voor zorginstellingen, wijkteams en overheidsinstanties. We werken onder andere samen met de politie, jeugdzorg, straatcoaches en diverse organisaties voor schoolbegeleiding.

Onze aanpak is altijd persoonlijk en afgestemd op de behoeften van de deelnemer. Door goede samenwerking herkennen én erkennen we problemen vroegtijdig. Of het nu gaat om groepslessen, individuele begeleiding of trainingen op locatie, we zorgen voor een traject op maat, op elk gewenst niveau.

Iedereen is welkom. We bieden ook gerichte trainingen voor mensen met een beperking of extra ondersteuningsbehoefte. In een veilige en respectvolle setting stimuleren we zelfvertrouwen, lichaamsbewustzijn en sociale vaardigheden, met oog voor ieders mogelijkheden.

Niet voor jezelf durven opkomen, onzekerheid in sociale situaties of gepest worden: dat zijn veelvoorkomende redenen om deel te nemen aan onze weerbaarheidstrainingen. Onze lessen helpen deelnemers letterlijk én figuurlijk steviger in hun schoenen te staan.

We werken aan sociale vaardigheden, zelfbeheersing en respectvol gedrag. Deelnemers leren zichzelf te zijn en zich uit te spreken, grenzen te herkennen en aan te geven, en op een verantwoorde manier met emoties om te gaan. In een veilige omgeving creëren we ruimte voor groei, expressie en samenwerking.

Meer dan een sportschool; een veilige, inclusieve plek voor sport, groei en weerbaarheid voor iedereen.

Name: GLOBAL SPORTS SCHOOL VISAKHAPATNAM
Description:
GSS — known as Global Sports School — is set to become the first-ever sports school in Andhra Pradesh, and a true pioneer in multi-sports excellence.

Our mission is simple but powerful: to promote and build the future of Indian athletes, and our vision is to make GSS a global brand in sports education and development.

At GSS, we are bringing together the best of the best under one roof. The school will cover over 15 individual sports, equipped with world-class facilities designed to shape more than 500+ student-athletes. From top-tier sports infrastructure to a complete sports ecosystem, everything an aspiring athlete needs will be right here.

We are building a strong foundation with 150+ certified coaches, trainers, professional and support staff, all dedicated to nurturing talent with passion and expertise.

Beyond just training, GSS will set a new benchmark with its rehabilitation center, private high-performance training facilities, and specialized support services — all designed to help athletes reach their peak potential safely and effectively.

And where better to build this dream than in the beautiful, vibrant city of Visakhapatnam, a place that inspires energy and ambition.

With GSS, we’re not just building a sports school; we’re building a movement, a legacy, and a global sports family.

Name: Salerno Youth League
Description:
La Salerno Youth League è un torneo giovanile di calcio che riunisce, ogni anno, alcune tra le migliori academy professionistiche e società dilettantistiche d’élite provenienti da tutta Italia e dall’estero.

Un progetto sportivo e organizzativo che nasce con l’obiettivo di valorizzare il talento giovanile e offrire ai ragazzi un’esperienza formativa di alto livello, in un contesto curato nei minimi dettagli.

 Location: Salerno e Pontecagnano Faiano (Campania, Italia)
 Prossima edizione: Dicembre 2025 
 Categorie: Under 12
 Prossima edizione: Maggio 2026 
 Categorie: Under 9, Under 10, Under 11, Under 13
Oltre all’aspetto tecnico, la Salerno Youth League promuove i valori educativi, sociali e culturali dello sport, trasformando ogni edizione in un’occasione di crescita e confronto tra giovani, famiglie e operatori del settore.

 Mission

Offrire una vetrina per i migliori talenti del calcio giovanile

Favorire il confronto tra club professionistici e realtà emergenti

Creare un punto di incontro per scout, dirigenti e allenatori

Valorizzare il territorio di Salerno come polo calcistico e turistico

 Un torneo. Un’esperienza. Un’occasione per crescere.

Name: Aerochute International
Description:
Experience the thrill of flight with the Aerochute, the world’s safest powered parachute. Designed for both novices and experienced pilots, the Aerochute combines the excitement of flying with the convenience of a motorized vehicle. With a weight capacity of up to 250kg, the Aerochute can comfortably accommodate two passengers, making it a perfect choice for a tandem flight.

The Aerochute  is  designed specifically with safety and ease of operation in mind. It cannot stall or spin and in the case of an engine failure it simply lands safely as a parachute would making it the most fun, safe and affordable way to explore the skies.

Description:
Welcome to Fintastic Swim Academy! Founded by husband-and-wife duo Nimrod and Kristina Shapira, both former professional swimmers, we bring over 20 years of elite swimming experience to the pool.

Our mission is to make swimming more than just a skill—it’s a life-changing experience. Whether you're a beginner or looking to perfect your technique, we provide a supportive environment for swimmers of all ages and levels.

Join us and discover the joy, confidence, and growth that swimming can bring!

Name: Op Noord
Description:
Op Noord bestaat uit: Paviljoen & terras, met het meest veelzijdige sport, speel & beweeg uitzicht van Eindhoven. Geheel vernieuwd Midgetgolf & Outdoorpark, met onder meer een 18 holes golfbaan en hoogteparcours. En het Speel & Beweegplein met 400 meter wieler & skeelerbaan, 4 kunstgras sportveldjes, atletiek en diverse E-games.

Op Noord is er voor alle denkbare actieve uitjes voor het gezin, kinderfeestjes, een familliedag of een bedrijfssportdag. Ook voor naschoolse sport,educatieve programma’s, outdoor trainingen en teambuilding is het park zeer geschikt. Daarnaast bieden wij ATB-clinics en Skike cursussen aan.
Het is mogelijk om diverse onderdelen van Op Noord per uur te huren, zoals een voetbalveldje of de wielerbaan. Ideaal voor scholen, verenigingen en vriendengroepen.
Op Noord is tevens het adres voor het inhuren van sportieve attracties & activiteiten. De speleobox, mobiele klimtoren, buikschuifbaan, survivalbaan en vele andere attracties kunnen Op Noord afgehaald worden.

Het ruime activiteiten aanbod van Op Noord, zorgt ervoor dat uw evenement een onvergetelijke ervaring wordt. Wij denken met u mee en leveren maatwerk. Op Noord is tevens een van de vele partners binnen het Sportcomplex Eindhoven-Noord, hierdoor kunnen wij ook evenementen aanbieden die veel breder zijn dan ons al veelzijdige aanbod.

Op Noord is aangesloten bij de VEBON , waardoor u verzekerd bent van veilige buitensport.

Name: Footure Academy
Description:
Ben jij klaar om jouw voetbalvaardigheden naar een hoger niveau te tillen? De Footure Academy biedt jonge voetballers de kans om zich technisch en mentaal te ontwikkelen in een plezierige professionele omgeving. Onze trainingen zijn niet alleen gericht op voetbaltechniek, maar ook op teamwork, spelinzicht en persoonlijke groei. Of je nu wilt leren dribbelen als een pro, de perfecte pass wilt geven of wilt werken aan jouw snelheid en kracht - Wij helpen jou jouw doelen te bereiken! 

Wat kun je verwachten?
Bij de Footure Academy ben je welkom vanaf 6 jaar en kun je elke zondag deelnemen aan onze groepstrainingen. Onder leiding van een ervaren team van trainers leer je alles over techniek, tactiek en samenwerken op het veld. Voor wie nog verder wil gaan, bieden we ook individuele 1-op-1 - een unieke kans om gericht te werken aan jouw persoonlijke doelen. 

Waarom de Footure Academy?
Wij geloven dat voetbal meer is dan alleen een spel. Kinderen ontwikkelen niet alleen hun voetbalvaardigheden, maar ook hun zelfvertrouwen, doorzettingsvermogen en respect voor anderen. Daarnaast zetten we maandelijks een speler in het zonnetje met onze ''Talent van de maand'' - erkenning, inclusief certificaat en extra privétraining! 

Grijp je kans! 

Dit is jouw kans om de eerste stappen te zetten naar een toekomst vol voetbalplezier en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Kom gerust langs voor een gratis proeftraining en ontdek zelf de voordelen van onze academie!

''Jouw talent, onze missie''

Klaar om te beginnen? Aanmelden kan eenvoudig via info@footureacademy.nl. Vermeld bij je aanmelding jouw naam, contactgegevens, leeftijd, huidige club en team. We kijken ernaar uit om samen met jou aan de slag te gaan bij de Footure Academy - dé plek waar jouw voetbaldroom begint!

We are passionate about sailing and dedicated to providing sailing trainings and sailing experiences. Led by Levent Sindel, a yachtmaster offshore, sailing instructor, film producer and photographer with over 15 years of expertise, our team is committed to helping you become a skilled sailor to achieve greatness on the water.
Alongside Levent, Cansu Sindel, a qualified sailor with a game and film production background, brings blend of expertise and creativity to our courses and expeditions. Join us for weekly expeditions and sailing courses in the Aegean, Mediterranean, and Baltic Sea regions.
We love to sail, explore, share, and enjoy the beauty of nature. Set sails on a journey of adventure and exploring with us!

Name: Adaptable Outdoor Recreation Society - (Adaptable Outdoors)
Description: Adaptable Outdoors provides outdoor recreation and leisure programs to children, adults and seniors living with physical and/or cognitive disabilities and their caregivers. Recreation and leisure programs were identified in 'The COVID 19 Disability Study', as one of the four greatest unmet needs for Candians living with a disability. As an organization we are responding to mental and physical health concerns, through meeting one the greatest unmet needs for a vulnerable population. Our adaptive recreation and leisure programs, also provide much needed social connection for our clients. Through the use of adaptive equipment, ingenuity and teamwork we make outdoor adventures accessible to people of all abilities, positively impacting their health quality of life and wellbeing. Providing participants and volunteers with opportunities to spend time in nature, try new activities, develop skills, and create meaningful social connections, helps individuals develop independence, healthy coping skills, and resilience. Our programs contribute to health and well-being through various phases of life. For example, we can provide opportunities for kids with disabilities to be included, and experience meaningful social interaction from a young age, laying a foundation for a lifetime of healthy living, or we might provide the first opportunity for someone after an injury to return to an activity they used to love, supporting their physical and mental recovery from trauma. We currently offer Adaptive Hiking, Adaptive Paddling, Adaptive Shore Fishing and Adaptive Kayak Fishing programs. We have a variety of adaptive equipment that helps us make these activities accessible to people of all abilities.

Name: Pro Skills Futsal
Description:
Pro Skills Futsal is a club-neutral supplemental program that offers all-year-round and seasonal training for players that are looking for individual development through futsal training to improve their technical skills in tight spaces, speed of play, and quick decision-making skills. As great skill developers, our training methodology will help players become more creative, confident on the ball, and more technical. 

Futsal has helped shape our players' technical proficiency, decision-making in a fast-paced environment, tactical understanding in small Futsal groups and outdoor field settings, improvisation, and ability to make quick key adjustments throughout the course of a game. Our goal is to continue to develop players through the aspects of the futsal game that can translate to improved performance on the soccer field.



All Year Training Program (Fall/Winter/Spring) - 38 training session total

Age groups: 2016/2015/2014/2013/2012/2011/2010/2009

Gender: Boys and Girls

Name: Bat Skills Cricket
Description:
Introducing Roundabout – A Game-Changing Cricket Training Tool

At BatskillsCricket.com, we’re proud to introduce Roundabout—a revolutionary cricket training system designed to teach, maintain, and sharpen essential batting skills for players of all ages and skill levels.
Invented by our founder, Moniram (Philip) Ramcharitar—a former First Division (3-day format) cricketer from Berbice, Guyana—Roundabout delivers a structured, modern, and highly effective way to improve batting technique, footwork, timing, and shot selection through focused, repetitive training.

 Our Mission
We aim to empower young and aspiring cricketers by giving them access to the right tools and training—helping them build confidence, discipline, and a strong foundation in the game.

 What Roundabout Offers:
• A structured introduction to batting for beginners and youth players
• A focus on proper technique and consistent skill development
• Engaging, accessible training designed for today’s players

There’s nothing like Roundabout anywhere in the world—and we’re excited to bring this innovation to the global cricket community.

Visit us at https://www.batskillscricket.com

Name: Off Szn Hockey LLC
Description:
Off Szn Hockey’s mission is to provide developmentally-appropriate, hockey-specific, off-season training for young female hockey players. Our training is designed with USA Hockey’s American Development Model (ADM) as a foundation. By introducing our players to structured training at an earlier age, we aim to improve their performance on and off the ice and help them reach the next level. Our main goal is to develop our players holistically to empower them to perform at their best in hockey, school, and life. 

Founded in 2024, Off Szn Hockey is dedicated to providing high-quality hockey training to girls hockey players looking to take their game to the next level. We offer on-ice and off-ice camps, skills clinics, and private and semi-private training. Off Szn also works with local youth ice hockey and street hockey programs to offer skills clinics to help grow & support their girls programs.

Name: GoDiving.col
Description:
GoDiving: Buceo, Bienestar y Desarrollo Personal para Empresas y Líderes 

En GoDiving, transformamos el buceo en una herramienta para el crecimiento personal y profesional. Nuestras experiencias combinan buceo, bienestar y seguridad, creando oportunidades únicas para fortalecer equipos, mejorar el liderazgo y fomentar el networking en entornos inspiradores.

 ¿Por qué las empresas confían en GoDiving?
 Team Building y Liderazgo – El buceo desarrolla confianza, comunicación y resiliencia, habilidades clave en cualquier organización.
 Bienestar y Mindfulness – Integramos meditación, respiración consciente y actividades para reducir el estrés y mejorar la concentración.
 Networking en entornos únicos – Conectamos empresarios y profesionales en experiencias transformadoras.
 Seguridad y Formación en Emergencias (DAN) – Ofrecemos certificaciones en primeros auxilios y manejo de emergencias para garantizar seguridad en cualquier entorno.
 Programas Personalizados – Diseñamos viajes para equipos corporativos, emprendedores y líderes en busca de crecimiento.

 Experiencias que ofrecemos
 Viajes de buceo y bienestar – Destinos exclusivos con actividades que fortalecen equipos y crean lazos genuinos.
 Certificaciones PADI y Especialidades – Desde Open Water hasta niveles avanzados y profesionales.
 Entrenamiento en Seguridad y Rescate con DAN – Cursos en Soporte Vital Básico, Administración de Oxígeno en emergencias de buceo y Evaluación Neurológica para accidentes descompresivos.

 Las empresas que invierten en el bienestar y la seguridad de sus equipos ven mejores resultados. Con GoDiving, llevamos esa transformación a un nivel más profundo.

 Hablemos sobre cómo crear una experiencia única para tu equipo o empresa.

Name: Crossfit by the Mill
Description:
CrossFit by the Mill er mere end et træningscenter.
Det er et fællesskab, hvor mennesker på alle niveauer mødes, udfordrer sig selv og udvikler sig – både fysisk og mentalt.

Hos os handler CrossFit ikke om at være den bedste – men om at blive bedre.
Vi tror på, at styrke skabes gennem fællesskab, tryghed og professionel coaching.
Derfor arbejder vi hver dag for at skabe et miljø, hvor alle føler sig velkomne, set og støttet.

I “The Mill” finder du:
• dedikerede coaches, der brænder for bevægelse og læring
• medlemmer i alle aldre og på alle niveauer
• et træningsmiljø, der kombinerer hårdt arbejde med humor, samhørighed og high-fives
• en kultur, hvor vi fejrer store og små fremskridt

Vi er stolte af at være "home of everyday athletes."
Her får du:
 professionel CrossFit-træning
 et stærkt og inkluderende community
 energi, sved og udvikling
 personlige relationer og støtte

Gennem vores storytelling-projekt “The Mill Stories” deler vi de historier, der gør vores box unik – fra medlemmernes rejser til coachenes passion og det fællesskab, der binder det hele sammen.

CrossFit by the Mill er stedet, hvor træning møder tilhørsforhold.
Hvor vi bygger stærke kroppe – og endnu stærkere fællesskaber.

Name: Voetbalschool Tiki Taka
Description:
Voetbalschool Tiki Taka | De leukste voetbalschool van de wereld

Bij Tiki Taka draait alles om de pure essentie van voetbal: spelplezier, vrijheid en persoonlijke groei. Wij zijn een voetbalschool uit Weert die kinderen van alle leeftijden helpt hun talent te ontdekken en te ontwikkelen in een inspirerende en veilige omgeving.

Onze trainingen zijn gebaseerd op het stimuleren van spelinzicht en technische voetbalvaardigheden. We geloven in leren door te doen, fouten te durven maken en oplossingen te vinden vanuit het spel zelf. Geen standaard oefenvormen, maar dynamische, uitdagende en speelse trainingssituaties die aansluiten bij de belevingswereld van jonge voetballers.

De ‘Goal Player’ Visie
Binnen onze doelspelersopleiding maken wij het verschil door te werken vanuit de moderne rol van de ‘goal player’. Doelspelers zijn niet alleen lijnbewakers, maar volwaardige teamspelers die meevoetballen, het spel lezen en initiatief tonen. Onder leiding van onze gespecialiseerde doelspelerscoaches krijgen jonge doelspelers de ruimte om hun spelhorizon te verbreden en hun unieke kwaliteiten te versterken.

Trainersontwikkeling
Naast trainingen voor spelers bieden wij ook trainerscursussen aan voor zowel beginnende als gevorderde trainers. Met onze praktische en inspirerende opleidingen helpen we trainers groeien in hun vakmanschap en begeleiden we hen in het ontwikkelen van een spelgerichte visie.

Meer dan alleen training
Tiki Taka organiseert toernooien, clinics en inspiratiesessies die kinderen uitdagen en motiveren om zichzelf te blijven ontwikkelen, zowel binnen als buiten het veld.

Samen bouwen we aan de spelers én de mensen van de toekomst.

Wil je meer weten over onze trainingen, trainerscursussen, visie of samenwerkingen? Neem gerust contact op of volg ons voor de nieuwste updates!


---

Name: Body Dynamics Bike Fit
Description:
Since 2016, our custom Bike Fit services have been helping cyclists achieve increased performance, improved comfort and pain free cycling at all levels from Elite level & GBCT performance athletes, sportive riders, novice through to lifelong cyclists. Our aim is to ensure you can achieve your goals, minimising risk of long term injury, maximising performance and above all, enjoying the ride.

Below are a few questions about your riding. If you answered yes to just some of those questions then a custom bike fit is for you! The list is not exhaustive, but just analysing one element, will not eliminate the other areas. Just raising or lowering your saddle for example, will not alleviate all your aches, pains or performance issues. 

We are experienced in working with female athletes where comfort is often compromised, when looking for performance. 

Male and female bike fits require a totally different approach and we are proud to be specialists in female bike fitting services.

Name: Fórmula URT
Description:
Fórmula URT es un equipo universitario multidisciplinario dedicado al diseño, análisis, manufactura y validación de un monoplaza tipo Fórmula SAE, con el propósito de impulsar la innovación y la excelencia en la ingeniería automotriz.

Integrado por estudiantes apasionados por la ciencia, la tecnología y el automovilismo, nuestro equipo aplica los conocimientos adquiridos en las aulas para resolver retos reales de la industria, fomentando habilidades en diseño mecánico, simulación, dinámica vehicular, electrónica, gestión de proyectos y patrocinio.

En Fórmula URT, creemos en el poder del trabajo colaborativo, la mejora continua y la formación integral de futuros ingenieros capaces de competir a nivel nacional e internacional. Nuestro objetivo es representar a nuestra universidad con orgullo, demostrando que la pasión, la disciplina y la ingeniería pueden transformar ideas en movimiento.

Name: Sports X
Description:
Sports X are a sports coaching company offering fun sports programs to 2-14 years old children across Australia, New Zealand and the United States. 

"sports for better minds"

Our specialised brand of coaching was developed by founder Justyn McKay and is designed to ensure that each child is fully engaged, with maximum participation and enjoyment during every session.

In other terms, we are all about the kids having FUN at every single of our session, playing sports and enjoying sharing these moments with their friends. 

The key to our success has been the energy and enthusiasm of the 150+ coaches who now implement the Sports X programs across the world.

Equally as important is the adherence to the key Sports X principles of professionalism, quality coaching and enjoyment. These have been our hallmarks and underpinned the growth we have enjoyed to date.

These principles, along with our commitment to providing a first-class experience for every player, every time, are driving future growth and creating opportunities for all our staff to grow with us.

We are currently providing:

- Sports programs (soccer, basketball, flag football, rugby, volleyball and multi-sport) at schools and preschools/kindergartens

- Holiday Camps (sport-specific or multi-sport)

- Sports X mini leagues

- Little X programs (fitness/exercise/dance programs for toddlers/preschoolers)

Name: The Northwest Soccer Foundation
Description: The Northwest Soccer Foundation exists for one reason: to make sure every player who wants to play, can. We level the playing field, remove barriers, and give kids, teens, and communities a fair shot at everything the game offers. Around here, it doesn’t matter what your bank account looks like or what gear you own—if you have the passion and the drive, we’ll fight to keep you on the field. Soccer in the Pacific Northwest is getting more expensive every year. For too many families, club fees, uniforms, travel, and gear are the dealbreaker. That’s not okay with us. The game should unite people, not divide them by who can pay. That’s why we step in with scholarships, gear donations, and program support. We’ve funded players who were ready to quit, stocked teams with much-needed equipment, covered travel costs for tournaments, and invested in coaching education. Your support doesn’t get lost in overhead—it turns into cleats on feet, jerseys on backs, and opportunities unlocked.

Name: Infinity Outdoors Kenya
Description:
Infinity Outdoors Kenya is a premier provider of outdoor adventure and education services, dedicated to delivering innovative, safe, and high-quality experiences across Kenya. With over two decades of expertise, we specialize in a wide range of activities, including whitewater kayaking, outdoor camping, school trips, adventure trips, hiking expeditions, and corporate team-building. Our programs cater to schools, private groups, and corporate clients, fostering resilience, outdoor survival skills, teamwork, and environmental appreciation through immersive outdoor experiences.
We offer comprehensive outdoor education programs for schools, emphasizing risk awareness, teamwork, leadership, and personal growth. Our private group adventures are designed for families and friends, featuring activities like educational excursions, mountain biking, water sports activities, guided outdoor camping, and guided hikes to explore Kenya’s breathtaking landscapes. Additionally, our corporate team-building programs focus on strengthening team cohesion and performance through engaging challenges at top venues all around the country. Beyond adventure, we provide safety management and consulting services for events and media productions, ensuring seamless execution for documentaries, reality shows, and other special projects as well.
With a deep-rooted heritage in water and land-based sports, we operate countrywide in locations such as Sagana on the Tana River, Mombasa, Watamu, Diani, Nairobi, Limuru, Nanyuki, Nakuru, Mara and Taita Taveta. Our commitment to quality extends to retail partnerships with leading brands, offering high-performance outdoor equipment, including Decathlon, Sweet Protection gear, Fluid Kayaks, and Red Paddle Co. SUPs. At Infinity Outdoors Kenya, we are passionate about creating memorable adventures that inspire and challenge individuals, fostering personal growth and a deeper connection with the natural world.

Name: Snellerzwemmen.nl
Description:
Mijn naam is Rob Kwaaitaal, eigenaar en oprichter van Snellerzwemmen.nl.

In 1985 nam ik op vijftienjarige leeftijd aan mijn eerste triathlon deel. Ik had toen niet kunnen bedenken dat er nog honderden wedstrijden zouden volgen!

Ik vind het leuk om de kennis en ervaring die ik heb opgedaan in meer dan dertig jaar duursport door te geven aan andere atleten. Om mij verder te bekwamen in het trainen en coachen van atleten heb ik in 2015 deelgenomen aan de opleiding Triathlon Trainer Niveau 3 van de Nederlandse Triathlonbond. Daarnaast heb ik de opleiding tot certified Swim Smooth coach gevolgd. Daarvoor heb ik cursussen in Engeland en Australië gevolgd. Ik ben de enige Nederlandse zwemtrainer met het Swim Smooth-certificaat. Swim Smooth is een methode voor triatleten en open water zwemmers om beter en sneller te leren zwemmen.

Eind 2015 heb ik Snellerzwemmen.nl opgericht. De missie van Snellerzwemmen.nl is om zwemmers en triatleten sneller en makkelijker te leren zwemmen. Dit doen we op basis van de Swim Smooth methodiek. Meer informatie over Swim Smooth vindt u hier.

De visie op trainen van Snellerzwemmen.nl is gebaseerd op de volgende vier pijlers:
– plezier in de sport (alleen dan kan je blijven trainen en ontwikkelen)
– stap voor stap verbeteren (progressie maak je geleidelijk en niet in een keer)
– kwaliteit boven kwantiteit (niet eindeloos km’s trainen maar er voor zorgen dat je zo efficiënt mogelijk beweegt)
– veel variatie in je training (je moet steeds je lichaam weer verrassen met nieuwe trainingsprikkels)

Graag helpen wij u om ook sneller te gaan leren zwemmen!

Name: Ireland By Canoe
Description: Our Mission is to empower the adventurer within. We aim to inspire and educate those looking to leverage the unique network of waterways in Ireland to explore memorable experiences. We share our love and passion for the outdoors, canoes and adventure through social channels. Driving the canoe revolution in Ireland.

Name: ScubaCaribe
Description: ScubaCaribe has been providing a complete range of diving, snorkeling, tours and water sports for travelers to the world’s best beach destinations.

Name: Selwyn Sports Trust

Our Purpose: To enrich people's lives and community wellbeing through active recreation.
What we Value:

Name: Beyond the Mud
Description:
Beyond the Mud was born from a desire to get out and live life to the full. We believe life happens outdoors and our aim is to help you experience that outdoor adventure.

Guided Rides

We offer bespoke guided mountain bike rides in Hampshire, West Sussex and Wales. Our guides love sharing the miles of trails that carve through the UK’s most beautiful landscapes, with everyone from novice riders in need of guidance, to experienced riders who just want a local’s knowledge of the trails.

Developed with you to create an experience, perfect for companies, charities and groups of individuals, around the UK. Packages can include the rental of bikes and lunches to keep you fuelled and well rested as you explore our countryside. 

Guided rides are an excellent way to get the most enjoyment out of your time on the bike. We all live busy lives so why fuss around looking for new routes and getting lost on bridleways and back roads when we can take you straight to the action. 

No matter your industry, architects, solicitors, retailers, manufacturers, charities or any other group of cyclists, our corporate guided rides provide an opportunity for team building and respite from the daily grind. We want you to get the same buzz out of your guided ride that we do, which is why we work with you to deliver the ride that your team will enjoy the most.

Come with us on an adventure, switch off from daily life and focus on you. 

Coaching 

Progressive mountain bike coaching run by highly qualified coaches in Southern England and Wales. You can choose the course that suits you best and focuses on the mountain bike techniques you wish to improve. From basic skills to race training, our expert coaches will get you riding with style and confidence on your mountain bike.

Name: ACTIVE ID
Description:
ACTIVE ID's goal is to promote the innovative growth and competitiveness of EU sport and leisure SMEs. The project promotes multidisciplinary innovation in the industry and facilitates the digital and green skills of SMEs.

1) Facilitating close cooperation between stakeholders in the fields of sports, tourism and leisure and information and communication technology
2) Promoting open innovation frameworks in regional S&L sectors

ACTIVE ID consortium covers 5 EU regions of varying levels of regional development and state of S&L industries: Päijät-Häme (FI), Castilla-La Mancha (ES), Dalarna (SE), North Brabant (NL), Vratsa (BG). 

Building on the joint interregional learning process, ACTIVE ID PPs will improve 5 regional policy instruments that have potential to promote S&L cross-sectoral multi-stakeholder innovation in their regions and upgrade S&L SME support mechanisms.

Name: Wheeling Barcelona
Description: Una nueva manera de descubrir Barcelona para personas con movilidad reducida. Visitaremos la costa, los parques y las montañas de Barcelona en handbike.

Personal training | athlete performance | prehab
Performance @hellopadelacademyholland 
Bedrijfsfitness

Welkom bij Rise Performance - jouw partner in het bereiken van topprestaties

Bij Rise Performance staan we voor hoogwaardige gestructureerde en persoonlijke op maat gemaakte programma's in de vorm van personal training, performance training, prehab, bedrijfsfitness en online coaching. Het team van Rise Performance bied deskundige begeleiding en professionele ondersteuning bij het behalen van jou persoonlijke potentieel of dat van jouw onderneming. 

- Wat ons onderscheid 
met de nadruk op persoonlijk, creeren we fitnessdoelen die net zo uniek zijn als jijzelf of jouw bedrijf. of je nu een atleet bent die het maximale uit zijn/haar prestaties wilt halen, iemand die streeft naar een gezondere levensstijl of een bedrijf die zijn/haar medewerkers fit/gezond en gemotiveerd op de werkvloer wilt houden. 

Rise Above limits, Improve your Performance

Name: Padelife
Description:
Padelife costruisce e gestisce in tutta Italia centri padel sostenibili e all'avanguardia, adatti ai giocatori di ogni età, livello e condizione fisica.
Padelife è un’esperienza che avvolge il giocatore prima, durante e dopo la performance.
Padelife Settimo Cielo, a Torino, è la più grande padel arena di Europa, con i suoi 11 campi tutti sotto un’unica copertura climatizzata.
Padelife Silicella, a Roma, è una piccola oasi nel traffico della città che offre servizi di eccellenza dentro e fuori dal campo, con i suoi 14 campi, di cui 8 coperti e uno singolo, la tribuna panoramica, il bistrot, la spa, l'areakids e la palestra di riscaldamento .
In tutti i club connessione WiFi gratuita in tutte le aree, distributori ecosostenibili di bevande con borraccia intelligente. Telecamere per riprese in diretta, registrazione dei momenti salienti e touch screen bordo campo [ coming soon], Spogliatoi di design , area lavoro comune.
 L'Academy Padelife vanta una squadra di maestri nazionali e di 1° livello sotto la direzione tecnica di Saverio Palmieri e il coordinamento di Lorenzo Verginelli.

Name: ON THE ROAD BOXING
Description:
Chez On The Road Boxing, nous sommes convaincus que la boxe est bien plus qu’un sport : c’est un puissant outil de transformation sociale.

Nous l’utilisons pour aller là où les dispositifs classiques échouent, en créant des espaces d’expérimentation pour les jeunes en rupture de parcours (On The Road Playground) et en développant le leadership féminin à travers la sororité (On The Road Sorority).

Avec Sorority Boxing, Marine Camara pousse encore plus loin son engagement en mettant la boxe au service des femmes victimes de violences. Elle transforme un espace de pratique partagée en un véritable dispositif de reconstruction et d’autodéfense, où chaque femme peut restaurer son estime de soi, développer une posture de leadership et reprendre le contrôle de sa vie.

Notre mission ? Utiliser la boxe pour reconstruire l’estime de soi, développer des compétences clés et créer du lien social.

#OnTheRoadBoxing #SororityBoxing

Name: RYSE. Athletic
Description: RYSE. Athletic exists to create a healthier, safer, more performance-driven future for youth athletes. Providing expert opinions from leaders in their fields, as well as current and ex-professional athletes, we strive to provide the best quality information utilising our 9 Pillars of Youth Performance strategy.

Name: Tommy Lazzaro Foundation
Description: The Tommy Lazzaro Foundation is dedicated to empowering underprivileged youth and high school athletes, building a foundation for the champions of tomorrow. Inspired by Tommy Lazzaro's legacy—a Colorado Springs native, high school football state champion, Central Michigan University quarterback, and dedicated member of the U.S. Army's 7th Special Forces Group—we strive to provide mentorship, coaching, and access to transformative athletic programs. Our mission is to equip young athletes with the skills development and scouting connections they need to excel on the field, in the classroom, and in life. By addressing the barriers these athletes face, we aim to unlock their potential and provide pathways to success. Join us in honoring Tommy's commitment to excellence and service by creating opportunities for the next generation of athletes to achieve their dreams.

Name: Inhala Pilates
Description:
Inhala pilates es un espacio en donde a través del entrenamiento corporal puedas tener un momento para ti de especial conexión. 

Nuestro enfoque está centrado en el cuidado de la persona en su integralidad, promoviendo la buena salud y el bienestar tanto mental, corporal y espiritual en un entorno amable y de respeto para todos. 

A través de la técnica del Pilates como canal y el uso del “Reformer” como equipamiento, buscamos entregar el más completo sistema funcional para lograr tus objetivos. 

Junto a profesores de larga trayectoria y experiencia, conformaremos una ruta para llegar a esos desafíos con una metodología personalizada, preocupados en las diferentes necesidades y capacidades de cada alumno.

Name: Global Syndicate of Mountain Bike Coaches
Description:
Global Syndicate of Mountain Bike Coaches

From the industry's top MTB coaches and instructor-trainers comes a new chapter in mountain bike coach education and certification.

Proven expertise. New vision. Elevating standards.

For nearly 20 years, we've shaped professional mountain bike instruction worldwide, leading the way from 2006 through 2024. Now, in 2025, we're charting an independent course to forge a new path. This approach keeps us agile and innovative, ensuring we deliver the highest-quality training programs that advance coach education and meet the demands of a fast-evolving global industry.

GSMBC’s vision centers on a holistic, human-centric coaching approach through our Six-Pillar Coaching System, empowering MTB instructors and coaches to create exceptional experiences for riders of all levels, including adaptive MTB.

GSMBC offers world-class programs and a cutting-edge learning portal with webinars, online courses, and a coaches' community. This pioneering global education system empowers coaches to inspire, connect, and elevate their riders.

GSMBC certifications are recognized globally by insurance providers and industry leaders, including Whistler Mountain Bike Park. Whether you’re an independent MTB coach, bike park, or coaching business, we’re excited to collaborate with you to deliver the best mountain bike programs for your community.

Join us today and discover your true potential.

Name: Explora Trott
Description: Explora Trott, Vente - location et balades guidées en trottinettes électriques tout terrain (MADE IN FRANCE).

Name: Gritt Outdoor
Description:
Gritt offers mentoring, coaching, and support to kids getting into the outdoors through action sports. We focus on skiing, snowboarding, and mountain biking.

We create sporting pathways through inspiration and inclusivity, while facilitating progression to the highest level.

Name: MK BOOST PADEL
Description:
MK BOOST PADEL est un service de coaching padel dédié au plaisir du jeu,  la progression et à la performance.

Porté par Maxime Kamper, coach de padel indépendant, MK BOOST PADEL accompagne joueurs et joueuses de tous niveaux, du loisir à la compétition.

 Services proposés :
• Cours individuels personnalisés
• Cours collectifs personnalisés
• Coaching enfants (sessions hebdomadaires)
• Accompagnement technique et tactique
• Travail du jeu en situation réelle et en match
• Arbitrage de tournoi
• Organisation d'évènement et team building
• Animation 

 Zone d’intervention : Strasbourg et alentours

 Approche :
Un coaching personnalisé, structuré et pédagogique, adapté à chaque joueur, avec un objectif clair : prendre du plaisir et booster votre niveau de padel.

 Cours sur réservation – particuliers, enfants, club entreprises.

Name: Instituto Basquete Brasil
Description:
Somos a instituição educacional do BASQUETE BRASILEIRO que através do ambiente digital iremos produzir e disseminar a educação e o ensino do Basquete ao maior número de pessoas possível contribuindo para o seu desenvolvimento técnico e social através do ensino de qualidade.
Focada na excelência dentro e fora das quadras, o IBB firmou um compromisso com o desenvolvimento do BASQUETE BRASILEIRO e todo o seu ecossistema, com um propósito claro em mudar o panorama do basquete brasileiro que reúne todas as competências e habilidades necessárias para a formação de profissionais de elite do basquete.
O IBB, atua na formação, qualificação e certificação, através de cursos, licenças e pós-graduação, de todos os profissionais que estão envolvidos com o basquete. Tendo escolas específicas para cada área: Escola de Treinadores, Escola de Administração, Gestão e Marketing, Escola de Ciência e Medicina do Esporte e Escola de Arbitragem.

Name: YOGA mitsandra GLÜCK
Description:
Is that you?
You want to get out of the carousel of thoughts?
But you are also afraid of silence?
You don't feel ready or mobile for yoga?

Then Yoga is there for you - exactly where you are right now:
with a stiff neck or a sore back
with a head buzzing of thoughts
regardless of how tall, short, young or old you are.

By exploring your body while 
moving & being  
tightening & releasing 
holding & letting go
you connect with yourself - naturally, without compulsion or pressure.

Not by achieving exciting poses, but by perceiving yourself with every fiber of your body. Get out of your head and into your body - release your energy. Challenge without exhaustion. 

To 
enjoy a pleasant body feeling
find a little more peace within yourself
see yourself and your life a bit clearer
afterwards.

Your body and mind will be recharged as we holistically strengthen ourselves. A short mini vacation. In tune with you and what is. Lightened. Invigorated. Liberated.

Doesn't that sound like a state we are all longing for?
 
Embark on your journey to you - with me - wherever you are: 
at home in your living room or online
 in your local company or hybrid, 
in the park or garden

Come as you are! I look forward to seeing you on the mat together sometime!

Yours Sandra

Name: Respect Hoops
Description: Respect Hoops was born of the desire to provide quality training for athletes of all ages and levels by current and retired pro and collegiate athletes in their own communities. Starting in 2018 we realized that there was a need to focus on up and coming athletes in our own communities and what better way to do so then by providing a home for off season collegiate and professional athletes from our community? Respect Hoops is an organization with the main focus of providing one on one and group training sessions to the next generation of athletes from professional and collegiate athletes themselves.

Name: Getcrewd - your next move.
Description:
Word jij enthousiast van het geven van bijv. een bootcamp les of hardlooptraining? Dan is Getcrewd misschien wel iets voor jou. Met Getcrewd hoef je niet meer met What'sapp of e-mail te stoeien om vrienden en kennissen op te trommelen en kan je zelfs betaald krijgen voor jouw inzet zonder tikkies achteraf. Hoe klinkt dat? 

Probeer ons uit, je zit nergens aan vast: getcrewd.io

Name: CROSSFIT BUMBLEBEES
Description:
A CrossFit BumbleBees nous mettons tout en œuvre pour que vous puissiez vous remettre en forme, à votre niveau, progressivement, avec un suivi et une ambiance unique.

Tous nos cours sont encadrés par un coach formé et certifié Level-1, et limités à 12 personnes maximum afin de vous offrir un coaching d’une qualité exceptionnelle.

Du lundi au samedi nous sommes à votre disposition pour vous renseigner, vous conseiller, vous accompagner pour atteindre vos objectifs personnels.

L’accès pour tous à l’activité physique en toute sécurité est notre 1er objectif ! C’est pour cela que nos cours et séances sont accessibles et adaptées à tous niveaux.

Name: Festivalul Sporturilor
Description:
Festivalul Sporturilor este un eveniment sportiv de mare amploare, anual, desfășurat în marile orașe din România și care cuprinde mai multe probe dedicate tuturor pasionaților de sport, profesioniști și amatori:
⚬ alergare (pe potecă și pe șosea)
⚬ ciclism montan
⚬ probă cu obstacole
⚬ orientare sportivă
⚬ cursa copiilor
⚬ cursa persoanelor cu dizabilități

Aceste probe se adresează atât persoanelor care au mai practicat aceste sporturi, dar și celor care își doresc să încerce pentru prima dată noi discipline, într-un mediu competițional organizat, susținând astfel performanța și dezvoltarea sportului de masă.

Pe lângă probele sportive vor avea loc activități cu caracter educațional și informativ: proiecții de filme, workshopuri sportive ținute de profesioniști cu experiență - cu scopul de a populariza și promova mișcarea ca parte integrantă a unei vieți de calitate.
În cadrul acestui eveniment ne dorim să promovăm un stil de viață sănătos bazat pe mișcare și activități sportive de calitate, cu impact pozitiv asupra mediului.

Festivalul Sporturilor este un proiect ce s-a conturat ca parteneriat între două echipe pline de entuziasm: Tabere și Circuite de Alergare, Schi și MTB, Silviu Bălan, o echipă de profesioniști ai sportului cu experiență în organizarea de evenimente dedicate mișcării de peste 13 ani și echipa IMPACT Developer & Contractor.

Name: Jumpshot Recruit
Description: Discover Your Path to College Basketball Success with Jumpshot Recruit. As a premier basketball-focused organization, we specialize in guiding high school players through the complex college recruitment process. Our comprehensive services feature an annual College Basketball Recruitment Summit, quarterly workshops, and immersive basketball camps. With a commitment to providing expert guidance, valuable information, and essential resources, Jumpshot Recruit empowers players to maximize their prospect value and secure coveted college scholarships. Join us as we elevate your game and unlock your potential for collegiate success.

Name: Voetjebal Delft, Westland en Zoetermeer
Description: Voetjebal is een voetballende speelconcept voor kinderen van twee tot en met vijf jaar. Kleuters en peuters maken voor het eerst op een gestructureerde manier kennis met een bal, samen met één van hun ouders, waarbij de nadruk uiteraard op spel en plezier ligt.

Name: Public Service Club
Description: PSC is an exclusive social and sports Club, and one of the best Sports clubs in  Nairobi.  We are the ultimate venue to enjoy sport, entertain friends or meet new people.

Name: The Picklr Santa Barbara-Goleta
Description:
The PICKLR Santa Barbara-Goleta isn’t just an indoor pickleball facility—it’s a third place. A community hub designed for how you want to play, train, recover, and hang out. We’re building a reliable, pro experience for every level of player. Look forward to 7 courts, 18’ high ceilings, and sound-dampening engineering so the game feels focused, fast, and fun every time a guest steps on our courts.
 
The PICKLR offers the convenience of having a reservation, showers, lockers, filtered water, grab-n-go snacks, drinks, and on-site paddle demos. It’s a space to arrive early, stay late, connect, and reset—supported by intentional programming, warm-up and recovery equipment, and an inviting community lounge. 

Built around reliable access, fair play, and an inclusive, energized culture... this club is for students, families, competitors, and anyone who wants more than just a place to play. We are the Home for Indoor Pickleball in Santa Barbara County!

Name: Soccer Shots Central/NorthCentral PA
Description:
Soccer Shots is an engaging children’s soccer program with a focus on character development. Our caring team positively impacts children’s lives on and off the field through best-in-class coaching, curriculum and communication. Our coaches are the best-trained in the business. Our expert-approved curriculum is
age-appropriate and aligns with childhood education standards. In addition, we provide an exceptional customer experience and ongoing communication with parents.

Name: Ramkrishna Yoga Cure (RYC)
Description: Ramkrishna Yoga Cure is dedicated to promoting holistic health and well-being through the transformative power of yoga at the comfort of your home. The institute offers online and in-person at home classes with a comprehensive range of yoga programs designed to address various physical, mental, and emotional health challenges. Each program is guided by experienced yoga instructors and tailored to help individuals manage and cure ailments naturally, enhancing their overall quality of life. Whether seeking stress relief, pain management, or improved flexibility, Ramkrishna Yoga Cure provides a supportive community for everyone on their journey to optimal wellness.

Name: Escuela Ski Baqueira
Description:
Baqueira Beret tiene unas montañas increíbles con una gran diversidad de terrenos por explorar. En Escuela de Ski Baqueira, queremos que pueda esquiar y recorrer todas sus pistas, con la seguridad que aporta un grupo de profesionales del esquí.

Las clases de esquí y snowboard que ofrecemos en nuestra escuela son impartidas por un grupo de profesores muy cualificado, experimentado y comprometido en ayudarle a alcanzar sus objetivos, familiarizarle con las pistas de la estación y guiarle de forma divertida hasta el siguiente nivel de aprendizaje.

Tenemos programas que se ajustan a todas las edades y niveles de aprendizaje. Garantizamos el 100% de la satisfacción de nuestros alumnos en todas nuestras clases de esquí. Le ofrecemos una aventura sin riesgos que no olvidará. Le invitamos a vivir con nosotros la experiencia del esquí en nuestra escuela de Baqueira Beret.

Name: Excellent Martial Arts
Description:
Excellent Martial Arts ist eine anerkannte Kampfkunstschule im Zwicky Areal, Dübendorf (Region Zürich).
Seit der Gründung im Jahr 1999 vermittelt Shihan Ralph Hödl mit über 40 Jahren Erfahrung die Werte traditioneller und moderner Kampfkünste – Disziplin, Respekt, Selbstvertrauen und mentale Stärke.

Unsere Trainings richten sich an Kinder, Jugendliche und Erwachsene, vom Anfänger bis zum Fortgeschrittenen.
Das Angebot umfasst Karate, Kyusho Jitsu, Krav Maga, Qigong, Taichi sowie Workshops und Personal Training.

Excellent Martial Arts verbindet die Präzision japanischer Tradition mit modernen Trainingsmethoden. Neben der körperlichen Fitness fördern wir auch mentale Stärke, Selbstbeherrschung und persönliche Entwicklung.
Unsere Schüler lernen, sich nicht nur zu verteidigen, sondern auch im Alltag sicher, konzentriert und selbstbewusst aufzutreten.

Ergänzend bieten wir Seminare, Events und Firmenkurse zu Themen wie Selbstschutz, Team-Building und Stressmanagement an.
Mit Leidenschaft, Erfahrung und Respekt führen wir Menschen jeden Alters auf ihrem Weg zu innerer und äusserer Stärke.

Excellent Martial Arts – Wo Kampfkunst zur Lebensschule wird.

URL der Website: http://excellentmartialarts.ch

Telefon: +41 (0)79 712 51 41
Gründungsjahr: 1999
Branche: Sport / Kampfkunst / Fitness / Bildung

Spezialgebiete:

Karate
Kyusho Jitsu
Krav Maga
Selbstverteidigung
Kinder- & Jugendtraining
Qigong & Taichi
Leadership & Persönlichkeitsentwicklung
Workshops & Seminare
Firmen- & Teamtrainings

Name: Happy Fit 4 U
Description: Happy fit 4 U biedt sportprogramma's aan voor kinderen vanaf 6 jaar. Wij hebben extra aandacht voor kinderen met een rugzak, zoals ADHD, autisme, slachtoffer van pestgedrag. Wij bieden een veilige plek zodat uw kind spelenderwijs weerbaarder en zelfverzekerder wordt.

Name: Crossfit La Forja
Description:
Somos un centro de CrossFit Oficial. No entrenamos con fines estéticos, trabajamos cuerpo y mente. 

Nuestro objetivo es desarrollar al máximo el rendimiento en todas y cada una de estas áreas físicas.

Name: Picklefox
Description:
Founded by passionate Pickleball enthusiasts, Picklefox is more than just a store – it’s a community. Our journey began with a simple addiction to the game, and now we’re on a mission to share our love for Pickleball with players of all ages and skill levels.

At Picklefox, we believe that Pickleball is more than just a sport; it’s a way to have fun, stay active, and connect with others. That’s why we’re dedicated to creating a fun and approachable Pickleball ecosystem that encourages everyone to pick up a paddle and join the excitement.

We pride ourselves on curating the best products available, ensuring that every item in our store offers the best value for our customers. From top-quality paddles to the most essential accessories, we’ve got everything you need to enhance your game and enjoy every moment on the court.

Our vision extends beyond providing great products. We have big plans for the future, aiming to expand the interest and participation in Pickleball across Malaysia and South East Asia. Whether you’re a seasoned player or just starting out, we’re here to support you every step of the way.

Join us at Picklefox, where Pickleball is more than just a game – it’s a passion we’re excited to share with you!

Name: BlackWomenWho
Description:
Black Women Who empowers, educates, and inspires women of color to hold space in outdoor environments where they're rarely seen.

We educate women and businesses about the importance of implementing diversity, inclusiveness, and equality through recreational activities.

Name: MMTH Fieldhouse
Description:
No Spectators. No Sidelines.
Mammoth Fieldhouse is a competitive social experience where competition breeds camaraderie. The Fieldhouse experience is thoughtfully curated to bring out everyone’s inner competitor. Guests will enjoy world-class food and beverage in a facility inspired to celebrate sports competition. An ideal space for a night out, a quick round, or corporate events.

Name: LB - PT
Description:
Personal Trainer die meer brengt dan trainingskills. 

Als PT ben ik gedreven het beste uit de mensen te halen op sportief gebied. Naast de trainingen geef ik sportvoeding advies en zorg ik voor mentale ondersteuning wanneer dat nodig is. 

Bedrijfsmatig heb ik veel toe te voegen en denk ik mee in wat het beste is voor het bedrijf en haar klanten waarvoor ik me inzet.

Name: Studio Tańca Towarzyskiego TANGO Gdynia
Description:
Studio Tańca Towarzyskiego TANGO GDYNIA. Kursy tańca towarzyskiego i użytkowego dla dorosłych oraz młodzieży. Zajęcia grupowe i indywidualne. Lekcje tańca dla par przed ślubem. Największa sala w Polsce i cała ściana luster.
Zapraszamy na kursy tańca towarzyskiego i użytkowego dla dorosłych prowadzone miłej i wesołej atmosferze. W ofercie mamy także lekcje indywidualne dla osób chcących szybciej poznać tajniki tańca. Pary ślubne znajdą u nas opiekę od zajęć grupowych po indywidualne lekcje choreografii pierwszego tańca.

Name: Bangkok Inter Academy
Description:
Bangkok Sports Academy is a community-focused sports training institution located in the lively city of Bangkok, Thailand. Committed to the grassroots development of kids, our academy is dedicated to providing accessible and quality coaching and development programs, with a strong emphasis on nurturing the talents of children and youth.

At Bangkok Sports Academy, we prioritize the growth and development of young athletes. Our programs are specifically designed to provide a strong foundation for kids, helping them discover and enhance their sporting abilities.

Our academy will offer a diverse range of training programs covering various sports, ensuring that children and young athletes have the chance to explore and excel in their chosen disciplines, introducing them to existing and new and upcoming sports.

Our dedicated team of coaches and trainers brings a wealth of experience and a passion for working with young athletes, fostering a supportive and nurturing environment.

We provide a safe and welcoming environment with equipment tailored to the needs of developing athletes. Our aim is to make quality sports training accessible to all.

Bangkok Sports Academy encourages participation in local and regional sports events, allowing young athletes to gain valuable experience and exposure while building their confidence.

We believe in the power of sports to strengthen communities. Beyond training, our academy promotes a sense of community and wellness, instilling values that extend beyond the field.

Bangkok Sports Academy is a hub for young athletes to discover their potential and embark on a journey of sports development and personal growth. Join us in the heart of Bangkok and watch your child's passion for sports flourish.

Name: Adam Premier Training
Description:
Adam Premier Training is the premier soccer development program in the Silicon Valley. With extensive reach to youth, college, and professional athletes in the Bay Area, Adam Premier Training is proven to elevate any player who joins the program.

Adam Premier Training offers youth development programs, private and group sessions, college ID & recruitment guidance, summer camps, and more.

Name: Sport Clique
Description:
Sport Clique is a student-led sports organization committed to developing future professionals in the global sports industry.
Guided by the slogan "Building Sport Professionals," we provide a platform where passion for sports meets career development.

Our work spans across sports media, law, management, marketing, journalism, coaching, scouting, and athletics. We organize training sessions, tournaments, workshops, and community initiatives that equip members with practical skills and professional exposure.

Sport Clique is more than a club. It is a community that fosters teamwork, discipline, leadership, and integrity. We create opportunities for students to grow as athletes, managers, and professionals, while connecting with alumni, industry experts, and stakeholders in the sports sector.

From organizing competitive events on campus to championing the advancement of talented sportspersons, our mission is to prepare members for successful careers in sports in Nigeria and beyond.

At Sport Clique, we don't just play sports. We shape the future of the sport industry.

Sport Clique | Building Sport Professionals

Name: SON BOU SCUBA - MENORCA
Description:
Son Bou Scuba is a PADI 5 Star Dive Resort and a BSAC Resort Centre. The dive centre is centrally located on Menorca’s south coast. This enables us to dive the best dive sites on the island, regardless of wind direction. Menorca offers excellent diving conditions with water temperatures of 28 degrees and an average visibility of more than 30 meters.
Since 2004, Son Bou Scuba offers professional and safe diving excursions for both beginners and experienced divers. We are a family-run company, and with more than 30 years of professional experience, new equipment and a passion for the underwater world, we ensure an unforgettable diving experience.
At Son Bou Scuba we prioritise small-group diving experiences, ensuring that there are never more than 6 people in a group, typically even fewer. We firmly believe in the effectiveness of small-group training, with our courses conducted either privately or semi-privately.
We welcome divers of all backgrounds and abilities, and strive to create a welcoming and inclusive environment for all.

Name: IAKS Japan
Description:
IAKS(International Association for Sports and Leisure facilities: 国際余暇スポー施設協会)はスポー・レジャー・レクリエーション施設の専門家に向けた世界有数の非営利組織です。1965年から計画やデザイン、運営に関する専門知識を国際的なネットワーキングにより共有してきました。

IAKSは国際的なコングレスやセミナー、スポー・レジャー施設を見学するスタディートリップを企画・開催しています。

1967年から機関誌sbマガジンを発行し、スポー・レジャー・プール・ウェルネス・スタジアム・アリーナの建築・イノベーション・製品・サービスの事例を紹介しています。

IAKSは特に優れた施設・デザインを表彰しています。

IAKSはIOCに認知され、IPCやそのほかの国際組織と協力関係にあります。

IAKSには現在８支部(ドイ、スイス、ポーランド、ノルディック、ラテンアメリカ、スペイン、オーストリア、日本)が存在し、支部毎に活発な活動を行なっています。

IAKS日本支部はIAKS発足直後に設立され、現在に当たるまで日本のスポー・レジャーの発展に寄与してきました。

日本支部では年に数回、国内外の有識者をお招きしてセミナーを行なっております。日本支部の会員はセミナーの参加の有無に関わらず、セミナーに使用された資料を無料でダウンロードいただけます。

また会員同士の情報交換の場としていただき、より良いスポー・レジャー施設の実現のために寄与したいと考えております。

Name: STAI FUORI
Description:
Siamo un’associazione nata dalla passione di vivere lo sport all’aria aperta, con la volontà di coniugarlo alla conoscenza dell’ambiente e spinti da un grande moto di libertà.

Non importa se tra la spuma delle onde, su sentieri sterrati o tra cime innevate, facendo sport insieme a noi imparerai a rispettare i territori, conoscendoli, esplorandoli e proteggendoli.

Lavoriamo a stretto contatto con la natura per responsabilizzare all’insegna di un futuro migliore, ricercando la condivisione di esperienze uniche capaci di emozionare. Lo sport è il mezzo che usiamo per il coinvolgimento di tutti, principianti e non.

Description: We are an official science club at CSU Polytechnic Pomona (CPP). We hold monthly meetings, collabs, and activities to educate our fellow students on the science of nutrition. Feel free to follow our instagram @snsc_cpp!

Name: Super Shots
Description:
In the heart of New Delhi, a transformative force in tennis coaching has emerged—Super Shots True Tennis (SSTT). Established in 2021 by former professional player and certified coach Yatharth Vidrohi Bhardwaj, SSTT is dedicated to nurturing tennis talent through a holistic approach that integrates technical, physical, and mental training. With a commitment to fostering community engagement and providing world-class facilities, SSTT is poised to redefine the tennis landscape in India.

At SSTT, our mission is clear: to positively impact lives through sport by offering comprehensive tennis training programs that cater to individuals of all ages and skill levels. We aim to create a nurturing environment where players can develop their skills, build character, and achieve their full potential both on and off the court.

Our vision extends beyond individual development; we aspire to cultivate a vibrant tennis community that thrives on collaboration, discipline, and mutual respect. By promoting tennis as a vehicle for personal growth and social interaction, SSTT seeks to contribute to the broader goal of making tennis accessible and enjoyable for all.

Name: Barbell Coalition
Description: Barbell Coalition provides online powerlifting coaching and mentorship services to athletes and coaches. Whether you're a hobbyist, striving for a world title, or looking to become a better coach, we're here to help you achieve your goals with personalised and professional guidance.

Name: Revel
Description: Welcome to our sports community! Here, you can connect with other passionate athletes, train to improve your skills and performance, play in games and competitions, compete against others at your level, and Revel in the joy and excitement of sports. No matter where you are located, you can join us and enjoy the ride. Whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting out, we have something for everyone. So don't wait – come train, play, compete, and Revel with us today!

Name: Skyhawks & SuperTots Sports Colorado
Description:
At Skyhawks-SuperTots Sports Colorado, we believe sports are more than just games, they’re a foundation for building confidence, character and lifelong skills.
As Colorado’s #1 youth sports program, we offer year-round classes and camps for kids ages 2–14, featuring 14 sports and a team of highly trained, safety-certified coaches. Every session is designed to help kids grow in a safe, fun and encouraging environment, whether they’re trying a sport for the first time or building on existing skills.
Parents who choose us see real results: happier kids, growing confidence and a love for being active. Our mission is to Connect with INTENTION, IGNITE a Spark, Leave an IMPRINT and to Teach Life Skills through Sports while ensuring every child has a positive, supportive experience that is full of smiles.
Sign up for a class or camp today: https://skyhawkscolorado.com/

Name: Butia Baseball Academy
Description:
Private one-on-one and group baseball and softball instruction from Mike Butia, former 5th round draft pick of the Cleveland Indians

About Mike:
Drafted in the 5th Round of the 2004 MLB Draft by the Cleveland Indians
Played 5+ years in Cleveland Indians Organization, 2004 New York Penn League All-Star
Division 1 James Madison University - 3 year starter and team captain
North Allegheny Grad, PIAA State Champion and 2016 NA Hall of Fame Inductee
Played in the renowned Cape Cod baseball collegiate summer league for the Bourne Braves

Our Methods:
At the Butia Baseball Academy we focus on building strong foundational skills by using repeatable methods for hitting, fielding and throwing. Our methods include leveraging both analytics and focusing on the core fundamentals to improve your game.

I strongly believe the mental side of the game is far more important then any physical talent or ability. I have seen many 5 tool players (hitting, hitting for power, running, fielding and throwing) that did not succeed because they struggled with the mental side of the game and lacked confidence.

The key to success in baseball and life is to have a disciplined, consistent and repeatable approach in everything you do and above all else have confidence in your abilities.

What makes us different?
I played collegiately and professionally so I know first hand what’s needed to achieve success
All private one on one and group instruction directly from me
Teach students life skills that they need on and off the field.
Maximize natural talent and ability
Rapsodo Certified Hitting & Pitching Instructor
Current American Baseball Coaches Association Member

Name: Camp Kee-Mo-Kee
Description:
Picture a wonderland just beyond Komoka, Ontario, where the forest welcomes you with open arms and the sounds of laughter echo through the trees. This is Camp Kee-Mo-Kee, where cabins peek out from the woods and campfires are a rite of passage. 

Each summer, Camp Kee-Mo-Kee welcomes hundreds of campers to our summer camp, where they learn, explore and make lifelong friendships. However, there’s more to Camp Kee-Mo-Kee than the summer camp programs. The Program Team also offers nature education and fun outdoor activities throughout the year to schools, community groups, and anyone looking for some adventure. Plus, our facility is available for rent to schools, churches, and community organizations when camp isn’t in session. The camp is generously supported by local organizations, churches and individual donors of time and resources and we truly are a community.

We’re thrilled to announce 2024’s programs, with day and overnight camps, recreation programs and lots of activities being offered throughout the year. With the leadership of Jill Hodgins, our Executive Director, we expect to see consistent and intentional camp development for years to come. So, come to camp and join the Kee-Mo-Kee family; let’s make some fantastic memories together!

Name: FLX Hockey
Description:
FLX Hockey is a premier high-performance hockey skills training program located in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). With a focus on unlocking the full potential of every player, we cater to individuals of all ages and skill levels, ensuring that everyone has the opportunity to reach their goals.

At FLX, our focus is on training players to make quick decisions, getting their hands, feet and mind in sync at high speeds. We focus on drills that push players out of their comfort zone, forcing them to make a lot of quick moves in tight spaces, engaging their feet and mind to open up ice for themselves. 

By providing these game-like scenarios for our players, they learn to be proactive with the puck, forcing them to start thinking steps in advance as to what their next play might be. We create an environment where players can connect with like-minded players to aim and elevate their skills to achieve greater success both on and off the ice.

We are committed to staying ahead of the game by continuously updating our training methods and staying informed about the latest industry advancements. Our goal is to provide you with the most effective and innovative training experience, equipping you with the tools and knowledge needed to thrive in the fast-paced world of hockey.

Name: University Surf School
Description:

Our experienced team of certified instructors offers personalized coaching in a safe and fun environment, allowing students to learn at their own pace and build confidence in the water. We offer lessons for all skill levels, from beginners to advanced surfers, and provide all necessary equipment.

In addition to our lessons, we also organize surf trips and events, giving students the opportunity to explore new destinations and connect with other surf enthusiasts. We strive to create a community of passionate and supportive surfers who share a love for the sport and the ocean.

We believe that surfing can have a positive impact on one's physical and mental well-being, and we are committed to sharing this experience with university students around the world. Join us at universitysurfschool.com and discover the joy of surfing.

Name: Paradisio Pilates Club
Description:
Bienvenue au Paradisio Pilates Club, le premier studio dédié au pilates reformer à Marseille !

Nos professeurs t’offrent des cours innovants, ludiques et challengeants pour renforcer chacun de tes muscles, améliorer ta posture, ta mobilité et ton équilibre afin de ressentir un état de bien-être général. Au Paradisio Pilates Club, on vient partager un moment de bien-être dans un espace design et chaleureux, on se motive grâce à la bonne énergie des profs, on se laisse porter par des playlists entraînantes, et on chill dans le Refreshment Club autour d’un bon café ou jus frais après sa séance!

Ta nouvelle routine feel good !
