Name: Keeperschool van der Kaay
Description:
De grote populariteit van keepers is terug te zien op de Nederlandse amateurvelden. Steeds meer kinderen kiezen ervoor om te keepen. Zij kunnen terecht bij Keeperschool Van der Kaay; in 2013 opgericht door voormalig profkeeper Arjan van der Kaay. Hij stond onder de lat bij onder meer Sparta (als jeugdspeler), Westlandia en ADO Den Haag. Al tijdens zijn keeperscarrière trainde Arjan jonge talenten. Dat vond hij zo leuk om te doen dat hij besloot om er zijn werk van te maken.

Met succes! Keeperschool Van der Kaay beschikt vandaag de dag over vestigingen op drie locaties: bij vv Sliedrecht, op het terrein van R.K.V.V. Westlandia in Naaldwijk en bij VDL in Maassluis. Op deze locaties zijn diverse gecertificeerde trainers actief, die allemaal zelf op hoog niveau hebben gekeept. Zij leren dagelijks tientallen jeugdige keepers het vak.

Bij Keeperschool Van der Kaay leren de jonge keepers zaken als een goede uitgangshouding, het insnijden van de bal, de traptechniek, positiespel, meevoetballen en het aangaan van 1-op-1 duels. Daarnaast krijgen ze sociale vaardigheden aangeleerd als praten voor een groep en coachen van medespelers. Ook leren ze hoe ze zich mentaal kunnen voorbereiden op een wedstrijd en zich volledig kunnen focussen.

Maar het allerbelangrijkste is nog wel het plezier dat kinderen krijgen in het ‘keepersvak’. De trainingen van Keeperschool Van der Kaay staan bekend om de enthousiaste werkwijze en persoonlijke benadering. Trainen in kleine groepjes, rekening houdend met de relatief korte concentratieboog van kinderen, vanuit een positieve houding, zonder prestatiedruk. Deze werkwijze zorgt bij iedereen voor blijde gezichten. Geen wonder dat steeds meer jeugdspelers en hun ouders kiezen voor een cursus bij Keeperschool Van der Kaay!

Name: POWERCAMPBRASIL
Description:
O Powercamp é uma alternativa à musculação tradicional. Aqui o aluno tem atendimento personalizado, o que garante execução correta dos exercícios e utilizações de intensidades que levarão ao alcance dos objetivos. 

Na pratica o Powercamp é uma sala com aparelhos de musculação e um coach que conduz a aula para no máximo 8 alunos. Os treinos são montados seguindo uma periodização de evolução mensal, mas são diferentes todo dia. Para auxiliar o coach, os exercícios do dia estão descritos na tela de treino, juntamente com as cargas prescritas individualmente para cada aluno. 

Os resultados após 2 meses de treino são aumento de força e massa muscular, definição e consequentemente melhora do condicionamento físico geral e bem estar.

Name: Mfantsipim-Adisadel Fun Day Games
Description:
Mfantsipim School and Adisadel College are the two oldest Boys schools in the history of secondary education in Ghana. Mfantsipim was founded by the Methodist Missionary Mission in 1876, and in 1910, the Anglican Church started Adisadel College, all in Cape Coast. The products of the two schools since their establishment have excelled in various fields of endeavor and have collectively contributed immensely to the development of Ghana and indeed the world. 

In 1992, Mr. Robert Mills (MOBA 78) conceived the idea of bringing the old boys of the schools together on a friendly and social platform, using sports as a tool to foster closer collaboration between them and raise funds for the development of the schools. The format for the games was to be a football tournament involving decade teams, with the climax being a football match between the present-day school teams.

Name: AVOnordic
Description:
Imagina algo que puede hacer todo el mundo, tiene beneficios para la empresa y es hasta divertido. (Y LAS OFICINAS DE GOOGLE AÚN NO LO SABEN). Eso es lo que hacemos en AVOnordic, juntar la Marcha Nórdica con el bienestar en el trabajo para conseguir resultados.

Posiblemente no sepas muy bien lo que es la Marcha Nórdica… no, no tiene nada que ver con los vikingos. No es por nada, pero no tenían problemas posturales. No eres un vikingo pero estamos casi seguros que nos estás leyendo desde una silla donde pasas sentado/a mucho tiempo. Mientras nos lees, posiblemente estés pensando en otras mil cosas que tienes que hacer. Así que te decimos gracias por dedicarnos tiempo.

Todo lo anterior, provoca que, con el paso del tiempo, tú y tu equipo de trabajo, tengáis problemas posturales y de estrés. Lo sabemos porque a nosotros nos pasaba, pero descubrimos la Marcha Nórdica, nos picó el gusanillo, conseguimos llegar al pódium en Castilla y León de esta disciplina, pero esa es otra historia…
nos dimos cuenta de sus beneficios para la salud. Lo llamaríamos más que deporte, hábito de vida. Algo del día a día como la jornada de trabajo.

Nuestra propuesta para el personal de tu empresa es sencilla. Organizamos jornadas de Team Building especiales:

-Porque están basadas en la marcha Nórdica, que de por sí es algo novedoso. Ayudamos a los trabajadores a salir de la monotonía del día a día educando cómo colocar su cuerpo.
-Porque son experiencias. No es sólo enseñar Marcha Nórdica, lo acompañamos de eventos, excursiones, catas, comidas... hay que disfrutar.
-Porque son jornadas de hacer equipo. Fomentan la participación, motivación y calidad de las relaciones laborales.

En resumen, jornadas de esas en las que el equipo acaba contento y lo agradecen a quien las organiza... no a nosotros, que también, sino a tí porque ven que ha sido algo bueno para ellos.
¿Quieres dejar a tus empleados con la boca abierta, motivados y con la espalda recta? puedes escribirnos a avonordicleon@gmail.

Name: Best Centre Sports
Description:
BEST – Bluewater Elite Sports Training Centre – is the number one outdoor Olympic swim centre in Europe, and has attracted sports teams and individual athletes from across the world for training camps and clinics for the past 13 years. 

Our state of the art facilities at The BEST Centre make this site the perfect location for your club training camp, attracting individuals and teams from across the world.

More specifically, we have welcomed 1000s of different swimming, water polo, triathlon and synchronised swimming teams from 38 countries worldwide. The combination of our facilities and the peacefulness of Colònia make for the perfect training camp – good enough for the very BEST!

With a lifetime of swimming knowledge and over 15 years of experience operating in this field, we understand the needs of swim teams and are able to provide everything you need to help you train as well as you possibly can. This means you can go to the block with confidence and give the BEST performance you can.
Location: Colònia de Sant Jordi, Islas Baleares

Name: BAEKHO
Description: Wir sind überzeugt von den verborgenen Potenzialen und positiven Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten unserer Teilnehmer. Diese zu fördern und zu trainieren, sehen wir als eine unserer wesentlichen Herausforderungen. Wer in unserem Trainer-Team agiert ist darauf vorbereitet. Exzellente Führungskräfte haben gezeigt, dass sie auch selbst führbar sind. Unsere Tugenden bieten sehr gute Möglichkeiten seine eigenen Grenzen zu erkennen, zu akzeptieren und weiterzuentwickeln. Wir sagen Body and Mind. Wie wir denken, wie wir uns bewegen und wie wir uns ernähren, machen letztendlich unsere Persönlichkeit aus. Positive Gedanken bringen positive Handlungen. Das bedeutet statt: "Ich versuche es" - "Ich mache es". Unsere Erfahrung besteht aus einer auf Jahrzehnte basierender Trainingserfahrung mit Führungskräften und Mitarbeitern aller Ebenen -regional und international. Diese Erfahrungen wollen wir weitergeben. Das alles wollen wir den Teilnehmern in unseren Kursen und Trainingseinheiten motivierend und begeisternd weitergeben.

Name: Wapenkunst Academie Rijswijk
Description:
Historical European Martial Arts (HEMA) is the study and practice of real martial techniques from medieval and Renaissance Europe. Based on historical manuals, it brings back the skills of sword fighting, grappling, and other weapons — all trained with modern safety and structure.

At Wapenkunst Akademie Rijswijk we focus on effective technique, smart movement, and controlled sparring. All this under guidance of experienced instructors, in a safe and welcoming environment.

If you’ve ever wanted to train with a sword and mean it, this is your place.

Name: Gym Assistance
Description:
Witaj w Gym Assistance!

Jesteśmy team’em specjalizującym się w dostarczaniu firmom kompleksowych rozwiązań z zakresu wsparcia aktywności fizycznej wśród ich pracowników.

To, że „ruch to zdrowie” wiedzą wszyscy… ale, czy masz świadomość jak istotny wpływ ma on na realizację Twoich projektów i celów biznesowych?

Sprawniejsi, zdrowsi i aktywniejsi pracownicy, są bardziej zaangażowani w pracy, szybciej i dokładniej wykonują zlecone im zadania, wyróżniają się kreatywnością i energią oraz nie mają problemów zdrowotnych. Są podstawą efektywnie działających biznesów – bez zwolnień lekarskich, bez błędów i bez opóźnień.

W ofercie Gym Assistance znajdziesz:

SZKOLENIA z zakresu ruchu, zdrowia, ergonomii pracy, metod relaksacji i rozluźnienia spiętych mięśni - wszystkie skierowane do osób z siedzącym trybem życia i ograniczoną spontaniczną aktywnością fizyczną.

ZDROWE BENEFITY PRACOWNICZE unikalne rozwiązania usuwające i zapobiegające dolegliwościom bólowym kręgosłupa i spięciom mięśni. Idealny produkt jako firmowy „welcome pack” czy prezent okazjonalny, wzmacniający wizerunek pracodawcy podążającego za trendami i dbającego o dobrostan pracowników.

WYNAJEM I SPRZEDAŻ SPRZĘTU TRENINGOWEGO wraz z usługą transportu, montażu, serwisu, projektowania stref i obsługą techniczną.

EVENTY sportowe, firmowe, rozrywkowe i kulturowe, podczas których tworzymy i prowadzimy strefy aktywności sprzyjające budowaniu i zacieśnianiu relacji wśród uczestników oraz rozmawiamy z nimi na temat radzenia sobie ze stresem i dolegliwościami bólowymi wynikającymi z siedzącego trybu pracy.

Nasze usługi są efektem wielu współprac z ludźmi o różnych trybach życia i pracy. Z dumą i satysfakcją obserwujemy jak ich skuteczność przekłada się na realne korzyści dla firm i ich pracowników.

Z Gym Assistance przekonasz się, że inwestycja w sprawne środowisko Twojego biznesu to nie tylko dobro pracowników, ale także strategiczny ruch prowadzący do trwałego sukcesu i wzmacniania wizerunku Twojej marki.

Name: AIRTIME Volleyball
Description:
Airtime Volleyball is a high-performance training organization committed to redefining how young athletes access elite volleyball development. Rooted in technical precision, innovation, and long-term growth, we deliver position-specific, small-group training that goes beyond reps — building confident, adaptable, and intelligent athletes.

We don’t just follow the game — we study it, evolve with it, and create spaces where athletes thrive. Every session is led by experienced coaches and built on intention: from how we design drills to how we engage our community. With capped sessions for personalized feedback, a media presence driven by authenticity, and a financial aid program that removes barriers to access, Airtime is more than a training option — it’s a movement.

We believe in doing things the right way — not the easy way. Our culture is built on high standards, real relationships, and a deep love for the game. From varsity hopefuls to national team prospects, our athletes train with purpose, compete with passion, and grow with us.

Own Your Game. Train with Airtime.

Name: EliteFootball.ch
Description: Wir bieten professionelle und gezielte Unterstützung in den Bereichen Training, Ernährung sowie Rehabilitation und fokussieren uns auf die Förderung von talentierten Fussball-Spielerinnen und -Spieler.

Name: AGFitness Doha
Description:
It’s not about diet, It’s about lifestyle and being healthy.
Created by a woman and dedicated to women.

AGFit is located in Doha, Qatar. 
This project is dedicated to all the women of Doha, with the goal of empowering them, helping them to feel better about themselves, their body and mind.

Name: Givonation Tennis Academy
Description: At GivoNation Tennis Academy, we believe every player’s journey is unique. That’s why our programs are designed to meet you where you are — from your very first rally to your next tournament win. Led by internationally experienced coaches, we offer structured training, small group sizes, and a supportive environment that blends technical mastery with a love for the game. Whether you’re a junior building your foundation, an adult refining your skills, or a competitive player chasing peak performance, you’ll find the perfect program to elevate your tennis.

Name: Sportschool Van der Velde
Description: Sportschool Van der Velde is a sports company based out of Spanjaardsgoed 5, VEENENDAAL, Netherlands.

Name: FITR
Description:
Wij zijn FITR, een netwerkvereniging voor én door ondernemende sportaanbieders uit de gemeente Oss. 

Binnen FITR staat de ondernemende sportaanbieder centraal en de ontwikkeling daarvan. We trachten een duurzame meerwaarde te vormen met onze vereniging: Een fundament waarop alle aangesloten ondernemende sportaanbieders blijvend samenwerken. Dit doen we o.a. door ontmoetingen te organiseren, sprekers uit te nodigen en collectief op te treden. We benutten hierbij onze intrinsieke sportmotivatie maar ook ons ondernemende DNA om samen te werken en van elkaar te leren. 

Wanneer de sportaanbieder groeit in zijn of haar ondernemerschap zal dit op haar beurt ten goede komen aan het aantal sportende Ossenaren. Als ondernemers in de sport beseffen wij onze maatschappelijke verantwoordelijkheid binnen de samenleving op het gebied van zowel fysieke als mentale gezondheid. Met FITR zorgen we er dus niet alleen voor dat we als ondernemers vooruit gaan, maar ook bijdragen aan een gezonde en vitale gemeente.

Name: Sportfront
Description:
Sportfront daagt je uit op het niveau dat jij aankan, wat jouw instapniveau ook is. Samen zetten we stappen; van een fysieke en geestelijke transformatie binnen enkele maanden, tot een verbeterde levensstijl op de lange termijn. 

We begeleiden je, zodat jij je goed voelt en je beter om kunt gaan met de fysieke, emotionele en sociale uitdagingen in het leven. Dit doen we door samen naar jouw persoonlijke sportdoelen toe te werken in verschillende sportlocaties verspreid door de Hoeksche Waard. 

Met de motivatie en gezelligheid van groepslessen en tegelijk de begeleiding en persoonlijke aandacht die je normaal alleen bij een personal training sessie zou verwachten, zorgen we dat jij de techniek van de oefeningen eigen maakt en je jezelf altijd blijft ontwikkelen op een manier die bij jou past. En begeleid worden door mensen die jou écht verder kunnen helpen.

Name: Planet Gymnastics
Description: Planet Gymnastics is proud to be part of Emler Swim and Gymnastic Schools, a growing network of schools rooted in safety, building confidence, and creating positive experiences in every step, stretch, and splash. Each of our unique brands serves children, families, and communities across the country with a mission-driven approach that makes working here truly meaningful. Joining Emler means becoming part of something bigger—a team committed to impact, purpose, and creating positive experiences every day.

Name: ProBaller Arena
Description: ProBaller Arena is an innovative basketball training facility designed for players of all skill levels. With a variety of specialized courts for individual shooting, competitive games, and tournaments, it’s the perfect place to elevate your game. Sharpen your skills, enjoy exciting matches with friends, or simply shoot ball using the industry’s best shooting machines for maximum performance and fun.

Name: Parnassos Hiking Club
Description:
The Parnassos Hiking Club was born out of a deep love for Mount Parnassos and nature.
We organize daily hikes in the the wide area of Parnassos and Amfiklia guided by experienced and certified mountain guides.

Our core values include environmental protection, sustainable development, and the preservation of cultural heritage. 
We cherish hiking and exploring nature, combining enjoyment with the preservation of our region's balance and harmony.

Be one of us!

Description: Cours de Hatha Yoga à Amiens

d’arts martiaux et particuliers passionnés ou curieux de découvrir ces disciplines !

Name: Dauphine-PSL Sports
Description:
L’objectif du Service Universitaire des Activités Physiques et Sportives (SUAPS) est de permettre au plus grand nombre d’accéder à une pratique sportive de qualité, variée et en toute sécurité.

À ce titre, il exerce principalement les missions suivantes : 
1. Il organise, développe et encadre les activités physiques et sportives des étudiants. Ces activités sont proposées aux personnels.
2. Il contribue par ses enseignements à la formation des étudiants dans le domaine des activités physiques et sportives. Les personnels peuvent participer à ces enseignements.
3. Il promeut les activités physiques et sportives comme facteur d’animation de la vie de campus et favorise la participation des étudiants à la vie associative et à la compétition sportive.
4. Il coordonne le dispositif d’accueil et d’accompagnement des étudiants ayant une pratique sportive d’excellence ou d’accession au haut niveau, afin de concilier leurs études et leur activité sportive.
5. Il favorise la pratique des activités physiques et sportives des étudiants en situation de handicap en relation avec la structure universitaire chargée d’accompagner les étudiants en situation de handicap.
6. Il promeut la pratique des activités physiques et sportives comme facteur de santé et de bien-être des étudiants, en favorisant une pratique régulière et adaptée à leurs besoins, en relation avec le service universitaire ou interuniversitaire chargé de la santé des étudiants.
7. Il valorise la dimension artistique des activités physiques et sportives, en relation avec le service universitaire chargé de l’action culturelle.
8. Il assure la gestion des équipements sportifs affectés à l’université. Ces équipements peuvent être ouverts à d’autres utilisateurs que les étudiants et les personnels des établissements.

Name: Moveo Partner
Description:
Le bien-être des salariés est un enjeu crucial pour les entreprises en 2023. Avec Moveo Partner, nous accompagnons les chefs d'entreprises dans l'optimisation du bien-être de leurs collaborateurs.
Nous mettons à disposition une équipe de professionnels diplômés pour encadrer des activités physiques & bien-être au sein des structures d'Île-de-France.

Name: Moe Mountains
Description: Moe Mountains is in the business of taking women on adventures. This summer season, we will be teaching women how to backpack and taking them on 4 day adventures in the mountains of Montana.

Name: Evolution Basketball Training
Description: Evolution Basketball is changing the lives of players by creating success in the game and beyond!  We have developed over 15,000 players in the past 18 years including countless Youth League AllStars, High School Award Winners, & over 450 College Players.

Name: OokJIJkanhet!
Description:
Sport - Voeding - Personal Training - Smallgroup - Vrolijk & Energiek - Schoolstraat - Musselkanaal

Gezellige, kleinschalige en professionele sportschool in Musselkanaal.
Altijd begeleiding aanwezig en splinternieuwe functionele toestellen!

Name: Nicole Welling Endurance
Description: Chase the finish line of your dreams! Nicole Welling Endurance will guide you through your journey to complete the endurance race you've always imagined. Aiding you in committing to an endurance lifestyle and working towards a healthier, happier you! We offer online coaching in swimming, cycling, running, and triathlon. We also offer stroke technique analysis for swimming - this can be done online via video analysis or in-person for those local to Tempe. We also offer free in-person group sessions for Tempe locals weekly - contact for details!

Description: Obstak - Mouvement urbain, c'est le tout premier centre d'entrainement intérieur dédié aux disciplines du déplacement à Québec : Parkour, Ninja Warrior, Art du déplacement, Free running et Tricking.

Description:
L’associazione rivolge la sua attenzione in modo specifico e in primis all’attività sportiva dilettantistica, con la possibilità di promuovere varie discipline sportive e la conseguente partecipazione a tornei, iniziative, incontri organizzati direttamente e/o organizzati da soggetti terzi. 
L’attività sportiva viene intesa come fine di socializzazione e divertimento a favore dei soci e come strumento di promozione degli obiettivi sociali legati alla lotta contro l’omofobia e la discriminazione in ogni sua forma.

Name: Soccer Stars - Central & Northwest Dallas
Description:
Backed by 20 years of experience, Soccer Stars offers a unique, age-specific curriculum that is crafted to improve soccer skills, build self-confidence, and develop socialization skills. Soccer Stars offers the most popular children’s soccer program for kids ages 1 & up.

Currently servicing Dallas, Preston Hollow, Addison, Farmers Branch, Carrollton, Irving, Arlington & the Mid Cities.

Name: The Bikefit Studio by Mads Christensen
Description:
The Bikefit Studio by Mads Christensen hjælper cykelryttere på alle niveuer, uanset ambitionsniveau med den optimale position på cyklen, med en skræddersyet løsning. 

Bikefit hos The Bikefit Studio eret kig på helheden. 
Ofte så omhandler bikefits kun tilpasning af din cykel, hvilket er selvfølgelig er vigtigt. Dog kan det ikke stå alene, hvis du for alvor ønsker at få det optimale ud af din cykling. Din krop og dine personlige præference er mindst ligeså vigtige elementer (hvis ikke vigtigere) for at yde maksimalt. 

Som tidligere professionel cykelrytter har Mads Christensen mange års erfaring med, hvordan krop og sind arbejder bedst sammen på cyklen.

Name: Six1Five Sports Training
Description:
Six1Five Sports Training is the place to be for elite sports training in all of Nashville and the 615 area code. Our indoor artificial turf facility is located in Mt. Juliet, TN, which is one of the most passionate sports towns in Middle TN.  We focus on speed, strength, and sport specific skills training like baseball, softball, football and soccer.  Speed, quickness and strength are the foundation for success, regardless of sport.  With our experienced staff, nothing is overlooked in training.  Since each athlete is different, our mission is to help them reach and exceed their potential through professional instruction so they can "Achieve Personal Athletic Perfection."  We accomplish this through initial evaluation, proper program placement designed to improve your game, and document your benchmarks and success along the way.   Join us and get a competitive edge on your opponents.

We also train adults and motivate them to stay in shape or to get in shape.  Our unique method of training adults gets quick results and in an efficient manner to cater to the busy lifestyles of today.

In addition to sports training, we also know the well-rounded athlete is not complete without a strong nutritional program.  We have the expertise, products and coaching to help each athlete close the gap and achieve an even higher level of success.

Name: United Elements
Description: United Elements is een urban sportaanbieder die zich focust op Freerunning. Wij kunnen Freerunning workshops en lessen verzorgen op diverse locaties. Daarnaast beschikken wij over een mobiel Freerunning/Calisthenics park die we verhuren op evenementen en andere gelegenheden. Kijk voor ons volledige aanbod op www.united-elements.com!

Name: Pulborough Paddles
Description: Try Canoeing, Kayaking & Paddleboarding - Get away from the masses on your next team day out and join our family run business on the banks of the river Arun. Take your time, talk and relax at our stunning launch site while exploring one of the most beautiful and calm sections of the Arun river. We have free parking, onsite refreshments and lunch is available on request, everything for a great day out by the river.

Name: Summer Smash Tennis
Description:
Since 2012, Summer Smash Tennis has been a leader of public tennis in  Vancouver. Today, we operate year-round serving community centres, the Park Board, First Nations, schools, and businesses. Our team is comprised of 30+ Tennis Canada certified coaches serving over 2,500 students annually. 

Our goal is to expand accessibility to tennis while creating safe, fun and challenging learning environments for students of all ages and abilities.

Name: Body Transformation Center
Description:
Deine Haltung ist schlecht, du fühlst dich unbeweglich und deine Körperform gefällt dir nicht?
Dann ist dieses Training die perfekte Lösung für dich, damit du strahlend und selbstbewusst dein Leben genießen kannst. Hier lernst du alles, was du für eine aufrechte Haltung und optimale Bewegungsabläufe brauchst. Dieses Training eliminiert deine Probleme und Beschwerden und baut dir ein unglaublich starkes Fundament für alle Aktivitäten oder Herausforderungen, denen du dich stellen willst oder musst. 

Dein Körper wird komplett gestrafft, du wirst stärker und beweglicher, als du es dir vorstellen kannst. Eine  selbstbewusste Ausstrahlung in einem gesunden Körper sind dein Ergebnis. Und noch viel mehr! Garantiert!

Name: Natur Sport
Description: Je suis diplômé Éducateur Sportif CQP ALS option AGEE et je souhaite développer la pratique sportive en général et plus particulièrement des sports nature dans la région du Pays de Vannes Golfe du Morbihan ( Pays de Lanvaux et de la Bretagne verte, 56-Morbihan).
Location: Vannes Golfe Du Morbihan Agglomération, Bretagne

Name: Goals Zone
Description:
Welcome to GoalsZone – The Ultimate Platform for Football Enthusiasts!  Are you passionate about football? 

GoalsZone is here to revolutionize the football community across Europe and Asia! Our platform connects Coaches, Teams, Organizers, Players, Agents, and Referees to create opportunities, improve performance, and make the sport more accessible to everyone. 

What We Offer: 
 AI-Powered Performance Analysis: Upload your match videos and get AI-generated insights to improve your game. 
 Yami Chat AI: Your football assistant, ready to answer all your questions 24/7. 
 Networking Opportunities: Players can connect with coaches, agents, and teams; organizers can find referees and teams for tournaments.

Name: REP Performance
Description: Nous offrons des services de développement physiques et de traitement thérapeutique à une clientèle de tous les âges en plus d'offrir des services en entraînement physique aux entreprises du centre-ville de  Trois-Rivières.

Name: Blue Wave Ec
Description: Somos un club local de actividades acuáticas que busca a través de cursos, salidas al mar y actividades educativas en contacto con la naturaleza acercar el océano a las personas para que lo conozcan mejor y nos ayuden en su conservación.

Name: CENTRO DEPORTIVO MUNICIPAL MEDITERRANEO
Description: DEPORTE Y OCIO CARTAGENA SL is a company based out of C/ CORAL S/N - ESQUINA AGUAMARINA, CARTAGENA, Spain.

Name: Pawn BeGone
Description:
Pawn BeGone Inc. is a creative venture that aims to blend arts, sciences and therapeutic modalities to reinvent the way we live, learn and play!

We extend the principles of play therapy to help people with neurodivergent tendencies to develop emotional regulation, better communications skills and sound decision-making abilities. 

We have multidisciplinary sessions that advance cognitive learning abilities using a combination of creative play therapy and traditional practices and modalities like cognitive-behavioral therapy (CBT), dialectical behavior therapy (DBT), and psychodynamic therapy in an effort to uncover rich insights about people's emotional spectrum.

Whether we are teaching others how to tap into their creative potential or providing therapeutic support to help them overcome challenges we are committed to helping others live their best lives.

Name: GV Pro Patria Zoetermeer
Description:
De GV Pro Patria Zoetermeer werd in 1911 in Zoetermeer opgericht en is al meer dan 100 jaar een begrip in de regio en in Nederland. GV Pro Patria is één van de grotere gymclubs van Nederland. De vereniging wil een moderne, goed toegeruste vereniging zijn met een hoog sportief ambitieniveau. GV Pro Patria staat midden in de (Zoetermeerse) samenleving en wil de aanjager blijven van de sportparticipatie in de stad Zoetermeer. De vereniging zoekt hierbij nadrukkelijk de verbinding met partners zoals gemeente, sportorganisaties, onderwijs en de zorg.

Daarnaast wil GV Pro Patria het gymsportplatform zijn in de stad Zoetermeer voor talentontwikkeling van sporters, coaches, juryleden en bestuurders. Al een halve eeuw nemen Pro Patria sporters deel aan de internationale wedstrijdsport en in 1976, 2000 en 2004 zelfs aan Olympische Zomerspelen.

GV Pro Patria is een vereniging voor iedereen, we zijn een vereniging waar je kunt kiezen uit een groot gymaanbod, van turnen tot dans, van ouder kind-gym tot aerobics. Ondanks de ingezette koers, waarbij zaken soms anders georganiseerd moeten worden om aan de doelstellingen en ambitie te voldoen blijft de gymsport centraal staan. Momenteel biedt Pro Patria in verschillende (gemeentelijke) wijksportzalen meer dan 100 lessen aan voor jong tot oud in diverse vormen van gymsport. Gymsport hoort dichtbij mensen plaats te vinden. Dat willen we zo houden!

Name: THE GALINOMA FOUNDATION
Description:
The Galinoma Foundation (TGF) proudly dedicates itself to uplifting the youth and women in Tanzanian communities through sports development and health initiatives. Recognizing the transformative power of these programs in fostering healthier lifestyles and building self-confidence, TGF strategically targets specific needs to create lasting transformations. 

With a core mission of promoting physical fitness, mental well-being, and social inclusion, TGF invites the collaboration of those who share the vision for a healthier and more empowered society, aiming to amplify the impact of initiatives for a brighter future. Join The Galinoma Foundation on this transformative journey toward building a stronger, more vibrant community.

Name: Unmatched Athlete
Description:
Unmatched Athlete will be a Maryland-based non-profit that encourages youth who identify as LGBTQ+ to participate in sports and fitness. We will encourage our youth to explore their athletic creativity and become well-versed student athletes that excel beyond their time in school. Our hope is that every youth that participates in our organization becomes an instrumental member of the LGBTQ+ community and beyond.

We are still getting started and will start by organizing weekend and seasonal games to create a safespace for our youth to play and have fun. As we grow, our seasonal calendar will feature tournaments, after-school fitness, and other social outings such as field trips, sporting events and alike. Our long-term goal is to fund stipends and scholarships for a path to college sports, especially for our LGBTQ+ black youth.

Name: WODland Fitness Ltd
Description:
WODland Fitness Ltd is an outdoor functional fitness events company like no other. Based in the heart of a forest within the hills of West Yorkshire, our very own one of a kind unique arena is something worth visiting.
We host various events / corporate days, along with our headline competitions across the course of the year.
Follow our social media platforms to keep up to date with what is happening at WODland.

Name: Inswin
Description: The official LinkedIn page of Inswin. Inswin is a mobile application that allows users to reserve time slots at indoor sports arenas based in Sri Lanka. The app will soon be launched to both Google Play Store and Apple App Store.

Name: SwimUnity Munich GmbH
Description: Hey :) Wir sind eine junge Schwimmschule aus München, gegründet von vier leidenschaftlichen Schwimmerinnen – darunter ehemalige Leistungsschwimmerinnen und eine zweifache Olympiateilnehmerin.

Name: Bury Lake Young Mariners
Description:
Bury Lake Young Mariners (BLYM) is an award-winning local youth charity (No. 1102162) and we are run entirely by over 300 volunteers at the picturesque Rickmansworth Aquadrome.

For 40 years, we have promoted the development of life skills in young people through the medium of sailing and related activities, taking over 6000 people onto the water each year.

We operate an all-inclusive club and welcome new members.

All of our sailing and powerboat courses are certified by the Royal Yachting Association (RYA) and are available to anyone from aged 9 upwards to adults. We also offer short fun sessions for 7-9 year-olds.

Name: Little Hoopers
Description:
Little Hoopers is a child-friendly version of basketball specifically designed to introduce small children to the game of basketball. It provides a safe and fun environment for kids to learn all the fundamental skills while developing key motor skills and fitness.

We play with smaller basketballs, lower hoops and less children per session to allow coaches to support each child during the session. Our aim is for our sessions to be fun, engaging and educational.

Name: PBVSI
Description:
Persatuan Bola Voli Seluruh Indonesia (PBVSI) adalah induk organisasi olahraga bola voli di Indonesia yang berdiri sejak 22 Januari 1955. Sebagai anggota resmi FIVB (Fédération Internationale de Volleyball) dan AVC (Asian Volleyball Confederation), PBVSI bertanggung jawab atas pengembangan dan kemajuan olahraga bola voli di Indonesia.

Tugas dan Tanggung Jawab:
- Pembinaan atlet dan pelatih nasional
- Penyelenggaraan kompetisi nasional (Proliga dan Livoli)
- Pengembangan bola voli di seluruh Indonesia
- Pengelolaan Tim Nasional Indonesia
- Standarisasi wasit dan technical official
- Koordinasi dengan FIVB dan AVC untuk event internasional

Prestasi Tim Nasional:
- Juara SEA Games (Multiple Gold Medals)
- Peserta Asian Games
- Partisipan AVC Cup
- Regular participant di kejuaraan internasional

Visi:
Menjadikan Indonesia sebagai kekuatan bola voli Asia dan dunia melalui pembinaan berkelanjutan dan kompetisi berkualitas.

Misi:
- Meningkatkan kualitas pembinaan atlet dari usia dini
- Mengembangkan kompetisi profesional
- Memperluas jangkauan pengembangan bola voli ke seluruh Indonesia
- Meningkatkan standar pelatihan dan pendidikan
- Memperkuat kerja sama dengan stakeholder nasional dan internasional

PBVSI berkomitmen untuk terus memajukan olahraga bola voli Indonesia dan mengharumkan nama bangsa di kancah internasional.

#VoliIndonesia #PBVSI #IndonesianVolleyball

Name: iSwim @ Immanuel
Description: iSwim is a Nationally Awarded Swim School offering pathways from swimming lessons to squad training

Name: Academia Nacional Del Fútbol
Description:
Formamos deportistas. Transformamos personas.

La Academia Nacional del Fútbol (ANF) es una institución chilena dedicada al desarrollo integral de niños, niñas y jóvenes a través de una formación futbolística profesional, inclusiva y comprometida con el entorno social.

Nuestro enfoque combina entrenamiento de alto rendimiento con una sólida base pedagógica, adaptada a diferentes niveles de desarrollo. Contamos con programas estructurados, entrenadores certificados y una metodología que promueve la disciplina, el trabajo en equipo y el crecimiento personal.

Lo que nos diferencia es nuestro compromiso con la inclusión: trabajamos activamente con jóvenes neurodivergentes, generando espacios accesibles, seguros y motivadores para todos y todas. Esta visión nos ha llevado a establecer alianzas con centros terapéuticos, organizaciones sociales y municipalidades.

Más que una academia de fútbol, somos una comunidad que cree en el poder transformador del deporte como herramienta de desarrollo social.

 Operamos en la comuna de Buin, Región Metropolitana
 Colaboramos con instituciones públicas y privadas
 En expansión constante, con nuevas series y proyectos sociales

Name: All.One Basketball
Description:
All.One Basketball is where African basketball dreams take flight. Empowering the next generation of stars, All.One Basketball (est. 2010) is Africa's premier player development program.

We cultivate well-rounded athletes, on and off the court.  From grassroots initiatives to national teams, we provide world-class training accessible locally. 

Our network of experienced coaches and global mentors unlocks a world of possibilities, fostering the right attitude and cultural fit for success. No matter your skill level, dedication and a thirst for learning are all you need. We believe in infinite potential, and we'll help you reach yours.

Join our journey to build Africa's basketball legends!

Name: Le Spot Kitecenter: école de kitesurf et wingfoil
Description:
Le Spot Kitecenter,  kite & wing : Ecole de Kitesurf et wingfoil sur la Presqu'île de Giens à Hyères, à 5 minutes de l’hôtel le Lodge des îles d'Or, Odalys et de l'Almanarre dans le Var. 
Cours et stages de kitesurf tous niveaux. A partir de 8 ans. Ouvert de fevrier a decembre!

Le  Spot Kitecenter kite & wing vous propose différentes formules pour vous initier ou vous perfectionner en kitesurf:

- Le stage semaine Kitesurf ou wingfoil: 5 cours de 3h30 du lundi au samedi, avec matériel inclus ( Duotone ), 4 stagiaires par moniteur dans le bateau.

Selon la météo de la semaine, nous adaptons le planning des cours pour optimiser votre stage.
Cours de kitesurf ou wingfoil dans la baie de la Bergerie ou de l'Almanarre en fonction de la direction du vent.

Nous proposons aussi:
- La formule à la carte: cours de kitesurf ou wingfoil 3h30 (3 Cours, 5 cours , ou 10 cours, valable 10 mois )
- Dépose / Navigation surveillé
- Coaching perfectionnement : surf strapless / freestyle (saut)
- Stage foil

N’hésitez pas à nous contacter par SMS au 06.16.18.49.91 !

Claire 
Le Spot Kite & Wing Center
1 avenue de la Bergerie
83400 HYERES
www.kitesurf-var.com

Name: Royal Port Dickson Yacht Club (RPDYC)
Description: Royal Port Dickson Yacht Club was founded in 1927. The purpose of the establishment is to promote and carry on a sports and social club. It also serves the purpose to enter into reciprocal arrangements with any other association or club so that the members thereof may enjoy the privileges, amenities and facilities of the club and vice versa.

Name: Enduro Trip - Moto Adventure
Description: Enduro Trip is the first Motorcycle Training company in Chile. We train in street motorcycles, large displacement and enduro motorcycles, we also offer the best enduro tours in the Central Mountain Range. We create training clinics in safe driving of enduro motorcycles and quadricycles for workers of agribusiness companies.

Name: Yerba Buena Ice Skating & Bowling Center
Description:
Looking for the perfect spot for a night out with friends or family? How about some afternoon fun for your kids this summer? Needing a place to host your next team building event? Planning a party and want something different and fun?

Look no further than Yerba Buena Ice Skating & Bowling Center, your ultimate affordable entertainment destination in the heart of San Francisco!

Name: JM Padel Academy
Description:
At the Jason Manford Padel Academy, we believe that sports have the power to transform lives and our mission is to provide underprivileged youth with the opportunity to experience the joy and benefits of Padel. We organise events, workshops and training sessions to introduce children from all walks of life to sport fostering teamwork, discipline and confidence along the way. 

Our academy is committed to breaking down barriers, creating inclusive spaces and inspiring the next generation of athletes. By partnering with local communities, schools and organisations, we aim to make Padel accessible to everyone, regardless of background or resources. Through these initiatives, we are not only teaching the game of Padel but also empowering young people with valuable life skills. We have a goal of introducing 1 million children to the fastest growing sport in the world! 

Join us in our mission to unlock the potential of disadvantaged youth and create lasting impact through the power of sport. Together, we can make a difference!

Name: ASSA - Association sports et social actions
Description:
ASSA - Association sports et social actions, une organisation qui a pour objectif le développement socio-éducatif à travers le sport. Notre organisation vise à créer des projets qui ont un fort impact sur les jeunes en utilisant la force du sport.

Fondée en 2019, A.S.S.A est une organisation Marocaine qui vise l’intégration et l'éducation des jeunes à travers le sport. Elle croit à la force du sport pour offrir aux jeunes, aux femmes, aux enfants, et aux personnes défavorisées : des bienfaits sur le moral, la santé, le corps et l’esprit, des communautés soudées, une confiance en soi et donc une identité plus forte.
Notre Vision est d’être la référence africaine du développement social à travers le sport à l’horizon 2035.

Name: PIKL Los Angeles
Description: At PIKL Los Angeles our mission is to elevate the game by creating a world-class facility that respects the spirit of pickleball. We're dedicated to crafting a space that not only meets but exceeds the needs of players, providing an exceptional experience that fosters community, camaraderie, and a passion for the game. At PIKL Los Angeles we're committed to bringing respect and recognition to the sport, while inspiring a new generation of players to join the pickleball revolution.

We're a street-football-inspired startup with an innovative training and play solution that helps players get the touches they need to develop core skills. We've gained considerable early traction with football clubs, schools, councils and beyond. Actively seeking investment.

Name: The Catching Camp
Description:
My name is Jay Weaver and I am the Director of  The Catching Camp. I want to briefly tell you a little about myself and our training program for both baseball and softball catchers.

The Catching Camp was founded by my father, the late Coach Dave Weaver when he recognized that instruction for the toughest position on the field was generally unavailable to players committed to playing the catcher position. We now work with catchers all around the world, youth ages all the way up to the NCAA Div. 1 and Professional ranks, nearly 365 days a year. We are the only National program exclusively dedicated to training baseball and softball catchers year round.

Name: RockWire Mt Buller

Name: Fakerz India
Description: FAKERZ Sports Academy officially started in the Year 2010 but had been in the works for decades.  with the vision to provide the best teachings and skills to the upcoming generation. During our 10 years of journey, we successfully conducted more than 30 Tournaments along with a participation of more than 1000 students. Fakerz academy has always provided an opportunity for our members to play basketball in the arenas at par with world standards. We don't just aim to raise the bar each year, but also increase our playing field by taking up many sports. We take pride in inspiring young athletes with regular worldwide stage coaching for all age categories and skill stages. Our number one motive is to provide abilities with an individual emphasis at the capability and requirement of every player. The training includes improvement of the gamers’ teamwork, management, and area both on-ground and off-ground.

Name: Mäntsälän Jäähalli Oy
Description:
Mäntsälän jäähallin kaksi kaukaloa sekä monipuoliset oheistilat, pukuhuoneet, varusteiden huolto- ja säilytystilat luovat erinomaiset puitteet jääkiekon, taitoluistelun, ringetten, kaukalopallon sekä curlingin harrastamiselle. Jäähallin käyttäjät arvostavat ilmavaa ja viihtyisää sisätilaa. Korkealle kohoavan katon sisäpinnan akustiset ominaisuudet onkin koettu miellyttäväksi konserteissa sekä valmennustoiminnassa.

Jäähallin tiloissa toimii myös 6-ratainen upouusi keilahalli. Keilahalli luo Mäntsälään erinomaiset olosuhteet lajin harrastamiselle. Keilahallin kahvioravintolassa on täydet anniskeluoikeudet sekä mahdollisuus neuvoittelutilojen sekä tilaussaunan vuokraamiseen.

Jäähallin pihassa on 150 pysäköintipaikkaa, 4 sähköautojen lautauspaikkaa ja kaksi linja-autojen pysäköintipaikkaa. Invapaikat on sijoitettu pääsisäänkäynnin välittömään läheisyyteen. 

Tervetuloa!

Name: CK Wano

Name: YoYoga Kinderyoga & Coaching
Description:
Yo! Welkom bij YoYoga. 

Hier kun je spelen, lachen, springen, balanceren en fantaseren. Ben jij vandaag een hond, een kat, een krokodil – of ben je liever stil? 

YoYoga is uniek. Alleen hier vind je de ideale mix tussen toneel en yoga. Meer dan tien jaar praktijkervaring in het jeugdtheater heeft mij geïnspireerd tot het ontwikkelen van deze eigenzinnige methode voor het extroverte én introverte kind. De yogahoudingen vormen samen een verhaal dat we spelen. De groepen zijn klein en er is veel ruimte voor persoonlijke aandacht. Elke les bij YoYoga is een nieuw verhaal. Een reis over de wereld en verder. Door ruimte en tijd. Ga je mee?

Bij YoYoga kan je zijn wie je maar wilt. Zo ontdek je wie jij bent.

Er zijn lessen op dinsdag, woensdag, donderdag, vrijdag en zaterdag.
Voor kinderen vanaf 4 jaar.

Stop running your program from a spreadsheet.

If you're like most program owners, you're buried in administrative chaos. You're chasing down payments, manually checking rosters against waivers, fighting with spreadsheets to build a schedule, and trying to get 10 coaches compliant before the first session.

This daily chaos is costing you more than just time—it's costing you growth and peace of mind.

NRICH is your all-in-one operating system, built to replace the chaos.

We are a single, unified platform designed to automate your entire administrative lifecycle. We connect your scheduling, registration, payments, and staff management in one smart system.

Name: LudoSport International
Description:
Since 2006 LudoSport is the discipline that combines an original, codified learning and competition system where practitioners enjoy the excitement to wield a combat-ready replica of the most elegant sci-fi weapon: the lightsaber. 
In addition to a massive global fan base of the famous sci-fi saga, LudoSport discipline attracts people of every age who want to keep fit, enjoying duels where balance, agility and control are the keys for success.
LudoSport International organization provides both the professional training required by Instructors to teach the discipline according to the standards and the necessary technical gear needed by Instructors and their pupils.
With a codified training path inclusive of three different "weapons", members
have a really low dropout rate over the years having the chance to train in several Combat Forms with different characteristics.
Each year, an international rated tournament system grants the opportunity to athletes enjoying competitions to attempt the qualification to the Champions'Arena where only the top athletes of the entire LudoSport Network can participate.

Name: Shikhar - The Mountaineering Club, ARSD
Description: SHIKHAR is The Mountaineering Club of Atma Ram Sanatan Dharma College, University of Delhi .  Established in 2017 , the club aims to promote mountaineering and other adventurous sports . Shikhar is one of the fastest growing college societies and has successfully organised and conducted various treks and trips to places including Kedarkantha , Roopkund , Brahmtal , Chopta-Chandrashila and Rishikesh to name a few . Apart from this , the society regularly organises various other adventurous activities like wall climbing , cycling events and nature-walks.

Description: Always in Motion Ninja and Parkour is more than a Ninja Gym—it’s a dynamic training center where Ninja skills, Parkour, tumbling, and climbing come together to build well-rounded athletes. We offer a wide range of classes for all skill levels and ages, ensuring everyone has a place to grow and succeed. Beyond training, we’re a hub for celebrations and events, providing birthday parties, competitions, after-school programs, homeschool activities, field trips, and team-building events.

Name: Thanya Monana Projects
Description:
The Thanya Monana Projects will be a series of sports and youth development initiatives that will utilize the sport of golf to address inequalities and economic challenges faced by underserved communities starting in Botswana and other African countries. The initiative is expected to host activities including golf course activations, career services, personal development and mentorship of athletes, all with the aim to provide opportunities for young people in underserved communities to gain social and economic development. 

The projects also aim to be a leading voice in golf philanthropy in Botswana by creating a space for youth businesses and organizations that serve young people to connect as well as creating avenues for local and international business partnerships. 

The projects are seed funded by the IOC Young Leaders programme under the International Olympic Committee. The new Young Leaders – balanced in terms of gender and diversity, and from 25 countries across five continents – were chosen in 2022 from more than 360 applicants, and have demonstrated their passion for using sport as a tool for social and economic change.

Name: Boxingclub Magic
Description:
Boxingclub Magic helpt fitnessclubs en sportscholen om PINK-& CROSSboxing strategisch te implementeren. Wij begeleiden clubs niet alleen bij de licentie, maar denken ook mee over hoe boksen méér kan zijn dan een groepsles – een concept dat leden aantrekt, trainers ontwikkelt en de club laat groeien.

Wat wij bieden:
 Implementatie van het licentiemodel – Wij begeleiden je stap voor stap bij het succesvol integreren van PINK-& CROSSboxing in jouw club.
 Opleiding van jouw personeel – Zodat iedereen dezelfde taal en kwaliteit levert, én jij als clubmanager wordt ontlast.
 Elke drie maanden een masterclass – Voor de doorlopende ontwikkeling van je instructeurs en trainers.
 Strategisch advies – Hoe haal je het maximale uit boksen? Wij helpen je bij ledenbinding, aanboduitbreiding en groei.
 Beleving als succesfactor – Boksen is niet zomaar een workout, het is een community. Wij helpen je om deze beleving neer te zetten en te laten groeien.

Waarom samenwerken met Boxingclub Magic?
 Bewezen succesvolle concepten die leden enthousiast maken en binden
 Een gestroomlijnde aanpak waarmee je trainers zich blijven ontwikkelen
 Meer dan een les – een strategische uitbreiding van je aanbod
 Ondersteuning in marketing, positionering en clubgroei

Klaar om boksen als krachtig concept in jouw club te integreren? Neem contact met ons op!

Geboren Zwemmers vindt het dan ook superbelangrijk dat ook de allerkleinste kinderen weten wat ze moeten doen als ze in het water vallen en hoe ze veiliger in en rondom het water kunnen spelen.

- Pre-survival babyzwemmen
- Drijf!
- Zwem-drijf-zwem
- Pre-diploma zwemmen

De kern van alle zwemmogelijkheden bestaat uit het kind zelfredzaam maken in en rondom het water.

Nous croyons que le sport peut être un outil puissant pour l'émancipation et l'épanouissement des enfants. 

Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus sur notre association ou si vous souhaitez nous soutenir, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter.

Ensemble, créons un monde où le sport apporte le sourire !

Name: Windridge Tennis & Sports Camps
Description:
The “Windridge Experience” is based on our mission and a commitment to hard work, good sportsmanship, and wholesome fun and laughter within a warm and friendly environment.

Our philosophy is centered on the belief that young people who are encouraged to do well in areas that they enjoy will show positive personal growth. By providing a wide range of instruction in sports and an opportunity for supervised group living, we are able to give campers the fundamentals they need for fulfilling their individual potential. 

Within the Windridge community, youngsters discover the meaning of trust and respect for others and are able to realize confidence in themselves as well as compassion and good feelings toward those around them.

Name: Sri Lanka Dunks
Description: Sri Lanka Dunks was founded in 2024 with a vision to bridge the gap between Sri Lankan athletes and the latest advancements in sports science. Recognising that our athletes were falling behind due to outdated training methods, I took the initiative to introduce modern jump training and strength & conditioning techniques used by top athletes worldwide. With over a decade of experience in national and international competitions, and training under NBA Strength & Conditioning coach Jimmy Mullins, I launched Sri Lanka’s first-ever dunk community and vertical jump program. Our mission is to revolutionise athletic performance in Sri Lanka by integrating cutting-edge training methods, biomechanics, and injury prevention strategies, ensuring that our athletes can compete at the highest level.

Name: Phoenix Yacht Club
Description:
Training - The club is a recognised RYA Training Centre, so there is plenty of opportunity to broaden your sailing experience. We are fortunate to have a number of RYA Instructors who can teach our members the range of RYA practical courses from Competent Crew, through Day Skipper to Yachtmaster Coastal and Offshore. These are normally taught as five-day (Monday-Friday) courses, with Yachtmaster exams being conducted by an independent RYA examiner over the weekend following the preparation course. In addition to certificated RYA training we also teach useful skills development short-courses such as boat handling and spinnaker training.

Cruising - The club undertakes cruises which can range from a day sail, or several days trip around the Solent to an extended expedition around the Mediterranean. The passage plan is determined by the experience of a club approved skipper. A highlight of the year is the summer cruise, and the club has been as far afield as the Baltic, Mediterranean, Spain as well as around Britain via the Caledonian Canal.
In 2023 we are off to Scotland

Racing - Both our yachts usually sail in the Round the Island race, with the handicap system levelling their performance. we are honing our racing skills in both RORC and the JOG series in 2023.

Name: WANDERBIRD HIKE & FLY
Description:
At WANDERBIRD Events you play the game of hike & fly together with like-minded people who want to have a good time and race. But what is the difference to other Hike&Fly Events?

WANDERBIRD Events are designed around our highest values: Inclusiveness, Courage (for development), Appreciation, Fun and Safety. 
This means our racing routes are designed so everybody can take part- from beginner, to pro. With that and the route design itself, we are building a learning environment, because you will meet and see the more advanced athletes not only once at the start line, but multiple times throughout the race!



Apart from the actual race on Saturday, we give you the opportunity to make more of your time and motivation with a variety of workshops- from just after your arrival on Friday, all the way to Sunday afternoon- because we appreciate every minute you choose to invest in your development.


And for those who want to really go all in, we are also going all in, by offering the ‚Become a Wanderbird‘ Coaching Program, in which Paul and Veronika will exclusively be available with a special program, for a very limited amount of athletes, throughout the weekend, to take you to the next level.
